Matthew1:1 Dore igitabo cy’amasekuruza ya Yezu Kristu, umwana wa Dawudi, mwene Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu yabyaye Izaki, Izaki abyara Yakobo, Yakobo abyara Yuda n’abavandimwe be," 
Matthew1:3 Yuda abyara Faresi na Zara, kuri Tamara, Faresi abyara Esiromi, Esiromi abyara Aramu." 
Matthew1:4 Aramu abyara Aminadabu, Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni, Nahasoni abyara Salimoni." 
Matthew1:5 Salimoni abyara Bowozi, kuri Rahabu, Bowozi abyara Yobedi, kuri Ruta, Yobedi abyara Yese," 
Matthew1:6 Yese abyara umwami Dawudi. Dawudi abyara Salomoni, ku mugore wa Uriya," 
Matthew1:7 Salomoni abyara Robowamu, Robowamu abyara Abiya, Abiya abyara Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa abyara Yozafati, Yozafati abyara Yoramu, Yoramu abyara Oziyasi," 
Matthew1:9 Oziyasi abyara Yowatamu, Yowatamu abyara Akazi, Akazi abyara Ezekiyasi," 
Matthew1:10 Ezekiyasi abyara Manase, Manase abyara Amoni, Amoni abyara Yoziyasi," 
Matthew1:11 Yoziyasi abyara Yekoniyasi na barumuna be, igihe bajyanwa bunyago i Babiloni." 
Matthew1:12 Ijyanwabunyago ry’i Babiloni rirangiye Yekoniyasi abyara Salatiyeli, Salatiyeli abyara Zorobabeli," 
Matthew1:13 Zorobabeli abyara Abiyudi, Abiyudi abyara Eliyakimu, Eliyakimu abyara Azori," 
Matthew1:14 Azori abyara Sadoki, Sadoki abyara Akimu, Akimu abyara Eliyudi," 
Matthew1:15 Eliyudi abyara Eleyazari, Eleyazari abyara Matani, Matani abyara Yakobo," 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo abyara Yozefu, umugabo wa Mariya ari we wabyaye Yezu witwa Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Ibisekuruza byose hamwe rero ni ibi: kuva kuri Abrahamu kugeza kuri Dawudi, ni ibisekuruza cumi na bine; kuva kuri Dawudi kugera ku ijyanwabunyago ry’i Babiloni, ni ibisekuruza cumi na bine; kuva ku ijyanwabunyago ry’i Babiloni kugera kuri Kristu, ni ibisekuruza cumi na bine." 
Matthew1:18 Dore uko Yezu Kristu yavutse. Nyina Mariya yari yarasabwe na Yozefu; mu gihe batarabana, aza gusama inda ku bubasha bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Matthew1:19 Yozefu, umugabo we, wari intungane kandi utashakaga kumuteza urubwa, yigira inama yo kumusezerera rwihishwa." 
Matthew1:20 Igihe yari akibizirikana, Umumalayika wa Nyagasani amubonekera mu nzozi, aramubwira ati «Yozefu, mwana wa Dawudi, witinya kuzana umugeni wawe Mariya, kuko yasamye ku bubasha bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Matthew1:21 Azabyara umwana uzamwite Yezu, kuko ari we uzakiza umuryango we ibyaha byawo.»" 
Matthew1:22 Ibyo byose ariko byabereye kugira ngo huzuzwe ibyo Nyagasani yavugishije umuhanuzi ati 
Matthew1:23 «Dore Umukobwa w’isugi agiye gusama inda, maze azabyare umuhungu, nuko bazamwite Emanuweli», ari byo kuvuga ngo «Imana turi kumwe.»" 
Matthew1:24 Yozefu akangutse abigenza uko Umumalayika wa Nyagasani yamutegetse nuko azana umugeni we. 
Matthew1:25 Ariko ntiyamwegera kugeza igihe Mariya abyariye umwana w’umuhungu nuko amwita Yezu. 
Matthew2:1 Yezu amaze kuvukira i Betelehemu ya Yudeya ku ngoma y’umwami Herodi, abanyabwenge baturutse iburasirazuba baza i Yeruzalemu," 
Matthew2:2 babaza bati «Umwami w’Abayahudi uherutse kuvuka ari hehe? Twabonye inyenyeri ye mu burasirazuba, none tuje kumuramya.»" 
Matthew2:3 Umwami Herodi abyumvise, akuka umutima, we na Yeruzalemu yose." 
Matthew2:4 Akoranya abatware bose b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko b’umuryango, abasiganuza aho Kristu yagombaga kuzavukira." 
Matthew2:5 Baramusubiza bati «Ni i Betelehemu ya Yudeya; kuko ari byo umuhanuzi yanditse ati 
Matthew2:6 ’Nawe, Betelehemu, umusozi wo muri Yudeya, si wowe giseswa mu migi yaho yose; kuko ari wowe uzaturukaho umutware uzaragira umuryango wanjye, Israheli’.»" 
Matthew2:7 Nuko Herodi atumiza ba banyabwenge rwihishwa, abasiganuza igihe inyenyeri yabonekeye," 
Matthew2:8 abohereza i Betelehemu, ababwira ati «Nimugende mubaririze iby’uwo mwana; maze nimumubona, muzabimenyeshe kugira ngo nanjye njye kumuramya.»" 
Matthew2:9 Bamaze kumva amagambo y’umwami, baragenda. Nuko ya nyenyeri bari baboneye mu burasirazuba ibajya imbere irinda igera hejuru y’aho umwana yari ari, irahahagarara." 
Matthew2:10 Ngo babone inyenyeri barishima cyane. 
Matthew2:11 Binjiye mu nzu babona umwana, na nyina Mariya; nuko barapfukama baramuramya. Hanyuma bapfundura impago zabo, bamutura zahabu, ububani n’imibavu." 
Matthew2:12 Cyakora baburirwa mu nzozi kudasubira kwa Herodi, banyura indi nzira basubira mu gihugu cyabo." 
Matthew2:13 Bamaze kugenda, Umumalayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Yozefu mu nzozi, aramubwira ati «Byuka, ujyane umwana na nyina, uhungire mu Misiri; maze ugumeyo kugeza igihe nzakubwirira, kuko Herodi agiye guhigahiga umwana ngo amwice.»" 
Matthew2:14 Yozefu arabyuka, ajyana umwana na nyina iryo joro, maze ahungira mu Misiri." 
Matthew2:15 Nuko abayo kugeza igihe Herodi apfiriye. Ibyo byabereye kugira ngo huzuzwe ibyo Nyagasani yavugishije umuhanuzi ati «Nahamagaye umwana wanjye wari mu Misiri.» 
Matthew2:16 Nuko Herodi abonye ko abanyabwenge bamubeshye, ararakara cyane, maze yohereza abica abana bose bo kuri Betelehemu n’abo ku mirenge yose iyikikije, bamaze imyaka ibiri n’abatarayigezaho, akurikije igihe yari yasobanuriwe n’abanyabwenge." 
Matthew2:17 Nuko huzuzwa ibyo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yavuze ati 
Matthew2:18 «Kuri Rama bumvise ijwi riboroga riganya cyane: ni Rasheli uririra abana be, kandi yanze guhozwa kuko batakiriho.»" 
Matthew2:19 Herodi amaze gupfa, Umumalayika wa Nyagasani abonekera Yozefu mu nzozi akiri mu Misiri;" 
Matthew2:20 aramubwira ati «Haguruka, ujyane umwana na nyina, usubire mu gihugu cya Israheli; kuko abashakaga kwica umwana bapfuye»." 
Matthew2:21 Yozefu arabyuka, ajyana umwana na nyina, asubira mu gihugu cya Israheli." 
Matthew2:22 Ariko yumvise ko Arikelawusi yazunguye se Herodi mu Yudeya, atinya kujyayo. Nk’uko rero yabisobanuriwe mu nzozi, agana mu karere ka Galileya," 
Matthew2:23 ajya gutura ku musozi witwa Nazareti. Bityo huzuzwa ibyavuzwe n’abahanuzi, ngo «Azitwa Umunyanazareti»." 
Matthew3:1 Muri iyo minsi, Yohani Batisita atangira kwigishiriza mu butayu bwa Yudeya," 
Matthew3:2 avuga ati «Nimwisubireho, kuko Ingoma y’ijuru yegereje!»" 
Matthew3:3 Uwo ni we wavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Izayi, ati «Ni ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutegure inzira ya Nyagasani, muringanize aho azanyura!’»" 
Matthew3:4 Yohani uwo yambaraga umwambaro uboheshejwe ubwoya bw’ingamiya, agakenyeza umukoba; ibyo kurya bye byari isanane n’ubuki bw’ubuhura." 
Matthew3:5 Nuko abaturage b’i Yeruzalemu, n’abo muri Yudeya yose, n’abo mu ntara yose ya Yorudani bakamusanga," 
Matthew3:6 bakabatirizwa na we mu ruzi rwa Yorudani, babanje kwiyemeza ibyaha byabo mu ruhame." 
Matthew3:7 Abonye Abafarizayi n’Abasaduseyi benshi baje kubatizwa, arababwira ati «Mwa nyoko z’impiri mwe, ni nde wababwirije guhunga uburakari bwegereje?" 
Matthew3:8 Noneho nimugaragaze imigenzereze ikwiranye n’ukwisubiraho nyako! 
Matthew3:9 Kandi ntimwitwaze ngo ’Abrahamu ni we mubyeyi wacu!’ Ndanabiberuriye, ndetse aya mabuye muruzi, Imana ishobora kuyabyutsamo abana ba Abrahamu." 
Matthew3:10 Dore intorezo irambitse ku mizi y’ibiti; none igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza kigiye gutemwa maze gicanwe. 
Matthew3:11 Jyewe ndababatirisha amazi kugira ngo mwisubireho, ariko Uje ankurikiye andusha ububasha, ndetse sinkwiriye no kumukuramo inkweto; We azababatirisha Roho Mutagatifu n’umuriro." 
Matthew3:12 Afite urutaro mu ntoki, kandi agiye gukubura imbuga ye: hanyuma azahunika ingano ze mu kigega, naho imishishi ayitwikishe umuriro utazima.»" 
Matthew3:13 Nuko Yezu ava mu Galileya ajya kuri Yorudani, asanga Yohani kugira ngo abatizwe na we." 
Matthew3:14 Yohani ashaka kumuhakanira ati «Ni jye ukeneye kubatizwa nawe, none uransanze!»" 
Matthew3:15 Ariko Yezu aramusubiza ati «Emera ubikore, tubone kuzuza dutyo icyo Imana ishaka.» Nuko aramwemerera." 
Matthew3:16 Yezu amaze kubatizwa, ako kanya ava mu mazi. Ubwo ijuru rirakinguka: abona Roho w’Imana amanuka nk’inuma, amuhagarara hejuru." 
Matthew3:17 Ubwo ijwi rituruka mu ijuru rivuga riti «Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane unyizihira.» 
Matthew4:1 Hanyuma Yezu ajyanwa na Roho Mutagatifu mu butayu kugira ngo ashukwe na Sekibi. 
Matthew4:2 Asiba kurya iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine, hanyuma arasonza." 
Matthew4:3 Nuko Umushukanyi aramwegera, aramubwira ati «Niba uri Umwana w’Imana, tegeka aya mabuye ahinduke imigati.»" 
Matthew4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Haranditswe ngo ’Umuntu ntatungwa n’umugati gusa, ahubwo atungwa n’ijambo ryose rivuye mu kanwa k’Imana.’»" 
Matthew4:5 Nuko Umushukanyi amujyana mu murwa mutagatifu, amuhagarika ku gasongero k’Ingoro," 
Matthew4:6 maze aramubwira ati «Niba uri Umwana w’Imana, ijugunye hasi; kuko handitswe ngo ’Izategeka abamalayika bayo kuzagusama, kugira ngo udasitara ku ibuye.’»" 
Matthew4:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Biranditswe kandi ngo ’Ntuzagerageze Nyagasani, Imana yawe.’»" 
Matthew4:8 Umushukanyi yongera kumujyana ku musozi muremure, amwereka ingoma zose z’isi n’ubukire bwazo," 
Matthew4:9 nuko aramubwira ati «Ibyo byose nzabikugabira, numfukamira ukandamya.»" 
Matthew4:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Igirayo, Sekibi, kuko handitswe ngo ’Uzaramye Nyagasani, Imana yawe, abe ari We uzakorera wenyine.’»" 
Matthew4:11 Umushukanyi amusiga aho. Ubwo abamalayika baramwegera, baramuhereza." 
Matthew4:12 Yezu yumvise ko Yohani yatanzwe, yigira mu Galileya," 
Matthew4:13 yimuka i Nazareti, ajya kuba i Kafarinawumu ku nkuka y’inyanja, mu rugabano rwa Zabuloni na Nefutali," 
Matthew4:14 kugira ngo huzuzwe ibyo umuhanuzi Izayi yavuze ati 
Matthew4:15 «Gihugu cya Zabuloni, nawe gihugu cya Nefutali, nzira igana inyanja, hakurya ya Yorudani, Galileya y’abanyamahanga!" 
Matthew4:16 Imbaga yari yigungiye mu mwijima yabonye urumuri rutangaje; n’abari batuye mu gihugu gicuze umwijima w’urupfu, urumuri rwabarasiyeho.»" 
Matthew4:17 Guhera ubwo Yezu atangira kwigisha, agira ati «Nimwisubireho, kuko Ingoma y’ijuru yegereje!»" 
Matthew4:18 Nuko igihe yagendaga ku nkombe y’inyanja ya Galileya, abona abavandimwe babiri, Simoni bita Petero na Andereya murumuna we; bariho baroha inshundura mu nyanja, kuko bari abarobyi." 
Matthew4:19 Arababwira ati «Nimunkurikire, nzabagira abarobyi b’abantu.»" 
Matthew4:20 Ako kanya basiga aho inshundura zabo, baramukurikira." 
Matthew4:21 Yigiye imbere, abona abandi bavandimwe babiri, Yakobo mwene Zebedeyi, na murumuna we Yohani, bari mu bwato hamwe na se Zebedeyi; bariho basana inshundura zabo. Nuko arabahamagara." 
Matthew4:22 Ako kanya basiga aho ubwato na se, baramukurikira." 
Matthew4:23 Nuko Yezu azenguruka Galileya yose, yigishiriza mu masengero yabo, atangaza Inkuru Nziza y’Ingoma, akiza icyitwa indwara n’ubumuga cyose muri rubanda." 
Matthew4:24 Ubugiraneza bwe bumenyekana muri Siriya yose, bakajya bamuzanira imbabare zose zifite indwara n’ibyago by’amoko yose: abahanzweho, abanyagicuri, ibimuga, nuko akabakiza." 
Matthew4:25 Maze abantu benshi bavuye muri Galileya no muri Dekapoli, iYeruzalemu no muri Yudeya, no hakurya ya Yorudani, bamuhombokaho." 
Matthew5:1 Yezu abonye icyo kivunge cy’abantu aterera umusozi. Aricara, abigishwa be baramwegera." 
Matthew5:2 Nuko araterura arigisha ati 
Matthew5:3 «Hahirwa abakene ku mutima, kuko Ingoma y’ijuru ari iyabo." 
Matthew5:4 Hahirwa abiyoroshya, kuko bazatunga isi ho umurage." 
Matthew5:5 Hahirwa abababaye, kuko bazahozwa." 
Matthew5:6 Hahirwa abasonzeye ubutungane bakabugirira inyota, kuko bazahozwa." 
Matthew5:7 Hahirwa abagira impuhwe, kuko bazazigirirwa." 
Matthew5:8 Hahirwa abakeye ku mutima, kuko bazabona Imana." 
Matthew5:9 Hahirwa abatera amahoro, kuko bazitwa abana b’Imana." 
Matthew5:10 Hahirwa abatotezwa bazira ubutungane, kuko Ingoma y’ijuru ari iyabo." 
Matthew5:11 Murahirwa nibabatuka, bakabatoteza, bakanababeshyera ku buryo bwose, ari jye babahora." 
Matthew5:12 Nimwishime munezerwe, kuko ingororano yanyu izaba nyinshi mu ijuru! Ni uko batoteje abahanuzi bababanjirije." 
Matthew5:13 Muri umunyu w’isi. Ariko se umunyu wakayutse, bawusubirishamo iki uburyohe? Nta kandi kamaro kawo kereka kujugunywa hanze, ugakandagirwa n’abantu." 
Matthew5:14 Muri urumuri rw’isi. Ikigo cyubatse mu mpinga y’umusozi nticyihishira. 
Matthew5:15 Kandi nta we ucana itara ngo aryubikeho icyibo, ahubwo arishyira ku gitereko cyaryo aho rimurikira abari mu nzu bose." 
Matthew5:16 Urumuri rwanyu niruboneshereze rutyo abantu kugira ngo barebe ibyiza mukora, bakurizeho gusingiza So uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew5:17 Ntimukeke ko naje kuvanaho Amategeko cyangwa Abahanuzi; sinaje gukuraho, ahubwo naje kunonosora." 
Matthew5:18 Koko rero, ndababwira ukuri: kugera igihe ijuru n’isi bizashirira, nta kanyuguti, nta n’akadomo kazava mu Mategeko ibyo byose bitarangiye." 
Matthew5:19 Nuko rero, uzarenga kuri rimwe muri ayo mategeko yoroheje, kandi akigisha n’abandi kugenza batyo, azitwa igiseswa mu Ngoma y’ijuru. Naho uzajya ayakurikiza akayatoza abandi, azitwa umuntu ukomeye mu Ngoma y’ijuru." 
Matthew5:20 Reka kandi mbabwire: niba ubutungane bwanyu budasumba ubw’abigishamategeko n’abafarizayi, nta bwo muzinjira mu Ngoma y’ijuru." 
Matthew5:21 Mwumvise ko abakurambere babwiwe ngo ’Ntuzice’, kandi nihagira uwica, azabibarizwa mu rubanza." 
Matthew5:22 Jyewe mbabwiye ko umuntu wese urakariye mugenzi we, azabibarizwa mu rukiko; naho nabwira mugenzi we ’Gicucu!’ azabibarizwa mu Nama Nkuru; namubwira ati ’Uri umusazi!’, azishyurira mu nyenga y’umuriro." 
Matthew5:23 Nuko rero nujyana ituro ryawe imbere y’urutambiro, ukahibukira ko mugenzi wawe mufitanye akantu," 
Matthew5:24 rekera ituro ryawe imbere y’urutambiro, ubanze ujye kwigorora na mugenzi wawe; hanyuma ugaruke ubone guhereza ituro ryawe." 
Matthew5:25 Jya ugira ubwira bwo kwiyunga n’uwo mwangana, igihe mukiri kumwe mu nzira kugira ngo ataguteza umucamanza, umucamanza akagushyikiriza umupolisi, ubwo ukaba uroshywe mu buroko." 
Matthew5:26 Mbikubwize ukuri: nta bwo uzavamo utishyuye byose, kugeza ku giceri cya nyuma." 
Matthew5:27 Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo ’Ntuzasambane’," 
Matthew5:28 jyeweho, mbabwiye ko ureba umugore akamwifuza, mu mutima we aba yamusambanyije." 
Matthew5:29 Ijisho ryawe ry’iburyo nirikubera impamvu yo gukora icyaha, rinogore urijugunye kure yawe: ikigufitiye akamaro ni ukubura rumwe mu ngingo zawe, aho kubona umubiri wose utawe mu nyenga y’umuriro." 
Matthew5:30 Niba ikiganza cy’iburyo kigutera gukora icyaha, gice ukijugunye kure yawe: ikiruta ni uko wabura rumwe mu ngingo zawe, aho kubona umubiri wawe wose ugiye mu nyenga y’umuriro." 
Matthew5:31 Kandi byaravuzwe ngo ’Usenze umugore we agomba kumuha urwandiko rwo kumusenda’. 
Matthew5:32 Naho jye mbabwiye ko umuntu wese usenda umugore we — usibye iyo babanaga bitemewe — aba amuteye gusambana; n’ucyura umugore wasenzwe, aba asambanye." 
Matthew5:33 Mwumvise kandi ko abakurambere babwiwe ngo ’Ntuzarahire ibinyoma ahubwo uzahigura Nyagasani ibyo wamusezeranije mu ndahiro’. 
Matthew5:34 Jyeweho mbabwiye kutarahira na gato: ari ukurahira ijuru, kuko ari inteko y’Imana;" 
Matthew5:35 ari ukurahira isi, kuko ari umusego w’ibirenge byayo; ari na Yeruzalemu, kuko ari Umurwa w’Umwami mukuru." 
Matthew5:36 Ntukarahize n’umutwe wawe, kuko udashobora guhindura n’umwe mu misatsi yawe umweru cyangwa igikara." 
Matthew5:37 Mujye muvuga muti ’Yego’, niba ari yego, cyangwa ’Oya’, niba ari oya; ibigeretsweho bindi biba biturutse kuri Sekibi." 
Matthew5:38 Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo ’Ijisho rihorerwe ijisho, iryinyo rihorerwe irindi ’." 
Matthew5:39 Jyeweho mbabwiye kudashyamirana n’umugiranabi; ahubwo nihagira ugukubita urushyi mu musaya w’iburyo, mutegeze n’uwundi." 
Matthew5:40 Nihagira ushaka kukuburanya ngo agutware ikanzu yawe, mwegurire n’igishura cyawe." 
Matthew5:41 Nihagira uguhatira gutera intambwe igihumbi, muterane ibihumbi bibiri." 
Matthew5:42 Ugusabye, umuhe; n’ushatse ko umuguriza, ntukamwihunze." 
Matthew5:43 Mwumvise ko byavuzwe ngo ’Uzakunde mugenzi wawe, wange umwanzi wawe.’" 
Matthew5:44 Jyeweho ndababwira ngo ’Nimukunde ababanga, musabire ababatoteza’." 
Matthew5:45 Bityo muzabe abana ba So uri mu ijuru, We uvusha izuba rye ku babi no ku beza, kandi akavubira imvura abatunganye n’abadatunganye." 
Matthew5:46 Nimwikundira gusa ababakunda, muzahemberwa iki? Ese abasoresha bo, si ko babigenza?" 
Matthew5:47 Maze se nimuramutsa gusa abo muva inda imwe, muzaba murushije iki abandi? Ese abatazi Imana bo, si ko babigenza?" 
Matthew5:48 Mwebweho rero, muzabe intungane nk’uko So wo mu ijuru ari intungane." 
Matthew6:1 Murajye mwirinda kugira neza mu maso y’abantu mugira ngo babarebe; mwaba mwivukije ingororano kwa So mu ijuru. 
Matthew6:2 Igihe rero utanga imfashanyo, ntukavugishe ihembe imbere yawe, nk’uko indyarya zibigira mu masengero no mu mayira, kugira ngo baratwe n’abantu. Ndababwira ukuri: baba bashyikiriye ingororano yabo." 
Matthew6:3 Naho wowe, nutanga imfashanyo, ikiganza cyawe cy’ibumoso ntikikamenye icyo icy’iburyo gikora," 
Matthew6:4 bityo imfashanyo yawe ijye igirirwa mu ibanga; maze So umenya ibyihishe, azabikwiture." 
Matthew6:5 Igihe musenga, ntimukagenze nk’ indyarya zikunda gusenga zihagaze mu masengero no mu mayirabiri, ngo zibonwe n’abantu. Ndababwira ukuri: baba bashyikiriye ingororano yabo." 
Matthew6:6 Naho wowe, nushaka gusenga, ujye winjira mu nzu yawe, ukinge, maze usenge So uri aho atagaragara; maze So umenya ibyihishe, azabikwiture." 
Matthew6:7 Igihe musenga, ntimugasukiranye amagambo nk’abatazi Imana, bibwira ko amagambo menshi ari yo atuma bumvwa neza." 
Matthew6:8 Ntimukagenze nka bo; kuko So azi neza icyo mukeneye, na mbere y’uko mukimusaba." 
Matthew6:9 Mwebwe rero mujye musenga, mugira muti: Dawe uri mu ijuru, izina ryawe ryubahwe," 
Matthew6:10 Ubwami bwawe nibuze, icyo ushaka gikorwe mu nsi nk’uko gikorwa mu ijuru." 
Matthew6:11 Ifunguro ridutunga uriduhe none. 
Matthew6:12 Utubabarire ibicumuro byacu, nk’uko natwe tubabarira abaducumuyeho." 
Matthew6:13 Ntudutererane mu bitwoshya, ahubwo udukize ikibi." 
Matthew6:14 Koko, nimubabarira abantu amakosa yabo, So wo mu ijuru na We azabababarira ayanyu." 
Matthew6:15 Naho nimutababarira abantu, na So ntazabababarira amakosa yanyu." 
Matthew6:16 Igihe musiba kurya, ntimukijime mu maso nk’uko indyarya zibigira: zikambya agahanga kugira ngo babone ko zisiba. Ndababwira ukuri: ziba zashyikiriye ingororano yazo." 
Matthew6:17 Wowe rero nusiba kurya, ujye wisiga mu mutwe, wiyuhagire mu maso," 
Matthew6:18 kugira ngo utamenyesha abantu ko usiba, ahubwo bimenywe na So uri aho atagaragara; maze So umenya ibyihishe, azabikwiture." 
Matthew6:19 Ntimugashakire ubukungu hano mu nsi, aho udusimba n’imungu byonona, aho abajura baca ibyuho bakiba." 
Matthew6:20 Ahubwo mwizigamire ubukungu mu ijuru, aho udusimba n’imungu bitonona, aho abajura badaca ibyuho ngo bibe." 
Matthew6:21 Kuko, aho ubukungu bwawe buri, ni ho n’umutima wawe uzaba uri." 
Matthew6:22 Itara ry’umubiri ni ijisho. Niba rero ijisho ryawe ridafite inenge, umubiri wawe wose uzamurikirwa." 
Matthew6:23 Naho niba ijisho ryawe ari ribi, umubiri wawe wose uzaba mu mwijima. Noneho se, niba urumuri rukurimo ruhindutse umwijima, uwo mwijima uzangana iki!" 
Matthew6:24 Nta wushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri: azanga umwe akunde undi, cyangwa azibanda kuri umwe, asuzugure undi. Ntimushobora gukorera Imana na Bintu." 
Matthew6:25 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ’Mwihagarikwa imitima n’uko muzamera, ari ku bibatunga cyangwa ku byo muzambika umubiri wanyu.’ Ubugingo se ntiburuta ibyo kurya? Umubiri se wo nturuta umwambaro?" 
Matthew6:26 Nimurebe inyoni zo mu kirere: ntizibiba, ntizisarura, ntizihunika mu bigega, nyamara So wo mu ijuru arazigaburira! Mwebwe se, ntimuzitambukije agaciro?" 
Matthew6:27 Ni nde muri mwe, n’aho yahagarika umutima ate, washobora kugira icyo yongera ku bugingo bwe?" 
Matthew6:28 Imyambaro yo yabahagarikira iki umutima? Nimwitegereze indabo zo mu gasozi uko zikura: ntiziruha, ntiziboha." 
Matthew6:29 Nyamara rero ndababwira ko na Salomoni mu bukire bwe bwose atigeze yambara nka rumwe muri zo. 
Matthew6:30 Niba Imana yambika ityo icyatsi cyo mu murima kiriho none, ejo kikazatabwa mu muriro, mwe ntizabarengerezaho, mwa bemera gato mwe?" 
Matthew6:31 Mwibunza rero imitima muvuga ngo ’Tuzarya iki? Tuzanywa iki? Tuzambara iki? 
Matthew6:32 Ni ibyo byose abanyamahanga bahihibikanira. So wo mu ijuru azi ko ibyo byose mubikeneye. 
Matthew6:33 Ahubwo mbere na mbere nimuharanire Ingoma n’ubutungane bwayo, naho ibindi byose muzabigerekerwaho." 
Matthew6:34 Mwiterwa impagarara n’iby’ejo: umunsi w’ejo uzazana impagarara zawo. Umuruho wa buri munsi urahagije. 
Matthew7:1 Mwica urubanza namwe mutazarucirwa," 
Matthew7:2 kuko, uko muzaba mwaziciye, ni ko muzazicirwa, n’igipimisho muzageresha, ni cyo namwe muzagererwamo." 
Matthew7:3 Kuki ubona akatsi kari mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe, ariko umugogo uri mu jisho ryawe ntuwubone?" 
Matthew7:4 Ubwo se wabwira ute mugenzi wawe uti ’Reka ngutokore akatsi kakuri mu jisho’ kandi utareba umugogo uri mu ryawe? 
Matthew7:5 Wa ndyarya we, banza ukure umugogo uri mu jisho ryawe, hanyuma uzabone neza, ushobore gutokora akatsi ko mu jisho rya mugenzi wawe." 
Matthew7:6 Ikintu gitagatifu ntimukakigabize imbwa, amasaro yanyu ntimukayajugunye imbere y’ingurube: hato zitayaribata hanyuma zikabahindukirana zikabashiha." 
Matthew7:7 Musabe, muzahabwa; mushakashake, muzaronka; mukomange, muzakingurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Kuko usaba wese ahabwa; ushakashatse akaronka, n’ukomanze agakingurirwa." 
Matthew7:9 Mbese ni nde muntu muri mwe, umwana we yasaba umugati, akamuhereza ibuye?" 
Matthew7:10 Cyangwa se, yamusaba ifi, akamuhereza inzoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Niba rero, mwebwe n’ububi bwanyu, muzi guha abana banyu ibintu byiza, So uri mu ijuru azarushaho ate guha ibyiza abamusabye?" 
Matthew7:12 Ibyo mwifuza ko abandi babagirira byose, namwe muzajye mubibagirira: ngayo Amategeko n’Abahanuzi." 
Matthew7:13 Nimwinjirire mu muryango ufunganye, kuko umuryango wagutse n’inzira y’igihogere ari byo bijyana mu cyorezo, kandi abahanyura ni benshi." 
Matthew7:14 Mbega ukuntu umuryango ugana mu bugingo ufunganye, n’inzira ijyayo ikaba impatanwa, maze bikabonwa na bake!" 
Matthew7:15 Muritondere abahanurabinyoma babasanga, inyuma basa n’intama, naho imbere ari ibirura by’ibihubuzi." 
Matthew7:16 Muzabamenyera ku mbuto bera. Hari usoroma imizabibu ku mahwa? Cyangwa se imitini ku mikeri? 
Matthew7:17 Burya igiti cyose cyiza cyera imbuto nziza, naho igiti kibi kikera imbuto mbi." 
Matthew7:18 Igiti cyiza ntigishobora kwera imbuto mbi, n’igiti kibi ntigishobora kwera imbuto nziza." 
Matthew7:19 Igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza baragitema, bakakijugunya mu muriro." 
Matthew7:20 Nuko rero, muzabamenyera ku mbuto bera." 
Matthew7:21 Umbwira wese ngo ’ Nyagasani, Nyagasani ', si we uzinjira mu ngoma y’ijuru, ahubwo ni ukora ibyo Data uri mu ijuru ashaka." 
Matthew7:22 Benshi bazambwira uwo munsi bati ’Nyagasani, Nyagasani, ese ntitwahanuye mu izina ryawe? Ese ntitwirukanye roho mbi mu izina ryawe? Ese ntitwakoze ibitangaza byinshi mu izina ryawe?" 
Matthew7:23 Ubwo nzaba bwira nti ’Sinigeze mbamenya; nimwigireyo, mwa nkozi z’ibibi mwe!’" 
Matthew7:24 Nuko rero, umuntu wese wumva ayo magambo maze kuvuga, kandi akayakurikiza, ameze nk’umuntu w’umunyabwenge wubatse inzu ye ku rutare." 
Matthew7:25 Imvura yaraguye, imivu iratemba, imiyaga irahuha, bikoranira kuri ya nzu ariko ntiyatemba; kuko yari yubatse ku rutare!" 
Matthew7:26 Naho uwumva wese ayo magambo maze kuvuga, ntayakurikize, ameze nk’umuntu w’umusazi wubatse inzu ye ku musenyi." 
Matthew7:27 Imvura yaraguye, imivu iratemba, imiyaga irahuha, bikoranira kuri ya nzu, irahirima; ihinduka ubushingwe!»" 
Matthew7:28 Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo, rubanda batangarira ibyo yigishije," 
Matthew7:29 kuko yigishaga nk’umuntu ufite ububasha, atameze nk’abigishamategeko babo." 
Matthew8:1 Igihe Yezu amanutse umusozi, abantu benshi baramukurikira." 
Matthew8:2 Nuko haza umubembe amupfukama imbere, aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, ubishatse wankiza.»" 
Matthew8:3 Yezu arambura ukuboko, amukoraho, avuga ati «Ndabishatse, kira.» Ako kanya ibibembe bye birakira." 
Matthew8:4 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati «Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira, ahubwo genda, wiyereke umuherezabitambo kandi utange ituro ryategetswe na Musa ngo ribabere icyemezo cy’uko wakize.»" 
Matthew8:5 Yezu abaye akinjira muri Kafarinawumu, umutegeka w’abasirikare aramwegera, aramwinginga, avuga ati" 
Matthew8:6 «Nyagasani, umugaragu wanjye aryamye mu nzu iwanjye; ni ikimuga kitinyagambura kandi arababaye cyane»." 
Matthew8:7 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ndaje mukize». 
Matthew8:8 Uwo mutegeka aravuga ati «Nyagasani, sinkwiye ko wakwinjira mu nzu yanjye, ariko uvuge ijambo rimwe gusa maze umugaragu wanjye akire." 
Matthew8:9 N’ubwo nanjye ndi umuntu utegekwa, mfite abasirikare; nabwira umwe nti ’Genda’, akagenda; undi nti ’Ngwino’, akaza; n’umugaragu wanjye nti ’Kora iki’, akagikora.»" 
Matthew8:10 Yezu abyumvise, aratangara maze abwira abamukurikiye, ati «Ndababwira ukuri, muri Israheli nta muntu nigeze nsangana ukwemera nk’uku." 
Matthew8:11 Ndabibabwiye: benshi bazava aho izuba rituruka n’aho rirengera, basangire na Abrahamu na Izaki na Yakobo mu Ngoma y’ijuru," 
Matthew8:12 naho abana b’Ingoma bazatabwa hanze mu mwijima: aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo.» 
Matthew8:13 Hanyuma Yezu abwira uwo mutegeka w’abasirikare, ati «Genda, uko wemeye abe ari ko ugirirwa.» Nuko wa mugaragu akira ako kanya." 
Matthew8:14 Yezu ngo agere kwa Petero, asanga nyirabukwe aryamye, yahinduwe." 
Matthew8:15 Amukoze ku kiganza, ubuganga bumwamukamo, arabyuka aramuzimanira." 
Matthew8:16 Bugorobye, bamuzanira abahanzweho na roho mbi nyinshi; nuko azirukana azikabukira, maze akiza abarwayi bose," 
Matthew8:17 kugira ngo huzuzwe ibyo umuhanuzi Izayi yavuze ati «Yatwunamuye mu ntege nke zacu, yigerekaho n’indwara zacu.»" 
Matthew8:18 Yezu abonye ko ashagawe n’abantu benshi, ategeka ko bafata ku nkombe yo hakurya." 
Matthew8:19 Umwigishamategeko aramwegera ati «Mwigisha, nzagukurikira aho uzajya hose.»" 
Matthew8:20 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Imihari igira amasenga, n’inyoni zo mu kirere zikagira ibyari; naho Umwana w’umuntu we ntagira aho yegeka umutwe.»" 
Matthew8:21 Undi wo mu bigishwa aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, reka mbanze njye guhamba data.»" 
Matthew8:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Nkurikira, ureke abapfu bahambe abapfu babo.»" 
Matthew8:23 Yezu aherekejwe n’abigishwa be, bajya mu bwato." 
Matthew8:24 Ni bwo habyutse umuhengeri mwinshi mu nyanja, imivumba irenga ubwato. Nyamara we yari asinziriye." 
Matthew8:25 Baramwegera baramukangura, bavuga bati «Nyagasani, dutabare, turashize!»" 
Matthew8:26 Arababwira ati «Muratinya iki, mwa bemera gato mwe?» Hanyuma arahaguruka, ategeka umuyaga n’inyanja, maze haratuza cyane." 
Matthew8:27 Nuko abo bantu baratangara, baravuga bati «Uyu ni muntu ki, imiyaga n’inyanja byumvira!»" 
Matthew8:28 Amaze gufata inkombe yo hakurya mu gihugu cy’Abanyagadara, abagabo babiri bahanzweho na roho mbi baturuka mu irimbi, baza bamusanga; bari ibintu by’ibinyamaswa, ntihagire utinyuka kunyura iyo nzira." 
Matthew8:29 Nuko barasakuza bati «Uradushakaho iki, Mwana w’Imana? Wazanywe no kuduturumbanya igihe kitaragera?»" 
Matthew8:30 Hirya y’aho rero hakaba umukumbi w’ingurube zarishaga. 
Matthew8:31 Roho mbi ni ko kwinginga Yezu, ziti «Niba utwirukanye, twohereze muri uriya mukumbi w’ingurube.»" 
Matthew8:32 Arazibwira ati «Nimuzijyemo!» Nuko ziva muri abo bantu, zijya muri za ngurube, maze uwo mukumbi wose ukonkoboka mu manga n’umuriri mwinshi, wiroha mu nyanja, urarohama." 
Matthew8:33 Abashumba barahunga, basubira mu mugi, bavuga ibyabaye byose, n’ibyerekeye abahanzweho." 
Matthew8:34 Nuko abatuye umugi bose basanga Yezu; ngo bamubone, baramwinginga ngo abavire mu gihugu." 
Matthew9:1 Yezu amaze kujya mu bwato, arambuka, ajya mu mugi we." 
Matthew9:2 Nuko bamuzanira ikirema kiryamye mu ngobyi. Yezu abonye ukwemera kwabo, abwira ikirema ati «Izere, mwana wanjye, ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe.»" 
Matthew9:3 Bamwe mu bigishamategeko baribwira bati «Uyu muntu aratuka Imana!» 
Matthew9:4 Ariko Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza, arababwira ati «Igituma mutekereza ibidatunganye ni iki?" 
Matthew9:5 Icyoroshye ni ikihe: ari ukuvuga ngo ’Ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe’, cyangwa kuvuga ngo ’Haguruka ugende’?" 
Matthew9:6 None rero, kugira ngo mumenye ko Umwana w’umuntu afite ububasha bwo gukiza ibyaha mu nsi... », abwira ikirema ati «Haguruka, ufate ingobyi yawe, witahire!»" 
Matthew9:7 Arahaguruka, arataha." 
Matthew9:8 Rubanda babibonye, barakangarana; nuko basingiza Imana yahaye abantu ububasha bungana butyo." 
Matthew9:9 Yezu arakomeza, yigiye imbere, abona umuntu wicaye mu biro by’imisoro, akitwa Matayo. Aramubwira ati «Nkurikira!» Arahaguruka, aramukurikira." 
Matthew9:10 Nuko, igihe Yezu yari ku meza iwe, abasoresha benshi n’abanyabyaha baraza, basangira na we n’abigishwa be." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarizayi babibonye, babaza abigishwa be bati «Ni iki gituma umwigisha wanyu asangira n’abasoresha n’abanyabyaha?»" 
Matthew9:12 We rero abyumvise, aravuga ati «Abazima si bo bakeneye umuvuzi, ahubwo ni abarwayi." 
Matthew9:13 Nimugende rero, musiganuze icyo iri jambo rivuga ngo ’Icyo nshaka ni impuhwe, si igitambo.’ Erega sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane, ahubwo abanyabyaha.»" 
Matthew9:14 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani baramusanga, ni ko kumubaza bati «Ni iki gituma twebwe n’Abafarizayi dusiba kurya, naho abigishwa bawe ntibasibe?»" 
Matthew9:15 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Birakwiye se ko abakwe bagira ishavu bakiri kumwe n’umukwe? Ariko hazaza igihe umukwe azabavanwamo, ni bwo bazasiba." 
Matthew9:16 Ntawe utera igitambaro gishya ku mwenda ushaje, kuko icyo kiremo cyakurura uwo mwenda, ukarushaho gucika." 
Matthew9:17 Nta n’ushyira divayi nshya mu masaho ashaje, naho ubundi amasaho yasandara, divayi ikameneka, kandi ya masaho akaba apfuye ubusa. Ubusanzwe bashyira divayi nshya mu masaho mashya, byombi bikarama.»" 
Matthew9:18 Igihe akibabwira, umutware aramwegera, amupfukama imbere, amubwira ati «Umukobwa wanjye amaze gupfa; ngwino umuramburireho ikiganza, arakira.»" 
Matthew9:19 Yezu arahaguruka, aramukurikira n’abigishwa be." 
Matthew9:20 Nuko umugore wari umaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri ava amaraso, amuturuka inyuma, akora ku ncunda z’igishura cye." 
Matthew9:21 Kuko yibwiraga ati «Mfa gusa gukora ku gishura cye ngakira!» 
Matthew9:22 Yezu akebutse aramurabukwa, aravuga ati «Humura, mwana wanjye, ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije.» Ako kanya umugore arakira." 
Matthew9:23 Yezu ageze mu rugo rw’umutware abona abavuza imyironge n’abantu benshi baboroga, aravuga ati" 
Matthew9:24 «Nimuhave, uwo mukobwa ntiyapfuye; arasinziriye.» Nuko baramuseka." 
Matthew9:25 Bamaze gusohora abo bantu, arinjira, amufata ukuboko, maze umukobwa arahaguruka." 
Matthew9:26 Iyo nkuru isakara muri icyo gihugu cyose. 
Matthew9:27 Yezu akomeza kugenda, impumyi ebyiri ziramukurikira, zisakuza, ziti «Mwana wa Dawudi, tugirire impuhwe!»" 
Matthew9:28 Ageze imuhira, impumyi ziramwegera maze arazibaza ati «Mwemera ko nshobora gukora ibyo ngibyo?» Ziti «Yego, Nyagasani.»" 
Matthew9:29 Nuko abakora ku maso, avuga ati «Nibibabere uko mubyemera!»" 
Matthew9:30 Nuko amaso yabo arahumuka. Hanyuma Yezu arabihanangiriza, ati «Mumenye ntihagire ubimenya!»" 
Matthew9:31 Ariko bo bagitirimuka aho, bamwamamaza muri icyo gihugu cyose." 
Matthew9:32 Bakiva aho, bamuzanira umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi yamuteraga kuba ikiragi." 
Matthew9:33 Roho mbi imaze kwirukanwa, icyo kiragi kiravuga. Rubanda baratangara bati «Nta bintu nk’ibi byigeze biboneka muri Israheli!»" 
Matthew9:34 Abafarizayi bo baravuga bati «Sekibi, umutware wa roho mbi, ni we yirukanisha roho mbi.»" 
Matthew9:35 Yezu yazengurukaga imigi yose n’insisiro, yigisha mu masengero yabo, akwiza Inkuru Nziza y’Ingoma, ari na ko akiza icyitwa indwara n’ubumuga bwose." 
Matthew9:36 Abonye iyo mbaga y’abantu, abagirira impuhwe, kuko bari barushye kandi bameze nk’intama zitagira umushumba." 
Matthew9:37 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ati «Imyaka yeze ni myinshi, ariko abakozi ni bakeya;" 
Matthew9:38 nimusabe rero Nyir’imyaka yohereze abakozi mu mirima ye.» 
Matthew10:1 Amaze guhamagara abigishwa be cumi na babiri, abaha ububasha bwo kuganza roho mbi no kuzirukana, n’ubwo gukiza icyitwa indwara n’icyitwa ubumuga cyose." 
Matthew10:2 Dore amazina y’izo ntumwa cumi n’ebyiri: uwa mbere ni Simoni witwa Petero, na Andereya murumuna we; Yakobo mwene Zebedeyi, na Yohani murumuna we;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo na Baritolomayo, Tomasi na Matayo umusoresha; Yakobo mwene Alufeyi na Tadeyo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni w’i Kana, na Yuda Isikariyoti wa wundi wamugambaniye." 
Matthew10:5 Abo cumi na babiri Yezu abohereza mu butumwa, kandi abihanangiriza agira ati «Ntimwerekeze mu karere k’abanyamahanga kandi ntimwinjire mu migi y’Abanyasamariya;" 
Matthew10:6 ahubwo musange intama zazimiye z’umuryango wa Israheli. 
Matthew10:7 Aho munyura, muvuge ko Ingoma y’ijuru yegereje." 
Matthew10:8 Mukize abarwayi, muzure abapfuye, ababembe mubakize, mwirukane roho mbi. Mwahawe ku buntu, mutange ku buntu." 
Matthew10:9 Ntimwitwaze zahabu, feza cyangwa ibiceri mu mikandara yanyu;" 
Matthew10:10 ntimujyane kandi uruhago rw’urugendo, amakanzu abiri, cyangwa inkweto, habe n’inkoni, kuko umukozi akwiye ifunguro." 
Matthew10:11 Aho mugeze mu mugi cyangwa mu rusisiro, mujye mubaririza umuntu ukwiriye kubakira, maze mugume iwe kugeza igihe muzagendera." 
Matthew10:12 Nimugera iwe, mumwifurize amahoro." 
Matthew10:13 Niba urwo rugo ruyakwiye, amahoro yanyu azarutahemo; niba rutayakwiye, amahoro yanyu azabagarukira." 
Matthew10:14 Nibanga kubakira no kumva amagambo yanyu, muve muri urwo rugo cyangwa muri uwo mugi, mukunguta umukungugu wo ku birenge byanyu." 
Matthew10:15 Ndababwira ukuri: ku munsi w’urubanza, Sodoma na Gomora bizadohorerwa kurusha uwo mugi." 
Matthew10:16 Dore, mbohereje nk’intama mu birura; murabe rero inyaryenge nk’inzoka, mube n’intaryarya nk’inuma." 
Matthew10:17 Muritondere abantu, kuko bazabagabiza inkiko zabo, kandi bakabakubitira mu masengero yabo." 
Matthew10:18 Bazabajyana imbere y’abatware n’abami, ari jye muzira, kugira ngo mumbere abagabo mu maso yabo, n’imbere y’abanyamahanga." 
Matthew10:19 Igihe rero bazabagabiza inkiko, ntimuzakurwe umutima n’ibyo muzavuga n’uburyo muzabivuga; icyo muzavuga muzakibona icyo gihe," 
Matthew10:20 kuko atari mwe muzavuga, ahubwo ni Roho wa So uzabavugiramo." 
Matthew10:21 Umuvandimwe azatanga uwo bava inda imwe, ngo bamwice, umubyeyi n’umwana we bibe uko; bazahinduka abababyaye, babicishe." 
Matthew10:22 Muzangwa na bose muzira izina ryanjye, ariko uzakomera kugeza ku ndunduro, uwo ni we uzarokoka." 
Matthew10:23 Nibabahiga mu mugi uyu n’uyu, muhungire mu wundi. Ndababwira ukuri: Ntimuzarinda guhetura imigi yose ya Israheli, Umwana w’umuntu ataraza." 
Matthew10:24 Umwigishwa ntasumba umwigisha we, n’umugaragu ntasumba shebuja." 
Matthew10:25 Ahubwo umwigishwa nabe nk’umwigisha, n’umugaragu amere nka shebuja, maze ibyo bibe bihagije. Niba nyir’urugo baramwise Belizebuli, bazavuga iki ku bo mu rugo rwe?" 
Matthew10:26 Ntimukabatinye rero, kuko nta kintu gihishe kitazagaragara, nta n’igihishiriwe kitazamenyekana." 
Matthew10:27 Icyo mbabwiriye mu mwijima, muzakivugire ahabona; icyo mbongorereye ahiherereye, muzagitangarize ahirengeye." 
Matthew10:28 Ntimugatinye abica umubiri, ariko badashobora kwica ubugingo; ahubwo mutinye Ushobora kuroha ubuzima n’umubiri icyarimwe mu nyenga y’umuriro." 
Matthew10:29 Mbese ibishwi bibiri ntibigura igiceri? Nyamara nta kigwa hasi muri byo, So atabishaka!" 
Matthew10:30 Naho mwe, imisatsi yo ku mutwe wanyu yose irabaze!" 
Matthew10:31 Ntimugatinye rero: mwebwe murushije agaciro ibishwi byinshi. 
Matthew10:32 Umuntu wese uzanyemera mu maso y’abantu, nanjye nzamwemera imbere ya Data uri mu ijuru;" 
Matthew10:33 naho uzanyihakana mu maso y’abantu, nanjye nzamwihakana mu maso ya Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew10:34 Ntimugire ngo nazanywe no gukwiza amahoro ku isi; sinaje gukwiza amahoro, ahubwo nazanye inkota." 
Matthew10:35 Koko naje gushyamiranya umuhungu na se, umukobwa na nyina, umukazana na nyirabukwe:" 
Matthew10:36 maze abanzi b’umuntu bakazaba abo mu rugo rwe. 
Matthew10:37 Ukunda se cyangwa nyina kunduta, ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye. Ukunda umuhungu cyangwa umukobwa we kunduta, ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye." 
Matthew10:38 Udatwara umusaraba we ngo ankurikire, ntakwiriye kuba uwanjye." 
Matthew10:39 Uwihambira ku bugingo bwe azabubura, naho uzahara ubugingo bwe ari jye agirira, azabuhorana." 
Matthew10:40 Ubakiriye neza, ni jye aba yakiriye, n’unyakiriye aba yakiriye Uwantumye." 
Matthew10:41 Uwakiriye neza umuhanuzi kuko ari umuhanuzi, azahabwa ingororano y’umuhanuzi; n’uwakiriye intungane neza kuko ari intungane, azahabwa ingororano y’intungane." 
Matthew10:42 Uzaba yarahaye icyo kunywa umwe muri aba baciye bugufi, n’aho rwaba uruho rw’amazi afutse, kuko ari umwigishwa wanjye, ndababwira ukuri: ntazabura ingororano ye.»" 
Matthew11:1 Yezu amaze guha abigishwa be cumi na babiri ayo mabwiriza, aherako ajya kwigisha no kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu migi yabo." 
Matthew11:2 Yohani, aho yari mu buroko, amaze kumva ibyo Kristu akora, yohereza babiri mu bigishwa be kumubaza bati" 
Matthew11:3 «Mbese uri Wawundi ugomba kuza, cyangwa dutegereze undi?»" 
Matthew11:4 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nimugende mutekerereze Yohani ibyo mwumva n’ibyo mubona: 
Matthew11:5 impumyi zirabona, abacumbagira baragenda, ababembe barakira, ibipfamatwi birumva, abapfuye barazuka, n’abakene barigishwa Inkuru Nziza." 
Matthew11:6 Hahirwa utazagushwa n’ibyo nkora!» 
Matthew11:7 Izo ntumwa zitirimutse, Yezu abwira rubanda ibya Yohani, ati «Mwagiye kureba iki mu butayu? Urubingo se ruhubanganywa n’umuyaga?" 
Matthew11:8 Mwagiye kureba iki? Umuntu se wambaye imyenda y’agatangaza?... Abambaye iy’agatangaza se ko batuye mu ngoro z’abami! 
Matthew11:9 Nk’ubwo se, mwagiye kureba iki? Umuhanuzi se? Koko rero ndabibabwiye, ndetse atambutse umuhanuzi." 
Matthew11:10 Ni we banditseho ngo ’Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye imbere yawe, kugira ngo izagutegurire inzira.’»" 
Matthew11:11 Ndababwira ukuri: mu bana babyawe n’abagore, ntihigeze kuboneka uruta Yohani Batisita; nyamara umuto mu Ngoma y’ijuru, aramuruta." 
Matthew11:12 Guhera igihe cya Yohani Batisita kugeza ubu, Ingoma y’ijuru iraharanirwa, ab’ibyihare ni bo bayikukana." 
Matthew11:13 Ni uko Abahanuzi bose kimwe n’Amategeko bavuze kugeza kuri Yohani. 
Matthew11:14 Kandi niba mushaka kunyemera, ni we Eliya wagombaga kuza." 
Matthew11:15 Ufite amatwi yo kumva niyumve! 
Matthew11:16 Mbese ab’iki gihe nabagereranya na bande? Bameze nk’abana bicaye ku bibuga, bagahamagara abandi," 
Matthew11:17 bati ’Twavugije umwironge, maze ntimwabyina! Duteye indirimbo z’amaganya, ntimwarira!’" 
Matthew11:18 Koko rero Yohani yaje atarya, atanywa, bati ’Yahanzweho!’" 
Matthew11:19 Naho Umwana w’umuntu aje arya kandi anywa, bati ’Ni igisambo, ni umusinzi, ni incuti y’abasoresha n’abanyabyaha!’ Nyamara ubuhanga bw’Imana bwagaragajwe n’ibikorwa byayo.»" 
Matthew11:20 Nuko atangira gutonganya imigi yabonye ibitangaza bye byinshi, ikarenga ntiyihane, avuga ati" 
Matthew11:21 «Iyimbire, Korazini! Iyimbire, Betsayida! Kuko ibitangaza byabakorewemo, iyo bikorerwa muri Tiri no muri Sidoni, baba barisubiyeho kuva kera, bakambara ibigunira bakisiga ivu." 
Matthew11:22 Ni cyo gituma mbibabwiye: ku munsi w’urubanza muzahanwa kurusha Tiri na Sidoni. 
Matthew11:23 Naho wowe, Kafarinawumu, ubona ko uzakuzwa kugera mu bicu? Uzarohwa mu kuzimu. Kuko ibitangaza byagukorewemo, iyo bikorerwa muri Sodoma, iba ikiriho n’ubu." 
Matthew11:24 Ni cyo gituma ku munsi w’urubanza uzahanwa kurusha igihugu cya Sodoma.» 
Matthew11:25 Icyo gihe Yezu yungamo ati «Dawe, Mutegetsi w’ijuru n’isi, ngushimiye ko ibyo wabihishe abanyabwenge n’abahanga, ukabihishurira abaciye bugufi." 
Matthew11:26 Koko, Dawe, ni ko wabyishakiye." 
Matthew11:27 Byose nabyeguriwe na Data, kandi nta we uzi Mwana keretse Data, nta n’uzi Data, keretse Mwana n’uwo Mwana ashatse kumuhishurira." 
Matthew11:28 Nimungane mwese, abarushye n’abaremerewe, jye nzabaruhura." 
Matthew11:29 Nimwikorere umutwaro wanjye, kandi mundebereho, kuko ngira umutima ugwa neza kandi nkoroshya; muzamererwa neza mu mitima yanyu." 
Matthew11:30 Koko rero umutwaro wanjye uroroshye, n’ibyo mbakorera ntibiremereye.»" 
Matthew12:1 Icyo gihe, ku munsi w’isabato, Yezu anyura mu mirima yeze. Abigishwa be bakaba bashonje, bamamfuza ingano, barazirya." 
Matthew12:2 Abafarizayi babibonye baramubwira bati «Dore re, abigishwa bawe barakora ibyabujijwe ku isabato!»" 
Matthew12:3 Ariko we arababwira ati «Ntimwasomye uko Dawudi yabigenjeje, igihe yari ashonje, we n’abo bari kumwe?" 
Matthew12:4 Uko yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Imana, n’uko bariye imigati y’umumuriko batashoboraga kurya, kuko yari igenewe abaherezabitambo bonyine?" 
Matthew12:5 Cyangwa se ntimwasomye mu Mategeko uko abaherezabitambo bakorera mu Ngoro y’Imana ku munsi w’isabato bahora bica ikiruhuko cyayo, ntibibabere icyaha?" 
Matthew12:6 Nyamara rero ndabibabwiye: hano hari igitambutse iyo Ngoro. 
Matthew12:7 Iyo musobanukirwa n’iri jambo ngo ’Icyo nshaka ni impuhwe, si igitambo’, ntimuba mwarahamije icyaha abaziranenge." 
Matthew12:8 Koko, Umwana w’umuntu ni Umugenga w’isabato.»" 
Matthew12:9 Avuye aho, ajya mu isengero ryabo." 
Matthew12:10 Maze ubwo hakaba umuntu ufite ikiganza cyumiranye. Nuko baramubaza bati «Ese biremewe gukiza umuntu ku munsi w’isabato?», bagira ngo babone icyo bamurega." 
Matthew12:11 We rero arabasubiza ati «Ni nde muri mwe wagira intama imwe, yagwa mu mwobo ku munsi w’isabato, ntajye kuyikuramo?" 
Matthew12:12 Nyamara umuntu arushije kure intama agaciro! Nuko rero biremewe kugira neza ku munsi w’isabato.» 
Matthew12:13 Hanyuma abwira uwo muntu ati «Rambura ikiganza cyawe.» Arakirambura, nuko kimera neza, kiba kizima nk’ikindi." 
Matthew12:14 Ni bwo Abafarizayi basohotse, bajya inama yo gushaka uko bamwicisha." 
Matthew12:15 Yezu abimenye, ava aho hantu. Abantu benshi baramukurikira, nuko arabakiza bose," 
Matthew12:16 kandi arabihanangiriza ngo boye kumwamamaza. 
Matthew12:17 Bityo huzuzwa ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Izayi, ngo" 
Matthew12:18 «Dore Umugaragu wanjye nitoreye, Inkoramutima yanjye natonesheje rwose. Nzamushyiraho Roho wanjye, na we azamenyeshe abanyamahanga ukuri." 
Matthew12:19 Ntazatongana, ntazasakuza, nta n’uzumva ijwi rye mu makoraniro." 
Matthew12:20 Ntazavuna urubingo rwarabiranye, ntazazimya ifumba icyaka. Azakomeza ukuri kuzarinde gutsinda;" 
Matthew12:21 abanyamahanga bazizera Izina rye.» 
Matthew12:22 Nuko Yezu bamuzanira umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi, akaba impumyi n’ikiragi; aramukiza, nuko ikiragi kiravuga kandi kirareba." 
Matthew12:23 Rubanda rwose baratangara, baravuga bati «Aho uriya ntiyaba Mwene Dawudi?»" 
Matthew12:24 Abafarizayi babyumvise, baravuga bati «Belizebuli, umutware wa roho mbi, ni we yirukanisha roho mbi.»" 
Matthew12:25 Yezu amenye ibyo batekereza, arababwira ati «Ingoma yabyaye amahari irarimbuka: nta mugi, nta rugo byasubiranamo ngo bikomere." 
Matthew12:26 Niba Sekibi yirukana Sekibi, ubwo ni we wirwanya. Ingoma ye izakomera ite?" 
Matthew12:27 Niba kandi ari Belizebuli nirukanisha roho mbi, abana banyu bazirukanisha nde? Ni bo rero bazababera abacamanza." 
Matthew12:28 Ariko niba ari Roho w’Imana nirukanisha roho mbi, ni uko Ingoma y’Imana yabagezemo." 
Matthew12:29 Cyangwa se, umuntu ashobora ate kwinjira mu nzu y’umunyamaboko no gusahura ibintu bye atabanje kumuboha? Ni bwo yabona kumusahurira inzu." 
Matthew12:30 Utari kumwe nanjye arandwanya, n’utarunda hamwe nanjye aranyanyagiza." 
Matthew12:31 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti: Icyaha cyose n’ubutukamana bwose bizababarirwa, ariko gutuka Roho Mutagatifu ntibizababarirwa." 
Matthew12:32 Kandi nihagira uvuga Umwana w’umuntu nabi, azagirirwa imbabazi; ariko navuga nabi Roho Mutagatifu, ntazagirirwa imbabazi, ari muri iki gihe, ari no mu kizaza." 
Matthew12:33 Niba mufite igiti cyiza, n’imbuto zacyo zizaba nziza; nyamara nimugira igiti kibi, n’imbuto zacyo zizaba mbi: kuko igiti kirangwa n’imbuto zacyo." 
Matthew12:34 Mwa nyoko mbi z’impiri mwe, mwashobora mute kuvuga amagambo meza kandi muri babi? N’ubundi akuzuye umutima gasesekara ku munwa!" 
Matthew12:35 Umunyamico myiza avana mu mutima we ibyiza bibitsemo; n’umunyamico mibi akavana mu mutima we ibibi byawusabitse. 
Matthew12:36 Ndabibabwira: ku munsi w’urubanza, abantu bazabazwa ijambo ryose ritagira aho rishingiye bazaba baravuze." 
Matthew12:37 Kuko amagambo yawe ari yo azatuma uba intungane, cyangwa se agatuma ucibwa.»" 
Matthew12:38 Nuko bamwe mu bigishamategeko no mu Bafarizayi baraterura, bati «Mwigisha, turifuza kubona ukora igitangaza.»" 
Matthew12:39 Arabasubiza ati «Iyi nyoko mbi kandi y’abahemu irashaka ikimenyetso! Nta kindi kimenyetso izahabwa, atari icy’umuhanuzi Yonasi." 
Matthew12:40 Nk’uko Yonasi yamaze mu nda y’igifi iminsi itatu n’amajoro atatu, ni na ko Umwana w’umuntu azamara mu nda y’isi iminsi itatu n’amajoro atatu." 
Matthew12:41 Ku munsi w’urubanza, Abanyaninivi bazahagurukira ab’iyi ngoma, maze babatsinde, kuko bo bumvise inyigisho za Yonasi maze bakisubiraho, kandi hano hari uruta Yonasi!" 
Matthew12:42 Umwamikazi w’igihugu cy’epfo azahagurukira ab’iyi ngoma kuri uwo munsi w’urubanza, maze abatsinde, kuko yaturutse iyo gihera aje kumva ubuhanga bwa Salomoni, kandi hano hari uruta Salomoni!" 
Matthew12:43 Iyo roho mbi ivuye mu muntu, ibungera ahantu h’agasi, ishaka uburuhukiro maze ikabubura." 
Matthew12:44 Nuko ikibwira iti ’Nsubiye mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.’ Yahagera igasanga idatuwe, ikubuye, iteguye." 
Matthew12:45 Nuko ikagenda ikazana roho mbi zindi ndwi ziyitambukije ubugome, zikaza zikahatura. Nuko imimerere ya nyuma y’uwo muntu ikarushaho kuba umwaku. Nguko uko bizamerera iki gisekuru kibi.»" 
Matthew12:46 Akibwira rubanda, nyina n’abavandimwe be baba bari hanze, bashaka kugira icyo bamubwira. (" 
Matthew12:47 Nuko umuntu aramubwira ati «Dore nyoko n’abavandimwe bawe bahagaze hanze, barashaka ko muvugana.»)" 
Matthew12:48 Yezu asubiza uwari ubimubwiye, ati «Mama ni nde, n’abavandimwe banjye ni bande?»" 
Matthew12:49 Nuko arambura ukuboko yerekeje ku bigishwa be, ati «Dore mama n’abavandimwe banjye!" 
Matthew12:50 Kuko ukora icyo Data wo mu ijuru ashaka wese, ni we muvandimwe wanjye, na mushiki wanjye, na mama.»" 
Matthew13:1 Uwo munsi Yezu ava imuhira, maze yicara ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Abantu benshi bamuteranira iruhande, bituma ajya kwicara mu bwato, naho rubanda rwose ruhagaze ku nkombe." 
Matthew13:3 Ababwirira byinshi mu migani, ati «Umubibyi yavuye iwe ajya kubiba." 
Matthew13:4 Nuko igihe abiba, imbuto zimwe zigwa iruhande rw’inzira, inyoni ziraza zirazirya." 
Matthew13:5 Izindi zigwa mu rubuye, ntizahasanga igitaka cyinshi, nuko zimera vuba, kuko igitaka cyari gike;" 
Matthew13:6 izuba rivuye zirashya, ziruma, kuko zitari zifite imizi." 
Matthew13:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa, amahwa arakura, nuko arazipfukirana." 
Matthew13:8 Izindi zigwa mu gitaka cyiza, nuko zera imbuto, imwe ijana, indi mirongo itandatu, indi mirongo itatu." 
Matthew13:9 Ufite amatwi, niyumve!»" 
Matthew13:10 Abigishwa baramwegera, baramubaza bati «Igituma ubabwira mu migani ni iki?»" 
Matthew13:11 Arabasubiza ati «Mwebweho mwahawe kumenya amabanga y’Ingoma y’ijuru; naho bo, ntibabihawe." 
Matthew13:12 Kuko ufite byinshi ari we uzongererwa agakungahara; naho ufite bike, n’icyo yari afite bazakimwaka." 
Matthew13:13 Ni cyo kintera kubabwirira mu migani, kuko bareba ntibabone, batega amatwi ntibumve kandi ntibasobanukirwe." 
Matthew13:14 Bityo ubuhanuzi bwa Izayi bubuzurizwaho, ngo ’Kumva muzumva, ariko ntimuzasobanukirwa; kureba muzareba, ariko ntimuzabona." 
Matthew13:15 Kuko umutima w’uwo muryango unangiye, bipfutse amatwi bahunza n’amaso, bagira ngo batabona, bagira ngo batumva, bagira ngo umutima wabo udasobanukirwa, bakisubiraho, nkabakiza.’" 
Matthew13:16 Mwebweho, amaso yanyu arahirwa kuko abona, n’amatwi yanyu arahirwa kuko yumva." 
Matthew13:17 Ndababwira ukuri: abahanuzi benshi n’intungane nyinshi bifuje kubona ibyo muruzi ntibabibona, kumva ibyo mwumva ntibabyumva!" 
Matthew13:18 Mwebweho rero, nimwumve icyo umugani w’umubibyi uvuga." 
Matthew13:19 Umuntu wese wumva ijambo ry’Imana, ariko ntaryiteho, ameze nk’imbuto yabibwe iruhande rw’inzira: Sekibi araza akamukuramo icyari cyabibwe mu mutima we." 
Matthew13:20 Imbuto yabibwe mu rubuye, isobanura umuntu wumva ijambo, ako kanya akaryakirana ibyishimo," 
Matthew13:21 nyamara ntirimucengeremo ngo rimushingemo imizi kubera ko ahora ahindagurika; iyo hadutse amagorwa cyangwa ibitotezo bitewe n’iryo jambo, agwa ako kanya." 
Matthew13:22 Naho imbuto ibibwe mu mahwa, yo isobanura umuntu wumva neza ijambo, ariko imihihibikano y’isi n’ibishuko by’ubukungu bigapfukirana iryo jambo, rigapfa ubusa." 
Matthew13:23 Hanyuma imbuto ibibwe mu gitaka cyiza, isobanura uwumva ijambo akaryitaho: uwo arera akabyara imbuto, umwe ijana, undi mirongo itandatu, undi mirongo itatu.»" 
Matthew13:24 Abacira undi mugani ati «Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umuntu wabibye imbuto nziza mu murima we. 
Matthew13:25 Ariko igihe abantu basinziriye, umwanzi we araza, abiba urumamfu hagati y’ingano, nuko arigendera." 
Matthew13:26 Ingano ziramera, zimaze kugengarara, ubwo urumamfu na rwo ruragaragara." 
Matthew13:27 Abagaragu basanga nyir’umurima, baramubaza bati ’Shobuja, ntiwari warabibye imbuto nziza mu murima wawe? Ni iki gituma harimo n’urumamfu?’" 
Matthew13:28 Arabasubiza ati ’Ni umwanzi wabigize!’ Abagaragu barongera bati ’Urashaka ko tujya kururandura?’ 
Matthew13:29 Ati ’Oya, muri uko gutoranya urumamfu, mutavaho murandura n’ingano." 
Matthew13:30 Nimureke bikure byombi kugeza mu isarura; igihe cy’isarura nzabwira abasaruzi, nti ’Nimubanze mutoranye urumamfu muruhambiremo imiba, muyijugunye mu muriro; naho ingano muzihunike mu kigega cyanjye.’»" 
Matthew13:31 Abacira undi mugani ati «Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’imbuto ya sinapisi, umuntu yateye mu murima we." 
Matthew13:32 Ni yo ntoya mu mbuto zose, ariko iyo imaze gukura, isumba imyaka yose yo mu murima, ndetse ikaba igiti, ku buryo inyoni zo mu kirere ziza kwarika mu mashami yacyo.»" 
Matthew13:33 Abacira undi mugani ati «Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umusemburo umugore yavanze n’incuro eshatu z’ifu, kugeza igihe byose bitutumbye.»" 
Matthew13:34 Ibyo byose Yezu yabibwiraga rubanda mu migani, nta cyo yababwiraga atababwiriye mu migani;" 
Matthew13:35 bityo huzuzwa ibyo umuhanuzi yavuze ati «Umunwa wanjye uzavuga mu migani, nzamamaza ibyahishwe kuva isi ikiremwa.»" 
Matthew13:36 Hanyuma asiga aho rubanda, ajya imuhira. Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera, baramubaza bati «Dusobanurire umugani w’urumamfu rwo mu murima.»" 
Matthew13:37 Arabasubiza ati «Ubiba imbuto nziza ni Umwana w’umuntu; 
Matthew13:38 umurima ni isi; imbuto nziza ni abana b’Ingoma; urumamfu ni abana ba Nyakibi; 
Matthew13:39 umwanzi warubibye ni Sekibi; isarura ni iherezo ry’isi; abasaruzi ni abamalayika. 
Matthew13:40 Nk’uko rero batoranya urumamfu, bakarujugunya mu muriro, ni ko bizagenda mu iherezo ry’isi." 
Matthew13:41 Umwana w’umuntu azohereza abamalayika be, bavangure mu Ngoma ye abateye abandi kugwa mu cyaha bose, n’inkozi z’ibibi zose," 
Matthew13:42 maze babarohe mu nyenga y’umuriro, aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo." 
Matthew13:43 Ubwo intungane zizabengerana nk’izuba mu Ngoma ya Se. Ufite amatwi, niyumve!" 
Matthew13:44 Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’ikintu cy’agaciro gakomeye gihishe mu murima; umuntu iyo akiguyeho, yongera kugihisha, akagenda yishimye, agatanga ibyo atunze byose, akagura uwo murima." 
Matthew13:45 Byongeye kandi Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umucuruzi washakashakaga amasaro meza. 
Matthew13:46 Yabona isaro rimwe ry’agaciro kanini, akagenda, akagurisha ibyo atunze byose, maze akarigura." 
Matthew13:47 Byongeye kandi Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’urushundura banaze mu nyanja, maze rugafata amafi y’amoko yose." 
Matthew13:48 Iyo rwuzuye, barukururira ku nkombe, hanyuma bakicara, bakarobanurira mu bitebo afite akamaro, naho adafite akamaro bakayajugunya." 
Matthew13:49 Ni ko bizamera mu iherezo ry’isi: abamalayika bazaza batandukanye intungane n’abagome. 
Matthew13:50 Maze bo babarohe mu nyenga y’umuriro; aho bazaririra kandi bagahekenya amenyo. 
Matthew13:51 Ibyo byose mwabyumvise?» Bati «Yee.» 
Matthew13:52 Arongera ati «Ni cyo gituma umwigishamategeko wese, wigishijwe iby’Ingoma y’ijuru, asa na nyir’urugo ukura mu bushyinguro bwe ibishya n’ibishaje.»" 
Matthew13:53 Yezu arangije iyo migani, ava aho." 
Matthew13:54 Nuko ajya mu karere k’iwabo, ahigishiriza abantu mu isengero ryabo, bituma batangara bavuga bati «Ubu buhanga n’ubu bubasha bwinshi abikomora he?" 
Matthew13:55 Uriya si umwana wa wa mubaji? Nyina ntiyitwa Mariya? Abavandimwe be si Yakobo, Yozefu, Simoni na Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Bashiki be bose ntiduturanye? None se biriya byose abikomora he?» 
Matthew13:57 Nuko abatera imbogamizi. Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati «Koko nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurirwa keretse mu gihugu cye no muri bene wabo.» 
Matthew13:58 Nuko aho ntiyahakorera ibitangaza byinshi, abitewe n’ukutemera kwabo." 
Matthew14:1 Icyo gihe Herodi, umutware w’intara ya Galileya, yumva iby’ubwamamare bwa Yezu." 
Matthew14:2 Nuko abwira ibyegera bye, ati «Uriya muntu ni Yohani Batisita, ni we wazutse mu bapfuye! Ni cyo gituma afite ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza.»" 
Matthew14:3 Koko Herodi yari yarafashe Yohani, aramuboha aranamufungisha, abitewe na Herodiya, umugore w’umuvandimwe we Filipo." 
Matthew14:4 Kuko Yohani yamubwiraga, ati «Ntibyemewe ko umutunga.»" 
Matthew14:5 Herodi asigara ashaka kumwica, ariko agatinya rubanda rwabonaga ko Yohani ari umuhanuzi." 
Matthew14:6 Ku munsi wo kwibuka ivuka rya Herodi, umukobwa wa Herodiya abyinira mu ruhame, Herodi aranyurwa." 
Matthew14:7 Ni bwo arahiriye kumuha icyo ari bumusabe cyose. 
Matthew14:8 Nuko uwo mukobwa amaze kugirwa inama na nyina, aravuga ati «Ngaho mpera aha ngaha ku mbehe, umutwe wa Yohani Batisita.»" 
Matthew14:9 Umwami ni ko kubabara, ariko kubera indahiro yagiriye imbere y’abatumirwa be, ategeka ko bawumuha." 
Matthew14:10 Yohereza ujya gucira Yohani umutwe mu nzu y’imbohe. 
Matthew14:11 Umutwe bawuzana ku mbehe, bawuha wa mukobwa, awushyira nyina." 
Matthew14:12 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani baraza batwara umurambo we, barawuhamba. Hanyuma bajya kubimenyesha Yezu." 
Matthew14:13 Yezu amaze kubyumva, ajya mu bwato, agana ahantu h’ubutayu hitaruye; rubanda rubimenye ruva mu migi, rumukurikira ku maguru." 
Matthew14:14 Amaze kwambuka, abona abantu benshi, abagirira impuhwe; akiza ibimuga byabo." 
Matthew14:15 Bugorobye, abigishwa be baramwegera, bati «Aha hantu ntihatuwe, kandi umunsi uciye ikibu; none sezerera aba bantu bajye mu ngo kwigurira ibyo barya.»" 
Matthew14:16 Ariko Yezu we arababwira ati «Bikwirirwa bajyayo; nimubahe ibyo kurya mwebwe ubwanyu.» 
Matthew14:17 Baramusubiza bati «Dufite hano imigati itanu n’amafi abiri gusa.» 
Matthew14:18 Arababwira ati «Nimubinzanire hano.» 
Matthew14:19 Amaze gutegeka ko bicaza abantu mu byatsi, afata ya migati itanu na ya mafi abiri, areba ku ijuru, ashimira Imana; hanyuma amanyura ya migati ayiha abigishwa be, na bo bayiha rubanda." 
Matthew14:20 Bose bararya barahaga. Nuko barundarundira hamwe ibisigaye, byuzura inkangara cumi n’ebyiri!" 
Matthew14:21 Nyamara abariye bari ibihumbi bitanu, batabariyemo abagore n’abana." 
Matthew14:22 Nuko Yezu aherako ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato no kumutanga hakurya, igihe agisezerera rubanda." 
Matthew14:23 Amaze kubasezerera, azamuka umusozi kugira ngo asengere ahiherereye. Umugoroba ukuba ari wenyine." 
Matthew14:24 Naho ubwato bwari bugeze kure y’inkombe, buhungabanywa n’imivumba, kuko umuyaga wabuturukaga imbere." 
Matthew14:25 Nuko bujya gucya, aza abasanga agenda hejuru y’inyanja." 
Matthew14:26 Abigishwa babonye agenda hejuru y’inyanja, bakuka umutima, bati «Ni Baringa!» Bashya ubwoba, ni ko kuvuza induru." 
Matthew14:27 Ako kanya Yezu arababwira, ati «Nimuhumure, ni jye; mwigira ubwoba!»" 
Matthew14:28 Petero ni ko kumusubiza ati «Nyagasani, niba ari wowe, tegeka ko ngusanga ngenda ku mazi.»" 
Matthew14:29 Yezu ati «Ngwino.» Nuko Petero ava mu bwato agenda ku mazi asanga Yezu. 
Matthew14:30 Ariko abonye ko umuyaga uteye inkeke, agira ubwoba atangira kurohama, nuko atera hejuru ati «Nyagasani, nkiza!»" 
Matthew14:31 Ako kanya Yezu arambura ukuboko, aramusingira, ati «Wa mwemera gato we, ni iki cyatumye ushidikanya?»" 
Matthew14:32 Nuko bageze mu bwato, umuyaga urahosha." 
Matthew14:33 Abari mu bwato bamupfukamira bavuga bati «Koko uri Umwana w’Imana!» 
Matthew14:34 Bamaze kwambuka, bagera mu karere ka Genezareti." 
Matthew14:35 Abantu b’aho bamumenye, bakwiza inkuru muri ako karere kose; ni ko kumuzanira abarwayi babo bose." 
Matthew14:36 Baramwinginga ngo abareke bakore ku ncunda z’igishura cye gusa, nuko abazikozeho bose bagakira." 
Matthew15:1 Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko baturutse i Yeruzalemu ni ko kwegera Yezu, bati" 
Matthew15:2 «Ni iki gituma abigishwa bawe bica umuco w’abakurambere? Dore ntibakaraba iyo bagiye gufungura!» 
Matthew15:3 Arabasubiza ati «Mwebwe se, ni iki gituma mwica itegeko ry’Imana, mubikurije ku muco wanyu?" 
Matthew15:4 Dore Imana yaravuze iti ’Jya wubaha so na nyoko’, kandi iti ’Uzatuka se cyangwa nyina, azicwe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mwebweho ariko muravuga ngo: Umuntu wese ubwira se cyangwa nyina, ati ’Ibintu najyaga kuzagufashisha, nabituye Imana’," 
Matthew15:6 ntaba agitegetswe gufasha se na nyina. Bityo mukaba mukuyeho ijambo ry’Imana mukurikije umuco wanyu! 
Matthew15:7 Mwa ndyarya mwe! Izayi yabahanuyeho neza, igihe avuze ati" 
Matthew15:8 ’Uyu muryango unyubahisha ururimi gusa, naho imitima yabo indi kure." 
Matthew15:9 Icyubahiro bampa ni amanjwe: inyigisho bigisha ni amategeko y’abantu gusa.’» 
Matthew15:10 Nuko Yezu ahamagara rubanda, ni ko kubabwira ati «Nimutege amatwi maze mwumve!" 
Matthew15:11 Si igishyirwa mu kanwa gihumanya umuntu; ahubwo ikiva mu kanwa, ni cyo gihumanya umuntu.»" 
Matthew15:12 Nuko abigishwa be baramwegera baramubwira bati «Aho uzi ko Abafarizayi bumvise ayo magambo, bikabarakaza?»" 
Matthew15:13 Yezu ati «Agati kose kadateretswe na Data wo mu ijuru, kazarandurwa." 
Matthew15:14 Nimubihorere: ni impumyi zirandata izindi impumyi! Kandi iyo impumyi irandase indi mpumyi, zombi zigwa mu mwobo.»" 
Matthew15:15 Petero araterura ati «Dusobanurire uwo mugani.» 
Matthew15:16 Yezu ati «Namwe ntimuramenya ubwenge? 
Matthew15:17 Ntimwumva se ko igishyirwa mu kanwa cyose, kijya mu nda, hanyuma kikajya mu musarane," 
Matthew15:18 naho ibiva mu kanwa bituruka mu mutima akaba ari byo bihumanya umuntu? 
Matthew15:19 Koko rero, mu mutima ni ho haturuka ibitekerezo bibi, ubwicanyi, ubusambanyi, ingeso mbi, ubujura, ububeshyi n’ubutukanyi." 
Matthew15:20 Ngibyo ibyanduza umuntu; naho kurya udakarabye si byo bihumanya umuntu.» 
Matthew15:21 Hanyuma Yezu ava aho, yerekeza mu karere k’i Tiri n’i Sidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Nuko Umukanahanikazi ava ku nkiko y’icyo gihugu, atera hejuru ati «Mbabarira, Nyagasani, Mwana wa Dawudi! Umukobwa wanjye yashegeshwe na roho mbi!»" 
Matthew15:23 Ariko Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza. Nuko abigishwa baramwegera, baramwinginga bati «Mwirukane, kuko adusakuza inyuma.»" 
Matthew15:24 Ariko we arabasubiza, ati «Nta handi noherejwe, kereka mu ntama zazimiye zo mu muryango wa Israheli.»" 
Matthew15:25 Ariko uwo mugore aramwegera, aramupfukamira, avuga ati «Nyagasani, ntabara!»" 
Matthew15:26 Aramusubiza ati «Ntibikwiye gufata umugati w’abana ngo uwujugunyire ibibwana.» 
Matthew15:27 Umugore na we ati «Ni koko, Nyagasani, ariko n’ibibwana birya utuvungukira tugwa aho ba shebuja bafunguriye.»" 
Matthew15:28 Nuko Yezu aramusubiza ati «Wa mugore we, ukwemera kwawe kurakomeye; nibikumerere uko ubishaka!» Ako kanya umukobwa we arakira." 
Matthew15:29 Nuko Yezu ava aho, afata ku nkombe y’inyanja ya Galileya. Azamuka umusozi, nuko aricara." 
Matthew15:30 Abantu benshi baramusanga, bazanye abacumbagira, ibimuga, impumyi, ibiragi n’abandi benshi, babashyira imbere ye arabakiza." 
Matthew15:31 Nuko rubanda baratangara babonye ibiragi bivuga, ibimuga bikize, abacumbagira bagenda, impumyi zibona, maze basingiza Imana ya Israheli." 
Matthew15:32 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be, arababwira ati «Iyi mbaga nyifitiye impuhwe, kuko hashize iminsi itatu bankurikiye, kandi bakaba badafite ibyo barya. Kubohereza bashonje simbishaka; hato batagwa mu nzira.»" 
Matthew15:33 Abigishwa baramubwira bati «Turakura he muri ubu butayu imigati ihagije abantu bangana batya?» 
Matthew15:34 Yezu arabaza ati «Mufite imigati ingahe?» Baramusubiza bati «Irindwi, n’udufi dukeya.»" 
Matthew15:35 Nuko ategeka rubanda kwicara hasi. 
Matthew15:36 Hanyuma afata ya migati irindwi na ya mafi, ashimira Imana, arayimanyura, maze ayiha abigishwa be, bayiha rubanda." 
Matthew15:37 Bose bararya barahaga. Nyuma bakoranya ibisate bisigaye, byuzura inkangara ndwi!" 
Matthew15:38 Nyamara abariye bari ibihumbi bine, batabariyemo abagore n’abana." 
Matthew15:39 Yezu amaze gusezerera rubanda, ajya mu bwato, berekeza mu karere ka Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Nuko Abafarizayi n’Abasaduseyi baramusanga, bagira ngo bamwinje, bamusaba ikimenyetso giturutse mu ijuru." 
Matthew16:2 Arabasubiza ati «Ku mugoroba, muravuga muti ’Hazaba umucyo kuko ijuru ari umutuku’;" 
Matthew16:3 no mu museke, muti ’Uyu munsi uraba mubi kuko ijuru ari urwijiji’. Bityo mukamenya gusobanura neza uko ijuru risa, nyamara ntimushobore kumenya ibimenyetso by’iki gihe turimo!" 
Matthew16:4 Iki gisekuru kibi kandi cy’abasambanyi kirashaka ikimenyetso! Ariko nta kindi kimenyetso bazabona, atari icya Yonasi.» Ubwo abasiga aho arigendera." 
Matthew16:5 Igihe bambukaga ngo bafate hakurya, abigishwa basanga bibagiwe kujyana imigati." 
Matthew16:6 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Murabe maso kandi mwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi n’uw’Abasaduseyi.» 
Matthew16:7 Naho bo mu mutima baribwira bati «Ni uko tutazanye imigati.» 
Matthew16:8 Yezu arabimenya, arababwira ati «Mwa bemera gato mwe, n’iki gituma mujya impaka ngo ntimwazanye imigati?" 
Matthew16:9 Ntimurasobanukirwa? Ntimwibuka se ya migati itanu yahagije abantu ibihumbi bitanu, n’umubare w’inkangara mwahavanye?" 
Matthew16:10 Ntimwibuka se ya migati irindwi yahagije abantu ibihumbi bine, n’umubare w’inkangara mwahavanye?" 
Matthew16:11 Ni iki gituma mutumva ko atari imigati navugaga, igihe nababwiraga nti ’Nimwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi n’uw’Abasaduseyi!’»" 
Matthew16:12 Nuko bumva ko atari yababwiye kwirinda umusemburo w’imigati, ahubwo kwirinda inyigisho z’Abafarizayi n’iz’Abasaduseyi." 
Matthew16:13 Yezu ageze mu gihugu cya Kayizareya ya Filipo, atangira kubaza abigishwa be, ati «Abantu bavuga ko Umwana w’umuntu ari nde?»" 
Matthew16:14 Baramusubiza bati «Bamwe bavuga ko ari Yohani Batisita, abandi ko ari Eliya, abandi ko ari Yeremiya cyangwa umwe mu bandi bahanuzi.»" 
Matthew16:15 Yongera kubabaza ati «Mwebwe se, muvuga ko ndi nde?»" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati «Wowe uri Kristu, Umwana w’Imana Nzima!»" 
Matthew16:17 Yezu amusubiza, agira ati «Urahirwa, Simoni mwene Yonasi, kuko atari umubiri n’amaraso byabiguhishuriye, ahubwo ni Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew16:18 Noneho nkubwiye ko uri Urutare, kandi kuri urwo rutare nzubakaho Kiliziya yanjye, n’ububasha bwo mu kuzimu ntibuzayitsinda." 
Matthew16:19 Nzaguha imfunguzo z’Ingoma y’ijuru: icyo uzaba waboshye mu nsi, kizabohwa no mu ijuru; n’icyo uzaba wabohoye mu nsi, kizabohorwa no mu ijuru.»" 
Matthew16:20 Hanyuma yihanangiriza abigishwa kutagira uwo babwira ko ari Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kuva ubwo Yezu atangira kumenyesha abigishwa be ko agomba kujya i Yeruzalemu kuhababarizwa cyane n’abakuru b’imiryango, n’Abaherezabitambo bakuru, n’abigishamategeko, akicwa kandi akazazuka ku munsi wa gatatu." 
Matthew16:22 Petero aramwihugikana, aramutonganya avuga ati «Biragatsindwa, Nyagasani! Ibyo ntibizakubeho!»" 
Matthew16:23 Ariko we ahindukirana Petero, aramubwira ati «Hoshi, mva iruhande, Sekibi! Umbereye umutego kuko ibitekerezo byawe bitavuye ku Mana, ahubwo ku bantu!»" 
Matthew16:24 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be, ati «Niba hari ushaka kunkurikira ajye yiyibagirwa ubwe, aheke umusaraba we, maze ankurikire!" 
Matthew16:25 Kuko uzashaka gukiza ubugingo bwe, azabubura; naho uzahara ubugingo bwe ari jye agirira, azabukiza." 
Matthew16:26 Umuntu watunga isi yose, ariko akabura ubugingo bwe, byaba bimumariye iki? Cyangwa se umuntu yagurana iki ubugingo bwe?" 
Matthew16:27 Kandi Umwana w’umuntu agomba kuzagaruka mu ikuzo rya Se, ashagawe n’abamalayika, maze ubwo akagororera umuntu wese akurikije imigirire ye." 
Matthew16:28 Ndababwira ukuri: mu bari hano harimo abatazapfa batabonye Umwana w’umuntu aje mu ikuzo ry’Ingoma ye.» 
Matthew17:1 Hashize iminsi itandatu, Yezu ajyana na Petero, na Yakobo, na Yohani umuvandimwe we ukwabo mu mpinga y’umusozi muremure." 
Matthew17:2 Nuko yihindurira ukundi mu maso yabo: uruhanga rwe rubengerana nk’izuba, imyambaro ye yererana nk’urumuri." 
Matthew17:3 Ubwo Musa na Eliya bababonekera, baganira na we." 
Matthew17:4 Petero ni ko guterura abwira Yezu, ati «Nyagasani, kwibera hano ntako bisa; niba ubishaka ngiye kuhaca ibiraro bitatu, kimwe cyawe, ikindi cya Musa, n’ikindi cya Eliya.»" 
Matthew17:5 Akivuga ibyo, igihu kibengerana kirabatwikira; ijwi riturukamo rivuga riti «Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane unyizihira; nimumwumve!»" 
Matthew17:6 Abigishwa babyumvise, bitura hasi bubitse amaso, bafite ubwoba bwinshi." 
Matthew17:7 Nuko Yezu arabegera, abakoraho, arababwira ati «Nimubaduke, mwitinya!»" 
Matthew17:8 Bubuye amaso, ntibagira undi babona kereka Yezu wenyine." 
Matthew17:9 Bamanuka umusozi, Yezu arabihanangiriza ati «Ntimugire uwo mubwira ibyo mumaze kubona, kugeza ubwo Umwana w’umuntu azaba amaze kuzuka mu bapfuye.»" 
Matthew17:10 Nuko abigishwa baramubaza bati «Ni kuki abigishamategeko bavuga ko Eliya ari we ugomba kubanza kuza? 
Matthew17:11 Arabasubiza ati «Ni koko, Eliya azaza kandi atunganye byose;" 
Matthew17:12 ariko mbabwire: Eliya yaraje, nyamara ntibamumenye, ahubwo bamugiriye nabi uko bishakiye. N’Umwana w’umuntu bazamubabaza batyo.»" 
Matthew17:13 Nuko abigishwa bamenya ko ari Yohani Batisita yababwiraga. 
Matthew17:14 Bageze iruhande rw’inteko y’abantu, umuntu yegera Yezu, amupfukamira agira ati" 
Matthew17:15 «Nyagasani, babarira umwana wanjye urwaye igicuri, akaba ameze nabi. Kenshi yiroha mu muriro, ubundi mu mazi." 
Matthew17:16 Namuzaniye abigishwa bawe ntibashobora kumukiza.» 
Matthew17:17 Yezu arasubiza ati «Mbe bantu b’iki gihe, b’abemera gato kandi b’inkozi z’ibibi, nzabana namwe kugeza ryari? Nzabiyumanganya mpereze hehe? Nimumunzanire hano.»" 
Matthew17:18 Nuko Yezu acyaha iyo roho mbi, imuvamo, ako kanya arakira." 
Matthew17:19 Nuko abigishwa begera Yezu, baramubaza bati «Ni iki gituma twebwe tutashoboye kuyirukana?»" 
Matthew17:20 Arababwira ati «Ni uko mufite ukwemera guke. Koko ndababwira ukuri: iyo mugira ukwemera kungana n’impeke y’ururo, mwabwiye uyu musozi muti ’Va aha ngaha, ujye hariya’, ukahajya; kandi nta cyashobora kubananira.» (...)" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Umunsi umwe bateraniye mu Galileya, Yezu arababwira ati «Umwana w’umuntu agiye gushyirwa mu maboko y’abantu," 
Matthew17:23 bakazamwica, ariko akazazuka ku munsi wa gatatu.» Ibyo birabashavuza cyane." 
Matthew17:24 Bageze i Kafarinawumu, abasoresha b’Ingoro begera Petero, baramubaza bati «Mbese Umwigisha wanyu ntatanga ituro ry’Imana?»" 
Matthew17:25 Arabasubiza ati «Araritanga.» Igihe bageze imuhira, Yezu aramutanguranwa, aramubwira ati «Simoni, ubyumva ute? Abami b’isi bahabwa na bande imisoro cyangwa amaturo? Babihabwa n’abana babo cyangwa se na rubanda?»" 
Matthew17:26 Amushubije ati «Ni rubanda», Yezu arongera ati «Nuko rero abana ntibabitegekwa." 
Matthew17:27 Nyamara, kugira ngo tudaha urugero rubi bariya bantu, jya ku nyanja urohe ururobo. Ifi ya mbere uri bufate, uyasamure; urayisangamo igiceri, ukijyane, maze ukibaheho ituro ryanjye n’iryawe.»" 
Matthew18:1 Icyo gihe abigishwa begera Yezu, baramubaza bati «Mbese ubona ari nde uruta abandi mu Ngoma y’ijuru?»" 
Matthew18:2 Ahamagara umwana muto, amushyira hagati yabo," 
Matthew18:3 nuko aravuga ati «Ndababwira ukuri: nimudahinduka ngo mumere nk’abana, nta bwo muzinjira mu Ngoma y’ ijuru." 
Matthew18:4 Uwicisha bugufi wese nk’uyu mwana, uwo ni we usumba abandi mu Ngoma y’ijuru." 
Matthew18:5 Uwakira neza umwana nk’uyu ari jye agirira, ni jye aba yakiriye." 
Matthew18:6 Ariko nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri bene aba bato banyemera, ikimukwiye ni uko bamuhambira ku ijosi urusyo rusheshwa n’indogobe maze akarohwa mu nyanja rwagati." 
Matthew18:7 Isi iragowe kubera ibibi byayo bigusha abantu mu byaha! Kubuza ibigusha abantu mu byaha ntibishoboka, ariko hagowe umuntu biturukaho!" 
Matthew18:8 Niba ikiganza cyawe cyangwa ikirenge cyawe bigutera gukora icyaha, bice ubijugunye kure yawe! Ikiruta ni uko wajya mu bugingo ucitse ukuboko cyangwa ucumbagira, aho gutabwa mu muriro w’iteka, ufite ibiganza byawe byombi cyangwa ibirenge byombi." 
Matthew18:9 Ijisho ryawe kandi nirikubera impamvu yo gukora icyaha, rinoboremo maze urijugunye kure yawe! Ikiruta ni uko wakwinjira mu bugingo ufite ijisho rimwe, aho gutabwa mu nyenga y’umuriro, ufite amaso yombi." 
Matthew18:10 Mwirinde kugira uwo musuzugura muri abo bato; koko rero ndababwira ko mu ijuru abamalayika babo badahwema kureba uruhanga rwa Data wo mu ijuru. 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 Mwe murabibona mute? Niba umuntu afite intama ijana, iyo imwe muri zo izimiye, ntasiga za zindi mirongo urwenda n’icyenda ku musozi, akajya gushaka iyazimiye?" 
Matthew18:13 Kandi iyo ahiriwe akayibona, ndababwira ukuri: imutera ibyishimo biruta ibyo aterwa na za zindi mirongo urwenda n’icyenda zitazimiye." 
Matthew18:14 Ni na ko So wo mu ijuru adashaka ko hari umwe muri abo bato uzimira. 
Matthew18:15 Mugenzi wawe naramuka acumuye, umusange maze umuhane mwiherereye. Nakumva, uzaba ukijije uwo muvandimwe." 
Matthew18:16 Natakumva, uzashake umuntu umwe cyangwa babiri, kugira ngo ibyo bikiranurwe n’abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu." 
Matthew18:17 Niyanga kumva abo ngabo, ubibwire ikoraniro. Niyanga kumva ikoraniro, abe akubereye nk’umunyamahanga n’umusoresha." 
Matthew18:18 Ndababwira ukuri: ibyo muzaba mwaboshye mu nsi byose, bizabohwa no mu ijuru; n’ibyo muzaba mwabohoye mu nsi, bizabohorwa no mu ijuru." 
Matthew18:19 Byongeye kandi ndababwira ukuri: niba babiri muri mwe ku isi bashyize hamwe ngo bagire icyo basaba, bazagihabwa na Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew18:20 Koko, iyo babiri cyangwa batatu bateraniye hamwe mu izina ryanjye, mba ndi aho hagati yabo.»" 
Matthew18:21 Nuko Petero aramwegera, aramubaza ati «Nyagasani, uwo tuva inda imwe nancumuraho, nzamubabarire kangahe? Nzageza ku ncuro ndwi?»" 
Matthew18:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Sinkubwiye kugeza kuri karindwi, ahubwo kuri mirongo irindwi karindwi." 
Matthew18:23 Nuko rero Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umwami washatse ko abagaragu be bamumurikira ibintu bye. 
Matthew18:24 Atangiye kumurikisha, bamuzanira umwe wari umurimo amatalenta ibihumbi cumi." 
Matthew18:25 Uwo muntu abuze icyo yishyura, shebuja ategeka ko bamugura, we n’umugore n’abana be, n’ibye byose, bityo akaba yishyuye umwenda we." 
Matthew18:26 Nuko umugaragu arapfukama, arunama, avuga ati ’Nyorohera, nzakwishyura byose.’" 
Matthew18:27 Shebuja agize impuhwe, aramurekura kandi amurekera uwo mwenda we." 
Matthew18:28 Uwo mugaragu akivaho, ahura n’umwe muri bagenzi be wari umurimo umwenda w’amadenari ijana, amufata mu muhogo aramuniga, ati ’Ishyura ibyo undimo byose.’" 
Matthew18:29 Nuko mugenzi we amupfukama imbere, aramwinginga ati ’Nyorohera, nzakwishyura.’" 
Matthew18:30 Ariko undi ntiyabyemera, ahubwo aragenda, amuroha mu nzu y’imbohe kugeza igihe yishyuriye umwenda we." 
Matthew18:31 Bagenzi be babibonye, birabarakaza cyane; ni ko kujya kubwira shebuja ibyabaye byose." 
Matthew18:32 Nuko shebuja aramutumiza, aramubwira ati ’Wa mugaragu mubi we, nakurekeye umwenda wawe wose kuko unyinginze;" 
Matthew18:33 wowe se ntiwagombaga kugirira mugenzi wawe impuhwe nk’uko nazikugiriye?’ 
Matthew18:34 Shebuja ararakara, amugabiza abamubabaza kugeza igihe yishyuriye umwenda we wose." 
Matthew18:35 Nguko uko Data wo mu ijuru azabagirira, nimutababarira bagenzi banyu mubikuye ku mutima.»" 
Matthew19:1 Yezu amaze gutanga izo nyigisho, ava muri Galileya, ajya mu ntara ya Yudeya iri hakurya ya Yorudani." 
Matthew19:2 Abantu benshi baramukurikira arahabakiriza. 
Matthew19:3 Nuko Abafarizayi baramwegera, bamubaza bamwinja, bati «Ese biremewe ko umugabo yasenda umugore we ku mpamvu ibonetse yose?»" 
Matthew19:4 Arabasubiza ati «Ntimwasomye ko kuva mu ntangiriro, Rurema yabaremye ari umugabo n’umugore," 
Matthew19:5 kandi ko yavuze ati ’Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina kugira ngo yegukire umugore we, maze bombi bakaba umubiri umwe gusa’?" 
Matthew19:6 Bityo rero ntibaba bakiri babiri, ahubwo baba umubiri umwe. Nuko rero icyo Imana yafatanyije, umuntu ntakagitandukanye!»" 
Matthew19:7 Baramubaza bati «Ariko se, ni iki gituma Musa yategetse gutanga urwandiko rw’isenda mbere yo kwirukana umugore?»" 
Matthew19:8 Arabasubiza ati «Ni umutima wanyu w’indashoboka watumye Musa abemerera kwirukana abagore banyu, ariko si ko byahoze." 
Matthew19:9 Naho jye mbabwiye ko umuntu wese wirukanye umugore we — uretse iyo babanaga bitemewe n’Amategeko — kandi akazana undi, aba asambanye.»" 
Matthew19:10 Abigishwa baramubwira bati «Niba ari uko bimeze ku mugabo n’umugore, ikiruta ni ukudashaka.»" 
Matthew19:11 Ni ko kubasubiza ati «Bose ntibumva iyo mvugo, kereka ababihawe bonyine." 
Matthew19:12 Koko rero hariho abantu bavutse ari ibiremba, hari abandi babigizwe n’abantu, kandi hari n’abandi bigize batyo kubera Ingoma y’ijuru. Ushobora kumva, niyumve!»" 
Matthew19:13 Nuko bamuzanira abana bato ngo abashyireho ibiganza abasabira, maze abigishwa barabakabukira." 
Matthew19:14 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati «Nimureke abana bansange, mwibabuza kunyegera, kuko Ingoma y’ijuru ari iy’abameze nka bo.»" 
Matthew19:15 Nuko amaze kubashyiraho ibiganza, ava aho hantu." 
Matthew19:16 Nuko umuntu aramwegera ati «Mwigisha, ngomba gukora iki cyiza kugira ngo ngire ubugingo bw’iteka?»" 
Matthew19:17 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Utewe n’iki kumbaza ikiri cyiza? Umwiza ni Umwe gusa. Ariko niba ushaka kugera mu bugingo, kurikiza amategeko.»" 
Matthew19:18 Undi aramubaza ati «Ni ayahe se?» Yezu ati «Ntuzice, ntuzasambane, ntuzibe, ntuzabe umushinjabinyoma," 
Matthew19:19 jya wubaha so na nyoko, kandi jya ukunda mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda.»" 
Matthew19:20 Uwo musore aramubwira ati «Ibyo byose ko nabikurikije, ni iki kindi nshigaje?»" 
Matthew19:21 Yezu aramubwira ati «Niba ushaka kuba intungane, genda ugurishe ibyo utunze, ibivuyemo ubihe abakene, maze uzagire ubukungu mu ijuru; hanyuma uze unkurikire.»" 
Matthew19:22 Umusore yumvise iryo jambo, agenda ababaye, kuko yari atunze ibintu byinshi." 
Matthew19:23 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Ndababwira ukuri: kwinjira mu Ngoma y’ijuru biraruhije ku mukungu! 
Matthew19:24 Koko nongere mbibabwire: byoroheye ingamiya guca mu mwenge w’urushinge kurusha uko byoroheye umukungu kwinjira mu Ngoma y’ijuru.» 
Matthew19:25 Abigishwa bumvise ayo magambo, baratangara cyane, barabaza bati «Ni nde ubasha kurokoka?»" 
Matthew19:26 Yezu arabitegereza maze arababwira ati «Ku bantu ntibishoboka, ariko ku Mana byose birashoboka.»" 
Matthew19:27 Nuko Petero araterura, aramubwira ati «Nkatwe twaretse byose tukagukurikira, tuzamera dute?»" 
Matthew19:28 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri: mwebwe mwankurikiye, igihe byose bizavugururwa, igihe Umwana w’umuntu azaba aganje ku ntebe ye y’ikuzo, namwe muzicara ku ntebe cumi n’ebyiri mutegeke imiryango cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli;" 
Matthew19:29 n’umuntu wese uzaba yararetse amazu, cyangwa abavandimwe be, cyangwa bashiki be, cyangwa se, cyangwa nyina, cyangwa abana, cyangwa isambu ye, abitewe n’izina ryanjye, azabisubizwa incuro ijana kandi azatunga ubugingo bw’iteka." 
Matthew19:30 Abenshi mu ba mbere bazaba aba nyuma, n’abenshi mu ba nyuma bazaba aba mbere." 
Matthew20:1 Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nka nyir’umurima wazindutse mu museke, kugira ngo ararike abamukorera mu mizabibu." 
Matthew20:2 Amaze gusezerana n’abakozi idenari imwe ku munsi, abohereza mu mizabibu ye." 
Matthew20:3 Ngo asohoke nko ku isaha ya gatatu, abona abandi bandagaye ku kibuga." 
Matthew20:4 Arababwira ati ’Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye, ndi bubahe igihembo gikwiye.’" 
Matthew20:5 Maze bajyayo. Yongeye gusohoka ahagana ku isaha ya gatandatu, n’ahagana ku ya cyenda, abigenza kwa kundi." 
Matthew20:6 Yongera kugenda ku isaha ya cumi n’imwe, abona n’abandi bahagaze, arababwira ati ’Ni iki gituma mwahagaze aha ngaha umunsi wose nta cyo mukora?’" 
Matthew20:7 Barasubiza bati ’Ni uko nta waturaritse.’ Arababwira ati ’Namwe nimujye mu mizabibu yanjye.’ 
Matthew20:8 Bugorobye, nyir’imizabibu abwira umuhingisha, ati ’Hamagara abakozi, ubahe igihembo cyabo, uhere ku baje nyuma, uheruke abaje mbere.’" 
Matthew20:9 Nuko rero abo ku isaha ya cumi n’imwe baraza, maze buri muntu ahabwa idenari." 
Matthew20:10 Aba mbere baza batekereza ko bari burengerezweho; na bo ariko buri muntu ahabwa idenari imwe. 
Matthew20:11 Bayakira binubira nyir’umurima, bati" 
Matthew20:12 ’Abaje nyuma bakoze isaha imwe gusa, ubagiriye nka twe twahanganye n’umunsi wose n’izuba.’" 
Matthew20:13 We rero asubiza umwe muri bo, ati ’Mugenzi wanjye, nta cyo nkurenganyijeho; si idenari imwe twasezeranye?" 
Matthew20:14 Fata ikiri icyawe, maze wigendere. Jye nshatse guha uwaje nyuma nk’icyo nguhaye." 
Matthew20:15 Sinshobora se kugenza uko nshaka mu byanjye? Cyangwa se undebye nabi kuko ngize neza?’ 
Matthew20:16 Nguko uko aba nyuma bazaba aba mbere, n’aba mbere bakazaba aba nyuma.»" 
Matthew20:17 Yezu akaba arazamuka yerekeza i Yeruzalemu, ashyira ba Cumi na babiri ukwabo, maze ababwirira mu nzira ati" 
Matthew20:18 «Dore tuzamutse tujya i Yeruzalemu, maze Umwana w’umuntu azagabizwe abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko. Bazamucira urubanza rwo gupfa," 
Matthew20:19 bazamugabiza abanyamahanga kugira ngo ashinyagurirwe, akubitwe, maze abambwe ku musaraba; ariko ku munsi wa gatatu azazuke.»" 
Matthew20:20 Nuko nyina wa bene Zebedeyi asanga Yezu ari kumwe n’abahungu be bombi, arapfukama, ashaka kugira icyo amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yezu aramubaza ati «Urashaka iki?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Dore aba bahungu banjye bombi, tegeka ko bazicarana nawe, umwe iburyo, undi ibumoso, mu Ngoma yawe.»" 
Matthew20:22 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ntimuzi icyo musaba; mushobora se kunywera ku nkongoro ngiye kunyweraho?» Baramusubiza bati «Turabishobora.» 
Matthew20:23 Yezu ati «Koko muzanywera ku nkongoro yanjye, naho kwicara iburyo n’ibumoso bwanjye, si jye ubitanga: ni ibyo abo Data yabigeneye.»" 
Matthew20:24 Abandi cumi babyumvise barakarira abo bavandimwe bombi. 
Matthew20:25 Nuko Yezu arabahamagara, arababwira ati «Muzi ko abahawe kugenga amahanga, bayagenga uko bashatse, kandi ko abatware bayo bayategekesha agahato." 
Matthew20:26 Kuri mwebwe rero, si ko bimeze. Ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe, niyigire umuhereza wanyu;" 
Matthew20:27 uzashaka kandi kuba uwa mbere muri mwe, azihindure umugaragu wanyu." 
Matthew20:28 Ni nk’uko Umwana w’umuntu ataje gukorerwa, ahubwo yaje gukorera abandi no gutanga ubugingo bwe ngo bube incungu ya benshi»." 
Matthew20:29 Igihe bavuye i Yeriko abantu benshi baramukurikira. 
Matthew20:30 Ubwo impumyi ebyiri zari zicaye iruhande rw’inzira, zumvise ko Yezu ahise, zitera hejuru ziti «Nyagasani, Mwana wa Dawudi, tubabarire!»" 
Matthew20:31 Rubanda barazicyaha ngo ziceceke, ariko zirushaho gusakuza, ziti «Nyagasani, Mwana wa Dawudi, tubabarire!»" 
Matthew20:32 Yezu arahagarara, arazihamagara, arazibaza ati «Murashaka ko mbagirira nte?»" 
Matthew20:33 Ziramusubiza ziti «Nyagasani, duhe guhumuka amaso!»" 
Matthew20:34 Yezu agize impuhwe, azikora ku maso, maze ako kanya zirabona. Ni ko kumukurikira." 
Matthew21:1 Igihe begereye Yeruzalemu, bageze i Betifage ku musozi w’Imizeti, Yezu yohereza babiri mu bigishwa be." 
Matthew21:2 Arababwira ati «Nimujye mu mudugudu uri imbere yanyu; ako kanya nimuhagera, murasanga indogobe iziritse hamwe n’iyayo, muziziture, muzinzanire." 
Matthew21:3 Nihagira ugira icyo ababwira, mumusubize muti ’Nyagasani arazikeneye, ariko arazohereza vuba’.»" 
Matthew21:4 Ibyo byabereye kugira ngo huzuzwe ibyo umuhanuzi yavuze, ati" 
Matthew21:5 «Mubwire Umwari wa Siyoni, muti ’Nguwo Umwami wawe w’ituze agusanze yicaye ku ndogobe n’iyayo, icyana cy’itungo riheka imizigo.’»" 
Matthew21:6 Nuko abigishwa baragenda, maze bagenza uko Yezu yabibategetse;" 
Matthew21:7 bazana indogobe n’iyayo. Hanyuma bazigerekaho ibishura byabo, maze Yezu yicaraho."
