Matthew21:8 Nuko abantu benshi barambura ibishura byabo mu nzira, abandi batema amashami y’ibiti maze bayasasa mu nzira." 
Matthew21:9 Nuko imbaga y’abantu yari imushagaye, bamwe imbere abandi inyuma, bose barangurura amajwi bati «Hozana! Harakabaho mwene Dawudi! Nasingizwe Uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! Hozana, nahabwe impundu mu ijuru!»" 
Matthew21:10 Igihe yinjiye muri Yeruzalemu, umurwa wose ucikamo igikuba; barabaza bati «Uwo ni nde?»" 
Matthew21:11 Naho rubanda ngo «Uwo ni Umuhanuzi Yezu, wo kuri Nazareti, mu Galileya.»" 
Matthew21:12 Hanyuma Yezu yinjira mu Ngoro y’Imana. Nuko yirukana abacuruzi n’abaguzi bari mu Ngoro y'Imana; ahirika ameza y’abavunjaga amafaranga, n’intebe z’abacuruzaga inuma." 
Matthew21:13 Maze arababwira ati «Handitswe ngo ’Inzu yanjye izitwa ingoro yo gusengeramo; none mwebwe mwayigize ubuvumo bw’abajura!’» 
Matthew21:14 Hari kandi impumyi n’abacumbagira, bamusanga mu Ngoro maze arabakiza." 
Matthew21:15 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko, babonye ibitangaza amaze gukora n’abana basakuzaga mu Ngoro bati ’Harakabaho mwene Dawudi!» Bararakara." 
Matthew21:16 Ni ko kumubwira bati «Aho urumva ibyo bariya bavuga?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndabyumva, ariko se ntimwigeze musoma aya magambo ngo ’Witeguriye igisingizo mu kanwa k’abakiri ku ibere n’ibitambambuga’?»" 
Matthew21:17 Hanyuma abasiga aho, maze ava mu murwa, ajya kurara i Betaniya." 
Matthew21:18 Agaruka mu murwa mu gitondo cya kare, yumva arashonje." 
Matthew21:19 Abonye igiti cy’umutini hafi y’inzira, aracyegera, ariko agisangana ibibabi bisa. Nuko arakibwira ati «Ntuzagire imbuto wera ukundi!» Maze ako kanya icyo giti cy’umutini kiruma." 
Matthew21:20 Abigishwa babibonye baratangara, bati «Cyumye gite aka kanya?»" 
Matthew21:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri: iyaba mwari mufite ukwemera kudashidikanya, ntimwakora gusa ibyo maze kugirira iki giti cy’umutini, ahubwo mwabwira uriya musozi muti ’Vaho wirohe mu nyanja’, maze bikaba." 
Matthew21:22 Icyo muzasaba cyose musenga, mubigiranye ukwemera, muzagihabwa.»" 
Matthew21:23 Igihe amaze kwinjira mu Ngoro ariho yigisha, abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango, baramusanga bati «Ibyo ubikoresha bubasha ki? Ni nde waguhaye ubwo bubasha?»" 
Matthew21:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Reka nanjye ngire icyo mbabaza; nimukimbwira nanjye ndababwira inkomoko y’ububasha nkoresha ibyo. 
Matthew21:25 Batisimu ya Yohani yaturukaga he? Ni mu ijuru cyangwa se ni ku bantu?» Ariko bo baribwira bati «Nidusubiza tuti ’Ni mu ijuru’, aratubwira ati ’Mwabujijwe n’iki kumwemera?’" 
Matthew21:26 Naho nidusubiza ngo ’Ni ku bantu’, ntidukira rubanda kuko bose bahamya ko Yohani ari umuhanuzi.»" 
Matthew21:27 Basubiza Yezu bati «Ntitubizi.» Na we arabasubiza ati «Nanjye ni uko, simbabwira inkomoko y’ububasha nkoresha ibyo.»" 
Matthew21:28 Ngaho nimumbwire uko mubyumva. Umugabo yari afite abahungu babiri. Asanga uwa mbere, aramubwira ati ’Mwana wanjye, uyu munsi jya gukora mu mizabibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 Undi aramusubiza ati ’Ndanze!’; ariko yisubiraho, ajyayo." 
Matthew21:30 Se abwira uwa kabiri kwa kundi; undi arasubiza ati ’Yego, Mubyeyi’, nyamara ntiyajyayo." 
Matthew21:31 Ni uwuhe muri abo bombi wakoze icyo se yashatse?» Bati «Ni uwa mbere.» Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri: abasoresha n’abakobwa b’ibyomanzi bazabatanga mu Ngoma y’Imana. 
Matthew21:32 Kuko Yohani yaje abayobora inzira y’ubutungane, maze ntimwamwemera; abasoresha bo n’abakobwa b’ibyomanzi baramwemera. Naho mwebwe mubonye urwo rugero, ntimwarushya mwisubiraho ngo mwemere." 
Matthew21:33 Nimwumve undi mugani. Habayeho umuntu wari ufite umurima, awuhingamo imizabibu, awuzengurutsa uruzitiro, acukuramo urwengero, yubakamo n’umunara w’abararirizi, awatira abahinzi, maze yigira mu rugendo." 
Matthew21:34 Igihe cy’isarura cyegereje, atuma abagaragu be ku bahinzi, kugira ngo bahabwe ibyatamurima." 
Matthew21:35 Ariko abahinzi bafata abagaragu be, umwe baramukubita, undi baramwica, undi bamutera amabuye." 
Matthew21:36 Nuko arongera yohereza abandi bagaragu baruta aba mbere ubwinshi, na bo babagenza batyo." 
Matthew21:37 Hanyuma abatumaho umwana we, yibwira ati ’Umwana wanjye we nta cyo bazamutwara.’" 
Matthew21:38 Ariko abahinzi babonye umwana we, barabwirana bati ’Dore uzamuzungura; nimuze tumwice, maze tuzazungure ibye!’" 
Matthew21:39 Nuko baramufata, bamwigiza hirya y’imizabibu, baramwica." 
Matthew21:40 Aho nyir’imizabibu azahindukirira, azagenzereza ate abo bahinzi?»" 
Matthew21:41 Baramusubiza bati «Abo batindi, azabica urw’abagome, maze imizabibu ye ayatire abandi bahinzi bazajya bamuha ibyatamurima uko isarura rigeze.»" 
Matthew21:42 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Ntimwigeze musoma mu Byanditswe ngo ’Ibuye ryajugunywe n’abubatsi ryabaye insanganyarukuta; icyo gikorwa cya Nyagasani cyatubereye igitangaza.’ 
Matthew21:43 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ’Ingoma y’Imana muzayinyagwa, maze ihabwe ihanga rizayibyaza imbuto.’" 
Matthew21:44 Uzagwa kuri iryo buye, azamenagurika; kandi uwo rizagwira na we, rizamujanjagura.»" 
Matthew21:45 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n'Abafarizayi bumvise imigani ye, bamenya ko ari bo avuga." 
Matthew21:46 Nuko bashaka kumufata, ariko batinya rubanda rwabonaga ko ari umuhanuzi." 
Matthew22:1 Yezu yongera kubabwirira mu migani, ati" 
Matthew22:2 «Ingoma y’ijuru imeze nk’umwami wacyuje ubukwe bw’umuhungu we; 
Matthew22:3 agatuma abagaragu be guhamagara abatumiwe mu bukwe, ariko banga kuza." 
Matthew22:4 Nuko yongera gutuma abandi bagaragu, kugira ngo babwire abatumiwe bati ’Dore nateguye amazimano; ibimasa byanjye n’amatungo yanjye y’imishishe byabazwe, byose byatunganye, nimuze mu bukwe.»" 
Matthew22:5 Ariko bo ntibabyitaho barigendera, umwe mu murima we, undi mu bucuruzi bwe;" 
Matthew22:6 maze abandi bafata abagaragu babagirira nabi, barabica." 
Matthew22:7 Umwami ararakara, yohereza ingabo ze zirimbura abo babisha, kandi zitwika umugi wabo." 
Matthew22:8 Hanyuma abwira abagaragu be, ati ’Iby’ubukwe byateguwe, ariko abatumiwe ntibari babikwiye." 
Matthew22:9 Nimugende rero mu mayirabiri, mutumire mu bukwe abantu bose muhura.’" 
Matthew22:10 Abo bagaragu bakwira amayira, bakoranya abo babonye bose, ari ababi, ari n’abeza, maze inzu y’ubukwe yuzura abatumirwa." 
Matthew22:11 Nuko umwami arinjira ngo arebe abari ku meza, maze ahabona umuntu utambaye iby’ubukwe." 
Matthew22:12 Aramubwira ati ’Mugenzi wanjye, waje ute hano udafite umwambaro w’abakwe?’ Undi araceceka." 
Matthew22:13 Nuko umwami abwira abahereza, ati ’Nimumubohe amaguru n’amaboko, mumujugunye hanze mu mwijima, aho azaririra kandi agahekenya amenyo.’" 
Matthew22:14 Koko hahamagarwa benshi, hagatorwa bake.»" 
Matthew22:15 Abafarizayi baragenda, bajya inama yo gufatira Yezu ku magambo avuga." 
Matthew22:16 Nuko bamutumaho abigishwa babo n’Abaherodiyani. Baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, tuzi ko uvuga ukuri kandi ukigisha inzira y’Imana nta cyo wikanga, kuko udatinya amaso y’abantu." 
Matthew22:17 Nuko rero tubwire uko ubyumva: ese guha Kayizari umusoro, biremewe cyangwa si byo?»" 
Matthew22:18 Ariko Yezu wari uzi ubugome bwabo, arabasubiza ati «Mwa ndyarya mwe, igituma munyinja ni iki?" 
Matthew22:19 Nimunyereke igiceri mutangaho umusoro.» Bamuhereza idenari. 
Matthew22:20 Nuko arababaza ati «Iri shusho n’ibyanditseho ni ibya nde?» 
Matthew22:21 Bati «Ni ibya Kayizari.» Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Ibya Kayizari, mubisubize Kayizari, n’iby’Imana, mubisubize Imana!»" 
Matthew22:22 Babyumvise baratangara, bamusiga aho barigendera." 
Matthew22:23 Uwo munsi nanone, Abasaduseyi ba bandi bahakana iby’izuka ry’abapfuye baramwegera, baramubaza bati" 
Matthew22:24 «Mwigisha, Musa yaravuze ati ’Umuntu napfa ari incike, uwo bava inda imwe ajye acyura uwo mupfakazi, kugira ngo acikure nyakwigendera.’" 
Matthew22:25 Iwacu rero habayeho abavandimwe barindwi. Uwa mbere ashaka umugore, hanyuma apfa bucike, umugore we amusigira uwo bava inda imwe." 
Matthew22:26 Uwa kabiri na we bimugendekera bityo, n’uwa gatatu biba uko, kugeza ku wa karindwi." 
Matthew22:27 Amaherezo, na wa mugore aza gupfa." 
Matthew22:28 Igihe cy’izuka uwo mugore azaba uwa nde muri abo bavandimwe barindwi, ko bose bamutunze?»" 
Matthew22:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Murayoba kuko mutazi Ibyanditswe, ntimumenye n’ububasha bw’Imana." 
Matthew22:30 Igihe cy’izuka nta we uzagira umugore, nta n’uzagira umugabo, ahubwo bazamera nk’abamalayika mu ijuru." 
Matthew22:31 Naho iby’izuka ry’abapfuye, ntimwasomye aho Imana ibabwira iti" 
Matthew22:32 ’Ndi Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, n’Imana ya Yakobo’? Nta bwo rero Imana ari iy’abapfuye, ahubwo ni iy’abazima!»" 
Matthew22:33 Maze rubanda bari babyumvise batangazwa n’inyigisho ze. 
Matthew22:34 Abafarizayi bumvise ko yazibye akanwa k’Abasaduseyi, barakorana." 
Matthew22:35 Maze umwe muri bo wari umwigishamategeko amubaza amwinja, ati" 
Matthew22:36 «Mwigisha, itegeko riruta ayandi ni irihe?»" 
Matthew22:37 Aramubwira ati «Uzakunde Nyagasani, Imana yawe, n’umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose, n’ubwenge bwawe bwose." 
Matthew22:38 Iryo ni itegeko riruta ayandi kandi ni ryo rya mbere. 
Matthew22:39 Irya kabiri risa na ryo: Urajye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda. 
Matthew22:40 Muri ayo mategeko uko ari abiri, habumbiyemo andi yose n’ibyo Abahanuzi bavuze.»" 
Matthew22:41 Abafarizayi bamaze gukorana, Yezu arababaza ati" 
Matthew22:42 «Icyo mutekereza kuri Kristu ni iki? Ni mwene nde?» Bati «Ni mwene Dawudi.» 
Matthew22:43 Arongera ati «Bite se ko Dawudi, abwirijwe na Roho w’Imana, amwita Umutegetsi, avuga ati" 
Matthew22:44 ’Nyagasani yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye, ati: Icara iburyo bwanjye kugeza igihe abanzi bawe mbahindura imisego y’ibirenge byawe.’" 
Matthew22:45 Uwo rero Dawudi yita Umutegetsi we, yaba umwana we ate?»" 
Matthew22:46 Ntihagira ubasha kumusubiza n’ijambo na rimwe; kandi kuva uwo munsi, nta n’uwongeye gutinyuka kugira icyo amubaza." 
Matthew23:1 Nuko Yezu abwira rubanda n’abigishwa be, ati" 
Matthew23:2 «Abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi bicaye ku ntebe ya Musa: 
Matthew23:3 nuko rero, nimukore kandi mukurikize icyo bababwira cyose, ariko ntimukigane imigenzereze yabo, kuko bavuga kandi ntibakore." 
Matthew23:4 Bahambira imitwaro iremereye, bakayikorera abantu, ariko bo bakanga kuyikozaho n’urutoki!" 
Matthew23:5 Muri byose bakorera kugira ngo abantu bababone. Ni cyo gituma barushanwa gutwara ku kuboko no ku gahanga udupapuro twanditseho Amategeko, n’incunda z’imyambaro yabo bakazigira ndende." 
Matthew23:6 Bakunda ibyicaro bya mbere aho batumiwe, n’intebe za mbere mu masengero," 
Matthew23:7 bagakunda kuramukirizwa ku karubanda no kumva abantu babita ’Mwigisha’. 
Matthew23:8 Mwebweho ntimugatume babita ’Mwigisha’, kuko Umwigisha wanyu ari umwe gusa, mwese mukaba abavandimwe." 
Matthew23:9 Ku isi ntimukagire uwo mwita Umubyeyi wanyu, kuko mufite Umwe gusa, Imana Data uri mu ijuru." 
Matthew23:10 Ntimukemere ko babita ’Abayobozi’, kuko mufite Umuyobozi umwe gusa, ari we Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Umukuru muri mwe azabe umugaragu wanyu. 
Matthew23:12 Uzikuza wese azacishwa bugufi, naho uzicisha bugufi azakuzwa." 
Matthew23:13 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe mutesha abantu irembo ry’Ingoma y’ijuru! Ubwanyu ntimwinjira, maze n’ababishaka ntimureke binjira." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe mubungera mu nyanja no mu bihugu kugira ngo mugire uwo muhindura, kandi mwamubona mukamugira uwo kujugunywa mu nyenga y’umuriro bitambutse ibyanyu incuro ebyiri!" 
Matthew23:16 Nimwiyimbire, bayobozi muhumye, muvuga ngo ’Iyo umuntu arahije Ingoro y’Imana nta cyo bitwaye, ariko yarahiza zahabu y’Ingoro akaba akomeje.’" 
Matthew23:17 Mwa basazi mwe n’impumyi! Ikiruta ikindi ni ikihe, zahabu cyangwa Ingoro y'Imana itagatifuza iyo zahabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Murongera kandi muti ’Iyo umuntu arahije urutambiro nta cyo bitwaye, ariko yarahiza ituro riri ku rutambiro akaba akomeje.’" 
Matthew23:19 Mwa mpumyi mwe! Ikiruta ikindi ni iki, ituro cyangwa urutambiro rutagatifuza ituro?" 
Matthew23:20 Nuko rero kurahiza urutambiro ni ukurahiza n’ibiruriho byose; 
Matthew23:21 kurahiza Ingoro ni ukurahiza n’Uyituyemo. 
Matthew23:22 Kurahiza ijuru ni ukurahiza intebe y’Imana n’Uyicayeho. 
Matthew23:23 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe mutanga igice cya cumi cy’isogi, n’icy’imbwija, n’icy’inyabutongo, mwirengagije ingingo zikomeye z’amategeko: ubutabera, imbabazi, no kutaryarya. Ngibyo ibyo mwagombaga gutunganya mutirengagije n’ibindi!" 
Matthew23:24 Mwa bayobozi bahumye mwe, muminina umubu ariko mukamira bunguri ingamiya!" 
Matthew23:25 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe musukura inkongoro n’imbehe inyuma gusa, naho imbere huzuye ubwambuzi n’ingeso mbi." 
Matthew23:26 Mufarizayi w’impumyi! Banza usukure inkongoro imbere, n’inyuma habonereho kuba hasukuye." 
Matthew23:27 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe mumeze nk’imva zirabye ingwa; inyuma ni nziza, naho imbere zuzuye amagufa y’abapfuye n’ibihumanya by’ubwoko bwose." 
Matthew23:28 Namwe ni uko mumeze: imbere y’abantu mwigira intungane, nyamara mu mutima haganje uburyarya n’ubugome." 
Matthew23:29 Nimwiyimbire, bigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi b’indyarya, mwe mwubakira imva z’abahanuzi mugasukura ibituro by’intungane" 
Matthew23:30 mukavuga ngo ’Iyo tubaho mu gihe cy’abasokuruza bacu ntituba twarafatanyije na bo kumena amaraso y’abahanuzi.’ 
Matthew23:31 Bityo mukihamya ubwanyu ko muri abana b’abishe Abahanuzi. 
Matthew23:32 Ngaho nimwigane ba sokuruza banyu, maze mubarenze ubugome!" 
Matthew23:33 Mwa nzoka mwe, mwa nyoko z’impiri mwe, muzarokoka mute igihano cy’umuriro w’iteka?" 
Matthew23:34 Dore rero mboherereje abahanuzi, abanyabuhanga n’abigisha; muzica bamwe mubabambe ku musaraba, abandi muzabakubitira mu masengero yanyu, mubameneshe mu migi yose." 
Matthew23:35 Bityo muzaryozwa amaraso yose atagira inenge yamenetse ku isi, kuva ku maraso ya Abeli intungane, kugera ku maraso ya Zakariya, mwene Barakiya, mwatsinze hagati y’Ingoro n’urutambiro rwayo." 
Matthew23:36 Ndababwira ukuri, ibyo byose bizaryozwa ab’iki gihe!" 
Matthew23:37 Yeruzalemu, Yeruzalemu, wowe wica abahanuzi ugatera amabuye abagutumweho, ni kangahe nashatse kwegeranya abana bawe, nk’uko inkoko ibundikira abana bayo mu mababa, ariko wowe ukanga!" 
Matthew23:38 Dore inzu mutuyemo izabasenyukiraho. 
Matthew23:39 Koko rero ndabibabwiye: ntimuzongera kumbona ukundi, kugeza igihe muzavuga muti ’Nasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!’»" 
Matthew24:1 Nuko Yezu ava mu Ngoro y'Imana, aragenda. Abigishwa be baramwegera, bamuratira uburyo iyo Ngoro yubakitse." 
Matthew24:2 Ariko arabasubiza, ati «Ntimubona ibi byose? Ndababwira ukuri, hano nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi ridashenywe.»" 
Matthew24:3 Nuko amaze kwicara ku musozi w’Imizeti, abigishwa be baraza baramwegera, baramubaza biherereye, bati «Tubwire igihe ibyo bizabera, n’ikizaba ikimenyetso cy’ukuza kwawe n’icy’iherezo ry’isi.»" 
Matthew24:4 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya! 
Matthew24:5 Kuko hazaduka benshi biyita izina ryanjye, bavuga ngo ’Ni jyewe Kristu’, maze bakayobya benshi." 
Matthew24:6 Muzumva bavuga intambara, mwumve n’impuha zayo. Ariko ntimuzakuke umutima, kuko bigomba kuba; nyamara si byo herezo." 
Matthew24:7 Igihugu kizahagurukira ikindi, ingoma ishyamirane n’indi. Hirya no hino hazatera inzara n’imitingito y’isi." 
Matthew24:8 Ibyo byose bizamera nk’intangiriro y’ububabare bw’umugore wenda kubyara. 
Matthew24:9 Ubwo bazabagabiza ababababaza, bakanabica; muzangwa n’amahanga yose kubera izina ryanjye." 
Matthew24:10 Benshi bazaboneraho ibibagusha, maze bazasubiranemo bangane." 
Matthew24:11 Hazaduka n’abahanurabinyoma batabarika, maze bayobye abantu benshi." 
Matthew24:12 Urukundo ruzacogora muri benshi kubera ko ubugome buzaba bwiganje. 
Matthew24:13 Ariko uzakomera kugeza ku ndunduro, uwo ni we uzarokoka." 
Matthew24:14 Iyi Nkuru Nziza y’Ingoma izamamazwe ku isi yose, kugira ngo ibere gihamya amahanga yose. Ubwo ni ho iherezo rizagera." 
Matthew24:15 Nuko rero nimubona ’rya shyano ry’icyorezo’ ryavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Daniyeli rihagaze ahantu hatagatifu — usoma abyumve neza! — 
Matthew24:16 icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi. 
Matthew24:17 Uzaba ari hejuru y’inzu, ntazururuke ngo hari icyo agiye gufata mu nzu ye." 
Matthew24:18 Kandi uzaba ari mu murima, ntazahindukire ngo ajye gufata umwitero we!" 
Matthew24:19 Hagowe abazaba batwite n’abazaba bonsa, muri iyo minsi!" 
Matthew24:20 Nimusabe kugira ngo ihunga ryanyu ritazaba mu itumba cyangwa ku munsi w’isabato. 
Matthew24:21 Nuko rero hazaba amagorwa akomeye atigeze aboneka kuva aho isi yatangiriye kugeza kuri uyu munsi, kandi adateze kuzaboneka ukundi." 
Matthew24:22 Ndetse iyo minsi iyo itagerurwa, nta kizima cyajyaga kurokoka; ariko iyo minsi izagerurwa bigiriwe abatowe." 
Matthew24:23 Nuko rero nihagira ubabwira ati ’Dore Kristu ari hano’, cyangwa ’ari hariya’, ntimuzabyemere." 
Matthew24:24 Koko hazaduka abiyita Kristu, haze n’abahanuzi b’ibinyoma; bazerekana ibimenyetso bikomeye, bakore n’ibitangaza, byayobya ndetse n’abatowe bibaye ibishoboka." 
Matthew24:25 Dore ndababuriye hakiri kare. 
Matthew24:26 Nibababwira ngo ’Nguriya mu butayu’, ntimuzajyeyo; bati ’Nguriya ari mu nzu’, ntimuzabyemere." 
Matthew24:27 Uko umurabyo urabiriza mu burasirazuba ukabonekera mu burengerazuba, ni ko ukuza k’Umwana w’umuntu kuzamera." 
Matthew24:28 Aho intumbi izaba iri hose, ni ho inkongoro zizakoranira." 
Matthew24:29 Bidatinze, nyuma y’iyo minsi y’amagorwa, izuba rizacura umwijima, ukwezi ntikuzamurika, inyenyeri zizahanuka ku ijuru, maze ibikomeye byo mu ijuru bihungabane." 
Matthew24:30 Ubwo ikimenyetso cy’Umwana w’umuntu kizaboneka mu ijuru, n’amoko yose y’isi azacure imiborogo, maze azabone Umwana w’umuntu aje ku bicu byo mu kirere afite ububasha n’ikuzo ryinshi." 
Matthew24:31 Nuko azatume abamalayika be bavuze ihembe riranguruye, bakoranye abo yatoye mu byerekezo bine by’isi, kuva aho ijuru ritangirira kugeza aho riherera." 
Matthew24:32 Nimurebere ku giti cy’umutini. Iyo amashami yacyo atoshye, n’amababi akamera, mumenya ko igihe cy’imbuto cyegereje." 
Matthew24:33 Namwe, nimubona ibyo byose bibaye, muzamenye ko Umwana w’umuntu ari hafi, ko yageze ku irembo." 
Matthew24:34 Ndababwira ukuri: iki gisekuru ntikizashira ibyo byose bitabaye. 
Matthew24:35 Ijuru n’isi bizashira, ariko amagambo yanjye ntazashira." 
Matthew24:36 Naho umunsi n’isaha ibyo bizabera nta we ubizi, ari abamalayika bo mu ijuru, ari Mwana, keretse Data wenyine." 
Matthew24:37 Mu gihe cy’ukuza k’Umwana w’umuntu bizamera nko mu minsi ya Nowa. 
Matthew24:38 Muri iyo minsi yabanjirije umwuzure, bararyaga kandi baranywaga, bashakaga abagore cyangwa abagabo, kugeza umunsi Nowa yinjiriye mu bwato," 
Matthew24:39 nuko abantu ntibagira icyo bamenya, kugera igihe umwuzure uziye ukabahitana bose. Nguko uko bizamera mu gihe cy’ukuza k’Umwana w’umuntu." 
Matthew24:40 Mu bagabo babiri bazaba bari mu mirima, umwe azatwarwa undi asigare;" 
Matthew24:41 mu bagore babiri bazaba basya, umwe azatwarwa undi asigare." 
Matthew24:42 Nuko rero murabe maso, kuko mutazi umunsi Umwami wanyu azaziraho." 
Matthew24:43 Murabizi: iyaba nyir’urugo yamenyaga igihe cy’ijoro umujura azaziraho, yabaye maso maze ntareke bamupfumurira inzu." 
Matthew24:44 Namwe rero nimube maso, kuko Umwana w’umuntu azaza igihe mudakeka." 
Matthew24:45 Mubirebye, ni nde mugaragu w’indahemuka kandi uzi ubwenge, atari uwo shebuja yemeye gushinga abo mu rugo rwe, kugira ngo ajye abaha igaburo ryabo ku gihe gikwiye?" 
Matthew24:46 Hahirwa uwo mugaragu, shebuja azagaruka agasanga agenza atyo!" 
Matthew24:47 Ndababwira ukuri: azamushinga ibyo atunze byose. 
Matthew24:48 Naho niba ari umugaragu mubi, wibwira ati ’Databuja aratinze’," 
Matthew24:49 maze agatangira gukubita bagenzi be, akarya akanywa hamwe n’abasinzi," 
Matthew24:50 shebuja azaza umunsi atamwitezeho no ku isaha atazi," 
Matthew24:51 amwirukane, amuherereze mu gice cy’indyarya: aho azaririra kandi agahekenya amenyo." 
Matthew25:1 Ubwo rero Ingoma y’ijuru izagereranywa n’abakobwa cumi bafashe amatara yabo, bajya gusanganira umukwe." 
Matthew25:2 Batanu muri bo bari abapfayongo, abandi batanu ari abanyamutima." 
Matthew25:3 Abakobwa b’abapfayongo bafata amatara yabo, ariko ntibajyana amavuta yo kongeramo;" 
Matthew25:4 naho abanyamutima bafata amatara hamwe n’amavuta mu tweso. 
Matthew25:5 Nuko rero umukwe atinze, barahunyiza, bose barasinzira." 
Matthew25:6 Ariko mu gicuku akamu karavuga ngo ’Dore umukwe araje, nimujye kumusanganira!’" 
Matthew25:7 Nuko ba bakobwa bose barabaduka, batunganya amatara yabo." 
Matthew25:8 Ab’abapfayongo babwira ab’abanyamutima bati ’Nimuduhe ku mavuta yanyu, kuko amatara yacu agiye kuzima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Ariko abanyamutima barabasubiza bati ’Ahubwo nimugane abacuruzi, mwigurire, tutavaho tubura aduhagije twese.’" 
Matthew25:10 Igihe bagiye kuyagura, umukwe aba araje; abiteguye binjirana na we mu nzu y’ubukwe, nuko umuryango urakingwa." 
Matthew25:11 Hanyuma ba bakobwa bandi baraza, barahamagara bati ’Nyagasani, Nyagasani, dukingurire!’" 
Matthew25:12 We rero arabasubiza ati ’Ndababwira ukuri: simbazi!’ 
Matthew25:13 Nuko rero, murabe maso, kuko mutazi umunsi n’isaha." 
Matthew25:14 Koko, iby’icyo gihe bizamera nk’umuntu wari ugiye kujya mu rugendo, agahamagara abagaragu be, akababitsa ibintu bye." 
Matthew25:15 Umwe amuha amatalenta atanu, undi abiri, undi imwe, umuntu wese ku rugero rw’icyo ashoboye, hanyuma aragenda." 
Matthew25:16 Ako kanya uwari wahawe amatalenta atanu ajya kuyakoresha maze yunguka andi atanu. 
Matthew25:17 Uwari wahawe abiri na we, yunguka andi abiri." 
Matthew25:18 Naho uwari wahawe imwe, aragenda acukura umwobo mu gitaka maze ahishamo imari ya shebuja." 
Matthew25:19 Hashize igihe kirekire, shebuja wa ba bagaragu araza, maze abamurikisha ibintu bye." 
Matthew25:20 Uwahawe amatalenta atanu aregera maze amuhereza amatalenta atanu yandi, agira ati ’Shobuja, wari wampaye amatalenta atanu, dore andi atanu nungutse.’" 
Matthew25:21 Shebuja aramubwira ati ’Ni uko, mugaragu mwiza kandi udahemuka, wabaye inyangamugayo mu bintu bike, nzagushinga ibisumbyeho; ngwino wishimane na Shobuja!’" 
Matthew25:22 Uwahawe amatalenta abiri, na we araza, agira ati ’Shobuja, wari wampaye amatalenta abiri, dore andi abiri nungutse.’" 
Matthew25:23 Shebuja aramubwira ati ’Ni uko, mugaragu mwiza kandi udahemuka, wabaye inyangamugayo mu bintu bike, nzagushinga ibisumbyeho; ngwino wishimane na Shobuja.’" 
Matthew25:24 Haza uwahawe talenta imwe, aravuga ati ’Shobuja, nzi ko uri umuntu w’umunyabugugu, usarura aho utabibye, ukanura aho utanitse." 
Matthew25:25 Naratinye, ndagenda mpisha talenta yawe mu gitaka: dore ibiri ibyawe.’" 
Matthew25:26 Naho shebuja aramusubiza ati ’Mugaragu mubi kandi w’umunebwe, wari uzi ko nsarura aho ntabibye, nkanura aho ntanitse;" 
Matthew25:27 uba rero warabikije imari yanjye abari kunyungukira, nagaruka nkabona ibyanjye n’inyungu." 
Matthew25:28 Nimumwambure talenta ye maze muyihe ufite amatalenta cumi; 
Matthew25:29 kuko utunze bazamuha agakungahara; naho udafite na mba bazamwaka n’utwo yaganyiragaho. 
Matthew25:30 Naho uwo mugaragu w’imburamumaro nimumujugunye hanze, aho azaririra kandi agahekenya amenyo.’" 
Matthew25:31 Igihe Umwana w’umuntu azaza yuje ikuzo, ashagawe n’abamalayika bose, ubwo azicara ku ntebe ye y’ikuzo." 
Matthew25:32 Ibihugu byose bizakoranyirizwe imbere ye, maze azatandukanye abantu nk’uko umushumba asobanura intama n’ihene." 
Matthew25:33 Azashyira intama iburyo bwe, n’ihene ibumoso." 
Matthew25:34 Nuko rero Umwami azabwire abari iburyo bwe, ati ’Nimuze, abahawe umugisha na Data, muhabwe Ingoma mwateguriwe kuva isi ikiremwa;" 
Matthew25:35 kuko nashonje mukamfungurira; nagize inyota mumpa icyo kunywa; naje ndi umugenzi murancumbikira; 
Matthew25:36 nari nambaye ubusa muranyambika; nari ndwaye muransura; nari imbohe muza kundeba.’ 
Matthew25:37 Nuko intungane zizamusubize ziti ’Nyagasani, twakubonye ryari ushonje, maze turagufungurira; ufite inyota tuguha icyo unywa;" 
Matthew25:38 uri umugenzi turagucumbikira; wambaye ubusa turakwambika; 
Matthew25:39 urwaye cyangwa se uri imbohe tuza kukureba?’ 
Matthew25:40 Nuko Umwami azabasubize, ati ’Ndababwira ukuri: ibyo mwagiriye umwe muri abo bavandimwe banjye baciye bugufi, ni jye mwabaga mubigiriye.’" 
Matthew25:41 Hanyuma azabwire n’ab’ibumoso, ati ’Nimumve iruhande, mwa bivume mwe, mujye mu muriro w’iteka wagenewe Sekibi n’abamalayika be;" 
Matthew25:42 kuko nashonje ntimwamfungurira; nagize inyota ntimwampa icyo nywa; 
Matthew25:43 naje ndi umugenzi ntimwancumbikira; nari nambaye ubusa ntimwanyambika; nari ndwaye cyangwa ndi imbohe ntimwaza kunsura.’ 
Matthew25:44 Nuko abo na bo bazamubaze bati ’Nyagasani, twakubonye ryari ushonje cyangwa ufite inyota; uri umugenzi cyangwa wambaye ubusa; urwaye cyangwa uri imbohe ntitwagufasha?’" 
Matthew25:45 Nuko azabasubize, ati ’Ndababwira ukuri: ibyo mutagiriye umwe muri abo baciye bugufi, ni jye mutabigiriye.’" 
Matthew25:46 Maze abo bazajye mu bubabare bw’iteka, naho intungane zijye mu bugingo bw’iteka.»" 
Matthew26:1 Yezu arangije izo nyigisho zose, abwira abigishwa be, ati" 
Matthew26:2 «Muzi ko Pasika izaba mu minsi ibiri, maze Umwana w’umuntu agatangwa kugira ngo abambwe ku musaraba.»" 
Matthew26:3 Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bakoranira mu ngoro y’umuherezabitambo mukuru witwaga Kayifa," 
Matthew26:4 kugira ngo bajye inama yo gufata Yezu ku mayeri, maze bamwice." 
Matthew26:5 Icyakora baravugaga bati «Ntibizabe ku munsi mukuru, ejo rubanda rudatera imidugararo.»" 
Matthew26:6 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe," 
Matthew26:7 umugore aza amusanga, afite urweso rwuzuye umubavu umininnye, awusuka ku mutwe wa Yezu, igihe yari ku meza afungura." 
Matthew26:8 Abigishwa babibonye, bararakara bati «Bimaze iki gupfusha ubusa bene ako kageni?" 
Matthew26:9 Uwo mubavu wari kugurwa byinshi bigahabwa abakene!» 
Matthew26:10 Yezu arababwira ati «Uwo mugore muramutonganyiriza iki? Dore ibyo amaze kungirira ni byiza. 
Matthew26:11 Abakene muzabahorana iteka, ariko jye ntimuzamporana iteka." 
Matthew26:12 Kuba asize uyu mubavu umubiri wanjye, abigize ateganya ihambwa ryanjye." 
Matthew26:13 Ndababwira ukuri: aho iyi Nkuru Nziza izamamazwa hose, ku isi yose, bazajya bavuga n’ibyo amaze gukora, bamwibuke.»" 
Matthew26:14 Nuko umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri witwaga Yuda Isikariyoti, asanga abatware b’abaherezabitambo," 
Matthew26:15 arababwira ati «Murampa iki, nanjye nkamubagabiza?» Bamubarira ibiceri mirongo itatu bya feza." 
Matthew26:16 Kuva icyo gihe atangira gushaka uburyo buboneye bwo kumutanga. 
Matthew26:17 Umunsi wa mbere wo kurya Imigati idasembuye, abigishwa baza kubaza Yezu, bati «Aho ushaka ko tugutegurira ibyo kurya Pasika ni he?»" 
Matthew26:18 Ati «Nimujye mu murwa kwa kanaka, mumubwire muti ’Umwigisha agutumyeho ngo: Igihe cyanjye kiregereje, ndashaka kurira Pasika iwawe ndi kumwe n’abigishwa banjye.’»" 
Matthew26:19 Abigishwa babigenza uko Yezu yabategetse, maze bategura ibya Pasika." 
Matthew26:20 Bugorobye, Yezu ajya ku meza hamwe na ba Cumi na babiri." 
Matthew26:21 Nuko rero igihe bafungura, aravuga ati «Ndababwira ukuri: umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.»" 
Matthew26:22 Birabababaza cyane, batangira kumubaza umwe umwe, bati «Mbese yaba ari jye, Nyagasani?»" 
Matthew26:23 Arabasubiza ati «Uwo duhurije intoki ku mbehe, ni we ugiye kungambanira!" 
Matthew26:24 Koko Umwana w’umuntu aragiye nk’uko Ibyanditswe bimuvuga! Ariko rero hagowe uwo muntu wemeye kugambanira Umwana w’umuntu; icyari kuba cyiza ni uko uwo muntu aba ataravutse!» 
Matthew26:25 Yuda umugambanyi na we aramubaza, ati «Aho ntiyaba jye, Mwigisha?» Yezu ati «Urabyivugiye!»" 
Matthew26:26 Nuko bafungura, Yezu afata umugati; amaze gushimira Imana, arawumanyura, awuhereza abigishwa be, ati «Nimwakire, murye: iki ni umubiri wanjye.»" 
Matthew26:27 Arongera afata n’inkongoro, arashimira, arabahereza, ati «Nimunyweho mwese," 
Matthew26:28 kuko iki ari amaraso yanjye, ay’Isezerano, agiye kumenerwa benshi ngo bababarirwe ibyaha." 
Matthew26:29 Ndabibabwiye, sinzongera kunywa ukundi ku mbuto y’umuzabibu kugeza ku munsi nzanywera divayi nshya hamwe namwe mu Ngoma ya Data.»" 
Matthew26:30 Bamaze kuririmba zaburi, barasohoka bagana ku musozi w’Imizeti." 
Matthew26:31 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Iri joro, ibigiye kumbaho biratuma mwese muhungabana, kuko handitse ngo ’Nzakubita umushumba, maze umukumbi w’intama utatane.’" 
Matthew26:32 Ariko nimara kuzuka, nzabatanga mu Galileya.»" 
Matthew26:33 Petero asubiza, amubwira ati «N’aho bose bahungabana kubera wowe, jyewe sinzigera mpungabana!»" 
Matthew26:34 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ndakubwira ukuri: iri joro, isake itarabika, uranyihakana gatatu.»" 
Matthew26:35 Petero aramusubiza ati «N’aho nagomba gupfana nawe, sinzakwihakana!» Abigishwa bose bavuga batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Nuko Yezu ajyana na bo ahantu hitwa Getsemani maze abwira abigishwa be, ati «Nimube mwicaye aha, umwanya ngiye hariya gusenga.»" 
Matthew26:37 Ajyana na Petero na bene Zebedeyi bombi, atangira kugira agahinda n’ishavu." 
Matthew26:38 Nuko arababwira ati «Umutima wanjye urashavuye byo gupfa; nimugume aha, kandi mube maso hamwe nanjye.»" 
Matthew26:39 Hanyuma yigira imbere gato, agwa yubitse amaso, asenga agira ati «Data, niba bishoboka, iyi nkongoro ice kure yanjye! Nyamara ntibibe uko jye nshaka, ahubwo bibe uko wowe ushaka!»" 
Matthew26:40 Agaruka ku bigishwa be, maze asanga basinziriye; nuko abwira Petero ati «Ni ibyo byawe, ntiwashoboye kuba maso hamwe nanjye isaha imwe?" 
Matthew26:41 Nimube maso kandi mwambaze, kugira ngo mutaza kugwa mu gishuko: umutima w’umuntu uharanira ibyiza, naho umubiri wo ugira intege nke.»" 
Matthew26:42 Arongera ajya kwambaza ubwa kabiri, ati «Data, niba iyi nkongoro idashobora guhita ntayinyoyeho, icyo ushaka nigikorwe!»" 
Matthew26:43 Hanyuma agarutse, asanga na none basinziriye, kuko amaso yabo yari aremerewe." 
Matthew26:44 Arabihorera, maze yongera kujya kwambaza ubwa gatatu, asubira muri ya magambo." 
Matthew26:45 Hanyuma asanga abigishwa be, arababwira ati «Noneho nimusinzire, muruhuke! Dore isaha irageze, Umwana w’umuntu agiye gushyirwa mu maboko y’abanyabyaha." 
Matthew26:46 Nimuhaguruke, tugende! Dore untanga ari hafi.»" 
Matthew26:47 Akivuga ibyo, Yuda umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri atunguka aherekejwe n’abantu benshi bitwaje inkota n’ibibando, boherejwe n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango." 
Matthew26:48 Umugambanyi yari yabahaye iki kimenyetso, ati «Uwo nza guhobera nkamusoma, araba ari we, mumufate.»" 
Matthew26:49 Maze ako kanya yegera Yezu, ati «Ndakuramutsa, Mwigisha», nuko aramusoma." 
Matthew26:50 Naho Yezu aramubwira ati «Ncuti, kora icyakuzanye!» Nuko baratambuka, basingira Yezu, baramufata." 
Matthew26:51 Ni bwo umwe mu bari kumwe na Yezu akuye inkota ye, ayikubita umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo mukuru, amuca ugutwi." 
Matthew26:52 Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati «Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati, kuko abarwanisha inkota bose bazicishwa inkota." 
Matthew26:53 Ubona ko ntashobora gutabaza Data akampa muri aka kanya imitwe irenze cumi n’ibiri y’abamalayika? 
Matthew26:54 Ariko se Ibyanditswe ko ari uko bigomba kumera byazarangira bite?» 
Matthew26:55 Ubwo nyine Yezu abwira rubanda, ati «Mwaje n’inkota n’ibibando kumfata nk’aho ndi igisambo! Nyamara buri munsi nari nicaye mu Ngoro y'Imana nigisha, ntimwamfata." 
Matthew26:56 Ariko ibyo byose byabereye kugira ngo ibyanditswe n’Abahanuzi byuzuzwe.» Nuko abigishwa baramutererana, bose barahunga." 
Matthew26:57 Abari bafashe Yezu bamujyana kwa Kayifa, umuherezabitambo mukuru, aho abigishamategeko n’abakuru b’umuryango bari bateraniye." 
Matthew26:58 Petero yari yamukurikiye yitaruye kugera ku ngoro y’umuherezabitambo mukuru, arinjira yicarana n’abagaragu bo mu rugo, ashaka kumenya amaherezo." 
Matthew26:59 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Inama Nkuru yose bashakaga ibyo bahimbira Yezu ngo bamwicishe. 
Matthew26:60 Ariko ntibabibona, n’ubwo abashinjabinyoma baje ari benshi. Nyuma haza babiri," 
Matthew26:61 bati «Uyu muntu yaravuze, ati ’Nshobora gusenya Ingoro y’Imana maze nkongera kuyubaka mu minsi itatu.’»" 
Matthew26:62 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru arahaguruka, aramubwira ati «Ko nta cyo usubiza ku byo bakurega?»" 
Matthew26:63 Ariko Yezu aricecekera. Umuherezabitambo mukuru aramubwira ati «Nkurahije Imana ihoraho, ngo utubwire niba uri Kristu, Umwana w’Imana.»" 
Matthew26:64 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Wabyivugiye. Byongeye kandi, nkwerurire, kuva ubu muzabona Umwana w’umuntu yicaye iburyo bw’Ushoborabyose, kandi aje ku bicu byo mu kirere.»" 
Matthew26:65 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru ashishimura imyambaro ye, ati «Atutse Imana! Abagabo bandi turacyabakeneyeho iki? Dore noneho mwiyumviye ko atutse Imana!" 
Matthew26:66 Murabibona mute?» Baramusubiza bati «Akwiye urupfu!» 
Matthew26:67 Nuko bamucira mu maso, bamukubita ibipfunsi, abandi bamukubita inshyi," 
Matthew26:68 bavuga bati «Umva ko uri Kristu, ngaho duhanurire! Ni nde ugukubise?»" 
Matthew26:69 Naho ubwo Petero yari yicaye hanze mu rugo. Umuja aregera, aramubwira ati «Nawe wari kumwe na Yezu Umunyagalileya.»" 
Matthew26:70 Ariko we ahakanira imbere ya bose, ati «Sinumva icyo ushaka kuvuga.»" 
Matthew26:71 Igihe yerekeye ku irembo, undi muja aramubona, abwira abantu bari aho, ati «Uyu yari kumwe na Yezu Umunyanazareti.»" 
Matthew26:72 Nuko yongera kubihakanisha indahiro, ati «Sinzi uwo muntu!»" 
Matthew26:73 Bimaze akanya, abari aho baregera, babwira Petero, bati «Koko nawe uri uwabo! N’imvugo yawe irakugaragaza.»" 
Matthew26:74 Noneho atangira gutukana no gucurikiranya indahiro, ati «Uwo muntu, nta bwo muzi!» Ako kanya isake irabika." 
Matthew26:75 Nuko Petero yibuka ijambo Yezu yari yamubwiye, ati «Isake itarabika, uraba unyihakanye gatatu.» Nuko, arasohoka, arirana ishavu." 
Matthew27:1 Igitondo gitangaje, abatware b’abaherezabitambo bose n’abakuru b’umuryango bajya inama yo kwicisha Yezu." 
Matthew27:2 Bamaze kumuboha baramushorera, bamushyira Pilato wari Umutware mukuru w’igihugu." 
Matthew27:3 Nuko Yuda wari wamugambaniye abonye ko bamuciriye urubanza rwo gupfa, yumva yigaye maze agarurira abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bya biceri mirongo itatu bya feza, arababwira ati" 
Matthew27:4 «Nacumuye, ngambanira amaraso y’umuntu w’umwere.» Baramusubiza, bati «Bidutwaye iki? Ni wowe uzigorerwa!»" 
Matthew27:5 Nuko bya biceri abijugunya imbere y’Ingoro, ava aho, ajya kwimanika." 
Matthew27:6 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo bafata bya biceri, baravugana bati «Ntibikwiye ko bishyirwa hamwe n’amaturo yandi, kuko byaguzwe amaraso y’umuntu.»" 
Matthew27:7 Nuko, bamaze kujya inama, babigura umurima w’umubumbyi, ngo bajye bahahamba abagenzi." 
Matthew27:8 Ni cyo gituma uwo murima witwa «umurima w’amaraso», kugeza na n’ubu." 
Matthew27:9 Nuko huzuzwa ibyo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yavuze, ati «Bakiriye ibiceri mirongo itatu bya feza, ari byo kiguzi cy’uwagurishijwe n’abana ba Israheli," 
Matthew27:10 kandi babitanga ku murima w’umubumbyi, nk’uko Nyagasani yabintegetse.»" 
Matthew27:11 Yezu ajyanwa imbere y’umutware mukuru w’igihugu. Umutware aramubaza ati «Ni wowe Mwami w’Abayahudi?» Yezu aravuga ati «Urabyivugiye.» 
Matthew27:12 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bamurega byinshi, ariko we ntagire icyo asubiza." 
Matthew27:13 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati «Ntiwumva ibyo byose bagushinja?» 
Matthew27:14 Nuko ntiyagira ijambo na rimwe amusubiza, umutware biramutangaza cyane." 
Matthew27:15 Buri munsi mukuru Umutware yari yaramenyereye kurekurira rubanda imfungwa imwe bishakiye. 
Matthew27:16 Ubwo hari imfungwa y’igihangange yitwaga Barabasi. 
Matthew27:17 Pilato abwira rubanda rwakoranye ati «Uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni nde, Barabasi cyangwa Yezu bita Kristu?»" 
Matthew27:18 Nyamara yari azi ko bamutanze babitewe n’ishyari. 
Matthew27:19 Mu gihe yari yicaye mu rukiko aca urubanza, umugore we amutumaho, ati «Uramenye ntiwivange mu by’uwo muntu w’intungane, dore naraye ndose byinshi byambabaje bitewe na we.»" 
Matthew27:20 Ariko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bemeza rubanda ko basaba Barabasi, naho Yezu bakamwicisha." 
Matthew27:21 Nuko rero Umutware yongera kubabaza ati «Muri abo bombi uwo mushaka ko mbarekurira ni uwuhe?» Baramusubiza bati «Barabasi!» 
Matthew27:22 Pilato arababwira ati «Naho se Yezu bita Kristu, mugenze nte?» Bose barasubiza bati «Nabambwe ku musaraba!»" 
Matthew27:23 We, ati «Ikibi se yakoze ni ikihe?» Ariko barushaho gusakuza, bati «Nabambwe ku musaraba!»" 
Matthew27:24 Nuko Pilato abonye ko nta cyo byunguye, ahubwo ko urusaku rurushaho kwiyongera, afata amazi akarabira imbere ya rubanda, avuga ati «Ndi umwere w’ayo maraso, muzigorerwe.»" 
Matthew27:25 Rubanda rwose rurasubiza ruti «Amaraso ye araduhame, twe n’abana bacu.»" 
Matthew27:26 Nuko abarekurira Barabasi; naho Yezu, amaze kumukubitisha ibiboko, aramubegurira ngo abambwe ku musaraba." 
Matthew27:27 Nuko abasirikare b’Umutware mukuru bajyana Yezu mu gikari cy’ingoro ye, bamukoranyirizaho igombaniro ryose." 
Matthew27:28 Baramwambura, bamwambika igishura gitukura," 
Matthew27:29 hanyuma baboha ikamba ry’amahwa, barimutamiriza mu mutwe, bamufatisha n’urubingo mu kiganza cy’iburyo. Bagatera ivi imbere ye, bakamushungera bavuga bati «Urakarama, Mwami w’Abayahudi!»" 
Matthew27:30 Nuko bakamuvunderezaho amacandwe, bagafata rwa rubingo bakarumukubita mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Bamaze kumukwena, bamwambura igishura, bamwambika imyambaro ye, maze bamujyana kumubamba ku musaraba." 
Matthew27:32 Basohotse bahura n’Umunyasireni witwa Simoni, bamuhatira gutwara umusaraba wa Yezu." 
Matthew27:33 Bageze ahantu hitwa Gologota, bikavuga ku Kibihanga," 
Matthew27:34 bamuha divayi ivanze n’indurwe ngo anywe; asomyeho yanga kuyinywa. 
Matthew27:35 Bamaze kumubamba ku musaraba bigabanya imyambaro ye bakoresheje ubufindo. 
Matthew27:36 Nuko bicara aho baramurinda. 
Matthew27:37 Hejuru y’umutwe we bahashyira urubaho rwanditseho icyo azize, ngo «Uyu ni Yezu Umwami w’Abayahudi.»" 
Matthew27:38 Icyo gihe hari ibisambo bibiri byari bibambanywe na we, kimwe iburyo, ikindi ibumoso." 
Matthew27:39 Abahisi bakamutuka bazunguza umutwe," 
Matthew27:40 bavuga bati «Wowe usenya Ingoro y’Imana, ukongera kuyubaka mu minsi itatu, ikize ubwawe niba uri Umwana w’Imana, maze umanuke ku musaraba!»" 
Matthew27:41 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo na bo bakamuseka, n’abigishamategeko, n’abakuru b’umuryango, bati" 
Matthew27:42 «Yakijije abandi, none ntashoboye kwikiza ubwe! Harya ngo ni Umwami wa Israheli, ngaho namanuke ku musaraba tumwemere!" 
Matthew27:43 Yiringiye Imana; nimukize rero ubu niba imukunze! Kuko yavuze ati ’Ndi Umwana w’Imana.’» 
Matthew27:44 N’abambuzi babambanywe na we bakamukwena batyo. 
Matthew27:45 Kuva ku isaha ya gatandatu kugeza ku isaha ya cyenda hacura umwijima ku isi yose. 
Matthew27:46 Ahagana ku isaha ya cyenda, Yezu avuga mu ijwi riranguruye, ati «Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?» Bivuga ngo «Mana yanjye, Mana yanjye, icyatumye untererana ni iki?»" 
Matthew27:47 Bamwe mu bari aho bamwumvise, baravuga bati «Aratabaza Eliya!»" 
Matthew27:48 Ako kanya umwe muri bo yiruka ajya gufata icyangwe, akivika muri divayi irura, maze agitunga ku rubingo, aramuhereza ngo anywe." 
Matthew27:49 Ariko abandi baramubwira bati «Reka turebe niba Eliya aza kumukiza!» 
Matthew27:50 Yezu yongera kurangurura ijwi cyane, nuko araca." 
Matthew27:51 Ni bwo umubambiko wo mu Ngoro y’Imana utanyutsemo kabiri, kuva hejuru kugeza hasi; isi ihinda umushyitsi, ibitare biriyasa." 
Matthew27:52 Imva zirakinguka, n’imibiri y’abatagatifu benshi bapfuye irazuka." 
Matthew27:53 Yezu amaze kuzuka, na bo bava mu mva zabo, bajya mu Murwa Mutagatifu, maze babonekera abantu benshi." 
Matthew27:54 Umutegeka hamwe n’abasirikare be barindanaga Yezu, babonye umutingito w’isi n’ibyari bibaye, bagira ubwoba bwinshi, baravuga bati «Uyu koko yari Umwana w’Imana!»" 
Matthew27:55 Aho hari abagore benshi bareberaga kure; abo ni abari barakurikiye Yezu kuva mu Galileya bamukorera. 
Matthew27:56 Barimo Mariya Madalena, na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo na Yozefu, na nyina wa bene Zebedeyi." 
Matthew27:57 Bugorobye, haza umuntu w’umukire w’i Arimatiya, witwa Yozefu, na we akaba yari umwigishwa wa Yezu." 
Matthew27:58 Asanga Pilato, amusaba umurambo wa Yezu. Nuko Pilato ategeka ko bawumuha." 
Matthew27:59 Yozefu ajyana umurambo wa Yezu, awuhambira mu mwenda utanduye;" 
Matthew27:60 maze awurambika mu mva nshya yari yaricukuriye mu rutare, hanyuma akingisha ibuye rinini umuryango w’imva, aragenda." 
Matthew27:61 Aho hari Mariya Madalena na Mariya wundi bicaye imbere y’imva. 
Matthew27:62 Umunsi w’umwiteguro w’isabato urangiye, bukeye bwawo, abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi bateranira kwa Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 baramubwira bati «Mutegetsi, twibutse ko wa munyakinyoma akiriho yavuze ati ’Nzazuka iminsi itatu ishize!’" 
Matthew27:64 Nuko rero, tegeka ko barinda imva kugeza ku munsi wa gatatu, hato abigishwa be bataza kumwiba, bakabwira rubanda bati ’Yazutse mu bapfuye!’ maze icyo kinyoma cya nyuma kikaruta icya mbere.»" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato arabasubiza ati «Dore abarinzi; nimugende, murinde imva uko mubyumva.»" 
Matthew27:66 Nuko rero baragenda, badanangira imva, bashyira ikimenyetso kuri rya buye, maze bahasiga abazamu." 
Matthew28:1 Isabato irangiye, ku wa mbere wayo mu museso, Mariya Madalena na Mariya wundi bazindukira ku mva." 
Matthew28:2 Ubwo isi ihinda umushyitsi mwinshi; umumalayika wa Nyagasani amanuka mu ijuru aregera, ahirika ibuye, aryicara hejuru." 
Matthew28:3 Yari ameze nk’umurabyo, umwambaro we wera nk’urubura." 
Matthew28:4 Abarinzi bamurabutswe bakuka umutima, bamera nk’abapfuye." 
Matthew28:5 Ariko wa mumalayika araterura, abwira abagore ati «Mwebweho mwitinya! Nzi ko mushaka Yezu wabambwe ku musaraba." 
Matthew28:6 Ntari hano, yazutse nk’uko yari yabivuze; nimuze mwirebere aho yari arambitse." 
Matthew28:7 None rero, nimugende mwihuta, mubwire abigishwa be ko yazutse, kandi ko agiye kubatanga mu Galileya; ni ho muzamubonera. Ngibyo ibyo nari mfite kubabwira.»" 
Matthew28:8 Ubwo abagore bava ku mva bafite ubwoba buvanze n’ibyishimo byinshi, bihutira kubwira abigishwa be iyo nkuru." 
Matthew28:9 Ni bwo Yezu ahuye na bo ati «Nimugire amahoro!» Baramwegera, bahobera ibirenge bye, bamupfukamye imbere." 
Matthew28:10 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Mwitinya! Ahubwo nimugende mubwire abavandimwe banjye bajye mu Galileya; ni ho bazambonera.» 
Matthew28:11 Abagore bakiri mu nzira, bamwe mu bazamu baza mu murwa kumenyesha abatware b’abaherezabitambo ibyari byabaye byose." 
Matthew28:12 Ni bwo bateraniye hamwe n’abakuru b’umuryango; nuko bajya inama; baha abo basirikare amafaranga menshi," 
Matthew28:13 babihanangiriza bati «Muvuge ko abigishwa be baje nijoro, bakiba umurambo we musinziriye.’" 
Matthew28:14 Umutware w’igihugu nabyumva, tuzamugusha neza, maze tubarinde impagarara.»" 
Matthew28:15 Bamaze gushyikira amafaranga bagenza uko bari babwirijwe. Nuko iyo nkuru yogera mu Bayahudi kugeza na n’ubu. 
Matthew28:16 Nuko abigishwa cumi n’umwe bajya mu Galileya ku musozi Yezu yari yarabarangiye. 
Matthew28:17 Bamubonye barapfukama, bamwe ariko bashidikanya." 
Matthew28:18 Yezu arabegera, arababwira ati «Nahawe ububasha bwose mu ijuru no ku isi." 
Matthew28:19 Nuko rero, nimugende mwigishe amahanga yose, mubabatize ku izina ry’Imana Data na Mwana na Roho Mutagatifu," 
Matthew28:20 mubatoze gukurikiza ibyo nabategetse byose. Dore kandi ndi kumwe namwe iminsi yose, kugeza ku ndunduro y'ibihe.»" 
Mark1:1 Intangiriro y’Inkuru Nziza ya Yezu Kristu, Umwana w’Imana." 
Mark1:2 Mu gitabo cya Izayi umuhanuzi, handitswemo ngo «Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye mbere yawe, kugira ngo izagutegurire inzira." 
Mark1:3 Ni ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutegure inzira ya Nyagasani, muringanize aho azanyura!’»" 
Mark1:4 Nuko Yohani Batisita atunguka mu butayu yamamaza mu bantu batisimu yo kwisubiraho kugira ngo bakire ibyaha. 
Mark1:5 Maze intara yose ya Yudeya ikagenda imugana, n’abaturage bose ba Yeruzalemu. Nuko bakabatizwa na we mu ruzi rwa Yorudani, babanje kwirega ibyaha byabo." 
Mark1:6 Yohani yambaraga umwenda uboheshejwe ubwoya bw’ingamiya, agakenyeza umukoba; yatungwaga n’isanane n’ubuki bw’ubuhura." 
Mark1:7 Yamamazaga avuga ati «Uje ankurikiye andusha ububasha; sinkwiye no kunama ngo mfundure udushumi tw’inkweto ze. 
Mark1:8 Jyewe nababatirishije amazi, naho We azababatirisha Roho Mutagatifu.»" 
Mark1:9 Muri iyo minsi Yezu ava i Nazareti ho muri Galileya, aza kubatizwa na Yohani muri Yorudani." 
Mark1:10 Akiva mu mazi, abona ijuru rirakingutse na Roho Mutagatifu amumanukiraho nk’inuma." 
Mark1:11 Nuko ijwi rituruka mu ijuru, riti «Uri Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane unyizihira.»" 
Mark1:12 Ako kanya Roho Mutagatifu amuganisha mu butayu. 
Mark1:13 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine, ashukwa na Sekibi. Yahabanaga n’inyamaswa, abamalayika bakamuhereza." 
Mark1:14 Yohani amaze gutangwa, Yezu aza mu Galileya. Yamamaza Inkuru Nziza y’Imana, avuga ati" 
Mark1:15 «Igihe kirageze, none Ingoma y’Imana iregereje. Nimwisubireho maze mwemere Inkuru Nziza!»" 
Mark1:16 Uko yagendaga akikiye inyanja ya Galileya, abona Simoni na Andereya murumuna we; bariho baroha inshundura mu nyanja, kuko bari abarobyi." 
Mark1:17 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimunkurikire, nzabagira abarobyi b’abantu.»" 
Mark1:18 Ako kanya basiga aho inshundura zabo, baramukurikira." 
Mark1:19 Yigiye imbere gatoya, abona Yakobo, mwene Zebedeyi, na Yohani murumuna we; bariho batunganya inshundura zabo mu bwato." 
Mark1:20 Ako kanya arabahamagara. Nuko basiga se Zebedeyi mu bwato, hamwe n’abakozi be, baramukurikira." 
Mark1:21 Bagera i Kafarinawumu. Nuko ku munsi w’isabato, Yezu yinjira mu isengero, arigisha." 
Mark1:22 Batangariraga inyigisho ze, kuko yabigishaga nk’umuntu ufite ububasha, utameze nk’abigishamategeko babo." 
Mark1:23 Ubwo nyine mu isengero ryabo hakaba umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi. Nuko itera hejuru iti 
Mark1:24 «Uradushakaho iki, Yezu w’i Nazareti? Waje kuturimbura! Nzi uwo uri we: uri Intungane y’Imana.»" 
Mark1:25 Yezu ayibwira ayikangara, ati «Ceceka, kandi uve muri uwo muntu!»" 
Mark1:26 Nuko iyo roho mbi iramutigisa cyane, imusohokamo ivuza induru." 
Mark1:27 Bose barumirwa, bituma babazanya bati «Ibi ni ibiki? Mbega inyigisho nshya itanganywe ububasha! Arategeka na roho mbi, zikamwumvira!»" 
Mark1:28 Nuko bidatinze, inkuru ye ikwira mu ntara yose ya Galileya." 
Mark1:29 Bakiva mu isengero, bajya kwa Simoni na Andereya, bari kumwe na Yakobo na Yohani." 
Mark1:30 Ubwo rero nyirabukwe wa Simoni yari aryamye, ahinda umuriro. Bahita babwira Yezu iby’uburwayi bwe." 
Mark1:31 Ni ko kumwegera, amufata ukuboko aramuhagurutsa. Nuko umuriro urazima, atangira kubazimanira." 
Mark1:32 Bugorobye, izuba rimaze kurenga, bamuzanira abarwayi bose n’abahanzweho na roho mbi;" 
Mark1:33 mbese umugi wose ukoranira imbere y’umuryango. 
Mark1:34 Nuko akiza abarwayi benshi bari bababajwe n’indwara z’amoko menshi, kandi yirukana roho mbi nyinshi, ariko akazibuza kumuvuga, kuko zari zizi uwo ari we." 
Mark1:35 Bukeye bwaho Yezu abyuka mu rukerera, arasohoka, ajya ahantu hiherereye, nuko arasenga." 
Mark1:36 Simoni na bagenzi be bajya kumushakashaka. 
Mark1:37 Bamubonye, baramubwira bati «Rubanda rwose ruragushaka.»" 
Mark1:38 We rero arabasubiza ati «Nimucyo tujye ahandi, mu nsisiro za hafi, na ho mpamamaze Inkuru Nziza, kuko ari cyo cyanzanye.»" 
Mark1:39 Nuko azenguruka Galileya yose, yamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu masengero yabo, kandi yirukana roho mbi." 
Mark1:40 Umubembe aza amugana, apfukama imbere ye, amwinginga agira ati «Ubishatse wankiza!»" 
Mark1:41 Yezu amugirira impuhwe, arambura ukuboko amukoraho; avuga ati «Ndabishatse, kira!»" 
Mark1:42 Ako kanya ibibembe bimuvaho, arakira." 
Mark1:43 Yezu aramwihanangiriza, amusezerera ako kanya," 
Mark1:44 amubwira ati «Uramenye ntugire uwo ubibwira, ahubwo genda, wiyereke umuherezabitambo kandi uture ibyo Musa yategetse abahumanuwe, maze bibabere icyemezo cy’uko wakize.»" 
Mark1:45 We ariko, ngo amare kugenda, atangira gutangaza no gukwiza hose iyo nkuru, bituma Yezu atagishoboye kwinjira mu mugi ku mugaragaro, ahubwo yigumira ahantu hadatuwe; akaba ari ho abantu bamusanga, baturutse impande zose." 
Mark2:1 Hashize iminsi mike, Yezu asubira i Kafarinawumu; bamenya ko ari imuhira." 
Mark2:2 Abantu benshi barahakoranira, bituma habura umwanya, ndetse n’imbere y’umuryango; nuko arabigisha." 
Mark2:3 Haza abantu bamuzaniye ikirema gihetswe mu ngobyi. 
Mark2:4 Kuko batashoboraga kukimugezaho, bitewe n’ikivunge cy’abantu, basenya igisenge hejuru y’aho yari ari. Bamaze kuhaca icyuho, bururutsa ingobyi ikirema cyari kiryamyemo." 
Mark2:5 Yezu abonye ukwemera kwabo, abwira icyo kirema ati «Mwana wanjye, ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe.»" 
Mark2:6 Ubwo hakaba abigishamategeko bamwe, bari bicaye aho, bakibaza bati" 
Mark2:7 «Igituma uriya avuga atyo ni iki? Aratuka Imana. Ni nde ushobora gukiza ibyaha, atari Imana yonyine?»" 
Mark2:8 Ako kanya Yezu amenya ibitekerezo byabo, ni ko kubabwira ati «Ni iki gituma mutekereza mutyo mu mutima wanyu?" 
Mark2:9 Icyoroshye ni ikihe, ari ukubwira ikirema nti ’Ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe’ cyangwa kuvuga nti ’Haguruka, ufate ingobyi yawe maze ugende’?" 
Mark2:10 None rero, kugira ngo mumenye ko Umwana w’umuntu afite ububasha ku isi bwo gukiza ibyaha... », abwira ikirema ati" 
Mark2:11 «Ndabikubwiye: haguruka, ufate ingobyi yawe, witahire!»" 
Mark2:12 Ako kanya arahaguruka, afata ingobyi ye, asohoka bose bamureba; bagwa mu kantu, basingiza Imana bavuga bati «Nta na rimwe twigeze tubona ibintu nk’ibi ngibi!»" 
Mark2:13 Yezu yongera kugenda akikiye inyanja, imbaga yose y’abantu iramusanga, arabigisha." 
Mark2:14 Nuko yihitira, abona Levi, mwene Alufeyi, yicaye mu biro by’imisoro. Aramubwira ati «Nkurikira.» Arahaguruka aramukurikira." 
Mark2:15 Igihe Yezu yari ku meza iwe, hamwe n’abigishwa be, haza abasoresha benshi n’abanyabyaha gusangira na bo, kuko bamukurikiraga ari benshi." 
Mark2:16 Abigishamategeko b’Abafarizayi, bamubonye asangira n’abanyabyaha n’abasoresha, babwira abigishwa be bati «Dore re! Mbese asangira n’abasoresha n’abanyabyaha!»" 
Mark2:17 Yezu ngo abyumve, arabasubiza ati «Abazima si bo bakeneye umuvuzi, ahubwo ni abarwayi; sinazanywe n’intungane, ahubwo nazanywe no guhamagara abanyabyaha.»" 
Mark2:18 Umunsi umwe abigishwa ba Yohani n’Abafarizayi bari basibye kurya. Nuko baraza babaza Yezu bati «Ni iki gituma abigishwa ba Yohani n’Abafarizayi basiba kurya, naho abigishwa bawe ntibasibe?»" 
Mark2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Birakwiye se ko abakwe basiba kurya, umukwe akiri kumwe na bo? Igihe cyose bakiri kumwe n’umukwe ntibakwiye gusiba kurya." 
Mark2:20 Ariko hari igihe umukwe azabavanwamo, ubwo rero bazasiba kurya kuri uwo munsi." 
Mark2:21 Nta we utera igitambaro gishya ku mwenda ushaje, kuko abigenje atyo, igishya cyakurura igishaje maze umwenda ukarushaho gucika." 
Mark2:22 Nta n’ushyira divayi nshya mu masaho ashaje, kuko divayi yasandaza amasaho, maze divayi ikameneka, n’amasaho agapfa ubusa. Ubundi divayi nshya bajye bayishyira mu masaho mashya!»" 
Mark2:23 Umunsi umwe, ku isabato, Yezu anyura mu mirima y’ingano, abigishwa be batangira kugenda bazimamfuza." 
Mark2:24 Abafarizayi ni ko kumubwira bati «Dore re! Kuki bakora ibibujijwe ku isabato?» 
Mark2:25 Arabasubiza ati «Ntimwasomye uko Dawudi yabigenjeje, igihe ashonje akabura uko agira, we n’abo bari kumwe?" 
Mark2:26 N’uko yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Imana mu gihe cy’Abiyatari umuherezabitambo mukuru, akarya imigati y’umumuriko atashoboraga kurya, kuko yari igenewe abaherezabitambo bonyine, kandi akayihaho n’abari kumwe na we?»" 
Mark2:27 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Isabato ibereyeho umuntu, nta bwo ari umuntu ubereyeho isabato!" 
Mark2:28 Ni cyo gituma Umwana w’umuntu agenga ndetse n’isabato!» 
Mark3:1 Nuko yongera kwinjira mu isengero, maze ahasanga umuntu wari ufite ikiganza cyumiranye." 
Mark3:2 Ubwo bagenzuraga Yezu ngo berebe ko amukiza ku munsi w’isabato, bagira ngo babone icyo bamurega." 
Mark3:3 Nuko abwira uwo muntu wari ufite ikiganza cyumiranye, ati «Haguruka, uze hano hagati!»" 
Mark3:4 Maze arababwira ati «Ni iki cyemewe ku munsi w’isabato, ari ukugira neza, cyangwa ari ukugira nabi? Ari ugukiza umuntu, cyangwa se kumwica?» Nyamara bo baraceceka." 
Mark3:5 Nuko abararanganyamo amaso arakaye, ashavujwe n’imitima yabo yanangiye. Ni ko kubwira uwo muntu ati «Rambura ikiganza cyawe.» Nuko arakirambura, kirakira." 
Mark3:6 Abafarizayi basohotse, baherako bajya inama n’Abaherodiyani yo gushaka uko bamwicisha." 
Mark3:7 Yezu yigira ku nyanja hamwe n’abigishwa be. Abantu benshi baramukurikira, baturutse muri Galileya. N’abandi benshi baturutse mu Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 n’i Yeruzalemu, no muri Idumeya, no hakurya ya Yorudani, no mu karere ka Tiri na Sidoni, baza bamugana, bumvise ibyo yakoraga." 
Mark3:9 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ngo bamuteganyirize ubwato, agira ngo ikivunge cy’abantu kitaza kumubyiganaho." 
Mark3:10 Koko rero yari yarakijije benshi, bigatuma abarwayi bose bamwirohaho bagira ngo bamukoreho." 
Mark3:11 Abahanzweho na roho mbi na bo, iyo bamubonaga, barambararaga imbere ye, bagatera hejuru bati «Uri Umwana w’Imana!»" 
Mark3:12 We ariko akabihanangiriza cyane, ababuza guhishura uwo ari we." 
Mark3:13 Hanyuma Yezu azamuka umusozi, maze ahamagara abo yishakiye ubwe, baramusanga." 
Mark3:14 Abashyiraho ari cumi na babiri, kugira ngo babane na we, kandi ngo abatume kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza," 
Mark3:15 abaha n’ububasha bwo kwirukana roho mbi. 
Mark3:16 Abo ni Simoni, ari we yahimbye izina rya Petero;" 
Mark3:17 na Yakobo mwene Zebedeyi, na Yohani umuvandimwe we, ari bo yahimbye irya ’Bowanerigesi’, bikavuga bene inkuba;" 
Mark3:18 na Andereya, Filipo, Baritolomayo, Matayo, Tomasi, Yakobo mwene Alufeyi, Tadeyo, Simoni umunyeshyaka," 
Mark3:19 na Yuda Isikariyoti, wa wundi wamugambaniye." 
Mark3:20 Bageze imuhira, abantu benshi bongera guterana, bituma badashobora kugira icyo barya." 
Mark3:21 Nuko bene wabo wa Yezu babyumvise, baza kuhamuvana; kuko bavugaga ngo «Yasaze!»" 
Mark3:22 N’abigishamategeko bari bavuye i Yeruzalemu baravugaga ngo «Yahanzweho na Belizebuli!» kandi ngo «Umutware wa roho mbi ni we yirukanisha roho mbi!» 
Mark3:23 Nuko abakoranyiriza iruhande rwe, ababwirira mu migani ati «Sekibi yabasha ate kwiyirukana?" 
Mark3:24 Ingoma yibyayemo amahari ntishobora gukomera. 
Mark3:25 N’umuryango wabyaye amahari, na wo ntushobora gukomera." 
Mark3:26 Niba rero Sekibi yirwanya akicamo ibice, ntaba agikomeye, ake kaba kashobotse!" 
Mark3:27 Kandi nta muntu ushobora kwinjira mu nzu y’umunyamaboko ngo asahure ibintu bye, atabanje kuboha uwo munyamaboko, hanyuma ngo abone uko asahura inzu ye." 
Mark3:28 Ndababwira ukuri, abana b’abantu bazakizwa ibyaha byose bakoze, ndetse n’ibitutsi batutse Imana." 
Mark3:29 Nyamara uzaba yaratutse Roho Mutagatifu, nta bwo azagirirwa imbabazi bibaho; ahubwo azashinjwa igicumuro cye iteka.»" 
Mark3:30 Yezu yababwiye ibyo, abitewe n’uko bavugaga ngo «Yahanzweho na roho mbi.»" 
Mark3:31 Nyina wa Yezu n’abavandimwe be baraza, bahagarara hanze, bamutumaho ngo aze babonane." 
Mark3:32 Abantu benshi bakaba bicaye bamukikije. Baramubwira bati «Dore nyoko n’abavandimwe bawe bari hanze baragushaka.» 
Mark3:33 Arabasubiza ati «Mama ni nde, n’abavandimwe banjye ni bande?»" 
Mark3:34 Nuko azengurutsa amaso mu bari bicaye bamukikije, aravuga ati «Dore mama, dore n’abavandimwe banjye." 
Mark3:35 Umuntu wese ukora icyo Imana ishaka, ni we muvandimwe wanjye, ni we mushiki wanjye, kandi ni we mama.»" 
Mark4:1 Arongera atangira kwigishiriza ku nkombe y’inyanja. Abantu benshi cyane bamuteranira iruhande, bituma ajya kwicara mu bwato, mu nyanja, naho abantu bose bari imusozi ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Mark4:2 Yabigishaga byinshi avugira mu migani, maze mu nyigisho ze akababwira ati" 
Mark4:3 «Nimutege amatwi! Umubibyi yavuye iwe ajya kubiba. 
Mark4:4 Nuko igihe abiba, imbuto zimwe zigwa iruhande rw’inzira, inyoni ziraza zirazirya." 
Mark4:5 Izindi zigwa mu rubuye, ntizahasanga igitaka cyinshi, nuko zimera vuba, kuko igitaka cyari gike;" 
Mark4:6 izuba rivuye zirashya, ziruma kuko zitari zifite imizi." 
Mark4:7 Izindi zigwa mu mahwa, amahwa arakura, arazipfukirana, nuko ntizagira icyo zera." 
Mark4:8 Naho izindi zose zigwa mu gitaka cyiza, zo zirakura ziragara, zera imbuto, imwe ikera mirongo itatu, indi mirongo itandatu, indi ijana.»" 
Mark4:9 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati «Ufite amatwi yo kumva, niyumve!»" 
Mark4:10 Igihe bari basigaye bonyine, ba cumi na babiri n’abandi bari kumwe na we, bamusiganuza iby’imigani." 
Mark4:11 Arababwira ati «Mwebweho mwahawe kumenya amabanga y’Ingoma y’Imana, naho bariya bo hanze, byose bibabera urujijo," 
Mark4:12 ’ku buryo bitegereza ariko ntibabone, bakumva ariko ntibasobanukirwe, kugira ngo badahinduka bagakizwa.’" 
Mark4:13 Nuko yungamo ati «Nta bwo mwumva uwo mugani! Ubwo se iyindi migani yose, muzayumva mute?»" 
Mark4:14 Umubibyi, ni Ijambo ry’Imana abiba." 
Mark4:15 Hari rero abari iruhande rw’inzira aho iryo Jambo ribibwa. Bamara kuryumva, ako kanya Sekibi akaza, akabakuramo iryo jambo ryababibwemo." 
Mark4:16 Abandi ni abakirira imbuto nko mu rubuye; iyo bamaze kumva Ijambo, ako kanya baryakirana ibyishimo," 
Mark4:17 ariko ntirishore imizi muri bo, bakarimarana igihe gito; hatera amagorwa cyangwa batotezwa bahorwa iryo Jambo, bagahita bagwa." 
Mark4:18 Abandi ni abakirira imbuto nko mu mahwa: bumva Ijambo," 
Mark4:19 ariko imihihibikano y’isi, n’ibishuko by’ubukungu, n’ibindi byifuzo bibi bibatwara umutima, bigapfukirana iryo Jambo, ntiryere imbuto na busa." 
Mark4:20 Naho abakirira imbuto nko mu gitaka cyiza, ni abumva Ijambo bakaryakira, bakera imbuto, umwe mirongo itatu, undi mirongo itandatu, undi ijana.»" 
Mark4:21 Yezu arababaza ati «Harya bazanira itara kugira ngo baryubikeho icyibo cyangwa ngo barishyire mu nsi y’urutara? Si ukugira ngo rishyirwe ku gitereko cyaryo? 
Mark4:22 Koko rero, nta cyahishwe kitazahishurwa, nta n’ibanga rizahera ritamenyekanye!»" 
Mark4:23 Ufite amatwi yo kumva, niyumve!»." 
Mark4:24 Arongera aravuga ati «Mwitondere ibyo mwumva. Igipimisho muzageresha, ni cyo namwe muzagererwamo, ndetse muzarengerezwaho." 
Mark4:25 Kuko ufite byinshi azongererwa, naho ufite bike na byo akazabyakwa.»" 
Mark4:26 Na none aravuga ati «Iby’Ingoma y’Imana byagereranywa n’umuntu watera imbuto mu gitaka. 
Mark4:27 Yasinzira cyangwa yaba maso, haba nijoro cyangwa ku manywa, izo mbuto ntizihwema kumera no gukura, we atazi uko bigenda." 
Mark4:28 Igitaka ku bwacyo kibanza kumera ingemwe, hanyuma zikagengarara, hanyuma imbuto z’ingano zikuzura mu mahundo." 
Mark4:29 Izo mbuto zamara kwera, ako kanya bakazitemesha urusaruzo, kuko imyaka iba yeze.»" 
Mark4:30 Arongera ati «Iby’Ingoma y’Imana twabigereranya n’iki, cyangwa se twabivuga mu wuhe mugani?" 
Mark4:31 Bimeze nk’imbuto ya sinapisi ibibwa mu gitaka, ari ntoya kurusha imbuto zose ziba ku isi;" 
Mark4:32 ariko yamara kubibwa, igakura ikaruta ibindi bihingwa byose, ikagira amashami manini, bigatuma inyoni zo mu kirere ziza kwarika mu gicucu cyayo.»" 
Mark4:33 Nguko uko yabigishaga Ijambo ry’Imana, abacira imigani myinshi, iringaniye n’ibyo bashoboraga kumva." 
Mark4:34 Kandi ntiyigishaga adaciye imigani, ariko abigishwa be akabasobanurira byose biherereye." 
Mark4:35 Uwo munsi nyine, umugoroba ukubye, arababwira ati «Twambuke dufate hakurya.»" 
Mark4:36 Nuko basiga rubanda aho, bamujyana muri bwa bwato yahozemo, andi mato aramukurikira." 
Mark4:37 Ni bwo haje umuhengeri mwinshi, maze imivumba irenga ubwato, butangira gusendera." 
Mark4:38 Yezu we yari ku irango asinziriye ku musego. Bamukangura bamubwira bati 
Mark4:39 «Mwigisha, nta cyo bigutwaye ko tugiye gushira?» Nuko arakanguka, akangara umuyaga, abwira inyanja ati «Ceceka! Tuza!» Nuko umuyaga urahosha, maze ituze riba ryose." 
Mark4:40 Hanyuma arababwira ati «Icyabateye ubwo bwoba ni iki? Mbese ntimuragira ukwemera?» 
Mark4:41 Bagira ubwoba bwinshi, barabazanya bati «Uyu yaba ari nde, wumvirwa n’umuyaga n’inyanja?»" 
Mark5:1 Nuko bagera hakurya y’inyanja, mu gihugu cy’Abanyagerasa." 
Mark5:2 Yezu akiva mu bwato, umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi aturuka mu irimbi, aza amusanga." 
Mark5:3 Yiberaga mu marimbi, kandi nta muntu wari ugishobora kumuboha, kabone n’iyo yakoresha umunyururu." 
Mark5:4 Kenshi yari yaraboheshejwe n’ingoyi n’iminyururu, maze agaca iminyururu agacagagura n’ingoyi, kandi nta washoboraga kumufata ngo amuherane." 
Mark5:5 Ijoro n’amanywa yahoraga ari mu marimbi, no mu misozi, avuza induru kandi yishishimuza amabuye." 
Mark5:6 Nuko abona Yezu akiri kure, aza yiruka, aramupfukamira," 
Mark5:7 maze atera hejuru cyane ati «Uranshakaho iki, Yezu, Mwana w’Imana Isumbabyose? Nkurahije Imana, winyica urubozo!»" 
Mark5:8 Yezu koko yarayibwiraga ati «Roho mbi, va muri uyu muntu!»" 
Mark5:9 Maze arayibaza ati «Izina ryawe ni irihe?» Iramusubiza iti «Nitwa Gitero, kuko turi nyinshi.»" 
Mark5:10 Nuko iramwinginga cyane ngo atazirukana muri icyo gihugu. 
Mark5:11 Kuri uwo musozi hari umukumbi munini w’ingurube zarishaga. 
Mark5:12 Nuko roho mbi zinginga Yezu, ziti «Tureke twigire muri ziriya ngurube, tuzituremo.»" 
Mark5:13 Arabizemerera. Nuko roho mbi ziva muri uwo muntu, zinjira mu ngurube, maze uwo mukumbi wose ukonkoboka mu manga n’umuriri mwinshi, wiroha mu nyanja; uko zari nk’ibihumbi bibiri, ziroha mu nyanja." 
Mark5:14 Nuko abashumba bazo barahunga, bajya kubimenyesha abari mu mugi n’abari mu cyaro na bo baza kureba ibyabaye." 
Mark5:15 Basanga Yezu, babona na wa muntu wigeze guhangwaho na Gitero, ya roho mbi, yicaye, yambaye, kandi noneho yagaruye ubwenge. Nuko bashya ubwoba." 
Mark5:16 Abari babibonye batekerereza abandi ibyabaye ku uwahanzweho, n’ibyabaye ku ngurube." 
Mark5:17 Binginga Yezu ngo abavire mu gihugu. 
Mark5:18 Ngo ajye mu bwato, wa muntu wigeze guhangwaho na roho mbi aramwinginga ngo bibanire." 
Mark5:19 Yezu ntiyamwemerera, ahubwo aramubwira ati «Taha usange bene wanyu; ubatekerereze ibyo Nyagasani yakugiriye byose, n’ukuntu yakugiriye impuhwe.»" 
Mark5:20 Uwo muntu aragenda, atangira kwamamaza mu ntara ya Dekapoli ibyo Yezu yamugiriye byose. Nuko bose bagatangara." 
Mark5:21 Yezu ngo amare kugera ku nkombe yo hakurya ari mu bwato, ikivunge cy’abantu kimuhombokaho bamusanga aho yari ahagaze ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Mark5:22 Ubwo rero haza umwe mu batware b’isengero, akitwa Yayiro. Abonye Yezu, apfukama imbere ye," 
Mark5:23 amutakambira akomeje ati «Umukobwa wanjye yarembye cyane; ngwino, umuramburireho ibiganza, akire, abeho.»" 
Mark5:24 Yezu ajyana na we, na cya kivunge cy’abantu kiramukurikira, kimubyiganaho." 
Mark5:25 Ubwo rero hakaba umugore wari urwaye indwara yo kuva amaraso, ayimaranye imyaka cumi n’ibiri." 
Mark5:26 Yari yarahababariye cyane kubera abavuzi benshi, ahamarira ibintu bye byose, ariko ntibyagira icyo bimumarira, ahubwo akarushaho kumererwa nabi." 
Mark5:27 Uwo mugore rero yari yarumvise ibyo bavugaga kuri Yezu, aturuka inyuma ye mu kivunge cy’abantu, nuko akora ku myambaro ya Yezu." 
Mark5:28 Yaribwiraga ati «Byibuze ninkora ku myambaro ye, ndakira.»" 
Mark5:29 Akiyikoraho, isoko y’amaraso irakama, maze yumva mu mubiri we akize icyo yari arwaye." 
Mark5:30 Ako kanya Yezu yumva ko ububasha bumuvuyemo. Arahindukira abaza ikivunge cy’abantu ati «Ni nde ukoze ku myambaro yanjye?» 
Mark5:31 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati «Urabona iki kivunge cy’abantu bakubyiga impande zose, maze ukavuga ngo ’Ni nde unkozeho?’»" 
Mark5:32 Nuko areba impande zose ngo amenye uwakoze ibyo. 
Mark5:33 Umugore rero wari uzi ibyamubayeho, aza afite ubwoba kandi ahinda umushyitsi, amupfukama imbere, amubwiza ukuri kose." 
Mark5:34 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mwana wanjye, ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije. Genda amahoro, kandi ukire indwara yawe.»" 
Mark5:35 Mu gihe akivuga ibyo, haza abantu bavuye kwa wa mutware w’isengero, baramubwira bati «Umukobwa wawe amaze guca. Uraruhiriza iki kandi Umwigisha?»" 
Mark5:36 Yezu aba yabumvise, abwira umutware w’isengero ati «Witinya! Upfa kwemera gusa!»" 
Mark5:37 Nuko ntiyareka hagira undi umukurikira, uretse Petero na Yakobo, na Yohani murumuna wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Bageze mu rugo rw’umutware w’isengero, Yezu ahasanga urusaku rw’abantu bariraga, bacura imiborogo." 
Mark5:39 Ngo yinjire, arababwira ati «Urwo rusaku n’ayo marira ni iby’iki? Umwana ntiyapfuye, ahubwo arasinziriye.»" 
Mark5:40 Nuko baramuseka. Amaze guheza bose, ajyana na se na nyina b’umwana, n’abari kumwe na we, maze yinjira aho umwana yari ari." 
Mark5:41 Nuko afata umwana ukuboko, aramubwira ati «Talita kumi», bigasobanura ngo «Mukobwa, ndabikubwiye: haguruka!»" 
Mark5:42 Ako kanya umukobwa arahaguruka, atangira kugenda, kuko yari afite imyaka cumi n’ibiri. Nuko ubwoba bwinshi burabataha bose." 
Mark5:43 Abihanangiriza akomeje ngo ntihagire umuntu ubimenya, maze arababwira ngo bamugaburire." 
Mark6:1 Yezu ava aho ngaho, ajya mu karere k’iwabo, abigishwa be baramukurikira." 
Mark6:2 Isabato igeze, atangira kwigishiriza mu isengero. Abenshi ngo bamwumve baratangara cyane, bati «Biriya avuga byose abikura he? Buriya buhanga afite, na biriya bitangaza akora, abikomora he?" 
Mark6:3 Uriya si wa mubaji tuzi, mwene Mariya; akaba umuvandimwe wa Yakobo, na Yozeto, na Yuda, na Simoni? Na bashiki be ntitubatunze?» Ibyo bibabera intandaro yo kumwanga." 
Mark6:4 Yezu arababwira ati «Nta handi umuhanuzi asuzugurwa, uretse mu gihugu cye, muri bene wabo, no mu rugo iwabo.»" 
Mark6:5 Ntiyashobora kuhakorera igitangaza na kimwe, uretse gukiza abarwayi bakeya abaramburiraho ibiganza." 
Mark6:6 Maze atangazwa no kutemera kwabo. Yazengurukaga insisiro zihegereye yigisha. 
Mark6:7 Nuko ahamagara ba bandi Cumi na babiri, abohereza babiri babiri mu butumwa, abaha n’ububasha kuri roho mbi." 
Mark6:8 Abategeka kutagira icyo bajyana mu rugendo, kereka inkoni yonyine; nta mugati, nta ruhago, nta biceri mu mukandara," 
Mark6:9 keretse kwambara inkweto z’urugendo. Ati «Ariko ntimwambare amakanzu abiri.» 
Mark6:10 Yungamo ati «Urugo muzinjiramo rwose, muzarugumemo kugeza igihe muhaviriye." 
Mark6:11 Nimugera ahantu ntibabakire kandi ntibabumve, mujye muhava mubanje gukunguta umukungugu uri ku birenge byanyu, bibabere ikimenyetso kibashinja.»" 
Mark6:12 Nuko baragenda, batangaza ko abantu bagomba kugarukira Imana." 
Mark6:13 Birukana roho mbi nyinshi, kandi basiga abarwayi benshi amavuta, barabakiza." 
Mark6:14 Nuko umwami Herodi yumva bavuga ibya Yezu, kuko izina rye ryari rimaze kwamamara, bavuga ngo «Yohani Batisita yazutse mu bapfuye! Ni cyo gituma yifitemo ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza.»" 
Mark6:15 Abandi bakavuga ngo «Ni Eliya.» Abandi kandi ngo «Ni umuhanuzi nk’abandi bahanuzi ba kera.» 
Mark6:16 Herodi abyumvise aravuga ati «Ni Yohani, umwe naciye umutwe, none akaba yarazutse!»" 
Mark6:17 Koko rero Herodi yari yatumye abantu bo gufata Yohani no kumubohera mu buroko, abitewe na Herodiya, umugore wa murumuna we Filipo, Herodi yari yaracyuye." 
Mark6:18 Kuko Yohani yari yarabwiye Herodi ati «Ubujijwe gutunga umugore wa murumuna wawe.» 
Mark6:19 Herodiya na we yahoraga ahigira Yohani agashaka no kumwicisha, ariko ntabishobore," 
Mark6:20 kubera ko Herodi yatinyaga Yohani bigatuma amurengera, abitewe n’uko yari azi ko ari umuntu w’intabera kandi w’intungane. Iyo yabaga yamwumvise yabunzaga imitima cyane, nyamara yakundaga kumwumva." 
Mark6:21 Nuko haza kuba umunsi mukuru, ubwo Herodi yari yahimbaje isabukuru y’ivuka rye, maze atumira abatware be, n’abakuru b’ingabo ze hamwe n’abanyacyubahiro bo mu Galileya." 
Mark6:22 Umukobwa wa Herodiya araza arabyina, ashimisha Herodi n’abatumirwa be. Nuko umwami abwira umukobwa ati «Nsaba icyo ushaka cyose, ndakiguha.»" 
Mark6:23 Aramurahira ati «Icyo unsaba cyose ndakiguha, kabone n’iyo cyaba icya kabiri cy’igihugu cyanjye.»" 
Mark6:24 Umukobwa arasohoka abaza nyina ati «Nsabe iki?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Saba umutwe wa Yohani Batisita.» 
Mark6:25 Umukobwa agaruka bwangu asanga umwami, amusaba avuga ati «Ndashaka ko umpa nonaha umutwe wa Yohani Batisita ku mbehe.»" 
Mark6:26 Umwami biramushavuza cyane, ariko kubera indahiro ye n’abo yari yatumiye, yanga kwivuguruza." 
Mark6:27 Ako kanya umwami yohereza umwe mu ngabo ze, amutegeka kuzana umutwe wa Yohani. Uwo mugabo aragenda, amucira umutwe mu buroko." 
Mark6:28 Nuko azana umutwe ku mbehe, maze awuha uwo mukobwa, umukobwa na we awuha nyina." 
Mark6:29 Abigishwa ba Yohani babyumvise, baraza bajyana umurambo we, baramuhamba." 
Mark6:30 Intumwa zihindukiye, ziteranira iruhande rwa Yezu maze zimumenyesha ibyo zari zakoze byose n’ibyo zari zigishije byose." 
Mark6:31 Nuko arazibwira ati «Nimuze ahitaruye, hadatuwe, maze muruhuke gatoya.» Koko rero abazaga n’abagendaga bari benshi, bigatuma batabona n’umwanya wo kurya." 
Mark6:32 Nuko bajya mu bwato bambukira ahantu hadatuwe bagira ngo biherere. 
Mark6:33 Abenshi mu bababonye bagenda barabamenya, nuko baza ku maguru baturuka mu migi yose bahirukira, ndetse barahabatanga." 
Mark6:34 Yezu amaze kwambuka abona iyo mbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu, abagirira impuhwe, kuko bari bameze nk’intama zitagira umushumba, atangira kubigisha byinshi." 
Mark6:35 Umunsi uciye ikibu, abigishwa be ni bwo bamwegereye, maze baramubwira bati «Aha hantu ntihatuwe, kandi umunsi uciye ikibu;" 
Mark6:36 none sezerera aba bantu bajye mu ngo no mu nsisiro za hafi kwigurira ibyo barya.» 
Mark6:37 Arabasubiza ati «Nimubahe ibyo kurya mwebwe ubwanyu.» Baramubwira bati «Urashaka ko tujya kugura imigati y’amadenari magana abiri, ngo tubahe barye?»" 
Mark6:38 Arabasubiza ati «Mufite imigati ingahe? Nimujye kureba.» Babimenye baravuga bati «Dufite itanu, n’amafi abiri.»" 
Mark6:39 Nuko abategeka kwicaza bose mu bwatsi butoshye, mu dutsiko udutsiko." 
Mark6:40 Bicara ari inteko z’abantu ijana n’iz’abantu mirongo itanu. 
Mark6:41 Amaze gufata ya migati itanu na ya mafi abiri, areba hejuru, ashimira Imana. Hanyuma amanyura ya migati, ayiha abigishwa be kugira ngo babagaburire. Na ya mafi abiri ayabagabanya bose." 
Mark6:42 Bose bararya barahaga. 
Mark6:43 Nuko bakoranya ibisate by’imigati byasigaye n’iby’amafi, buzuza inkangara cumi n’ebyiri." 
Mark6:44 Nyamara abari bariye bari abagabo bageze ku bihumbi bitanu. 
Mark6:45 Nuko ako kanya ategeka abigishwa be kujya mu bwato no kumutanga hakurya, hafi ya Betsayida, we asigara asezerera abantu." 
Mark6:46 Amaze kubasezerera azamuka umusozi, ajya gusenga." 
Mark6:47 Umugoroba ukubye, ubwato buba bugeze mu nyanja hagati, we akiri imusozi wenyine." 
Mark6:48 Abona abigishwa be bananijwe no kugashya, kubera umuyaga wahuhaga ubarwanya. Nuko bujya gucya, aza abasanga agenda hejuru y’inyanja, ndetse ashaka no kubacaho." 
Mark6:49 Babonye agenda hejuru y’inyanja, bakeka ko ari baringa bavuza induru." 
Mark6:50 Bose bari bamubonye, bagira ubwoba. Yezu ni ko kubavugisha ati «Nimuhumure ni jye, mwigira ubwoba.»" 
Mark6:51 Nuko abasanga mu bwato, maze umuyaga urahosha. Barushaho gutangara," 
Mark6:52 kuko batari bumvise iby’imigati; imitima yabo yari ikinangiye. 
Mark6:53 Bamaze kwambuka, bagera i Genezareti, maze bashyikira ku nkombe." 
Mark6:54 Bakiva mu bwato, abantu baramumenya," 
Mark6:55 nuko bazenguruka ako karere kose, maze batangira kumuzanira abarwayi mu ngobyi, aho bumvaga yageze hose." 
Mark6:56 N’aho Yezu yinjiraga hose, ari mu nsisiro, mu migi no mu midugudu, bashyiraga abarwayi ku kibuga, maze bakamusaba ngo abareke bakore ku ncunda z’umwambaro we. Nuko abamukozeho bose bagakira." 
Mark7:1 Abafarizayi na bamwe mu bigishamategeko bari baturutse i Yeruzalemu, bateranira iruhande rwa Yezu." 
Mark7:2 Babona bamwe mu bigishwa be barisha intoki zanduye, ari byo kuvuga zidakarabye." 
Mark7:3 Koko rero, Abafarizayi n’Abayahudi bose ntibarya batabanje gukaraba ibiganza kugeza ku nkokora, bakurikije akamenyero k’abakurambere," 
Mark7:4 n’iyo bavuye mu materaniro, ntibarya batabanje kwitera amazi. Hariho kandi n’indi migenzo myinshi bakurikiza by’akarande, nko koza ibikombe, ibibindi, n’amasahani..." 
Mark7:5 Nuko rero, Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko baramubaza bati «Ni iki gituma abigishwa bawe badakurikiza umuco w’abakurambere, bakarisha intoki zanduye?»" 
Mark7:6 Arabasubiza ati «Izayi yabahanuye neza, mwa ndyarya mwe! Nk’uko byanditswe ngo ’Uyu muryango unyubahisha akarimi gusa, naho imitima yabo indi kure." 
Mark7:7 Icyubahiro bampa ni amanjwe: inyigisho bigisha ni amategeko y’abantu gusa.’ 
Mark7:8 Murenga ku itegeko ry’Imana, mukibanda ku muco w’abantu.»" 
Mark7:9 Maze arababwira ati «Murubahuka mugakuraho itegeko ry’Imana mwitwaza gukurikiza umucokarande wanyu. 
Mark7:10 Dore Musa yaravuze ati ’Jya wubaha so na nyoko’, kandi ati ’Uzatuka se cyangwa nyina, azacirwa urwo gupfa.’" 
Mark7:11 Naho mwe mukavuga ngo ’Umuntu wese ubwira se cyangwa nyina ati: Ibintu najyaga kuzagufashisha ni «Korbani », ari byo kuvuga ituro ry’Imana," 
Mark7:12 mumwemerera kutagira icyo afashisha se cyangwa nyina; 
Mark7:13 bityo mukavuguruza ijambo ry’Imana mwitwaza umucokarande. Kandi mukora n’ibindi byinshi bisa n’ibyo.» 
Mark7:14 Yongera guhamagara rubanda, arababwira ati «Nimutege amatwi mwese, kandi munyumve neza!" 
Mark7:15 Nta kintu kijya mu muntu giturutse inyuma kimuhumanya, ahubwo ikivuye mu muntu ni cyo kimuhumanya." 
Mark7:16 Ufite amatwi yo kumva niyumve!» 
Mark7:17 Amaze kwinjira mu nzu yitaruye rubanda, abigishwa be bamusobanuza uwo mugani." 
Mark7:18 Arabasubiza ati «Namwe mubuze ubwenge bigeze aho? Ntimwumva se ko nta kintu na kimwe cyinjira mu muntu giturutse inyuma gishobora kumuhumanya," 
Mark7:19 kuko kitinjira mu mutima we, ahubwo kijya mu nda, kigasohoka kijya gutabwa mu rwobo.» Bityo yemeza ko ibiribwa byose bidahumanya." 
Mark7:20 Arongera ati «Ikivuye mu muntu ni cyo kimuhumanya. 
Mark7:21 Kuko mu mutima w’abantu ariho haturuka imigambi mibi: ubusambanyi, ubujura, ubwicanyi," 
Mark7:22 ubuhabara, umururumba, ubugome, uburyarya, ingeso mbi, ishyari, gutukana, ubwirasi, n’amafuti." 
Mark7:23 Ibyo bintu byose bibi biva mu mutima, ni byo bihumanya umuntu.»" 
Mark7:24 Ahagurutse aho, Yezu ajya mu gihugu cya Tiri. Nuko yinjira mu nzu, adashaka ko hagira ubimenya, ariko ntiyashobora kuhaguma bitamenyekanye." 
Mark7:25 Ako kanya, umugore wari ufite umwana w’umukobwa wahanzweho na roho mbi yumvise bamuvuga, araza amupfukama imbere." 
Mark7:26 Uwo mugore yari umunyamahanga, kavukire k’i Fenisiya ho muri Siriya, nuko amusaba kwirukana iyo roho mbi yari mu mukobwa we." 
Mark7:27 Yezu aramubwira ati «Reka abana babanze bahage, kuko bidakwiye gufata umugati w’abana ngo bawujugunyire ibibwana.»" 
Mark7:28 Umugore aramusubiza ati «Ni koko, Nyagasani! Ariko n’ibibwana birya utuvungukira abana bataye mu nsi y’ameza.»" 
Mark7:29 Aramubwira rero ati «Ngiriye iryo jambo uvuze, ngaho genda, roho mbi ivuye mu mukobwa wawe.»" 
Mark7:30 Uwo mugore arataha, asanga umwana arambaraye ku buriri, koko roho mbi yamuvuyemo." 
Mark7:31 Yezu ava mu gihugu cya Tiri yambukiranya igihugu cya Sidoni, agaruka ku nyanja ya Galileya, yerekeje kuri Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Nuko bamuzanira igipfamatwi kidedemanga, baramwinginga ngo amuramburireho ibiganza." 
Mark7:33 Amuvana muri rubanda, amujyana ahitaruye, ashyira intoki ze mu matwi ye, nuko acira amacandwe ayamukoza ku rurimi." 
Mark7:34 Hanyuma yubura amaso ayerekeje ku ijuru, asuhuza umutima ati «Efata», bikavuga ngo «Zibuka.»" 
Mark7:35 Ako kanya, amatwi ye arazibuka, n’ururimi rwe ruragobodoka, maze atangira kuvuga neza." 
Mark7:36 Maze Yezu abihanangiriza kutagira uwo babibwira, nyamara uko abihanangiriza, akaba ari ko barushaho kubyamamaza." 
Mark7:37 Bagatangara cyane bakavuga bati «Byose yabikoze neza; atuma ibipfamatwi byumva n’ibiragi bivuga.» 
Mark8:1 Muri iyo minsi, hongera kuza imbaga y’abantu badafite ibyo kurya. Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be arababwira ati" 
Mark8:2 «Iyi mbaga nyifitiye impuhwe, kuko hashize iminsi itatu bankurikiye, kandi bakaba badafite ibyo kurya." 
Mark8:3 Nimbasezerera batariye, baragwa mu nzira, kandi muri bo harimo abaturutse kure.»" 
Mark8:4 Abigishwa be baramusubiza bati «Imigati ihagije aba bantu bangana batya umuntu yayikura he muri ubu butayu?» 
Mark8:5 Arababaza ati «Mufite imigati ingahe?» Bati «Irindwi.» 
Mark8:6 Nuko ategeka rubanda kwicara hasi, maze afata ya migati irindwi, ashimira Imana, arayimanyura, maze ayiha abigishwa be ngo bayibahereze." 
Mark8:7 Bayihereza imbaga. Bari bafite n’udufi dukeya; Yezu ashimira Imana, abategeka kutubahereza na two." 
Mark8:8 Nuko bararya barahaga. Hanyuma bakoranya ibisate byasigaye, byuzura inkangara ndwi!" 
Mark8:9 Ubwo kandi bari nk’ibihumbi bine. Nuko Yezu arabasezerera. 
Mark8:10 Aherako ajya mu bwato hamwe n’abigishwa be, agana mu karere ka Dalimanuta." 
Mark8:11 Abafarizayi baraza, maze batangira kumwiyenzaho bamusaba ikimenyetso giturutse mu ijuru, byo kumwinja." 
Mark8:12 Nuko asuhuza umutima, ati «Kuki abantu b’iki gihe bashaka ikimenyetso? Ndababwira ukuri, nta kimenyetso abantu b’ubu bateze kubona.»" 
Mark8:13 Nuko abasiga aho, arongera ajya mu bwato agana ku yindi nkombe y’inyanja." 
Mark8:14 Abigishwa bari bibagiwe kujyana imigati, maze bakagira umugati umwe gusa mu bwato." 
Mark8:15 Nuko Yezu arabihanangiriza ati «Murabe maso, kandi mwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi n’umusemburo wa Herodi.»" 
Mark8:16 Bo rero batangira kujya impaka ngo nta migati bafite. 
Mark8:17 Yezu abimenye, arababwira ati «Kuki mujya impaka ngo nta migati mufite? Ntimurumva kandi ntimurasobanukirwa? Mbese umutima wanyu uracyanangiye?" 
Mark8:18 Mufite amaso ntimubone, mukagira n’amatwi ntimwumve? Kandi ntimwibuka," 
Mark8:19 igihe manyuriye imigati itanu abantu ibihumbi bitanu, mwahakuye inkangara zingahe zuzuye ibisate?» Baramusubiza bati «Ni cumi n’ebyiri.»" 
Mark8:20 Arongera ati «N’igihe manyuriye imigati irindwi abantu ibihumbi bine, mwahakuye inkangara zingahe zuzuye ibisate?» Baramusubiza bati «Ni indwi.»" 
Mark8:21 Nuko arababwira ati «Na n’ubu ntimurasobanukirwa?» 
Mark8:22 Ngo bagere i Betsayida, abantu bamuzanira impumyi, bamwingingira ko ayikoraho." 
Mark8:23 Afata impumyi ukuboko, ayikura mu rusisiro, ayisiga amacandwe ku maso, ayiramburiraho n’ibiganza, maze arayibaza ati «Hari icyo ubona?»" 
Mark8:24 Impumyi irambura amaso, iramusubiza iti «Ndabona abantu, barasa n’ibiti, ariko baragenda.»" 
Mark8:25 Yezu arongera ashyira ibiganza ku maso ye, undi atangira kubona bigaragara, arakira, abona neza ibintu byose uko biri." 
Mark8:26 Nuko Yezu amwohereza iwe, amubwira ati «Ntiwinjire no mu rusisiro.»" 
Mark8:27 Yezu ajyana n’abigishwa be, agana mu nsisiro za Kayizareya ya Filipo. Bakiri mu nzira, abaza abigishwa be ati «Abantu bavuga ko ndi nde?»" 
Mark8:28 Baramusubiza bati «Ngo uri Yohani Batisita, abandi ngo uri Eliya; naho abandi ngo uri umwe mu bahanuzi.»" 
Mark8:29 Ati «Mwebwe se, muvuga ko ndi nde?» Petero aramusubiza ati «Uri Kristu.»" 
Mark8:30 Nuko Yezu arabihanangiriza ngo ntibagire uwo babibwira. 
Mark8:31 Nuko atangira kubigisha ko Umwana w’umuntu agomba kuzababara cyane, agacibwa n’abakuru b’imiryango, n’abaherezabitambo bakuru, n’abigishamategeko, akicwa, ariko akazazuka nyuma y’iminsi itatu." 
Mark8:32 Ibyo yabibabwiye akomeje. Nuko Petero aramwihugikana, atangira kumutonganya." 
Mark8:33 We ariko arahindukira, maze areba abigishwa be, acyaha Petero, amubwira, ati «Hoshi, mva iruhande, Sekibi! Kuko ibitekerezo byawe bitavuye ku Mana, ahubwo ku bantu!»" 
Mark8:34 Nuko ahamagara rubanda hamwe n’abigishwa be, arababwira ati «Niba hari ushaka kunkurikira, yiyibagirwe ubwe, aheke umusaraba we, maze ankurikire!" 
Mark8:35 Kuko uzashaka gukiza ubugingo bwe azabubura, naho uzahara ubugingo bwe kubera jyewe n’Inkuru Nziza, azabukiza." 
Mark8:36 Umuntu watunga iby’isi yose, ariko akabura ubugingo bwe, byaba bimumariye iki?" 
Mark8:37 Cyangwa se umuntu yagurana iki ubugingo bwe? 
Mark8:38 Koko rero, umuntu uzanyihakana agahinyura n’amagambo yanjye imbere ya bariya bantu b’abasambanyi kandi b’abanyabyaha, Umwana w’umuntu na we azamwihakana igihe azazira mu ikuzo rya Se, ashagawe n’abamalayika batagatifu.»" 
Mark9:1 Nuko yungamo ati «Ndababwira ukuri: mu bari hano, harimo abatazapfa batabonye Ingoma y’Imana ije mu bubasha.»" 
Mark9:2 Hashize iminsi itandatu, Yezu ajyana na Petero, na Yakobo, na Yohani ukwabo mu mpinga y’umusozi muremure. Nuko yihindura ukundi mu maso yabo." 
Mark9:3 Imyambaro ye irererana, irabengerana bitambutse kure uburyo umumeshi wo ku isi yashobora kuyeza." 
Mark9:4 Ubwo Eliya arababonekera hamwe na Musa, baganira na Yezu."
