Mark9:5 Petero ni ko guterura abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, kwibera hano nta ko bisa; reka tuhace ibiraro bitatu, kimwe cyawe, ikindi cya Musa, n’ikindi cya Eliya.»" 
Mark9:6 Yari yabuze icyo avuga, kuko bari bahiye ubwoba." 
Mark9:7 Nuko igicu kirabatwikira, maze muri icyo gicu haturukamo ijwi riti «Uyu ni umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, nimumwumve!»" 
Mark9:8 Ako kanya, barebye hirya no hino, ntibagira undi wundi bongera kubona, uretse Yezu wenyine wari kumwe na bo." 
Mark9:9 Mu gihe bamanukaga umusozi, Yezu abategeka kutazagira uwo batekerereza ibyo bari bamaze kubona, kugera igihe Umwana w’umuntu azaba amaze kuzuka mu bapfuye." 
Mark9:10 Bakomeza kuzirikana iryo jambo, ariko banabazanya bati «Kuzuka mu bapfuye bivuga iki?»" 
Mark9:11 Abigishwa babaza Yezu bati «Ni kuki abigishamategeko bavuga ko Eliya ari we ugomba kubanza kuza?» 
Mark9:12 Arabasubiza ati «Koko Eliya azabanza aze atunganye byose. Nyamara se kuki byanditswe ngo Umwana w’umuntu azababazwa ku buryo bwinshi kandi asuzugurwe? 
Mark9:13 Reka rero mbibabwire: Eliya yaraje, kandi bamugiriye uko bishakiye, nk’uko Ibyanditswe bimuvuga.»" 
Mark9:14 Igihe rero bazaga basanga abigishwa be, babona ikivunge cy’abantu kibakikije n’abigishamategeko bajyaga impaka na bo." 
Mark9:15 Rubanda rwose bakimurabukwa, barahomboka, maze biruka bajya kumusuhuza." 
Mark9:16 Arababaza ati «Icyo mujyaho impaka na bo ni iki?» 
Mark9:17 Umwe muri rubanda aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha, nakuzaniye umwana wanjye wahanzweho na roho mbi y’ikiragi." 
Mark9:18 Iyo imweguye, imutura hasi, maze akazana urufuro, agahekenya amenyo, kandi akagagara. Nasabye abigishwa bawe kuyirukana, ntibabishobora.»" 
Mark9:19 Arababwira ati «Yemwe bantu b’iki gihe mutemera! Nzabana namwe kugeza ryari? Nzabiyumanganya mpereze hehe? Nimunzanire uwo mwana.» 
Mark9:20 Baramumuzanira. Roho mbi ikibona Yezu, icugusa umwana cyane, yikubita hasi, arigaragura azana urufuro." 
Mark9:21 Yezu abaza se ati «Hashize igihe kingana iki agirwa atya?» Se aramusubiza ati «Kuva mu bwana bwe. 
Mark9:22 Incuro nyinshi yamuroshye mu muriro no mu mazi kugira ngo imwice; ariko niba hari icyo ushobora, tubabarire udutabare!»" 
Mark9:23 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ngo niba hari icyo ushobora...? Erega byose bishobokera uwemera!» 
Mark9:24 Ako kanya se w’umwana arangurura ijwi ati «Ndemera! Ariko komeza ukwemera kwanjye guke!» 
Mark9:25 Yezu abonye abantu baza banigana, akabukira roho mbi avuga ati «Wowe roho mbi, umubuza kuvuga no kumva, ndagutegetse: va muri uwo mwana, kandi ntukamugarukemo ukundi.»" 
Mark9:26 Roho mbi ivuza induru, icugusa umwana cyane, imusohokamo. Nuko uwo mwana amera nk’uwapfuye, ndetse bituma abantu benshi bavuga ngo «Yapfuye!»" 
Mark9:27 Naho Yezu amaze kumufata ukuboko, aramuhagurutsa, umwana arahagarara." 
Mark9:28 Yezu yinjiye mu nzu, abigishwa be bamubariza ahiherereye bati «Kuki twebwe tutashoboye kuyirukana?»" 
Mark9:29 Arabasubiza ati «Buriya bwoko bwa roho mbi, nta kindi gishobora kubwirukana, usibye isengesho.»" 
Mark9:30 Bavuye aho ngaho, bambukiranya Galileya, ariko Yezu ntiyashakaga ko babimenya." 
Mark9:31 Yigishaga abigishwa be, ababwira ati «Umwana w’umuntu agiye gushyirwa mu maboko y’abantu, bakazamwica, ariko yamara gupfa, akazazuka ku munsi wa gatatu.»" 
Mark9:32 Iryo jambo ariko ntibaryumva, batinya no kumubaza." 
Mark9:33 Nuko bagera i Kafarinawumu. Bari mu nzu, Yezu arababaza ati «Mu nzira mwajyaga impaka z’iki?»" 
Mark9:34 Baraceceka, kuko mu nzira bari bagiye impaka zo kumenya umukuru muri bo." 
Mark9:35 Amaze kwicara, ahamagara ba Cumi na babiri, arababwira ati «Ushaka kuba uwa mbere, azigire uwa nyuma muri bose, abe n’umugaragu wa bose.»" 
Mark9:36 Nuko afata umwana, amuhagarika hagati yabo, aramuhobera, arababwira ati" 
Mark9:37 «Umuntu wese wakira umwana nk’uyu nguyu, ari jye abigirira, ni jye aba yakiriye. Kandi unyakira wese, si jyewe aba yakiriye, ahubwo aba yakiriye Uwantumye.»" 
Mark9:38 Yohani aramubwira ati «Mwigisha, twabonye umuntu wirukana roho mbi mu izina ryawe kandi atadukurikira; turabimubuza kuko atadukurikira.»" 
Mark9:39 Yezu ati «Mwibimubuza, kuko nta muntu ushobora gukora igitangaza mu izina ryanjye, maze ngo ahindukire amvuge nabi." 
Mark9:40 Utaturwanya wese ari kumwe natwe. 
Mark9:41 Umuntu wese uzabaha ikirahuri cy’amazi yo kunywa abitewe n’uko muri aba Kristu, ndababwira ukuri, ntazabura igihembo cye." 
Mark9:42 Ariko nihagira ugusha mu cyaha umwe muri aba bato bemera, ikimukwiye ni uko bamuhambira ku ijosi urusyo rusheshwa n’indogobe, bakamuroha mu nyanja." 
Mark9:43 Niba ikiganza cyawe kigutera gukora icyaha, ugice, kuko ikiruta ari ukwinjirana akanimfu mu bugingo," 
Mark9:44 aho kujyana ibiganza byawe byombi mu nyenga y’umuriro utazima. 
Mark9:45 Niba ikirenge cyawe kigutera gukora icyaha, ugice, kuko ikiruta ari ukwinjira mu bugingo ucumbagira," 
Mark9:46 aho kurohwa mu nyenga ufite ibirenge byawe byombi. 
Mark9:47 Niba ijisho ryawe rigutera gukora icyaha, rinoboremo; kuko ikiruta ari uko wakwinjirana rimwe mu Ngoma y’Imana, aho kwinjirana yombi mu nyenga," 
Mark9:48 aho urunyo rudapfa, n’umuriro ntuzime." 
Mark9:49 Ahubwo buri wese ajye asukurwa n’umunyu n’umuriro. 
Mark9:50 Umunyu ufite akamaro; ariko iyo ukayutse; mwawusubiza mute uburyohe bwawo? Nimwigiremo umunyu kandi mubane mu mahoro.» 
Mark10:1 Nuko Yezu ava aho ngaho, ajya mu ntara ya Yudeya yo hakurya ya Yorudani. Abantu benshi bongera gukoranira iruhande rwe, nuko abigisha uko bisanzwe." 
Mark10:2 Abafarizayi baramwegera, maze bamubaza niba umugabo afite uruhushya rwo gusenda umugore we, ariko bamwinja." 
Mark10:3 Arababwira ati «Musa yabategetse iki?» 
Mark10:4 Baramusubiza bati «Musa yemereye umugabo kwandika icyemezo cyo gusenda umugore, akabona kumusezerera.»" 
Mark10:5 Yezu arababwira ati «Icyamuteye kwandika iryo tegeko, ni uko umutima wanyu unangiye." 
Mark10:6 Naho mu ntangiriro y’isi, ’Imana yaremye umugabo n’umugore;" 
Mark10:7 ni yo mpamvu umugabo azasiga se na nyina, akifatanya n’umugore we," 
Mark10:8 maze bombi bakaba umubiri umwe.’ Bityo ntibaba bakiri babiri, ahubwo baba ari umubiri umwe." 
Mark10:9 Nuko rero ntihakagire umuntu utandukanya icyo Imana yafatanyije.» 
Mark10:10 Basubiye imuhira, abigishwa bongera kumusobanuza ibyerekeye iyo ngingo." 
Mark10:11 Arababwira ati «Koko umugabo usenda umugore we akazana undi aba asambana; 
Mark10:12 umugore na we utandukana n’umugabo we agacyurwa n’undi, aba asambana.»" 
Mark10:13 Nuko bamuzanira abana bato ngo abakoreho, maze abigishwa barabakabukira." 
Mark10:14 Yezu abibonye ararakara, maze arababwira ati «Nimureke abana bansange, mwibabuza, kuko Ingoma y’Imana ari iy’abameze nka bo." 
Mark10:15 Ndababwira ukuri: umuntu wese utazakira Ingoma y’Imana nk’umwana, ntazayinjiramo bibaho.»" 
Mark10:16 Nuko arabahobera, abasabira umugisha abashyizeho ibiganza." 
Mark10:17 Yezu agihaguruka aho, umuntu aza yiruka amupfukama imbere, aramubaza ati «Mwigisha mwiza, nkore iki kugira ngo nzabone ubugingo bw’iteka ho umurage?»" 
Mark10:18 Yezu aramubwira ati «Kuki unyita mwiza? Nta mwiza ubaho, keretse Imana yonyine." 
Mark10:19 Uzi amategeko: ntuzice, ntuzasambane, ntuzibe, ntuzahamye ibinyoma, ntuzagirire abandi nabi, urajye wubaha so na nyoko.»" 
Mark10:20 Uwo muntu aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha, ibyo byose nabikurikije kuva mu buto bwanjye.»" 
Mark10:21 Yezu aramwitegereza yumva amukunze; aramubwira ati «Ubuze ikintu kimwe gusa: genda ugurishe ibyo utunze, ubihe abakene, uzagira ubukire mu ijuru, hanyuma uze unkurikire.»" 
Mark10:22 We ariko abyumvise arasuherwa, agenda ababaye, kuko yari atunze ibintu byinshi." 
Mark10:23 Nuko Yezu araranganya amaso, abwira abigishwa be ati «Mbega ukuntu kuzinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana biruhije ku bakungu!»" 
Mark10:24 Abigishwa batangazwa n’ayo magambo; Yezu ariko abibasubiriramo ati «Bana banjye, mbega ukuntu biruhije kwinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana." 
Mark10:25 Byoroheye ingamiya guca mu mwenge w’urushinge, kurusha uko byoroheye umukungu kwinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana!»" 
Mark10:26 Abigishwa barushaho gutangara, barabazanya bati «Ubwo se ni nde ushobora kurokoka?»" 
Mark10:27 Yezu arabitegereza, maze arababwira ati «Ku bantu ntibishoboka, ariko ku Mana birashoboka, kuko nta kinanira Imana.»" 
Mark10:28 Nuko Petero araterura, aramubwira ati «Dore twebwe twasize byose turagukurikira.»" 
Mark10:29 Yezu arasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri, nta we uzaba yarasize urugo, cyangwa abavandimwe be, cyangwa bashiki be, cyangwa nyina, cyangwa se, cyangwa abana, cyangwa isambu ye, ari jye abigirira n’Inkuru Nziza," 
Mark10:30 ngo abure kwiturwa karijana muri iki gihe, ari amazu, ari abavandimwe, ari na bashiki be, na ba nyina, n’abana n’amasambu, ariko n’ibitotezo bitabuze, kandi no mu gihe kizaza, akaziturwa ubugingo bw’iteka." 
Mark10:31 Benshi mu ba mbere bazaba aba nyuma, n’aba nyuma babe aba mbere.»" 
Mark10:32 Ubwo bari mu nzira bazamuka bajya i Yeruzalemu, Yezu abarangaje imbere. Bari bahagaritse umutima, n’abari babakurikiye bari bafite ubwoba. Yongera kwihererana ba Cumi na babiri iruhande rwe, ababwira ibigiye kumubaho ati" 
Mark10:33 «Dore tuzamutse tujya i Yeruzalemu, kandi Umwana w’umuntu agiye kugabizwa abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko; bazamucira urubanza rwo gupfa, maze bamugabize abanyamahanga." 
Mark10:34 Bazamushinyagurira, bamuvunderezeho amacandwe, bamukubite, bamwice, ariko nyuma y’iminsi itatu azuke.»" 
Mark10:35 Nuko Yakobo na Yohani, bene Zebedeyi, begera Yezu, baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, turashaka ko udukorera icyo tugiye kugusaba.»" 
Mark10:36 Arababaza ati «Murashaka ko mbakorera iki?» 
Mark10:37 Baramusubiza bati «Uraduhe kuzicarana nawe, umwe iburyo, undi ibumoso mu ikuzo ryawe.»" 
Mark10:38 Yezu arababwira ati «Ntimuzi icyo musaba. Mushobora se kunywera ku nkongoro nzanyweraho, cyangwa se guhabwa batisimu nzahabwa?»" 
Mark10:39 Baramusubiza bati «Turabishobora!» Yezu arababwira ati «Koko inkongoro nzanyweraho muzayinywesha, na batisimu nzahabwa muzayihabwa;" 
Mark10:40 naho ibyo kwicara iburyo bwanjye cyangwa ibumoso bwanjye, si jye ubitanga; bizahabwa ababigenewe.»" 
Mark10:41 Abandi uko ari icumi babyumvise, batangira kurakarira Yakobo na Yohani." 
Mark10:42 Yezu arabahamagara, arababwira ati «Muzi ko abahawe kugenga amahanga, bayagenga uko bashatse, kandi ko abatware bayo bayategekesha agahato." 
Mark10:43 Kuri mwebwe rero si ko bimeze. Ahubwo ushaka kuba mukuru muri mwe, ajye yigira umugaragu wanyu," 
Mark10:44 maze ushaka kuba uwa mbere, yihindure umucakara wa bose." 
Mark10:45 Dore n’Umwana w’umuntu ntiyazanywe no gukorerwa, ahubwo yazanywe no gukorera abandi, no gutanga ubugingo bwe ngo bube incungu ya benshi.»" 
Mark10:46 Nuko bagera i Yeriko. Igihe agisohoka muri Yeriko, ari kumwe n’abigishwa be n’imbaga y’abantu benshi, umuntu w’impumyi witwaga Baritimeyo, mwene Timeyo, akaba yari yicaye iruhande rw’inzira asabiriza." 
Mark10:47 Yumvise ko ari Yezu w’i Nazareti, atera hejuru ati «Yezu, Mwana wa Dawudi, mbabarira!»" 
Mark10:48 Benshi baramucyaha ngo aceceke, ariko we arushaho gusakuza ati «Mwana wa Dawudi, mbabarira!»" 
Mark10:49 Yezu arahagarara, aravuga ati «Nimumuhamagare.» Bahamagara iyo mpumyi, barayibwira bati «Humura, haguruka, dore araguhamagaye.»" 
Mark10:50 Ajugunya igishura cye, ahaguruka bwangu, asanga Yezu." 
Mark10:51 Yezu aramubaza ati «Urashaka ko ngukorera iki?» Impumyi iramusubiza iti «Mwigisha, mpa kubona!»" 
Mark10:52 Yezu aramubwira ati «Genda, ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije.» Ako kanya arahumuka, maze akurikira Yezu." 
Mark11:1 Bagiye kugera i Yeruzalemu, ahagana i Betifage n’i Betaniya, hafi y’umusozi w’Imizeti, Yezu yohereza babiri mu bigishwa be," 
Mark11:2 arababwira ati «Nimujye mu ngo ziri imbere yanyu; mukihagera murabona icyana cy’indogobe kiziritse, kitigeze kigira uwo giheka, mukiziture, maze mukinzanire." 
Mark11:3 Nihagira ubabwira ati ’Ibyo mukora ni ibiki?’ musubize muti ’Umwigisha aragikeneye, kandi aracyohereza vuba.’»" 
Mark11:4 Baragenda, basanga icyana cy’indogobe kiziritse ku irembo iruhande rw’inzira, barakizitura." 
Mark11:5 Bamwe mu bari aho ngaho barababwira bati «Ibyo mukora ni ibiki? Kuki muzitura iyo ndogobe?» 
Mark11:6 Bo babasubiza uko Yezu yari yababwiye, nuko barabihorera." 
Mark11:7 Icyana cy’indogobe bakizanira Yezu, bagisasaho ibishura byabo, acyicaraho." 
Mark11:8 Nuko abantu benshi basasa ibishura byabo mu nzira; abandi basasa amashami bari batemye mu mirima. 
Mark11:9 Abamugendaga imbere n’abari bamukurikiye barangurura ijwi bati «Hozana! Hasingizwe Uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! 
Mark11:10 Hasingizwe Ingoma y’umubyeyi wacu Dawudi itugezeho! Hozana, Imana nihabwe impundu mu ijuru!»" 
Mark11:11 Nuko Yezu agera i Yeruzalemu, yinjira mu Ngoro y’Imana. Amaze kwitegereza byose hirya no hino, umugoroba ukubye, arasohoka, ajyana na ba Cumi na babiri i Betaniya." 
Mark11:12 Bukeye, bahagurutse i Betaniya, Yezu aza gusonza." 
Mark11:13 Akiri kure, arabukwa igiti cy’umutini gifite amababi, ajya kureba ko hari imbuto yakibonaho, acyegereye, asanga ni ibibabi bisa, kuko kitari igihe cyacyo cyo kwera." 
Mark11:14 Abwira icyo giti ati «Ntihakagire umuntu urya imbuto zawe ukundi!» Ubwo abigishwa be baramwumvaga. 
Mark11:15 Baragenda, bagera i Yeruzalemu. Yezu yinjira mu Ngoro y’Imana, atangira kwirukana abacuruzi n’abaguzi bari mu Ngoro; ahirika ameza y’abavunjaga amafaranga, n’intebe z’abacuruzaga inuma," 
Mark11:16 kandi abuza abikoreraga imitwaro kwahuranya ikibuga cy’Ingoro. 
Mark11:17 Nuko abigisha ababwira ati «Mbese ntihanditswe ngo: Inzu yanjye izitwa inzu yo gusengerwamo n’amahanga yose, naho mwebwe mwayigize ubuvumo bw’abambuzi!»" 
Mark11:18 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko ngo babimenye, bashaka ukuntu bamwicisha, ariko bakamutinya, kuko rubanda rwatangariraga inyigisho ze." 
Mark11:19 Bugorobye, Yezu n’abigishwa be bava mu mugi." 
Mark11:20 Mu gitondo bahita, babona wa mutini wumye kugeza mu mizi." 
Mark11:21 Petero yibuka ibyabaye, maze abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, cya giti wavumye, dore cyumye cyose!»" 
Mark11:22 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Nimwemere Imana! 
Mark11:23 Ndababwira nkomeje ko uwizera Imana ashobora kubwira uriya musozi ati ’Shyiguka aho wirohe mu nyanja’, niyizera adashidikanya ko ibyo avuze biba, bizaba." 
Mark11:24 Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ’Icyo musabye cyose musenga, mwizere ko mugihawe, kandi muzagihabwa.’" 
Mark11:25 Kandi igihe muhagaze musenga, mujye mubabarira uwo mwaba mufitanye akantu, kugira ngo namwe So wo mu ijuru abababarire ibicumuro byanyu." 
Mark11:26 Naho nimutababarira abandi, na So wo mu ijuru ntazabababarira ibicumuro byanyu.»" 
Mark11:27 Barongera bagaruka i Yeruzalemu. Ubwo Yezu yagendagendaga mu Ngoro y’Imana, abaherezabitambo bakuru, abigishamategeko n’abakuru b’imiryango baramwegera," 
Mark11:28 baramubwira bati «Ibyo ubikoresha bubasha ki? Ni nde waguhaye ubwo bubasha?» 
Mark11:29 Yezu arababwira ati «Reka nanjye ngire icyo mbabaza, kandi munsubize, maze nanjye mbone kubabwira aho ububasha butuma nkora ibyo mubona bukomoka." 
Mark11:30 Batisimu ya Yohani yaturutse mu ijuru cyangwa ku bantu? Nimunsubize!» 
Mark11:31 Naho bo baribwira bati «Nituvuga ko yaturutse mu ijuru, aratubwira ati ’Mwabujijwe n’iki kumwemera?’" 
Mark11:32 Nituramuka tuvuze ko yaturutse ku bantu, bizatugendekera bite?» Koko rero batinyaga rubanda, kuko bose bahamyaga ko Yohani ari umuhanuzi nyawe." 
Mark11:33 Nuko basubiza Yezu bati «Ntitubizi.» Yezu na we arababwira ati «Nanjye rero simbabwiye aho nkura ububasha bwo gukora ibyo mubona.» 
Mark12:1 Nuko Yezu atangira kubabwira mu migani, avuga ati «Umuntu yateye imizabibu mu murima we, ayikikizaho uruzitiro, acukuramo urwengero, yubakamo n’umunara w’abararirizi, awatira abahinzi, maze yigira mu rugendo." 
Mark12:2 Igihe cy’isarura kigeze, yohereza umugaragu kuri ba bahinzi, ngo bamumuhere ku mbuto z’imizabibu." 
Mark12:3 Ariko bo basumira uwo mugaragu, baramuhondagura, bamwohereza amara masa." 
Mark12:4 Arongera abatumaho undi mugaragu, uwo na we bamurema uruguma mu mutwe, baramutukagura." 
Mark12:5 Nuko yoherezayo undi, we baramwica. Nyuma yohereza n’abandi benshi, bamwe barabakubita, abandi barabica." 
Mark12:6 Hari hasigaye umwana we yakundaga, nyuma aba ari we abatumaho, yibwira ati ’Umwana wanjye we nta cyo bazamutwara.’" 
Mark12:7 Ariko abahinzi bamubonye, barabwirana bati ’Dore uzamuzungura; nimuze tumwice, maze tuzazungure ibye.’" 
Mark12:8 Nuko baramufata baramwica, bamujugunya inyuma y’umurima w’imizabibu." 
Mark12:9 Mbese mubona nyir’imizabibu azakora iki? Azaza, arimbure abo bahinzi, maze imizabibu ayishinge abandi." 
Mark12:10 Ntimwasomye se mu Byanditswe ngo Ibuye ryajugunywe n’abubatsi, ni ryo ryabaye insanganyarukuta." 
Mark12:11 Ngicyo icyo Nyagasani yakoze, kikaba kibaye igitangaza mu maso yacu.’»" 
Mark12:12 Bashaka uko bafata Yezu, ariko batinya rubanda. Bari bumvise neza ko ari bo yavugaga muri uwo mugani. Nuko bamusiga aho, barigendera." 
Mark12:13 Hanyuma bamwoherereza bamwe mu Bafarizayi no mu Baherodiyani, kugira ngo bamufatire ku byo avuga." 
Mark12:14 Baraza baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, tuzi ko uvuga ukuri nta cyo wikanga, kuko udatinya amaso y’abantu, ahubwo wigisha inzira y’Imana mu kuri. Ese gutanga umusoro wa Kayizari biremewe, cyangwa se ntibyemewe? Tujye tuwutanga cyangwa se twoye kuwutanga?»" 
Mark12:15 Ariko Yezu kuko yari azi uburyarya bwabo, arababwira ati «Kuki muntega iyo mitego? Nimunzanire igiceri ndebe!»" 
Mark12:16 Barakimuzanira. Yezu arababaza ati «Iri shusho n’iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?» Barasubiza bati «Ni ibya Kayizari.» 
Mark12:17 Yezu ni ko kubabwira ati «Ibya Kayizari mubisubize Kayizari, n’iby’Imana mubisubize Imana!» Ngo avuge atyo, baramutangarira cyane." 
Mark12:18 Nuko Abasaduseyi baza bamugana, ba bandi bavuga ko kuzuka bitabaho. Baramubaza bati" 
Mark12:19 «Mwigisha, dore Musa yatwandikiye iri tegeko ngo ’Umuntu napfa asize umugore batabyaranye, umuvandimwe we agomba gucyura uwo mugore, kugira ngo acikure nyakwigendera.’" 
Mark12:20 Habayeho rero abavandimwe barindwi, uwa mbere ashaka umugore maze apfa batabyaranye." 
Mark12:21 Uwa kabiri acyura wa mupfakazi, na we apfa batabyaranye. N’uwa gatatu bigenda gutyo." 
Mark12:22 Bose uko ari barindwi bapfa badasize imbuto. Amaherezo wa mugore na we arapfa. 
Mark12:23 Igihe cy’izuka, nibamara kuzuka, mbese uwo mugore azaba uwa nde muri bo, ko bose uko ari barindwi bazaba baramutunze?»" 
Mark12:24 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Aho ntimwayobejwe no kutamenya Ibyanditswe, mukirengagiza n’ububasha bw’Imana?" 
Mark12:25 Erega igihe abapfuye bazazuka, nta we uzagira umugore, nta n’uzagira umugabo, ahubwo bazamera nk’abamalayika bo mu ijuru." 
Mark12:26 Naho ku byerekeye ko abapfuye bazazuka, nta bwo mwasomye mu gitabo cya Musa, uko Imana yamubwiriye muri cya gihuru kigurumana, iti ’Ndi Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, n’Imana ya Yakobo?’»" 
Mark12:27 Nta bwo rero Imana ari iy’abapfuye, ahubwo ni iy’abazima. Mwarayobye cyane!»" 
Mark12:28 Umwe mu bigishamategeko wari wumvise bajya impaka, abonye ko Yezu abashubije neza, aramwegera aramubaza ati «Itegeko riruta ayandi ni irihe?»" 
Mark12:29 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Irya mbere ni iri ngiri: Tega amatwi Israheli, Nyagasani Imana yacu ni We Nyagasani umwe rukumbi:" 
Mark12:30 Urajye ukunda Nyagasani Imana yawe n’umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose, n’ubwenge bwawe bwose, n’imbaraga zawe zose." 
Mark12:31 Irya kabiri na ryo ngiri: Urajye ukunda mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda. Nta rindi tegeko riruta ayo yombi.» 
Mark12:32 Uwo mwigishamategeko aramubwira ati «Ni koko, Mwigisha, uvuze ukuri ko Nyagasani ari umwe rukumbi, kandi nta yindi mana ibaho uretse Yo yonyine." 
Mark12:33 Kandi kuyikunda n’umutima wawe wose, n’ubwenge bwawe bwose, n’imbaraga zawe zose, ugakunda mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda, ibyo biruta ibitambo n’amaturo byose.»" 
Mark12:34 Yezu yumvise ko amushubije neza, aramubwira ati «Nta bwo uri kure y’Ingoma y’Imana.» Nuko ntihagira utinyuka kongera kugira icyo amubaza." 
Mark12:35 Igihe Yezu yigishirizaga mu Ngoro y’Imana, araterura ati «Ni iki gituma abigishamategeko bavuga ko Kristu ari Mwene Dawudi?" 
Mark12:36 Kandi Dawudi ubwe yaravuze ati ‘Nyagasani yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye ati ’Icara iburyo bwanjye, kugeza igihe abanzi bawe mbahindura imisego y’ibirenge byawe’." 
Mark12:37 Uwo Dawudi yita Umutegetsi, yaba umwana we ate?» Abantu benshi bamwumvanaga umunerezo." 
Mark12:38 Mu nyigisho ze Yezu akavuga ati «Murajye mwirinda abigishamategeko, bakunda gutembera bambaye amakanzu maremare, no kuramukirizwa mu materaniro." 
Mark12:39 Bakunda kandi guhabwa intebe z’icyubahiro mu masengero n’imyanya y’imbere aho batumiwe. 
Mark12:40 Icyabo ni ukurya ingo z’abapfakazi, maze bakiha kuvuga amasengesho y’urudaca. Abo bazacirwa urubanza rukaze kurusha abandi.»" 
Mark12:41 Yezu yari yicaye mu Ngoro y’Imana, ahateganye n’ububiko ba shyiragamo amaturo, yitegereza uko rubanda batura. Abakungu benshi bashyiragamo byinshi." 
Mark12:42 Maze haza umupfakazi w’umukene, ashyiramo uduceri tubiri." 
Mark12:43 Yezu ahamagara abigishwa be, arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri: Uriya mupfakazi w’umukene yarushije abandi bose gutura." 
Mark12:44 Kuko bariya bose bashyizemo ku by’ikirenga, naho we yashyizemo ibyari bimutunze byose.»" 
Mark13:1 Yezu asohotse mu Ngoro, umwe mu bigishwa be aramubwira ati «Mwigisha, irebere nawe: mbega amabuye manini! Mbega amazu meza!»" 
Mark13:2 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ntureba ariya mazu ukuntu asa? Nkubwiye ko nta buye rizasigara rigeretse ku rindi, yose azasenyuka.»" 
Mark13:3 Nuko igihe yari yicaye ku musozi w’Imizeti, ahateganye n’Ingoro, Petero na Yakobo na Yohani na Andereya bamubaza biherereye bati" 
Mark13:4 «Tubwire igihe ibyo bizabera, n’ikimenyetso kizereka abantu ko ibyo byose bigiye gushira.»" 
Mark13:5 Yezu ni ko guterura ati «Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya," 
Mark13:6 kuko hazaza benshi biyitirira izina ryanjye, bavuga bati ’Ni jye Kristu’, maze bayobye abantu benshi." 
Mark13:7 Nimwumva bavuga intambara cyangwa impuha zayo, ntimuzakuke umutima. Ibyo bigomba kuba, ariko ntibizaba ari byo herezo." 
Mark13:8 Igihugu kizahagurukira ikindi, ingoma ishyamirane n’indi, kandi hamwe hazaba imitingito y’isi, ahandi hatere inzara. Bizamera nk’intangiriro y’ububabare bw’umugore wenda kubyara." 
Mark13:9 Namwe ubwanyu, muramenye! Bazabagabiza inkiko, mukubitirwe mu masengero. Bazabahagarika imbere y’abami n’abandi bategetsi, ari jye babaziza, bityo muzambere abagabo imbere yabo." 
Mark13:10 Icyakora, Inkuru Nziza izabanza yogezwe mu mahanga yose." 
Mark13:11 Maze igihe bazaba babajyanye kubatanga, ntimuzabunze imitima mwibaza icyo muzavuga. Muzavuge ikibajemo muri uwo mwanya, kuko atari mwe muzaba muvuga, ahubwo azaba ari Roho Mutagatifu ubavugiramo." 
Mark13:12 Umuvandimwe azicisha umuvandimwe we, umubyeyi yicishe umwana we, abana na bo bazahinduka ababyeyi babicishe." 
Mark13:13 Kandi muzangwa n’abantu bose, muzira izina ryanjye; ariko uzakomera kugeza ku ndunduro, uwo nguwo azarokorwa." 
Mark13:14 Nimubona ’ishyano ry’icyorezo ’ riri aho ritagomba kuba — usoma abyumve neza! — icyo gihe abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi; 
Mark13:15 uzaba ari hejuru y’inzu, ntazamanuke ku nzu ye ngo yinjiremo, maze agire icyo avanamo;" 
Mark13:16 kandi uzaba ari mu murima ntazahindukire ngo ajye gushaka igishura cye imuhira. 
Mark13:17 Hagowe abazaba batwite n’abazaba bonsa muri iyo minsi! 
Mark13:18 Nimusabe kugira ngo ibyo byose bitazaba ari mu itumba. 
Mark13:19 Kuko muri iyo minsi hazaba amakuba atigeze abaho, kuva mu ntangiriro Imana irema isi kugeza ubu ngubu, kandi nta n’ubwo azongera kubaho." 
Mark13:20 Kandi iyo Nyagasani atagabanya iyo minsi, nta muntu wajyaga kuzarokoka; ariko kubera intore yatoye, yagabanyije iyo minsi." 
Mark13:21 Ubwo nihagira ubabwira ati ’Dore Kristu ari hano!’ cyangwa ’Ari hariya!’ ntimuzamwemere. 
Mark13:22 Kuko hazaduka abiyita Kristu, haze n’abiyita abahanuzi berekana ibimenyetso, bakore n’ibitangaza byo kuyobya n’abatowe, iyaba byashobokaga." 
Mark13:23 Naho mwebwe muritonde, dore ndababuriye kuri byose." 
Mark13:24 Muri iyo minsi kandi, nyuma y’icyo cyorezo, izuba rizacura umwijima, ukwezi ntikuzamurika," 
Mark13:25 inyenyeri zizahanuka ku ijuru, maze ibikomeye byo mu ijuru bihungabane." 
Mark13:26 Ni bwo bazabona Umwana w’umuntu aje mu bicu, afite ububasha bukomeye n’ikuzo ryinshi." 
Mark13:27 Ubwo rero azohereza abamalayika mu mpande enye z’isi, aho isi iherera kugeza ku mpera y’ijuru, maze akoranye intore ze." 
Mark13:28 Nimugereranye muhereye ku giti cy’umutini maze mwumve: iyo amashami yacyo amaze gutoha akameraho amababi, mumenyeraho ko igihe cy’imbuto cyegereje." 
Mark13:29 Namwe rero nimubona ibyo bibaye, muzamenye ko Umwana w’umuntu ari hafi, ndetse ko ageze ku miryango yanyu." 
Mark13:30 Ndababwira ukuri, iki gisekuru ntikizahita ibyo byose bitabaye." 
Mark13:31 Ijuru n’isi bizashira, ariko amagambo yanjye nta bwo azashira." 
Mark13:32 Nyamara uwo munsi cyangwa iyo saha, nta we ubizi, habe n’abamalayika bo mu ijuru, habe ndetse na Mwana; bizwi n’Imana Data wenyine." 
Mark13:33 Mwitonde, mube maso, kuko mutazi igihe bizabera." 
Mark13:34 Bizaba bimeze nk’umuntu wagiye mu rugendo, agashinga abagaragu be urugo rwe, akagenera buri wese umurimo we, naho umunyarugi akamutegeka kuba maso." 
Mark13:35 Murabe maso rero kuko mutazi igihe nyir’urugo azazira, ari ku mugoroba, ari mu gicuku, ari mu nkoko, cyangwa mu gitondo," 
Mark13:36 kugira ngo atazaza abatunguye, agasanga musinziriye." 
Mark13:37 Ibyo mbabwiye, mbibwiye n’abandi bose: Murabe maso!»" 
Mark14:1 Hari hasigaye iminsi ibiri ngo Pasika ibe, n’umunsi mukuru w’imigati idasembuye. Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko bashaka gufata Yezu ku mayeri ngo bamwice." 
Mark14:2 Icyakora baravugaga bati «Ntibizabe ku munsi mukuru, ejo rubanda rudatera imidugararo.»" 
Mark14:3 Igihe Yezu yari i Betaniya kwa Simoni umubembe, ari ku meza, haza umugore ufite agacupa kuzuye umubavu umininnye w’igiciro gikomeye. Nuko amaze kugapfundura, umubavu awusuka ku mutwe wa Yezu." 
Mark14:4 Bamwe ariko birabarakaza, barabwirana bati «Uriya mubavu uzize iki?" 
Mark14:5 Uyu mubavu wajyaga kugurwa amadenari arenze magana atatu, maze agahabwa abakene!» Nuko batonganya uwo mugore." 
Mark14:6 Ariko Yezu arababwira ati «Nimumureke! Muramutonganyiriza iki? Dore ibyo amaze kungirira ni byiza. 
Mark14:7 Abakene muzabahorana iteka, kandi aho mushakiye mubagirira neza; naho jyewe ntimuzamporana iteka." 
Mark14:8 Yakoze ibyo ashoboye: yasize umubiri wanjye ateganya ihambwa ryanjye. 
Mark14:9 Ndababwira ukuri: ku isi yose, aho Inkuru Nziza izamamazwa hose, bazajya bavuga n’ibyo uyu mugore amaze gukora, bamwibuke.»" 
Mark14:10 Nuko Yuda Isikariyoti, umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri, asanga abatware b’abaherezabitambo bakuru, agira ngo azamubagabize." 
Mark14:11 Ngo babyumve, barishima, maze bamusezeranya kuzamuha ikiguzi. Yuda asigara ashaka uburyo bwo kumutanga." 
Mark14:12 Umunsi wa mbere wo kurya Imigati idasembuye, ari na wo babagagaho intama za Pasika, abigishwa be baramubaza bati «Urashaka ko tujya gutegura he, ngo uharire Pasika?»" 
Mark14:13 Yezu yohereza babiri mu bigishwa be, arababwira ati «Nimujye mu murwa, muri buhure n’umuntu wikoreye ikibindi cy’amazi, mumukurikire," 
Mark14:14 maze aho yinjira, mubwire nyir’urugo muti ’Umwigisha aravuze ngo: Icyumba cyanjye nza kuriramo Pasika hamwe n’abigishwa banjye kiri hehe?’" 
Mark14:15 Ari bubereke mu nzu yo hejuru icyumba kigari, gishashe, kandi giteguye neza, abe ariho mudutegurira ibya Pasika.»" 
Mark14:16 Abigishwa baragenda, bagera mu murwa, maze basanga bimeze uko yabibabwiye, batunganya ibya Pasika." 
Mark14:17 Bugorobye, Yezu azana na ba Cumi na babiri." 
Mark14:18 Nuko igihe bari ku meza barya, Yezu aravuga ati «Ndababwira ukuri: umwe muri mwe dusangira, agiye kungambanira.»" 
Mark14:19 Nuko barashavura, batangira kumubaza umwe umwe bati «Mbese yaba ari jyewe?»" 
Mark14:20 Arabasubiza ati «Ni umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri; dore dukoreye ku mbehe rimwe. 
Mark14:21 Koko Umwana w’umuntu aragiye, nk’uko ibyanditswe bimuvuga, ariko hagowe uwemeye kumugambanira! Ibyiza ni uko uwo muntu aba ataravutse.»" 
Mark14:22 Nuko igihe bafunguraga, Yezu afata umugati, amaze gushimira Imana, arawumanyura, arawubahereza avuga ati «Nimwakire: iki ni umubiri wanjye.»" 
Mark14:23 Hanyuma afata inkongoro, amaze gushimira Imana, arayibahereza, maze bayinyweraho bose." 
Mark14:24 Nuko arababwira ati «Iki ni amaraso yanjye y’Isezerano, amenewe abantu batabarika." 
Mark14:25 Ndababwira ukuri: Nta bwo nzongera kunywa ku mbuto y’imizabibu, kugeza ku munsi nzanywera divayi nshya mu Ngoma y’Imana.»" 
Mark14:26 Bamaze kuririmba zaburi, barasohoka bagana ku musozi w’Imizeti." 
Mark14:27 Yezu arababwira ati «Mwese ibigiye kumbaho biratuma muhungabana, kuko byanditswe ngo ’Nzakubita umushumba, maze intama zitatane.’" 
Mark14:28 Ariko nimara kuzuka, nzabatanga mu Galileya.»" 
Mark14:29 Petero aramubwira ati «N’aho bose bahungabana, jye ntibizambaho!»" 
Mark14:30 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri: None muri iri joro, isake itarabika ubwa kabiri, uraba umaze kunyihakana gatatu.»" 
Mark14:31 Ariko we arakomeza ati «N’aho nagomba gupfana nawe, sinakwihakana!» Abandi bose na bo bavuga batyo." 
Mark14:32 Nuko bajya mu murima witwa Getsemani, maze Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Nimube mwicaye hano, umwanya ngiye gusenga.»" 
Mark14:33 Yezu ajyana na Petero na Yakobo na Yohani, maze atangira kugira ubwoba n’ishavu." 
Mark14:34 Arababwira ati «Umutima wanjye ushavuye byo gupfa; nimugume aha, maze mube maso.»" 
Mark14:35 Yigiye imbere gato, yikubita hasi, arasaba ngo niba bishoboka, iyo saha ice kure ye." 
Mark14:36 Yaravugaga ati «Abba, Dawe! Byose biragushobokera: igizayo iyi nkongoro; nyamara ntibibe uko jye nshaka, ahubwo bibe uko wowe ushaka.»" 
Mark14:37 Yezu aragaruka, asanga basinziriye; abwira Petero ati «Simoni, urasinziriye, ntiwashoboye kuba maso isaha n’imwe?" 
Mark14:38 Nimube maso, musenge kugira ngo mutaza kugwa mu gishuko; koko umutima w’umuntu uharanira ibyiza, ariko umubiri we ukagira intege nke.»" 
Mark14:39 Yezu asubirayo, yongera kwambaza avuga nka mbere." 
Mark14:40 Hanyuma agarutse, asanga na none basinziriye, kuko amaso yabo yari aremerewe; nuko ntibabona icyo bamusubiza." 
Mark14:41 Ubwa gatatu araza, arababwira ati «Noneho nimusinzire, muruhuke! Nimurekere aho. Isaha irageze; dore Umwana w’umuntu agiye gushyirwa mu maboko y’abanyabyaha." 
Mark14:42 Nimuhaguruke tugende! Dore untanga ari hafi.» 
Mark14:43 Nuko ako kanya akivuga, Yuda umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri azana n’igitero cy’abantu bafite inkota n’ibibando, boherejwe n’abaherezabitambo bakuru, n’abigishamategeko, n’abakuru b’imiryango." 
Mark14:44 Umugambanyi yari yabahaye ikimenyetso, ati «Uwo nza guhobera nkamusoma, araba ari we: mumufate, maze mumujyane, mumenye ntabacike.»" 
Mark14:45 Nuko Yuda araza yegera Yezu, ati «Mwigisha!»; nuko aramusoma." 
Mark14:46 Ba bandi bahita basumira Yezu ubwo, baramufata." 
Mark14:47 Umwe mu bari aho, akura inkota ayikubita umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo mukuru, amuca ugutwi." 
Mark14:48 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Mwaje kumfata mufite inkota n’ibibando nk’aho ndi igisambo! 
Mark14:49 Nyamara iminsi yose nabaga ndi kumwe namwe mu Ngoro y'Imana nigisha, ntimwamfashe. Ariko ibi bibereye kugira ngo Ibyanditswe byuzuzwe.»" 
Mark14:50 Nuko bose bamusiga aho barahunga. 
Mark14:51 Hari umusore wari ukurikiye Yezu, yifubitse igishura cyonyine; nuko baramufata." 
Mark14:52 We rero arabiyaka, abasigira igishura mu ntoki, ahunga yambaye ubusa." 
Mark14:53 Nuko Yezu bamushyira umuherezabitambo mukuru, maze abatware b’abaherezabitambo, n’abakuru b’imiryango, n’abigishamategeko, baraterana bose." 
Mark14:54 Petero akaba yari yamukurikiriye kure, kugera mu ngoro y’umuherezabitambo mukuru, maze yicarana n’abagaragu ku ikome, arota." 
Mark14:55 Ubwo rero abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’inama nkuru yose bashaka icyo bashinja Yezu kugira ngo bamucire urwo gupfa, ariko barakibura." 
Mark14:56 Benshi nanone bamushinjaga ibitari byo, n’ibyo bamushinje ntibabihuze." 
Mark14:57 Bamwe barahaguruka, bamushinja ibinyoma bavuga bati" 
Mark14:58 «Twamwumvise avuga ati ’Jyewe nzasenya iyi Ngoro yubatswe n’amaboko y’abantu, maze mu minsi itatu nubake indi itubakishijwe amaboko y’abantu.’»" 
Mark14:59 Ariko no kuri ibyo, uko bamuregaga ntibabihuze." 
Mark14:60 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru arahaguruka, ahagarara hagati y’iteraniro, abaza Yezu ati «Nta cyo usubiza ku byo aba bantu bakurega?»" 
Mark14:61 We rero araceceka, ntiyagira icyo asubiza. Umuherezabitambo mukuru arongera aramubaza ati «Mbese uri Kristu, Umwana wa Nyagusingizwa?»" 
Mark14:62 Yezu arasubiza ati «Ndi we, byongeye kandi muzabona Umwana w’umuntu yicaye iburyo bwa Nyir’ububasha, munamubone aje ku bicu by’ijuru.»" 
Mark14:63 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru ashishimura imyambaro ye, avuga ati «Abagabo bandi dushaka ni ab’iki?" 
Mark14:64 Mwiyumviye ukuntu atutse Imana. Mubitekerezaho iki?» Bose bahamya ko akwiye gupfa. 
Mark14:65 Hanyuma bamwe batangira kumuvunderezaho amacandwe no kumupfuka mu maso, no kumukubita inshyi, bamubwira bati «Ngaho duhanurire!» Abagaragu na bo bamukubita inshyi." 
Mark14:66 Icyo gihe Petero yari mu rugo, maze haza umwe mu baja b’umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
Mark14:67 Abonye Petero yota aramwitegereza, maze aramubwira ati «Nawe wari kumwe na Yezu w’i Nazareti!»" 
Mark14:68 Petero ahakana avuga ati «Ibyo simbizi, sinumva icyo ushaka kuvuga.» Arahaguruka, ajya ku irembo." 
Mark14:69 Wa muja yongera kumwitegereza, abwira abari aho ati «Koko uriya ni umwe muri bo!»" 
Mark14:70 We ariko arongera arahakana. Hashize akanya, abari aho babwira Petero bati «Ni ukuri, uri umwe muri bo! Byongeye uri Umunyagalileya.»" 
Mark14:71 Nuko we atangira kurahira yimazeyo ati «Uwo muntu muvuga, nta bwo muzi!» Ako kanya isake ibika ubwa kabiri." 
Mark14:72 Nuko Petero yibuka ijambo Yezu yari yamubwiye ati «Isake itarabika ubwa kabiri, uzaba unyihakanye gatatu.» Nuko araturika ararira." 
Mark15:1 Mu gitondo kare, abatware b’abaherezabitambo bateranira hamwe n’abakuru b’imiryango n’abigishamategeko, mbese abagize inama nkuru bose. Bamaze kuboha Yezu, baramujyana bamushyikiriza Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati «Mbese uri umwami w’Abayahudi?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Urabyivugiye.» 
Mark15:3 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo bamurega byinshi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato arongera aramubaza ati «Nta cyo usubiza? Ntiwumva ibyo bakurega byose?» 
Mark15:5 Yezu ariko ntiyongera kugira icyo asubiza, Pilato biramutangaza cyane." 
Mark15:6 Buri munsi mukuru yabarekuriraga imwe mu mfungwa babaga bamusabye. 
Mark15:7 Ubwo rero mu buroko hakaba uwitwa Barabasi, wari wafatanywe n’abandi bagome bari biciye umuntu mu myivumbagatanyo." 
Mark15:8 Nuko rubanda rurazamuka, batangira gusaba Pilato ngo abagirire uko yabamenyereje." 
Mark15:9 Pilato arababaza ati «Murashaka ko mbarekurira umwami w’Abayahudi?» 
Mark15:10 Yari azi neza ko abaherezabitambo bakuru bari bamutanze babitewe n’ishyari. 
Mark15:11 Ubwo ariko abaherezabitambo bakuru boshya rubanda gusaba ko abarekurira Barabasi. 
Mark15:12 Pilato arongera arababaza ati «Maze se ngire nte uwo mwita umwami w’Abayahudi?» 
Mark15:13 Bo rero batera hejuru bati «Mubambe ku musaraba!» 
Mark15:14 Pilato arababaza ati «Ikibi yakoze ni ikihe?» Bo rero barushaho gutera hejuru bati «Mubambe ku musaraba!» 
Mark15:15 Pilato ahitamo gushimisha rubanda, abarekurira Barabasi. Amaze gukubitisha Yezu, aramutanga ngo bajye kumubamba." 
Mark15:16 Nuko abasirikare bajyana Yezu mu gikari cy’ingoro ya Pilato, maze bakoranya igombaniro ryose." 
Mark15:17 Bamwambika igishura gitukura, nyuma baboha ikizingo cy’amahwa, bakimushyira ku mutwe." 
Mark15:18 Nuko batangira kumushungera bavuga bati «Turakuramya, Mwami w’Abayahudi!»" 
Mark15:19 Ubwo bamukubitisha urubingo mu mutwe, bakamuvunderezaho amacandwe, maze bagatera ivi imbere ye byo kumuramya." 
Mark15:20 Bamaze kumukwena batyo, bamwambura igishura gitukura, bamwambika imyambaro ye, baramushorera, bajya kumubamba." 
Mark15:21 Mu nzira, bafatirana Simoni w’i Sireni, se wa Alegisanderi na Rufusi, wiviraga mu murima, ngo amutwaze umusaraba." 
Mark15:22 Nuko bajyana Yezu ahantu hitwa Gologota, bikavuga ku Kibihanga." 
Mark15:23 Bamuha divayi ivanze n’indurwe ngo abinywe, ariko ntiyabyakira." 
Mark15:24 Nuko baramubamba. Hanyuma bigabanya imyambaro ye, bayikoreraho ubufindo ngo bamenye icyo buri wese yegukana." 
Mark15:25 Bamubambye ari ku isaha ya gatatu. 
Mark15:26 Hari kandi urubaho rwanditseho icyo azize, ngo «Umwami w’Abayahudi»." 
Mark15:27 Maze bamubambana n’abagome babiri, umwe iburyo undi ibumoso bwe." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Abahisi bakamutuka bazunguza umutwe kandi bavuga ngo «Ngaho da! Wowe usenya Ingoro y’Imana maze ukongera ukayubaka mu minsi itatu," 
Mark15:30 ikize ubwawe, wimanure ku musaraba!»" 
Mark15:31 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo hamwe n’abigishamategeko bamushinyaguriraga bavuga ngo «Yakijije abandi, none yananiwe kwikiza ubwe!" 
Mark15:32 Kristu, Umwami wa Israheli, namanuke ku musaraba ubu ngubu, kugira ngo tubone maze twemere!» Ndetse n’abari babambanywe na we, na bo baramutukaga." 
Mark15:33 Bigejeje ku isaha ya gatandatu, umwijima ucura ku isi yose, kugeza ku isaha ya cyenda." 
Mark15:34 Nuko ku isaha ya cyenda, Yezu avuga mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktani?» bivuga ngo «Mana yanjye, Mana yanjye, icyatumye untererana ni iki?»" 
Mark15:35 Bamwe mu bari aho bamwumvise, baravuga bati «Dore aratabaza Eliya!»" 
Mark15:36 Umwe ariruka, avika icyangwe muri divayi irura, maze agitunga ku rubingo, aramuhereza ngo anywe, avuga ati «Nimureke turebe niba Eliya aza kumumanura.»" 
Mark15:37 Yezu arangurura ijwi cyane, nuko araca." 
Mark15:38 Maze umubambiko wo mu Ngoro y’Imana utanyukamo kabiri, kuva hejuru kugeza hasi." 
Mark15:39 Nuko umutegeka w’abasirikare, wari uhagaze imbere ye, abonye ko aciye atyo, aravuga ati «Koko, uyu yari umwana w’Imana!»" 
Mark15:40 Hari n’abagore bareberaga kure. Barimo Mariya Madalena, na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo muto na Yoze, na Salome," 
Mark15:41 bajyaga bakurikira Yezu kandi bakamukorera igihe yari mu Galileya. Bari kumwe n’abandi bagore benshi bari barazamukanye na we ajya i Yeruzalemu. 
Mark15:42 Bugorobye, kuko hari ku mwiteguro w’isabato," 
Mark15:43 Yozefu w’i Arimatiya, umujyanama w’umunyacyubahiro, wari utegereje na we Ingoma y’Imana, ashirika ubwoba aza kwa Pilato, maze asaba umurambo wa Yezu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato atangazwa n’uko yaba yapfuye, ahamagaza umutegeka w’abasirikare, amubaza niba hashize igihe apfuye." 
Mark15:45 Amaze kubyemezwa n’uwo mutegeka, yemerera Yozefu kujyana umurambo." 
Mark15:46 Yozefu, ngo amare kugura umwenda, amanura umurambo wa Yezu ku musaraba, awuzingiraho uwo mwenda, maze awushyingura mu mva yari yacukuwe mu rutare. Hanyuma ahirikira ibuye ku muryango w’imva." 
Mark15:47 Nuko Mariya Madalena na Mariya nyina wa Yoze bitegereza aho bamushyize. 
Mark16:1 Isabato irangiye, Mariya Madalena na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo na Solome, bagura imibavu yo kumusiga." 
Mark16:2 Nuko mu gitondo cya kare, ku wa mbere w’isabato, bajya ku mva, izuba rirashe." 
Mark16:3 Baravugana bati «Ni nde uri buduhirikire ibuye riri ku muryango w’imva?» 
Mark16:4 Nuko bitegereje, babona ibuye rihirikiye iruhande; nyamara ryari rinini cyane." 
Mark16:5 Binjiye mu mva, babona umusore wari wicaye iburyo, yambaye ikanzu yera, maze bashya ubwoba." 
Mark16:6 Nuko arababwira ati «Mwigira ubwoba. Murashaka Yezu w’i Nazareti, uwabambwe ku musaraba; yazutse, ntakiri hano. Ngaho nimwirebere n’aho bari bamushyize." 
Mark16:7 Ahubwo nimujye kubwira abigishwa be, na Petero, ko abatanze mu Galileya; ni ho muzamubonera nk’uko yabibabwiye.»" 
Mark16:8 Basohoka mu mva bahunga, kuko umushyitsi n’ubwoba byari byabatashye. Nuko ntibagira uwo babibwira, kuko bari bafite ubwoba." 
Mark16:9 Yezu amaze kuzuka mu gitondo cy’uwa mbere w’isabato, abanza kubonekera Mariya Madalena, uwo yari yarirukanyemo roho mbi ndwi." 
Mark16:10 Nuko Mariya ajya kubimenyesha abari barabanye na we, bari bakiri mu mubabaro n’amarira." 
Mark16:11 Bumvise ko Yezu ari muzima, kandi ko yamubonye, ntibamwemera." 
Mark16:12 Hanyuma Yezu yongera kubonekera babiri muri bo, bari mu nzira bajya mu cyaro, bamubona asa ukundi." 
Mark16:13 Na bo bajya kubimenyesha abandi, ariko ntibabemera." 
Mark16:14 Hanyuma abonekera ba bandi Cumi n’umwe, bari ku meza, maze abatonganyiriza ukutemera kwabo n’umutima wabo unangiye, kuko bari banze kwemera abari bamubonye amaze kuzuka." 
Mark16:15 Ni bwo ababwiye ati «Nimujye mu isi hose, mwamamaze Inkuru Nziza mu biremwa byose." 
Mark16:16 Uzemera akabatizwa azakira; utazemera azacibwa. 
Mark16:17 Dore kandi n’ibimenyetso bizaranga abazaba bemeye: mu izina ryanjye bazirukana roho mbi, bazavuga indimi nshya," 
Mark16:18 bazafata inzoka; nibagira kandi icyo banywa cyica, nta cyo kizabatwara; bazaramburira ibiganza ku barwayi bakire.»" 
Mark16:19 Nuko Nyagasani Yezu amaze kubabwira atyo, ajyanwa mu ijuru, maze yicara iburyo bw’Imana." 
Mark16:20 Naho bo baragenda, bajya kwigisha hose. Nyagasani yabibafashagamo, kandi ijambo ryabo akarikomeresha ibimenyetso byariherekezaga." 
Luke1:1 Ubwo benshi batangiye kwandika barondora ibyabaye muri twe," 
Luke1:2 mbese nk’uko twabigejejweho n’ababyiboneye kuva mu ntangiriro, ari na bo bari bashinzwe kwamamaza ijambo ry’Imana," 
Luke1:3 nanjye, maze kubaririza neza uko byagenze kuva bigitangira, niyemeje, nyakubahwa Tewofili, kukwandikira ayo mateka nyakurikiranyije," 
Luke1:4 ngo umenye nyakuri ukuntu inyigisho washyikirijwe zihamye. 
Luke1:5 Ku ngoma ya Herodi, umwami wa Yudeya, hari umuherezabitambo wo mu cyiciro cya Abiya, akitwa Zakariya, n’umugore we akaba uwo mu muryango wa Aroni, akitwa Elizabeti." 
Luke1:6 Bombi bari intungane imbere y’Imana, bagakurikiza badatezuka amategeko n’amabwiriza yose ya Nyagasani." 
Luke1:7 Ariko nta mwana bari bafite, kuko Elizabeti yari ingumba; byongeye bombi bari bageze mu zabukuru." 
Luke1:8 Igihe rero Zakariya yariho akora imihango y’ubuherezabitambo imbere y’Imana, mu mwanya ugenewe icyiciro cye," 
Luke1:9 nk’uko abaherezabitambo babigenzaga, ubufindo buramufata ngo ajye gutwika ububani mu Ngoro ya Nyagasani." 
Luke1:10 Rubanda rwose rwasengeraga hanze igihe cyo gutwika ububani. 
Luke1:11 Nuko Umumalayika wa Nyagasani amubonekera ahagaze iburyo bw’urutambiro rw’ububani. 
Luke1:12 Zakariya amubonye arikanga, ubwoba buramutaha." 
Luke1:13 Ariko Malayika aramubwira ati «Wigira ubwoba, Zakariya, kuko isengesho ryawe ryashimwe: umugore wawe Elizabeti azakubyarira umuhungu, maze ukazamwita Yohani." 
Luke1:14 Azagutera ibyishimo n’umunezero, kandi benshi bazashimishwa n’ivuka rye," 
Luke1:15 kuko azaba umuntu ukomeye mu maso ya Nyagasani. Ntazanywa divayi n’icyitwa inzoga cyose, kandi azuzura Roho Mutagatifu akiri mu nda ya nyina." 
Luke1:16 Azagarura abana benshi ba Israheli kuri Nyagasani, Imana yabo," 
Luke1:17 kandi azagenda imbere y’Imana arangwa n’umutima n’ubushobozi nka Eliya, agira ngo yunge ababyeyi n’abana babo, no kugira ngo ab’ibigande abagire intungane, maze ategurire atyo Nyagasani umuryango umutunganiye.»" 
Luke1:18 Nuko Zakariya abwira Malayika, ati «Nzabibwirwa n’iki, ko ndi umusaza, n’umugore wanjye akaba ageze mu zabukuru?»" 
Luke1:19 Malayika aramusubiza ati «Ndi Gaburiyeli uhora imbere y’Imana; natumwe kukubwira no kukugezaho iyo nkuru nziza. 
Luke1:20 Nyamara guhera ubu ngubu ugiye kuba ikiragi; ntuzongera kuvuga kugeza ku munsi ibyo bizaberaho, kuko utemeye ibyo nakubwiye bizagaragara igihe cyabyo kigeze.»" 
Luke1:21 Ubwo rubanda rwari rutegereje Zakariya, rutangazwa n’uko yatinze mu Ngoro." 
Luke1:22 Aho asohokeye, ntiyari agishobora kuvuga, maze bamenya ko yabonekerewe mu Ngoro. Nuko aba uwo kubacira amarenga, akomeza kuba ikiragi." 
Luke1:23 Iminsi y’imihango y’ubuherezabitambo irangiye arataha. 
Luke1:24 Hashize iminsi, umugore we Elizabeti arasama, amara amezi atanu atajya ahagaragara, avuga ati" 
Luke1:25 «Dore ibyo Nyagasani yangiriye, yarangobotse ankiza icyankozaga isoni mu bantu.»" 
Luke1:26 Hahise amezi atandatu, Malayika Gaburiyeli atumwa n’Imana, mu mugi wo mu Galileya witwa Nazareti," 
Luke1:27 ku mukobwa w’isugi wari warasabwe n’umusore witwa Yozefu, wo mu muryango wa Dawudi; uwo mukobwa yitwaga Mariya." 
Luke1:28 Malayika aza iwabo, aramubwira ati «Ndakuramutsa, mutoni w’Imana; Nyagasani ari kumwe nawe.»" 
Luke1:29 Yumvise ayo magambo, arikanga, yibaza icyo iyo ndamutso ivuga." 
Luke1:30 Malayika aramubwira ati «Wigira ubwoba, Mariya, kuko wagize ubutoni ku Mana." 
Luke1:31 Dore ugiye gusama inda, ukazabyara umuhungu, maze ukazamwita izina rya Yezu." 
Luke1:32 Azaba umuntu ukomeye, kandi bazamwita Mwene Nyir’ijuru. Nyagasani Imana azamwegurira ingoma ya se Dawudi;" 
Luke1:33 azategeka umuryango wa Yakobo ubuziraherezo, ingoma ye ntizashira.»" 
Luke1:34 Nuko Mariya abwira Malayika, ati «Ibyo bizashoboka bite, kandi nta mugabo mfite?»" 
Luke1:35 Malayika aramusubiza ati «Roho Mutagatifu azakumanukiraho, maze ububasha bwa Nyir’ijuru bukubundikire mu gicucu cye, ndetse ugiye kuvuka azaba intungane, kandi azitwa Umwana w’Imana." 
Luke1:36 Dore Elizabeti mwene wanyu, na we yasamiye mu zabukuru; uku kwezi ni ukwa gatandatu, kandi ubundi yitwaga ingumba," 
Luke1:37 koko nta kinanira Imana.» 
Luke1:38 Mariya aravuga ati «Ndi umuja wa Nyagasani; byose bimbeho nk’uko ubivuze.» Nuko Malayika amusiga aho aragenda. 
Luke1:39 Muri iyo minsi, Mariya yarahagurutse agenda yihuta, ajya mu misozi miremire, mu mugi wa Yuda," 
Luke1:40 agera kwa Zakariya, aramutsa Elizabeti." 
Luke1:41 Nuko Elizabeti yumvise indamutso ya Mariya, umwana atwite yisimbiza mu nda, maze Elizabeti yuzura Roho Mutagatifu." 
Luke1:42 Arangurura ijwi ati «Wahebuje abagore bose umugisha, n’Umwana utwite arasingizwa." 
Luke1:43 Mbikesha iki kugira ngo nyina w’Umutegetsi wanjye angenderere? 
Luke1:44 Dore mbaye ncyumva indamutso yawe, umwana yisimbagizanya ibyishimo mu nda yanjye." 
Luke1:45 Urahirwa, wowe wemeye ko ibyo watumweho na Nyagasani bizaba.»" 
Luke1:46 Nuko Mariya na we aravuga ati 
Luke1:47 «Umutima wanjye urasingiza Nyagasani, kandi uhimbajwe n’Imana Umukiza wanjye." 
Luke1:48 Kuko yibutse umuja we utavugwaga; rwose, kuva ubu amasekuruza yose azanyita umuhire." 
Luke1:49 Ushoborabyose yankoreye ibitangaza, Izina rye ni ritagatifu." 
Luke1:50 Impuhwe ze zisesekarizwa abamutinya, bo mu bihe byose." 
Luke1:51 Yagaragaje ububasha bw’amaboko ye, atatanya abantu birata;" 
Luke1:52 yahanantuye abakomeye abakura ku ntebe zabo, maze akuza ab’intamenyekana;" 
Luke1:53 abashonje yabagwirije ibintu, abakungu abasezerera amara masa;" 
Luke1:54 yagobotse Israheli umugaragu we, bityo yibuka impuhwe ze," 
Luke1:55 nk’uko yari yarabibwiye abakurambere bacu, abigirira Abrahamu n’urubyaro rwe iteka.»" 
Luke1:56 Mariya yamaranye na Elizabeti nk’amezi atatu, abona gutaha." 
Luke1:57 Nuko Elizabeti ageze igihe cyo kubyara, abyara umwana w’umuhungu." 
Luke1:58 Abaturanyi na bene wabo, bumvise ko Nyagasani yamugiriye ubuntu, bafatanya na we kwishima." 
Luke1:59 Ku munsi wa munani, baza kugenya umwana, bashaka kumwita Zakariya nka se." 
Luke1:60 Ariko nyina aravuga ati «Oya, aritwa Yohani.»" 
Luke1:61 Baramubwira bati «Nta muntu wo mu muryango wanyu wigeze kwitwa iryo zina!» 
Luke1:62 Nuko babaza se mu marenga uko yifuza kwita umwana. 
Luke1:63 Zakariya yaka akabaho, maze yandikaho aya magambo: «Izina rye ni Yohani.» Bose baratangara." 
Luke1:64 Ako kanya umunwa we urabumbuka, n’ururimi rwe ruragobodoka, maze atangira kuvuga, asingiza Imana." 
Luke1:65 Nuko ubwoba butaha abaturanyi babo bose, n’abo mu misozi yo mu Yudeya, bakwiza hose ibyabaye." 
Luke1:66 Ababyumvaga bose bakomezaga kubizirikana mu mitima, bibaza bati «Uyu mwana azamera ate, ko ububasha bwa Nyagasani buri kumwe na we?»" 
Luke1:67 Nuko se Zakariya yuzura Roho Mutagatifu, ahanura avuga ati" 
Luke1:68 «Nihasingizwe Nyagasani, Imana ya Israheli, kuko yasuye umuryango we kandi akawukiza." 
Luke1:69 Yatugoboreye ububasha budukiza mu nzu ya Dawudi umugaragu we," 
Luke1:70 nk’uko abahanuzi be batagatifu bari barabitumenyesheje kuva kera 
Luke1:71 ko azadukiza abanzi bacu, akatugobotora mu nzara z’abatwanga bose." 
Luke1:72 Yagiriye impuhwe ababyeyi bacu, maze yibuka isezerano rye ritagatifu," 
Luke1:73 ya ndahiro yarahiye Abrahamu umubyeyi wacu," 
Luke1:74 avuga ko namara kutugobotora mu maboko y’abanzi bacu, azaduha kumukorera nta cyo twikanga," 
Luke1:75 turangwa n’ubuyoboke hamwe n’ubutungane, iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwacu." 
Luke1:76 Nawe rero wa kana we, uzitwa umuhanuzi w’Umusumbabyose, kuko uzabanziriza Nyagasani ngo umutegurire amayira," 
Luke1:77 ukamenyesha umuryango we umukiro, bazakesha kubabarirwa ibyaha byabo." 
Luke1:78 Koko Imana yacu igira impuhwe zihebuje, ari na zo zatumye Zuba‐rirashe amanuka mu ijuru aje kudusura," 
Luke1:79 akabonekera abari batuye mu mwijima no mu gicucu cy’urupfu, kugira ngo atuyobore mu nzira y’amahoro.»" 
Luke1:80 Umwana uko yakuraga, ni na ko yungukaga ubwenge. Nuko yibera ahantu h’ubutayu kugeza igihe yigaragaje imbere ya Israheli." 
Luke2:1 Muri iyo minsi, Kayizari Ogusito yaciye iteka ryo kubarura abantu bo mu bihugu byose yategekaga." 
Luke2:2 Iryo barura rya mbere ryabaye igihe Kwirini yari umutware wa Siriya. 
Luke2:3 Bose bajyaga kwiyandikisha, buri muntu mu mugi we." 
Luke2:4 Yozefu na we ava mu mugi wa Nazareti ho mu Galileya, ajya mu mugi wa Dawudi witwaga Betelehemu yo mu Yudeya, kuko yari uwo mu muryango wa Dawudi," 
Luke2:5 agira ngo abarwe, we n’umugore we Mariya wari utwite." 
Luke2:6 Nuko bagezeyo, umunsi wo kubyara uragera." 
Luke2:7 Abyara umuhungu we w’imfura, amworosa utwenda, amuryamisha mu kavure, kuko nta wundi mwanya ukwiye bari babonye aho bacumbika." 
Luke2:8 Muri ako karere hari abashumba barariraga amatungo yabo ku gasozi. 
Luke2:9 Nuko Umumalayika wa Nyagasani abahagarara iruhande, ikuzo rya Nyagasani ribasesekazaho urumuri, maze bashya ubwoba." 
Luke2:10 Malayika arababwira ati «Mwigira ubwoba, kuko mbazaniye inkuru ikomeye cyane, izashimisha umuryango wose." 
Luke2:11 None, mu mugi wa Dawudi, mwavukishije Umukiza ari we Kristu Nyagasani." 
Luke2:12 Dore ikimenyetso kimubabwira: murasanga uruhinja rworoshe utwenda, ruryamye mu kavure.»" 
Luke2:13 Nuko ako kanya, inteko y’ingabo zo mu ijuru yifatanya na wa Mumalayika, basingiza Imana bavuga bati" 
Luke2:14 «Imana nikuzwe mu bushorishori bw’ijuru, kandi mu nsi abo ikunda bahorane amahoro.»" 
Luke2:15 Abamalayika babasiga aho, basubira mu ijuru. Nuko abashumba bajya inama bati «Nimucyo tujye i Betelehemu, turebe ibyabaye Nyagasani atumenyesheje.»" 
Luke2:16 Nuko bagenda bihuta, basanga Mariya na Yozefu, n’uruhinja ruryamye mu kavure." 
Luke2:17 Bamaze kureba bamenyesha hose ibyo bari babwiwe kuri uwo Mwana. 
Luke2:18 Maze ababumvaga bose, batangazwa n’ibyo abashumba bavugaga." 
Luke2:19 Mariya we yashyinguraga mu mutima we ibyabaye byose, akabizirikana." 
Luke2:20 Nuko abashumba bataha bakuza Imana kandi bayisingiza, babitewe n’ibyo bari babonye kandi bumvise bihuje n’uko bari babibwiwe." 
Luke2:21 Hashize iminsi munani, igihe cyo kugenya Umwana kiragera; bamwita izina rya Yezu, Malayika yari yamwise atarasamwa." 
Luke2:22 Umunsi w’isukurwa ryabo wategetswe na Musa uragera, bamujyana i Yeruzalemu kumutura Nyagasani," 
Luke2:23 nk’uko byanditse mu itegeko rya Nyagasani, ngo «Umuhungu wese w’imfura azaba intore y’umwihariko wa Nyagasani.»" 
Luke2:24 Bari bajyanywe kandi no gutura igitambo cy’intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri bakurikije itegeko rya Nyagasani. 
Luke2:25 Icyo gihe, i Yeruzalemu hari umuntu witwaga Simewoni; yari intungane kandi yubaha Imana. Yari ategereje ihumure rya Israheli, kandi Roho Mutagatifu yari amurimo." 
Luke2:26 Byongeye Roho Mutagatifu yari yaramuhishuriye ko atazapfa atabonye Kristu wa Nyagasani. 
Luke2:27 Nuko Simewoni aza mu Ngoro y'Imana abibwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu. Igihe Ababyeyi b’Umwana Yezu bamuzanye ngo bamurangirizeho ibyategetswe," 
Luke2:28 na we amwakira mu biganza bye, ashimira Imana avuga ati" 
Luke2:29 «Nyagasani, noneho sezerera umugaragu wawe mu mahoro nk’uko wabivuze;" 
Luke2:30 kuko amaso yanjye yabonye agakiza kawe," 
Luke2:31 wageneye imiryango yose. 
Luke2:32 Ni we rumuri ruboneshereza amahanga, akaba n’ikuzo ry’umuryango wawe Israheli!»" 
Luke2:33 Se na nyina batangazwaga n’ibyo bamuvugagaho. 
Luke2:34 Nuko Simewoni arabashima, maze abwira Mariya, nyina wa Yezu, ati «Dore uyu nguyu yashyiriweho kubera benshi muri Israheli impamvu yo korama cyangwa gukira, azaba n’ikimenyetso bazagiriraho impaka." 
Luke2:35 Nawe kandi inkota izakwahuranya umutima. Bityo ibitekerezo biri mu mitima ya benshi bigaragare.» 
Luke2:36 Hakaba n’umuhanuzikazi Ana, umukobwa wa Fanuweli wo mu muryango wa Azeri; yari ageze mu zabukuru. Nyuma y’ubusugi bwe, yamaranye n’umugabo we imyaka irindwi," 
Luke2:37 hanyuma aba umupfakazi kugeza mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo inani n’ine. Ntiyavaga mu Ngoro, agakorera Imana umunsi n’ijoro, asiba kurya kandi asenga." 
Luke2:38 Nuko uwo mwanya na we arahagoboka, atangira gusingiza Imana, no gutekerereza iby’uwo mwana abari bategereje ugukira kwa Yeruzalemu." 
Luke2:39 Bamaze gutunganya ibyategetswe na Nyagasani, basubira mu Galileya mu mugi wabo wa Nazareti." 
Luke2:40 Nuko umwana arakura, arakomera, abyirukana ubwenge, yuzuye ubwitonzi, afite n’ubutoni ku Mana." 
Luke2:41 Uko umwaka utashye ababyeyi be bajyaga i Yeruzalemu guhimbaza umunsi mukuru wa Pasika. 
Luke2:42 Nuko umwana amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri, bajyanayo uko babimenyereye ku munsi mukuru." 
Luke2:43 Iminsi mikuru irangiye barataha, umwana Yezu asigara i Yeruzalemu ababyeyi be batabizi." 
Luke2:44 Bagenda urugendo rw’umunsi wose, bakeka ko ari mu bo bagendanaga. Hanyuma bamushakira muri bene wabo no mu bamenyi." 
Luke2:45 Bamubuze, basubira i Yeruzalemu bamushaka." 
Luke2:46 Hashize iminsi itatu bamusanga mu Ngoro y'Imana, yicaye hagati y’abigisha, abateze amatwi kandi abasiganuza." 
Luke2:47 Abamwumvaga bose batangariraga ubwenge bwe n’amagambo yabasubizaga. 
Luke2:48 Ababyeyi be bamubonye barumirwa, maze nyina aramubwira ati «Mwana wanjye, watugenje ute? Jye na so twagushakanye umutima uhagaze.»" 
Luke2:49 Arabasubiza ati «Mwanshakiraga iki? Muyobewe ko ngomba kuba mu Nzu ya Data?» 
Luke2:50 Bo ariko ntibasobanukirwa n’ibyo ababwiye. 
Luke2:51 Nuko ajyana na bo i Nazareti, agahora abumvira. Nyina abika ibyo byose mu mutima we." 
Luke2:52 Uko Yezu yakuraga, ni ko yungukaga ubwenge n’igihagararo, anyuze Imana n’abantu." 
Luke3:1 Nuko mu mwaka wa cumi n’itanu w’ingoma ya Tiberi Kayizari, igihe Ponsiyo Pilato yatwaraga Yudeya, Herodi na we atwara Galileya, murumuna we Filipo atwara igihugu cya Itureya n’icya Tirakoniti, na Lizaniya atwara Abileni," 
Luke3:2 Ana na Kayifa ari abaherezabitambo bakuru, ijambo ry’Imana ribwirwa Yohani mwene Zakariya ari mu butayu." 
Luke3:3 Aherako agenda akarere kose ka Yorudani, yigisha ko abantu bagomba kwisubiraho bakabatizwa kugira ngo bagirirwe imbabazi z’ibyaha byabo," 
Luke3:4 nk’uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy’ibyavuzwe na Izayi umuhanuzi ngo «Ni ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutegure inzira ya Nyagasani, muringanize aho azanyura!" 
Luke3:5 Imanga yose yuzuzwe, umusozi wose n’akanunga bisizwe, ahantu hagoramye hagororwe, n’inzira z’urubuye zitungane." 
Luke3:6 Maze umuntu wese azabone umukiro uturutse ku Mana.’» 
Luke3:7 Yohani yabwiraga abantu bamusangaga bagira ngo ababatize, ati «Mwa nyoko z’impiri mwe, ni nde wababwirije guhunga uburakari bwegereje?" 
Luke3:8 Noneho nimugaragaze imigenzereze ikwiranye n’ukwisubiraho nyako! Kandi ntimwitwaze ngo ’Abrahamu ni we mubyeyi wacu!’ Ndetse mbiberurire, aya mabuye muruzi, Imana ishobora kuyabyutsamo abana ba Abrahamu!" 
Luke3:9 Dore intorezo irambitse ku mizi y’ibiti; noneho igiti cyose kitera imbuto nziza kigiye gutemwa maze gicanwe.» 
Luke3:10 Inteko y’abantu ikabaza Yohani iti «Tubigenze dute?» 
Luke3:11 Na we akabasubiza ati «Ufite amakanzu abiri agabane n’utayafite, n’ufite icyo kurya, na we agenze atyo.»" 
Luke3:12 Abasoresha na bo bazaga kwibatirisha bakamubaza bati «Mwigisha, dukore iki?»" 
Luke3:13 Arabasubiza ati «Ntimugasoreshe ibirenze ibyategetswe.» 
Luke3:14 Abasirikare na bo baramubaza bati «Twebwe se, dukore iki?» Arabasubiza ati «Ntimukagire uwo murenganya n’uwo mubeshyera, kandi munyurwe n’igihembo cyanyu.»" 
Luke3:15 Kuko rubanda rwari rutegereje, kandi bose bibaza mu mutima wabo niba Yohani atari we Kristu," 
Luke3:16 Yohani ni ko guterura abwira bose ati «Jyewe mbabatirisha amazi, ariko haje undi undusha ububasha, sinkwiriye ndetse no gupfundura udushumi tw’inkweto ze; we azababatiriza muri Roho Mutagatifu n’umuriro." 
Luke3:17 Afite urutaro mu ntoki, kandi agiye gukubura imbuga ye: hanyuma azahunika ingano mu kigega cye, naho imishishi ayitwikishe umuriro utazima.»" 
Luke3:18 Nguko uko Yohani yahuguraga rubanda mu nyigisho nyinshi, abagezaho Inkuru Nziza." 
Luke3:19 Icyo gihe kandi Yohani yacyashye umutware Herodi kubera Herodiya, umugore wa murumuna we yari yaracyuye, no kubera ibindi bibi yakoraga." 
Luke3:20 Nyamara Herodi we arushaho kugira nabi, afungisha Yohani." 
Luke3:21 Nuko rubanda rwose rumaze kubatizwa, mu gihe Yezu na we amaze kubatizwa asenga, ijuru rirakinguka," 
Luke3:22 maze Roho Mutagatifu amumanukiraho bamubona ameze nk’inuma. Nuko ijwi rituruka mu ijuru riti «Uri Umwana wanjye, nakwibyariye none.»" 
Luke3:23 Igihe Yezu atangiye kwigisha, yari afite nk’imyaka mirongo itatu, kandi uko abantu bibwiraga, yari mwene Yozefu wa Heli," 
Luke3:24 wa Matati, wa Levi, wa Meliki, wa Yanayi, wa Yozefu," 
Luke3:25 wa Matatiyasi, wa Amosi, wa Nawumu, wa Esili, wa Nagayi," 
Luke3:26 wa Mahati, wa Matatiyasi, wa Semeyini, wa Yozefu, wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 wa Yohanani, wa Resa, wa Zorobabeli, wa Salatiyeli, wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 wa Meliki, wa Adi, wa Kozamu, wa Elimadamu, wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 wa Yezu, wa Eliyezeri, wa Yorimi, wa Matati, wa Levi," 
Luke3:30 wa Simewoni, wa Yuda, wa Yozefu, wa Yonamu, wa Eliyakimi," 
Luke3:31 wa Meleya, wa Mena, wa Matata, wa Natami, wa Dawudi," 
Luke3:32 wa Yese, wa Yobedi, wa Bowozi, wa Sala, wa Nasoni," 
Luke3:33 wa Aminadabu, wa Adimini, wa Arini, wa Esiromi, wa Faresi, wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 wa Yakobo, wa Izaki, wa Abrahamu, wa Tara, wa Nakori," 
Luke3:35 wa Serugi, wa Ragawu, wa Faleki, wa Heberi, wa Sala," 
Luke3:36 wa Kayinamu, wa Arufagasadi, wa Semu, wa Nowa, wa Lameki," 
Luke3:37 wa Matusala, wa Henoki, wa Yareti, wa Maleleyeli, wa Kayinamu," 
Luke3:38 wa Enoshi, wa Seti, wa Adamu, w’Imana." 
Luke4:1 Yezu ava ku nkombe ya Yorudani yuzuye Roho Mutagatifu, maze ajyanwa na Roho Mutagatifu mu butayu." 
Luke4:2 Ahamara iminsi mirongo ine ashukwa na Sekibi; ntiyagira icyo arya muri iyo minsi, maze ishize arasonza." 
Luke4:3 Nuko Sekibi aramubwira ati «Niba uri Umwana w’Imana, tegeka iri buye rihinduke umugati.»" 
Luke4:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Haranditswe ngo ’Umuntu ntatungwa n’umugati gusa.’ » 
Luke4:5 Sekibi amujyana ahantu hirengeye, mu kanya gato amwereka ibihugu byose byo ku isi," 
Luke4:6 aramubwira ati «Nzaguha gutegeka biriya bihugu byose, nguhe n’ubukire bwabyo, kuko nabihawe kandi nkabigabira uwo nshatse." 
Luke4:7 Wowe rero nundamya, biriya byose biraba ibyawe.»" 
Luke4:8 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Haranditswe ngo ’Uzaramya Nyagasani Imana yawe, abe ari we uzasenga wenyine.’»" 
Luke4:9 Noneho amujyana i Yeruzalemu, amuhagarika ku gasongero k’Ingoro, maze aramubwira ati «Niba uri Umwana w’Imana, ngaho simbuka!" 
Luke4:10 Kuko handitswe ngo ’Izategeka abamalayika bayo bakurinde.’ 
Luke4:11 Kandi ngo ’Bazagusama kugira ngo udatsitara ku ibuye.’» 
Luke4:12 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Byaravuzwe ngo ’Ntuzagerageze Nyagasani Imana yawe.’ » 
Luke4:13 Sekibi amaze kumushuka ku buryo bwose, amusiga aho, ariko amuteze ikindi gihe." 
Luke4:14 Nuko Yezu asubira mu Galileya yuzuye ububasha bwa Roho Mutagatifu, aba ikirangirire mu gihugu cyose." 
Luke4:15 Yigishirizaga mu masengero yabo, maze bose bakamushima." 
Luke4:16 Nuko Yezu ajya i Nazareti, aho yari yararerewe, maze nk’uko yabimenyereye, yinjira mu isengero ku munsi w’isabato; nuko arahaguruka ngo asome Ibyanditswe bitagatifu." 
Luke4:17 Bamuhereza igitabo cy’umuhanuzi Izayi, arakibumbura, abona ahanditse ngo" 
Luke4:18 «Roho wa Nyagasani arantwikiriye, kuko yantoye akansiga amavuta, agira ngo ngeze Inkuru Nziza ku bakene, ntangarize imbohe ko zibohowe, n’impumyi ko zihumutse, n’abapfukiranwaga ko babohowe," 
Luke4:19 kandi namamaze umwaka w’impuhwe za Nyagasani.» 
Luke4:20 Yezu abumba igitabo, agisubiza umuhereza, maze aricara; mu isengero bose bari bamuhanze amaso." 
Luke4:21 Nuko atangira kubabwira ati «Ibiri mu isomo mumaze kumva, mumenye ko byujujwe uyu munsi.»" 
Luke4:22 Bose baramushima, kandi batangazwa n’amagambo y’ineza yababwiraga. Ni ko kuvuga bati «Uyu si mwene Yozefu?»" 
Luke4:23 Yezu arababwira ati «Nta gushidikanya mugiye kuncira wa mugani ngo ’Muganga, banza wivure ubwawe!’ Twumvise ibyo wakoreye i Kafarinawumu byose, ngaho bikorere na hano iwanyu.»" 
Luke4:24 Yungamo ati «Ndababwira ukuri: nta muhanuzi ushimwa iwabo. 
Luke4:25 Ndababwiza ukuri rwose: hariho abapfakazi benshi muri Israheli mu gihe cya Eliya, ubwo imvura yamaraga imyaka itatu n’amezi atandatu itagwa, inzara ikoreka igihugu cyose;" 
Luke4:26 nyamara muri bo nta n’umwe Eliya yoherejweho, uretse umupfakazi w’i Sareputa ho mu gihugu cya Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Hari kandi n’ababembe benshi muri Israheli mu gihe cy’umuhanuzi Elisha; nyamara muri bo nta n’umwe wakijijwe, uretse Nahamani w’Umusiriya.»" 
Luke4:28 Abari mu isengero bumvise ayo magambo, bose barabisha," 
Luke4:29 nuko bahagurukira icyarimwe, bamusohora mu mugi wabo, bamujyana hejuru y’imanga y’umusozi umugi wabo wari wubatseho, bagira ngo bahamurohe." 
Luke4:30 Nyamara we abanyura hagati arigendera. 
Luke4:31 Nuko amanukira i Kafarinawumu umugi wo muri Galileya, ahigishiriza ku munsi w’isabato." 
Luke4:32 Batangariraga inyigisho ze, kuko yavugaga nk’umuntu ufite ububasha." 
Luke4:33 Ubwo nyine, mu isengero ryabo hakaba umuntu wahanzweho na roho mbi, nuko itera hejuru cyane iti" 
Luke4:34 «Ayi we! Uradushakaho iki, Yezu w’i Nazareti? Waje kuturimbura! Nzi uwo uri we: uri Intungane y’Imana.»" 
Luke4:35 Yezu ayibwira ayikangara, ati «Ceceka, kandi uve muri uwo muntu!» Nuko roho mbi imutura hasi imbere ya bose, imuvamo nta cyo imutwaye." 
Luke4:36 Bose ubwoba burabataha, baravugana bati «Mbega ijambo rikomeye! Dore arategekesha roho mbi ubushobozi n’ububasha zikamenengana!»" 
Luke4:37 Nuko Yezu aba ikirangirire muri ako karere kose. 
Luke4:38 Yezu ava mu isengero, ajya mu rugo rwa Simoni. Ubwo rero nyirabukwe wa Simoni yari yahinduwe ahinda umuriro mwinshi, baramumwingingira ngo arebe uko amugira." 
Luke4:39 Amwunama hejuru, ategeka umuriro kumuvamo, maze koko urazima. Ako kanya arabyuka, arabazimanira." 
Luke4:40 Izuba rimaze kurenga, abari bafite abarwayi bafashwe n’indwara z’amoko yose, barabamuzanira; we abaramburiraho ibiganza, arabakiza." 
Luke4:41 Roho mbi na zo zavaga mu bantu benshi zisakabaka ziti «Uri Umwana w’Imana!» Nyamara akazicyaha, azibuza kuvuga, kuko zari zizi ko ari we Kristu." 
Luke4:42 Ngo bucye, arasohoka ajya ahantu hiherereye. Abantu baramushaka, baramwinginga ngo yoye kubasiga." 
Luke4:43 Ariko arababwira ati «No mu yindi migi ngomba kuhamamaza Inkuru Nziza y’Ingoma y’Imana, kuko ari cyo natumwe.»" 
Luke4:44 Nuko ajya kwigisha mu masengero yo muri Yudeya. 
Luke5:1 Umunsi umwe, abantu benshi bamuniganagaho bashaka kumva ijambo ry’Imana; naho we akaba ahagaze ku nkombe y’ikiyaga cya Genezareti." 
Luke5:2 Nuko abona amato abiri ku nkombe y’ikiyaga; abarobyi bari bayavuyemo boza inshundura zabo. 
Luke5:3 Ajya mu bwato bumwe bwari ubwa Simoni, amusaba kubutsura gato. Nuko aricara, maze yigisha abantu ari mu bwato." 
Luke5:4 Amaze kwigisha, abwira Simoni ati «Erekeza ubwato mu mazi magari, murohe inshundura zanyu, murobe.»" 
Luke5:5 Simoni aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha, twagotse ijoro ryose, ntitwagira icyo dufata, ariko ubwo ubivuze, ngiye kuroha inshundura.»" 
Luke5:6 Baraziroha, maze bafata amafi menshi cyane, inshundura zabo zenda gucika." 
Luke5:7 Barembuza bagenzi babo bari mu bundi bwato ngo babafashe. Baraza, buzuza amato yombi, bigeza aho yenda kurohama." 
Luke5:8 Simoni Petero abibonye, apfukama imbere ya Yezu, avuga ati «Igirayo, Nyagasani, kuko ndi umunyabyaha!»" 
Luke5:9 Koko, ubwoba bwari bwamutashye, we na bagenzi be, babonye ayo mafi yose bari bamaze kuroba." 
Luke5:10 Barimo Yakobo na Yohani bene Zebedeyi bagenzi ba Simoni. Nuko Yezu abwira Simoni ati «Witinya, kuva ubu uzajya uroba abantu.»" 
Luke5:11 Nuko bagarura amato yabo ku nkombe, basiga aho byose, baramukurikira." 
Luke5:12 Igihe Yezu yari muri umwe muri iyo migi, hatunguka umuntu wamazwe n’ibibembe. Abonye Yezu, yikubita imbere ye, amwinginga agira ati «Nyagasani, ubishatse wankiza.»" 
Luke5:13 Yezu arambura ikiganza, amukoraho, avuga ati «Ndabishatse, kira.» Ako kanya ibibembe bye birakira." 
Luke5:14 Nuko amubuza kugira uwo abibwira, agira ati «Ahubwo genda, wiyereke umuherezabitambo, kandi uture ibyo Musa yategetse abahumanuwe, maze bibabere icyemezo cy’uko wakize.»" 
Luke5:15 Barushaho kumuvuga cyane, bituma abantu benshi bashikira kumwumva no gukizwa indwara zabo." 
Luke5:16 We ariko akanyuzamo akajya ahiherereye, agasenga." 
Luke5:17 Umunsi umwe, Yezu yariho yigisha, imbere ye hicaye Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko baturutse mu nsisiro zose za Galileya n’iza Yudeya, n’abavuye i Yeruzalemu. Ububasha bwa Nyagasani bwari bumurimo, bugatuma akiza indwara." 
Luke5:18 Nuko haza abantu bari bahetse ikirema, bashaka kucyinjiza ngo bagishyire imbere ye." 
Luke5:19 Babura aho bakinyuza, kubera ubwinshi bw’abantu bari aho. Nuko burira inzu, bayikuraho amategura, bururukiriza ingobyi cyarimo imbere ya Yezu, hagati y’abari aho." 
Luke5:20 Abonye ukwemera kwabo, Yezu aravuga ati «Wa muntu we, ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe.»" 
Luke5:21 Abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi batangira kwibaza bati «Uyu utuka Imana ni muntu ki? Ni nde ushobora gukiza ibyaha atari Imana yonyine?» 
Luke5:22 Yezu amenye ibitekerezo byabo, arababwira ati «Ni iki gituma mutekereza mutyo mu mitima yanyu?" 
Luke5:23 Icyoroshye ni ikihe: ari ukuvuga ngo ’Ibyaha byawe urabikijijwe’, cyangwa kuvuga ngo ’Haguruka ugende’?" 
Luke5:24 Nyamara kugira ngo mumenye ko Umwana w’umuntu afite ububasha bwo gukiza ibyaha mu nsi... », abwira ikirema ati «Ndabikubwiye: haguruka, ufate ingobyi yawe witahire!»" 
Luke5:25 Ako kanya, ahaguruka bamureba, ajyana ingobyi yari aryamyemo, ataha asingiza Imana." 
Luke5:26 Nuko bose barumirwa, basingiza Imana, kandi barakangarana, bakavuga bati «Uyu munsi twabonye ibintu bitangaje!»" 
Luke5:27 Ibyo birangiye, Yezu arasohoka, yitegereza umusoresha witwa Levi wari wicaye mu biro bya gasutamo. Nuko aramubwira ati «Nkurikira.»" 
Luke5:28 Undi aherako ahaguruka, asiga byose, aramukurikira." 
Luke5:29 Nuko Levi amujyana iwe, amukorera umunsi mukuru wo kumuzimanira. Kandi ku meza hamwe na bo, hari abasoresha n’abandi benshi basangiraga." 
Luke5:30 Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko babo bijujutira abigishwa be bababwira bati «Kuki murya kandi mukanywera hamwe n’abasoresha n’abanyabyaha?» 
Luke5:31 Yezu aba ari we ubasubiza ati «Abazima si bo bakeneye umuvuzi, ahubwo ni abarwayi." 
Luke5:32 Erega sinazanywe no guhamagara intungane, ahubwo nazanywe n’abanyabyaha, kugira ngo bisubireho.»" 
Luke5:33 Bo baramubwira bati «Abigishwa ba Yohani basiba kurya kenshi kandi bagasenga, n’ab’Abafarizayi na bo ni uko, naho abawe baririra bakinywera!»" 
Luke5:34 Ariko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Mushobora mute kwiriza ubusa abakwe, kandi umukwe akiri kumwe na bo?" 
Luke5:35 Ariko hari igihe umukwe azabavanwamo, ubwo rero muri iyo minsi, bazasiba kurya.»" 
Luke5:36 Yungamo abacira uyu mugani ati «Nta we utabura ikiremo ku gishura gishya ngo agitere ku gishura gishaje. Agenje atyo, yaba yangije igishura gishya, kandi icyo kiremo kivuyeho, nticyaba gikwiranye n’icyo gishura gishaje!" 
Luke5:37 Nta n’ushyira divayi nshya mu masaho ashaje, kuko divayi nshya yasandaza amasaho, divayi ikameneka, kandi amasaho akaba apfuye ubusa." 
Luke5:38 Ahubwo igikwiye ni ugushyira divayi nshya mu masaho mashya. 
Luke5:39 Kandi nta wanyoye divayi ikuze wifuza kunywa ikiri nshya, kuko aba avuga ati ’Divayi imaze iminsi ni yo nziza.’»" 
Luke6:1 Nuko ku munsi umwe w’isabato, Yezu anyura mu mirima yeze, abigishwa be bamamfuza amahundo y’ingano, bayavungira mu ntoki, barazirya." 
Luke6:2 Abafarizayi bamwe baravuga bati «Ni iki gituma mukora ibibujijwe ku isabato?» 
Luke6:3 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ntimwasomye uko Dawudi yabigenjeje igihe yari ashonje, we n’abo bari kumwe?" 
Luke6:4 Uko yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Imana, agafata imigati y’umumuriko, akayiryaho, akayihaho n’abo bari kumwe, kandi yari igenewe abaherezabitambo bonyine?»" 
Luke6:5 Nuko yungamo ati «Umwana w’umuntu ni we mugenga w’isabato.» 
Luke6:6 Ku wundi munsi w’isabato, Yezu yinjira mu isengero, arigisha. Ubwo hakaba umuntu ufite ikiganza cy’iburyo cyumiranye." 
Luke6:7 Abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi baramugenzura ngo barebe ko amukiza ku munsi w’isabato, maze babone icyo bamurega." 
Luke6:8 We rero amenya ibitekerezo byabo, abwira uwo muntu wari ufite ikiganza cyumiranye, ati «Haguruka, uhagarare hano hagati!» Arahaguruka, arahagarara." 
Luke6:9 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Reka mbabaze: icyemewe ku munsi w’isabato ni ikihe? Ari ukugira neza, cyangwa ari ukugira nabi? Ari ugukiza umuntu, cyangwa se kumwica?»" 
Luke6:10 Nuko abararanganyamo amaso, maze abwira wa muntu ati «Rambura ikiganza cyawe.» Abigenza atyo, ikiganza cye giherako kirakira." 
Luke6:11 Ariko bo barabisha, basigara bashaka uko bagenza Yezu." 
Luke6:12 Muri iyo minsi, Yezu ajya ku musozi gusenga, ijoro arikesha asenga Imana." 
Luke6:13 Bukeye, ahamagara abigishwa be, abatoramo cumi na babiri, abita intumwa." 
Luke6:14 Ni bo b’aba: Simoni yise Petero, na Andereya murumuna we, na Yakobo, na Yohani, na Filipo, na Baritolomayo," 
Luke6:15 na Matayo, na Tomasi, na Yakobo mwene Alufeyi, na Simoni bitaga Murwanashyaka," 
Luke6:16 na Yuda mwene Yakobo, na Yuda Isikariyoti, wa wundi wabaye umugambanyi." 
Luke6:17 Nuko Yezu amanukana na bo, ahagarara ahantu h’igisiza, ari kumwe n’abantu benshi bo mu bigishwa be, n’abandi benshi bari baturutse muri Yudeya yose, n’i Yeruzalemu, no muri Tiri na Sidoni, imigi yo ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Luke6:18 Bari baje kumwumva no gukizwa indwara bari barwaye. N’abababazwaga na roho mbi, bagakira." 
Luke6:19 Kandi rubanda rwose rwaharaniraga kumukoraho, kuko ububasha bwamuvagamo bwabakizaga bose." 
Luke6:20 Nuko Yezu yerekeza amaso ku bigishwa be, maze aravuga ati «Murahirwa mwe abakene, kuko Ingoma y’Imana ari iyanyu." 
Luke6:21 Murahirwa mwe mushonje ubu, kuko muzahazwa. Murahirwa mwe murira ubu, kuko muzaseka." 
Luke6:22 Murahirwa igihe cyose abantu babanga, bakabaca, bakabatuka, bakabahindura ruvumwa, babaziza Umwana w’umuntu." 
Luke6:23 Icyo gihe muzishime kandi munezerwe, kuko ingororano yanyu ari nyinshi mu ijuru. Nguko uko ababyeyi babo bagenzerezaga abahanuzi." 
Luke6:24 Ariko muragowe mwe bakungu, kuko mwashyikiriye imaragahinda yanyu." 
Luke6:25 Muragowe mwe mwijuse ubu, kuko muzasonza. Muragowe mwe museka ubu, kuko muzarira, mukaganya." 
Luke6:26 Muragowe igihe cyose abantu babavuga neza, kuko ari uko ababyeyi babo bagenzerezaga abahanuzi b’ibinyoma." 
Luke6:27 Ahubwo, mwe munyumva, reka mbabwire: nimujye mukunda abanzi banyu, mugirire neza ababanga;" 
Luke6:28 mwifurize ineza ababavuma, musabire abababeshyera." 
Luke6:29 Nihagira ugukubita ku itama, umutege n’irindi. Nihagira ukwambura igishura cyawe, ntumwime n’ikanzu yawe." 
Luke6:30 Ugusabye wese, ujye umuha, n’ukwambuye icyawe ntukakimwake." 
Luke6:31 Kandi uko mushaka ko abandi babagirira, abe ari ko namwe mubagirira." 
Luke6:32 Niba mwikundiye ababakunda gusa, mwabishimirwa mute, ko n’abanyabyaha bakunda ababakunda?" 
Luke6:33 Bisubiye kandi, niba mugirira neza ababagirira neza namwe, mwabishimirwa mute, ko n’abanyabyaha babigenza batyo?" 
Luke6:34 Kandi nimuguriza gusa abo mwizeye ko bazabishyura, mwabishimirwa mute? Abanyabyaha bo ntibaguriza abandi banyabyaha, bizeye ko na bo bazabagenzereza batyo!" 
Luke6:35 Ahubwo nimujye mukunda abanzi banyu, mugire neza, kandi mutange inguzanyo mutizeye inyiturano. Ubwo rero ingororano yanyu izaba nyinshi, kandi muzaba mubaye abana ba Nyir’ijuru, kuko agirira neza indashima n’abagiranabi." 
Luke6:36 Nimube abanyampuhwe, nk’uko So ari Umunyampuhwe." 
Luke6:37 Ntimugashinje abandi, namwe mutazashinjwa; ntimugacire abandi urubanza, namwe mutazarucirwa; nimubabarire abandi, namwe muzababarirwe." 
Luke6:38 Mujye mutanga, namwe muzahabwa: icyibo gishimishije, gitsindagiye, gicugushije, gisheshekaje, ni cyo bazabuzuriza, kuko igipimisho mugeresha, ari cyo muzasubirizwamo.»" 
Luke6:39 Abacira n’umugani, ati «Harya impumyi ishobora ite kurandata indi mpumyi? Aho zombi ntizagwa mu mwobo?" 
Luke6:40 Nta mwigishwa usumba umwigisha we; ahubwo umwigishwa wese ushyitse azamera nk’umwigisha we. 
Luke6:41 Witegerereza iki akatsi kari mu jisho ry’uwo muva inda imwe, kandi umugogo uri mu jisho ryawe ukawirengagiza?" 
Luke6:42 Washobora ute kubwira uwo muva inda imwe uti ’Muvandimwe, reka ngutokore akatsi kakuri mu jisho’, kandi ubwawe utareba umugogo uri mu jisho ryawe? Wa ndyarya we, banza ukure umugogo mu jisho ryawe, hanyuma uzabona neza, ushobore gutokora akatsi kari mu jisho ry’uwo muva inda imwe." 
Luke6:43 Nta giti cyiza cyera imbuto mbi, nta n’igiti kibi cyera imbuto nziza." 
Luke6:44 Igiti cyose kirangwa n’imbuto zacyo. Koko nta we usoroma imitini ku mahwa, nta n’usarura imizabibu ku bitovu." 
Luke6:45 Umunyamico myiza avana mu mutima we ibyiza bibitsemo, n’umunyamico mibi avana mu mutima we ibibi byawusabitse; kuko akuzuye umutima gasesekara ku munwa." 
Luke6:46 Ni iki gituma mumpamagara ngo ’Mwigisha! Mwigisha!’ kandi mudakora ibyo mbabwira? 
Luke6:47 Umuntu wese ungana, akumva amagambo yanjye, kandi akayakurikiza, reka mbereke uwo namugereranya." 
Luke6:48 Ameze nk’umuntu wubatse inzu, agacukura akageza ku rutare, akarugerekaho amabuye y’ishingiro. Umwuzure uteye, umuvu wiroha kuri iyo nzu, ariko ntiyanyeganyega, kuko yari yubatse neza." 
Luke6:49 Naho rero uwumva amagambo yanjye ntayakurikize, ameze nk’umuntu wubatse inzu ku butaka, ashinga imiganda yayo ahadakomeye. Umuvu uyiroshyeho, iherako itemba, maze aho yari iri hahinduka itongo.»" 
Luke7:1 Yezu amaze kubwira rubanda ayo magambo yose, arahaguruka, ajya i Kafarinawumu." 
Luke7:2 Hakaba umutware w’abasirikare wari urwaje umugaragu yakundaga, yenda gupfa." 
Luke7:3 Yumvise bavuga Yezu, amutumaho bamwe mu bakuru b’Abayahudi, ngo bamumwingingire aze gukiza umugaragu we." 
Luke7:4 Bageze iruhande rwa Yezu bamwinginga bakomeje, baramubwira bati «Uwo muntu akwiye ko wamutabara," 
Luke7:5 kuko akunda umuryango wacu, kandi ni we watwubakiye isengero.»" 
Luke7:6 Nuko Yezu ajyana na bo. Agiye kugera hafi y’urugo, umutware w’abasirikare amutumaho incuti ze ngo zimubwire ziti «Nyagasani, wikwirushya, kuko ndakwiye ko wakwinjira mu nzu yanjye." 
Luke7:7 Ni na cyo cyatumye ndatinyuka kugusanga; ahubwo vuga ijambo rimwe gusa, umugaragu wanjye arakira." 
Luke7:8 Erega, n’ubwo ndi umuntu utegekwa, nanjye mfite abasirikare ntegeka. Iyo mbwiye umwe nti ’Genda’ aragenda; nabwira undi nti ’Ngwino’ akaza; nabwira n’umugaragu wanjye nti ’Kora iki’ akagikora.»" 
Luke7:9 Yezu yumvise ayo magambo, aramutangarira cyane; ahindukirira abantu bari bamukurikiye, arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri: no muri Israheli nta kwemera gukomeye nk’uku nigeze mpabona.»" 
Luke7:10 Nuko abari batumwe bahindukiye, basanga umugaragu yakize rwose." 
Luke7:11 Yezu arakomeza ajya mu mugi witwa Nayini. Abigishwa be n’abandi benshi baramukurikira. 
Luke7:12 Ngo agere hafi y’irembo ry’umugi, ahura n’abahetse umurambo bajya guhamba umuhungu w’ikinege, nyina akaba yari umupfakazi; kandi abantu benshi bo muri uwo mugi bari bamuherekeje." 
Luke7:13 Nyagasani amubonye, amugirira impuhwe; aramubwira ati «Wirira.»" 
Luke7:14 Nuko yegera ikiriba, agikoraho, abari bagihetse barahagarara. Aravuga ati «Wa musore we, ndabigutegetse, haguruka!»" 
Luke7:15 Nuko uwari wapfuye areguka, aricara, atangira kuvuga. Yezu amusubiza nyina." 
Luke7:16 Bose ubwoba burabataha, basingiza Imana bavuga bati «Umuhanuzi ukomeye yaduturutsemo, kandi Imana yasuye umuryango wayo.»" 
Luke7:17 Iyo nkuru isakara muri Yudeya yose, no mu gihugu cyose kiyikikije." 
Luke7:18 Abigishwa ba Yohani baza kumumenyesha ibyabaye byose; nuko ahamagara babiri muri bo," 
Luke7:19 abatuma kuri Nyagasani kumubaza bati «Mbese uri Wawundi ugomba kuza, cyangwa se dutegereze undi?»" 
Luke7:20 Abo bantu basanga Yezu, baramubwira bati «Yohani Batisita yakudutumyeho ngo: Mbese ni wowe Wawundi ugomba kuza, cyangwa se dutegereze undi?»" 
Luke7:21 Ubwo Yezu akaba arakiza abarwayi benshi, n’abamugaye, n’abahanzweho na roho mbi, agahumura n’impumyi nyinshi." 
Luke7:22 Nuko arabasubiza ati «Nimugende mubwire Yohani ibyo mwabonye n’ibyo mwumvise: dore impumyi zirahumuka, abacumbagira baragenda, ababembe barahumanurwa, ibipfamatwi birumva, abapfuye barazuka, n’abakene barabwirwa Inkuru Nziza." 
Luke7:23 Kandi hahirwa utazatsitara ku mpamvu yanjye.» 
Luke7:24 Intumwa za Yohani zimaze kugenda, Yezu atangira kubaza rubanda ibyerekeye Yohani, ati «Mwagiye kureba iki mu butayu? Urubingo ruhungabanywa n’umuyaga?" 
Luke7:25 Ariko se mwagiye kureba iki? Umuntu wambaye imyenda y’agatangaza? Dore, abambaye ibishashagira bakiberaho mu mudamararo, batuye mu ngoro z’abami." 
Luke7:26 Nk’ubwo se, mwagiye kureba iki? Umuhanuzi se? Koko rero ndabibabwiye, ndetse atambutse umuhanuzi." 
Luke7:27 Ni we banditseho ngo ’Dore nohereje intumwa yanjye imbere yawe, kugira ngo izagutegurire inzira.’" 
Luke7:28 Mbabwiye kandi ko mu babyawe n’umugore, nta we uruta Yohani; nyamara umuto mu Ngoma y’Imana aramuruta." 
Luke7:29 Nuko rubanda rwose rwamwumvaga, ndetse n’abasoresha, bakuza Imana bayigarukira, banahabwa batisimu ya Yohani;" 
Luke7:30 Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko, bo bahinyura icyo Imana yabashakagaho, banga kubatizwa na we.»" 
Luke7:31 Yezu yungamo ati «Mbese abantu b’iki gihe nabagereranya na nde? Bameze nka nde? Bameze nk’abana bicaye ku kibuga," 
Luke7:32 bamwe babwira abandi bati ’Twavugije umwirongi maze ntimwabyina! Duteye indirimbo z’amaganya, ntimwarira!’" 
Luke7:33 Koko rero Yohani Batisita yaje atarya umugati, kandi atanywa divayi, muravuga muti ’Yahanzweho!’" 
Luke7:34 Naho Umwana w’umuntu aza arya kandi anywa, muravuga muti ’Ni igisambo, ni umusinzi, ni incuti y’abasoresha n’abanyabyaha!’" 
Luke7:35 Nyamara ubuhanga bugaragazwa n’ibikorwa byabwo.» 
Luke7:36 Nuko umwe mu Bafarizayi, atumira Yezu ngo basangire; yinjira iwe, ajya ku meza." 
Luke7:37 Maze haza umugore wari ihabara mu mugi. Yari yamenye ko Yezu ari ku meza, mu nzu y’uwo Mufarizayi, aza afite urweso rurimo umubavu." 
Luke7:38 Nuko aturuka inyuma ya Yezu, yunama ku birenge bye arira. Amarira atonyangira ku birenge bya Yezu, abihanaguza imisatsi ye, agumya kubisoma, anabisiga umubavu." 
Luke7:39 Umufarizayi wari wamutumiye, ngo abibone, aribwira ati «Uyu muntu, iyo aba umuhanuzi koko, aba yamenye uyu mugore umukora uwo ari we, n’icyo ari cyo: ko ari umunyabyaha.»" 
Luke7:40 Yezu araterura, aramubwira ati «Simoni, mfite icyo nkubwira.» Undi aravuga ati «Mbwira, Mwigisha.»" 
Luke7:41 Yezu ati «Umuntu yari afite abantu babiri bamurimo umwenda; umwe yari amurimo amadenari magana atanu, undi mirongo itanu." 
Luke7:42 Babuze icyo bishyura, abarekera uwo mwenda. Muri abo bombi, ni uwuhe uzarusha undi kumukunda?»" 
Luke7:43 Simoni arasubiza ati «Ndasanga ari uwarekewe umwenda munini.» Yezu aramubwira ati «Ushubije neza.» 
Luke7:44 Nuko ahindukirira wa mugore, abwira Simoni ati «Urabona uyu mugore? Ninjiye mu nzu yawe, ntiwansuka amazi ku birenge; naho we, yuhagije ibirenge byanjye amarira ye, maze abihanaguza imisatsi ye." 
Luke7:45 Ntiwampobeye unsoma; naho we, kuva aho yinjiriye mu nzu, ntiyahwemye kunsoma ibirenge." 
Luke7:46 Ntiwansize amavuta ahumura mu mutwe; naho we, yansize umubavu ku birenge." 
Luke7:47 Ni cyo gitumye nkubwira nti: ibyaha bye byose uko bingana arabibabariwe, kubera urukundo rwe rwinshi. Naho ubabariwe bike, akunda buke.»" 
Luke7:48 Nuko Yezu abwira uwo mugore ati «Ibyaha byawe birakijijwe.» 
Luke7:49 Abari kumwe na we ku meza batangira kwibaza bati «Uyu ni muntu ki ugeza n’aho gukiza ibyaha?» 
Luke7:50 Nuko Yezu abwira wa mugore ati «Ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije; genda amahoro.» 
Luke8:1 Nuko Yezu ashyira nzira, azenguruka imigi n’insisiro, yamamaza Inkuru Nziza y’Ingoma y’Imana. Ba Cumi na babiri bari kumwe na we."
