Luke8:2 Hari kandi n’abagore bamwe bari bakijijwe roho mbi n’izindi ndwara; barimo Mariya bise Madalena, wari wameneshejwemo roho mbi ndwi;" 
Luke8:3 hari na Yohana muka Shuza, umunyabintu wa Herodi, na Suzana n’abandi benshi babafashishaga ibintu bari bafite." 
Luke8:4 Nuko abantu benshi bamaze guterana, baturutse mu migi yose bamusanga, Yezu ababwiza uyu mugani ati" 
Luke8:5 «Umubibyi yavuye iwe ajya kubiba imbuto ye. Igihe abiba, imbuto zimwe zigwa iruhande rw’inzira; barazikandagira, n’inyoni zo mu kirere zirazirya zose." 
Luke8:6 Izindi zigwa mu mabuye; zimaze kumera ziruma, kuko zabuze amazi." 
Luke8:7 N’izindi zigwa mu mahwa; amahwa arakura, arazipfukirana." 
Luke8:8 Izindi zigwa mu butaka bwiza; ziramera, zera imbuto karijana.» Amaze kuvuga atyo, atera hejuru, ati «Ufite amatwi yo kumva, niyumve!»" 
Luke8:9 Abigishwa be bamubaza icyo uwo mugani ushaka kuvuga. 
Luke8:10 Arabasubiza ati «Mwebweho mwahawe kumenya amabanga y’Ingoma y’Imana; naho abandi bakabwirwa mu migani, ’kugira ngo barebe boye kubona, bumve boye gusobanukirwa.’" 
Luke8:11 Dore rero icyo uwo mugani uvuga: imbuto ibibwa ni ijambo ry’Imana. 
Luke8:12 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye iruhande rw’inzira ni abumva iryo jambo, hanyuma Sekibi akaza, akarikura mu mutima wabo, agira ngo batemera, bagakira." 
Luke8:13 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu mabuye, ni abumva iryo jambo bakaryakirana ibyishimo, nyamara ntiribacengeremo ngo ribashingemo imizi. Ni abemera by’akanya gato; ibishuko byaza, bagahita bacika intege." 
Luke8:14 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu mahwa, ni abumva ijambo, ariko imihihibikano n’ubukungu n’amaraha y’isi bikabapfukirana, bikababuza kwera imbuto." 
Luke8:15 Abameze nk’imbuto zaguye mu butaka bwiza, ni abumva ijambo, bakaryakirana umutima ukeye kandi mwiza, maze bakera imbuto nziza babikesha ubudacogora bwabo." 
Luke8:16 Nta muntu ucana itara ngo arishyire mu nsi y’ikibindi, cyangwa mu nsi y’urutara, ahubwo arishyira ku gitereko, agira ngo rimurikire abinjira bose." 
Luke8:17 Koko rero, nta cyahishwe kitazahishurwa, nta n’ibanga rizahera ritamenyekanye." 
Luke8:18 Mwitondere rero uburyo mwumva aya magambo. Kuko ufite byinshi, ari we uzongererwa; naho udafite, n’icyo yibwiraga ko afite bazakimwaka.»" 
Luke8:19 Nuko nyina wa Yezu n’abavandimwe be baza bamusanga, ariko babura uko bamugeraho kubera abantu benshi bari bamukikije." 
Luke8:20 Babimenyesha Yezu bati «Nyoko n’abavandimwe bawe bari hanze barifuza ko mubonana.» 
Luke8:21 Arabasubiza ati «Mama n’abavandimwe banjye, ni abumva ijambo ry’Imana, bakarikurikiza.»" 
Luke8:22 Umunsi umwe, Yezu ajya mu bwato ari kumwe n’abigishwa be. Arababwira ati «Twambuke ikiyaga, dufate hakurya.» Nuko bagana amazi magari." 
Luke8:23 Mu gihe bambuka, Yezu arasinzira. Nuko haza umuhengeri, ubwato buravoma, benda kurohama." 
Luke8:24 Baramwegera baramukangura, bavuga bati «Mwigisha, Mwigisha, turashize!» Nuko arakanguka, akangara umuyaga n’umuvumba w’amazi. Birahosha haza ituze." 
Luke8:25 Arababwira ati «Ukwemera kwanyu kuri he?» Bagira ubwoba, baratangara, bakabazanya bati «Uyu ni muntu ki, ugeza aho gutegeka imiyaga n’imivumba bikamwumvira!»" 
Luke8:26 Bakukira mu gihugu cy’Abanyageraza giteganye n’icya Galileya. 
Luke8:27 Yezu ageze imusozi, asanganirwa n’umuntu uturutse mu mugi, wahanzweho na roho mbi. Yari amaze igihe kirekire atikoza imyambaro, nta n’inzu yabagamo, ahubwo yiberaga mu marimbi." 
Luke8:28 Abonye Yezu, amwikubita imbere, maze atera hejuru cyane, ati «Uranshakaho iki, Yezu mwana w’Imana Isumbabyose? Ndakwinginze, winyica urubozo.»" 
Luke8:29 Roho mbi yavuze ibyo kubera ko Yezu yari yatangiye kuyitegeka ngo ive muri uwo muntu. Koko rero, roho mbi yamuhangagaho kenshi; bakamubohesha iminyururu amaboko n’amaguru bagira ngo adacika, ariko akarenga agaca ingoyi, maze roho mbi ikamujyana kwangara ku gahinga." 
Luke8:30 Yezu aramubaza ati «Izina ryawe ni irihe?» Aramusubiza ati «Nitwa Gitero.» Kumusubiza atyo yabitewe n’uko roho mbi nyinshi zari zaramwaritsemo. 
Luke8:31 Nuko zimwingingira kutazitegeka gusubira mu nyenga. 
Luke8:32 Ubwo aho ngaho hakaba umukumbi w’ingurube zarishaga kuri uwo musozi. Roho mbi zinginga Yezu ngo azireke zigire muri izo ngurube, arazemerera." 
Luke8:33 Nuko roho mbi ziva muri uwo muntu, zijya mu ngurube, maze uwo mukumbi ukonkoboka mu manga n’umuriri mwinshi, wiroha mu kiyaga, urarohama." 
Luke8:34 Abashumba babibonye barahunga, bajya kubimenyesha abari mu mugi n’abari mu cyaro." 
Luke8:35 Abantu b’aho barahurura, baza kureba ibyabaye. Bageze iruhande rwa Yezu, basanga wa muntu roho mbi zari zavuyemo yicaye imbere ye, yambaye, kandi yagaruye ubwenge. Nuko bagira ubwoba." 
Luke8:36 Abari babibonye, babatekerereza ukuntu uwo muntu wari wahanzweho na roho mbi yakize." 
Luke8:37 Nuko abaturage bose bo mu gihugu cy’Abanyageraza basaba Yezu ngo abavire aho, kuko bari bafite ubwoba bwinshi. Yezu yurira ubwato aragenda." 
Luke8:38 Nuko uwo muntu roho mbi zari zavuyemo, aramusaba ngo bibanire. We rero amusezerera, amubwira ati" 
Luke8:39 «Ahubwo taha, maze utekerereze abandi ubuntu Imana yakugiriye.» Uwo muntu aragenda, atangaza mu mugi wose ibyo Yezu yari yamugiriye." 
Luke8:40 Yezu agarutse, abantu baramwakira, kuko bose bari bamutegereje." 
Luke8:41 Nuko haza umuntu witwa Yayiro, akaba umutware w’isengero. Apfukamira Yezu, aramwinginga ngo aze iwe," 
Luke8:42 kuko umukobwa we wari ufite nk’imyaka cumi n’ibiri yendaga gupfa. Mu gihe aganayo, rubanda bamubyiganaho." 
Luke8:43 Ubwo rero hakaba umugore wari umaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri ava amaraso, ntihagira n’umwe ushobora kumukiza." 
Luke8:44 Amuturuka inyuma, akora ku ncunda z’igishura cye; ako kanya amaraso arakira." 
Luke8:45 Nuko Yezu arabaza ati «Ni nde unkozeho?» Bose barahakana. Petero aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha, ni aba bantu bagukikije, bakubyiga!»" 
Luke8:46 Yezu asubiramo ati «Hari umuntu unkozeho, kuko numvise ububasha bumvamo.»" 
Luke8:47 Umugore abonye ko yamenyekanye, aza ahinda umushyitsi, maze apfukama imbere ya Yezu, avugira mu ruhame icyatumye amukoraho, n’uko yahereyeko akira ako kanya." 
Luke8:48 We rero aramubwira ati «Mwana wanjye, ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije, genda amahoro.»" 
Luke8:49 Mu gihe akivuga ibyo, haza umuntu uvuye kwa wa mutware w’isengero, aramubwira ati «Umukobwa wawe amaze guca; reka kurushya Umwigisha.»" 
Luke8:50 Yezu abyumvise abwira Yayiro ati «Witinya! Upfa kwemera gusa, arakira.»" 
Luke8:51 Ageze mu rugo, ntiyatuma hari uwinjirana na we mu nzu, kereka Petero na Yakobo na Yohani, hamwe na se na nyina b’umwana." 
Luke8:52 Bose baramuririraga, kandi bashavujwe na we. Yezu aravuga ati «Mwirira: umukobwa ntiyapfuye, ahubwo arasinziriye.»" 
Luke8:53 Baramuseka, kuko bari bazi neza ko umwana yapfuye." 
Luke8:54 Naho we amufata ukuboko, aramuhamagara ati «Mwana, kanguka.»" 
Luke8:55 Umukobwa agarura akuka, ako kanya arahaguruka. Nuko Yezu ategeka ko bamugaburira." 
Luke8:56 Ababyeyi be baratangara cyane, ariko ababuza kugira uwo babwira ibimaze kuba." 
Luke9:1 Nuko Yezu akoranya ba Cumi na babiri, abaha gutegeka no kwirukana roho mbi zose, abaha n’ububasha bwo gukiza indwara." 
Luke9:2 Abatuma kwamamaza Ingoma y’Imana no gukiza abarwayi. 
Luke9:3 Arababwira ati «Ntimugire icyo mujyana mu rugendo, yaba inkoni, waba umufuka, waba umugati, byaba n’ibiceri», ababwira no kutajyana amakanzu abiri." 
Luke9:4 Arongera ati «Urugo muzinjiramo rwose, muzarugumemo kugeza igihe muhaviriye." 
Luke9:5 Naho abatazabakira, nimujya kuva mu mugi wabo, muzakungute umukungugu wo ku birenge byanyu, bibe ikimenyetso cy’uko bahemutse.»" 
Luke9:6 Nuko baragenda bazenguruka insisiro, bamamaza Inkuru Nziza, kandi bakiza abarwayi hose." 
Luke9:7 Icyo gihe Herodi, umutware w’intara ya Galileya, yumva ibyabaye byose, biramushobera, kuko bamwe bavugaga bati «Ni Yohani wazutse mu bapfuye»;" 
Luke9:8 abandi ngo «Ni Eliya wagarutse»; naho abandi ngo «Ni umwe mu bahanuzi ba kera wazutse.» 
Luke9:9 Ariko Herodi akavuga ati «Yohani, jyewe namucishije umutwe; none se uwo muntu numva bavugaho ibyo yaba nde?» Asigara ashaka uko yamubona." 
Luke9:10 Intumwa zihindukiye, zitekerereza Yezu ibyo zakoze byose. Nuko ajyana na zo, ajya ahantu hiherereye, ahagana ku mugi wa Betsayida." 
Luke9:11 Ariko abantu benshi baza kuhamenya, baramukurikira. Yezu abakira neza, ababwira iby’Ingoma y’Imana, kandi akiza abari babikeneye." 
Luke9:12 Umunsi uciye ikibu, ba Cumi na babiri baramwegera, baramubwira bati «Sezerera aba bantu, bajye mu nsisiro no mu ngo ziri hafi aha, bashake icumbi n’icyo barya, kuko aha turi ari ku butayu.»" 
Luke9:13 Maze arababwira ati «Mwebwe ubwanyu nimubahe ibyo kurya.» Baramusubiza bati «Nta kindi dufite kitari imigati itanu n’amafi abiri gusa; keretse ahari twebwe ubwacu twajya kubagurira icyo barya... » 
Luke9:14 Koko hari abagabo bageze nko ku bihumbi bitanu. Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Nimubicaze mu dutsiko tw’abantu nka mirongo itanu mirongo itanu.» 
Luke9:15 Babigenza batyo, barabicaza bose." 
Luke9:16 Nuko afata ya migati itanu na ya mafi abiri, areba ku ijuru, abivugiraho amagambo y’umugisha, hanyuma arabimanyura, abiha abigishwa be kugira ngo babihereze abantu bari aho." 
Luke9:17 Bararya, bose barahaga; barundarundira hamwe ibisigaye, byuzura inkangara cumi n’ebyiri." 
Luke9:18 Umunsi umwe Yezu yasengeraga ahiherereye ari kumwe n’abigishwa be, maze arababaza ati «Rubanda bavuga ko ndi nde?»" 
Luke9:19 Barasubiza bati «Bamwe bavuga ko uri Yohani Batisita, abandi ngo uri Eliya, naho abandi ngo uri umwe mu bahanuzi ba kera wazutse.»" 
Luke9:20 Yongera kubabaza ati «Mwebwe se, muvuga ko ndi nde?» Petero aramusubiza ati «Uri Kristu w’Imana.»" 
Luke9:21 Nyamara we abihanangiriza kutagira uwo babibwira. 
Luke9:22 Yungamo avuga ko Umwana w’umuntu agomba kuzababara cyane, agacibwa n’abakuru b’umuryango, n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo, n’abigishamategeko, akicwa, kandi akazazuka ku munsi wa gatatu." 
Luke9:23 Nuko akabwira bose, ati «Niba hari ushaka kunkurikira, yiyibagirwe ubwe, aheke umusaraba we, maze ankurikire!" 
Luke9:24 Kuko uzashaka gukiza ubugingo bwe, azabubura; naho uzahara ubugingo bwe ari jye agirira, azabukiza." 
Luke9:25 Umuntu watunga iby’isi yose, ariko akabura ubugingo bwe, cyangwa akabwangiza, byaba bimumariye iki?" 
Luke9:26 Koko rero, umuntu uzanyihakana, agahakana n’amagambo yanjye, uwo nguwo Umwana w’umuntu na we azamwihakana, igihe azazira mu ikuzo rye, n’irya Se, n’iry’Abamalayika batagatifu." 
Luke9:27 Ndababwira ukuri: mu bari hano, harimo abatazapfa batabonye Ingoma y’Imana.»" 
Luke9:28 Nuko hashize nk’iminsi munani Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo, ajyana na Petero, na Yohani, na Yakobo, aterera umusozi ajya gusenga." 
Luke9:29 Mu gihe yasengaga, mu maso he hahinduka ukundi, n’imyambaro ye irakirana nk’umurabyo." 
Luke9:30 Nuko haza abagabo babiri baganira na we, ari bo Musa na Eliya." 
Luke9:31 Bababonekera babengerana ikuzo, bavugana na we iby’urupfu rwe, yari agiye gupfira i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke9:32 Icyo gihe Petero na bagenzi be bari batwawe n’ibitotsi. Ngo bakanguke, babona ikuzo rya Yezu na ba bagabo babiri bari kumwe." 
Luke9:33 Bagiye kugenda, Petero abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, kwibera hano nta ko bisa. Reka tuhace ibiraro bitatu, kimwe cyawe, ikindi cya Musa, n’ikindi cya Eliya.» Icyakora ntiyari azi icyo avuga." 
Luke9:34 Akivuga ibyo, igihu kiraza kirabatwikira; kibarenzeho bashya ubwoba." 
Luke9:35 Nuko ijwi rituruka muri cya gihu rivuga riti «Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nihitiyemo; mujye mumwumvira!» 
Luke9:36 Ijwi ngo rimare kuvuga, babona Yezu ari wenyine. Nuko muri iyo minsi baryumaho, ntibagira uwo babwira ibyo bari babonye." 
Luke9:37 Bukeye bwaho, igihe bamanuka umusozi, abantu benshi baza kumusanganira." 
Luke9:38 Maze umuntu wo muri iyo mbaga atera hejuru ati «Mwigisha, ndabigusabye: dore uyu mwana wanjye mufite ari ikinege." 
Luke9:39 Hari ubwo roho mbi imwegura, agacura imiborogo, ikamuhotagura, akazana urufuro; kandi ikamuvamo byaruhanije, igasiga ari intere." 
Luke9:40 Ninginze abigishwa bawe ngo bayirukane, ariko ntibabishoboye.»" 
Luke9:41 Yezu arasubiza ati «Bantu b’iki gihe batemera kandi b’inkozi z’ibibi, nzabana namwe kugeza ryari? Nzabiyumanganya mpereze he? Cyo zana umwana wawe hano.»" 
Luke9:42 Igihe umwana ariho yegera Yezu, roho mbi imutura hasi, iramuhotagura. Nuko Yezu akangara roho mbi, akiza umwana, amusubiza se." 
Luke9:43 Bose batangarira ububasha bw’Imana. Mu gihe bose bagitangarira ibyo Yezu yakoraga byose, abwira abigishwa be ati" 
Luke9:44 «Mwebweho mutege amatwi, mwumve ibyo ngiye kubabwira: dore Umwana w’umuntu agiye kugabizwa abantu.»" 
Luke9:45 Ariko ntibumva iryo jambo, ribabera urujijo, ntibasobanukirwa kandi batinya kumusobanuza." 
Luke9:46 Ubundi, baza kujya impaka, bibaza uwaba mukuru muri bo." 
Luke9:47 Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza, maze arembuza umwana muto, amushyira iruhande rwe." 
Luke9:48 Arababwira ati «Umuntu wese wakira uyu mwana ari jye abigirira, ni jye aba yakiriye. Kandi uzanyakira wese, azaba yakiriye Uwantumye. Koko rero umuto muri mwe, ni we mukuru.»" 
Luke9:49 Ni bwo Yohani amubwiye ati «Mwigisha, twabonye umuntu wirukana roho mbi mu izina ryawe; turabimubuza kuko atagukurikira hamwe natwe.»" 
Luke9:50 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ntimukagire uwo mubibuza, kuko utabatambamira, burya aba ari kumwe namwe.»" 
Luke9:51 Igihe cya Yezu cyo kuvanwa ku isi cyari cyegereje, nuko yiyemeza adashidikanya kujya i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke9:52 Yohereza integuza ngo zimubanzirize imbere. Baragenda binjira mu rusisiro rw’Abanyasamariya kumuteguriza. 
Luke9:53 Ariko ab’aho banga kumwakira, kuko yajyaga i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke9:54 Babiri mu bigishwa be, Yakobo na Yohani, babibonye baravuga bati «Nyagasani, urashaka se ko dutegeka umuriro, ukamanuka mu ijuru, ukabatsemba?»" 
Luke9:55 We rero arahindukira, arabatonganya cyane." 
Luke9:56 Nuko baboneza bajya mu rundi rusisiro. 
Luke9:57 Igihe bari mu nzira bagenda, umuntu umwe aramubwira ati «Nzagukurikira aho uzajya hose.»" 
Luke9:58 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Imihari igira amasenga, n’inyoni zo mu kirere zikagira ibyari; naho Umwana w’umuntu we, ntagira aho arambika umutwe.»" 
Luke9:59 Yezu abwira undi ati «Nkurikira.» We aramusubiza ati «Reka mbanze njye guhamba data.» 
Luke9:60 Yezu aramubwira ati «Reka abapfu bahambe abapfu babo; naho wowe, genda ujye kwamamaza Ingoma y’Imana.»" 
Luke9:61 Undi na we ati «Mwigisha, nzagukurikira, ariko reka mbanze njye gusezera ku bo mu rugo.»" 
Luke9:62 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Umuntu wese watangiye guhinga agasubiza amaso inyuma, uwo ntakwiye gukorera Ingoma y’Imana.»" 
Luke10:1 Nyuma y’ibyo Nyagasani ahitamo n’abandi mirongo irindwi na babiri, maze abohereza imbere ye babiri babiri, mu migi yose n’ahandi hose yajyaga kunyura." 
Luke10:2 Arababwira ati «Imirima yeze ni myinshi, ariko abasaruzi ni bake; nimusabe rero Nyirimyaka yohereze abasaruzi mu mirima ye." 
Luke10:3 Ngaho nimugende; dore mbohereje nk’abana b’intama mu birura. 
Luke10:4 Ntimugire icyo mujyana, kaba agasaho k’ibiceri, waba umufuka, zaba inkweto; kandi mwirinde guhera mu nzira muramukanya." 
Luke10:5 Urugo rwose mwinjiyemo, mubanze muvuge muti ’Amahoro abe muri uru rugo!’" 
Luke10:6 Nihaba umuntu w’amahoro, amahoro yanyu azamusakaraho; nahabura azabagarukira." 
Luke10:7 Mugume muri iyo nzu, munywe kandi murye icyo babahaye, kuko umukozi akwiriye igihembo cye. Ntimukave mu nzu mujya mu yindi." 
Luke10:8 Umugi wose muzinjiramo bakabakira, muzarye ibyo babahereje." 
Luke10:9 Mukize n’abarwayi muhasanze, kandi mubabwire muti ’Ingoma y’Imana ibari hafi!’" 
Luke10:10 Naho rero umugi wose muzinjiramo ntibabakire, muzajye mu materaniro yabo, muvuge muti" 
Luke10:11 ’Dore n’umukungugu w’umugi wanyu wadufashe ku birenge, turawukunguse kandi turawubasigiye! Icyakora mubimenye neza, Ingoma y’Imana iri hafi.’" 
Luke10:12 Ndabibabwiye: kuri wa munsi w’urubanza, Sodoma izababarirwa kurusha uwo mugi." 
Luke10:13 Iyimbire, Korazini! Iyimbire, Betsayida! Kuko ibitangaza byabakorewemo, iyo bikorerwa muri Tiri no muri Sidoni, kuva kera baba barisubiyeho, bakambara ibigunira bakisiga ivu." 
Luke10:14 Nyamara ku munsi w’urubanza muzahanwa kurusha Tiri na Sidoni. 
Luke10:15 Naho wowe, Kafarinawumu, ubona ko uzakuzwa kugera mu bicu? Uzarohwa mu kuzimu!" 
Luke10:16 Ubumva, ni jye aba yumva; ubahinyura, ni jye aba ahinyura, kandi umpinyuye aba ahinyuye n’Uwantumye.»" 
Luke10:17 Ba bigishwa uko bari mirongo irindwi na babiri, bagaruka bishimye cyane, bavuga bati «Mwigisha, na roho mbi ziratwumvira kubera izina ryawe.»" 
Luke10:18 Arababwira ati «Koko nabonaga Sekibi ahanuka ku ijuru nk’umurabyo. 
Luke10:19 Dore mbahaye ububasha bwo kuribata inzoka na za manyenga, n’ubwo gutsinda umwanzi wese kandi nta kizashobora kubahuganya." 
Luke10:20 Nyamara, ntimwishimire ko roho mbi zibumvira, ahubwo nimwishimire ko amazina yanyu yanditse mu ijuru.»" 
Luke10:21 Ako kanya, Yezu ahimbazwa na Roho Mutagatifu, maze aravuga ati «Dawe, Mutegetsi w’ijuru n’isi, ngushimiye ko ibyo wabihishe abanyabwenge n’abahanga, ukabihishurira abaciye bugufi. Koko, Dawe, ni ko wabyishakiye." 
Luke10:22 Byose nabyeguriwe na Data, kandi nta we uzi Mwana uwo ari we keretse Data, nta n’uzi Data uwo ari we keretse Mwana n’uwo Mwana ashatse kubihishurira.»" 
Luke10:23 Hanyuma ahindukirira abigishwa be, ababwirira ukwabo ati «Hahirwa amaso abona ibyo muruzi!" 
Luke10:24 Ndababwira ukuri: abahanuzi benshi n’abami benshi bifuje kubona ibyo muruzi ntibabibona, no kumva ibyo mwumva ntibabyumva.»" 
Luke10:25 Nuko umwigishamategeko arahaguruka, amubaza amwinja ati «Mwigisha, ngomba gukora iki kugira ngo ndonke ubugingo bw’iteka?»" 
Luke10:26 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mu Mategeko handitsemo iki? Usomamo iki?» 
Luke10:27 Undi aramusubiza ati «Uzakunde Nyagasani Imana yawe, n’umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose, n’imbaraga zawe zose, n’ubwenge bwawe bwose, kandi uzakunde mugenzi wawe nk’uko wikunda.»" 
Luke10:28 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ushubije neza; ubigenze utyo, uzagira ubugingo.»" 
Luke10:29 Nyamara we, kugira ngo yikure mu isoni, abwira Yezu ati «Ariko se mugenzi wanjye ni nde?»" 
Luke10:30 Yezu araterura ati «Umuntu yamanutse i Yeruzalemu ajya i Yeriko, maze agwa mu gico cy’abajura, baramwambura, baramuhondagura maze bamusiga ari intere." 
Luke10:31 Umuherezabitambo aza kumanuka muri iyo nzira, aramubona arihitira." 
Luke10:32 Haza n’umulevi, na we aramubona arihitira." 
Luke10:33 Nuko Umunyasamariya wari mu rugendo amugeze iruhande, aramubona amugirira impuhwe." 
Luke10:34 Aramwegera, apfuka ibikomere bye amaze kubyomoza amavuta na divayi. Hanyuma amwuriza indogobe ye, amujyana ku icumbi, amwitaho." 
Luke10:35 Bukeye afata amadenari abiri, ayaha nyir’icumbi, aramubwira ati ’Umwiteho maze ibindi uzamutangaho, nzabikwishyura ngarutse.’" 
Luke10:36 Muri abo uko ari batatu, uwo ukeka ko ari mugenzi w’uwaguye mu gico cy’abajura ni uwuhe?»" 
Luke10:37 Umwigishamategeko arasubiza ati «Ni uwamugiriye impuhwe.» Yezu aramubwira ati «Genda, nawe ugenze utyo.»" 
Luke10:38 Yezu akomeza urugendo n’abigishwa be, agera mu rusisiro, maze umugore witwa Marita aramwakira." 
Luke10:39 Yari afite mwene nyina witwa Mariya, akaba yicaye iruhande rw’ibirenge bya Nyagasani, yumva amagambo ye." 
Luke10:40 Marita we yari ahugiye mu byo gushaka amazimano. Ageze aho, araza abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, nta cyo bikubwiye kubona murumuna wanjye amparira imirimo yose? Mubwire aze amfashe!»" 
Luke10:41 Ariko Nyagasani aramusubiza ati «Marita, Marita, uhagaritse umutima kandi urahihibikanywa na byinshi;" 
Luke10:42 nyamara ibya ngombwa ni bike, ndetse ni kimwe gusa. Mariya rero yahisemo umugabane mwiza, udateze kuzamwamburwa.»" 
Luke11:1 Umunsi umwe, Yezu yari ahantu asenga. Arangije, umwe mu bigishwa be aramubwira ati «Mwigisha, natwe dutoze gusenga nk’uko Yohani yabigenjereje abigishwa be.»" 
Luke11:2 Nuko arababwira ati «Igihe musenga, mujye muvuga muti: Dawe, izina ryawe ryubahwe, Ubwami bwawe nibuze," 
Luke11:3 ifunguro ridutunga uriduhe buri munsi. 
Luke11:4 Utubabarire ibicumuro byacu, kuko natwe tubabarira uwaducumuyeho wese, kandi ntudutererane mu bitwoshya.»" 
Luke11:5 Nuko arababwira ati «Tuvuge ko umwe yaba afite incuti, akagenda ayigana mu gicuku, akayibwira ati ’Mugenzi wanjye, nguriza imigati itatu;" 
Luke11:6 dore incuti yanjye iri mu rugendo intungutseho, none mbuze icyo nyiha’." 
Luke11:7 Hanyuma undi akamusubiriza mu nzu, ati ’Windushya! Dore nakinze, kandi jye n’abana banjye turaryamye; sinshobora kubyuka ngo nguhe iyo migati.’" 
Luke11:8 Ndabibabwiye: n’aho atabyutswa no kumuhera ko ari incuti ye, yabyutswa n’uko yamubujije uburyo, maze akamuha ibyo akeneye byose." 
Luke11:9 Nanjye ndabibabwiye nti: musabe, muzahabwa; mushakashake, muzaronka; mukomange, muzakingurirwa." 
Luke11:10 Kuko usaba wese ahabwa, ushakashaka akaronka, n’ukomanga agakingurirwa." 
Luke11:11 Mbese ni nde mubyeyi muri mwe, umwana we yasaba umugati, akamuhereza ibuye? Cyangwa se yamusaba ifi, aho kuyimuha, akamuhereza inzoka?" 
Luke11:12 Cyangwa se yamusaba igi, akamuhereza manyenga?" 
Luke11:13 Niba rero, mwebwe n’ububi bwanyu, muzi guha abana banyu ibintu byiza, So uri mu ijuru azarushaho ate guha Roho Mutagatifu abamumusabye?»" 
Luke11:14 Umunsi umwe Yezu yariho yirukana roho mbi yari yagize umuntu ikiragi. Roho mbi imaze kumuvamo, ikiragi kiravuga, abantu bose baratangara." 
Luke11:15 Icyakora bamwe muri bo baravuga bati «Belizebuli, umutware wa roho mbi, ni we yirukanisha roho mbi.»" 
Luke11:16 Naho abandi bamusaba ikimenyetso kivuye mu ijuru bamwinja. 
Luke11:17 Yezu amenya ibyo batekereza, arababwira ati «Ingoma yose yibyayemo amahari irarimbuka, n’amazu yayo yose akagwirirana." 
Luke11:18 Niba rero Sekibi yibyayemo amahari, ingoma ye izakomera ite, ko muvuga ngo roho mbi nzirukanisha Belizebuli?" 
Luke11:19 Niba ari Belizebuli nirukanisha roho mbi, abana banyu bo bazirukanisha nde? Ni bo rero bazababera abacamanza." 
Luke11:20 Ariko niba ari urutoki rw’Imana nirukanisha roho mbi, ni uko Ingoma y’Imana yabagezemo." 
Luke11:21 Iyo umuntu w’umunyamaboko kandi ufite intwaro arinze urugo rwe, ibye biba amahoro." 
Luke11:22 Ariko iyo haje umurusha amaboko akamutsinda, akamwambura intwaro yari yiringiye, amunyaga ibye akabigaba." 
Luke11:23 Utari kumwe nanjye, aba andwanya; n’utarunda hamwe nanjye, aba anyanyagiza." 
Luke11:24 Iyo roho mbi ivuye mu muntu, ibungera ahantu h’agasi, ishaka uburuhukiro maze ikabubura. Nuko ikibwira iti ’Nsubiye mu nzu yanjye navuyemo.’" 
Luke11:25 Yahagera igasanga ikubuye, iteguye." 
Luke11:26 Nuko ikagenda ikazana roho mbi zindi ndwi ziyitambukije ubugome, zikaza zikahatura. Nuko imimerere ya nyuma y’uwo muntu ikarushaho kuba umwaku.»" 
Luke11:27 Nuko igihe Yezu yavugaga atyo, umugore arangurura ijwi rwagati mu mbaga, aramubwira ati «Hahirwa inda yagutwaye n’amabere yakonkeje!»" 
Luke11:28 Na we ati «Ahubwo hahirwa abumva ijambo ry’Imana bakarikurikiza!» 
Luke11:29 Abantu bamaze guterana ari benshi, Yezu arababwira ati «Ab’iyi ngoma ni abantu babi! Barashaka ikimenyetso; nyamara nta kindi kimenyetso bazahabwa, atari icya Yonasi." 
Luke11:30 Nk’uko Yonasi yabereye Abanyaninivi ikimenyetso, ni na ko Umwana w’umuntu azakibera ab’iyi ngoma." 
Luke11:31 Ku munsi w’urubanza, umwamikazi w’igihugu cy’epfo azahagurukira ab’iyi ngoma maze abatsinde, kuko yaturutse iyo gihera aje kumva ubuhanga bwa Salomoni, kandi hano hari uruta Salomoni!" 
Luke11:32 Kuri uwo munsi w’urubanza, Abanyaninivi na bo bazahagurukira ab’iyi ngoma maze babatsinde, kuko bumvise inyigisho za Yonasi maze bakisubiraho, kandi hano hari uruta Yonasi." 
Luke11:33 Nta muntu ucana itara ngo arishyire ahihishe, cyangwa mu nsi y’ikibindi, ahubwo arishyira ku gitereko, agira ngo rimurikire abinjira bose." 
Luke11:34 Itara ry’umubiri ni ijisho ryawe. Niba rero ijisho ryawe ridafite inenge, umubiri wawe wose uzamurikirwa. Naho niba ijisho ryawe ari ribi, umubiri wawe na wo uzaba mu mwijima." 
Luke11:35 Isuzume urebe niba urumuri rukurimo rutari umwijima. 
Luke11:36 Umubiri wawe nuwerekeza wose ku rumuri, ntihagire n’agace kawo kaguma mu mwijima, uzaba wese mu rumuri nk’uko itara ryaka rikumurikira wese.»" 
Luke11:37 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo, Umufarizayi aramutumira. Yinjira iwe, bajya ku meza." 
Luke11:38 Umufarizayi abonye ko atabanje gukaraba mbere yo gufungura, biramutangaza." 
Luke11:39 Ariko Nyagasani aramubwira ati «Ni ko mwabaye mwebwe Abafarizayi: inkongoro n’imbehe murazisukura ndetse n’inyuma hazo, naho mwebwe imbere hanyu huzuye ubwambuzi n’ubugome." 
Luke11:40 Mwa biburabwenge mwe! Imana yaremye inyuma, si Yo yaremye n’imbere?" 
Luke11:41 Ahubwo nimujye mutanga imfashanyo ku byo mutunze, byose bizabatunganira." 
Luke11:42 Nimwiyimbire, Bafarizayi, mwe mutanga igice cya cumi cy’isogi, n’icy’imbwija, n’icy’izindi mboga zose, ariko mukirengagiza ubutabera n’urukundo rw’Imana. Ngibyo ibyo mwagombaga gutunganya mutirengagije n’ibindi!" 
Luke11:43 Nimwiyimbire, Bafarizayi, mwe mukunda intebe za mbere mu masengero, no kuramukirizwa ku karubanda." 
Luke11:44 Nimwiyimbire, mwe mumeze nk’imva zitagira ikiziranga; bakazinyura hejuru, batabizi.»" 
Luke11:45 Nuko umwe mu bigishamategeko abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, iyo uvuga utyo, natwe uba udutuka.»" 
Luke11:46 We rero aramusubiza ati «Nimwiyimbire namwe, bigishamategeko, kuko mukorera abantu imitwaro iremereye, ariko mwe ntimukoze n’urutoki rwanyu kuri iyo mitwaro!" 
Luke11:47 Nimwiyimbire, mwe mwubakira imva z’abahanuzi kandi ari abasokuruza banyu babishe!" 
Luke11:48 Bityo muba muhamya kandi mugashima ibyo abasokuruza banyu bakoze: bo bishe abahanuzi, mwebwe mukubakira imva zabo." 
Luke11:49 Ni cyo cyateye Imana Nyir’ubuhanga bwose kuvuga ngo ’Nzabatumaho abahanuzi n’intumwa, bazica bamwe abandi babatoteze.’" 
Luke11:50 Ni yo mpamvu ituma ab’iyi ngoma bazaryozwa amaraso y’abahanuzi bose yamenetse kuva isi igitangira," 
Luke11:51 uhereye ku maraso ya Abeli kugeza ku ya Zakariya batsinze hagati y’urutambiro n’Ingoro. Koko ndabibabwiye: ab’iyi ngoma bazayaryozwa! 
Luke11:52 Mwiyimbire, bigishamategeko, mwe mwatwaye urufunguzo rw’ubumenyi, mwebwe ubwanyu ntimwinjire, kandi n’abashatse kwinjira mukababuza!»" 
Luke11:53 Yezu avuye aho ngaho, abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi batangira kumuzira no kumuvugisha menshi bamubaza," 
Luke11:54 bamwinja kugira ngo bamufatire mu magambo ye. 
Luke12:1 Nuko abantu bageze ku bihumbi n’ibihumbi barakorana ndetse barabyigana. Yezu abanza kubwira abigishwa be ati «Mwirinde umusemburo w’Abafarizayi!» ashaka kuvuga uburyarya bwabo. 
Luke12:2 Arongera ati «Nta kintu gihishe kitazagaragara, nta n’igihishiriwe kitazamenyekana." 
Luke12:3 Kuko ibyo mwavugiye mu mwijima bizumvikana ku mugaragaro, n’ibyo mwavugiye ahiherereye mwongorera, bizatangarizwa ahirengeye." 
Luke12:4 Mwe ncuti zanjye, reka mbabwire: ntimugatinye abica umubiri, nyuma ntibagire ikindi bashobora kubatwara." 
Luke12:5 Ahubwo reka mbabwire uwo mukwiye gutinya: mutinye Umara kwica agashobora no kubaroha mu nyenga y’umuriro. Koko ndabibabwiye: Uwo nguwo muzajye mumutinya. 
Luke12:6 Mbese ibishwi bitanu ntibigura uduceri tubiri? Nyamara nta na kimwe muri byo Imana yibagirwa. 
Luke12:7 Mwebweho ndetse n’imisatsi yo ku mutwe wanyu yose irabaze. Ntimugatinye rero: murushije agaciro ibishwi byinshi. 
Luke12:8 Ndabibabwiye: umuntu wese uzanyemera mu maso y’abantu, Umwana w’umuntu na we azamwemera imbere y’abamalayika b’Imana." 
Luke12:9 Naho uzanyihakana mu maso y’abantu, na we azihakanwa imbere y’abamalayika b’Imana." 
Luke12:10 Kandi nihagira uvuga Umwana w’umuntu nabi, azagirirwa imbabazi; ariko natuka Roho Mutagatifu, ntazagirirwa imbabazi." 
Luke12:11 Mu gihe bazabajyana mu masengero imbere y’abacamanza n’abategetsi, ntimuzibaze uko muziburanira, n’amagambo muzavuga," 
Luke12:12 kuko icyo gihe Roho Mutagatifu ari we uzababwiriza icyo mukwiye kuvuga.» 
Luke12:13 Nuko umwe muri rubanda abwira Yezu ati «Mwigisha, mbwirira umuvandimwe wanjye tugabane umurage wacu.»" 
Luke12:14 Ariko we aramusubiza ati «Wa muntu we, ni nde wangize umucamanza wanyu cyangwa ngo mbagabanye ibyanyu?»" 
Luke12:15 Yungamo ati «Muramenye, mwirinde kugira irari ry’ibintu, kuko n’aho umuntu yatunga ibintu byinshi bite, nta bwo ari byo byamubeshaho.»" 
Luke12:16 Nuko abacira uyu mugani, ati «Habayeho umuntu w’umukungu wari wejeje imyaka myinshi." 
Luke12:17 Aribaza ati ’Ndagira nte, ko ari nta ho mfite mpunika imyaka yanjye?’" 
Luke12:18 Nuko aribwira ati ’Dore uko ngiye kubigenza: ndasenya ibigega mfite, nubake ibindi bibiruta; mpunikemo ingano zanjye n’ibindi bintu byanjye byose." 
Luke12:19 Maze nzibwire nti: dore mfite ibintu byinshi mpunitse, bizamaza igihe kirekire; ubu ngiye kuruhuka, ndye, nywe, ndabagire.’" 
Luke12:20 Ariko Imana iramubwira iti ’Wa kiburabwenge we, muri iri joro uri bunyagwe ubuzima bwawe. Ubwo se ibyo wahunitse bizaba ibya nde?’" 
Luke12:21 Nguko uko bimerera umuntu wikungahaza ubwe, aho guharanira ubukungu buva ku Mana.»" 
Luke12:22 Nuko abwira abigishwa be ati «Ni cyo gituma mbabwira nti ’Mwihagarikwa imitima n’uko muzamera, ari ku bibatunga, cyangwa ku byo muzambika umubiri wanyu.’" 
Luke12:23 Kuko ubugingo buruta ibyo kurya, n’umubiri ukaruta imyambaro." 
Luke12:24 Nimwitegereze ibyiyoni: ntibibiba, ntibisarura, ntibigira ububiko cyangwa ibigega, ariko Imana irabigaburira. Mwebwe se ntimubona uko mutambukije ibyo bisiga agaciro!" 
Luke12:25 Ni nde muri mwe, n’aho yabishishikarira ate, wagira n’akantu na gato yongera ku buzima bwe?" 
Luke12:26 Niba rero n’ibyo byoroheje mutabishoboye, kuki ibindi byo byatuma muhagarika imitima?" 
Luke12:27 Nimwitegereze indabo: ntiziboha, ntizinadoda. Nyamara ndababwira ko na Salomoni mu bukire bwe bwose atigeze yambara nka rumwe muri zo." 
Luke12:28 Niba Imana yambika ityo icyatsi cyo mu murima kiriho none, ejo kikazatabwa mu muriro, mwe ntizabarengerezaho, mwa bemera gato mwe?" 
Luke12:29 Nimureke rero kubunza imitima mwibaza icyo muzarya cyangwa icyo muzanywa. 
Luke12:30 Ibyo byose abanyamahanga barabihihibikanira, naho mwe mufite umubyeyi uzi ko mubikeneye." 
Luke12:31 Ahubwo mbere na mbere nimuharanire Ingoma ye, naho ibyo byose muzabigerekerwaho." 
Luke12:32 Mwitinya, bushyo bukiri mbarwa, kuko Umubyeyi wanyu yishimiye kubaha Ingoma." 
Luke12:33 Nimugurishe ibyo mutunze, mubifashishe abakene. Nimwishakire impago zidasaza n’ubukungu butazashira bwo mu ijuru, aho umujura atagera n’aho imungu itonona." 
Luke12:34 Koko, aho ubukungu bwawe buri, ni na ho umutima wawe uhora." 
Luke12:35 Nimukenyere kandi muhorane amatara yaka. 
Luke12:36 Nimugenze nk’abantu bategereje shebuja avuye mu bukwe, kugira ngo nagera iwe agakomanga, bahite bamukingurira." 
Luke12:37 Barahirwa abo bagaragu shebuja azasanga bari maso. Ndababwira ukuri: azakenyera abicaze ku meza, maze abahereze." 
Luke12:38 Naza no mu gicuku cyangwa mu nkoko, agasanga bakimutegereje, barahirwa!" 
Luke12:39 Musanzwe mubizi: iyaba nyir’urugo yamenyaga igihe umujura azazira, ntiyareka bamupfumurira inzu." 
Luke12:40 Namwe rero nimube maso, kuko Umwana w’umuntu azaza igihe mudakeka.»" 
Luke12:41 Petero ni ko kumubwira ati «Mwigisha, ni twe uciriye uwo mugani, cyangwa se uwuciriye bose?»" 
Luke12:42 Nyagasani aramusubiza ati «Murabona umunyabintu w’inyangamugayo kandi uzi ubwenge yaba uwuhe, ngo shebuja azamushinge abo mu rugo rwe, maze ajye abaha umugabane wabo w’ingano mu gihe gikwiye?" 
Luke12:43 Arahirwa uwo mugaragu, shebuja azagaruka agasanga agenza atyo!" 
Luke12:44 Ndababwira ukuri: azamushinga ibyo atunze byose. 
Luke12:45 Naho, uwo mugaragu niyibwira ati ’Databuja aratinze’, maze agatangira gukubita abagaragu n’abaja, akarya, akanywa agasinda," 
Luke12:46 amaherezo shebuja azaza umunsi atamwitezeho, no ku isaha atazi, maze amwirukane nabi, amuherereze mu nteko y’abahemu." 
Luke12:47 Uwo mugaragu rero wari uzi icyo shebuja ashaka, ntacyiteho ngo agikore uko yari yamutegetse, azakubitwa nyinshi;" 
Luke12:48 naho utazi icyo shebuja ashaka, agakora ibidakwiye, we azakubitwa nkeya. Uzaba yarahawe byinshi, azabazwa byinshi; n’uwo bazaba barashinze byinshi, azabazwa ibiruta iby’abandi.»" 
Luke12:49 Yezu yungamo ati «Nazanywe no gukongeza umuriro ku isi, mbega ukuntu nifuza ko wagurumana!" 
Luke12:50 Hari batisimu ngomba guhabwa, mbega ukuntu umutima wanjye uhagaze kugeza igihe nzayihererwa!" 
Luke12:51 Aho ntimwibwira ko nazanywe no gutera amahoro ku isi? Oya, ndabibabwiye, ahubwo naje kubateranya." 
Luke12:52 Koko, kuva ubu, urugo rw’abantu batanu ruzicamo ibice, batatu barwanye babiri, babiri na bo barwanye batatu." 
Luke12:53 Bazashyamirana, umugabo n’umuhungu we, umuhungu na se, umugore n’umukobwa we, umukobwa na nyina, nyirabukwe n’umukazana we, umukazana na nyirabukwe.»" 
Luke12:54 Arongera abwira rubanda ati «Iyo mubonye igicu giturutse iburengerazuba, muhita muvuga muti ’Imvura iraza kugwa’, kandi bikaba." 
Luke12:55 N’iyo mubonye umuyaga uhushye uturutse mu majyepfo, muravuga muti ’Haraza kuba ubushyuhe’, kandi bikaba." 
Luke12:56 Mwa ndyarya mwe musobanukirwa n’ibyo mu nsi n’ibyo mu kirere, ni iki gituma mudasobanukirwa n’iby’iki gihe?" 
Luke12:57 Kuki mutabona ubwanyu icyo mukwiye gukora? 
Luke12:58 Nuko rero, nujyana n’umuburanyi wawe agiye kukurega, gerageza kwigorora na we mukiri mu nzira, hato ataguteza umucamanza, umucamanza na we akakugabiza umurinzi w’uburoko ngo agufunge." 
Luke12:59 Ndabikubwiye: ntuzafungurwa utishyuye kugeza ku isenge rya nyuma.» 
Luke13:1 Muri icyo gihe, haza abantu batekerereza Yezu uko Abanyagalileya bari bishwe na Pilato, maze amaraso yabo akayavanga n’ay’ibitambo baturaga." 
Luke13:2 Arabasubiza ati «Mukeka ko abo Banyagalileya barushaga abandi kuba abanyabyaha? 
Luke13:3 Oya! Ahubwo reka mbabwire: nimuticuza, mwese muzapfa kimwe na bo." 
Luke13:4 Cyangwa se, ba bantu cumi n’umunani bagwiriwe n’umunara wo kuri Silowe, mukeka ko bazize kuba abanyabyaha kurusha abandi baturage b’i Yeruzalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Oya! Ahubwo reka mbabwire: nimuticuza, mwese muzapfa kimwe na bo.»" 
Luke13:6 Nuko Yezu abacira uyu mugani ati «Umuntu yari afite igiti cy’ umutini cyatewe mu murima we w’imizabibu. Aza kuwushakaho imbuto, ariko ntiyazibona." 
Luke13:7 Ni ko kubwira umuhinzi we ati ’Uyu mwaka ni uwa gatatu nza gushaka imbuto kuri uyu mutini sinzibone. Wuteme, nta cyo umaze aha ngaha.’" 
Luke13:8 Undi aramusubiza ati ’Shobuja, ba uwuretse byibura uyu mwaka, nywucukurire iruhande, maze nshyireho ifumbire." 
Luke13:9 Ahari kera wazera imbuto; nutera uzawuteme.’» 
Luke13:10 Nuko Yezu yigishiriza mu isengero ku munsi w’isabato. 
Luke13:11 Icyo gihe, hari umugore wari umaze imyaka cumi n’umunani afashwe n’indwara yari yaramumugaje. Yarububaga, ntashobore kunamuka na gato." 
Luke13:12 Yezu amubonye, aramuhamagara aramubwira ati «Mugore, dore ukize ubumuga bwawe.»" 
Luke13:13 Nuko amuramburiraho ibiganza; ako kanya arunamuka, asingiza Imana." 
Luke13:14 Nuko umukuru w’isengero arakazwa n’uko Yezu yakijije umuntu ku isabato. Atangira kubwira rubanda ati «Hari iminsi itandatu yo gukoraho imirimo, mujye muza kwivuza kuri iyo minsi, atari ku isabato.»" 
Luke13:15 Nyagasani aramusubiza ati «Mwa ndyarya mwe! Mbese buri muntu muri mwe, ku munsi w’isabato, ntakura ikimasa cyangwa indogobe ye mu kiraro, ngo ajye kuyuhira?" 
Luke13:16 None, uyu mwana wa Abrahamu Sekibi yaboshye imyaka cumi n’umunani, ngo ntiyakurwa ku ngoyi ku munsi w’isabato?»" 
Luke13:17 Amaze kuvuga atyo, abanzi be bose bagira ikimwaro, naho rubanda rwishimira ibitangaza yakoraga." 
Luke13:18 Yezu aravuga ati «Ingoma y’Imana imeze ite? Nayigereranya n’iki? 
Luke13:19 Imeze nk’akabuto ka sinapisi umuntu yagiye gutera mu murima we, karakura kaba igiti, maze inyoni zo mu kirere ziza kwarika mu mashami yacyo.»" 
Luke13:20 Arongera ati «Ingoma y’Imana, nayigereranya n’iki?" 
Luke13:21 Imeze nk’umusemburo umugore yavanze n’incuro eshatu z’ifu, kugeza igihe byose bitutumbiye.»" 
Luke13:22 Nuko Yezu anyura mu migi no mu nsisiro yigisha, yerekeza i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke13:23 Haza umuntu, aramubaza ati «Mwigisha, koko abantu bakeya ni bo bazarokoka?» Nuko arababwira ati" 
Luke13:24 «Muharanire kwinjirira mu muryango ufunganye; ndabibabwiye: benshi bazagerageza kwinjira, ariko boye kubishobora." 
Luke13:25 Koko rero, nimuzaba mukiri hanze, igihe nyir’urugo azahaguruka agakinga, n’aho muzakomanga kangahe muvuga muti ’Shobuja, dukingurire’, azabasubiza ati ’Sinzi iyo muturuka.’" 
Luke13:26 Ubwo muzatangira kuvuga muti ’Twaririye kandi tunywera imbere yawe, ndetse wigishirije no mu materaniro yacu.’" 
Luke13:27 We rero azabasubiza ati ’Sinzi iyo muturutse; nimumve imbere mwa nkozi z’ibibi mwe!’ 
Luke13:28 Ubwo ni bwo muzaganya mugahekenya amenyo, mubona Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo, n’abahanuzi bose bari mu Ngoma y’Imana, naho mwe mwaraciriwe hanze." 
Luke13:29 Bazaturuka iburasirazuba n’iburengerazuba, baturuke mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo, bazakikize ameza mu isangira ry’Ingoma y’Imana." 
Luke13:30 Bityo hari abo mu ba nyuma bazaba aba mbere, hakaba n’abo mu ba mbere bazaba aba nyuma.»" 
Luke13:31 Icyo gihe bamwe mu Bafarizayi begera Yezu, baramubwira bati «Haguruka, uve hano, kuko Herodi ashaka kukwicisha.»" 
Luke13:32 Arabasubiza ati «Nimujye kubwira uwo muhari muti ’Uyu munsi n’ejo ndirukana roho mbi, nkize n’abarwayi, maze ku munsi wa gatatu nzabe ndangije.’" 
Luke13:33 Ariko uyu munsi, ejo n’ejobundi, ngomba gukomeza urugendo rwanjye, kuko bidakwiye ko umuhanuzi apfira ahandi hatari i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke13:34 Yeruzalemu, Yeruzalemu, wowe wica abahanuzi ugatera amabuye abagutumweho, ni kangahe nashatse kwegeranya abana bawe, nk’uko inkoko ibundikira abana bayo mu mababa, ariko wowe ukanga!" 
Luke13:35 Dore inzu mutuyemo izabasenyukiraho. Koko rero ndabibabwiye: ntimuzongera kumbona ukundi kugeza igihe muzavugira muti ’Nasingizwe uje mu izina rya Nyagasani!’» 
Luke14:1 Nuko ku munsi w’isabato, Yezu yinjira mu nzu y’umwe mu Bafarizayi b’abanyacyubahiro kuhafungurira, naho bo bakamugenzura." 
Luke14:2 Imbere ye rero hakaba umuntu urwaye urushwima. 
Luke14:3 Yezu araterura, abwira abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi ati «Ese biremewe gukiza umuntu ku isabato, cyangwa se birabujijwe?»" 
Luke14:4 Ariko bo baricecekera. Nuko Yezu aramwegera, aramukiza maze aramusezerera." 
Luke14:5 Arangije arababwira ati «Ni nde muri mwe utavana ako kanya umwana we waguye mu iriba, cyangwa ikimasa cye, kabone n’iyo haba ku munsi w’isabato?»" 
Luke14:6 Nuko babura icyo basubiza. 
Luke14:7 Amaze kwitegereza ukuntu abatumirwa bihutira gufata imyanya y’icyubahiro, abacira uyu mugani ati" 
Luke14:8 «Igihe bagutumiye mu bukwe, ntukishyire mu mwanya wa mbere, hato mu batumiwe hataza ukurushije icyubahiro," 
Luke14:9 maze uwabatumiye mwembi akavaho akubwira ati ’Muvire mu mwanya’; icyo gihe wakorwa n’isoni ukajya mu mwanya w’inyuma. 
Luke14:10 Ahubwo nutumirwa, ujye wishyira mu mwanya w’inyuma kugira ngo uwagutumiye naza, akubwire ati ’Mugenzi wanjye igira imbere.’ Icyo gihe uzagira icyubahiro imbere y’abandi batumirwa bose." 
Luke14:11 Kuko uwikuza wese azacishwa bugufi, naho uwicisha bugufi akazakuzwa.»" 
Luke14:12 Arongera abwira uwamutumiye ati «Nugira abo utumira ku meza, haba ku manywa cyangwa nimugoroba, ntugatumire incuti zawe, cyangwa abavandimwe n’abo mufitanye isano, cyangwa abakize muturanye, kugira ngo na bo batazavaho bagutumira, bakakwitura." 
Luke14:13 Ahubwo nugira abo utumira, ujye urarika abakene, ibirema, abacumbagira n’impumyi." 
Luke14:14 Ubwo ni bwo uzaba uhirwa kuko bo badafite ibyo bakwitura, maze ibyo uzabyiturwe ku munsi w’izuka ry’intungane.»" 
Luke14:15 Umwe mu bo basangiraga, ngo yumve ibyo, abwira Yezu ati «Hahirwa uzemererwa gufungurira mu Ngoma y’Imana!»" 
Luke14:16 Nuko aramusubiza ati «Umuntu yateguye ibirori bikomeye maze atumira abantu benshi ngo basangire. 
Luke14:17 Igihe cyo gufungura kigeze, yohereza umugaragu we kubwira abatumiwe ngo ’Nimuze, byose byatunganye.’" 
Luke14:18 Nuko bose batangira gushaka impamvu zo kubyangira. Uwa mbere aramubwira ati ’Naguze umurima, ngomba kujya kuwureba; umbabarire, ntundenganye.’" 
Luke14:19 Undi na we ati ’Naguze ibimasa cumi byo guhingisha, ubu ngiye kubigerageza; umbabarire, ntundenganye.’" 
Luke14:20 Naho undi ati ’Narongoye, none simbonye uko nza.’" 
Luke14:21 Umugaragu agarutse abitekerereza shebuja. Nyir’urugo arabisha, abwira umugaragu we ati ’Ihute, ujye mu materaniro no mu mayira y’umugi, maze uzane abakene, ibirema, impumyi n’abacumbagira.’" 
Luke14:22 Umugaragu agaruka avuga ati ’Shobuja, ibyo wategetse nabirangije, ariko haracyari umwanya.’" 
Luke14:23 Nyir’urugo abwira umugaragu we ati ’Ongera ujye mu mayira yo mu cyaro no mu mihora, maze uhate abantu baze mu nzu yanjye bayuzure." 
Luke14:24 Koko mbibabwire: nta n’umwe mu bari batumiwe uzakora ku biryo byanjye.’» 
Luke14:25 Ubundi Yezu yari ashagawe n’abantu benshi. Arahindukira, arababwira ati" 
Luke14:26 «Umuntu waza ansanga, atabanje guhara se na nyina, umugore n’abana be, abavandimwe na bashiki be, ndetse n’ubuzima bwe bwite, uwo nguwo ntashobora kuba umwigishwa wanjye." 
Luke14:27 Kandi umuntu wese udaheka umusaraba we ngo ankurikire, ntashobora kuba umwigishwa wanjye." 
Luke14:28 Mbese ni nde muri mwe washaka kubaka umunara, ntabanze kwicara ngo arebe ibyo azawutangaho, kandi ngo amenye niba afite ibizawuzuza?" 
Luke14:29 Aba yanga ko yatangira kubaka, agasanga adashobora kuzuza, maze abazamubona bakamuseka bavuga ngo" 
Luke14:30 ’Dore umuntu watangiye kubaka, akananirwa no kuzuza!’" 
Luke14:31 Cyangwa se, ni nde mwami waba agiye kurwanya undi mwami, ntabanze kwicara ngo yibaze ko, niba afite ingabo ibihumbi cumi, yashobora kurwanya uza kumutera afite ibihumbi makumyabiri?" 
Luke14:32 Abonye bitamushobokeye, yamutumaho akiri kure, akamusaba ko babana mu mahoro." 
Luke14:33 Nuko rero, utazahara ibyo atunze byose, ntashobora kuba umwigishwa wanjye." 
Luke14:34 Koko, umunyu ni ikintu cyiza, ariko iyo ushizemo uburyohe bwawo, bwagarurwa n’iki?" 
Luke14:35 Nta kindi uba ugifitiye akamaro, cyaba igitaka cyangwa ifumbire; ahubwo barawujugunya. Ufite amatwi yo kumva, niyumve!»" 
Luke15:1 Nuko abasoresha n’abanyabyaha basanga Yezu bose, bashaka kumwumva." 
Luke15:2 Abafarizayi n’abigishamategeko batangira kwijujuta, bavuga bati «Uyu muntu ko yakira abanyabyaha akanasangira na bo!»" 
Luke15:3 Nuko Yezu abacira uyu mugani, ati" 
Luke15:4 «Ni nde muri mwe wagira intama ijana, imwe muri zo yazimira, ntasige za zindi mirongo urwenda n’icyenda ku gasozi, akajya gushakashaka iyazimiye kugeza igihe ayiboneye?" 
Luke15:5 Iyo amaze kuyibona ayiterera ku bitugu yishimye. 
Luke15:6 Yagera iwe agakoranya incuti n’abaturanyi, akababwira ati ’Nimuze twishimane, kuko nabonye intama yanjye yari yazimiye!’" 
Luke15:7 Ndabibabwiye: nguko uko umunyabyaha umwe wisubiraho azatera ibyishimo mu ijuru, birenze iby’intungane mirongo urwenda n’icyenda zidakeneye kwisubiraho." 
Luke15:8 Cyangwa se, ni nde mugore wagira ibiceri cumi, kimwe cyatakara, ntacane itara ngo akubure inzu, ashakashake kugeza igihe akiboneye." 
Luke15:9 Iyo amaze kukibona akoranya incuti n’abaturanyi, akababwira ati ’Nimuze twishimane, kuko nabonye igiceri cyanjye nari natakaje!’" 
Luke15:10 Ndabibabwiye: nguko uko abamalayika b’Imana bazishima kubera umunyabyaha umwe wisubiyeho.» 
Luke15:11 Arongera ati «Umugabo yari afite abahungu babiri. 
Luke15:12 Umutoya abwira se ati ’Dawe, mpa umunani ungenewe.’ Nuko se abagabanya ibye." 
Luke15:13 Hashize iminsi mike, umutoya akoranya ibye byose, ajya mu gihugu cya kure. Nuko ahatagaguriza ibye yibera mu maraha." 
Luke15:14 Amaze kubitsemba byose, muri icyo gihugu hatera inzara ikaze, nuko aratindahara." 
Luke15:15 Ni bwo agiye gusaba akazi umuturage w’icyo gihugu, amwohereza kuragira ingurube mu isambu ye." 
Luke15:16 Yifuzaga kuba yahemburwa n’ibishishwa ingurube zaryaga, ariko ntihagire ubimuha." 
Luke15:17 Bigeze aho, aribwira ati ’Nyamara se kwa data hari abakozi bangana iki barya bakanabisigaza, naho jyewe nicirwa n’inzara hano!" 
Luke15:18 Reka mpaguruke nsange data, mubwire nti: Dawe, nacumuye ku Mana no kuri wowe." 
Luke15:19 Singikwiriye kwitwa umwana wawe, none ngira nk’umwe mu bakozi bawe.’" 
Luke15:20 Nuko arahaguruka asanga se. Akiri kure, se aramurabukwa, yumva impuhwe ziramusabye. Ariruka ajya kumugwa mu nda, aramuramutsa amusomagura." 
Luke15:21 Nuko umwana aramubwira ati ’Dawe, nacumuye ku Mana no kuri wowe, singikwiriye kwitwa umwana wawe.’" 
Luke15:22 Naho se abwira abagaragu be ati ’Vuba, muzane ikanzu nziza cyane muyimwambike, mumwambike n’impeta mu rutoki n’inkweto mu birenge." 
Luke15:23 Muzane ikimasa cy’umushishe, mukibage, turye twishime," 
Luke15:24 kuko uyu mwana wanjye yari yarapfuye, none yazutse; yari yarazimiye, none yatahutse!’ Nuko batangira kwishima." 
Luke15:25 Icyo gihe umwana we w’imfura yari mu murima. Arahinguka, ageze hafi y’urugo yumva baririmba, umudiho ari wose." 
Luke15:26 Nuko ahamagara umwe mu bagaragu, amubaza ibyo ari byo." 
Luke15:27 Undi aramusubiza ati ’Ni murumuna wawe wagarutse; none so yabaze ikimasa cy’umushishe, kuko yamubonye ari mutaraga.’" 
Luke15:28 Aherako ararakara, yanga kujya mu rugo. Se arasohoka, aramuhendahenda ngo aze." 
Luke15:29 Nuko abwira se ati ’Reba imyaka yose maze ngukorera; nta n’itegeko ryawe na rimwe ndengaho, nyamara ntiwigeze umpa n’agahene ngo ngasangire n’incuti zanjye." 
Luke15:30 None uriya muhungu wawe wagarutse amaze kumarira ibintu byawe mu ndaya, ube ari we ubagishiriza ikimasa cy’umushishe!’" 
Luke15:31 Nuko se aramusubiza ati ’Mwana wanjye, wowe iteka tuba turi kumwe, kandi ibyanjye byose ni ibyawe." 
Luke15:32 Ariko byari ngombwa rwose ko dukora umunsi mukuru, tukishima, kuko uriya muvandimwe wawe ureba yari yarapfuye none yazutse, yari yarazimiye none yatahutse!’»" 
Luke16:1 Nuko akomeza kubwira abigishwa be ati «Habayeho umuntu w’umukungu wari ufite umunyabintu yashinze ibintu bye, maze bamumuregaho ko abipfusha ubusa." 
Luke16:2 Aramuhamagaza, aramubwira ati ’Ibyo numva bakuvugaho ni ibiki? Murikira ibyanjye kuko kuva ubu utazongera kumbera mu bintu.’" 
Luke16:3 Nuko uwo munyabintu aribaza ati ’Nzabigenza nte ko databuja ankuye mu bintu bye? Guhinga? Sinabishobora. Gusabiriza? Binteye isoni. 
Luke16:4 Mbonye uko nzabigenza kugira ngo, nimara kuva mu bintu bye, nzabone abanyakira iwabo.’" 
Luke16:5 Nuko ahamagaza abarimo imyenda ya shebuja bose, umwe umwe, maze ahera ku wa mbere aramubaza ati ’Databuja umufitiye umwenda ungana iki?’" 
Luke16:6 Undi aramusubiza ati ’Ibibindi ijana by’amavuta y’imizeti.’ Umunyabintu aramubwira ati ’Akira urupapuro rwawe, wicare, wandikeho vuba ko ari mirongo itanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Hanyuma abaza undi ati ’Wowe, se urimo mwenda ki?’ Aramusubiza ati ’Imifuka ijana y’ingano.’ Aramubwira ati ’Akira urupapuro rwawe, wandikeho ko ari mirongo inani.’" 
Luke16:8 Nuko shebuja atangarira uwo mugaragu w’umuhemu, kuko yamenye kwiteganyiriza. Koko, abana b’iyi si mu mibanire yabo barusha ubwenge abana b’urumuri.»" 
Luke16:9 Reka rero mbabwire: ayo matindi y’amafaranga nimuyashakishe incuti, kugira ngo umunsi mwayabuze izo ncuti zizabakire aho muzibera iteka." 
Luke16:10 Udahemuka mu bintu byoroheje, ntahemuka no mu bikomeye; naho uhemuka mu bintu byoroheje, ahemuka no mu bikomeye." 
Luke16:11 None se nimuterekana ko muri indahemuka mu matindi y’amafaranga, ni nde uzabashinga ibifite agaciro k’ukuri?" 
Luke16:12 Niba kandi muterekanye ko muri indahemuka mu bintu bitari ibyanyu, ibibagenewe muzabihabwa na nde?" 
Luke16:13 Nta mugaragu ushobora gukorera ba shebuja babiri: azanga umwe akunde undi, cyangwa azibanda kuri umwe asuzugure undi. Ntimushobora gukorera Imana na Bintu.»" 
Luke16:14 Abafarizayi bikundiraga amafaranga, bumvise ibyo byose baramukwena." 
Luke16:15 Yezu arababwira ati «Mukunda kwigira intugane mu maso y’abantu, ariko Imana izi imitima yanyu. Koko icyo abantu baha agaciro, ni cyo kiba kigayitse mu maso y’Imana." 
Luke16:16 Amategeko n’Abahanuzi byabayeho kugeza kuri Yohani; kuva ubwo Ingoma y’Imana iramamazwa, kandi umuntu wese arwanira kuyinjiramo." 
Luke16:17 Biroroshye ko ijuru n’isi bishira aho kugira ngo akitso kamwe kave mu Mategeko. 
Luke16:18 Umuntu wese usenda umugore we akazana undi, aba asambanye; n’ucyura umugore wasenzwe n’umugabo we, na we aba asambanye." 
Luke16:19 Habayeho umugabo w’umukungu wambaraga imyambaro myiza y’umuhemba n’iy’imyeru, buri munsi akarya by’agatangaza." 
Luke16:20 Hari n’umukene witwaga Lazaro wari waramazwe n’ibisebe, akarambarara ku muryango w’uwo mukungu." 
Luke16:21 Yifuzaga gutungwa n’ibyagwaga hasi bivuye ku meza y’uwo mukungu, akabibura; ahubwo imbwa zikaza kurigata ibisebe bye." 
Luke16:22 Umukene rero aza gupfa, abamalayika bamushyikiriza Abrahamu; umukungu na we arapfa, baramuhamba." 
Luke16:23 Ageze ikuzimu, arahababarira cyane. Ni ko kubura amaso, abonera kure Abrahamu ari kumwe na Lazaro." 
Luke16:24 Nuko atera hejuru ati ’Mubyeyi Abrahamu, mbabarira wohereze Lazaro, akoze umutwe w’urutoki rwe mu mazi, maze aze ambobeze ku rurimi, kuko nazahajwe n’uyu muriro.’" 
Luke16:25 Abrahamu aramusubiza ati ’Mwana wanjye, ibuka ko wakize cyane ukiri ku isi, naho Lazaro akahagirira ibyago. Ubu rero yibereye hano mu byishimo, naho wowe urababara." 
Luke16:26 Uretse n’ibyo, hagati yacu namwe hari imanga nini, ituma abashaka kuva hano baza aho batabishobora, namwe kandi ntimushobore kuva aho muri ngo mudusange.’" 
Luke16:27 Umukungu arongera ati ’Mubyeyi, ndagusabye ngo wohereze Lazaro kwa data," 
Luke16:28 kuko mpafite abavandimwe batanu; agende ababurire ejo na bo batazaza aha hantu h’ububabare.’ 
Luke16:29 Abrahamu aramusubiza ati ’Bafite Musa n’Abahanuzi, nibabumve!’" 
Luke16:30 Undi ati ’Oya, mubyeyi Abrahamu! Ahubwo umwe mu bapfuye nabasanga, bazisubiraho.’" 
Luke16:31 Abrahamu arongera, aramusubiza ati ’Niba batumva Musa n’Abahanuzi, n’aho hagira uzuka mu bapfuye, ntibyabemeza.’»" 
Luke17:1 Nuko Yezu abwira abigishwa be ati «Kubuza ibigusha abantu mu byaha ntibishoboka, ariko hagowe umuntu biturukaho!" 
Luke17:2 Ikiruta kuri we, ni uko bamuhambira urusyo ku ijosi bakamuroha mu nyanja, ataragira uwo agusha muri aba batoya." 
Luke17:3 Murabyitondere! Umuvandimwe wawe nagucumuraho, ubimuhane ukomeje, maze niyicuza, umubabarire." 
Luke17:4 Ndetse nagucumuraho karindwi mu munsi, akakwitwaraho karindwi avuga ati ’Ndabyicujije’, uzamubabarire.»" 
Luke17:5 Nuko intumwa zibwira Yezu ziti «Twongerere ukwemera.» 
Luke17:6 Nyagasani arabasubiza ati «Iyaba mwari mufite ukwemera kungana n’impeke y’ururo, mwabwiye iki giti cya boberi muti ’Randuka, ujye kwitera mu nyanja’, kikabumvira." 
Luke17:7 Ni ko se, ni nde muri mwe wagira umugaragu umuhingira cyangwa akamuragirira amatungo, yataha akamubwira ati ’Banguka uze ufungure’?" 
Luke17:8 Ahubwo ntazamubwira ati ’Banza ujye kuntekera, ukenyere umpereze, kugeza ndangije kurya no kunywa; hanyuma nawe ubone kurya no kunywa’?" 
Luke17:9 Mbese shebuja yashimira uwo mugaragu we ko yarangije ibyo yari yategetswe? 
Luke17:10 Namwe ni uko, nimurangiza gukora icyo mwategetswe cyose, mujye muvuga muti ’Turi abagaragu nk’abandi: twakoze ibyo twari dushinzwe.’»" 
Luke17:11 Yezu yari mu rugendo, anyura ku mipaka ya Samariya na Galileya, yerekeza i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke17:12 Ageze mu rusisiro, ababembe cumi baza bamugana, bahagarara ahitaruye." 
Luke17:13 Nuko barangurura ijwi, bati «Yezu, Mwigisha, tubabarire!»" 
Luke17:14 Ababonye, arababwira ati «Nimujye kwiyereka abaherezabitambo.» Bakiri mu nzira barakira." 
Luke17:15 Umwe muri bo, abonye ko yakize, asubira inyuma arangurura ijwi, asingiza Imana." 
Luke17:16 Nuko amwikubita imbere, yubitse umutwe ku butaka, aramushimira. Uwo muntu kandi yari Umunyasamariya." 
Luke17:17 Yezu araterura aravuga ati «Mbese bose ntibakize uko ari icumi? Abandi icyenda bari hehe? 
Luke17:18 Nta wundi wabonetse ngo agaruke gushimira Imana, atari uyu munyamahanga?»" 
Luke17:19 Nuko aramubwira ati «Haguruka wigendere; ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije.» 
Luke17:20 Abafarizayi baramubaza bati «Ingoma y’Imana izaza gihe ki?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ingoma y’Imana ntizaza yigaragaza mu maso y’abantu," 
Luke17:21 ngo bagire bati ’Ngiyi, ngiriya.’ Ahubwo nimumenye ko Ingoma y’Imana ibarimo.»" 
Luke17:22 Yongera kubwira abigishwa be, ati «Hazaza igihe muzifuza kubona nibura umwe mu minsi y’Umwana w’umuntu, ariko ntimuzawubona." 
Luke17:23 Bazababwira bati ’Dore nguyu, nguriya.’ Ntimuzajyeyo, ntimuzirukireyo." 
Luke17:24 Koko rero, nk’uko umurabyo urabiriza mu ruhande rumwe rw’isi, ukabonekera mu rundi, ni ko n’Umwana w’umuntu azaza ku munsi yigeneye." 
Luke17:25 Ariko agomba kubanza kubabara cyane, kandi abantu b’iyi ngoma bamwihakane." 
Luke17:26 Mbese nk’uko byagenze mu gihe cya Nowa, ni na ko bizamera mu minsi y’Umwana w’umuntu." 
Luke17:27 Icyo gihe abantu bararyaga bakanywa, abahungu bararongoraga, abakobwa bakarongorwa, kugeza ubwo Nowa yinjiye mu bwato, maze umwuzure uraza urabatsemba bose." 
Luke17:28 Bizamera nk’uko byagenze mu minsi ya Loti. Icyo igihe abantu bararyaga bakanywa, bararanguraga bagacuruza, kandi barahingaga bakubaka;" 
Luke17:29 ariko umunsi Loti avuye muri Sodoma, Imana igusha umuriro uvanze n’amahindure biturutse ku ijuru, bose irabatsemba." 
Luke17:30 Ni ko bizamera ku munsi Umwana w’umuntu azigaragazaho. 
Luke17:31 Kuri uwo munsi, uzaba ari hejuru y’inzu, ntazamanuke ku nzu ye ngo agire icyo avanamo. Kandi uzaba ari mu murima, ntazasubire imuhira." 
Luke17:32 Nimwibuke umugore wa Loti! 
Luke17:33 Uwihambira ku bugingo bwe, azabubura, naho uzahara ubugingo bwe azabuhorana." 
Luke17:34 Ndabibabwiye: muri iryo joro, abantu babiri bazaba bari ku buriri bumwe, umwe azafatwa, undi asigare." 
Luke17:35 Abagore babiri bazaba bari hamwe basya, umwe azafatwa, undi asigare.» (...)" 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Abigishwa ni ko kumubaza bati «Ibyo bizabera hehe, Nyagasani?» Arabasubiza ati «Ahazaba hari intumbi, ni ho inkongoro zizakoranira.»" 
Luke18:1 Hanyuma abacira umugani, abumvisha ko ari ngombwa gusenga iteka batarambirwa." 
Luke18:2 Nuko aravuga ati «Mu mugi umwe hari umucamanza utatinyaga Imana, ntiyubahe n’abantu." 
Luke18:3 Muri uwo mugi hari n’umupfakazi wazaga kumubwira ati ’Nkiranura n’uwo duhora tuburana!’ 
Luke18:4 Amwirengagiza igihe kirekire. Ageze aho, aribwira ati ’N’ubwo ndatinya Imana bwose, kandi singire uwo nubaha," 
Luke18:5 uriya mupfakazi wandembeje ngiye kumucira urubanza rwe rurangire, areke guhora aza kumena umutwe.’»" 
Luke18:6 Nyagasani arongera ati «Nimwumve ibyo uwo mucamanza mubi avuga. 
Luke18:7 Imana se ni Yo yarangarana intore zayo, ntizirengere kandi ziyitakambira amanywa n’ijoro?" 
Luke18:8 Ndabibabwiye: izabarenganura vuba. Ariko se, igihe Umwana w’umuntu azazira, azasanga hakiri ukwemera ku isi?»" 
Luke18:9 Yezu yongera guca uyu mugani, awucira bamwe bibwiraga ko ari intungane, bagasuzugura abandi bose." 
Luke18:10 Nuko aravuga ati «Abantu babiri bahuriye mu Ngoro baje gusenga. Umwe yari Umufarizayi, undi ari umusoresha." 
Luke18:11 Umufarizayi aremarara, asengera mu mutima we avuga ati ’Mana, ndagushimira ko ntameze nk’abandi bantu b’ibisambo, b’abahemu, b’abasambanyi, mbese nk’uriya musoresha!" 
Luke18:12 Nsiba kurya kabiri mu cyumweru, ngatanga kimwe cya cumi cy’urwunguko rwanjye rwose.’" 
Luke18:13 Umusoresha we yihagararira kure, atinya no kubura amaso ngo ayerekeze hejuru, maze yikomanga ku gituza avuga ati ’Mana yanjye, mbabarira jyewe w’umunyabyaha!’" 
Luke18:14 Ndabibabwiye: uwo musoresha yasubiye iwe ari intungane, naho ureke undi! Kuko uwikuza wese azacishwa bugufi, naho uwicisha bugufi akazakuzwa.»" 
Luke18:15 Nuko abantu bamuzanira n’abana babo b’ibitambambuga ngo abakoreho, ariko abigishwa babibonye barabakabukira." 
Luke18:16 Yezu arabahamagara ati «Nimureke abana bansange, mwibabuza, kuko Ingoma y’Imana ari iy’abameze nka bo." 
Luke18:17 Ndababwira ukuri: umuntu wese utazakira Ingoma y’Imana nk’umwana, ntazayinjiramo bibaho.»" 
Luke18:18 Nuko haza umunyacyubahiro, abaza Yezu ati «Mwigisha mwiza, nkore iki kugira ngo nzabone ubugingo bw’iteka ho umurage?»" 
Luke18:19 Yezu aramubwira ati «Kuki unyita mwiza? Nta mwiza ubaho, keretse Imana yonyine." 
Luke18:20 Uzi amategeko: ntuzasambane, ntuzice, ntuzibe, ntuzahamye ibinyoma, urajye wubaha so na nyoko.»" 
Luke18:21 Uwo mugabo aramusubiza ati «Ibyo byose nabikurikije kuva nkiri muto.» 
Luke18:22 Yezu abyumvise, aramubwira ati «Ubuze ikintu kimwe gusa: gurisha ibyo utunze byose, maze ubigabanye abakene, uzagira ubukire mu ijuru; hanyuma uze unkurikire.»" 
Luke18:23 We ariko abyumvise arijima, kuko yari atunze ibintu byinshi." 
Luke18:24 Yezu abibonye atyo, aravuga ati «Mbega ukuntu kuzinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana biruhije ku bakungu!" 
Luke18:25 Byoroheye ingamiya guca mu mwenge w’urushinge kurusha uko byoroheye umukungu kwinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana!» 
Luke18:26 Ababyumvise baravuga bati «Ubwo se ni nde ushobora kurokoka?» 
Luke18:27 Arabasubiza ati «Ikidashobokera abantu, Imana iragishobora.»" 
Luke18:28 Nuko Petero aravuga ati «Dore, twebwe twasize ibyacu byose, turagukurikira.»" 
Luke18:29 Arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri: ntawe uzaba yarasize urugo rwe, cyangwa umugore we, cyangwa abavandimwe be, cyangwa ababyeyi be, cyangwa abana be, abigirira Ingoma y’Imana," 
Luke18:30 ngo abure kwiturwa ibirenzeho muri iki gihe, no mu gihe kizaza akaziturwa ubugingo bw’iteka.»" 
Luke18:31 Nuko Yezu yihererana ba Cumi na babiri, arababwira ati «Dore tuzamutse tujya i Yeruzalemu, maze ibyanditswe n’abahanuzi byose byerekeye Umwana w’umuntu bizabe." 
Luke18:32 Koko bazamugabiza abanyamahanga, akubitwe, ashinyagurirwe, avunderezwe amacandwe;" 
Luke18:33 kandi nibamara kumukubitisha ibiboko bazamwice, maze ku munsi wa gatatu azazuke.»" 
Luke18:34 Nyamara bo, birabayobera. Ayo magambo ababera urujijo; ntibumva icyo Yezu yashakaga kuvuga." 
Luke18:35 Igihe yegereye i Yeriko, hakaba hari impumyi yicaye iruhande rw’inzira, isabiriza." 
Luke18:36 Yumvise abantu benshi bahitaga, abaza ibyo ari byo." 
Luke18:37 Baramusubiza bati «Ni Yezu w’i Nazareti uhise.» 
Luke18:38 Nuko atera hejuru ati «Yezu, Mwana wa Dawudi, mbabarira!»" 
Luke18:39 Abari imbere baramucyaha ngo naceceke, ariko arushaho kurangurura ijwi, ati «Mwana wa Dawudi, mbabarira!»" 
Luke18:40 Yezu arahagarara, ategeka ko bamumuzanira. Amugeze iruhande, aramubaza ati" 
Luke18:41 «Urashaka ko ngukorera iki?» Na we, ati «Nyagasani, mpa kubona!»" 
Luke18:42 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ngaho bona; ukwemera kwawe kuragukijije!» 
Luke18:43 Ako kanya arabona, maze aramukurikira, agenda asingiza Imana. Abantu bose na bo babibonye, basingiza Imana." 
Luke19:1 Yezu ageze i Yeriko, yahuranya umugi." 
Luke19:2 Nuko haza umugabo witwa Zakewusi, yari umutware w’abasoresha, akaba umukungu." 
Luke19:3 Agerageza kubona Yezu uwo ari we ariko ntiyabishobora, kubera imbaga y’abantu, kandi akaba yari mugufi." 
Luke19:4 Arirukanka, abacaho maze yurira igiti cy’umuvumu, agira ngo abone Yezu wari ugiye kunyura aho." 
Luke19:5 Yezu ahageze yubura amaso, aramubwira ati «Zakewusi, manuka vuba kuko ngomba gucumbika iwawe uyu munsi.»" 
Luke19:6 Nuko amanuka bwangu, amwakirana ibyishimo." 
Luke19:7 Ababibonye bose barijujuta, baravuga bati «Yagiye gucumbika ku munyabyaha!»" 
Luke19:8 Nuko Zakewusi yegera Nyagasani, aramubwira ati «Rwose, Mwigisha, kimwe cya kabiri cy’ibyo ntunze, ngihaye abakene; niba kandi hari uwo nahuguje, ndamusubiza ibye incuro enye.»" 
Luke19:9 Yezu ni ko kuvuga ati «Uyu munsi umukiro watashye muri iyi nzu, kuko uyu na we ari umwana wa Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Koko rero, Umwana w’umuntu yazanywe no gushaka no kurokora ibyazimiye.»" 
Luke19:11 Mu gihe abantu bari bamuteze amatwi, Yezu yongera kubacira umugani, kuko yari ageze hafi ya Yeruzalemu, kandi hakaba hari abibwiraga ko Ingoma y’Imana igiye kwigaragaza ako kanya." 
Luke19:12 Nuko aravuga ati «Umuntu w’igikomangoma yagiye mu gihugu cya kure ajyanywe no kwimikwa, byarangira akagaruka." 
Luke19:13 Nuko ahamagara icumi mu bagaragu be, abaha ibiceri cumi bya feza, arababwira ati ’Muzabikoreshe neza bizunguke kugeza igihe nzagarukira.’" 
Luke19:14 Ariko abaturage be baramwangaga, maze bamukurikiza intumwa zo kuvuga ngo ’Ntidushaka ko uriya atubera umwami!’" 
Luke19:15 Amaze rero kwimikwa, aragaruka, ahamagaza abagaragu yari yarahaye feza ze, kugira ngo amenye icyo buri muntu yungutse." 
Luke19:16 Uwa mbere araza, aravuga ati ’Nyagasani, ifeza yawe yungutse izindi cumi.’" 
Luke19:17 Umwami aramubwira ati ’Ni uko, ni uko, mugaragu mwiza! Kubera ko wabaye inyangamugayo mu bintu bike, uzatwara imigi cumi.’" 
Luke19:18 N’uwa kabiri araza, ati ’Nyagasani, ifeza yawe yungutse izindi eshanu.’" 
Luke19:19 N’uwo nguwo umwami aramubwira ati ’Nawe uzatwara imigi itanu.’ 
Luke19:20 Undi na we araza, ati ’Nyagasani, dore ifeza yawe, nayibitse neza mu gitambaro." 
Luke19:21 Koko naragutinye, kuko uri umunyamwaga: utwara ibyo utabitse, ugasarura aho utabibye.’" 
Luke19:22 Umwami aramusubiza ati ’Amagambo yawe umaze kwivugira ni yo ngiye kukuziza, wa mugaragu mubi we! Wari uzi ko ndi umunyamwaga, ntwara ibyo ntabitse, ngasarura ibyo ntabibye." 
Luke19:23 Wabujijwe n’iki gushyira feza yanjye mu isanduku y’ububiko, ngo ningaruka uyimpane n’inyungu yayo?’" 
Luke19:24 Nuko abwira abari aho, ati ’Nimumwake ifeza ye, maze muyihe uzifite ari icumi.’" 
Luke19:25 Baramubwira bati ’Nyagasani, ko afite se nyine icumi!’" 
Luke19:26 Umwami arabasubiza ati ’Ndabibabwiye: ufite wese bazamwongerera, naho ufite ubusa bazamwambura n’utwo yari atunze." 
Luke19:27 Naho abanzi banjye banze ko mbabera umwami, nimubazane hano mubicire imbere yanjye.’»" 
Luke19:28 Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo abarangaza imbere, azamuka agana i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke19:29 Nuko agiye kugera i Betifage n’i Betaniya, hafi y’umusozi witwaga uw’Imizeti, yohereza babiri mu bigishwa be." 
Luke19:30 Arababwira ati «Nimujye mu ngo ziri imbere yanyu. Nimuhagera, murahasanga icyana cy’indogobe kiziritse, kitigeze kigira uwo giheka. Mukiziture, mukinzanire." 
Luke19:31 Nihagira ubabaza ati ’Murakiziturira iki?’ mumusubize muti ’Nyagasani aragikeneye.’» 
Luke19:32 Intumwa ziragenda, zisanga bimeze uko Yezu yabibabwiye." 
Luke19:33 Igihe bakikizitura, ba nyiracyo barababaza bati «Icyo cyana cy’indogobe murakiziturira iki?»" 
Luke19:34 Baravuga bati «Nyagasani aragikeneye.» 
Luke19:35 Nuko bakizanira Yezu. Bagereka ibishura byabo kuri cya cyana cy’indogobe, maze bicazaho Yezu." 
Luke19:36 Uko yagendaga, ni ko baramburaga imyambaro yabo mu nzira." 
Luke19:37 Ageze ahamanuka ku musozi w’Imizeti, abigishwa bose basagwa n’ibyishimo, batangira gusingiza Imana mu ijwi riranguruye kubera ibitangaza byose babonye." 
Luke19:38 Nuko batera hejuru bati «Nahabwe impundu Umwami uje mu izina rya Nyagasani! Amahoro mu ijuru, n’ikuzo mu bushorishori bwaryo!»" 
Luke19:39 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi bari muri rubanda, baravuga bati «Mwigisha, cecekesha abigishwa bawe!»" 
Luke19:40 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndabibabwiye: n’iyo aba baceceka, amabuye yo yasakuza!»" 
Luke19:41 Amaze kwegera umugi no kuwitegereza, arawuririra," 
Luke19:42 avuga ati «Ubonye uyu munsi iyo ugera waramenye icyaguhesha amahoro! Noneho rero byarakwihishe. 
Luke19:43 N’iminsi iragusatiriye, maze abanzi bawe bazakugote, bagutangatange, bakwagirize impande zose." 
Luke19:44 Bazakurimburana n’abana bawe bazaba bakurimo, kandi ntibazagusigira n’ibuye rigeretse ku rindi, kuko utamenye igihe Imana yakugendereyeho.»" 
Luke19:45 Hanyuma Yezu yinjira mu Ngoro y’Imana, atangira kuyirukanamo abacuruzi." 
Luke19:46 Arababwira ati «Haranditswe ngo: Inzu yanjye izaba inzu yo gusengeramo; naho mwebwe mwayigize ubuvumo bw’abambuzi.» 
Luke19:47 Buri munsi yigishirizaga mu Ngoro y'Imana. Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko, kimwe n’abakuru b’umuryango, bashaka ukuntu bamwicisha." 
Luke19:48 Nyamara ntibabona aho bamuturuka, kuko rubanda rwose bari bamuteze amatwi, bitaye cyane ku byo yavugaga." 
Luke20:1 Umunsi umwe, Yezu yigishirizaga abantu mu Ngoro, yamamaza Inkuru Nziza. Haza abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko, hamwe n’abakuru b’umuryango." 
Luke20:2 Baramubaza bati «Tubwire: ibyo ubikoresha bubasha ki? Ni nde waguhaye ubwo bubasha?» 
Luke20:3 Yezu araba subiza ati «Reka nanjye ngire icyo mbabaza. Ngaho nimumbwire: 
Luke20:4 batisimu ya Yohani yaturutse mu ijuru, cyangwa ku bantu?»" 
Luke20:5 Naho bo baribwira bati «Nituvuga ko yaturutse mu ijuru, aratubwira ati ’Mwabujijwe n’iki kumwemera?’" 
Luke20:6 Nituramuka tuvuze ko yaturutse ku bantu, rubanda rwose baradutera amabuye kuko bemera ko Yohani ari umuhanuzi.»" 
Luke20:7 Nuko basubiza ko batazi aho ituruka. 
Luke20:8 Yezu na we arababwira ati «Nanjye rero simbabwira aho nkura ububasha bwo gukora ibyo mubona.» 
Luke20:9 Yezu abwira rubanda uyu mugani, ati «Umuntu yateye imizabibu mu murima we, awatira abahinzi, maze yigira mu rugendo ruzamara igihe." 
Luke20:10 Igihe cy’isarura kigeze, yohereza umugaragu kuri ba bahinzi, kugira ngo bamumuhere ku mbuto z’imizabibu. Ariko abo bahinzi baramuhondagura, bamwohereza amara masa." 
Luke20:11 Arongera abatumaho undi mugaragu; uwo na we baramuhondagura, baramutukagura, maze bamwohereza amara masa." 
Luke20:12 Arongera yohereza uwa gatatu; we baramukomeretsa, kandi baramwirukana." 
Luke20:13 Nuko nyir’imizabibu aribwira ati ’Ndabigenza nte? Ngiye kohereza noneho umwana wanjye nkunda; ahari we nta cyo bazamutwara.’ 
Luke20:14 Ariko abahinzi bamubonye barabwirana bati ’Dore uzamuzungura; nimuze tumwice, maze tuzazungure ibye.’" 
Luke20:15 Nuko bamaze kumujugunya inyuma y’umurima w’imizabibu baramwica. Mbese murabona nyir’imizabibu azabagenza ate? 
Luke20:16 Azaza arimbure abo bahinzi, maze imizabibu ayishinge abandi.» Rubanda babyumvise, baravuga bati «Ibyo ntibikabe!»" 
Luke20:17 Nuko Yezu abahanga amaso, arababaza ati «Ibyanditswe ngo ’Ibuye ryajugunywe n’abubatsi ryabaye insanganyarukuta’ bivuga iki?" 
Luke20:18 Umuntu wese uzagwira iryo buye azamenagurika; n’uwo rizagwira rizamujanjagura.» 
Luke20:19 Abigishamategeko n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo bashaka uko bahita bamufata ako kanya, ariko batinya rubanda. Bari bumvise neza ko ari bo yavugaga muri uwo mugani." 
Luke20:20 Nuko batangira kumugenzura, maze bamwoherezaho ingenza, ziriyoberanya zigira nk’intungane, kugira ngo zimufatire mu magambo ye, maze bamugabize abategetsi n’umutware mukuru w’igihugu." 
Luke20:21 Baraza baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, tuzi ko uvuga ukuri kandi ukakwigisha; byongeye kandi nta we ubera, ahubwo wigisha inzira y’Imana mu kuri." 
Luke20:22 Ese twemerewe guha Kayizari umusoro, cyangwa si byo?»" 
Luke20:23 Ariko Yezu kuko yari azi uburyarya bwabo, arababwira ati" 
Luke20:24 «Nimunyereke igiceri. Iri shusho n’iri zina biriho ni ibya nde?» Baramusubiza bati «Ni ibya Kayizari.» 
Luke20:25 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Ibya Kayizari mubisubize Kayizari, n’iby’Imana mubisubize Imana!»" 
Luke20:26 Nuko babura uko bamufatira mu magambo imbere ya rubanda, baraceceka, basigara batangazwa n’amagambo yabashubije." 
Luke20:27 Nuko Abasaduseyi bamwe baramwegera, ba bandi bavuga ko kuzuka bitabaho." 
Luke20:28 Baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, dore Musa yatwandikiye iri tegeko ngo ’Umuntu napfa asize umugore batabyaranye, umuvandimwe we agomba gucyura uwo mugore, kugira ngo acikure nyakwigendera." 
Luke20:29 Habayeho rero abavandimwe barindwi; uwa mbere ashaka umugore maze apfa batabyaranye. 
Luke20:30 Uwa kabiri aramucyura," 
Luke20:31 n’uwa gatatu aramucyura kimwe n’abandi. Bose uko ari barindwi bapfa badasize abana. 
Luke20:32 Hanyuma wa mugore na we arapfa. 
Luke20:33 Ubwo se, igihe cy’izuka uwo mugore azaba uwa nde muri abo, ko bose bamutunze uko ari barindwi?»" 
Luke20:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ab’iyi ngoma ni bo bagira abagore cyangwa abagabo. 
Luke20:35 Naho abo Imana izasanga bakwiye kugira uruhare ku bugingo buzaza no kuzuka mu bapfuye, bo ntibazagira abagore cyangwa abagabo." 
Luke20:36 Ntibazaba bagipfuye ukundi, kuko bazaba bameze nk’abamalayika; babaye abana b’Imana koko babikesha ukuzuka." 
Luke20:37 Naho iby’izuka ry’abapfuye, Musa na we yabitwumvishije igihe yari yibereye imbere y’igihuru kigurumana, akita Nyagasani ngo ’Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, n’Imana ya Yakobo.’" 
Luke20:38 Nta bwo rero ari Imana y’abapfuye, ahubwo ni iy’abazima. Koko bose ni Yo babereyeho.»" 
Luke20:39 Abigishamategeko bamwe baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, uvuze neza.»" 
Luke20:40 Nuko baherukira aho ntibatinyuka kugira ikindi bamubaza. 
Luke20:41 Yezu na we arababaza ati «Bashobora bate kuvuga ko Kristu ari mwene Dawudi? 
Luke20:42 Kandi Dawudi ubwe mu gitabo cya Zaburi yaravuze ati ’Nyagasani yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye, ati: Icara iburyo bwanjye," 
Luke20:43 kugeza igihe abanzi bawe mbahindura imisego y’ibirenge byawe.’ 
Luke20:44 Uwo rero Dawudi yita Umutegetsi we, yaba umwana we ate?»" 
Luke20:45 Nuko abwira abigishwa be, rubanda rwose rwumva, ati" 
Luke20:46 «Murajye mwirinda abigishamategeko, bakunda gutembera bambaye amakanzu maremare, no kuramukirizwa mu materaniro; bakunda kandi guhabwa intebe z’icyubahiro mu masengero, n’imyanya y’imbere aho batumiwe." 
Luke20:47 Icyabo ni ukurya ingo z’abapfakazi, maze bakiha kuvuga amasengesho y’urudaca. Abo bazacirwa urubanza rukaze kurusha abandi!»" 
Luke21:1 Nuko Yezu yubura amaso, abona abakungu bashyiraga imfashanyo zabo mu bubiko bw’amaturo." 
Luke21:2 Abona n’umupfakazi w’umukene ashyiramo uduceri tubiri. 
Luke21:3 Nuko aravuga ati «Ndababwira ukuri: uriya mupfakazi w’umukene yarushije abandi gutura. 
Luke21:4 Kuko bariya bose bashyizemo amaturo avuye mu by’ikirenga, naho we yashyizemo ibyari bimutunze byose mu bukene bwe.»" 
Luke21:5 Kubera ko bamwe barataga uko Ingoro y’Imana itatse amabuye meza n’ibintu by’agaciro bari batuye, Yezu arababwira ati" 
Luke21:6 «Mu byo mureba byose hazaza igihe hatazagira ibuye risigara rigeretse ku rindi, byose bizasenywa.»" 
Luke21:7 Baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, ibyo bizaba ryari, kandi ikimenyetso cy’uko bigiye kuba kizaba ikihe?»" 
Luke21:8 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Muramenye ntihazagire ubayobya! Kuko hazaduka benshi bitwaje izina ryanjye, bavuga ngo ’Ni jyewe Kristu!’ kandi ngo ’Igihe kiregereje!’ Ntimuzabakurikire!" 
Luke21:9 Nimwumva bavuga intambara n’imidugararo, ntimuzakuke umutima. Ibyo bigomba kuba, ariko ntibizaba ari byo herezo.»" 
Luke21:10 Arongera arababwira ati «Igihugu kizahagurukira ikindi, ingoma ishyamirane n’indi." 
Luke21:11 Hazaba imitingito y’isi ikomeye, ahandi hatere ibyorezo n’inzara. Hazaba ibintu biteye ubwoba, n’ibimenyetso bikomeye biturutse ku ijuru." 
Luke21:12 Ariko mbere y’ibyo byose, bazabafata, babatoteze, babace mu masengero, babarohe mu buroko; bazabajyana imbere y’abami n’abatware, babaziza izina ryanjye." 
Luke21:13 Ibyo bizatuma mumbera abagabo. 
Luke21:14 Muzirinde guhagarika umutima mwibaza uko muziregura," 
Luke21:15 kuko ubwanjye nzabaha imvugo n’ubuhanga abanzi banyu batazashobora kurwanya cyangwa kuvuguruza. 
Luke21:16 Ndetse muzatangwa n’ababyeyi, n’abo muva inda imwe, na bene wanyu, n’incuti zanyu, bazicisha benshi muri mwe," 
Luke21:17 kandi muzangwa na bose muzira izina ryanjye. 
Luke21:18 Nyamara mumenye ko nta gasatsi na kamwe ko ku mutwe wanyu kazagira icyo kaba. 
Luke21:19 Mu bwiyumanganye bwanyu ni ho muzarokora ubuzima bwanyu! 
Luke21:20 Nuko rero nimubona Yeruzalemu ikikijwe n’ingabo, muzamenye ko isenywa ryayo ryegereje." 
Luke21:21 Icyo gihe, abazaba bari muri Yudeya bazahungire mu misozi, abazaba bari mu mugi imbere bazawuvemo, n’abazaba bari ku gasozi ntibazawugarukemo." 
Luke21:22 Kuko izaba ari iminsi y’igihano, maze ibyanditswe byose bizuzuzwe." 
Luke21:23 Hagowe abazaba batwite n’abazaba bonsa muri iyo minsi, kuko hazaba amakuba akomeye mu gihugu, n’uburakari bukaze kuri uyu muryango." 
Luke21:24 Bazicishwa ubugi bw’inkota, babajyane bunyago mu mahanga yose, kandi Yeruzalemu izaribatwa n’abanyamahanga, kugeza ubwo igihe cyagenewe abanyamahanga kizaba kirangiye." 
Luke21:25 Hazaba n’ibimenyetso mu zuba, mu kwezi, no mu nyenyeri, naho ku isi amahanga azakuka umutima kubera urusaku rw’inyanja n’imivumba yayo." 
Luke21:26 Abantu bazicwa n’ubwoba, bahagarike imitima bitewe n’amakuba azaba yadutse mu nsi, kuko ibikomeye byo mu ijuru bizahungabana." 
Luke21:27 Ni bwo rero bazabona Umwana w’umuntu aje mu bicu afite ububasha n’ikuzo ryinshi. 
Luke21:28 Ibyo byose nibitangira kuba, muzubure umutwe mukomere kuko uburokorwe bwanyu buzaba bwegereje.»" 
Luke21:29 Nuko abacira umugani ati «Nimwitegereze umutini n’ibindi biti. 
Luke21:30 Iyo birabije, mumenya ko igihe cy’imbuto cyegereje." 
Luke21:31 Namwe rero nimubona ibyo bibaye, muzamenye ko Ingoma y’Imana yegereje." 
Luke21:32 Ndababwira ukuri: iki gisekuru ntikizashira ibyo byose bitabaye. 
Luke21:33 Ijuru n’isi bizashira, ariko amagambo yanjye ntazashira." 
Luke21:34 Mwitonde rero, hato imitima yanyu itazatwarwa n’ubusambo, n’isindwe, n’uducogocogo tw’ubuzima, maze uwo munsi ukazabagwa gitumo." 
Luke21:35 Kuko uzatungura abatuye ku isi bose, nk’uko umutego ufata inyamaswa." 
Luke21:36 Mube maso kandi musenge igihe cyose, kugira ngo muzabone intege zo guhunga ibyo bintu byose bizaza, no kugira ngo muzashobore gutunguka mu maso y’Umwana w’umuntu.»" 
Luke21:37 Ku manywa Yezu yigishirizaga mu Ngoro, ariko nijoro akajya kurara ku musozi w’Imizeti." 
Luke21:38 Nuko mu gitondo cya kare, abantu bose bakamusanga mu Ngoro, kugira ngo bamwumve." 
Luke22:1 Umunsi mukuru wo kurya imigati idasembuye, witwa Pasika, wari wegereje." 
Luke22:2 Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko bashakaga aho bamuturuka ngo bamwice, ariko bagatinya rubanda." 
Luke22:3 Nuko Sekibi itaha muri Yuda Isikariyoti, umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri." 
Luke22:4 Aragenda ajya kubonana n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’abarinzi b’Ingoro, ngo barebere hamwe uko yamubagabiza." 
Luke22:5 Ngo babyumve barishima, maze bamusezeranya kuzamuha ikiguzi." 
Luke22:6 Aremera, asigara ashaka uko yamutanga, rubanda batabizi." 
Luke22:7 Nuko umunsi mukuru w’imigati idasembuye, ari na wo bagombaga kubagaho intama za Pasika, uragera." 
Luke22:8 Yezu atuma Petero na Yohani, arababwira ati «Nimujye kudutegurira Pasika kugira ngo tuyirye.»" 
Luke22:9 Baramubaza bati «Urashaka ko tujya kuyitegurira hehe?» 
Luke22:10 Arabasubiza ati «Mukigera mu murwa, murahura n’umuntu wikoreye ikibindi cy’amazi. Mumukurikire mu nzu ari bwinjiremo," 
Luke22:11 maze mubwire nyir’urugo, muti ’Umwigisha aravuze ngo: Icyumba cyanjye nza kuriramo Pasika hamwe n’abigishwa banjye kiri hehe?’" 
Luke22:12 Ari bubereke mu nzu yo hejuru icyumba kigari, gishashe neza; abe ari ho mutegura.»" 
Luke22:13 Nuko baragenda, maze basanga byose bimeze uko yabibabwiye, bategura Pasika." 
Luke22:14 Igihe kigeze, ajya ku meza hamwe n’intumwa ze," 
Luke22:15 maze arazibwira ati «Nifuje cyane gusangira namwe iyi Pasika, ntarababara." 
Luke22:16 Ndabibabwiye: nta bwo nzongera kuyirya, itaruzurizwa mu Ngoma y’Imana.»" 
Luke22:17 Nuko yakira inkongoro ya divayi bamuhereje, ashimira Imana maze arababwira ati «Nimwakire musangire." 
Luke22:18 Koko ndabibabwiye: sinzongera kunywa ukundi ku mbuto y’imizabibu, kugeza igihe Ingoma y’Imana izaba yaje.»" 
Luke22:19 Hanyuma afata n’umugati, ashimira Imana, arawumanyura, awubahereza avuga ati «Iki ni umubiri wanjye ubatangiwe; mujye mubikora namwe bibe urwibutso rwanjye.»" 
Luke22:20 Barangije kurya, n’inkongoro ayigenzereza atyo, avuga ati «Iyi ni inkongoro y’Isezerano rishya, rishingiye ku maraso yanjye abamenewe." 
Luke22:21 Nyamara ugiye kungambanira turiho turasangira. 
Luke22:22 Koko, Umwana w’umuntu aragiye, nk’uko byagenwe; ariko hagowe umuntu umutanze!»" 
Luke22:23 Ubwo batangira kubazanya ugiye gukora ibyo uwo ari we. 
Luke22:24 Nuko batangira kujya impaka ngo: umukuru muri bo yaba nde? 
Luke22:25 Arababwira ati «Abami batwara amahanga bayategeka uko bishakiye, n’abandi bayafiteho ubutegetsi bagakunda ko babita abagiraneza." 
Luke22:26 Kuri mwe rero, si ko bimeze. Ahubwo umukuru muri mwe nagenze nk’aho ari we muto, kandi umutware ahinduke umugaragu." 
Luke22:27 Ni ko se, umukuru ni uwuhe: uri ku meza, cyangwa ni uhereza? Si uwo se uri ku meza? Jyewe rero, ndi hagati yanyu nk’umuhereza!" 
Luke22:28 Mwebwe, muri abankomeyeho mu bigeragezo nagize." 
Luke22:29 Nanjye nabageneye Ingoma nk’uko Data yayingeneye," 
Luke22:30 kugira ngo muzarire kandi muzanywere ku meza yanjye mu Ngoma yanjye; kandi muzicare ku ntebe z’ubutware, mucire imanza imiryango cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli.»" 
Luke22:31 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati «Simoni, Simoni! Dore Sekibi yabasabye ngo abashungure nk’ingano," 
Luke22:32 ariko nagusabiye kugira ngo ukwemera kwawe kudatezuka. Nawe rero, numara kwisubiraho, uzakomeze abavandimwe bawe.»" 
Luke22:33 Aramusubiza ati «Mwigisha, niteguye kujyana nawe, badufunga cyangwa batwica!»" 
Luke22:34 Ariko we aramubwira ati «Yewe Petero, nkubwire: uyu munsi, isake ntiri bubike utaranyihakana gatatu ngo ntunzi.»" 
Luke22:35 Hanyuma arababwira ati «Igihe mbohereje nta gasaho k’ibiceri, nta mufuka, nta n’inkweto, ese hari icyo mwabuze?» Baramusubiza bati «Nta cyo.»" 
Luke22:36 Arababwira ati «Ubu noneho, ufite agasaho k’ibiceri nakajyane; n’ufite umufuka abigenze atyo; n’udafite inkota nagurishe igishura cye, maze ayigure." 
Luke22:37 Koko ndabibabwiye: ni ngombwa ko Ibyanditswe binyuzurizwaho ngo ’Yabariwe mu bagome.’ Koko rero ibinyerekeyeho bigiye kurangira.» 
Luke22:38 Baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, dore hano hari inkota ebyiri.» Arabasubiza ati «Birahagije!»" 
Luke22:39 Arasohoka, ajya ku musozi w’Imizeti nk’uko yari asanzwe abigenza, n’abigishwa baramukurikira." 
Luke22:40 Amaze kuhagera, arababwira ati «Nimwambaze, kugira ngo mutagwa mu bishuko.»" 
Luke22:41 Nuko arabitarura ajya ahareshya n’aho umuntu yatera ibuye; arapfukama, asenga agira ati" 
Luke22:42 «Dawe, ubishatse wakwigizayo iyi nkongoro! Ariko ntibibe uko nshaka, ahubwo bibe uko ubishaka.»" 
Luke22:43 Nuko umumalayika wo mu ijuru aramubonekera, aramukomeza." 
Luke22:44 Asambishwa n’agahinda, nyamara arushaho gusenga, abira ibyuya by’amaraso byatonyangiraga hasi." 
Luke22:45 Amaze kwambaza arahaguruka, asanga abigishwa be basinzirijwe n’agahinda." 
Luke22:46 Arababwira ati «Koko mwasinziriye? Nimuhaguruke maze mwambaze kugira ngo mutagwa mu bishuko!» 
Luke22:47 Akivuga ibyo, hatunguka igitero cy’abantu babanjirijwe n’uwitwa Yuda, umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri. Yegera Yezu kugira ngo amuhobere." 
Luke22:48 Yezu aramubwira ati «Yuda, ni koko utanze Umwana w’umuntu umusoma?»" 
Luke22:49 Abari bakikije Yezu, babonye ibigiye kuba, baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, turwanishe inkota se?»" 
Luke22:50 Nuko umwe muri bo ayikubita umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo mukuru, amuca ugutwi kw’iburyo." 
Luke22:51 Ariko Yezu arababwira ati «Nimusigeho!» Aherako amukora ku gutwi, aramukiza." 
Luke22:52 Hanyuma Yezu abwira abari bamuteye, ari bo batware b’abaherezabitambo, n’abakuru b’abarinzi b’Ingoro, n’abakuru b’umuryango, ati «Mwanteye mufite inkota n’ibibando nk’aho ndi igisambo." 
Luke22:53 Nyamara buri munsi nari kumwe namwe mu Ngoro, ntimwagira icyo munkoraho. Ariko ubu ni igihe cyanyu, cyo kwisunga umwijima.»" 
Luke22:54 Yezu bamufata ubwo, baramujyana bamwinjiza mu nzu y’umuherezabitambo mukuru. Naho Petero abakurikirira kure." 
Luke22:55 Bari bacanye umuriro mu gikari, barawukikiza barota, Petero na we akaba yari yicaranye na bo." 
Luke22:56 Nuko umuja amubonye yicaye ku ikome, aramwitegereza maze aravuga ati «N’uyu yari kumwe na we!»" 
Luke22:57 Ariko Petero ahakana, avuga ati «Wa mugore we, uwo muntu nta bwo muzi.»" 
Luke22:58 Hashize akanya undi amubonye, ati «Nawe, uri umwe muri bo!» Petero ati «Wa mugabo we, nta bwo ndi uwo muri bo.»" 
Luke22:59 Hashize nk’isaha, undi yemeza akomeje ati «Ni ukuri: n’uyu yari kumwe na we, ndetse ni n’Umunyagalileya!»" 
Luke22:60 Petero ati «Wa mugabo we, sinzi ibyo uvuga.» Muri ako kanya akivuga ibyo, isake irabika." 
Luke22:61 Nuko Nyagasani arakebuka, yitegereza Petero, maze Petero yibuka rya jambo Nyagasani yari yamubwiye ati «Uyu munsi, isake itarabika uraba wanyihakanye gatatu.»" 
Luke22:62 Nuko Petero asohoka arirana ishavu. 
Luke22:63 Ubwo abantu barindaga Yezu bamujyaho baramushinyagurira, bakanamukubita." 
Luke22:64 Bari bamupfutse mu maso, nuko bakamubaza bati «Ngaho fora: ni nde ugukubise?»" 
Luke22:65 Maze bamuhunda n’ibindi bitutsi byinshi. 
Luke22:66 Bumaze gucya, inama y’abakuru b’umuryango n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko iraterana, maze bahamagaza Yezu mu rukiko rwabo." 
Luke22:67 Baravuga bati «Niba uri Kristu, bitubwire!» Arabasubiza ati «Nimbibabwira ntimubyemera," 
Luke22:68 kandi nimbabaza ntimunsubiza. 
Luke22:69 Ariko guhera ubu, Umwana w’umuntu agiye kwicara iburyo bw’Imana Nyir’ububasha.»" 
Luke22:70 Nuko bose baravuga bati «Rero uri Umwana w’Imana!» Arabasubiza ati «Murabyivugiye: ndi we.» 
Luke22:71 Batera hejuru bati «Abagabo bandi ni ab’iki? Ubwacu turamwiyumviye!» 
Luke23:1 Hanyuma ikoraniro ryose rirahaguruka, bamujyana kwa Pilato."
