Luke23:2 Batangira kumurega bavuga bati «Twasanze uyu mugabo agandisha igihugu cyacu, akabuza gutanga umusoro wa Kayizari kandi akiyita Kristu Umwami.»" 
Luke23:3 Pilato aramubaza ati «Koko, uri umwami w’Abayahudi?» Aramusubiza ati «Urabyivugiye!»" 
Luke23:4 Pilato abwira abatware b’abaherezabitambo na rubanda, ati «Nta cyaha nsanganye uyu muntu cyatuma ahanwa.»" 
Luke23:5 Bo rero bahatiriza bavuga bati «Agomesha abantu, ari na ko yigisha muri Yudeya yose, yatangiriye mu Galileya none ageze ino.»" 
Luke23:6 Pilato abyumvise, abaza niba uwo muntu ari Umunyagalileya." 
Luke23:7 Amaze kumenya yuko atwarwa na Herodi, amwoherereza Herodi wari i Yeruzalemu muri iyo minsi." 
Luke23:8 Herodi abonye Yezu, arishima cyane kuko yahoraga yifuza kumubona, kubera ibyo yamwumvagaho. Ndetse yizeraga kumubona akora igitangaza." 
Luke23:9 Amubaza ibibazo byinshi, ariko Yezu ntiyagira icyo amusubiza." 
Luke23:10 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abigishamategeko bari aho bamurega byinshi. 
Luke23:11 Nuko Herodi, afatanyije n’abasirikare be, aramushinyagurira cyane, amuhindura urw’amenyo, hanyuma amwambika umwenda urabagirana, amusubiza atyo kwa Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Herodi na Pilato bahera ubwo baruzura, kandi mbere hose baziranaga." 
Luke23:13 Nuko Pilato akoranya abatware b’abaherezabitambo, abakuru b’umuryango na rubanda." 
Luke23:14 Arababwira ati «Mwanzaniye uyu muntu muvuga ko agandisha rubanda. Namubarije imbere yanyu, sinagira icyaha musangana mu byo mumurega." 
Luke23:15 Na Herodi ni uko, dore nguyu yamutugaruriye. Uyu muntu nta cyo yakoze gikwiye kumwicisha." 
Luke23:16 Rero ndamuhana, ubundi mureke agende.» (...)" 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Ariko bo basakuriza icyarimwe, bati «Uwo nguwo napfe! Uturekurire Barabasi!»" 
Luke23:19 Barabasi uwo akaba yari afungiwe imidugararo yadutse mu mugi no kuba yarishe umuntu. 
Luke23:20 Nuko Pilato wifuzaga kurekura Yezu, yongera kubabwira kwa kundi." 
Luke23:21 Ariko barushaho gusakuza bati «Mubambe, mubambe ku musaraba!»" 
Luke23:22 Pilato yongera kubabwira ubwa gatatu, ati «Ikibi uyu muntu yakoze ni ikihe? Nta cyo namusanganye gikwiye kumwicisha. Rero ndamuhana, ubundi mureke agende.»" 
Luke23:23 Ariko bo barushaho gusakabaka, bamusaba ngo abambwe, maze urusaku rwabo rurushaho kwiyongera." 
Luke23:24 Nuko Pilato yemeza ko icyo bashegeye gikorwa. 
Luke23:25 Abarekurira uwo basabaga, wari warafungiwe guteza imidugararo no kwica umuntu; naho Yezu aramubagabiza." 
Luke23:26 Igihe bamushoreye, baza gufatirana uwitwa Simoni w’i Sireni, wiviraga mu mirima ye; bamuhekesha umusaraba, agenda inyuma ya Yezu awumutwaje." 
Luke23:27 Yezu yari akurikiwe n’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu, barimo abagore baborogaga bamuririra." 
Luke23:28 Bigeze aho Yezu arabakebuka maze arababwira ati «Bakobwa b’i Yeruzalemu, mwindirira ahubwo nimwiririre mwe n’abana banyu!" 
Luke23:29 Dore hagiye kuza igihe bazavuga bati ’Hahirwa ingumba n’inda zitabyaye, n’amabere atonkeje.’" 
Luke23:30 Icyo gihe bazinginga imisozi ngo ’Nimuturidukireho’ n’utununga ngo ’Nimudutwikire.’ 
Luke23:31 None se niba bagiriye batya igiti kibisi, icyumye bazakigenzereza bate?»" 
Luke23:32 Bari bashoreye n’abandi babiri b’abagiranabi, bagira ngo babicire hamwe na we." 
Luke23:33 Nuko bageze ahantu hitwa ku Kibihanga, barahamubamba hamwe na ba bagiranabi, umwe iburyo undi ibumoso." 
Luke23:34 Nuko Yezu yambaza avuga ati «Dawe, bababarire, kuko batazi icyo bakora.» Hanyuma bigabanya imyambaro ye, bayikoreyeho ubufindo." 
Luke23:35 Rubanda baguma aho bamurebera, abatware bo bakamunnyega bavuga bati «Yakijije abandi, ngaho na we niyikize, niba ari Kristu Intore y’Imana!»" 
Luke23:36 Abasirikare na bo bakamukwena, maze baramwegera bamuhereza divayi irura," 
Luke23:37 bavuga bati «Niba uri umwami w’Abayahudi, ngaho ikize ubwawe!»" 
Luke23:38 Hejuru ye hari handitse itangazo ngo «Uyu ni umwami w’Abayahudi.» 
Luke23:39 Umwe mu bagiranabi bari babambanywe na we yaramutukaga, avuga ati «Harya si wowe Kristu? Ngaho ikize ubwawe, natwe udukize!»" 
Luke23:40 Ariko mugenzi we amucyaha avuga ati «Mbese ntutinya Imana, wowe waciriwe rumwe na we!" 
Luke23:41 Twebwe turazira ukuri, turaryozwa ibibi twakoze; naho we nta kibi yakoze.»" 
Luke23:42 Arongera ati «Yezu, uranyibuke, igihe uzazira kwima Ingoma yawe.»" 
Luke23:43 Yezu ni ko kumusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri: uyu munsi uraba uri kumwe nanjye mu ihirwe ry’Imana.» 
Luke23:44 Hari nko ku isaha ya gatandatu, maze ku isi yose hacura umwijima, izuba rirazima bigeza ku isaha ya cyenda." 
Luke23:45 Umubambiko wo mu Ngoro utanyukamo kabiri. 
Luke23:46 Nuko Yezu arangurura ijwi ati «Dawe, nshyize ubuzima bwanjye mu maboko yawe.» Amaze kuvuga atyo araca." 
Luke23:47 Umutware w’abasirikare abonye ibyo bibaye, asingiza Imana avuga, ati «Koko uriya muntu yari intungane.»" 
Luke23:48 Abantu bose bari bahururiye kureba ibyabaye, babonye ibimaze kuba, bikubura bataha bikubita ku gituza." 
Luke23:49 Abamenyi ba Yezu bose bari bahagaze ahitaruye, hamwe na ba bagore bari baturutse mu Galileya bamuherekeje, bakomeza kubyitegereza." 
Luke23:50 Nuko hagoboka umugabo witwa Yozefu, umwe mu bagize Inama Nkuru, akaba umuntu w’imico myiza kandi w’intungane." 
Luke23:51 We ntiyari yemeye imigambi mibi ya bagenzi be n’ibyo bari barakoze. Yakomokaga ahitwa Arimatiya, umugi wo muri Yudeya, kandi akaba yari ategereje kubona Ingoma y’Imana." 
Luke23:52 Nuko asanga Pilato, amusaba umurambo wa Yezu." 
Luke23:53 Awumanura ku musaraba, awuzingiraho umwenda, maze awushyingura mu mva yari yacukuwe mu rutare, itigeze igira uyihambwamo." 
Luke23:54 Wari umunsi w’umwiteguro wabanzirizaga isabato. 
Luke23:55 Abagore bari bavanye na Yezu mu Galileya, bakurikira Yozefu; bitegereza imva n’ukuntu bari bashyizemo umurambo we." 
Luke23:56 Nuko barataha bajya gutegura imibavu n’ibindi bihumura. Maze ku isabato bararuhuka nk’uko byari bitegetswe. 
Luke24:1 Ku wa mbere ukurikira isabato, mu museso wa kare, abagore bajya ku mva bajyanye imibavu bari bateguye." 
Luke24:2 Basanga ibuye ryakingaga imva rihirikiye ku ruhande. 
Luke24:3 Ariko binjiye, ntibabona umurambo wa Nyagasani Yezu." 
Luke24:4 Barumirwa, bayoberwa ibyo ari byo; nuko abagabo babiri babahagarara imbere, bambaye imyenda ibengerana." 
Luke24:5 Abo bagore bashya ubwoba bubika amaso; ba bagabo ni ko kubabwira bati «Ni kuki mushakira umuzima mu bapfuye? 
Luke24:6 Ntari hano, ahubwo yazutse. Nimwibuke uko yababwiye akiri mu Galileya," 
Luke24:7 ngo ’Umwana w’umuntu agomba kugabizwa amaboko y’abanyabyaha, akabambwa kandi akazuka ku munsi wa gatatu.’»" 
Luke24:8 Nuko abagore bibuka ayo magambo ye. 
Luke24:9 Bavuye ku mva, bajya kubitekerereza ba Cumi n’umwe n’abandi bose." 
Luke24:10 Hari Mariya Madalena, na Yohana, na Mariya nyina wa Yakobo. N’abandi bagore bari kumwe na bo, ni ko babwiraga intumwa." 
Luke24:11 Ariko amagambo yabo bayita uburondogozi, ntibabemera." 
Luke24:12 Nyamara Petero we arahaguruka, yiruka ajya ku mva. Yunamye, abona udutambaro twonyine. Nuko asubira imuhira, atangazwa cyane n’ibyari byabaye." 
Luke24:13 Kuri uwo munsi nyine, babiri mu bigishwa bajyaga mu rusisiro rwitwa Emawusi; kuva i Yeruzalemu kugerayo hari urugendo rw’amasaha nk’abiri." 
Luke24:14 Bagendaga baganira ibyari bimaze kuba byose. 
Luke24:15 Igihe rero bakibivugana kandi babyibazaho, Yezu ubwe arabegera ajyana na bo." 
Luke24:16 Ariko amaso yabo yari ameze nk’ahumye, ntibamumenya." 
Luke24:17 Yezu arababwira ati «Ese ibyo mugenda muvugana ni ibiki?» Baherako barahagarara, ariko bijimye mu maso." 
Luke24:18 Umwe muri bo witwaga Kiliyofasi, aramubaza ati «Ni wowe wenyine uba i Yeruzalemu utazi ibyahabaye muri iyi minsi?»" 
Luke24:19 Arababaza ati «Ni ibiki se?» Baramusubiza bati «Ni ibyabaye kuri Yezu w’i Nazareti, wari waragaragaje mu bikorwa no mu magambo ko ari umuhanuzi ukomeye imbere y’Imana n’imbere ya rubanda." 
Luke24:20 Twavuganaga n’ukuntu abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru bacu bamutanze ngo apfe, maze bakamubamba ku musaraba." 
Luke24:21 Twebweho, twari twizeye ko ari we uzarokora Israheli; none dore uyu munsi ubaye uwa gatatu ibyo byose bibaye." 
Luke24:22 Icyakora bamwe mu bagore b’iwacu badutangaje. Mu gitondo cya kare bagiye ku mva," 
Luke24:23 maze ntibahasanga umurambo we, nuko bagaruka bavuga ko abamalayika bababonekeye, bakababwira ko ari muzima." 
Luke24:24 Ubundi kandi bamwe muri twe bagiye ku mva babisanga uko abagore bari babivuze, ariko we ntibamubona.»" 
Luke24:25 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Mwa biburabwenge mwe, mutinda kwemera ibyo Abahanuzi bavuze!" 
Luke24:26 None se Kristu ntiyagombaga kubabara atyo ngo abone kwinjira mu ikuzo rye?» 
Luke24:27 Nuko ahera kuri Musa n’Abahanuzi bose, maze abasobanurira ibimwerekeyeho biri mu Bitabo bitagatifu." 
Luke24:28 Bageze hafi y’urusisiro bajyagamo, Yezu asa n’uwikomereza urugendo." 
Luke24:29 Ariko bo baramwinginga bati «Gumana natwe kuko bugorobye, umunsi ukaba uciye ikibu.» Nuko arinjira, kugira ngo agumane na bo." 
Luke24:30 Igihe rero yari ku meza hamwe na bo, afata umugati, ashimira Imana, arawumanyura, arawubahereza." 
Luke24:31 Nuko amaso yabo arahumuka noneho baramumenya. Hanyuma agira atya arazimira, ntibongera kumubona." 
Luke24:32 Basigara babwirana bati «Mbega ukuntu imitima yacu yari yuzuye ibinezaneza igihe yatuganirizaga mu nzira, adusobanurira Ibyanditswe!»" 
Luke24:33 Ako kanya barahaguruka basubira i Yeruzalemu. Bahasanga ba Cumi n’umwe bateranye, bari kumwe na bagenzi babo bandi," 
Luke24:34 bavuga bati «Ni koko! Nyagasani yazutse kandi yabonekeye Simoni!» 
Luke24:35 Na bo rero babatekerereza uko byagenze mu nzira, n’uburyo bamumenye amanyura umugati." 
Luke24:36 Igihe bakivuga ibyo, Yezu ubwe aba nguyu ahagaze hagati yabo, arababwira ati «Nimugire amahoro.»" 
Luke24:37 Barakangarana, bashya ubwoba, bakeka ko babonye umuzimu." 
Luke24:38 Nuko arababwira ati «Ubwo bwoba bwose mufite ni ubw’iki? Kandi mutewe n’iki gushidikanya mu mitima yanyu? 
Luke24:39 Nimurebe ibiganza n’ibirenge byanjye: ni jyewe ubwanjye. Nimunkoreho, maze mumenye ko umuzimu atagira umubiri cyangwa amagufwa nk’uko muruzi mbifite.»" 
Luke24:40 Avuga ibyo abereka ibiganza n’ibirenge bye. 
Luke24:41 Uko bakamazwe n’ibyishimo ntibanyurwa, baba abo gutangara gusa; noneho arababwira ati «Hari icyo kurya mufite hano?»" 
Luke24:42 Bamuhereza igice cy’ifi yokeje; 
Luke24:43 aracyakira, akirira imbere yabo." 
Luke24:44 Nuko arababwira ati «Ibyo ni byo nababwiraga nkiri kumwe namwe, nti ’Ni ngombwa ko huzuzwa ibinyerekeyeho byose byanditswe mu mategeko ya Musa, mu bitabo by’Abahanuzi no muri Zaburi.’»" 
Luke24:45 Aherako ahugura ubwenge bwabo ngo bajye bumva Ibyanditswe. 
Luke24:46 Maze arababwira ati «Handitswe ko Kristu agomba kubabara, maze ku munsi wa gatatu akazuka mu bapfuye," 
Luke24:47 kandi ko uhereye i Yeruzalemu abantu bo mu mahanga yose bagomba kwigishwa, mu izina rye, ibyerekeye ukwisubiraho n’ibabarirwa ry’ibyaha." 
Luke24:48 Ibyo ni mwe bagabo bashinzwe kubihamya. 
Luke24:49 Jyeweho ngiye kuboherereza icyo Data yasezeranye. Mwebwe rero, nimube mugumye mu murwa kugeza igihe muzasenderezwa imbaraga zivuye mu ijuru.»" 
Luke24:50 Hanyuma abajyana ahagana i Betaniya, maze arambura amaboko abaha umugisha." 
Luke24:51 Igihe akibaha umugisha, atandukana na bo ajyanwa mu ijuru." 
Luke24:52 Bamaze kumupfukamira, bagarukana ibyishimo byinshi i Yeruzalemu." 
Luke24:53 Nuko bagahora mu Ngoro basingiza Imana. 
John1:1 Mu ntangiriro ya byose Jambo yariho, kandi Jambo yabanaga n’Imana, kandi Jambo akaba Imana." 
John1:2 Ubwe mu ntangiriro yabanaga n’Imana. 
John1:3 Ni we ibintu byose bikesha kubaho, nta n’ikiremwa na kimwe cyabayeho bitamuturutseho." 
John1:4 Yari asanzwe yifitemo ubugingo, kandi ubwo bugingo bukaba urumuri rw’abantu." 
John1:5 Nuko urumuri rumurika mu mwijima, ariko umwijima wanga kurwakira." 
John1:6 Habayeho rero umuntu woherejwe n’Imana, izina rye rikaba Yohani." 
John1:7 Yazanywe no kuba umugabo wo guhamya iby’urwo rumuri, kugira ngo bose bamukeshe kwemera." 
John1:8 Si we wari urumuri, ahubwo yari umugabo uhamya iby’urwo rumuri." 
John1:9 Jambo ni we wari urumuri nyakuri, rumurikira umuntu wese uza kuri iyi si." 
John1:10 Yari mu isi, kandi isi yabayeho ku bwe, ariko isi irarenga ntiyamumenya." 
John1:11 Yaje mu bye, ariko abe ntibamwakira." 
John1:12 Nyamara abamwakiriye bose, yabahaye ububasha bwo guhinduka abana b’Imana, abo ni abemera Izina rye." 
John1:13 Ntibavutse ku bw’amaraso cyangwa ku bushake bw’umubiri, cyangwa se ku bushake bw’umuntu, ahubwo bavutse ku bw’Imana." 
John1:14 Nuko Jambo yigira umuntu maze abana natwe, kandi twibonera ikuzo rye, ikuzo Umwana w’ikinege akomora kuri Se, akaba asendereye ubuntu n’ukuri." 
John1:15 Yohani yabaye umugabo wo guhamya ibimwerekeyeho, maze arangurura ijwi avuga ati «Nguyu Uwo navuze nti ’Uje ankurikiye, aranduta, kuko yariho mbere yanjye.’»" 
John1:16 Kandi twese twahawe ku busendere bwe, tugirirwa ubuntu bugeretse ku bundi." 
John1:17 Uko Amategeko yatanzwe anyuze kuri Musa, ni na ko ubuntu n’ukuri byatugejejweho binyujijwe kuri Yezu Kristu." 
John1:18 Nta wigeze abona Imana na rimwe; Umwana w’ikinege uba muri Se, ni We wayimenyekanishije." 
John1:19 Dore ubuhamya bwa Yohani igihe Abayahudi b’i Yeruzalemu bamutumyeho abaherezabitambo n’Abalevi kumubaza ngo «Uri nde?» 
John1:20 Yohani yaremeje ntiyahakana, ahamya agira ati «Sindi Kristu.»" 
John1:21 Na bo baramubaza bati «Bite se? Uzabe uri Eliya?» Arabasubiza ati «Sindi we.» — «Uzabe se uri wa Muhanuzi ugomba kuza?» Arabasubiza ati «Oya.» 
John1:22 Baramubwira bati «Rwose uri nde, kugira ngo tugire icyo dusubiza abadutumye. Wibwira ko uri nde?»" 
John1:23 Arabasubiza ati «Ndi ijwi ry’uvugira mu butayu aranguruye ati ’Nimutunganye inzira ya Nyagasani’, nk’uko umuhanuzi Izayi yabivuze.»" 
John1:24 Abari batumwe bari abo mu Bafarizayi. 
John1:25 Bongera kumubaza bati «None se ko ubatiza, kandi utari Kristu, ntube Eliya, ntube na wa Muhanuzi, ubiterwa n’iki?»" 
John1:26 Yohani arabasubiza ati «Jyewe mbatiriza mu mazi, ariko hagati yanyu hari Uwo mutazi." 
John1:27 Ni we ugiye kuza ankurikiye; sinkwiye no gupfundura umushumi w’inkweto ze.» 
John1:28 Ibyo byabereye i Betaniya, hakurya ya Yorudani, aho Yohani yabatirizaga." 
John1:29 Bukeye, Yohani abona Yezu aje amusanga, aravuga ati «Dore Ntama w’Imana ugiye gukuraho icyaha cy’isi." 
John1:30 Ni we navugaga ngira nti ’Ngiye gukurikirwa n’umuntu unduta, kuko yariho mbere yanjye.’" 
John1:31 Jye sinari muzi, ariko kugira ngo agaragarizwe Israheli, naje mbatiriza mu mazi.»" 
John1:32 Nuko Yohani ahamya avuga ati «Nabonye Roho amanuka nk’inuma ivuye mu ijuru, maze amuguma hejuru." 
John1:33 Koko jye sinari muzi, ariko Uwanyohereje kubatiriza mu mazi, yarambwiye ati ’Uwo uzabona Roho amumanukiraho kandi akamuhama hejuru, ni we ubwe ubatiza muri Roho Mutagatifu.’" 
John1:34 Naramwiboneye ubwanjye kandi ndahamya ko ari we Mwana w’Imana.» 
John1:35 Bukeye, Yohani yari akiri aho, ari kumwe na babiri mu bigishwa be." 
John1:36 Abonye Yezu ahise, aravuga ati «Dore Ntama w’Imana.»" 
John1:37 Ba bigishwa be bombi bumvise avuze atyo, bakurikira Yezu." 
John1:38 Yezu arahindukira, abona bamukurikiye, arababaza ati «Murashaka iki?» Baramusubiza bati «Rabbi (ibyo bivuga ngo Mwigisha), utuye he?»" 
John1:39 Arababwira ati «Nimuze murebe.» Baraza babona aho atuye. Nuko uwo munsi bagumana na we. Hari nk’igihe cy’isaha ya cumi. 
John1:40 Andereya, mwene nyina wa Simoni Petero, yari umwe muri abo babiri bari bumvise amagambo ya Yohani, bagakurikira Yezu." 
John1:41 Aza guhura mbere na mwene nyina Simoni, aramubwira ati «Twabonye Kristu» (ari byo kuvuga Umukiza)." 
John1:42 Nuko amugeza kuri Yezu. Yezu aramwitegereza, aramubwira ati «Uri Simoni, mwene Yohani; none kuva ubu uzitwa Kefasi, ari byo kuvuga ""Urutare""." 
John1:43 Bukeye bwaho, Yezu yemeza kujya mu Galileya; aza guhura na Filipo, aramubwira ati «Nkurikira.»" 
John1:44 Filipo yari uw’i Betsayida, umugi wa Andereya na Petero." 
John1:45 Filipo na we aza guhura na Natanayeli, aramubwira ati «Wa wundi wanditswe mu Mategeko ya Musa no mu Bahanuzi, twamubonye: ni Yezu w’i Nazareti, mwene Yozefu.»" 
John1:46 Nuko Natanayeli aramubwira ati «Hari ikintu cyiza cyaturuka i Nazareti?» Filipo aramusubiza, ati «Ngwino wirebere.»" 
John1:47 Yezu abonye Natanayeli aje amugana, aravuga ati «Dore Umuyisraheli w’ukuri utarangwaho uburyarya.»" 
John1:48 Natanayeli aramubwira ati «Unzi ute?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Filipo ataraguhamagara, uri mu nsi y’igiti cy’umutini, nakubonaga.»" 
John1:49 Natanayeli aramusubiza ati «Rabbi, koko uri Umwana w’Imana, uri Umwami wa Israheli.»" 
John1:50 Yezu aramubwira ati «Wemejwe n’uko nkubwiye ngo nakubonye uri mu nsi y’umutini; uzabona ibitambutse ibyo ngibyo.» 
John1:51 Arongera aramubwira ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: muzabona ijuru rikinguye n’abamalayika b’Imana bazamuka kandi bamanuka hejuru y’Umwana w’umuntu.» 
John2:1 Ku munsi wa gatatu, i Kana mu Galileya bacyuza ubukwe. Nyina wa Yezu yari yabutashye." 
John2:2 Kandi Yezu n’abigishwa be bari babutumiwemo. 
John2:3 Divayi imaze gushira, nyina wa Yezu aramubwira ati «Nta divayi bagifite.»" 
John2:4 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Mubyeyi, ari jye ari nawe, ibyo tubigenzemo dute? Byongeye igihe cyanjye ntikiragera.»" 
John2:5 Nyina abwira abaherezaga, ati «Icyo ababwira cyose mugikore.»" 
John2:6 Hari hateretse intango esheshatu zibaje mu mabuye, zagenewe imihango y’Abayahudi yo kwiyuhagira. Intango yose yajyagamo incuro ebyiri cyangwa eshatu z’ikibindi." 
John2:7 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimwuzuze amazi izo ntango.» Barazisendereza kugeza ku rugara. 
John2:8 Yezu arongera, arababwira ati «Ngaho noneho nimudahe, mushyire umutegeka w’ubukwe.» Baramushyira." 
John2:9 Umutegeka w’ubukwe amaze gusogongera ku mazi yahindutse divayi, atazi aho iyo divayi iturutse, abahereza bari bavomye bo bari bahazi, nuko ahamagara umukwe," 
John2:10 aramubwira ati «Ubusanzwe umuntu arabanza agatereka inzoga nziza, bamara guhaga, agaheruka itari nziza. Wowe ariko wakomeje gutereka inziza kugeza ubu!»" 
John2:11 Aho i Kana mu Galileya ni ho Yezu yatangiye ikimenyetso cye cya mbere, maze agaragaza ikuzo rye, nuko abigishwa be baramwemera." 
John2:12 Ibyo birangiye, Yezu amanuka ajya i Kafarinawumu ari kumwe na nyina n’abavandimwe be n’abigishwa be, nuko bahamara iminsi mikeya." 
John2:13 Pasika y’Abayahudi yari yegereje; Yezu azamuka ajya i Yeruzalemu. 
John2:14 Asanga mu Ngoro y’Imana hari abantu bahagurira ibimasa, n’intama, n’inuma, n’abicaye bavunja ibiceri." 
John2:15 Nuko aboha imigozi mo ikiboko bakubitisha, bose abasuka hanze y’Ingoro, yirukanamo n’intama, n’ibimasa; anyanyagiza ibiceri by’abavunjaga, ahirika n’ameza yabo." 
John2:16 Abwira abacuruzaga inuma, ati «Nimuzikure aha ngaha; inzu ya Data mwiyigira inzu y’ubucuruzi!»" 
John2:17 Nuko abigishwa be bibuka ko handitswe ngo «Ishyaka mfitiye Ingoro yawe riramparanya.» 
John2:18 Nuko Abayahudi baramubaza bati «Utanze kimenyetso ki gitumye wiha kugira utyo?» 
John2:19 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nimusenye iyi Ngoro y'Imana, mu minsi itatu nzaba nongeye kuyubaka.»" 
John2:20 Abayahudi baramubwira bati «Kubaka iyi Ngoro y'Imana byamaze imyaka mirongo ine n’itandatu, none wowe ngo wayihagarika mu minsi itatu?»" 
John2:21 Iyo Ngoro y'Imana Yezu yavugaga, yari umubiri we." 
John2:22 Amaze kuzuka, ava mu bapfuye, abigishwa be bibutse ko yari yarabivuze, nuko bemera Ibyanditswe, bemera n’ijambo Yezu yari yaravuze." 
John2:23 Igihe yari i Yeruzalemu mu minsi mikuru ya Pasika, abantu benshi babonye ibimenyetso yatangaga, bemera izina rye." 
John2:24 Nyamara Yezu ubwe ntiyabizeraga, kuko yari abazi bose," 
John2:25 kandi ntiyari akeneye umuntu wo kumubwira ikiri muri muntu, kuko ubwe asanzwe azi imigambi ya buri muntu." 
John3:1 Mu Bafarizayi, hari umugabo witwaga Nikodemu, akaba umwe mu Bayahudi b’abategetsi." 
John3:2 Nuko aza nijoro asanga Yezu, aramubwira ati «Rabbi, tuzi ko uri umwigisha waturutse ku Mana; kuko nta muntu washobora gutanga ibimenyetso nk’ibyo werekana, atari kumwe n’Imana.»" 
John3:3 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: nta muntu n’umwe ushobora kubona Ingoma y’Imana, atavutse ubwa kabiri.»" 
John3:4 Nikodemu aramubwira ati «Umuntu ashobora ate kuvuka, kandi ashaje? Yashobora se gusubira mu nda ya nyina ngo yongere avuke?»" 
John3:5 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndakubwira ukuri koko: umuntu atavutse ku bw’amazi no ku bwa Roho, ntashobora kwinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana." 
John3:6 Icyavutse ku mubiri kiba ari umubiri, n’icyavutse kuri Roho kikaba roho." 
John3:7 Ntutangazwe n’uko nkubwiye ngo ugomba kongera kuvuka ubwa kabiri. 
John3:8 Umuyaga uhuha werekeza aho ushaka, ukawumva uhuha, ariko ntumenye aho uturuka cyangwa aho werekeza; nguko uko bimerera umuntu wese wavutse kuri Roho.»" 
John3:9 Nikodemu aramubaza ati «Ese ibyo bishobora kubaho bite?» 
John3:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ukaba umwigisha muri Israheli, maze ibyo ntubimenye?" 
John3:11 Ndakubwira ukuri koko: tuvuga ibyo tuzi, tugahamya n’ibyo twabonye, ariko ntimwemere ibyo duhamya." 
John3:12 Niba mutemera mbabwira ibintu byo mu isi, muzemera mute nimbabwira ibyo mu ijuru?" 
John3:13 Nta wigeze azamuka ajya mu ijuru, uretse Umwana w’umuntu wamanutse aturutse mu ijuru." 
John3:14 Mbese nk’uko Musa yamanitse inzoka mu butayu, ni ko n’Umwana w’umuntu azagomba kumanikwa," 
John3:15 kugira ngo umwemera wese agire ubugingo bw’iteka.» 
John3:16 Koko Imana yakunze isi cyane, bigeza aho itanga Umwana wayo w’ikinege, igira ngo umwemera wese atazacibwa, ahubwo agire ubugingo bw’iteka." 
John3:17 Icyakora, Imana ntiyohereje Umwana wayo ku isi ngo ayicire urubanza, ahubwo yagira ngo akize isi." 
John3:18 Umwemera wese ntacirwa urubanza, ariko utemera aba yaciriwe urubanza, kuko atemera izina ry’Umwana w’ikinege w’Imana." 
John3:19 Dore urwo rubanza urwo ari rwo: ni uko urumuri rwaje mu isi, abantu bakikundira umwijima kuruta urumuri, kuko ibikorwa byabo byari bibi." 
John3:20 Koko rero ukora ibibi wese, yanga urumuri kandi ntarwegere, agira ngo ibyo akora bitagaragara." 
John3:21 Naho rero ukora iby’ukuri, ajya ahabona, agira ngo agaragaze ko ibyo akora biba bikorewe Imana." 
John3:22 Ibyo birangiye, Yezu ajyana n’abigishwa be mu gihugu cya Yudeya, agumanayo na bo, kandi arabatiza." 
John3:23 Yohani na we yabatirizaga ahitwa Enoni, hafi ya Salimu, kuko hari amazi menshi, abantu bakaza kuhabatirizwa." 
John3:24 Icyo gihe, Yohani yari atarafungwa." 
John3:25 Nuko abigishwa ba Yohani bajya impaka n’Abayahudi bapfa umuhango wo kwiyuhagira. 
John3:26 Basanga Yohani, baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, wa muntu mwari kumwe hakurya ya Yorudani, ugatanga ubuhamya bumwerekeyeho, dore na we arabatiza, kandi bose baramusanga.»" 
John3:27 Yohani arabasubiza ati «Nta muntu ugira icyo atunga atagihawe no mu ijuru. 
John3:28 Ni mwe ntanzeho abagabo b’uko navuze ko ntari Kristu, ahubwo ko natumwe kumuteguriza." 
John3:29 Umukwe ni we nyir’umugeni, naho umuherekeza w’umukwe aba iruhande rwe, akamutega amatwi, agahimbazwa no kumva ijwi rye; ngibyo ibyishimo binsabye." 
John3:30 Koko ni we ugomba gukura, naho jye ngaca bugufi.»" 
John3:31 Uza aturutse hejuru, aba asumbye bose; naho uza aturutse mu isi, aba ari uw’isi, kandi avuga iby’isi. Uza aturutse mu ijuru aza asumbye bose;" 
John3:32 ahamya ibyo yabonye n’ibyo yumvise, nyamara nta muntu n’umwe wakira ibyo ahamya." 
John3:33 Uwakira ibyo ahamya, aba yemeza ko Imana ari Inyakuri." 
John3:34 Uwo Imana yatumye, avuga amagambo y’Imana, kuko Imana itamuha Roho wayo imugerera." 
John3:35 Imana Data ikunda Mwana, kandi ibintu byose yabishyize mu maboko ye." 
John3:36 Uwemera Mwana agira ubugingo bw’iteka, uwanga kwemera Mwana ntazagira ubugingo, ahubwo uburakari bw’Imana bumuhoraho." 
John4:1 Yezu amaze kumenya ko Abafarizayi bari bumvise ko afite abigishwa benshi, ko yabatizaga kurusha Yohani," 
John4:2 — mu by’ukuri si Yezu wabatizaga, ahubwo ni abigishwa be —" 
John4:3 ni bwo avuye mu Yudeya, asubira mu Galileya;" 
John4:4 yagombaga rero kwambukiranya Samariya. 
John4:5 Agera mu mugi wo muri Samariya witwaga Sikari, wari hafi y’umurima Yakobo yari yarahaye umuhungu we Yozefu." 
John4:6 Aho hantu hari iriba rya Yakobo. Yezu ahagera yananijwe n’urugendo, maze yicara iruhande rw’iriba. Hari nk’isaha ya gatandatu." 
John4:7 Nuko umugore wo kuri Samariya aza kuvoma amazi. Yezu aramubwira ati «Mpa amazi yo kunywa.» 
John4:8 Icyo gihe abigishwa be bari bagiye mu mugi kugura ibyo kurya. 
John4:9 Umunyasamariyakazi abwira Yezu, ati «Bishoboka bite kugira ngo wowe w’Umuyahudi unsabe amazi yo kunywa, kandi ndi Umunyasamariyakazi?» Koko rero Abayahudi ntibasangiraga n’Abanyasamariya." 
John4:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Iyaba wari uzi ingabire y’Imana, ukamenya n’ukubwira ati ’Mpa amazi yo kunywa’, wajyaga kuyamusaba ari wowe, maze akaguha amazi atanga ubugingo.»" 
John4:11 Umugore aramubwira ati «Nyakubahwa, ntufite n’icyo uvomesha, byongeye kandi iriba ni rirerire cyane; ayo mazi atanga ubugingo wayakura he?" 
John4:12 Uzabe uruta umubyeyi wacu Yakobo waduhaye iri riba, akarinyweraho, we n’abana be n’amatungo ye?»" 
John4:13 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Unywa aya mazi wese azongera agire inyota; 
John4:14 ariko uzanywa amazi nzamuha, ntazagira inyota ukundi, ahubwo amazi nzamuha, azamubamo ari isoko idudubiza kugera mu bugingo bw’iteka.»" 
John4:15 Umugore aramubwira, ati «Nyakubahwa, mpa kuri ayo mazi n’ejo ntazongera kugira inyota, nkagaruka hano nje kuvoma.»" 
John4:16 Yezu aramubwira ati «Jya guhamagara umugabo wawe, maze ugaruke hano.»" 
John4:17 Umugore aramusubiza ati «Nta mugabo mfite.» Yezu ati «Uvuze neza, wowe ugize uti ’Nta mugabo mfite’;" 
John4:18 kuko wagize abagabo batanu, n’ugutunze ubu akaba atari umugabo wawe. Ubivuze ukuri.»" 
John4:19 Umugore abwira Yezu ati «Nyakubahwa, mbonye ko uri umuhanuzi." 
John4:20 Ba sogokuruza bacu basengeraga kuri uyu musozi, naho mwebwe Abayahudi mukavuga ko i Yeruzalemu ari ho abantu bagomba gusengera.»" 
John4:21 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mugore, nyemera: dore igihe kiregereje ntimube mugisengera Imana Data kuri uyu musozi, cyangwa se i Yeruzalemu." 
John4:22 Mwebwe musenga Uwo mutazi, naho twe tugasenga Uwo tuzi, kuko umukiro uturuka mu Bayahudi." 
John4:23 Igihe kiregereje, ndetse ngiki cyageze, maze abasenga by’ukuri bakazasengana Imana Data umutima utaryarya, kuko abayisenga batyo ari bo Imana Data yikundira." 
John4:24 Imana ni Roho, bityo abasenga bajye bayisenga by’ukuri, bayobowe na Roho.»" 
John4:25 Umugore abwira Yezu ati «Nzi ko Umukiza, ari we Kristu, agiye kuza; namara kuza azatwigisha byose.»" 
John4:26 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ni jye uvugana nawe.» 
John4:27 Abigishwa be baba barahindukiye, maze batangazwa n’uko yaganiraga n’umugore. Ariko ntihagira ugira ati «Urashaka iki?» cyangwa ngo «Mwavuganaga iki?»" 
John4:28 Nuko umugore asiga ikibindi aho, ajya mu mugi, maze abwira abantu ati" 
John4:29 «Nimuze murebe umuntu wambwiye ibyo nakoze byose. Aho none ntiyaba ari we Kristu?» 
John4:30 Ni bwo bavuye mu mugi, nuko basanga Yezu." 
John4:31 Hagati aho, abigishwa be basigara bamwinginga ngo arye, bati «Mwigisha, fungura.»" 
John4:32 Yezu arababwira ati «Mfite ibyo kurya mwebwe mutazi.» 
John4:33 Nuko abigishwa batangira kubazanya bati «Ese hari uwamuzaniye ibyo kurya?» 
John4:34 Yezu arababwira ati «Ibyo kurya bintunga, ni ugukora icyo Uwantumye ashaka, no kurangiza umurimo we." 
John4:35 Si mwe musanzwe muvuga ngo hasigaye amezi ane, bagasarura? Reka rero mbabwire: ngaho nimwubure amaso maze mwitegereze, imirima ireze, ni iyo gusarurwa." 
John4:36 Usarura wese aba abonye igihembo, maze agahunika imbuto z’ubugingo bw’iteka, kugira ngo ari ubiba ari n’usarura, bombi basangire ibyishimo." 
John4:37 Ubwo ibyo bikagaragaza ukuri kw’ibivugwa ngo: ubiba si we usarura. 
John4:38 Nabohereje gusarura ibyo mutaruhiye; abandi bararushye, none mwe muhawe ibyo baruhiye.»" 
John4:39 Nuko Abanyasamariya benshi b’uwo mugi bemera Yezu, babitewe n’ijambo umugore yari yavuze ahamya ati «Yambwiye ibyo nakoze byose.»" 
John4:40 Abanyasamariya baramusanga, baramwinginga ngo aze agumane na bo, maze aguma aho iminsi ibiri." 
John4:41 Nuko abantu benshi cyane baremera, babitewe n’ibyo yababwiraga." 
John4:42 Babwira wa mugore, bati «Ntitucyemezwa n’ibyo watubwiye; natwe twamwiyumviye, kandi tumenye ko ari we Mucunguzi w’isi koko.»" 
John4:43 Iyo minsi ibiri irangiye, Yezu ava aho, ajya mu Galileya." 
John4:44 Yari yigeze kwemera ubwe ko ari nta muhanuzi wubahwa mu gihugu avukamo. 
John4:45 Nuko agera mu Galileya, Abanyagalileya bamwakira neza, kuko bari babonye ibyo yari yakoreye i Yeruzalemu byose ku munsi mukuru; na bo bari bagiye mu munsi mukuru." 
John4:46 Yezu agaruka rero i Kana ka Galileya, aho yari yahinduye amazi divayi. I Kafarinawumu hari umutware w’ibwami wari urwaje umwana." 
John4:47 Yumvise ko Yezu yavuye mu Yudeya akaza mu Galileya, aramusanganira, aramwinginga ngo aze amukirize umwana kuko yari agiye gupfa." 
John4:48 Yezu aramubwira ati «Iyo mutabonye ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, ntimwemera.»" 
John4:49 Umutware aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, banguka umwana wanjye atarahwera.»" 
John4:50 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Genda, umwana wawe ni mutaraga.» Uwo muntu yemera ijambo Yezu amubwiye, aragenda." 
John4:51 Abaye agitirimuka, abagaragu be baramusanganira, bamubwira ko umwana we ari muzima." 
John4:52 Ababaza igihe yoroherewe, baramusubiza bati «Ni ejo ku isaha ya karindwi, ni bwo umuriro wamuvuyemo.»" 
John4:53 Se w’umwana amenya ko kuri iyo saha, ari bwo Yezu yamubwiraga ko umwana we ari mutaraga. Nuko aremera hamwe n’urugo rwe rwose." 
John4:54 Icyo kiba ikimenyetso cya kabiri. Yezu yagikoze avuye mu Yudeya, agarutse mu Galileya." 
John5:1 Ibyo birangiye, haba umunsi mukuru w’Abayahudi, Yezu aboneza ajya i Yeruzalemu." 
John5:2 Aho i Yeruzalemu hafi y’irembo ry’intama, hari icyuzi cyitwa Betesida mu gihebureyi, kikagira amabaraza atanu." 
John5:3 Muri ayo mabaraza hari haryamye abarwayi batabarika, barimo impumyi, abacumbagurika, n’ibirema; (bose bategereje ko amazi yibirindura." 
John5:4 Kuko rimwe na rimwe, umumalayika yamanukaga muri icyo cyuzi, akabirindura amazi, maze utanze abandi kuyajyamo, akimara kubirinduka, agakira indwara arwaye iyo ari yo yose.)" 
John5:5 Aho ngaho rero hari umuntu wari umaranye ubumuga imyaka mirongo itatu n’umunani. 
John5:6 Yezu abonye uwo murwayi aryamye, amenya ko amaze igihe kirekire arwaye aramubaza ati «Urashaka gukira?»" 
John5:7 Umurwayi aramusubiza ati «Mubyeyi, singira umuntu unjugunya mu cyuzi, igihe amazi yibirinduye; iyo ngerageje kujyamo, nsanga undi yamanukiyemo.»" 
John5:8 Yezu aramubwira ati «Haguruka, ufate ingobyi yawe, maze ugende.»" 
John5:9 Ako kanya, uwo muntu arakira, yegura ingobyi ye aragenda." 
John5:10 Uwo munsi hari ku isabato. Abayahudi babwira uwakijijwe bati «None ni umunsi w’isabato: nta burenganzira ufite bwo kwikorera ingobyi yawe.» 
John5:11 Arabasubiza ati «Uwankijije ni we wambwiye ngo nimfate ingobyi yanjye maze ngende.» 
John5:12 Baramubaza bati «Uwo muntu ni nde wakubwiye ngo fata ingobyi yawe ugende?» 
John5:13 Ariko uwakijijwe ntiyari azi uwamukijije uwo ari we, kuko Yezu yari yigendeye mu kivunge cy’abantu benshi bari aho." 
John5:14 Hanyuma, Yezu amusanga mu Ngoro y'Imana, aramubwira ati «Dore wakize, ntuzongere gucumura ukundi, ejo utazagubwaho n’icyago kiruta icya mbere.»" 
John5:15 Nuko uwo muntu aragenda, abwira Abayahudi ko ari Yezu wamukijije." 
John5:16 Iyo iba impamvu yatumye Abayahudi batoteza Yezu, kuko ngo ibyo yabikoraga ku munsi w’isabato." 
John5:17 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Kugeza ubu Data arakora, nanjye ngakora.»" 
John5:18 Ayo magambo atuma Abayahudi barushaho gushaka impamvu yo kumwica, batamuziza gusa ko yicaga isabato, ahubwo bamuziza kandi ko yavugaga ko Imana ari Se, akiringaniza n’Imana." 
John5:19 Nuko Yezu aboneraho, arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: Mwana nta cyo ashobora gukora ku bwe, uretse icyo abonye Se akora, kuko icyo akoze, na Mwana aragikora." 
John5:20 Koko rero Data akunda Mwana, kandi amwereka ibyo akora byose. Ndetse azamwereka ibirushije ibi ngibi maze muzatangare." 
John5:21 Uko Data azura abapfuye kandi akabeshaho, ni na ko Mwana abeshaho abo yishakiye." 
John5:22 Nyamara Data nta we acira urubanza; imanza zose yazeguriye Mwana," 
John5:23 kugira ngo bose bubahe Mwana nk’uko bubaha Data. Utubaha Mwana ntiyubaha na Data wamwohereje. 
John5:24 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwumva ijambo ryanjye kandi akemera n’Uwantumye, agira ubugingo bw’iteka kandi ntazacirwa urubanza, ahubwo aba avuye mu rupfu yinjiye mu bugingo." 
John5:25 Ndababwira ukuri koko: igihe kiregereje ndetse tukirimo, maze abapfuye bakazumva ijwi ry’Umwana w’Imana, kandi abaryumvise bakazabaho." 
John5:26 Uko Data yifitemo ubugingo, ni na ko yahaye Mwana kwigiramo ubugingo." 
John5:27 Kandi amuha ububasha bwo guca imanza, kuko ari Umwana w’umuntu." 
John5:28 Ibyo ntibibatangaze, kuko igihe cyegereje, maze abari mu mva bose, bazumve ijwi rye." 
John5:29 Nuko abazaba barakoze neza, bazazukire kubaho, naho abazaba barakoze nabi, bazukire gucirwa urubanza." 
John5:30 Nta cyo nshobora gukora ku bwanjye. Nca urubanza nkurikije ibyo numvise, kandi urubanza rwanjye ntirubera; kuko ndakurikiza ugushaka kwanjye, ahubwo nkurikiza icyo Uwautumye ashaka." 
John5:31 Ndamutse ari jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho, icyemezo cyanjye nticyaba ari icy’ukuri." 
John5:32 Hariho Undi uhamya ibyanjye, kandi nzi ko ibyo ahamya binyerekeyeho, ari ukuri." 
John5:33 Mwebwe mwatumye kuri Yohani, maze abaha ubuhamya bw’ukuri." 
John5:34 Jye sinkeneye umuntu uhamya ibinyerekeyeho, ahubwo ibyo mbivugiye kugira ngo mukire." 
John5:35 Yohani yari itara ryaka kandi rimurika, maze muhimbazwa n’urumuri rwe mu gihe gito." 
John5:36 Jye mfite icyemezo kiruta icya Yohani, kuko ibikorwa Data yampaye gukora, ari byo nkora; kubirangiza akaba ari byo bihamya ko Data yantumye." 
John5:37 Kandi Data wantumye, ni we ubwe uhamya ibyanjye. Ntimwigeze kumva ijwi rye kandi ntimwigeze mubona n’uko asa." 
John5:38 Byongeye, n’ijambo rye ntiribarimo, kuko mutemera uwo yatumye." 
John5:39 Mushakashakira mu Byanditswe, mwibwira ko ari ho musanga ubugingo bw’iteka, nyamara ni byo bihamya ibinyerekeyeho." 
John5:40 Ariko mwanga kunsanga, ngo mugire ubugingo." 
John5:41 Ikuzo ryanjye sindikesha abantu; 
John5:42 ariko mwebwe ndabazi: nta rukundo rw’Imana mwifitemo. 
John5:43 Jye naje mu izina rya Data maze ntimwanyakira, ariko nihagira undi uza ku giti cye, muzamwakira." 
John5:44 Mwashobora mute kwemera, kandi buri wese amaranira guhabwa ikuzo na mugenzi we, mudashaka ikuzo mwahabwa n’Imana yonyine?" 
John5:45 Ntimugire ngo ni jyewe uzabarega kuri Data, uzabarega ni Musa, kandi ari we mwiringiye." 
John5:46 Iyaba mwemeraga Musa, nanjye mwanyemeye, kuko yanditse ibinyerekeyeho." 
John5:47 Niba rero mutemera ibyo yanditse, mwakwemera mute amagambo yanjye?»" 
John6:1 Ibyo birangiye, Yezu ajya hakurya y’inyanja ya Galileya ari yo Tiberiya." 
John6:2 Abantu benshi baramukurikira, bitewe n’uko babonaga ibimenyetso yerekanaga akiza abarwayi." 
John6:3 Nuko Yezu aterera umusozi, ageze mu mpinga aricara ari kumwe n’abigishwa be." 
John6:4 Ubwo Pasika, umunsi mukuru w’Abayahudi, yari yegereje." 
John6:5 Yezu arambura amaso, abona cya kivunge cy’abantu kije kimugana. Ni ko kubaza Filipo, ati «Turagura he imigati yo kugaburira bariya bantu?»" 
John6:6 Ibyo yabimubwiye amwinja, kuko yari azi icyo ari bukore." 
John6:7 Filipo aramusubiza ati «N’uwagura imigati y’amadenari magana abiri, umuntu ntiyabonaho na kanzinya.»" 
John6:8 Umwe mu bigishwa be witwaga Andereya, mwene nyina wa Simoni Petero, aramubwira ati" 
John6:9 «Hano hari agahungu gafite imigati itanu y’ingano za bushoki n’amafi abiri, ariko se byamarira iki abantu bangana batya?»" 
John6:10 Yezu ati «Nimwicaze abantu.» Aho hantu hari ibyatsi byinshi. Nuko baricara, abagabo bari nk’ibihumbi bitanu." 
John6:11 Maze Yezu afata imigati, arashimira, ayigaburira abari bicaye aho, abaha n’ifi, uko bazishakaga." 
John6:12 Bamaze guhaga, Yezu abwira abigishwa be, ati «Nimurundarunde ibimanyu bisigaye, ntihagire ibipfa ubusa.»" 
John6:13 Babishyira hamwe, maze buzuza inkangara cumi n’ebyiri z’ibimanyu kuri ya migati itanu y’ingano za bushoki byashigajwe n’abari bariye." 
John6:14 Abo bantu babonye ikimenyetso Yezu amaze gukora, baravuga bati «Koko ni ukuri, uyu ni wa Muhanuzi ugomba kuza mu isi.»" 
John6:15 Yezu rero amenya ko bagiye kuza kumujyana ku mbaraga, bakamwimika, arongera ahungira ku musozi ari wenyine." 
John6:16 Bugorobye, abigishwa be baramanuka no ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
John6:17 Bajya mu bwato, berekeza hakurya y’inyanja, ahagana i Kafarinawumu, nuko bubiriraho kandi Yezu atarabageraho." 
John6:18 Hahuha umuyaga mwinshi, inyanja yitera hejuru." 
John6:19 Bamaze kugashya ahantu h’amasitadi makumyabiri n’atanu cyangwa mirongo itatu, babona Yezu agenda ku nyanja, ageze hafi y’ubwato. Ubwoba burabataha." 
John6:20 Ni bwo Yezu ababwiye ati «Nimuhumure, ni jye.»" 
John6:21 Bashatse kumushyira mu bwato, babona ubwato bugeze ku mwaro aho bajyaga." 
John6:22 Bukeye, ya mbaga y’abantu bari basigaye hakurya y’inyanja babona ko nta bundi bwato bwari buhari, uretse bumwe gusa, bari bazi kandi ko Yezu atari yabugiyemo hamwe n’abigishwa be, ahubwo ko abigishwa bari bagiye bonyine." 
John6:23 Icyakora andi mato yari yaturutse i Tiberiya, hafi y’aho bari baririye imigati." 
John6:24 Ya mbaga y’abantu ibonye ko Yezu n’abigishwa be batagihari, bajya mu mato bagana i Kafarinawumu kuhashakira Yezu." 
John6:25 Bamusanze hakurya y’inyanja, baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, wageze hano ryari?»" 
John6:26 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: ntimunshakira ko mwabonye ibimenyetso, ahubwo muranshakira ko mwariye imigati mugahaga." 
John6:27 Nimujye mukora mudaharanira ibiribwa bishira, ahubwo nimuharanire ibiribwa bihoraho mu bugingo bw’iteka, ibyo Umwana w’umuntu azabaha, kuko ari we Imana Data yashyizeho ikimenyetso.»" 
John6:28 Baramubaza bati «Twagenza dute kugira ngo dukore ibyo Imana ishima?» 
John6:29 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Igikorwa Imana ishima, ni uko mwakwemera uwo yatumye.»" 
John6:30 Nuko baramubwira bati «Ikimenyetso utanze ni ikihe, ngo tukibone maze tukwemere? Ukoze iki?" 
John6:31 Mu butayu, ba sogokuruza bacu bariye ’manu ’, nk’uko byanditswe ngo ’Yabagaburiye umugati uturutse mu ijuru.’ »" 
John6:32 Nuko Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: Musa si we wabahaye umugati wo mu ijuru, ahubwo ni Data ubaha umugati w’ukuri wo mu ijuru." 
John6:33 Kuko umugati Imana itanga ari umanuka mu ijuru, kandi ukazanira isi ubugingo.»" 
John6:34 Nuko baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, jya uhora uduha uwo mugati utubwiye.»" 
John6:35 Yezu arababwira ati «Ni jyewe mugati utanga ubugingo. Unsanga wese ntazasonza bibaho, n’unyemera ntazagira inyota bibaho." 
John6:36 Nyamara narabibabwiye: murambona ariko mukanga kwemera. 
John6:37 Uwo Data ampa wese angeraho, kandi uza ansanga sinzamujugunya hanze." 
John6:38 Namanutse mu ijuru ntazanywe no gukora ibyo nshaka, ahubwo nje gukora ibyo Uwantumye ashaka." 
John6:39 Icyo Uwantumye ashaka ni ukutagira n’umwe nzimiza mu bo yampaye, ahubwo nkazamuzura ku munsi w’imperuka." 
John6:40 Icyo Data ashaka, ni uko ubona Mwana wese akamwemera, yagira ubugingo bw’iteka, maze nkazamuzura ku munsi w’imperuka.»" 
John6:41 Nuko Abayahudi barijujuta, bitewe n’uko yari yavuze ati «Ndi umugati wamanutse mu ijuru.»" 
John6:42 Maze baravuga bati «Uriya si Yezu, mwene Yozefu? Se na nyina ntitubazi? Ubu ashobora ate kuvuga ati ’Namanutse mu ijuru’?»" 
John6:43 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nimureke kuvugana mwijujuta. 
John6:44 Nta we ushobora kungeraho atabihawe na Data wanyohereje, nanjye nkazamuzura ku munsi w’imperuka." 
John6:45 Mu gitabo cy’Abahanuzi haranditse ngo ’Bose baziyigishirizwa n’Imana.’ Umuntu wese wumvise Data akigishwa, aransanga." 
John6:46 Nta wigeze abona Data, uretse uwaturutse ku Mana; uwo nguwo ni we wabonye Data." 
John6:47 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwemera agira ubugingo bw’iteka. 
John6:48 Ni jye mugati w’ubugingo. 
John6:49 Ba sogokuruza banyu baririye manu mu butayu, maze bararenga barapfa." 
John6:50 Nguyu umugati wamanutse mu ijuru, kugira ngo uwuriye wese ye kuzapfa." 
John6:51 Ni jye mugati muzima wamanutse mu ijuru. Urya uwo mugati azabaho iteka; kandi umugati nzatanga, ni umubiri wanjye, kugira ngo isi igire ubugingo.»" 
John6:52 Ni bwo Abayahudi batangiye kujya impaka ubwabo, bati «Ashobora ate kuduha umubiri we ngo uribwe?»" 
John6:53 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: nimutarya umubiri w’Umwana w’umuntu, ntimunywe n’amaraso ye, ntimuzagira ubugingo muri mwe." 
John6:54 Naho urya umubiri wanjye, akanywa n’amaraso yanjye, agira ubugingo bw’iteka, kandi nzamuzura ku munsi w’imperuka." 
John6:55 Kuko umubiri wanjye ari ikiribwa koko, n’amaraso yanjye akaba ikinyobwa koko." 
John6:56 Urya umubiri wanjye kandi akanywa amaraso yanjye, angumamo nanjye nkamugumamo." 
John6:57 Mbese nk’uko Data wantumye ariho, nanjye nkabaho ku bwa Data, bityo undya, na we azabaho ku bwanjye." 
John6:58 Nguyu umugati wamanutse mu ijuru: si nk’uwo ba sogokuruza banyu bariye bakarenga bagapfa; urya uyu mugati azabaho iteka ryose.» 
John6:59 Ibyo yabivuze igihe yigishirizaga mu isengero ry’i Kafarinawumu. 
John6:60 Abenshi mu bigishwa be bamaze kumwumva, baravuga bati «Aya magambo arahambaye, ni nde washobora kuyatega amatwi?»" 
John6:61 Yezu amenya ko abigishwa be bijujutiye ayo magambo, arababwira ati «Mbese ibyo birabatsitaje?" 
John6:62 Noneho ubwo hacura iki mubonye Umwana w’umuntu azamutse ajya aho yahoze mbere hose? 
John6:63 Roho ni we ubeshaho, umubiri nta kavuro. Amagambo nababwiye aturuka kuri Roho, kandi agatanga ubugingo." 
John6:64 Ariko muri mwe harimo abatemera.» Koko Yezu yari azi mbere hose abatemera, ndetse yari azi n’uzamugambanira." 
John6:65 Arongera ati «Ngiyo impamvu yatumye mbabwira ko ari nta we ushobora kunsanga atabihawe na Data.» 
John6:66 Kuva ubwo, benshi mu bigishwa be bavanamo akabo karenge, ntibongera kugendana na we ukundi." 
John6:67 Nuko Yezu abwira ba Cumi na babiri, ati «Namwe se murashaka kwigendera?»" 
John6:68 Simoni Petero aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani, twasanga nde wundi, ko ari wowe ufite amagambo y’ubugingo bw’iteka." 
John6:69 Twe twaremeye, kandi tuzi ko uri Intungane y’Imana.»" 
John6:70 Yezu arababwira ati «Si jye wabatoye uko muri Cumi na babiri? Nyamara umwe muri mwe ni uwa Sekibi.» 
John6:71 Uwo ni Yuda, mwene Simoni Isikariyoti, Yezu yavugaga. Kuko ari we wari ugiye kumugambanira, n’ubwo yari umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri." 
John7:1 Ibyo birangiye, Yezu akomeza kuzenguruka muri Galileya; ntiyashakaga kujya mu Yudeya, kuko Abayahudi bamuhigaga ngo bamwice." 
John7:2 Umunsi mukuru w’Abayahudi witwa uw’Ingando ukaba wegereje. 
John7:3 Abavandimwe be baramubwira bati «Haguruka, ujye mu Yudeya, abigishwa bawe na bo babone ibikorwa ukora." 
John7:4 Nta we ukorera ibintu ahihishe ashaka kuba ahagaragara; ubwo ukora bene ibyo, igaragarize isi.»" 
John7:5 Koko rero n’abavandimwe be ntibamwemeraga. 
John7:6 Nuko Yezu arababwira ati «Igihe cyanjye ntikiragera, igihe cyanyu cyo gihora kiboneye." 
John7:7 Isi ntishobora kubanga, ariko jye iranyanga, kuko mpamya ko ibyo ikora ari bibi." 
John7:8 Mwe nimugende, mujye mu munsi mukuru; jye sinjya muri uwo munsi mukuru, kuko igihe cyanjye kitaruzuzwa.»" 
John7:9 Amaze kubabwira atyo, yihamira mu Galileya." 
John7:10 Abavandimwe be bamaze kugenda bajya mu munsi mukuru, na we ajyayo, atari ku mugaragaro ahubwo nka rwihishwa." 
John7:11 Abayahudi bamushakiraga mu munsi mukuru, babaririza bati «Mbese wa wundi ari hehe?»" 
John7:12 Rubanda bahwihwisaga byinshi bimwerekeyeho, bamwe bati «Ni umuntu mwiza», abandi bati «Oya, ahubwo arayobya rubanda.»" 
John7:13 Nta muntu watinyukaga kuvuga ibimwerekeyeho yeruye, kuko batinyaga Abayahudi." 
John7:14 Umunsi mukuru ugeze hagati, Yezu ajya mu Ngoro y'Imana, arigisha." 
John7:15 Abayahudi baratangara, baravuga bati «Uyu ashobora ate kumenya Ibyanditswe, atarigeze yiga?»" 
John7:16 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Inyigisho mvuga, si izanjye, ahubwo ni iz’Uwantumye." 
John7:17 Ukereye gukora icyo Imana ishaka, amenyeraho ko inyigisho mvuga ari iz’Imana, cyangwa se ko ari izo nihimbira ubwanjye." 
John7:18 Uvuga ibye bwite, aba ashaka kwihesha ikuzo, naho ushaka ikuzo ry’Uwamutumye, uwo ni umunyakuri, kandi nta kinyoma kimurangwaho." 
John7:19 Mbese nta mategeko Musa yabahaye? Nyamara nta n’umwe muri mwe uyakurikiza. 
John7:20 Kuki mushaka kunyica?» Rubanda baramusubiza bati «Aho ntuhanzweho na roho mbi? Ni nde ushaka kukwica?» 
John7:21 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nakoze igikorwa kimwe, mwese muratangara." 
John7:22 Musa yabahaye umuhango wo kugenya kandi utamuturutseho, ahubwo yarawukuye kuri ba sogokuruza, maze mukagenya umuntu ku isabato." 
John7:23 Niba umuntu agenywa ku munsi w’isabato, ntibyice itegeko rya Musa, mutewe n’iki kundakarira kuko nakijije umuntu ku munsi w’isabato?" 
John7:24 Ntimugace urubanza mukurikije ibigaragara, ahubwo mujye muruca mukurikije ubutabera.»" 
John7:25 Bamwe mu batuye i Yeruzalemu baravuga bati «Uriya si wa wundi bahigaga bashaka kumwica? 
John7:26 Nyamara dore aravugira mu ruhame, nta cyo bavuga. Aho abategetsi bacu ntibamenye by’ukuri ko ari we Kristu?" 
John7:27 Ariko uyu tuzi aho akomoka, naho Kristu naza, nta we uzamenya aho aturuka.»" 
John7:28 Yezu yigishiriza mu Ngoro y'Imana aranguruye ijwi, ati «Ni koko muranzi kandi muzi n’aho nkomoka! Icyakora sinaje ku bwanjye; Uwantumye ni We Munyakuri, Uwo mwe ntimumuzi." 
John7:29 Jye ndamuzi, kuko ari We nkomokaho, kandi akaba ari We wantumye.»" 
John7:30 Ni bwo bashatse kumufata, ariko ntihagira n’umwe umukozaho n’urutoki, kuko igihe cye cyari kitaragera." 
John7:31 Icyakora benshi muri rubanda baramwemera, baravuga bati «Kristu naza, aho azakora ibimenyetso biruta ibyo uyu akora?»" 
John7:32 Abafarizayi bumvise ko rubanda rukomeza guhwihwisa ibyo byose, bo n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo bohereza abagaragu babo ngo bamufate." 
John7:33 Yezu aravuga ati «Ndacyari kumwe namwe igihe gito, nyuma ngasanga Uwantumye." 
John7:34 Muzanshaka mumbure, kandi ntimuteze kugera aho nzaba ndi.»" 
John7:35 Abayahudi batangira kubazanya bati «Agiye kuzajya he, tutazamusanga? Azabe agiye gusanga Abayahudi batataniye mu banyamahanga, maze akigisha abanyamahanga?" 
John7:36 Aya magambo avuze arashaka kuvuga iki, ngo ’Muzanshaka mumbure, kandi ntimuteze kugera aho nzaba ndi’?»" 
John7:37 Ku munsi usoza iminsi mikuru, ari na wo uyirusha ibirori, Yezu arahagarara, arangurura ijwi ati «Ufite inyota nansange anywe." 
John7:38 Unyemera, nk’uko byanditswe, imigezi y’amazi atanga ubugingo izamuvubukamo.»" 
John7:39 Ibyo yabivuze abyerekeje kuri Roho uzahabwa abamwemera. Kugeza icyo gihe, Roho yari ataratangwa, kuko Yezu yari atarahabwa ikuzo rye." 
John7:40 Benshi muri rubanda bumvise ayo magambo, bati «Uyu ni we wa Muhanuzi koko.»" 
John7:41 Abandi bati «Ni Kristu.» Abandi na bo bati «Kristu azaturuke se mu Galileya? 
John7:42 Ibyanditswe ntibivuga ko Kristu ari uwo mu nkomoko ya Dawudi, ko azaturuka ku musozi wa Betelehemu, aho Dawudi yavukiye?»" 
John7:43 Ibyo bituma rubanda bicamo ibice kubera we. 
John7:44 Bamwe muri bo bashakaga kumufata, ariko ntihagira umukozaho n’urutoki." 
John7:45 Nuko abagaragu baragaruka basanga abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi; barababaza bati «Ko mutamuzanye ni iki?» 
John7:46 Abagaragu barabasubiza bati «Nta muntu wigeze avuga nk’uwo muntu.» 
John7:47 Abafarizayi bati «Ese namwe mwashukitse? 
John7:48 Hari n’umwe mu Bategetsi cyangwa se mu Bafarizayi wamwemeye? 
John7:49 Si rubanda ruriya rutazi amategeko? Ni ibivume.» 
John7:50 Umwe muri bo, Nikodemu, wigeze gusanga Yezu mbere, arababwira ati" 
John7:51 «Harya amategeko yacu apfa gucira umuntu urubanza, batabanje kumwumva ngo bamenye icyo yakoze?»" 
John7:52 Baramusubiza bati «Mbese nawe uri Umunyagalileya? Uzashishoze, uzasanga ari nta muhanuzi uvuka mu Galileya!»" 
John7:53 Nuko bose barikubura barataha, umwe iwe, undi iwe." 
John8:1 Naho Yezu yigira ku musozi w’Imizeti. 
John8:2 Bugicya, agaruka mu Ngoro y'Imana, rubanda rwose baza bamugana, maze aricara arabigisha." 
John8:3 Ni bwo abigishamategeko n’Abafarizayi bamuzaniye umugore wari wafashwe asambana, bamuhagarika hagati." 
John8:4 Babwira Yezu bati «Mwigisha, uyu mugore bamufashe asambana." 
John8:5 Mu Mategeko, Musa yadutegetse kwicisha amabuye abagore nk’aba. Wowe se ubivugaho iki?»" 
John8:6 Ibyo babivugiraga kumwinja, bagira ngo babone ibyo bamurega. Ariko Yezu ariyunamira atangira kwandikisha urutoki ku butaka." 
John8:7 Bakomeje kumubaza, arunamuka arababwira ati «Muri mwe udafite icyaha, ngaho namubanze ibuye.»" 
John8:8 Yongera kunama, akomeza kwandika ku butaka." 
John8:9 Bumvise avuze atyo, batangira kugenda umwe umwe, bahereye ku basaza." 
John8:10 Nuko Yezu asigara aho wenyine na wa mugore agihagaze aho hagati. 
John8:11 Yezu yunamutse aramubaza ati «Mugore, ba bandi bari he? Nta n’umwe waguciriye urubanza?» Umugore arasubiza ati «Nta n’umwe, Mwigisha.» Yezu aramubwira ati «Nanjye rero singuciriye urubanza; genda ariko uherukire aho gucumura ukundi.»" 
John8:12 Nuko Yezu yongera kubabwira ati «Ndi urumuri rw’isi, unkurikira ntazagenda mu mwijima, ahubwo azatunga urumuri rw’ubugingo.»" 
John8:13 Abafarizayi baramubwira bati «Ubwo ari wowe ubwawe uhamya ibikwerekeyeho, ibyo uhamya si iby’ukuri!»" 
John8:14 Yezu arabasubiza ati «N’ubwo ari jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho, ibyo mpamya ni ukuri, kuko nzi aho nturuka n’aho ngana, naho mwe ntimuzi aho nturuka n’aho ngana." 
John8:15 Mwe muca urubanza mukurikije umubiri, jye nta we ncira urubanza." 
John8:16 N’iyo nciye urubanza, ruba ari urw’ukuri, kuko mba ntari jyenyine, ahubwo mba ndi kumwe na Data wantumye." 
John8:17 Ni na ko byanditse mu Mategeko yanyu ngo ’Icyo abagabo babiri bemeje, kiba ari icy’ukuri.’" 
John8:18 Koko ni jye uhamya ibinyerekeyeho, ariko na Data wantumye na we arabyemeza.»" 
John8:19 Baramubwira bati «So aba hehe?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ari jye ari na Data, nta we muzi; iyaba mwari munzi, mwamenye na Data.»" 
John8:20 Ayo magambo Yezu yayavugiye iruhande rw’ububiko, aho yigishirizaga mu Ngoro y'Imana. Ntihagira umufata, kuko igihe cye cyari kitaragera." 
John8:21 Yezu yongera kubabwira ati «Ndagiye kandi muzanshaka, ariko muzapfana icyaha cyanyu. Aho ngiye ntimushobora kuhajya.»" 
John8:22 Abayahudi baravuga bati «Aho ntagiye kwiyahura, ubwo avuze ngo ’Aho ngiye ntimushobora kuhajya’?»" 
John8:23 Yezu arababwira ati «Mwe muri abo hasi, jye nkaba uwo hejuru; mwe muri abo kuri iyi si, jye sindi uwo kuri iyi si." 
John8:24 Nababwiye ko muzapfana ibyaha byanyu. Muramutse mutemeye ko ndi uriho, muzapfana ibyaha byanyu.»" 
John8:25 Nuko baramubaza bati «Uri nde?» Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndi uwo nababwiye ngitangira. 
John8:26 Mfite byinshi mbavugaho n’urubanza nabacira. Ariko Uwantumye ni umunyakuri, kandi ibyo namwumvanye ni byo mbwira isi.»" 
John8:27 Ntibamenya ko yababwiraga Se. 
John8:28 Yezu yungamo ati «Nimumara kwerereza Umwana w’umuntu, icyo gihe muzamenya ko ndi uriho, kandi ko ari nta cyo nkora ku bwanjye, ahubwo mvuga nk’uko Data yambwirije." 
John8:29 Uwantumye turahorana, ntiyansize jyenyine, kuko mpora nkora ibimunyura.»" 
John8:30 Amaze kuvuga atyo, benshi baramwemera." 
John8:31 Nuko Yezu abwira Abayahudi bari bamwemeye, ati «Nimukomera ku ijambo ryanjye muzaba mubaye abigishwa banjye by’ukuri." 
John8:32 Kandi muzamenya ukuri, maze ukuri kubahe kwigenga.»" 
John8:33 Baramusubiza bati «Turi abo mu nkomoko ya Abrahamu, nta wigeze atwigarurira. Watubwira ute ngo muzigenga?»" 
John8:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: umuntu wese ukora icyaha aba ari umugaragu w’icyaha. 
John8:35 Burya umugaragu ntahora iteka mu nzu, ahubwo umwana ni we uyihoramo." 
John8:36 Mwana nabakura ku bugaragu, icyo gihe muzaba mubaye abigenga koko." 
John8:37 Nzi ko mukomoka kuri Abrahamu, ariko murashaka kunyica, kuko ijambo ryanjye mutarizirikana." 
John8:38 Jye mvuga ibyo nabonye kwa Data, namwe mukora ibyo mwumvanye so.»" 
John8:39 Baramusubiza bati «Umubyeyi wacu ni Abrahamu.» Yezu na we arababwira ati «Niba muri abana ba Abrahamu, nimukore ibyo Abrahamu yakoze." 
John8:40 Ubu rero murashaka kunyica, jye ubabwira ukuri numvanye Imana. Ibyo Abrahamu ntiyabikoze." 
John8:41 Mwe murakora ibyo so akora.» Baramubwira bati «Nta bwo turi ibibyarirano. Dufite Data umwe, ni Imana.»" 
John8:42 Yezu arababwira ati «Iyaba Imana yari so mwankunze, kuko nkomoka ku Mana, nkaba naraje. Sinaje ku bwanjye, ni We wantumye." 
John8:43 Kuki mudasobanukirwa n’ibyo mvuga? Ni uko mudashobora kwakira ijambo ryanjye. 
John8:44 Ubabyara koko ni Sekibi, none murashaka gukora ibyo so yifuza. Kuva mu ntangiriro yamye ari umwicanyi, kandi ntiyigeze aba mu kuri, kuko atigeze atunga ukuri. Igihe avuga ibinyoma, aba avuga ibiri ibye, kuko yamye ari umubeshyi, ndetse akaba na Sekinyoma." 
John8:45 None jye navuga ukuri, mukanga kwemera." 
John8:46 Muri mwe, ni nde wampamya icyaha? Niba rero mvuga ukuri, mubuzwa n’iki kunyemera?" 
John8:47 Umuntu w’Imana yumva amagambo y’Imana. Ngaho mwamenya igituma mutumva, ni uko mutari ab’Imana.»" 
John8:48 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati «Si ngaha twavuga ukuri, ko uri Umunyasamariya kandi ko wahanzweho na Sekibi?»" 
John8:49 Yezu arasubiza ati «Simpanzweho na Sekibi, ahubwo nubaha Data, naho mwe ntimunyubahe." 
John8:50 Jye simparanira ikuzo ryanjye, hari Undi uriharanira agaca n’urubanza." 
John8:51 Ndababwira ukuri koko: ukomera ku magambo yanjye, ntateze gupfa bibaho.»" 
John8:52 Abayahudi baramubwira bati «Ngaha twamenya ko wahanzweho na Sekibi! Abrahamu yarapfuye, n’abahanuzi barapfa. None wowe uravuga ngo ’Ukomera ku magambo yanjye, ntazakorwaho n’urupfu bibaho.’" 
John8:53 Uzabe se uruta umubyeyi wacu Abrahamu wapfuye? N’abahanuzi na bo barapfuye! None ubwawe, wibwira ko uri iki?»" 
John8:54 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Niba ubwanjye niha ikuzo, ikuzo ryanjye ryaba ari ubusa. Data ni we umpa ikuzo, ari na we muvuga ngo ni Imana yacu." 
John8:55 Nyamara ntimumuzi, ariko jye ndamuzi; ndamutse mvuze ko ntamuzi, naba ndi umubeshyi nkamwe. Ni koko ndamuzi kandi ngakomera ku ijambo rye." 
John8:56 Umubyeyi wanyu Abrahamu yahimbajwe no kubona umunsi wanjye, yarawubonye maze aranezerwa.»" 
John8:57 Abayahudi baramubwira bati «Uba utaragira imyaka mirongo itanu, none ngo wabonye Abrahamu!»" 
John8:58 Yezu arababwira ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: Abrahamu atarabaho nari ndiho.» 
John8:59 Ni bwo bafashe amabuye yo kumutera; Yezu arihisha, nuko ava mu rugo rw'Ingoro y'Imana." 
John9:1 Yihitira abona umuntu wavutse ari impumyi. 
John9:2 Maze abigishwa be baramubaza bati «Mwigisha, uwacumuye ni nde, ari uyu muntu, ari n’ababyeyi be, kugira ngo avuke ari impumyi?»" 
John9:3 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ari we, ari n’ababyeyi be, nta wacumuye, ahubwo ni ukugira ngo ibyo Imana ikora bimugaragarireho." 
John9:4 Ni ngombwa gukora imirimo y’Uwantumye hakibona; ijoro riraje, kandi muri ryo nta wagira icyo akora." 
John9:5 Igihe nkiri ku isi, ndi urumuri rw’isi.»" 
John9:6 Amaze kuvuga atyo, acira hasi, amacandwe ye ayatobesha akondo, agasiga ku maso y’impumyi." 
John9:7 Maze arayibwira ati «Jya kwiyuhagira mu cyuzi cya Silowe» (bivuga ngo: uwatumwe). Nuko impumyi iragenda, iriyuhagira, ihindukira ibona." 
John9:8 Bituma abaturanyi n’abandi bari barabonye asabiriza bavuga bati «Uriya si wa wundi wajyaga yirirwa yicaye asabiriza?» 
John9:9 Bamwe bati «Ni we», abandi bati «Si we, ahubwo ni usa na we.» Arababwira ati «Ni jye.»" 
John9:10 Ni bwo bamubwiye bati «Amaso yawe yahumutse ate?» 
John9:11 Arabasubiza ati «Ni wa muntu bita Yezu: yatobye akondo, akansiga ku maso, maze arambwira ati ’Jya mu cyuzi cya Silowe maze wiyuhagire.’ Nuko njyayo, ndiyuhagira, none ndabona.»" 
John9:12 Baramubwira bati «Uwo muntu ari hehe?» Arabasubiza ati «Simpazi.» 
John9:13 Nuko uwahoze ari impumyi bamushyira Abafarizayi. 
John9:14 Hari ku munsi w’isabato igihe Yezu atobye akondo, agahumura amaso ye." 
John9:15 Abafarizayi na bo bongera kumubaza uko yahumutse. Arababwira ati «Yansize akondo ku maso, ndiyuhagira, none ndabona.»" 
John9:16 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi baravuga bati «Uwo muntu ntakomoka ku Mana, kuko atubahiriza isabato.» Ariko abandi bati «Bishoboka bite ko umunyabyaha yakora ibitangaza nk’ibi?» Ni bwo biciyemo ibice." 
John9:17 Barongera babwira impumyi bati «Wowe se, uwaguhumuye umuvugaho iki?» Arababwira ati «Ni umuhanuzi.»" 
John9:18 Abayahudi banga kwemera ko yari impumyi n’uko yahumutse, bigeza igihe bahamagaje ababyeyi be." 
John9:19 Barababaza bati «Uyu koko ni umwana wanyu muvuga ko yavutse ari impumyi? Ubu se ahumutse ate?» 
John9:20 Ababyeyi be barasubiza bati «Icyo tuzi, ni uko uyu ari umwana wacu kandi ko yavutse ari impumyi." 
John9:21 Uko byagenze kugira ngo abone ntitubizi, n’uwamuhumuye amaso ntitumuzi. Nimumwibarize, ni mukuru, niyivugire ubwe»." 
John9:22 Ababyeyi be bavuze batyo babitewe no gutinya Abayahudi, kuko Abayahudi bari babyumvikanyeho ko umuntu wese uzemera ko Yezu ari Kristu, bazamuca mu isengero." 
John9:23 Ni cyo cyateye ababyeyi be kuvuga bati «Arakuze, nimumwibarize.»" 
John9:24 Abayahudi bongera guhamagara ubwa kabiri uwo muntu wahoze ari impumyi, baramubwira bati «Singiza Imana, twe tuzi ko uwo muntu ari umunyabyaha.»" 
John9:25 Arababwira ati «Niba ari umunyabyaha, ibyo simbizi; icyo nzi ni kimwe: ni uko nari impumyi none nkaba mbona!»" 
John9:26 Bongera kumubaza bati «Yakugenjereje ate? Yaguhumuye amaso ate?» 
John9:27 Arabasubiza ati «Nabibabwiye kandi ntimwabyumva, murashaka kongera kubyumvira iki? Namwe se murashaka kuba abigishwa be?»" 
John9:28 Nuko bamuhunda ibitutsi, bati «Urakaba umwigishwa we, twe turi abigishwa ba Musa." 
John9:29 Tuzi ko Imana yavuganye na Musa, ariko we ntituzi aho aturuka.»" 
John9:30 Wa muntu arabasubiza ati «Ibyo biratangaje, kuba mutazi aho aturuka kandi yampumuye amaso." 
John9:31 Tuzi neza ko Imana itumva abanyabyaha, tukamenya ko uwubaha Imana, agakora icyo ishaka, imwumva." 
John9:32 Kuva na kera kose nta wigeze yumva bavuga ko hari uwahumuye uwavutse ari impumyi. 
John9:33 Uwo muntu iyo adaturuka ku Mana, nta cyo aba yashoboye gukora.»" 
John9:34 Baramusubiza bati «Wazikamye wese mu byaha ukivuka, none ni wowe ugiye kutwigisha?» Nuko bamusuka hanze." 
John9:35 Yezu aza kumva ko bamuroshye hanze. Bahuye, Yezu aramubaza ati «Wemera Umwana w’umuntu?»" 
John9:36 We arasubiza ati «Nyakubahwa, ni nde ngo mwemere?»" 
John9:37 Yezu aramubwira ati «Wamubonye, kandi ni We muvugana.»" 
John9:38 Ni bwo avuze ati «Ndemera, Nyagasani.» Nuko arapfukama aramuramya." 
John9:39 Yezu aramubwira ati «Naje mu nsi nje guca urubanza, kugira ngo abatabona bahumuke, maze ababona babe impumyi.»" 
John9:40 Bamwe mu Bafarizayi bari kumwe na we babyumvise, baramubwira bati «Natwe se turi impumyi?»" 
John9:41 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Iyo muba impumyi, nta cyaha mwajyaga kugira. None ubwo mugize ngo ’Turabona’, icyaha cyanyu kigumyeho." 
John10:1 Ndababwira ukuri koko: umuntu utinjirira mu irembo ry’urugo rw’intama, ahubwo akuririra ahandi, aba ari umujura n’igisambo." 
John10:2 Unyura mu irembo we, aba ari umushumba w’intama." 
John10:3 Uwugarira irembo, aramwugururira, n’intama zikumva ijwi rye; maze agahamagara intama ze mu mazina yazo, nuko akazahura." 
John10:4 Intama ze zose iyo amaze kuzikura mu rugo, azijya imbere, zikamukurikira, kuko ziba zisanzwe zizi ijwi rye." 
John10:5 Ntizikurikira uw’ahandi, ahubwo ziramuhunga, kuko ziba zitazi ijwi ry’ab’ahandi.»" 
John10:6 Yezu yabahaye icyo kigereranyo, ariko bo ntibamenya icyo yashakaga kubabwira." 
John10:7 Nuko Yezu ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: ni jye rembo ry’intama. 
John10:8 Abandi bose baje mbere yanjye, ni abajura n’ibisambo, n’intama zanze kubumva." 
John10:9 Ni jye rembo; uzanyuraho yinjira azakizwa, azishyira yizane kandi abone urwuri." 
John10:10 Umujura agenzwa no kwiba, no kwica, no kurimbura. Jye rero nazanywe no kugira ngo intama zigire ubugingo, kandi zibugire busagambye." 
John10:11 Ni jye mushumba mwiza. Umushumba mwiza yigurana intama ze. 
John10:12 Naho umucanshuro utari umushumba, ntabe na nyir’intama, abona ikirura kije, agatererana intama agahunga; ikirura kikaziraramo kikazitatanya." 
John10:13 Agenza atyo abitewe n’uko aba ari umucanshuro, maze intama ntizibe zimushishikaje." 
John10:14 Ni jye mushumba mwiza; nzi intama zanjye, na zo zikamenya," 
John10:15 mbese nk’uko Data anzi, nanjye kandi nkamenya Data. Ndetse nemera guhara ubugingo bwanjye, nkabutangira intama zanjye." 
John10:16 Mfite n’izindi ntama zitari muri uru rugo, na zo ngomba kuzizana zikazumva ijwi ryanjye, maze hakaba igikumba kimwe n’umushumba umwe." 
John10:17 Ngicyo igitera Data kunkunda, kuko ntanga ubuzima bwanjye kugira ngo mbusubirane." 
John10:18 Nta we ubunyaga, ahubwo ni jye ubwanjye ubutanga. Mfite ububasha bwo kubutanga nkagira n’ububasha bwo kubwisubiza. Iryo ni itegeko nahawe na Data.»" 
John10:19 Abayahudi bongera kwicamo ibice babitewe n’ayo magambo. 
John10:20 Benshi muri bo bati «Yahanzweho na roho mbi, ndetse yasaze; mumuteze amatwi mushaka iki?»" 
John10:21 Abandi ariko bati «Aya magambo si ay’uwahanzweho na roho mbi; roho mbi yashobora ite guhumura amaso y’impumyi?» 
John10:22 I Yeruzalemu bahimbazaga umunsi mukuru wo gutaha Ingoro y’Imana. Hari mu itumba. 
John10:23 Yezu yagendagendaga mu Ngoro yImana mu nsi y’Ibaraza rya Salomoni. 
John10:24 Abayahudi baramukikiza, maze baramubaza, bati «Uzakomeza kuturerega na ryari? Niba uri Kristu bitwerurire, ubitubwire.»" 
John10:25 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Ndababwira mukanga kwemera; ibikorwa nkora mu izina rya Data, ni byo bihamya ibyanjye." 
John10:26 Mwe ntimwemera, kuko mutari abo mu ntama zanjye." 
John10:27 Intama zanjye zumva ijwi ryanjye, ndazizi, na zo zikankurikira." 
John10:28 Nziha ubugingo bw’iteka, kandi ntiziteze gupfa bibaho; byongeye kandi nta n’uzazinkura mu kiganza." 
John10:29 Data wazimpaye, aruta byose, kandi nta wagira icyo ashikuza mu kiganza cya Data." 
John10:30 Jye na Data turi umwe.» 
John10:31 Abayahudi bongera gufata amabuye yo kumutera. 
John10:32 Ni bwo Yezu ababwiye ati «Naberetse ibikorwa byiza byinshi bituruka kuri Data, none muri ibyo bikorwa icyo munterera amabuye ni ikihe?»" 
John10:33 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati «Si igikorwa cyiza gituma tugutera amabuye; turakuziza igitutsi ututse Imana, kuko uri umuntu maze ukigira Imana.»" 
John10:34 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Mu Mategeko yanyu ntihanditse ngo ’Naravuze nti: muri imana’? 
John10:35 Ubwo Amategeko yita imana ababwiwe ijambo ry’Imana, kandi Ibyanditswe bidashobora kuvuguruzwa," 
John10:36 mushobora mute kubwira uwo Data yatagatifuje akamutuma mu nsi, ngo ’Uratuka Imana’, ari uko ngize nti ’Ndi Umwana w’Imana’?" 
John10:37 Niba koko ndakora ibikorwa bya Data, nimureke kunyemera." 
John10:38 Ariko niba mbikora, maze mukanga kunyemera, nimwemere byibura ibikorwa nkora kugira ngo mumenye kandi mwemere ko Data andimo nanjye nkaba muri Data.»" 
John10:39 Nuko bongera gushaka kumufata, abaca mu myanya y’intoki." 
John10:40 Asubira hakurya ya Yorudani, aho Yohani yajyaga abatiriza mbere, agumayo." 
John10:41 Abantu benshi barahamusanga bavuga bati «Nta gitangaza na kimwe Yohani yigeze akora, ariko ibyo yamuvuzeho byari ukuri.»" 
John10:42 Abari aho benshi baramwemera. 
John11:1 I Betaniya, ku musozi Mariya na mwene nyina Marita bari batuyeho, hari umurwayi witwa Lazaro." 
John11:2 Mariya ni we wari wasize Nyagasani umubavu, umusatsi we akawuhanaguza ibirenge bye. Lazaro wari urwaye yari musaza we." 
John11:3 Nuko bashiki be batuma kuri Yezu, bati «Mwigisha, uwo ukunda ararwaye.»" 
John11:4 Yezu abyumvise, aravuga ati «Iyo ndwara si iyo kumwica, ahubwo ni iyo kugaragaza ikuzo ry’Imana, ndetse igahesha ikuzo Umwana w’Imana.»" 
John11:5 Yezu yakundaga cyane Marita na mwene nyina na Lazaro. 
John11:6 Yumvise ko Lazaro arwaye, amara iminsi ibiri aho yari ari." 
John11:7 Hanyuma abwira abigishwa be ati «Nimuze dusubire mu Yudeya.» 
John11:8 Abigishwa baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, vuba aha Abayahudi bashakaga kugutera amabuye, none usubiyeyo!»" 
John11:9 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Mbese umunsi ntufite amasaha cumi n’abiri? Iyo umuntu agenda ku manywa ntatsitara, kuko aba abona urumuri rw’iyi si." 
John11:10 Ariko umuntu ugenda nijoro aratsitara, kuko aba adafite urumuri.»" 
John11:11 Amaze kubabwira ibyo, yungamo, ati «Incuti yacu Lazaro arasinziriye, ngiye kumukangura.»" 
John11:12 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati «Mwigisha, niba asinziriye azakira.»" 
John11:13 Yezu yashakaga kuvuga ko yapfuye, bo bumva ko yaheranywe n’ibitotsi." 
John11:14 Yezu noneho araberurira, ati «Lazaro yarapfuye." 
John11:15 Mutumye nishimira ko ntahabaye, kugira ngo mwemere. Ariko nimuze tumusange.»" 
John11:16 Nuko Tomasi witwaga Didimi abwira abandi bigishwa, ati «Reka tujyane, natwe tuzapfane na we.»" 
John11:17 Yezu agezeyo, asanga Lazaro amaze iminsi ine mu mva." 
John11:18 Kuva i Betaniya kugera i Yeruzalemu, hari nk’intera y’amasitadi cumi n’atanu." 
John11:19 Hari haje Abayahudi benshi kwa Marita na Mariya kubahoza urupfu rwa musaza wabo. 
John11:20 Marita yumvise ko Yezu aje, ajya kumusanganira, Mariya we asigara imuhira." 
John11:21 Marita abwira Yezu, ati «Mwigisha, iyo uba hano musaza wanjye ntaba yarapfuye." 
John11:22 Ariko n’ubu ngubu, nzi ko icyo wasaba Imana cyose, Imana yakiguha.»" 
John11:23 Yezu ati «Musaza wawe azazuka.» 
John11:24 Marita arasubiza ati «Nzi ko azazuka igihe cy’izuka ku munsi w’imperuka.» 
John11:25 Yezu aramubwira ati «Ni jye zuka n’ubugingo; unyemera, n’aho yaba yarapfuye, azabaho." 
John11:26 Byongeye umuntu wese uriho kandi akanyemera, ntateze gupfa. Ibyo urabyemera?»" 
John11:27 Marita ati «Yego, Nyagasani, nemera ko uri Kristu Umwana w’Imana waje muri iyi si.»" 
John11:28 Amaze kuvuga atyo, ajya guhamagara mwene nyina Mariya. Aramwongorera ati «Umwigisha ari hano kandi araguhamagara.»" 
John11:29 Mariya abyumvise, aherako arabaduka, aramusanga." 
John11:30 Ubwo Yezu yari ataragera aho atuye, yari agihagaze aho Marita yari yamusanganiriye." 
John11:31 Nuko Abayahudi bari kumwe na Mariya mu nzu baje kumuhoza, babonye abadutse agenda, baramukurikira bibwira ko agiye kuririra ku mva." 
John11:32 Mariya ageze aho Yezu yari ari, ngo amukubite amaso aramupfukamira, ati «Nyagasani, iyo uba hano, musaza wanjye ntaba yarapfuye.»" 
John11:33 Yezu amubonye arira, n’Abayahudi bamuherekeje na bo barira, ashenguka umutima maze avugana ikiniga," 
John11:34 ati «Mwamushyinguye hehe?» Baramubwira bati «Nyagasani, ngwino urebe.»" 
John11:35 Nuko Yezu asuka amarira. 
John11:36 Abayahudi baravuga bati «Nimurebe ukuntu yamukundaga.» 
John11:37 Ariko bamwe muri bo baravuga bati «Uwashoboye guhumura ya mpumyi, yari ananiwe kubuza uyu gupfa?»" 
John11:38 Yezu yongera gushenguka umutima maze ajya ku mva; iyo mva yari ubuvumo bari bakingishije ibuye. 
John11:39 Yezu ati «Nimukureho ibuye.» Marita, mushiki w’uwapfuye, aravuga ati «Nyagasani ubu aranuka: uyu munsi ni uwa kane.»" 
John11:40 Yezu aramubwira ati «Sinakubwiye ko niwemera uri bubone ikuzo ry’Imana?» 
John11:41 Nuko ibuye barikuraho. Yezu yubura amaso ayerekeza hejuru, avuga ati «Dawe, ndagushimira kuko wanyumvise." 
John11:42 Jye nari nsanzwe nzi ko unyumva, none mbivugiye aba bantu bankikije, ngira ngo bemere ko ari wowe wantumye.»" 
John11:43 Amaze kuvuga atyo, arangurura ijwi rihanitse, ati «Lazaro, ngwino, sohoka.»" 
John11:44 Uwari warapfuye arasohoka, aza ibiganza n’ibirenge bigihambiriye, no mu maso hagipfukishije ibitambaro. Yezu arababwira ati «Nimumuhambure, maze mumureke agende.»" 
John11:45 Benshi mu Bayahudi bari baje kwa Mariya, bamaze kubona ibyo Yezu akoze, baramwemera." 
John11:46 Abandi muri bo basanga Abafarizayi, babatekerereza ibyo Yezu yakoze." 
John11:47 Nuko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi bakoranya inama nkuru, baravuga bati «Turabigenza dute, ko uriya muntu akomeza gukora ibitangaza byinshi?" 
John11:48 Nitumureka agakomeza kuriya, bose bazamwemera, maze Abanyaroma baze badusenyere Ingoro kandi barimbure abaturage.»" 
John11:49 Umwe muri bo witwaga Kayifa, wari umuherezabitambo mukuru uwo mwaka, arababwira ati «Nta cyo mubyumvamo!" 
John11:50 Ntimubona ko ikiruta ari uko umuntu umwe yapfa mu kigwi cy’imbaga, aho kugira ngo igihugu cyose kirimbuke!»" 
John11:51 Ibyo ntiyabivuze ku bwe; yabitewe no kuba umuherezabitambo mukuru w’uwo mwaka bimuha guhanura, avuga ko Yezu yari agiye gupfira rubanda." 
John11:52 Bitari no gupfira rubanda gusa, ndetse no gukoranya abana b’Imana batatanye, akababumbira hamwe." 
John11:53 Nuko guhera uwo munsi bashaka uko bamwicisha. 
John11:54 Yezu na we ntiyongera kujya agaragara hagati y’Abayahudi, ahubwo ajya ahantu hafi y’ubutayu, mu mugi witwa Efurayimu, agumayo kumwe n’abigishwa be." 
John11:55 Icyo gihe, Pasika y’Abayahudi yari yegereje; maze abantu bo mu misozi bajya i Yeruzalemu gukora imihango yo kwisukura, mbere ya Pasika." 
John11:56 Bakomeza gushaka Yezu, maze uko bagahagaze mu Ngoro y'Imana, bamwe bati «Kuba ataje mu munsi mukuru mubitekerezaho iki?»" 
John11:57 Koko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi bari bategetse ko, nihagira umenya aho aherereye, ahavuga kugira ngo baze kumufata." 
John12:1 Hasigaye iminsi itandatu Pasika ikaba, Yezu agaruka i Betaniya, aho Lazaro yari yarazuye mu bapfuye yabaga." 
John12:2 Bahamuzimanirira ibya nimugoroba. Marita ni we waherezaga, naho Lazaro ari mu basangiraga na we." 
John12:3 Nuko Mariya areba incuro y’amavuta y’umubavu w’ukuri kandi uhenda cyane, ayasiga ibirenge bya Yezu, abihanaguza umusatsi we, maze umubavu utama mu nzu yose." 
John12:4 Ni bwo Yuda Isikariyoti, wo mu bigishwa be, wari ugiye kumugambanira, avuze ati" 
John12:5 «Nk’uriya mubavu wajyaga kugurwa amadenari magana atatu, agahabwa abakene, upfuye iki?»" 
John12:6 Ibyo ariko ntiyabivugiraga ko yari ababajwe n’abakene, ahubwo ni uko yari umujura; n’ubundi ni we wari umubitsi, akajya yiha ku byo bamubikije." 
John12:7 Nuko Yezu aravuga ati «Nimumwihorere, kuko uwo mubavu ubikiwe umunsi wo kunshyingura mu mva." 
John12:8 Abakene bo muzabahorana, ariko jye ntimuzamporana igihe cyose.»" 
John12:9 Nuko imbaga nyamwinshi y’Abayahudi iza kumenya ko Yezu yari aho ngaho; ni bwo baje, ariko batazanywe na Yezu gusa, ahubwo bashaka no kubona Lazaro yari yarazuye mu bapfuye." 
John12:10 Nyamara abatware b’abaherezabitambo bajya inama yo kwica na Lazaro," 
John12:11 kuko yatumaga Abayahudi benshi babacikaho, bakemera Yezu." 
John12:12 Bukeye bwaho, abantu benshi bari baje mu munsi mukuru bamenya ko Yezu na we aje i Yeruzalemu." 
John12:13 Bafata amashami y’imikindo, bajya kumusanganira, ari na ko batera hejuru bati «Hozana! Nahabwe impundu uje mu izina rya Nyagasani, ni we Mwami wa Israheli!»" 
John12:14 Yezu abonye icyana cy’indogobe acyicaraho, nk’uko byari byaranditswe ngo" 
John12:15 «Witinya, Mwari wa Siyoni, dore Umwami wawe aje akugana, yicaye ku cyana cy’indogobe.»" 
John12:16 Abigishwa be babanza kuyoberwa icyo ibyo bivuga, ariko Yezu amaze gukuzwa, babona kwibuka ko ibyo bintu ari we byari byaranditsweho, ari na ko banabimugiriye." 
John12:17 Abari kumwe na we bose igihe ahamagaye Lazaro mu mva akamuzura mu bapfuye, na bo barabihamyaga." 
John12:18 Ni na cyo cyatumye rubanda ruza kumusanganira, kuko rwari rwamenye ko yakoze icyo gitangaza." 
John12:19 Nuko Abafarizayi baravugana bati «Ntimubona ko ari nta cyo bibamariye! Dore igihugu cyose cyashitse kimuyoboka!» 
John12:20 Hari n’Abagereki bari baje gusenga ku munsi mukuru. 
John12:21 Begera Filipo wari uw’i Betsayida ho mu Galileya, baramwinginga bati «Nyakubahwa, turashaka kubona Yezu.»" 
John12:22 Filipo na we ajya kubibwira Andereya. Andereya na Filipo bajya kubibwira Yezu. 
John12:23 Yezu abasubiza avuga ati «Koko igihe kirageze, cyo kugira ngo Umwana w’umuntu akuzwe." 
John12:24 Ndababwira ukuri koko: imbuto y’ingano iyo itaguye mu gitaka ngo ihugute, ikomeza kuba yonyine; naho iyo ihuguse, yera imbuto nyinshi." 
John12:25 Ukunda ubuzima bwe arabubura, kandi uwanga ubuzima bwe muri iyi si azabukomeza kugeza mu bugingo bw’iteka." 
John12:26 Ushaka kumbera umugaragu nankurikire, maze aho ndi, abe ari na ho umugaragu wanjye azaba. Byongeye, ungaragira, Data azamwubahiriza." 
John12:27 Ubu ariko umutima wanjye urahagaze, mvuge ngo iki se? Dawe, iyi saha uyinkize? Nyamara nzi ko ari cyo cyanzanye kugeza kuri iyi saha." 
John12:28 Dawe, iheshe ikuzo!» Nuko ijwi rituruka mu ijuru riti «Nihesheje ikuzo kandi nzakomeza kuryihesha.»" 
John12:29 Abantu bari bahagaze aho kandi bari bumvise, baravuga bati «Ni inkuba ikubise.» Abandi na bo bati «Ni umumalayika umuvugishije.»" 
John12:30 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Iryo jwi si jye rivugiye, ahubwo ni mwebwe." 
John12:31 Ubu igihe cyo gucira isi urubanza kirageze; ubu umutware w’iyi si agiye gusukwa hanze. 
John12:32 Nanjye nimara kwererezwa hejuru y’isi, nzareshya bose mbiyegereze.»" 
John12:33 Ibyo yabivuze yerekana urupfu yari agiye kuzapfa. 
John12:34 Nuko rubanda baramusubiza bati «Twumvise Amategeko avuga ko Kristu ahoraho iteka, none wowe wavuga ute ko Umwana w’umuntu azererezwa? Mbese uwo Mwana w’umuntu ni nde?»" 
John12:35 Yezu arababwira ati «Ubu ni igihe gito urumuri rubarimo; cyo nimugende mugifite urumuri, umwijima utabatungura, kuko ugenda mu mwijima, atamenya aho agana." 
John12:36 Igihe mugifite urumuri, nimwemere urumuri, kugira ngo mube abana b’urumuri.» Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo aragenda, ajya kubihisha." 
John12:37 N’ubwo yari yaraberetse ibyo bimenyetso byose, ntibamwemeraga," 
John12:38 bityo harangira ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Izayi ati «Nyagasani, ni nde wemeye ibyo yatwumvanye? Ni nde wahishuriwe ukuboko kwa Nyagasani?»" 
John12:39 Ngicyo icyatumaga badashobora kwemera. Izayi yunzemo ati 
John12:40 «Yabahumye amaso, imitima yabo ayigira urutare, kugira ngo amaso yabo atabona, n’umutima wabo ugasobanukirwa, maze bakazahinduka nkazabakiza.»" 
John12:41 Izayi yavuze ibyo, kuko yari yabonye ikuzo rya Yezu, kandi abivuga ari we abyerekejeho." 
John12:42 Icyakora benshi, ndetse no mu batware baramwemeraga, ariko kubera Abafarizayi ntibatinyuke kubyemeza, banga gucibwa mu isengero," 
John12:43 kuko bakunze ikuzo ry’abantu kuruta ikuzo ry’Imana. 
John12:44 Nuko Yezu arangurura ijwi ati «Unyemera si jye aba yemeye, ahubwo aba yemeye Uwantumye," 
John12:45 kandi rero umbona aba abonye n’Uwantumye. 
John12:46 Naje mu nsi ndi urumuri, kugira ngo unyemera wese adahera mu mwijima." 
John12:47 Nihagira uwumva amagambo yanjye ntayakurikize, si jye umucira urubanza, kuko ntazanywe no gucira isi urubanza, ahubwo naje gukiza isi." 
John12:48 Ungaya kandi ntiyakire amagambo yanjye, afite umucamanza we: ijambo navuze ni ryo rizamucira urubanza ku munsi w’imperuka." 
John12:49 Kuko ntavuze ku bwanjye, ahubwo Data wantumye ni We wantegetse ibyo mvuga, n’ibyo nzavuga." 
John12:50 Kandi nzi ko itegeko rye ari ubugingo bw’iteka. Jye rero ibyo mvuga, mbivuga uko Data yabimbwiye.»" 
John13:1 Mbere y’umunsi mukuru wa Pasika, Yezu amenye ko igihe cye cyageze cyo kuva kuri iyi si agasanga Se, uko yagakunze abe bari mu nsi, abakunda byimazeyo." 
John13:2 Nuko nimugoroba igihe bafunguraga, Sekibi akaba yashyize mu mutima wa Yuda mwene Simoni Isikariyoti igitekerezo cyo kumugambanira," 
John13:3 Yezu azirikanye ko Se yamweguriye byose, ko yaturutse ku Mana, kandi akaba ari Yo asanga," 
John13:4 ni ko guhaguruka ava ku meza. Yikuramo umwitero we, afata igitambaro aragikindikiza." 
John13:5 Nuko asuka amazi ku ibesani, atangira koza ibirenge by’abigishwa be, akajya abihanaguza igitambaro yari akindikije." 
John13:6 Aza kugera imbere ya Simoni Petero, maze Petero aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, abe ari wowe unyoza ibirenge?»" 
John13:7 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ibyo nkora ubu ntiwabimenya, ariko uzabimenya hanyuma.»" 
John13:8 Petero aramubwira ati «Ntuzigera na rimwe unyoza ibirenge.» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ndamutse ntakogeje, ntuzagira umugabane hamwe nanjye.»" 
John13:9 Petero aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani, noneho si ibirenge gusa, dore n’amaboko ndetse n’umutwe!»" 
John13:10 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Uwiyuhagiye nta kindi aba ashigaje kitari ukoga ibirenge, kuko aba yisukuye wese. Namwe murasukuye, ariko si mwese.»" 
John13:11 Yari azi neza uri bumugambanire, bituma avuga ati «Mwese ntimusukuye.»" 
John13:12 Amaze kuboza ibirenge no gusubizamo umwitero we, asubira ku meza, arababwira ati «Aho mwumvise ibyo maze kubagirira?" 
John13:13 Munyita Umwigisha na Nyagasani, ni koko muvuga neza, kuko ndi we." 
John13:14 Ubwo rero mbogeje ibirenge, kandi ndi Nyagasani n’Umwigisha, namwe murajye mwozanya ibirenge ubwanyu." 
John13:15 Ni urugero mbahaye, kugira ngo uko nabagiriye, abe ari ko namwe mugirirana ubwanyu." 
John13:16 Ndababwira ukuri koko: nta mugaragu usumba shebuja, kandi intumwa ntisumba uwayitumye." 
John13:17 Ubwo mumenye ibyo, muzahirwa nimubikurikiza." 
John13:18 Simvuze mwese: abo natoye ndabazi, ariko Ibyanditswe bigomba kuzuzwa ngo ’Uwo dusangira umugati ni we wanteye umugeri.’" 
John13:19 Mbaburiye hakiri kare bitaraba, ngira ngo umunsi ibyo byabaye, muzemere ko ndi Uriho." 
John13:20 Ndababwira ukuri koko: uwakiriye uwo ntumye, ni jye aba yakiriye, kandi unyakiriye aba yakiriye Uwantumye.»" 
John13:21 Yezu amaze kuvuga ayo magambo, ashenguka umutima, maze avuga yemeza ati «Ndababwira ukuri koko: umwe muri mwe agiye kungambanira.»" 
John13:22 Abigishwa be batangira kurebana, bibaza uwo ashaka kuvuga." 
John13:23 Nuko umwe mu bigishwa, uwo Yezu yakundaga, akaba yegamiye Yezu ku gituza." 
John13:24 Simoni Petero amwicira ijisho, aramubwira ati «Mubaze uwo avuga uwo ari we.»" 
John13:25 Wa mwigishwa uko yakegamye mu gituza cya Yezu, aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, uwo uvuze ni nde?" 
John13:26 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ni uwo ngiye gukoreza umugati nkawumuha.» Nuko akoza ikimanyu cy’umugati, agihereza Yuda mwene Simoni Isikariyoti." 
John13:27 Yuda ngo amare kwakira uwo mugati, Sekibi amwinjiramo. Nuko Yezu aramubwira ati «Ibyo ugiye gukora, bigire vuba.»" 
John13:28 Ariko mu bari aho ku meza, ntihagira umenya ikimuteye kuvuga ibyo." 
John13:29 Kubera ko Yuda yari asanzwe ari umubitsi, bamwe bakeka ko Yezu yashatse kumubwira ngo ajye kugura iby’umunsi mukuru, cyangwa se ngo agire icyo aha abakene." 
John13:30 Amaze kumira icyo kimanyu cy’umugati, aherako asohoka. Hari nijoro." 
John13:31 Yuda amaze kugenda, Yezu aravuga ati «Ubu rero Umwana w’umuntu ahawe ikuzo, n’Imana iherewe ikuzo muri we." 
John13:32 Ubwo rero Imana iherewe ikuzo muri we, n’Imana izamuha ikuzo muri yo, kandi dore iri hafi yo kumukuza." 
John13:33 Twana twanjye, ndacyari kumwe namwe igihe kigufi; muzanshaka, maze nk’uko nabibwiye Abayahudi, nti ’Aho ngiye ntimushobora kuhajya’, namwe ubu ni byo mbabwiye." 
John13:34 Mbahaye itegeko rishya: nimukundane, kandi mukundane nk’uko nabakunze." 
John13:35 Icyo bose bazamenyeraho ko muri abigishwa banjye, ni urukundo muzaba mufitanye." 
John13:36 Simoni Petero aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, ugiye kujya he?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Aho ngiye kujya ubu ngubu, ntushobora kuhankurikira; ariko amaherezo uzahankurikira.»" 
John13:37 Petero aramubwira ati «Mwigisha, ubu se nabuzwa n’iki kugukurikira? No kugupfira nagupfira!»" 
John13:38 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Uzampfira? Ndakubwira ukuri koko: isake ntiza kubika, utaranyihakana gatatu." 
John14:1 Ntimugakuke umutima. Nimwemere Imana nanjye munyemere. 
John14:2 Mu nzu ya Data hari ibyicaro byinshi; iyo bitaba byo, mba narabibabwiye. Ubu ngiye kubategurira umwanya." 
John14:3 Nimara kugenda, nkabategurira umwanya, nzagaruka mbajyane hamwe nanjye, kugira ngo aho ndi, namwe abe ari ho muba." 
John14:4 Aho ngiye murahazi n’inzira yaho murayizi.» 
John14:5 Tomasi aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani, tube tutazi aho ugiye, ukabona ko twamenya inzira dute?»" 
John14:6 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ni jye Nzira, n’Ukuri n’Ubugingo. Nta we ugera kuri Data atanyuzeho." 
John14:7 Iyaba mwari munzi, na Data mwamumenya. Icyakora kuva ubu muramuzi kandi mwaramubonye.»" 
John14:8 Filipo ni ko guhita amubwira ati «Nyagasani, twereke So, biraba biduhagije.»" 
John14:9 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Filipo we, n’iminsi yose tumaranye, ukaba utanzi? Uwambonye aba yabonye na Data. Ushobora ute kuvuga ngo twereke So?" 
John14:10 Rwose ntimwemera ko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba muri jye? Amagambo mbabwira sinyavuga ku bwanjye, ahubwo Data uhora muri jye, ni we ukora imirimo ye." 
John14:11 Nimwemere ko ndi muri Data, na Data akaba muri jye. Byibuze nimwemezwe n’ibyo nkora." 
John14:12 Ndababwira ukuri koko: unyemera azakora imirimo nkora, ndetse azakora n’ibitambutseho, kuko ngiye kwa Data." 
John14:13 Byongeye kandi, icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye, nzagikora, kugira ngo Data ahererwe ikuzo muri Mwana." 
John14:14 Nimugira icyo musaba mu izina ryanjye, nzagikora."
