John14:15 Niba munkunda koko, muzubaha amategeko yanjye." 
John14:16 Nanjye nzasaba Data, azabahe undi Muvugizi, uzaza kubana namwe iteka." 
John14:17 Uwo ni Roho Nyir’ukuri isi idashobora kwakira, kuko itamubona kandi ntimumenye. Mwebwe ariko muramuzi, kuko abana namwe kandi akababamo." 
John14:18 Sinzabasiga muri imfubyi, nzagaruka mbasange." 
John14:19 Hasigaye igihe gito isi ntizongere kumbona. Ariko mwe muzambona, kuko ndiho kandi namwe mukazabaho." 
John14:20 Uwo munsi muzamenya ko mba muri Data, kandi namwe mukaba muri jye, nk’uko nanjye ndi muri mwe." 
John14:21 Umenya amategeko yanjye kandi akayubaha, ni we unkunda. Kandi rero unkunda, azakundwa na Data, nanjye nzamukunda kandi nzamwiyereka.»" 
John14:22 Yuda utari Isikariyoti aramubaza ati «Nyagasani, utewe n’iki kutwiyereka, ntiwiyereke isi?»" 
John14:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Umuntu unkunda, azubaha ijambo ryanjye, Data azamukunda, maze tuzaze iwe tubane na we." 
John14:24 Utankunda ntamenya n’ijambo ryanjye; kandi rero ijambo mwumvise si iryanjye, ni irya Data wantumye." 
John14:25 Ibyo mbibabwiye nkiri kumwe namwe," 
John14:26 ariko Umuvugizi Roho Mutagatifu, Data azohereza mu izina ryanjye, ni we uzabigisha byose, kandi abibutse n’ibyo nababwiye byose." 
John14:27 Mbasigiye amahoro, mbahaye amahoro yanjye. Sinyabahaye nk’uko isi iyatanga. Ntimukuke umutima kandi ntimugire ubwoba." 
John14:28 Mwumvise ko nababwiye nti ’Ndagiye kandi nzagaruka mbasange’. Iyaba mwankundaga, mwakwishimiye ko nsanze Data, kuko Data anduta." 
John14:29 Dore mbibabwiye igihe cyabyo kitaragera, kugira ngo nibiba muzemere." 
John14:30 Sinkivuganye namwe byinshi, kuko umugenga w’iyi si aje." 
John14:31 Nta bushobozi amfiteho, ariko aje agira ngo isi imenye ko nkunda Data, kandi ko nkora uko Data yantegetse. Nimuhaguruke, tuve hano!" 
John15:1 Ndi umuzabibu w’ukuri, naho Data akaba umuhinzi." 
John15:2 Ishami ryose riterera imbuto muri jye, araritema; naho ishami ryera imbuto, araryicira agira ngo rirusheho kwera imbuto." 
John15:3 Mwe murakeye kubera ijambo nababwiye. 
John15:4 Nimube rero muri jyewe, nanjye mbe muri mwe. Uko ishami ridashobora kwera imbuto ku bwaryo ritari ku muzabibu, namwe ni ko mutakwera mutandimo." 
John15:5 Jye ndi umuzabibu, mwe mukaba amashami. Uba rero muri jye, nanjye nkaba muri we, yera imbuto nyinshi; koko tutari kumwe nta cyo mwashobora." 
John15:6 Utaba muri jye, azajugunywa nk’ishami ritera, maze yumagane, kandi bene ayo mashami barayasakuma, bakayajugunya mu muriro, agashya." 
John15:7 Nimumbamo n’amagambo yanjye akababamo, muzasabe icyo muzashaka cyose muzagihabwa." 
John15:8 Igihesha Data ikuzo ni uko mwakwera imbuto nyinshi, mukaba n’abigishwa banjye." 
John15:9 Uko Data yankunze, ni ko nanjye nabakunze. Nimugume mu rukundo rwanjye." 
John15:10 Nimwubaha amategeko yanjye, muzaguma mu rukundo rwanjye, nk’uko nanjye nubaha amategeko ya Data, maze nkaguma mu rukundo rwe." 
John15:11 Ibyo mbibabwiye ngira ngo ibyishimo byanjye bibabemo, kandi ngo ibyishimo byanyu bisendere." 
John15:12 Ngiri itegeko mbahaye: nimujye mukundana nk’uko nanjye nabakunze. 
John15:13 Nta wagira urukundo ruruta urw’umuntu uhara amagara ye kubera incuti ze. 
John15:14 Muba muri incuti zanjye, igihe mukora icyo mbategetse." 
John15:15 Jye sinkibita abagaragu, kuko umugaragu atamenya icyo shebuja akora; ahubwo mbise incuti, kuko nabamenyesheje ibyo numvanye Data byose." 
John15:16 Si mwe mwantoye, ahubwo ni jye wabatoye, maze mbashyiraho kugira ngo mugende, mwere imbuto, kandi imbuto yanyu igumeho; bityo icyo muzasaba Data cyose mu izina ryanjye, azakibahe." 
John15:17 Icyo mbategetse ni uko mukundana. 
John15:18 Isi nibazira, mumenye ko ari jye yabanje kwanga." 
John15:19 Iyo muba ab’isi, isi yakunze ikiri icyayo; ariko kuko mutari ab’isi, kandi nkaba narabatoye mbakura mu isi, ni cyo isi izabaziza." 
John15:20 Mwibuke ijambo nababwiye ko ’Nta mugaragu uruta shebuja.’ Niba barantoteje namwe bazabatoteza, niba barubashye amagambo yanjye, n’ayanyu bazayubaha." 
John15:21 Ibyo byose bazabibagirira babaziza izina ryanjye, kuko batazi Uwantumye." 
John15:22 Iyo ntaza, byongeye iyo ntagira ijambo mbabwira, nta cyaha bajyaga kugira; ubu rero ntibafite uko bikuraho icyaha cyabo." 
John15:23 Unyanga, aba yanze na Data." 
John15:24 Iyo ntagaragariza muri bo ibikorwa bitigeze gukorwa n’undi wundi, nta cyaha bajyaga kugira; ubu rero barabibonye, bararenga baranyanga hamwe na Data." 
John15:25 Ibyo rero byabaye kugira ngo ibyanditswe mu Mategeko byuzuzwe ngo ’Banyanze bampora ubusa.’ 
John15:26 Ariko Umuvugizi nzaboherereza, aturutse kuri Data, Roho Nyir’ukuri ukomoka kuri Data, naza azambera umugabo." 
John15:27 Namwe rero muzambera abagabo, kuko twabanye kuva mu ntangiriro." 
John16:1 Mbibabwiye ngira ngo ejo mudatsitara. 
John16:2 Bazabaca mu masengero; ndetse n’igihe kirageze, maze uzabica wese azibwire ko yubashye Imana." 
John16:3 Ibyo bazabibagirira, babitewe n’uko batamenye Data nanjye ntibamenye." 
John16:4 Ibyo mbibabwiye ngira ngo igihe cyabyo nikigera, muzibuke ko nababuriye. Sinabibabwiye ngitangira, kuko twari kumwe." 
John16:5 Ubu rero nsanze Uwantumye, none muri mwe nta we umbaza ati ’Ugiye he?’" 
John16:6 Ubwo mbabwiye ibyo, umutima wanyu wuzuye ishavu." 
John16:7 Ariko mbabwire ukuri, ngiye byabagirira akamaro; kuko ntagiye, Umuvugizi ntiyabazamo, ariko ningenda nzamuboherereza." 
John16:8 Kandi namara kuza, azereka ab’isi aho icyaha cyabo kiri, n’aho ubutungane buri, n’urubanza uko ruteye." 
John16:9 Azabereka icyaha cyabo, kuko batanyemeye;" 
John16:10 azabereka aho ubutungane buri, kuko ngiye kwa Data, kandi mukaba mutakimbonye;" 
John16:11 azabereka uko urubanza ruteye kuko Umutware w’iyi si yaciriwe urubanza. 
John16:12 Ndacyafite byinshi nababwira, ariko ubu ntimwashobora kubyakira." 
John16:13 Ariko Roho Nyir’ukuri uwo naza, azabayobora mu kuri kose, kuko atazavuga yitumirije, ahubwo azavuga ibyo yumvise byose, kandi akazabahanurira n’ibizaza." 
John16:14 Azampesha ikuzo, kuko azahabwa ku byanjye akabibamenyesha." 
John16:15 Ibyo Data atunze byose ni ibyanjye; ni cyo kinteye kuvuga ko azafata ku byanjye maze akabibamenyesha. 
John16:16 Hasigaye akanya gato, ntimwongere kumbona, ariko mu kandi kanya mukambona.»" 
John16:17 Nuko bamwe mu bigishwa be batangira kubwirana bati «Buriya se aratubwira iki, ngo: ni akanya gato ntimumbone, mu kandi kanya mukambona, kandi ngo ngiye kwa Data?»" 
John16:18 Baravuga bati «Iby’aka kanya gato bivuga iki? Ntituzi icyo ashaka kuvuga.» 
John16:19 Yezu amenya ko bashaka kugira icyo bamubaza, arababwira ati «Murabazanya ibyo mvuze nti ’Mu kanya gato ntimuzambona, mu kandi kanya mukazambona.’" 
John16:20 Ndababwira ukuri koko: mwe muzarira ndetse muganye, ariko isi yo izishima. Mwe muzagira ishavu, ariko ishavu ryanyu rizabaviramo ibyishimo." 
John16:21 Umugore iyo agiye kubyara, arababara, kuko igihe cye kiba kigeze, ariko yamara kubyara umwana, ntabe akibuka bwa bubabare, kubera ibyishimo by’uko havutse umuntu ku isi." 
John16:22 Namwe ubu koko mufite ishavu, ariko nzongera mbabone, maze imitima yanyu inezerwe; kandi ibyishimo byanyu he kugira ubibavutsa." 
John16:23 Uwo munsi kandi ntimuzongera kugira icyo mumbaza. Ndababwira ukuri koko: nimugira icyo musaba Data mu izina ryanjye, azakibaha." 
John16:24 Kugeza ubu nta cyo mwigeze musaba mu izina ryanjye. Nimusabe muzahabwa, maze ibyishimo byanyu bisendere." 
John16:25 Ibyo nabibabwiye mu bigereranyo; igihe kirageze noneho simbe nkibabwiza ibigereranyo, maze mbabwire neruye ibyerekeye Data." 
John16:26 Icyo gihe muzasaba mu izina ryanjye, simbabwiye ngo ni jye uzagira icyo mbasabira Data," 
John16:27 kuko Data abakundira ko mwankunze, kandi mukemera ko nkomoka ku Mana." 
John16:28 Nakomotse kuri Data, maze nza mu nsi; none mvuye mu nsi nsanga Data.»" 
John16:29 Abigishwa be baramubwira bati «Erega noneho uravuga weruye, ntukivugira mu bigereranyo." 
John16:30 Ubu tumenye ko uzi byose, kandi ntukeneye ko hari uwakwirirwa agira icyo akubaza; ngicyo n’igituma twemera ko ukomoka ku Mana.»" 
John16:31 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Noneho muremeye? 
John16:32 Dore igihe kiregereje, ndetse cyageze, maze mugatatana, umwe ukwe undi ukwe; mukansiga jyenyine. Mumenye ariko ko ntari jyenyine, kuko Data ari kumwe nanjye." 
John16:33 Ibi mbibabwiye ngira ngo muhore munkesha amahoro. Hano mu nsi muzahagirira amakuba, ariko nimukomere: isi narayitsinze.»" 
John17:1 Yezu amaze kuvuga atyo, yubura amaso ayerekeza ku ijuru, aravuga ati «Dawe, igihe kirageze, hesha ikuzo Umwana wawe, kugira ngo Umwana wawe na we aguheshe ikuzo," 
John17:2 nk’uko wamuhaye ububasha ku kiremwa cyose, ugira ngo abo wamuhaye bose, abahe ubugingo bw’iteka." 
John17:3 Ubwo bugingo bw’iteka ni ukukumenya, wowe Mana imwe y’ukuri, no kumenya uwo watumye Yezu Kristu." 
John17:4 Jye naguhesheje ikuzo, ndangiza igikorwa wampaye gukora." 
John17:5 None ubu, Dawe, mpesha ikuzo iwawe, rya rindi nahoranye iwawe, isi itararemwa." 
John17:6 Namamaje izina ryawe mu bantu wampaye ubakuye mu nsi. Bari abawe maze urabampa, na bo bubaha ijambo ryawe." 
John17:7 Ubu bamenye ko ibyo wampaye byose, ari wowe biturukaho," 
John17:8 kuko nababwiye amagambo wambwiye, maze barayakira, bamenyeraho by’ukuri ko ngukomokaho, kandi bemera ko ari wowe wantumye." 
John17:9 Ubu ni bo nsabira; sinsabira isi, ahubwo ndasabira abo wampaye, kuko ari abawe." 
John17:10 Kandi rero ibyanjye byose ni ibyawe, n’ibyawe byose bikaba ibyanjye, maze ngaherwa ikuzo muri bo." 
John17:11 Ubu rero sinkiri mu nsi, ariko bo bayirimo, jye nje ngusanga. Dawe Nyir’ubutagatifu, abo wampaye bakomereshe izina ryawe, kugira ngo babe umwe nkatwe." 
John17:12 Igihe nari kumwe na bo, abo wampaye narabaragiye mu izina ryawe; narabakomeje ntihagira n’umwe muri bo nzimiza, kereka umwana nyagucibwa kugira ngo Ibyanditswe byuzuzwe." 
John17:13 Ubu rero nje ngusanga, kandi ibi mbivuze nkiri mu isi, kugira ngo bankeshe kwigiramo ibyishimo bisendereye." 
John17:14 Nabagejejeho ijambo ryawe, maze isi irabanga, kuko atari ab’isi, nk’uko nanjye ntari uw’isi." 
John17:15 Singusabye kubakura ku isi, ahubwo ndagira ngo ubarinde ikibi." 
John17:16 Si ab’isi, nk’uko nanjye ntari uw’isi." 
John17:17 Batagatifurize mu kuri: ijambo ryawe ni ukuri. 
John17:18 Nk’uko wantumye mu nsi, nanjye ni ko nabatumye ku isi;" 
John17:19 kandi ndakwiyeguriye ubwanjye ari bo ngirira, kugira ngo na bo babe abakwiyeguriye mu kuri." 
John17:20 Si bo bonyine nsabira, ahubwo ndasabira n’abazanyemera babikesha ijambo ryabo," 
John17:21 kugira ngo bose babe umwe. Nk’uko wowe, Dawe, uri muri jye, nanjye nkaba muri wowe, ndasaba ko na bo bunga ubumwe muri twe, kugira ngo isi yemere ko ari wowe wantumye." 
John17:22 Kandi ikuzo wampaye, nanjye nararibahaye, kugira ngo babe umwe nk’uko natwe turi umwe;" 
John17:23 mbe muri bo, nawe ube muri jye, kugira ngo bagere ku bumwe bushyitse, maze isi imenye ko wantumye, kandi ko wabakunze nk’uko wankunze." 
John17:24 Dawe, ndashaka ko aho ndi, abo wampaye na bo tuhabana, kugira ngo babone ikuzo ryanjye wampaye, kuko wankunze isi itararemwa." 
John17:25 Dawe w’intungane, isi ntiyakumenye, ariko jye narakumenye, n’aba kandi bamenye ko ari wowe wantumye." 
John17:26 Nabamenyesheje izina ryawe, kandi nzakomeza kuribamenyesha, kugira ngo urukundo wankunze rubabemo, nanjye kandi mbabemo.»" 
John18:1 Yezu amaze kuvuga ibyo, ajyana n’abigishwa be, yambuka umugezi wa Sedironi. Hakaba ubusitani, we n’abigishwa babwinjiramo." 
John18:2 Yuda wajyaga kumugambanira akamenya aho hantu, kuko Yezu yakundaga kuhaza kenshi aherekejwe n’abigishwa be." 
John18:3 Nuko Yuda amaze kubona abasirikare n’abagaragu yahawe n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Abafarizayi, ajyayo; bari bitwaje amatara n’imuri n’intwaro." 
John18:4 Yezu wari uzi ibigiye kumubaho byose, aza abagana, arababaza ati «Murashaka nde?»" 
John18:5 Baramusubiza bati «Yezu w’i Nazareti.» Yezu arababwira ati «Ni jyewe.» Yuda wamugambaniraga, akaba ahagararanye na bo." 
John18:6 Yezu amaze kubabwira ati «Ni jyewe», basubira inyuma bitura hasi." 
John18:7 Yongera kubabaza ati «Murashaka nde?» Barongera bati «Yezu w’i Nazareti.» 
John18:8 Yezu arabasubiza ati «Nababwiye ko ari jye. Niba rero ari jye mushaka, nimureke aba ngaba bigendere.»" 
John18:9 Bityo harangira ijambo yari yaravuze ati «Abo wampaye nta n’umwe najimije muri bo.» 
John18:10 Nuko Simoni Petero wari ufite inkota arayikura, ayikubita umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo mukuru, amuca ugutwi kw’iburyo. Uwo mugaragu yitwaga Malikusi." 
John18:11 Yezu abwira Petero ati «Subiza inkota yawe mu rwubati. Inkongoro Data ampaye, ndeke se kuyinywa?»" 
John18:12 Abasirikare n’umutware wabo, n’abagaragu b’Abayahudi bafata Yezu baramuboha." 
John18:13 Babanza kumujyana kwa Ana wari sebukwe wa Kayifa, umuherezabitambo mukuru w’uwo mwaka." 
John18:14 Kayifa uwo ni we wari waragiriye Abayahudi inama, y’uko ikiruta ari uko umuntu umwe yapfira imbaga." 
John18:15 Simoni Petero yari yakurikiye Yezu hamwe n’undi mwigishwa. Uwo mwigishwa wundi akaba yaraziranye n’umuherezabitambo mukuru, yinjirana na Yezu mu rugo rw’umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
John18:16 Petero we asigara ahagaze hanze inyuma y’irembo; wa mwigishwa wundi wari uzwi n’umuherezabitambo mukuru, araza abwira umuja ukumira, ngo yinjize Petero." 
John18:17 Nuko uwo muja w’umukumirizi abwira Petero ati «Aho none ntiwaba uri uwo mu bigishwa b’uriya muntu?» Petero arasubiza ati «Sindi we.» 
John18:18 Abagaragu n’abafasha bari bacanye umuriro bota, kuko hari imbeho. Petero na we yari ahagararanye na bo, yota." 
John18:19 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru abaza Yezu iby’abigishwa be n’inyigisho ze. 
John18:20 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Navugiye ahagaragara mbwira isi yose. Nigishirije iteka mu masengero no mu Ngoro y’Imana, aho Abayahudi bose bateranira, nta cyo navuze rwihishwa." 
John18:21 Urambaza iki? Baza abanyumvise icyo nababwiye. Bo bazi ibyo navuze.» 
John18:22 Amaze kuvuga ibyo, umwe mu bafasha wari aho ngaho, akubita Yezu urushyi ati «Ni uko usubiza umuherezabitambo mukuru?»" 
John18:23 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Niba mvuze nabi, garagaza ikibi mvuze; niba kandi mvuze neza, unkubitiye iki?»" 
John18:24 Nuko Ana amwohereza aboshye kwa Kayifa, umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
John18:25 Simoni Petero yari ahagaze aho yota. Nuko baramubaza bati «Aho nawe nturi uwo mu bigishwa be?» Arahakana ati «Sindi we.» 
John18:26 Umwe mu bagaragu b’umuherezabitambo mukuru, mwene wabo w’uwo Petero yari yaciye ugutwi, ati «Sinakubonye mu busitani muri kumwe?»" 
John18:27 Petero yongera guhakana. Ako kanya isake irabika. 
John18:28 Nuko bavana Yezu kwa Kayifa, bamujyana mu rugo rw’Umutware w’igihugu, hakaba mu gitondo, ariko bo ntibinjira mu rugo rw’Umutware ngo batandura, batararya Pasika." 
John18:29 Pilato arasohoka arabasanga, ati «Uyu muntu muramurega iki?»" 
John18:30 Baramusubiza bati «Iyo ataba umugiranabi ntituba tumukuzaniye.» 
John18:31 Nuko Pilato arababwira ati «Nimumujyane mumucire urubanza, mukurikije amategeko yanyu.» Abayahudi bati «Nta bubasha dufite bwo kugira uwo ducira urubanza rwo gupfa.»" 
John18:32 Bityo ijambo Yezu yari yaravuze ryerekeye ku rupfu yari agiye gupfa riruzuzwa. 
John18:33 Nuko Pilato asubira mu rugo rwe, ahamagaza Yezu aramubaza ati «Mbese ni wowe mwami w’Abayahudi koko?»" 
John18:34 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Ibyo ubivuze ku bwawe, cyangwa se ni abandi babikumbwiyeho?»" 
John18:35 Pilato arasubiza ati «Aho ntugira ngo nanjye ndi Umuyahudi? Bene wanyu n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo ni bo bakunzaniye; wakoze iki?» 
John18:36 Yezu arasubiza ati «Ingoma yanjye si iyo kuri iyi si; iyo ingoma yanjye iza kuba iyo kuri iyi si, abantu banjye baba bandwanyeho, kugira ngo ntagabizwa Abayahudi. None rero, Ingoma yanjye si iy’ino aha.»" 
John18:37 Nuko Pilato aramubaza ati «Noneho rero uri umwami?» Yezu aramusubiza ati «Urabyivugiye ko ndi umwami! Cyakora icyo jyewe navukiye, kandi kikanzana ku isi, ni ukugira ngo mpamye ibyerekeye ukuri. Unyurwa n’ukuri wese, yumva icyo mvuga.»" 
John18:38 Pilato aramubaza ati «Ukuri ni iki?» Amaze kuvuga atyo, yongera gusohoka, asanga Abayahudi arababwira ati «Nta kirego na kimwe nsanze kimuhama." 
John18:39 Birasanzwe ko mbarekurira imbohe imwe mwishakiye, ku munsi wa Pasika; murashaka ko mbarekurira Umwami w’Abayahudi?»" 
John18:40 Nuko bose barongera batera hejuru, bati «Si uwo dushaka, ahubwo duhe Barabasi.» Barabasi uwo yari umujura." 
John19:1 Ni bwo Pilato ategetse ko bafata Yezu ngo bamujyane, maze bamukubite." 
John19:2 Abasirikare bamushyira ku mutwe ikamba babohesheje amahwa, bamwambika n’igishura gitukura;" 
John19:3 nuko bamujyaho bavuga bati «Turakuramutsa, Mwami w’Abayahudi», bakamukubita n’inshyi." 
John19:4 Pilato yongera gusohoka, abwira Abayahudi, ati «Dore ndamubazaniye kugira ngo mumenye ko nta kirego na kimwe kimuhama musanganye.»" 
John19:5 Nuko Yezu asohoka yambaye ikamba ry’amahwa n’igishura gitukura. Pilato arababwira ati «Nguyu wa muntu.» 
John19:6 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abagaragu babo bamukubise amaso, batera hejuru bati «Nabambwe ku musaraba! Nabambwe!» Pilato arababwira ati «Ngaho nimumujyane mumwibambire, jye nta kirego kimuhama musanganye.»" 
John19:7 Abayahudi baramusubiza bati «Dufite itegeko, kandi dukurikije iryo tegeko agomba gupfa, kuko yigize Umwana w’Imana.»" 
John19:8 Pilato abyumvise arushaho kugira ubwoba. 
John19:9 Asubira mu rugo, maze abaza Yezu ati «Ukomoka he?» Yezu ariko ntiyagira icyo amusubiza." 
John19:10 Pilato ni ko kumubwira ati «Nta cyo unshubije? Ntuzi ko mfite ububasha bwo kukurekura, nkagira n’ubwo kukubambisha?»" 
John19:11 Yezu aramusubiza ati «Nta bubasha na buke wajyaga kungiraho, iyo utabihabwa no hejuru. Ni cyo gituma uwangambaniye ari we ufite icyaha kiruta icyawe.»" 
John19:12 Pilato yumvise ibyo, ashaka uko yamurekura, ariko Abayahudi batera hejuru, bati «Uramutse umurekuye, uraba utakibaye incuti ya Kayizari. Uwigira umwami wese, aba arwanya Kayizari.»" 
John19:13 Nuko Pilato amaze kumva ayo magambo, ajyana Yezu hanze, yicara ku ntebe y’ubucamanza ahantu hiherereye, hitwa «Litostrotosi », mu gihebureyi «Gabata »." 
John19:14 Wari n’umunsi w’umwiteguro wa Pasika, bigeze nko ku isaha ya gatandatu. Pilato abwira Abayahudi ati «Nguyu umwami wanyu.»" 
John19:15 Batera hejuru bati «Kuraho, kuraho, mubambe ku musaraba!» Pilato arababwira ati «Mbambe umwami wanyu?» Abatware b’abaherezabitambo barasubiza bati «Nta mwami wundi tugira utari Kayizari.»" 
John19:16 Nuko aramutanga, ngo bamubambe ku musaraba." 
John19:17 Nuko bafata Yezu, maze agenda yikoreye umusaraba we, yerekeza ahantu hitwa «ku Kibihanga », mu gihebureyi hakitwa «Gologota»." 
John19:18 Aho ni ho bamubambye ku musaraba, ari kumwe n’abandi babiri, umwe hino, undi hirya, Yezu we akaba hagati." 
John19:19 Nuko Pilato yandikisha itangazo, arimanikisha hejuru y’umusaraba; hari handitse ngo «Yezu Umunyanazareti, umwami w’Abayahudi.»" 
John19:20 Abayahudi benshi basoma iryo tangazo, kuko aho hantu Yezu yabambwe hari hafi y’umugi kandi ryari ryanditse mu gihebureyi, mu kilatini no mu kigereki." 
John19:21 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo b’Abayahudi babwira Pilato bati «Oya, wikwandika ngo ’umwami w’Abayahudi’; ahubwo andika ko uyu muntu yihaye kuvuga ngo ’Ndi umwami w’Abayahudi.’»" 
John19:22 Pilato arabasubiza ati «Icyo nanditse nacyanditse.» 
John19:23 Abasirikare bamaze kubamba Yezu, bafata imyenda ye bayicamo imigabane ine, umusirikare wese ajyana umugabane we. Hari n’ikanzu, ariko iyo kanzu ntigire iteranyirizo, kuko yari iboshywe buzima kuva hejuru kugera hasi. Bajya inama bati" 
John19:24 «Ntituyitanyure, ahubwo reka tuyikorereho ubufindo, tumenye uri bube nyirayo.» Bityo harangira Ibyanditswe, ngo «Bigabanije imyambaro yanjye, maze kanzu yanjye bayikoreraho ubufindo.» Nguko uko abasirikare babigenjeje." 
John19:25 Iruhande rw’umusaraba wa Yezu hari hahagaze Nyina, na nyina wabo Mariya muka Kilopa, na Mariya Madalena." 
John19:26 Yezu abonye Nyina, ahagararanye na wa mwigishwa yakundaga, abwira Nyina ati «Mubyeyi, dore umwana wawe.»" 
John19:27 Abwira na wa mwigishwa ati «Dore Nyoko.» Guhera icyo gihe, uwo mwigishwa amujyana iwe." 
John19:28 Nyuma y’ibyo, Yezu wari uzi ko byose birangiye, kugira ngo Ibyanditswe byuzuzwe, aravuga ati «Mfite inyota.»" 
John19:29 Aho hakaba hari hateretse urweso rwuzuye divayi irura. Bahambira ku rubingo icyangwe cyinitswe muri iyo divayi irura, bacyegereza umunwa we." 
John19:30 Yezu amaze kunywa kuri iyo divayi irura, aravuga ati «Birujujwe.» Nuko umutwe uregukira imbere, araca." 
John19:31 Ubwo hari ku munsi w’Umwiteguro wa Pasika; kugira ngo rero imirambo itaguma ku misaraba kuri sabato, kandi iyo sabato ari umunsi mukuru cyane, Abayahudi binginga Pilato ngo bavune amaguru yabo, maze imirambo bayimanure." 
John19:32 Nuko abasirikare baraza, bavuna amaguru y’uwa mbere, n’ay’undi wari ubambanywe na we;" 
John19:33 ariko bageze kuri Yezu, basanga yapfuye, we ntibirirwa bamuvuna amaguru;" 
John19:34 ahubwo umwe mu basirikare amutikura icumu mu rubavu, maze ako kanya havamo amaraso n’amazi." 
John19:35 Uwabibonye ni we ubyemeza, kandi icyemezo cye ni ukuri; na we azi ko avuga ukuri kugira ngo namwe mwemere." 
John19:36 Ibyo byabaye ari ukugira ngo huzuzwe Ibyanditswe ngo «Nta gufwa rye rizavunika.» 
John19:37 N’ahandi mu Byanditswe havuga ngo «Bazarangamira uwo bazaba bahinguranyije.» 
John19:38 Ibyo birangiye, Yozefu w’ahitwa Arimatiya, wari umwigishwa wa Yezu rwihishwa kuko yatinyaga Abayahudi, asaba Pilato gutwara umurambo wa Yezu. Pilato arabimwemerera. Nuko araza ajyana umurambo wa Yezu." 
John19:39 Haza na Nikodemu, wa wundi wigeze gusanga Yezu nijoro; azana ikivange cy’ishangi n’amarira y’igikakarubamba, bipima nk’ibiro mirongo itatu." 
John19:40 Nuko benda umurambo wa Yezu bawuhambira mu myenda hamwe n’imibavu, uko Abayahudi bagenzaga bahamba." 
John19:41 Ahantu bari bamubambye hari ubusitani, muri ubwo busitani hari imva nshya itaragira uyihambwamo n’umwe." 
John19:42 Nuko kubera umwiteguro wa Pasika y’Abayahudi, aba ari ho bahamba Yezu, kuko iyo mva yari hafi." 
John20:1 Ku wa mbere w’isabato, Mariya Madalena azindukira ku mva butaratandukana; asanga ibuye ryavuye ku mva." 
John20:2 Nuko yirukanka asanga Simoni Petero, n’undi mwigishwa, wa wundi Yezu yakundaga, arababwira ati «Nyagasani bamukuye mu mva, none ntituzi aho bamushyize.»" 
John20:3 Petero arabaduka na wa mwigishwa, bajya ku mva." 
John20:4 Bombi bagenda birukanka, ariko wa mwigishwa arusha Petero amaguru, amutanga kugera ku mva." 
John20:5 Nuko arunama abona imyenda irambitse, ariko ntiyinjira mu mva." 
John20:6 Simoni Petero wari umukurikiye, aba arahageze, yinjira mu mva, abona imyenda irambitse," 
John20:7 n’igitambaro bari bapfukishije umutwe we kitarambitse hamwe n’imyenda, ahubwo kizingiye ukwacyo ahandi hantu." 
John20:8 Nuko wa mwigishwa wari wageze mbere ku mva, na we arinjira, aritegereza maze aremera." 
John20:9 Kugeza ubwo bari batarasobanukirwa n’Ibyanditswe bivuga ko yagombaga kuzuka ava mu bapfuye. 
John20:10 Nuko abigishwa bisubirira imuhira. 
John20:11 Mariya we, akomeza guhagarara iruhande rw’imva, arira. Uko yakariraga arunama, arunguruka mu mva." 
John20:12 Ni bwo abonye abamalayika babiri bambaye imyenda yererana, bicaye aho umurambo wa Yezu bari bawushyize, umwe ahagana ku mutwe, undi ahagana ku birenge." 
John20:13 Baramubwira bati «Mugore, urarizwa n’iki?» Arabasubiza ati «Nyagasani bamutwaye, none nayobewe aho bamushyize.»" 
John20:14 Akivuga ibyo, arahindukira areba inyuma, maze abona Yezu ahagaze, ariko ntiyamenya ko ari Yezu." 
John20:15 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mugore urarizwa n’iki? Urashaka nde?» Mariya akeka ko ari umunyabusitani, aramubwira ati «Nyakubahwa, niba ari wowe wamutwaye, mbwira aho wamushyize, maze mujyane.»" 
John20:16 Yezu aramubwira ati «Mariya we!» Undi arahindukira, aherako amubwira mu gihebureyi ati «Rabuni», ari byo kuvuga ngo «Mwigisha»." 
John20:17 Yezu ahita amubwira ati «Ntushake kungumana, kuko ntarazamuka njya kwa Data. Ahubwo genda, usange abavandimwe banjye maze ubabwire ko ngiye kwa Data ari we So, ku Mana yanjye ari na Yo Mana yanyu.»" 
John20:18 Nuko Mariya Madalena ajya kubwira abigishwa ati «Nabonye Nyagasani, nimwumve n’ibyo yambwiye.»" 
John20:19 Kuri uwo munsi wa mbere ku cyumweru nimugoroba, inzugi z’aho abigishwa bari bateraniye zari zikinze, bitewe no gutinya Abayahudi. Nuko Yezu agira atya araza, ahagarara hagati yabo, arababwira ati «Nimugire amahoro.»" 
John20:20 Amaze kuvuga atyo, abereka ibiganza n’urubavu rwe. Abigishwa babonye Nyagasani, ibyishimo birabasaga." 
John20:21 Yezu yongera kubabwira ati «Nimugire amahoro. Nk’uko Data yantumye, nanjye ndabatumye.»" 
John20:22 Amaze kuvuga atyo, abahuhaho, arababwira ati «Nimwakire Roho Mutagatifu." 
John20:23 Abo muzakiza ibyaha bazabikizwa, abo mutazabikiza bazabigumana.»" 
John20:24 Tomasi umwe muri ba Cumi na babiri witwaga Didimi, we ntiyari kumwe na bo igihe Yezu aje." 
John20:25 Nuko abandi bigishwa baramubwira bati «Twabonye Nyagasani.» Naho we arababwira ati «Nintabona mu biganza bye umwenge w’imisimari, kandi nindashyira urutoki rwanjye mu mwenge w’imisimari, n’ikiganza cyanjye mu rubavu rwe, sinzemera.»" 
John20:26 Hashize iminsi munani, abigishwa na bwo bari bikingiranye mu nzu, noneho Tomasi ari kumwe na bo. Yezu agira atya aba ahagaze hagati yabo, inzugi zikinze, arababwira ati «Nimugire amahoro.»" 
John20:27 Hanyuma abwira Tomasi ati «Shyira urutoki rwawe hano, urebe n’ibiganza byanjye; zana n’ikiganza cyawe ugishyire mu rubavu rwanjye, maze ureke kuba umuhakanyi, ahubwo ube umwemezi.»" 
John20:28 Tomasi amusubiza avuga, ati «Nyagasani, Mana yanjye!»" 
John20:29 Yezu aramubwira ati «Wemejwe n’uko umbonye; hahirwa abemera batabanje kwirebera.» 
John20:30 Yezu yongeye guha abigishwa be ibindi bimenyetso byinshi, bitanditse muri iki gitabo." 
John20:31 Ibi byanditswe ari ukugira ngo mwemere ko Yezu ari Kristu, Umwana w’Imana, no kugira ngo nimumwemera mugire ubugingo mu izina rye." 
John21:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Yezu yongera kubonekera abigishwa bari ku nyanja ya Tiberiya. Dore uko yababonekeye." 
John21:2 Simoni Petero na Tomasi ari we Didimi, na Natanayeli w’i Kana ho mu Galileya, na bene Zebedeyi, n’abandi babiri bo mu bigishwa be, bari bateranye." 
John21:3 Nuko Simoni Petero arababwira ati «Ngiye kuroba.» Baramusubiza bati «Tukajyana.» Ni bwo bagiye mu bwato; iryo joro ariko ntibagira icyo baronka. 
John21:4 Bugicya, Yezu araza ahagarara ku nkombe, nyamara abigishwa be ntibamenya ko ari we." 
John21:5 Nuko arababwira ati «Bahungu mwe, hari ifi mwaronse?» Baramusubiza bati «Habe na busa.»" 
John21:6 Arababwira ati «Nimurohe urushundura iburyo h’ubwato muraronka.» Bararuroha, bananirwa kuruzamura kubera amafi menshi arimo." 
John21:7 Ni bwo wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga abwiye Petero, ati «Ni Nyagasani!» Simoni Petero yumvise ko ari Nyagasani, akenyera umwambaro we, kuko atari yambaye, maze yiroha mu nyanja." 
John21:8 Abandi bigishwa baza mu bwato bakurura urushundura rwari rwuzuye amafi, agatsinda ntibari kure y’ubutaka, nko mu ntambwe magana abiri." 
John21:9 Bageze ku butaka, babona umuriro ucanye utazeho ifi, n’umugati." 
John21:10 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimuzane kuri ayo mafi mumaze kuroba.» 
John21:11 Simoni Petero yurira mu bwato, maze akururira urushundura ku butaka rwarimo amafi manini ijana na mirongo itanu n’atatu; n’ubwo yanganaga atyo bwose, urushundura ntirwacitse." 
John21:12 Yezu arababwira ati «Nimuze mufungure.» Ntihagira n’umwe utinyuka kumubaza, ati «Uri nde?» Bari bamenye ko ari Nyagasani." 
John21:13 Nuko Yezu araza, afata umugati arawubaha, n’amafi ni uko." 
John21:14 Ubwo bwari bubaye ubwa gatatu Yezu abonekera abigishwa be, aho amariye kuzuka ava mu bapfuye." 
John21:15 Bamaze kurya, Yezu abaza Simoni Petero ati «Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda kurusha aba ngaba?» Aramusubiza ati «Yego, Nyagasani, uzi ko ngukunda.» Yezu aramubwira ati «Ragira abana b’intama zanjye.»" 
John21:16 Yezu yongera kumubaza ubwa kabiri ati «Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda?» Petero aramusubiza ati «Yego Nyagasani, uzi ko ngukunda.» Yezu ati «Ragira intama zanjye.»" 
John21:17 Yongera kumubaza ubwa gatatu, ati «Simoni mwene Yohani, urankunda?» Petero ababazwa n’uko amubajije ubwa gatatu, ati «Urankunda?» Ni bwo amushubije ati «Nyagasani, uzi byose, uzi ko ngukunda.» Yezu aramubwira ati «Ragira intama zanjye." 
John21:18 Ndakubwira ukuri koko: igihe wari ukiri umusore warikenyezaga, kandi ukajya aho ushaka, ariko numara gusaza, uzatega amaboko undi agukenyeze, kandi akujyane aho udashaka.»" 
John21:19 Yavuze atyo, ashaka kumuburira urupfu rumuteze, ruzahesha Imana ikuzo. Amaze kuvuga atyo, aramubwira ati «Nkurikira.»" 
John21:20 Petero ahindukiye, abona wa mwigishwa Yezu yakundaga aje abakurikiye, ari na we wegamiraga Yezu bari ku meza akamubaza ati «Nyagasani, ni nde ugiye kukugambanira?»" 
John21:21 Petero amaze kumubona, abwira Yezu, ati «Nyagasani, naho se uyu we bite?»" 
John21:22 Yezu aramubwira ati «Niba nshaka ko akomeza kubaho kugera igihe nzazira, bigutwaye iki? Wowe nkurikira.»" 
John21:23 Kuva ubwo, iryo jambo rikwira mu bavandimwe ko uwo mwigishwa atazapfa. Nyamara Yezu ntiyavuze ngo ntazapfa, ahubwo ati «Niba nshaka ko akomeza kubaho kugera igihe nzazira, bigutwaye iki?»" 
John21:24 Uwo mwigishwa, ni we mugabo wemeza ibyo byose, kandi ni we wabyanditse; byongeye tuzi ko ibyo yemeza ari iby’ukuri." 
John21:25 Hari n’ibindi bintu byinshi Yezu yakoze; babyanditse bakabirondora byose, ngira ngo ibitabo byakwandikwaho ntibyakwirwa ku isi yose." 
Acts1:1 Tewofili we, mu gitabo cyanjye cya mbere nanditse ibyo Yezu yakoze n’ibyo yigishije byose, kuva mu ntangiriro" 
Acts1:2 kugera ubwo ajyanywe mu ijuru, amaze guha intumwa yari yaritoreye amabwiriza ye, abigirishije Roho Mutagatifu." 
Acts1:3 Ni na bo yari yariyeretse nyuma y’ibabara rye ari muzima, abihamya akoresheje ibimenyetso byinshi. Nuko ababonekera mu minsi mirongo ine, abaganirira iby’Ingoma y’Imana." 
Acts1:4 Igihe yariho asangira na bo, abategeka ko batazatirimuka i Yeruzalemu, ahubwo ko bazahategerereza ibyo Imana Data yasezeranye. Arababwira ati «Ni na byo mwanyumvanye:" 
Acts1:5 ngo Yohani yabatirishije amazi, naho mwebwe muzabatirizwa muri Roho Mutagatifu, nyuma y’iminsi mikeya.»" 
Acts1:6 Nuko bakaba bateraniye hamwe, maze baramubaza bati «Nyagasani, ubu se ni ho ugiye kubyutsa ingoma ya Israheli?»" 
Acts1:7 Arabasubiza ati «Si mwebwe mugenewe kumenya ibihe n’amagingo Data yageneye ubutegetsi bwe bwite," 
Acts1:8 ahubwo mugiye guhabwa imbaraga za Roho Mutagatifu uzabazamo, bityo muzambere abahamya i Yeruzalemu, muri Yudeya yose no muri Samariya, ndetse no kugera ku mpera y’isi.»" 
Acts1:9 Amaze kuvuga atyo azamurwa mu ijuru bamureba, maze igicu kiramukingiriza ntibongera kumubona." 
Acts1:10 Uko bagahanze amaso ejuru, Yezu amaze kugenda, babona abantu babiri bambaye imyambaro yererana bahagaze iruhande rwabo." 
Acts1:11 Barababaza bati «Yemwe bagabo b’i Galileya, ni iki kibahagaritse aho mureba mu ijuru? Yezu uwo ubavanywemo akajyanwa mu ijuru, azaza nk’uko mumubonye ajya mu ijuru.»" 
Acts1:12 Bava ku musozi witwa uw’Imizeti bagaruka i Yeruzalemu, — uwo musozi ukaba bugufi ya Yeruzalemu, nk’urugendo bemerewe gukora ku isabato —." 
Acts1:13 Bahageze, bazamuka mu cyumba cyo hejuru aho babaga. Abo ni Petero, Yohani, Yakobo, Andereya, Filipo na Tomasi, Baritolomayo na Matayo, Yakobo mwene Alufeyi, Simoni umunyeshyaka, na Yuda mwene Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Bose barangwaga n’umutima umwe, bagashishikarira gusenga, bari kumwe n’abagore bamwe, barimo Mariya nyina wa Yezu, n’abavandimwe be." 
Acts1:15 Muri iyo minsi, Petero arahaguruka, ahagarara hagati y’abavandimwe bari bateraniye aho, bageze nko ku ijana na makumyabiri. Nuko arababwira ati" 
Acts1:16 «Bavandimwe, ibyo Roho Mutagatifu yavugishije Dawudi mu Byanditswe ku byerekeye Yuda wayoboye abafashe Yezu, byagombaga kubaho koko!" 
Acts1:17 Uwo yari umwe muri twe kandi yari yaratorewe uyu murimo wacu. 
Acts1:18 Nuko rero, uwo mugabo yari yariguriye umurima ukomotse ku gihembo cy’icyaha cye, agwa yubamye; ni ko gukindukira hagati, maze amara ye yose arasandara." 
Acts1:19 Abatuye i Yeruzalemu bose barabimenya, bituma uwo murima bawita mu rurimi rwabo Hakeludama, ari byo kuvuga ngo umurima w’amaraso." 
Acts1:20 Koko rero, ni ko byanditswe no mu gitabo cya Zaburi ngo ’Iwe harakaba itongo, ntihazagire uhatura.’ kandi ngo ’Umurimo we uzahabwe undi" 
Acts1:21 None rero, hari abagabo twagendanye igihe cyose Nyagasani Yezu yari kumwe na twe," 
Acts1:22 uhereye kuri batisimu ya Yohani ukageza ku munsi atuvanywemo. Ni ngombwa rero ko umwe muri bo yafatanya natwe kuba umuhamya w’izuka rya Yezu.» 
Acts1:23 Nuko bazana babiri muri bo; umwe akaba Yozefu witwaga Barisaba, wari waranahimbwe ’Ntungane’, undi akaba Matiyasi." 
Acts1:24 Hanyuma basenga bagira bati «Nyagasani, wowe uzi imitima ya bose, garagaza muri aba bombi uwo wihitiyemo," 
Acts1:25 kugira ngo ahabwe umwanya mu murimo wa gitumwa Yuda yaretse, akajya ahamukwiye.»" 
Acts1:26 Nuko bakora ubufindo maze bwerekana Matiyasi, guhera ubwo abarwa hamwe n’Intumwa cumi n’imwe." 
Acts2:1 Umunsi wa Pentekositi uragera, bose bakaba bakoraniye hamwe." 
Acts2:2 Ako kanya, umuriri umeze nk’inkubi y’umuyaga uva mu ijuru, maze wuzura mu nzu bari barimo." 
Acts2:3 Nuko haboneka indimi zisa n’iz’umuriro, zigabanya zijya kuri buri muntu muri bo." 
Acts2:4 Ubwo bose buzuramo Roho Mutagatifu, batangira kuvuga mu zindi ndimi, uko Roho abahaye kuzivuga." 
Acts2:5 Aho rero i Yeruzalemu habaga Abayahudi bubaha Imana, bari baraturutse mu mahanga yose ari mu nsi y’ijuru." 
Acts2:6 Ngo bumve urwo rusaku, rubanda rwose barakorana maze barumirwa, kuko buri wese yabumvaga bavuga mu rurimi rwe bwite." 
Acts2:7 Barashoberwa, batangara bavuga bati «Mbese aba bose bavuga si Abanyagalileya?" 
Acts2:8 Bishoboka bite se ko buri muntu muri twe abumva bavuga mu rurimi rwe kavukire? 
Acts2:9 Baba Abapariti, Abamedi n’Abelamu, baba abatuye muri Mezopotamiya, muri Yudeya no muri Kapadosiya, muri Ponti no muri Aziya," 
Acts2:10 muri Furujiya no muri Pamfiliya, mu Misiri no mu turere twa Libiya duhereranye na Sireni, baba abashyitsi baturutse i Roma," 
Acts2:11 Abayahudi kavukire n’abayoboke b’idini yabo, Abanyakireta n’Abarabu, twese turabumva bamamaza mu ndimi zacu bwite ibitangaza by’Imana.»" 
Acts2:12 Bose bari bumiwe, bagatangara babazanya bati «Ibi birashaka kuvuga iki?»" 
Acts2:13 Ariko hakaba n’abandi babakwena, bagira bati «Aba bantu basinze divayi nshyashya!»" 
Acts2:14 Nuko Petero ahagararanye na ba Cumi n’umwe, arangurura ijwi agira ati «Bantu bo muri Yudeya, namwe mwese abatuye i Yeruzalemu, nimumenye neza ibi ngibi kandi mutege amatwi amagambo yanjye." 
Acts2:15 Aba bantu ntibanyoye nk’uko mubitekereza, kuko hakiri ku isaha ya gatatu y’igitondo;" 
Acts2:16 ahubwo ibi mureba ni ibyavuzwe n’umuhanuzi Yoweli, ati" 
Acts2:17 ’Mu minsi ya nyuma, — uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga —, nzasendereza Umwuka wanjye ku cyitwa ikiremwa cyose. Abahungu banyu n’abakobwa banyu bazahanure, urubyiruko rwanyu ruzabonekerwe n’abasaza banyu bazabonere mu nzozi." 
Acts2:18 Koko muri iyo minsi, abagaragu banjye n’abaja banjye, nzabasenderezamo Umwuka wanjye maze bahanure." 
Acts2:19 Nzakora ibintu bitangaje hejuru mu kirere, n’ibimenyetso bikomeye hasi ku isi: hazaboneka amaraso, umuriro n’inkingi y’umwotsi." 
Acts2:20 Izuba rizijima n’ukwezi guhinduke amaraso, mbere y’uko haza Umunsi wa Nyagasani, Umunsi ukomeye kandi w’ikuzo." 
Acts2:21 Ubwo rero umuntu wese uziyambaza izina rya Nyagasani, azakizwa.’" 
Acts2:22 Yemwe Bayisraheli, nimutege amatwi amagambo yanjye: Yezu w’i Nazareti, uwo muntu Imana yemeje muri mwe, imukoresha ibitangaza, ibikorwa n’ibimenyetso bikomeye rwagati muri mwe, nk’uko mubizi ubwanyu," 
Acts2:23 uwo muntu rero, bikurikije umugambi udakuka w’Imana, amaze gutangwa, mwaramwishe mumubambisha ku musaraba amaboko y’abagome." 
Acts2:24 Ariko Imana yaramuzuye, imubohora ku ngoyi z’urupfu kuko bitashobokaga ko rumuherana." 
Acts2:25 Koko kandi, Dawudi yavuze ibimwerekeyeho ati ’Narebaga Nyagasani imbere yanjye ubudahwema, kuko ari iburyo bwanjye kugira ngo ntadandabirana." 
Acts2:26 Ni cyo gituma umutima wanjye uri mu byishimo, n’ururimi rwanjye rukaba runezerewe, byongeye kandi nzaruhukana icyizere," 
Acts2:27 kuko utazatererana ubugingo bwanjye mu kuzimu, kandi ntuzatume intungane yawe imenyana n’ubushanguke." 
Acts2:28 Wamenyesheje inzira zigana mu bugingo, unyuzuzamo ibyishimo unyereka uruhanga rwawe.’" 
Acts2:29 Bavandimwe, nta cyambuza kubabwira nta shiti ko umukurambere wacu Dawudi yapfuye, ko yahambwe ndetse n’imva ye ikaba ikiri iwacu kugeza uyu munsi." 
Acts2:30 Nyamara, kuba yari umuhanuzi kandi yazirikanaga ko Imana yamusezeranyishije indahiro kuzicaza ku ntebe ye y’ubwami uwo mu bamukomokaho," 
Acts2:31 yabonye atyo mbere y’igihe iby’izuka rya Kristu, maze amuvugaho ati ’Ntiyatereranywe ikuzimu kandi umubiri we ntiwigeze umenyana n’ubushanguke.’" 
Acts2:32 Yezu uwo rero Imana yaramuzuye, twese turi abahamya babyo." 
Acts2:33 Aho amariye gukuzwa n’ububasha bw’Imana, no guhabwa na Se Roho Mutagatifu wasezeranywe, amusendereza mu bantu nk’uko mubibona kandi mubyumva." 
Acts2:34 Dawudi we n’ubwo atazamutse mu ijuru, nyamara yaravuze ati ’Nyagasani yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye ati: Icara iburyo bwanjye," 
Acts2:35 kugeza ko abanzi bawe, mbagira akabaho ukandagizaho ibirenge byawe.’" 
Acts2:36 Nuko rero, inzu yose ya Israheli nimenye idashidikanya ko uwo Yezu mwabambye, Imana yamugize Umutegetsi n’Umukiza.»" 
Acts2:37 Ngo bumve ayo magambo barakangarana, babaza Petero n’izindi Ntumwa bati «Bavandimwe, dukore iki?»" 
Acts2:38 Petero arabasubiza ati «Nimwisubireho, buri muntu muri mwe abatizwe mu izina rya Yezu Kristu kugira ngo ababarirwe ibyaha bye, kandi muhabwe ingabire ya Roho Mutagatifu." 
Acts2:39 Kuko Isezerano ari mwe ryagenewe kimwe n’abana banyu, ndetse n’abari kure bose, n’abandi batabarika uko Nyagasani Imana yacu azabihamagarira.»" 
Acts2:40 Ababwira n’andi magambo menshi yo kubemeza no kubakomeza, agira ati «Nimwirokore, mwitandukanye n’aba bantu bayobye.»" 
Acts2:41 Nuko abemeye izo nyigisho barabatizwa, uwo munsi biyongeraho abantu bagera ku bihumbi bitatu." 
Acts2:42 Bahoraga bashishikariye kumva inyigisho z’Intumwa, gushyira hamwe kivandimwe, kumanyurira hamwe umugati no gusenga." 
Acts2:43 Abantu bose bagiraga ubwoba kubera ibitangaza n’ibimenyetso bikomeye byakorwaga n’Intumwa. 
Acts2:44 Abemera bose bari bashyize hamwe, n’ibyo batunze byose bakabigira rusange." 
Acts2:45 Bagurishaga amasambu yabo n’ibintu byabo, bose bakagabana ikiguzi cyabyo bakurikije ibyo buri muntu akeneye." 
Acts2:46 Iminsi yose bashishikariraga kujya mu Ngoro y’Imana bashyize hamwe, bakamanyurira umugati imuhira, bagasangira mu byishimo no mu bwiyoroshye bw’umutima." 
Acts2:47 Basingizaga Imana kandi bagashimwa n’abantu bose; nuko Nyagasani akagwiza uko bukeye umubare w’abacunguwe. 
Acts3:1 Umunsi umwe, saa cyenda ari cyo gihe cy’isengesho rusange, Petero na Yohani bazamuka bajya mu Ngoro y’Imana." 
Acts3:2 Hakaba umuntu wavutse ari ikirema, buri munsi bakamuzana imbere y’umuryango w’Ingoro witwa «Uw’Uburanga», kugira ngo asabe imfashanyo abinjiraga mu Ngoro bose." 
Acts3:3 Ngo abone Petero na Yohani bagiye kwinjira mu Ngoro, abasaba imfashanyo." 
Acts3:4 Nuko Petero, ari hamwe na Yohani, aramwitegereza maze aramubwira ati «Ngaho turebe! »" 
Acts3:5 Uwo muntu agumya kubahanga amaso, kuko yari ategereje ko hari icyo bari bumuhe." 
Acts3:6 Petero aramubwira ati «Ari zahabu, ari na feza, nta byo mfite; ariko icyo mfite ndakiguhaye: mu izina rya Yezu Kristu w’i Nazareti, haguruka ugende!»" 
Acts3:7 Nuko amufata ikiganza cy’iburyo aramuhagurutsa. Ako kanya ibirenge bye n’utugombambari birakomera; 
Acts3:8 arabaduka, arahagarara, aratambuka yinjirana na bo mu Ngoro y'Imana, agenda asimbuka kandi asingiza Imana." 
Acts3:9 Nuko rubanda rwose ngo bamubone agenda kandi asingiza Imana," 
Acts3:10 baramumenya: koko yari wa wundi wajyaga asabiriza, yicaye imbere y’Umuryango w’Ingoro y'Imana witwa ""Uw'Uburanga"". Nuko abantu barumirwa, batangazwa n’ibimubayeho." 
Acts3:11 Kubera ko uwo muntu yanze kuvirira Petero na Yohani, bitangaza cyane rubanda rwose, biruka babasanga ahitwa ku «Ibaraza rya Salomoni»." 
Acts3:12 Petero abibonye ni ko kubwira rubanda ati «Bantu ba Israheli, ni iki gitumye mutangazwa n’ibimaze kuba? Cyangwa se ni iki gitumye muduhanga amaso, nk’aho duhaye uyu muntu kugenda ku bw’ububasha bwacu cyangwa ku bw’ubutungane bwacu bwite?" 
Acts3:13 Imana ya Abrahamu, ya Izaki na Yakobo, Imana y’abakurambere bacu yakujije umugaragu wayo Yezu mwebwe mwatanze, mukamwihakanira imbere ya Pilato kandi we yari yiyemeje kumurekura." 
Acts3:14 Mwihakanye Umutagatifu n’Intungane, maze musaba ko babarekurira umwicanyi." 
Acts3:15 Mwicishije Umugenga w’ubugingo, ariko Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye, turi abagabo bo kubihamya." 
Acts3:16 Kubera ko twiringiye izina rya Yezu, iryo zina ni ryo ryakomeje uyu muntu mubona kandi muzi; maze ukwemera gukomoka kuri Yezu kumusubiza ubuzima bwe bwose mu maso yanyu mwese." 
Acts3:17 None rero, bavandimwe, nzi yuko ibyo mwabikoze mubitewe n’ubujiji kimwe n’abatware banyu." 
Acts3:18 Nyamara Imana yujuje ityo ibyo yari yaravugishije Abahanuzi bose mbere y’uko biba, ko Kristu yagombaga kubabara." 
Acts3:19 Nimwisubireho rero kandi mugarukire Imana, kugira ngo ibyaha byanyu bihanagurwe;" 
Acts3:20 bityo hazabeho ibihe by’ihumure muhawe na Nyagasani, ubwo azaboherereza Kristu wabagenewe, ari we Yezu," 
Acts3:21 Uwo ijuru rigomba kwakira kuzageza ku bihe by’ivugururwa ry’ibintu byose: ngibyo ibyo Imana yavugishije Abahanuzi bayo batagatifu bo mu bihe bya kera. 
Acts3:22 Koko Musa yaravuze ati ’Nyagasani Imana azababonera mu bavandimwe banyu Umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye; muzamwumvire mu byo azababwira byose. 
Acts3:23 Umuntu wese utazumvira uwo Muhanuzi, azacibwa mu muryango wayo.’" 
Acts3:24 Kandi n’Abahanuzi bose, uhereye kuri Samweli no ku bamusimbuye, bavuze iby’iy’iminsi turimo." 
Acts3:25 Ni mwebwe abaragwa b’Abahanuzi, n’ab’Isezerano Imana yagiranye n’abasekuruza bacu igihe ibwiye Abrahamu iti ’Imiryango yose y’isi izaherwa umugisha mu rubyaro rwawe.’" 
Acts3:26 Ni mwebwe mbere na mbere Imana yahingukirije Umugaragu wayo, iramuboherereza kugira ngo abazanire umugisha; bityo buri muntu muri mwe abone kuzinukwa ibibi yakoraga.»" 
Acts4:1 Igihe Petero na Yohani bariho babwira rubanda, abaherezabitambo, umutegeka w’Ingoro n’Abasaduseyi baraza, barabegera." 
Acts4:2 Bari barakajwe cyane no kubona bigisha rubanda kandi banamamaza izuka ry’abapfuye, bahereye kuri Yezu." 
Acts4:3 Nuko barabafatisha babaraza mu buroko, kuko bwari bugorobye." 
Acts4:4 Nyamara abenshi mu bari bumvise izo nyigisho baremera, umubare wabo ugera nko ku bantu ibihumbi bitanu." 
Acts4:5 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, abatware b’Abayahudi, abakuru b’umuryango n’abigishamategeko bakoranira i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts4:6 Hari kandi na Ana, umuherezabitambo mukuru, na Kayifa, na Yohani, na Alegisanderi, n’abo mu muryango w’umuherezabitambo mukuru bose." 
Acts4:7 Nuko batumiza Petero na Yohani, batangira kubabaza bati «Biriya mwabikoze ku buhe bubasha cyangwa se ku bw’irihe zina?»" 
Acts4:8 Ubwo Petero yuzuye Roho Mutagatifu arabasubiza ati 
Acts4:9 «Batware, namwe bakuru b’umuryango, uyu munsi turabazwa iby’ineza yagiriwe ikirema, no gusobanura uburyo uyu muntu yakijijwe." 
Acts4:10 Nimumenye neza rero, mwebwe mwese n’umuryango wose wa Israheli, ko izina rya Yezu Kristu w’i Nazareti mwebwe ubwanyu mwabambye, Imana ikamuzura mu bapfuye, ari ryo uyu muntu akesha kuba ahagaze imbere yanyu ari mutaraga." 
Acts4:11 Yezu uwo ni we rya buye ryajugunywe namwe abubatsi, nyamara rigahinduka insanganyarukuta." 
Acts4:12 Bikaba rero nta wundi wundi twakesha umukiro usibye we, kuko ku isi nta rindi zina abantu bahawe, ngo abe ari ryo turonkeramo uburokorwe.»" 
Acts4:13 Ngo babone ukuntu Petero na Yohani bavuga bashize amanga, kandi bazi ko ari abantu batize, ahubwo ari rubanda rusanzwe, barumirwa. Baza kwibuka ko bagendanaga na Yezu;" 
Acts4:14 banitegereje uwo muntu wakijijwe wari uhagararanye na bo, babura icyo babasubiza." 
Acts4:15 Nuko bategeka ko babavana imbere y’Inama nkuru, barabazanya bati" 
Acts4:16 «Bariya bantu tubagenze dute? Dore bakoze igitangaza kiragaragara, cyanamenyekanye mu batuye Yeruzalemu bose kandi ntidushobora kugihakana." 
Acts4:17 Ariko kugira ngo bidakomeza kwamamara muri rubanda, nimucyo tubakange, tubabuze kuzongera kugira uwo babwira bitwaje iryo zina.»" 
Acts4:18 Ni ko kubahamagaza, bababuza rwose kuzongera kuvuga cyangwa kwigisha mu izina rya Yezu." 
Acts4:19 Ariko Petero na Yohani barabasubiza bati «Icyaba kiboneye mu maso y’Imana ni ikihe: ari ukubumvira cyangwa se kumvira Imana? Ngaho namwe nimwihitiremo! 
Acts4:20 Twe rero ntidushobora guceceka ibyo twiboneye kandi tukabyiyumvira.» 
Acts4:21 Bamaze kubuka inabi barabarekura, kuko babuze uko babahana kubera rubanda basingizaga Imana bakurije ku byari byabaye." 
Acts4:22 Koko kandi, uwo muntu wari wakijijwe ku buryo bw’agatangaza yari arengeje imyaka mirongo ine." 
Acts4:23 Petero na Yohani bamaze kurekurwa basanga bagenzi babo, babatekerereza ibyo abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango bababwiye." 
Acts4:24 Ngo bamare kubyumva, bose hamwe n’umutima umwe basenga Imana, bagira bati «Nyagasani, ni wowe waremye ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose;" 
Acts4:25 ni wowe kandi ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu wavugiye mu munwa w’umukurambere wacu Dawudi, umugaragu wawe, uti ’Ni iki giteye amahanga gusakabaka, n’imiryango gutekereza ibidafite umumaro?" 
Acts4:26 Abami b’isi barahagurutse n’abatware barakorana, kugira ngo barwanye Nyagasani n’Uwo yisigiye amavuta y’ubutore.’" 
Acts4:27 Ni ukuri rwose, Herodi na Ponsiyo Pilato, kumwe n’amahanga yose n’imiryango yose ya Israheli, bakoraniye muri uyu mugi kugira ngo barwanye Yezu, umugaragu wawe mutagatifu, uwo wisigiye amavuta y’ubutore." 
Acts4:28 Barangiza batyo imigambi yawe yose wari waragennye kuva kera, ku bw’ububasha bwawe n’ubushake bwawe." 
Acts4:29 None rero, Nyagasani, witegereze ibyo badukangisha byose, maze uhe abagaragu bawe kuvuga ijambo ryawe bashize amanga." 
Acts4:30 Urambure ikiganza cyawe maze indwara zikizwe, haboneke ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza mu izina rya Yezu, umugaragu wawe mutagatifu.»" 
Acts4:31 Nuko ngo bamare gusenga, aho bari bateraniye hahinda umushyitsi; bose buzura Roho Mutagatifu, maze bamamaza ijambo ry’Imana bashize amanga." 
Acts4:32 Imbaga y’abemera yari ifite umutima umwe n’amatwara amwe, kandi nta n’umwe wibwiraga ko icyo atunze cyose ari icye bwite, ahubwo byose byari rusange kuri bo." 
Acts4:33 Nuko Intumwa zikomeza guhamya izuka rya Nyagasani Yezu n’ububasha bukomeye, kandi ubugwaneza bwinshi bwari bubuzuyemo bose." 
Acts4:34 Koko rero, nta mukene wababagamo, kuko ababaga bafite amasambu cyangwa amazu babigurishaga, bakazana ikiguzi cyabyo," 
Acts4:35 bakagishyikiriza Intumwa. Nuko bakabisaranganya, bakurikije ibyo buri muntu akeneye." 
Acts4:36 Bityo na Yozefu, uwo Intumwa zari zarahimbye Barinaba — ari byo kuvuga Imaragahinda —, wari n’umulevi ukomoka i Shipure, akaba yari afite umurima." 
Acts4:37 Agurisha uwo murima maze ikiguzi cyawo agishyikiriza Intumwa. 
Acts5:1 Ariko umuntu witwa Ananiya, amaze kubyumvikanaho n’umugore we Safira, agurisha isambu ye;" 
Acts5:2 hanyuma yisigira igice cy’ikiguzi cyayo ndetse n’umugore we abyemeye, maze ajyana igice gisigaye agishyikiriza Intumwa." 
Acts5:3 Petero aramubwira ati «Ananiya, ni iki cyatumye Sekinyoma agutaha mu mutima? Wabeshye Roho Mutagatifu maze usigarana igice cy’ikiguzi cy’isambu yawe." 
Acts5:4 Ntiwashoboraga se kugumana isambu yawe ntuyigurishe, cyangwa n’aho umariye kuyigurisha, ntiwari kugumana ikiguzi cyayo uko ubishaka? Uwo mugambi waje ute mu mutima wawe? Si abantu wabeshye, ahubwo wabeshye Imana.»" 
Acts5:5 Ananiya ngo yumve ayo magambo, yitura hasi, araca; maze ababyumvise bose bashya ubwoba." 
Acts5:6 Nuko abasore baraza baramupfunya, maze bajya kumuhamba." 
Acts5:7 Hashize nk’amasaha atatu, umugore we na we araza, ariko atazi ibyabaye." 
Acts5:8 Petero aramubaza ati «Ni ko ye, koko iki ni cyo kiguzi mwagurishije isambu yanyu?» Umugore arasubiza ati «Ni icyo ngicyo.»" 
Acts5:9 Petero ni ko kumubwira ati «Mwaje guhuza mute umugambi, kugira ngo musembure Roho wa Nyagasani? Umva imirindi y’abavuye guhamba umugabo wawe bageze ku muryango; nawe bagiye kukujyana.»" 
Acts5:10 Ako kanya agwa imbere ya Petero, araca. Ba basore ngo binjire basanga amaze gupfa, na we baramujyana bamuhamba iruhande rw’umugabo we." 
Acts5:11 Kiliziya yose n’abumvise ibyabaye bose bashya ubwoba. 
Acts5:12 Intumwa zikomeza gutanga ibimenyetso no gukora ibitangaza byinshi muri rubanda, kandi bose hamwe n’umutima umwe bagakoranira mu nsi y’Ibaraza rya Salomoni." 
Acts5:13 Ariko n’ubwo rubanda babashimaga, ntihagire n’umwe utinyuka kubegera." 
Acts5:14 Nyamara abantu batabarika, abagabo n’abagore, bagakomeza kwiyongera ku bemera Nyagasani." 
Acts5:15 Byageraga n’aho bazana abarwayi mu mihanda y’umugi, bakabaryamisha ku mariri cyangwa mu ngobyi kugira ngo Petero naza kuhanyura, nibura igicucu cye kigere kuri umwe muri bo." 
Acts5:16 Ndetse n’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu bagashika, baturutse mu turere dukikije Yeruzalemu, bazanye abarwayi n’abantu bahanzweho na za roho mbi, maze bose bagakira." 
Acts5:17 Nuko umuherezabitambo mukuru kimwe n’abari kumwe na we bose — ari byo kuvuga abo mu gatsiko k’Abasaduseyi — bashengurwa n’ishyari; 
Acts5:18 bafatisha Intumwa, bazishyira mu buroko rusange." 
Acts5:19 Nyamara muri iryo joro, Umumalayika wa Nyagasani akingura inzugi z’uburoko, abakuramo maze arababwira ati" 
Acts5:20 «Nimugende muhagarare mu Ngoro y’Imana, maze mubwire rubanda ayo magambo yose azabahesha ubugingo!»" 
Acts5:21 Ngo bamare kubyumva, mu museso binjira mu Ngoro, batangira kwigisha. Umuherezabitambo mukuru kimwe n’abari kumwe na we baraza, bahamagaza Inama nkuru igizwe n’abakuru bose b’Abayisraheli; ni ko gutuma ngo bajye gushaka Intumwa mu buroko." 
Acts5:22 Abagaragu baragenda; ngo bagere mu buroko ntibabasangamo. Nuko bagaruka bababwira bati 
Acts5:23 «Twasanze uburoko bufunze neza n’abarinzi bahagaze imbere y’imiryango, ariko dukinguye ntitwagira n’umwe dusangamo.»" 
Acts5:24 Ngo babyumve, umutegeka w’Ingoro n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo barashoberwa, bibaza uko byabagendekeye." 
Acts5:25 Ariko haza umuntu arababwira ati «Dore ba bantu mwari mwashyize mu buroko bahagaze mu Ngoro kandi bariho barigisha rubanda.» 
Acts5:26 Nuko umutegeka w’Ingoro ajyana n’abagaragu be kuzana Intumwa, ariko batazakuye, kuko batinyaga ko rubanda babatera amabuye." 
Acts5:27 Barabazana rero babahagarika imbere y’Inama nkuru. Umuherezabitambo mukuru arababaza ati 
Acts5:28 «Twari twarabihanangirije dukomeje kutazongera kwigisha mwitwaje iryo zina, none dore Yeruzalemu yose mwayujujemo inyigisho zanyu. Murashaka rero kuduhamya amaraso y’uwo muntu?»" 
Acts5:29 Petero n’izindi Ntumwa barabasubiza bati «Tugomba kumvira Imana kuruta abantu. 
Acts5:30 Imana y’abasekuruza bacu yazuye Yezu, uwo mwishe mumumanitse ku giti." 
Acts5:31 Ni we Imana yakurishije ububasha bwayo ngo abe Umutegetsi n’Umukiza, kugira ngo aronkere Israheli ukwisubiraho n’ibabarirwa ry’ibyaha." 
Acts5:32 Turi abagabo bo kubihamya, twe na Roho Mutagatifu Imana yahaye abayumvira.»" 
Acts5:33 Bo ngo babyumve, umujinya urabasya maze batekereza kubica." 
Acts5:34 Ariko mu Nama nkuru hahaguruka umugabo w’Umufarizayi witwa Gamaliyeli, yari umwigishamategeko wubahwaga n’abantu bose; nuko ategeka ko Intumwa zahezwa akanya gato." 
Acts5:35 Hanyuma arababwira ati «Bayisraheli, muritondere ibyo mugiye kugirira bariya bantu!" 
Acts5:36 Dore hambere aha hadutse uwitwa Tewudasi; aza avuga ko ari umuntu ukomeye, maze abantu nka magana ane baramuyoboka. Nyamara yamaze kwicwa, abari baramuyobotse baratatana, ibyo yari yatangiye birayoyoka." 
Acts5:37 Nyuma y’uwo, mu minsi y’ibarura, haduka Yuda w’Umunyagalileya, akurikirwa n’abantu benshi. Ariko na we aza kwicwa, abari baramuyobotse bose baratatana." 
Acts5:38 None rero mbibabwire: ntimugire icyo mutwara bariya bantu, nimubareke bagende. Niba umugambi wabo n’ibikorwa byabo bikomoka ku bantu, bizayoyoka ku bwabyo." 
Acts5:39 Ariko kandi niba bikomoka ku Mana, ntimuzashobora kubisenya. Muramenye, hato mutavaho murwanya Imana.» Nuko iyo nama barayemera," 
Acts5:40 bahamagara Intumwa bazikubita ibiboko, bazibuza rwose kongera kwigisha mu izina rya Yezu, maze barazirekura." 
Acts5:41 Intumwa ngo zive mu Nama nkuru, zigenda zishimye kuko zagize ihirwe ryo kugirirwa nabi, zizira izina rya Yezu." 
Acts5:42 Nuko buri munsi ntizisibe kwigishiriza mu Ngoro y’Imana no mu ngo, zamamaza Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu Yezu." 
Acts6:1 Muri iyo minsi, umubare w’abigishwa ukomeza kwiyongera; nuko abavugaga ikigereki muri bo batangira kwinubira Abahebureyi, kuko abapfakazi babo batitabwagaho uko bikwiye mu igabura rya buri munsi." 
Acts6:2 Nuko ba Cumi na babiri bahamagaza ikoraniro ry’abigishwa, barababwira bati «Ntibikwiye ko tureka ijambo ry’Imana ngo tujye mu byo kugabura." 
Acts6:3 None rero, bavandimwe, nimwishakemo abagabo barindwi b’inyangamugayo buzuye Roho Mutagatifu n’ubuhanga, maze tubashinge uwo murimo." 
Acts6:4 Naho twebwe tuzagumya kwibanda ubudahwema ku isengesho no ku murimo wo kwigisha ijambo ry’Imana.» 
Acts6:5 Iyo nama ishimisha ikoraniro ryose; batora Sitefano, umuntu wuzuye ukwemera na Roho Mutagatifu, batora na Filipo na Porokori, Nikanori na Timoni, Parumena na Nikola wo muri Antiyokiya wari umuyoboke w’idini ry’Abayahudi." 
Acts6:6 Maze babashyira Intumwa; zimaze kubasabira, zibaramburiraho ibiganza." 
Acts6:7 Nuko ijambo ry’Imana rikomeza gukwira hose, umubare w’abigishwa urushaho kwiyongera i Yeruzalemu, ndetse n’abaherezabitambo benshi bayoboka ukwemera." 
Acts6:8 Sitefano, uko Imana yakamusenderejemo ubutoneshwe n’ububasha, yakoraga ibitangaza n’ibimenyetso bikomeye muri rubanda." 
Acts6:9 Ariko abantu bo mu isengero ryitwa «iry’ababohowe», hamwe n’Abanyasireni n’Abanyalegisandiriya, n’abantu bo muri Silisiya n’abo muri Aziya, batangira kujya impaka na Sitefano." 
Acts6:10 Nyamara ntibashoboraga guhangara ubuhanga bwe kimwe na Roho wamuvugiragamo," 
Acts6:11 bituma bagurira abantu ngo bavuge bati «Twamwumvise avuga amagambo atuka Musa n’Imana.» 
Acts6:12 Nuko bahuruza rubanda hamwe n’abakuru b’umuryango n’abigishamategeko; baraza bamugwa gitumo baramufata, bamujyana mu Nama nkuru." 
Acts6:13 Ni ko kuzana abashinjabinyoma baravuga bati «Uyu muntu ntahwema kuvuga amagambo asebya Ahantu hatagatifu kimwe n’Amategeko; 
Acts6:14 tunamwumva avuga ko uwo Yezu w’i Nazareti azasenya aha Hantu hatagatifu, akanahindura Amategeko twahawe na Musa.»" 
Acts6:15 Abari mu Nama nkuru bose baramwitegerezaga, maze babona mu ruhanga rwe hasa n’ah’umumalayika." 
Acts7:1 Umuherezabitambo mukuru abaza Sitefano ati «Ibyo se koko ni ko biri?» 
Acts7:2 Sitefano arasubiza ati «Bavandimwe kandi babyeyi, nimunyumve: Imana Nyir’ikuzo yabonekeye umukurambere wacu Abrahamu igihe yari muri Mezopotamiya, mbere y’uko atura i Harani." 
Acts7:3 Iramubwira iti ’Wimuke mu gihugu cyawe no mu muryango wawe, maze ujye mu gihugu nzakwereka.’" 
Acts7:4 Nuko Abrahamu yimuka mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya, ajya gutura i Harani. Nyuma y’urupfu rwa se, Imana imuzana muri iki gihugu mutuyemo ubu ngubu." 
Acts7:5 Nyamara ntiyigera imukebera isambu muri iki gihugu, habe ndetse n’ahangana urwara, ahubwo imusezeranya kuzakimuhaho umurage, we n’urubyaro rwe, n’ubwo Abrahamu atagiraga umwana." 
Acts7:6 Imana ni ko kumubwira iti ’Urubyaro rwawe ruzatura mu gihugu cy’amahanga, babakoreshe imirimo y’agahato kandi babagirire nabi imyaka magana ane." 
Acts7:7 Nyamara igihugu kizabagira abacakara, ni jye ubwanjye uzagicira urubanza — iyo ari Imana ibivuga —, hanyuma bazavayo maze bajye bansengera aha hantu.’" 
Acts7:8 Nuko igirana na we Isezerano rirangwa no kugenywa; bityo abyaye Izaki amugenya ku munsi wa munani, hanyuma Izaki na we abigenza atyo kuri Yakobo, na Yakobo abigenza atyo ku basekuruza bacu uko ari cumi na babiri." 
Acts7:9 Abo basekuruza bacu bagirira Yozefu ishyari, baramugurisha, ajyanwa mu Misiri. Ariko Imana yari kumwe na we," 
Acts7:10 imugobotora mu magorwa ye yose, maze imuha ubutoni n’ubuhanga imbere ya Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, amugira umutware wa Misiri n’uw’urugo rwe rwose." 
Acts7:11 Nuko inzara iza gutera mu Misiri no muri Kanahani; amagorwa aba yose maze abasekuruza bacu babura ibibatunga. 
Acts7:12 Yakobo ngo yumve ko mu Misiri hari ibiribwa, yoherezayo ku ncuro ya mbere abasekuruza bacu." 
Acts7:13 Ku ncuro ya kabiri Yozefu yimenyesha abavandimwe be, bityo na Farawo amenyana n’umuryango wa Yozefu." 
Acts7:14 Nuko Yozefu abatuma kuzana se Yakobo n’umuryango we wose, bose hamwe bari abantu mirongo irindwi na batanu." 
Acts7:15 Yakobo aramanuka ajya mu Misiri, aba ari ho apfira kimwe n’abasekuruza bacu." 
Acts7:16 Nuko babajyana i Sikemu, babahamba mu mva Abrahamu yari yaraguze ku giciro cya feza na bene Hemori, i Sikemu." 
Acts7:17 Igihe cyegereje kugira ngo Isezerano Imana yagiriye Abrahamu rirangire, umuryango uriyongera maze ugwira mu Misiri," 
Acts7:18 kugeza ubwo mu Misiri hima undi mwami utari uzi Yozefu. 
Acts7:19 Uwo mwami apyinagaza umuryango wacu, agirira nabi abasekuruza bacu, kugeza aho abategeka kujugunya abana babo ngo batabaho." 
Acts7:20 Muri icyo gihe Musa aravuka, yari umwana mwiza kandi w’igikundiro mu maso y’Imana. Arererwa mu rugo rwa se amezi atatu;" 
Acts7:21 amaze gutabwa, umukobwa wa Farawo aramuraruza, maze amurera nk’umwana we bwite." 
Acts7:22 Nuko Musa yigishwa ubuhanga bwose bw’Abanyamisiri, aba igihangange mu magambo ye no mu bikorwa bye." 
Acts7:23 Igihe Musa yujuje imyaka mirongo ine, igitekerezo kimuzamo cyo kugenderera abavandimwe be, Abayisraheli." 
Acts7:24 Ngo abone umwe muri bo agirirwa nabi, aramutabara, maze kugira ngo ahorere umuvandimwe we wagirirwaga nabi, yica wa Munyamisiri." 
Acts7:25 Yatekerezaga ko abavandimwe be bazumviraho ko Imana izabarokoresha ikiganza cye, ariko ntibabyumva." 
Acts7:26 Bukeye asanga barwana ubwabo, agerageza kubunga agira ati ’Yemwe bagabo, ko muri abavandimwe; igituma mugirirana nabi ni iki?’" 
Acts7:27 Ariko uwarenganyaga mugenzi we asunika Musa, avuga ati ’Ni nde wakugize umutware n’umucamanza wacu?" 
Acts7:28 Mbese urashaka kunyica nk’uko ejo wishe wa Munyamisiri?’ 
Acts7:29 Musa ngo yumve ayo magambo arahunga, asuhukira mu gihugu cya Madiyani, ahabyarira abahungu babiri." 
Acts7:30 Imyaka mirongo ine ishize, umumalayika amubonekera mu gihuru cyaka umuriro, aho yari ari mu butayu bw’umusozi wa Sinayi." 
Acts7:31 Musa ngo abibone biramutangaza, aregera ashaka kwitegereza, maze yumva ijwi rya Nyagasani rigira riti" 
Acts7:32 ’Ndi Imana y’abasekuruza bawe, Imana ya Abrahamu, ya Izaki na Yakobo.’ Musa ahinda umushyitsi, ntiyatinyuka kwitegereza." 
Acts7:33 Nuko Nyagasani aramubwira ati ’Kuramo inkweto zawe, kuko aha hantu uhagaze ari ubutaka butagatifu." 
Acts7:34 Amagorwa y’umuryango wanjye uri mu Misiri narayitegereje, kandi n’imiborogo yawo narayumvise; none namanuwe no kubagobotora. Ubu ngubu rero genda, ngutumye mu Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 Musa uwo nyine bari barihakanye bavuga bati ’Ni nde wakugize umutware n’umucamanza?’, ni we Imana yohereje kubabera umutware n’umutabazi, imutumyeho umumalayika wari wamubonekeye mu gihuru." 
Acts7:36 Ni we wabavanye mu Misiri, akora ibitangaza n’ibimenyetso bikomeye muri icyo gihugu, ku Nyanja itukura no mu butayu mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine." 
Acts7:37 Musa uwo, ni we wabwiye Abayisraheli ati ’Imana izababonera mu bavandimwe banyu umuhanuzi.’ umeze nkanjye" 
Acts7:38 Igihe cy’ikoraniro ryo mu butayu, ni we kandi wari uhagaze imbere y’abasekuruza bacu, akavugana n’Umumalayika ku musozi wa Sinayi; ni we wakiriye amagambo y’ubugingo kugira ngo ayadushyikirize." 
Acts7:39 Ariko abasekuruza bacu banga kumwumvira, baramuhigika maze bifuza kwisubirira mu Misiri!" 
Acts7:40 Ni ko kubwira Aroni bati ’Ngaho dukorere imana zo kutugenda imbere; kuko Musa uriya watuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, tutazi uko byamugendekeye.’" 
Acts7:41 Muri iyo minsi ni bwo bacuze ikimasa, batura igitambo icyo kigirwamana kandi bishimira igikorwa cy’ibiganza byabo." 
Acts7:42 Nuko Imana irabazibukira, irabareka ngo basenge inyenyeri zo mu kirere, nk’uko byanditswe mu gitabo cy’Abahanuzi ngo ’Hari ubwo se mwigeze kuntura ibitambo n’amaturo, muryango wa Israheli, mu myaka mirongo ine yose mwamaze mu butayu?" 
Acts7:43 Ahubwo mwahetse ihema rya Moloki n’inyenyeri y’imana yanyu Refani, ibyo bishushanyo mwikoreye kugira ngo mubisenge! Ni cyo gituma nzabajyana bunyago hirya ya Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 Mu butayu, abasekuruza bacu bari bafite ihema rihamya Isezerano; Uwavuganaga na Musa yari yaramutegetse kuryubaka akurikije urugero yari yabonye." 
Acts7:45 Hanyuma abasekuruza bacu bamaze kurihabwa, bayobowe na Yozuwe, baryinjirana mu gihugu bari bamaze kwigarurira, Imana imaze kwirukanamo amahanga yari agituye; rirahaguma kugeza mu gihe cya Dawudi." 
Acts7:46 Dawudi uwo nyine yatonnye ku Mana, maze ayisaba guteganya Ingoro igenewe Imana ya Yakobo." 
Acts7:47 Ariko Salomoni ni we wayubakiye Ingoro. 
Acts7:48 Nyamara Umusumbabyose ntaba mu mazu yubatswe n’abantu, nk’uko byavuzwe n’umuhanuzi ati" 
Acts7:49 ’Ijuru ni intebe yanjye y’ubwami, isi ikaba akabaho nkandagizaho ibirenge byanjye. None rero, muzanyubakira ingoro nyabaki? — uwo ni Nyagasani ubivuga — Cyangwa se aho nzaruhukira, hazaba hameze hate?" 
Acts7:50 Mbese ye, ibiganza byanjye si byo byaremye ibi byose.’" 
Acts7:51 Bantu b’ijosi rishingaraye, bantu banangiye umutima n’amatwi, mugahora murwanya Roho Mutagatifu, muri kimwe n’abasekuruza banyu!" 
Acts7:52 Ni nde mu bahanuzi, abasekuruza banyu batatoteje? Ndetse bishe n’abahanuye mbere ukuza kwa ya Ntungane, imwe ubu ngubu mwagambaniye maze mukamwica." 
Acts7:53 Mwahawe Amategeko muyashyikirijwe n’abamalayika, nyamara ntimwayakurikiza!»" 
Acts7:54 Ayo magambo ya Sitefano arabarakaza, bamuhekenyera amenyo." 
Acts7:55 Naho we yuzura Roho Mutagatifu, ahanga amaso ijuru, abona ikuzo ry’Imana na Yezu ahagaze iburyo bw’Imana." 
Acts7:56 Nuko aravuga ati «Dore ndabona ijuru rikinguye, n’Umwana w’umuntu ahagaze iburyo bw’Imana.»" 
Acts7:57 Bahera ko bavuza induru, bipfuka mu matwi maze bamwiroheraho icyarimwe." 
Acts7:58 Baramukurubana no hanze y’umugi, bamutera amabuye. Abamushinjaga bari barambitse imyambaro yabo imbere y’umusore witwa Sawuli." 
Acts7:59 Igihe bamuteraga amabuye, Sitefano asenga agira ati «Nyagasani Yezu, akira ubuzima bwanjye.»" 
Acts7:60 Nuko arapfukama maze atera hejuru ati «Nyagasani, ntubahore iki cyaha.» Ngo amare kuvuga ibyo, araca." 
Acts8:1 Sawuli na we yari mu bemeye ubwo bwicanyi. Uwo munsi haduka itotezwa rikomeye muri Kiliziya y’i Yeruzalemu, maze bose uretse Intumwa, batatanira mu turere twa Yudeya na Samariya." 
Acts8:2 Abantu bubaha Imana bahamba Sitefano, baramuririra cyane." 
Acts8:3 Naho Sawuli we agumya kuyogoza Kiliziya, akinjira mu mazu, agafata abagabo n’abagore, akabashyira mu buroko." 
Acts8:4 Abari batatanye bagendaga hose, bamamaza Inkuru Nziza y’ijambo ry’Imana." 
Acts8:5 Filipo na we aramanuka ajya mu mugi wa Samariya, yigisha abahatuye ibya Kristu." 
Acts8:6 Rubanda bashishikariraga n’umutima umwe inyigisho za Filipo, kuko bari barumvise ibitangaza yakoraga kandi bakanabibona." 
Acts8:7 Koko rero, roho mbi zasohokaga mu bari bahanzweho zisakuza, ibimuga byinshi n’ibirema bigakira." 
Acts8:8 Nuko muri uwo mugi haba ibyishimo byinshi. 
Acts8:9 Muri uwo mugi hakaba umugabo witwa Simoni, wari umupfumu, maze agatangaza Abanyasamariya, yiyita akataraboneka." 
Acts8:10 Abantu bose kuva ku muto kugera ku mukuru bakamwihambiraho, bavuga bati «Uyu muntu arimo Ububasha bw’Imana, ubwo bita Ubuhangange.»" 
Acts8:11 Icyatumaga bamwihambiraho batyo, ni uko yari amaze igihe kirekire yarabararuye n’ubwo bupfumu bwe." 
Acts8:12 Ariko aho bamariye kwemera Filipo wabamenyeshaga Inkuru Nziza y’Ingoma y’Imana n’izina rya Yezu Kristu, abagabo n’abagore barabatizwa." 
Acts8:13 Nuko na Simoni ubwe aremera, arabatizwa, maze yihambira kuri Filipo; yabona ibimenyetso bikomeye n’ibitangaza byakorwaga, akumirwa." 
Acts8:14 Intumwa zari i Yeruzalemu zimenye ko muri Samariya bakiriye ijambo ry’Imana, ziboherereza Petero na Yohani." 
Acts8:15 Bagezeyo, basabira Abanyasamariya kugira ngo bahabwe Roho Mutagatifu," 
Acts8:16 kuko ari nta n’umwe muri bo yari yaramanukiyeho; bakaba bari barabatijwe gusa mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu. 
Acts8:17 Nuko Petero na Yohani babaramburiraho ibiganza, maze bahabwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Acts8:18 Simoni rero ngo abone ko Roho Mutagatifu atangwa no kuramburirwaho ibiganza n’Intumwa, azizanira amafaranga, azibwira ati" 
Acts8:19 «Nimumpe nanjye ubwo bubasha, kugira ngo uwo nzaramburiraho ibiganza ajye ahabwa Roho Mutagatifu.»" 
Acts8:20 Petero aramusubiza ati «Uragapfana n’amafaranga yawe, kuko watekereje ko ingabire y’Imana igurwa amafaranga!" 
Acts8:21 Nta mugabane, nta n’umurage ufite muri ibi, kuko umutima wawe udatunganiye Imana." 
Acts8:22 Ngaho rero ihane ubwo bugome bwawe, kandi utakambire Nyagasani; wenda yakubabarira icyo gitekerezo cyinjiye mu mutima wawe," 
Acts8:23 kuko mbona uri mu ndurwe isharira no mu ngoyi y’icyaha.» 
Acts8:24 Simoni ni ko gusubiza ati «Nimunsabire namwe kuri Nyagasani, kugira ngo hatagira ikingwirira mu byo mwavuze.»" 
Acts8:25 Petero na Yohani bamaze guhamya no kwamamaza ijambo rya Nyagasani, basubira i Yeruzalemu. Bamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu nsisiro nyinshi z’Abanyasamariya." 
Acts8:26 Umumalayika wa Nyagasani abwira Filipo, ati «Haguruka, ugende werekeje mu majyepfo, unyure mu muhanda umanuka i Yeruzalemu ujya i Gaza, ubu ngubu ukaba utarimo abagenzi.»" 
Acts8:27 Filipo ahera ko aragenda. Ubwo Umunyetiyopiya wari icyegera cya Kandasi, umwamikazi wa Etiyopiya, akaba n’umunyabintu we, yari yaje gusengera Imana i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts8:28 Yari mu nzira ataha, yicaye mu igare rye, agenda asoma igitabo cya Izayi umuhanuzi." 
Acts8:29 Roho Mutagatifu abwira Filipo ati «Genda, wegere ririya gare.»" 
Acts8:30 Filipo ariruka, yumva uwo mutware asoma mu gitabo cya Izayi umuhanuzi, aramubaza ati «Mbese aho ibyo usoma urabyumva?»" 
Acts8:31 Undi aramusubiza ati «Nabyumva nte se, ntabonye unsobanurira.» Nuko asaba Filipo kurira ngo yicare iruhande rwe." 
Acts8:32 Muri ibyo Byanditswe yahasomaga ibi ngibi «Bamushoreye nk’intama bajyanye mu ibagiro, cyangwa nk’umwana w’intama wicecekera imbere y’uwupfura ubwoya, na we ntiyaruhije abumbura umunwa." 
Acts8:33 Yacishijwe bugufi, acirwa urubanza rw’akarengane. Ni nde uzavuga iby’abazamukomokaho? Ko ubugingo bwe bwazimanganye ku isi, nta cyo yasize.»" 
Acts8:34 Uwo mutware abaza Filipo ati «Ndagusabye ngo umbwire: ni nde umuhanuzi avugaho ibi ngibi? Ni kuri we ubwe, cyangwa se ni undi muntu yavugaga?»" 
Acts8:35 Filipo ni ko guterura, ahereye kuri iyo ngingo y’Ibyanditswe, amumenyesha Inkuru Nziza ya Yezu." 
Acts8:36 Uko bagakomeje inzira baza kugera ku mugezi, wa mutware aravuga ati «Dore amazi! Ni iki se kandi cyambuza kubatizwa?» (Filipo aramusubiza ati «Niba wemera Yezu n’umutima wawe wose, birashoboka.» Undi aramubwira ati «Ndemera ko Yezu Kristu ari Umwana w’Imana.»)" 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Nuko ategeka ko bahagarika igare, bombi baramanuka bajya mu mazi, Filipo n’umutware, maze Filipo aramubatiza." 
Acts8:39 Bamaze kuva mu mazi Roho Mutagatifu ajyana Filipo, uwo mutware ntiyongera kumubona ukundi, ahubwo yikomereza urugendo rwe yishimye." 
Acts8:40 Naho Filipo ngo arebe, asanga ari mu mugi wa Azoti, maze yamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu migi yose yanyuragamo, kugeza ko agera i Kayizareya." 
Acts9:1 Sawuli nta kindi yatekerezaga kitari ukujujubya no kwica abigishwa ba Nyagasani. Nuko asanga umuherezabitambo mukuru," 
Acts9:2 amusaba inzandiko zo kujya mu masengero y’i Damasi, kugira ngo nagira abo ahasanga bayobotse iyo Nzira, abagabo n’abagore, ababohe abazane i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts9:3 Nuko igihe yari mu nzira agiye kugera i Damasi, ako kanya urumuri ruturutse mu ijuru ruramugota." 
Acts9:4 Yitura hasi, maze yumva ijwi rimubwira riti «Sawuli, Sawuli! Urantotereza iki?»" 
Acts9:5 Sawuli arabaza ati «Uri nde, Nyagasani?» Iryo jwi rirasubiza riti «Ndi Yezu, uwo uriho utoteza!" 
Acts9:6 Ariko haguruka winjire mu mugi, bari bukubwire icyo ugomba gukora.»" 
Acts9:7 Bagenzi be bari kumwe mu rugendo, bari bahagaze bumiwe, kuko bumvaga ijwi ariko ntibabone umuntu." 
Acts9:8 Sawuli arabaduka, nyamara n’ubwo yabumburaga amaso, nta cyo yabonaga. Bagenzi be ni ko kumurandata bamugeza i Damasi." 
Acts9:9 Nuko ahamara iminsi itatu atabona, nta cyo arya nta n’icyo anywa." 
Acts9:10 Aho i Damasi rero hakaba umwigishwa witwaga Ananiya. Nyagasani aramubonekera, amuhamagara agira ati «Ananiya!» Undi arasubiza ati «Ndi hano, Nyagasani!»" 
Acts9:11 Nyagasani aramubwira ati «Haguruka ujye mu muhanda witwa ’Ugororotse’, ubarize kwa Yuda umuntu witwa Sawuli, ukomoka i Tarisi. Ubu ariho arasenga," 
Acts9:12 kandi mu ibonekerwa, yabonye umuntu witwa Ananiya yinjira iwe, amuramburiraho ibiganza kugira ngo abone.»" 
Acts9:13 Ananiya arasubiza ati «Nyagasani, numvise benshi bavuga iby’uwo muntu, n’inabi yose yagiriye abatagatifujwe bawe b’i Yeruzalemu," 
Acts9:14 kandi n’ino ahafite ububasha yahawe n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo, kugira ngo abohe abiyambaza izina ryawe bose.»" 
Acts9:15 Ariko Nyagasani aramubwira ati «Genda! Kuko uwo muntu ari igikoresho cyanjye nitoranyirije, kugira ngo amenyekanishe izina ryanjye imbere y’abanyamahanga, imbere y’abami n’imbere y’Abayisraheli." 
Acts9:16 Ni jye ubwanjye uzamwereka uburyo bwose azagomba kubabazwa, ahorwa izina ryanjye.»" 
Acts9:17 Nuko Ananiya aragenda, yinjira mu nzu, amuramburiraho ibiganza, maze aramubwira ati «Sawuli muvandimwe! Nyagasani Yezu wakubonekeye mu nzira uza ino yakuntumyeho, kugira ngo wongere kubona kandi wuzuremo Roho Mutagatifu.»" 
Acts9:18 Ako kanya, utuntu dusa n’udushishwa duhubuka mu maso ye, yongera kubona maze ahera ko arabatizwa." 
Acts9:19 Amaze kurya, yongera kugira intege. Sawuli amarana iminsi mike n’abigishwa b’i Damasi," 
Acts9:20 maze atangira adatinze kwamamaza mu masengero ko Yezu ari Umwana w’Imana. 
Acts9:21 Abamwumvaga bose baratangaraga, maze bakabaza bati «Mbese uyu si we wajujubyaga i Yeruzalemu abiyambaza iryo zina? Hanyuma se ntiyazanywe ino no kubaboha, kugira ngo abashyikirize abatware b’abaherezabitambo?»" 
Acts9:22 Ariko Sawuli arushaho gukomera, agatsinda impaka Abayahudi batuye i Damasi, abemeza ko Yezu ari we Kristu." 
Acts9:23 Hashize igihe kinini Abayahudi bajya inama yo kumwica. 
Acts9:24 Nyamara Sawuli aza kumenya ubwo bugambanyi bwabo, bugeza aho kurinda amarembo y’umugi ijoro n’amanywa, ngo babone uko bamwica." 
Acts9:25 Ariko nijoro abigishwa be baramucikisha, bamwururukiriza ku nkike y’umugi, bamumanuriye mu gitebo." 
Acts9:26 Sawuli ageze i Yeruzalemu, agerageza kwegera abigishwa; ariko bose bakamutinya, kuko batemeraga ko na we ari umwigishwa koko." 
Acts9:27 Nuko Barinaba aramujyana, amushyikiriza Intumwa, azitekerereza uko yabonanye na Nyagasani mu nzira n’uko yamubwiye, n’ukuntu i Damasi yigishije mu izina rya Yezu ashize amanga." 
Acts9:28 Nuko Sawuli agumana na bo, akagenda hose muri Yeruzalemu nta cyo yishisha, ari na ko yigisha mu izina rya Yezu ashize amanga." 
Acts9:29 Yakundaga kuganira n’Abayahudi bavugaga ikigereki kandi akajya impaka na bo; ariko bo bagashaka kumwica. 
Acts9:30 Abavandimwe ngo babimenye, baramuherekeza bamugeza i Kayizareya, maze bamwohereza i Tarisi." 
Acts9:31 Ubwo Kiliziya yariho mu mahoro muri Yudeya yose, muri Galileya no muri Samariya, ishinga imizi kandi ikomeza kubaha Nyagasani, bityo irushaho kujya mbere ikomejwe na Roho Mutagatifu." 
Acts9:32 Ubwo rero Petero wazengurukaga igihugu cyose, aza kugera no ku batagatifujwe bari batuye i Lida." 
Acts9:33 Ahasanga umuntu witwa Eneya, wari umaze imyaka umunani atabyuka, kubera ubumuga." 
Acts9:34 Petero aramubwira ati «Eneya, Yezu Kristu aragukijije. Haguruka wisasire uburiri bwawe!» Uwo mwanya arahaguruka." 
Acts9:35 Nuko abaturage bose b’i Lida n’abo mu kibaya cya Saroni babibonye, bayoboka Nyagasani." 
Acts9:36 Ubwo i Yope hakaba umwigishwakazi witwa Tabita, mu kigereki rikaba Doruka. Yakoraga ibikorwa byiza byinshi, kandi agatanga n’imfashanyo y’abakene." 
Acts9:37 Muri iyo minsi aza gufatwa n’indwara, maze arapfa. Bamaze kuhagira umurambo we, bawurambika mu cyumba cyo mu nzu yo hejuru." 
Acts9:38 Kuko rero Lida yari bugufi bw’i Yope, abigishwa bakaba barumvise ko Petero ariho ari, bamutumaho abantu babiri kumubwira bati «Ntutindiganye kuza iwacu.»" 
Acts9:39 Petero ahaguruka uwo mwanya, ajyana na bo. Akihagera, bamujyana muri cya cyumba cyo mu nzu yo hejuru, abapfakazi bose bari bamukikije barira, bereka Petero amakanzu n’ibishura Doruka yadodaga akiri kumwe na bo." 
Acts9:40 Nuko Petero aheza abantu bose, arapfukama arasenga; hanyuma ahindukirira umurambo aravuga ati «Tabita, haguruka!» Nuko ngo abumbure amaso abona Petero, areguka maze aricara." 
Acts9:41 Petero amuhereza ikiganza aramuhagurutsa; ni ko guhamagara abatagatifujwe n’abapfakazi, aramubereka ari mutaraga." 
Acts9:42 Iyo nkuru imenyekana i Yope hose, bituma abantu benshi bemera Nyagasani." 
Acts9:43 Nuko Petero amara iminsi myinshi i Yope, acumbitse kwa Simoni w’umukannyi." 
Acts10:1 I Kayizareya hakaba umuntu witwa Koruneli, wari umutegeka w’abasirikare bo mu mutwe witwa «uw’Ubutaliyani»." 
Acts10:2 Yari umuntu wubaha kandi agatinya Imana, we n’urugo rwe rwose, akagirira ubuntu bwinshi rubanda kandi agasenga Imana ubudasiba." 
Acts10:3 Nuko umunsi umwe, nko ku isaha ya cyenda y’amanywa, arabonekerwa: abona umumalayika w’Imana yinjira iwe, maze aramubwira ati «Koruneli!»" 
Acts10:4 Undi amuhanga amaso, ubwoba buramutaha, ni ko gusubiza ati «Ni iki se, Nyagasani?» Umumalayika aramubwira ati «Amasengesho yawe n’ubuntu bwawe byageze ku Mana, ntibyibagirwa." 
Acts10:5 None rero, ohereza abantu i Yope utumize umuntu witwa Simoni, wahimbwe irya Petero." 
Acts10:6 Acumbitse ku wundi muntu witwa Simoni w’umukannyi, utuye mu rugo ruri iruhande rw’inyanja.»" 
Acts10:7 Umumalayika bavuganaga ngo amare kugenda, Koruneli ahamagaza abantu babiri bo mu rugo rwe, n’umusirikare umukoreye igihe kirekire kandi wubaha Imana;" 
Acts10:8 amaze kubatekerereza byose, abohereza i Yope." 
Acts10:9 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, ba bantu bakiri mu nzira ahajya kwegera umugi, ubwo na Petero akaba yazamutse ajya ahitaruye hejuru y’igisenge cy’inzu gusenga; hari nka saa sita." 
Acts10:10 Nuko aza gusonza yifuza kurya. Igihe rero bakimutegurira ibyo kurya, ahera ko atwarwa." 
Acts10:11 Abona ijuru rirakingutse, hamanuka ikintu kimeze nk’umwenda munini gifashwe mu mfuruka enye, cyururuka kigana ku isi." 
Acts10:12 Muri uwo mwenda harimo inyamaswa zose z’amaguru ane, ibikururuka ku butaka n’ibiguruka mu kirere." 
Acts10:13 Nuko yumva ijwi rimubwira riti «Petero, haguruka wice maze urye.»" 
Acts10:14 Petero arasubiza ati «Oya, Nyagasani! Nabera sindarya icyanduye cyangwa igihumanya.»" 
Acts10:15 Rya jwi rero ryongera kumubwira ku ncuro ya kabiri, riti «Icyo Imana yahumanuye ntukacyite icyanduye!»" 
Acts10:16 Ibyo biba incuro eshatu, maze cya kintu gisubizwa mu ijuru." 
Acts10:17 Nuko igihe Petero akibaza iby’iryo bonekerwa n’icyo rishaka kuvuga, aboherejwe na Koruneli baba barayoboza urugo rwa Simoni, bahagarara ku marembo." 
Acts10:18 Barahamagara kugira ngo bamenye ko Simoni, wahimbwe irya Petero, acumbitse muri urwo rugo." 
Acts10:19 Petero yari akibaza iby’ibonekerwa rye, ariko Roho aramubwira ati «Dore hari abantu batatu bagushaka." 
Acts10:20 Manuka rero ujyane na bo nta kugingimiranya, kuko ari jyewe ubohereje.»" 
Acts10:21 Petero aramanuka asanga ba bantu, maze arababwira ati «Uwo mushaka ni jye. Muragenzwa n’iki?»" 
Acts10:22 Baramusubiza bati «Twatumwe n’umutegeka w’abasirikare witwa Koruneli, umuntu w’intungane, utinya Imana kandi agashimwa n’umuryango wose w’Abayahudi. Yabwiwe rero n’umumalayika mutagatifu kugutumira, kugira ngo yumve ibyo umubwira.»" 
Acts10:23 Nuko Petero abinjiza mu nzu, arabacumbikira. Bukeye, arahaguruka ajyana na bo, aherekejwe na bamwe mu bavandimwe b’i Yope." 
Acts10:24 Ku munsi ukurikiyeho, Petero agera i Kayizareya, asanga Koruneli abategereje, yatumiye bene wabo n’incuti ze z’amagara." 
Acts10:25 Petero ngo ajye kwinjira, Koruneli aramusanganira agwa hasi imbere ye aramupfukamira." 
Acts10:26 Nuko Petero aramuhagurutsa, amubwira ati «Haguruka! Nanjye ndi umuntu nkawe.»" 
Acts10:27 Nuko yinjirana na Koruneli baganira, asanga hateraniye abantu benshi," 
Acts10:28 maze arababwira ati «Muzi ko ku Muyahudi bibujijwe kugirana umubano cyangwa se umushyikirano n’abanyamahanga. Nyamara Imana yanyeretse ko nta muntu n’umwe nkwiriye kunena cyangwa ngo mwite uwahumanye. 
Acts10:29 Ni na cyo cyatumye untumira nkaza ntashidikanya. None rero ndashaka kumenya impamvu yatumye untumira.» 
Acts10:30 Koruneli arasubiza ati «Hashize iminsi itatu, icyo gihe nari mu nzu yanjye nsenga, hari nko ku isaha ya cyenda y’amanywa. Uwo mwanya, umuntu wambaye imyenda irabagirana ahagarara imbere yanjye," 
Acts10:31 maze arambwira ati ’Koruneli, isengesho ryawe ryakiriwe n’ubuntu bwawe buribukwa mu maso y’Imana." 
Acts10:32 Wohereze rero abantu i Yope, utumire Simoni uhimbwa irya Petero aze hano. Acumbitse mu rugo rwa Simoni w’umukannyi, iruhande rw’inyanja’." 
Acts10:33 Mpera ko rero ngutumaho, nawe ugize neza kuko uje. None ubu dukoraniye imbere yawe, kugira ngo twumve icyo Nyagasani yagutegetse kutubwira cyose.»" 
Acts10:34 Nuko Petero aterura agira ati «Noneho numvise mu by’ukuri ko Imana itarobanura," 
Acts10:35 ahubwo inyurwa n’umuntu wa buri hanga iryo ari ryo ryose uyitinya kandi agaharanira ubutungane. 
Acts10:36 Ubwo butumwa bwayo yabwoherereje Abayisraheli, ari bwo Inkuru Nziza y’amahoro bazaniwe na Yezu Kristu, Umutegetsi w’abantu bose." 
Acts10:37 Mwese muzi ibyabaye muri Yudeya yose, bihereye mu Galileya nyuma ya batisimu Yohani yigishaga." 
Acts10:38 Muzi n’ibya Yezu w’i Nazareti: ukuntu Imana yamusize amavuta y’ubutore ibigirishije Roho Mutagatifu, ikamuha n’ububasha; n’uko yagendaga agira neza aho anyuze hose, akiza abahanzweho na Sekibi bose, kuko Imana yari kumwe na we." 
Acts10:39 Natwe rero turi abahamya b’ibyo yakoze mu gihugu cy’Abayahudi kimwe n’i Yeruzalemu. Bamwishe bamumanitse ku giti," 
Acts10:40 ariko Imana yamuzuye ku munsi wa gatatu, imuha no kwigaragaza;" 
Acts10:41 atari kuri rubanda rwose, ahubwo ku bahamya batoranyijwe n’Imana hakiri kare, twebwe abariye kandi tukanywa kumwe na we aho amariye kuzuka mu bapfuye." 
Acts10:42 Nuko adutegeka kwamamaza no guhamya muri rubanda ko ari we washyizweho n’Imana kuba umucamanza w’abazima n’abapfuye; 
Acts10:43 abahanuzi bose bemeza ko umwemera wese azaronka imbabazi z’ibyaha, abikesha ububasha bw’izina rye.»" 
Acts10:44 Petero akivuga ibyo, Roho Mutagatifu amanukira ku bumvaga iryo jambo bose." 
Acts10:45 Nuko abemera bo mu bagenywe bari baraherekeje Petero batangazwa no kubona ingabire ya Roho Mutagatifu yasesekaye no ku banyamahanga. 
Acts10:46 Koko rero, bumvaga abo bantu bavuga mu ndimi kandi bakuza Imana. Petero ni ko kungamo ati" 
Acts10:47 «Hari uwashobora se kubuza aba bantu kubatirishwa amazi, kandi na bo bahawe Roho Mutagatifu kimwe natwe?»" 
Acts10:48 Nuko ategeka ko bababatiza mu izina rya Yezu Kristu. Maze basaba Petero kugumana na bo iminsi mike. 
Acts11:1 Intumwa n’abavandimwe bari muri Yudeya bari barumvise ko n’abanyamahanga bakiriye ijambo ry’Imana. 
Acts11:2 Petero rero ngo agaruke i Yeruzalemu, abagenywe batangira kumugisha impaka, bagira bati" 
Acts11:3 «Ubonye ngo uragenderera abatagenywe kandi ugasangira na bo!» 
Acts11:4 Nuko Petero abatekerereza uko byose byagenze, nta cyo aciyeho, agira ati" 
Acts11:5 «Nari mu mugi w’i Yope ndiho nsenga, nza gutwarwa, maze mbona mu ijuru ikintu kimeze nk’umwenda munini, gifashwe mu mfuruka enye cyururuka gituruka mu ijuru, maze kiza kinsanga." 
Acts11:6 Uko nakagihanze amaso, nitegereje mbona inyamaswa z’amaguru ane zo ku isi, ibikoko by’inkazi, ari ibikururuka ku butaka ari n’ibiguruka mu kirere." 
Acts11:7 Nuko numva ijwi rimbwira riti ’Petero, haguruka wice maze urye!’" 
Acts11:8 Ni ko gusubiza nti «Oya, Nyagasani! Nabera sinigeze nasamira icyanduye cyangwa igihumanya.’" 
Acts11:9 Ijwi rituruka mu ijuru ryongera kumbwira riti ’Icyo Imana yahumanuye, ntukacyite icyanduye.’" 
Acts11:10 Ibyo biba incuro eshatu, hanyuma byose bisubizwa mu ijuru." 
Acts11:11 Ako kanya, abantu batatu bari baturutse i Kayizareya bantumweho, baba bahagaze ku rugo nari ncumbitsemo."
