Acts11:12 Roho Mutagatifu ambwira kujyana na bo nta gushidikanya. Aba bavandimwe batandatu muruzi ni bo bamperekeje, nuko twinjira mu nzu y’uwo muntu." 
Acts11:13 Ubwo adutekerereza ukuntu yabonye umumalayika wamubonekeye mu nzu ye, akamubwira ati ’Wohereze abantu i Yope, utumire Simoni uhimbwa irya Petero." 
Acts11:14 Azakubwira amagambo azagukiza, wowe n’urugo rwawe rwose.’" 
Acts11:15 Igihe rero nteruye kuvuga, Roho Mutagatifu abamanukiraho nk’uko natwe yatumanukiyeho mu ntangiriro." 
Acts11:16 Ubwo nahise nibuka ijambo rya Nyagasani yavuze ati ’Yohani yabatirishije amazi, naho mwebwe muzabatirizwa muri Roho Mutagatifu.’" 
Acts11:17 Niba se Imana yarahaye abo bantu ingabire imwe natwe igihe twemeye Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, jyewe rero nari nde wo kuburizamo umugambi w’Imana?»" 
Acts11:18 Bumvise ibyo baratuza, bakuza Imana bavuga bati «Noneho Imana yahaye n’abanyamahanga kwisubiraho kugira ngo baronke ubugingo!»" 
Acts11:19 Nyamara, abari batatanyijwe n’ibitotezo byavutse igihe cya Sitefano, baragenda bagera muri Fenisiya, i Shipure n’i Antiyokiya, ntibagira undi batangariza ijambo ry’Imana, uretse Abayahudi bonyine." 
Acts11:20 Ariko bamwe muri bo bakomoka muri Shipure no muri Sireni bageze i Antiyokiya, bamenyesha n’Abagereki Inkuru Nziza ya Nyagasani Yezu." 
Acts11:21 Ububasha bwa Nyagasani burabakomeza, bigatuma umubare w’abahinduka bakamwemera urushaho kwiyongera." 
Acts11:22 Iyo nkuru iza kugera kuri Kiliziya y’i Yeruzalemu, maze bohereza Barinaba i Antiyokiya." 
Acts11:23 Ngo agereyo, abona ineza Imana yari yabagiriye, biramushimisha. Nuko arabihanangiriza ngo bizirike kuri Nyagasani babikuye ku mutima." 
Acts11:24 Koko rero, Barinaba yari umunyangeso nziza, wuzuye Roho Mutagatifu n’ukwemera. Bityo abantu benshi biyongera ku bemera Nyagasani." 
Acts11:25 Nuko Barinaba ajya i Tarisi gushaka Sawuli; 
Acts11:26 ahamusanze amuzana i Antiyokiya. Bahamara umwaka wose bakorera iyo Kiliziya kandi bigisha inteko nyamwinshi y’abantu. Aho i Antiyokiya nyine, ni ho abigishwa bitiwe bwa mbere na mbere «Abakristu»." 
Acts11:27 Icyo gihe, abahanuzi bamanuka i Yeruzalemu bajya i Antiyokiya." 
Acts11:28 Umwe muri bo witwaga Agabo, amurikiwe na Roho Mutagatifu, ahanura ko inzara ikomeye igiye gutera ku isi yose — ari yo yateye ku ngoma ya Kalawudiyo —." 
Acts11:29 Abigishwa rero, biyemeza gufasha abavandimwe batuye muri Yudeya, bakurikije na none amikoro ya buri muntu." 
Acts11:30 Koko babigenza batyo, maze izo mfashanyo bazoherereza abakuru b’ikoraniro, zijyanwa na Barinaba na Sawuli." 
Acts12:1 Icyo gihe, umwami Herodi atangira kugirira nabi bamwe muri Kiliziya," 
Acts12:2 yicisha inkota Yakobo, umuvandimwe wa Yohani." 
Acts12:3 Abonye ko ibyo bishimishije Abayahudi, yongera no gufata Petero, — ubwo hakaba mu minsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye —." 
Acts12:4 Amaze kumufata amushyira mu buroko, ategeka amatsinda ane, rimwe rigizwe n’abasirikare bane, kumurinda. Yashakaga kumuhingutsa imbere ya rubanda nyuma y’umunsi mukuru wa Pasika." 
Acts12:5 Petero aguma mu buroko, ariko Kiliziya ikamusabira ku Mana ubudatuza." 
Acts12:6 Herodi araye ari bumutange ngo acirwe urubanza, muri iryo joro Petero akaba arasinziriye, akikijwe n’abasirikare babiri kandi aboheshejwe iminyururu ibiri, n’abarinzi bahagaze mu mwanya wabo imbere y’umuryango." 
Acts12:7 Ako kanya, umumalayika wa Nyagasani arahatunguka, maze urumuri rutangaza muri ubwo buroko. Uwo mumalayika akomanga Petero mu mbavu, amukangura amubwira ati «Haguruka bwangu!» Iminyururu ihita imuva ku maboko, iragwa." 
Acts12:8 Umumalayika aramubwira ati «Kenyera, wambare n’inkweto zawe!» Abigenza atyo, maze umumalayika yongera kumubwira ati «Ifubike igishura cyawe, maze unkurikire!»" 
Acts12:9 Nuko Petero asohoka amukurikiye, ariko atazi ko ibyakorwaga n’umumalayika ari ukuri, ahubwo akibwira ko ari inzozi yarose." 
Acts12:10 Banyura ku barinzi ba mbere, hanyuma no ku ba kabiri, maze bagera ku rugi rw’icyuma rwerekeraga mu mugi; rurikingura ubwarwo. Barasohoka barenga umuhanda umwe, ako kanya umumalayika amusiga aho." 
Acts12:11 Nuko Petero ngo agarure umutima, aravuga ati «Noneho menye by’ukuri ko Nyagasani yohereje umumalayika we, akangobotora mu biganza bya Herodi kandi akankiza n’imihigo yose y’imbaga y’Abayahudi.»" 
Acts12:12 Amaze kumva ibyo ari byo, ajya kwa Mariya nyina wa Yohani bitaga Mariko, aho abantu benshi bari bateraniye basenga." 
Acts12:13 Petero akomanga ku rugi rw’irembo, umukobwa w’umuja witwaga Roda ajya kumva uwo ari we." 
Acts12:14 Amenya ijwi rya Petero, ariko ibyishimo bimubuza gukingura, ahubwo yirukanka ajya mu nzu kumenyesha abandi ko Petero ahagaze inyuma y’irembo." 
Acts12:15 Ariko bo baramubwira bati «Wasaze!» Ababwira akomeje ko ari ko bimeze. Nuko baravuga bati «Ni umumalayika we! 
Acts12:16 Nyamara Petero yakomezaga gukomanga, bigeze aho baza gukingura, basanze ari we, barumirwa." 
Acts12:17 Abacecekesha ikiganza, maze abatekerereza uburyo Nyagasani yamukuye mu buroko, hanyuma arababwira ati «Nimujye kubimenyesha Yakobo n’abavandimwe.» Nuko arahava, yigira ahandi hantu." 
Acts12:18 Bukeye, haba impagarara nyinshi mu basirikare, bibaza uko Petero byamugendekeye." 
Acts12:19 Herodi amushakisha hose ariko ntiyamubona, ni bwo rero abanje kubaza abarinzi, hanyuma ategeka ko babica. Birangiye, Herodi ava mu Yudeya, ajya i Kayizareya ahamara iminsi." 
Acts12:20 Herodi yari arakariye cyane abantu b’i Tiri n’i Sidoni. Nuko bo bahuza umugambi baramusanga, maze ku bw’inkunga y’uwitwa Bulasito, umutware w’abanyanzu b’ibwami bari bamaze guhongerera, basaba umwami amahoro kuko bahahiraga mu gihugu cye." 
Acts12:21 Ku munsi wari wemejwe, Herodi yambara imyambaro ye ya cyami, yicara ku ntebe ahirengeye, maze afata ijambo abwira rubanda." 
Acts12:22 Igihe rubanda bariho bamushimagiza bagira bati «Noneho ni ijwi ry’Imana, si iry’umuntu»," 
Acts12:23 ako kanya umumalayika wa Nyagasani aramukubita, agwa inyo arapfa, kuko atari yahaye Imana icyubahiro." 
Acts12:24 Nyamara ijambo ry’Imana rirushaho gukura no kwamamara. 
Acts12:25 Naho Barinaba na Sawuli barangije umurimo wabo i Yeruzalemu, bagarukana na Yohani bitaga Mariko." 
Acts13:1 Muri Kiliziya y’i Antiyokiya hari abahanuzi n’abigisha, ari bo Barinaba, Simewoni bitaga «Umwirabura» na Lusiyusi w’i Sireni, Manaheni wari warareranywe n’umwami Herodi, na Sawuli." 
Acts13:2 Igihe bari bateraniye gusenga kandi basibye kurya, Roho Mutagatifu arababwira ati «Barinaba na Sawuli nimubashyire ukwabo, bajye gukora umurimo nabahamagariye.»" 
Acts13:3 Nuko bamaze gusiba kurya no kwambaza, babaramburiraho ibiganza, barabohereza." 
Acts13:4 Ubwo Barinaba na Sawuli batumwe na Roho Mutagatifu, bamanukira i Selewukiya, aho bafatiye ubwato berekeza mu kirwa cya Shipure." 
Acts13:5 Bageze i Salamina, bamamaza ijambo ry’Imana mu masengero y’Abayahudi. Ubwo bari kumwe na Yohani, umufasha wabo." 
Acts13:6 Bamaze kwambukiranya ikirwa cyose kugera i Pafo, bahasanga umupfumu w’ingirwamuhanuzi, akaba Umuyahudi witwaga Bariyezu," 
Acts13:7 wabaga kwa Serigiyo Pawulo wategekaga icyo kirwa, akaba n’umuntu w’umunyabwenge. Uwo mutegetsi atumira Barinaba na Sawuli, maze abagaragariza ko yifuza kumva ijambo ry’Imana." 
Acts13:8 Nyamara uwo mupfumu Elimasi, — kuko ari ko izina rye risobanurwa — arabatambamira, ashaka uko yayobya uwo mutegetsi ngo amubuze kwemera." 
Acts13:9 Nuko Sawuli, ari we Pawulo, yuzura Roho Mutagatifu, amuhanga amaso" 
Acts13:10 maze aramubwira ati «Yewe muntu wuzuyemo uburiganya n’amahugu, mwana wa Sekinyoma, mwanzi w’icyitwa ubutungane cyose, uzahereza he gusiba amayira atunganye ya Nyagasani?" 
Acts13:11 Noneho ahasigaye, ngiki ikiganza cya Nyagasani hejuru yawe: ugiye kuba impumyi umare igihe utabona izuba.» Ako kanya afatwa n’umwijima w’icuraburindi, arindagira ashaka uwamurandata." 
Acts13:12 Wa mutegetsi ngo abone ibibaye, atangazwa n’inyigisho za Nyagasani, nuko aremera." 
Acts13:13 Pawulo na bagenzi be bafatira ubwato i Pafo, bambuka bajya i Perige ho muri Pamfiliya. Nuko Yohani atandukana na bo, yisubirira i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts13:14 Bo rero ngo bave i Perige, barakomeza bagera i Antiyokiya ho muri Pisidiya. Ku isabato, binjira mu isengero baricara." 
Acts13:15 Nyuma y’isomo ryo mu gitabo cy’Amategeko n’Abahanuzi, abatware b’isengero babatumaho bati «Bavandimwe, niba hari amagambo mufite yashishikaza rubanda, ngaho nimuvuge!»" 
Acts13:16 Nuko Pawulo arahaguruka, amaze kubacecekesha ikiganza, araterura ati «Bayisraheli, namwe abatinya Imana, nimunyumve." 
Acts13:17 Imana ya Israheli, umuryango wacu, yitoreye abasekuruza bacu, ibaha kororoka igihe bari abasuhuke mu gihugu cya Misiri. Hanyuma ihabavanisha ububasha bwayo bukomeye," 
Acts13:18 ibitaho mu myaka mirongo ine yose bamaze mu butayu. 
Acts13:19 Nuko imaze kwimura amahanga arindwi mu gihugu cya Kanahani, ibagabira icyo gihugu ho umurage." 
Acts13:20 Ibyo byose byamaze imyaka igera kuri magana ane na mirongo itanu. Hanyuma ibaha abacamanza kugera kuri Samweli, umuhanuzi." 
Acts13:21 Ni bwo basabye umwami, Imana ibaha Sawuli mwene Kishi wo mu muryango wa Benyamini, amara imyaka mirongo ine ku ngoma." 
Acts13:22 Imana imaze kumuhigika, ishyiraho Dawudi ngo ababere umwami, ari na we yatanzeho icyemezo iti ’Nabonye Dawudi mwene Yese, umuntu unguye ku mutima, uzakora ibyo nshaka byose.’" 
Acts13:23 Mu rubyaro rwe, nk’uko Imana yari yarabimusezeranyije, ni ho yakuye Yezu, Umukiza wa Israheli." 
Acts13:24 Mbere y’ukuza kwe, Yohani yatangarije Abayisraheli bose batisimu yo kwisubiraho." 
Acts13:25 Nuko ajya kurangiza ubutumwa bwe, aravuga ati ’Nta bwo ndi uwo mukeka! Ahubwo hari ugiye kuza ankurikiye, nkaba ntakwiriye no guhambura udushumi tw’inkweto ze.’" 
Acts13:26 Bavandimwe, mwaba urubyaro rwa Abrahamu cyangwa se mwaba abatinya Imana, iri jambo ry’umukiro ni mwe ryohererejwe." 
Acts13:27 Koko rero, abaturage b’i Yeruzalemu n’abatware babo birengagije Yezu; maze mu kumucira urubanza, barangiza batyo ibyo abahanuzi bavuze, bisomwa kuri buri sabato." 
Acts13:28 N’ubwo batabonye impamvu n’imwe yo kumwicisha, basabye Pilato ngo amwice." 
Acts13:29 Bamaze kurangiza ibyari byaramwanditsweho byose, bamumanura ku musaraba maze bamushyira mu mva." 
Acts13:30 Ariko Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye," 
Acts13:31 amara iminsi myinshi abonekera abari barazamukanye na we kuva muri Galileya kugera i Yeruzalemu, ari na bo bahamya babyo muri rubanda kugeza na n’ubu." 
Acts13:32 Natwe rero turabamenyesha iyo Nkuru Nziza: iryo Sezerano Imana yagiranye n’abasekuruza bacu," 
Acts13:33 yararidusohoreje twebwe abana babo, igihe yazuraga Yezu nk’uko byanditswe muri zaburi ya kabiri ngo ’Uri umwana wanjye, nakwibyariye uyu munsi.’" 
Acts13:34 Iby’uko yamuzuye mu bapfuye, akaba adashobora gusubira mu bushanguke, Imana yabivuze muri aya magambo, iti ’Nzabaha ibyiza nasezeranyije Dawudi, ku buryo budasubirwaho.’" 
Acts13:35 Ni cyo gituma n’ahandi havugwa ngo ’Ntuzareka Intungane yawe imenyana n’ubushanguke.’ 
Acts13:36 Dawudi akiriho yarangije ugushaka kw’Imana, arasaza maze ashyingurwa hamwe n’abasekuruza be kandi yarashangutse." 
Acts13:37 Nyamara uwo Imana yazuye, we ntarakamenyana n’ubushanguke." 
Acts13:38 Nimumenye rero, bavandimwe, ko ari ku bwe mwamenyeshejwe ibabarirwa ry’ibyaha, n’ubwo butungane mutashoboye kubona mu Mategeko ya Musa," 
Acts13:39 uwemera wese akabuherwa muri we. 
Acts13:40 Muririnde rero mutagubwaho n’ibyavuzwe n’abahanuzi bagira bati 
Acts13:41 ’Nimurebe, mwa banyagasuzuguro mwe, nimutangare maze bibatere gutatana. Koko rero muri iki gihe cyanyu, ngiye gukora igikorwa mutabasha kwemera, n’ubwo hagira ukibabwira!’»" 
Acts13:42 Pawulo na Barinaba basohotse, abo bantu babasaba ko ku isabato itaha bazongera kubabwira ayo magambo." 
Acts13:43 Ikoraniro rimaze gusezererwa, benshi mu Bayahudi no mu banyamahanga bayobotse idini yabo baherekeza Pawulo na Barinaba. Bo rero bakomeza kubaganiriza babashishikariza gukomera ku ngabire y’Imana." 
Acts13:44 Ku isabato yakurikiyeho, hafi umugi wose urakorana kugira ngo bumve ijambo ry’Imana." 
Acts13:45 Abayahudi rero, ngo babone icyo kivunge cy’abantu, bagira ishyari, ni ko guhinyura ibyo Pawulo yavugaga, babisebya." 
Acts13:46 Nuko Pawulo na Barinaba bavuga nta cyo bishisha, bati «Byari ngombwa ko ari mwe mubanza gushyikirizwa ijambo ry’Imana! None ubwo muryamaganye, mukabona ko mwebwe ubwanyu mudakwiye ubugingo buhoraho, ngaho rero twisangiye abanyamahanga." 
Acts13:47 Ni na ko Nyagasani yadutegetse agira ati ’Nagushyiriyeho kuba urumuri rw’amahanga, kugira ngo uzajyane ijambo ry’umukiro kugeza aho isi igarukira.’»" 
Acts13:48 Abanyamahanga babyumvise barishima, basingiza ijambo rya Nyagasani, n’abari baragenewe ubugingo bose baremera." 
Acts13:49 Nuko ijambo rya Nyagasani ryogera muri icyo gihugu cyose," 
Acts13:50 ariko Abayahudi boshya abagore b’abapfasoni bubahaga Imana, kimwe n’abanyacyubahiro bo muri uwo mugi, babateza Pawulo na Barinaba ngo babatoteze, kugeza ubwo babamenesha mu gihugu cyabo." 
Acts13:51 Na bo ngo bamare kwihungura umukungugu wo mu birenge byabo, barawubasigira maze bajya mu mugi witwa Ikoniyo." 
Acts13:52 Abigishwa b’aho basigaye buzuye ibyishimo na Roho Mutagatifu. 
Acts14:1 Aho Ikoniyo na ho ni ko byagenze. Pawulo na Barinaba binjiye mu isengero ry’Abayahudi, baravuga ku buryo Abayahudi n’Abagereki benshi bemeye." 
Acts14:2 Ariko bamwe mu Bayahudi bari banze kwemera, batera imidugararo mu banyamahanga, baboshya kugirira nabi abavandimwe." 
Acts14:3 Pawulo na Barinaba bahamara igihe kirekire, bakigisha bashize amanga kuko bari biringiye Nyagasani wahamyaga ukuri kw’amagambo yabo, abaha gukora ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza bikomeye." 
Acts14:4 Abatuye uwo mugi rero bicamo ibice: bamwe bajya ku ruhande rw’Abayahudi, abandi ku rw’Intumwa." 
Acts14:5 Nuko abanyamahanga n’Abayahudi bajya inama n’abatware babo ngo bagirire nabi Intumwa, bazitere amabuye." 
Acts14:6 Pawulo na Barinaba babimenye, bashaka ubuhungiro mu migi ya Lisitiri na Deribe yo muri Likawoniya, no mu turere tuyikikije." 
Acts14:7 Na ho bakomeza kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza. 
Acts14:8 Nuko i Lisitiri hakaba umuntu waremaye ibirenge, kuko yari yaravukanye ubumuga, atigeze atambuka." 
Acts14:9 Umunsi umwe, yari ateze amatwi Pawulo yigisha, Pawulo na we amwitegereje, abona ko afite ukwemera guhagije kugira ngo akire," 
Acts14:10 amubwira mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Haguruka, uhagarare wemye!» Umuntu arabaduka, aragenda." 
Acts14:11 Rubanda rero ngo babone ibyo Pawulo amaze gukora, batera hejuru bavuga mu rurimi rwabo kavukire rwo muri Likawoniya, bati «Imana zisa n’abantu zaje muri twe!»" 
Acts14:12 Nuko Barinaba bamwita «Zewusi », naho Pawulo bamwita «Herimesi», kuko ari we wakundaga gufata ijambo." 
Acts14:13 Nuko umuherezabitambo w’ikigirwamana Zewusi, (ingoro yacyo ikaba yari ku irembo ry’umugi), azana ibimasa bitatse indabyo abishyira imbere y’irembo, kuko yashakaga we na rubanda, gutura igitambo." 
Acts14:14 Ariko Pawulo na Barinaba, ngo bumve iyo nkuru, bashishimura imyambaro yabo maze biroha muri rubanda batera hejuru, bati" 
Acts14:15 «Ibyo mukora ni ibiki? Natwe turi abantu nkamwe. Inkuru Nziza tubamenyesha, irabasaba ko mwigizayo ayo manjwe, ngo mugarukire Imana Nzima yaremye ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose." 
Acts14:16 Mu bihe byo hambere, yaretse amahanga yose akora ibyo yishakiye;" 
Acts14:17 nyamara ntiyaretse gutanga ibimenyetso bihamya ubugiraneza bwayo: ibaha imvura n’ibihe by’uburumbuke, ikabahaza ibibatunga, n’imitima yanyu ikayuzuza ibyishimo.»" 
Acts14:18 Ayo magambo yabo atuma rubanda batuza ariko bigoranye, bityo bareka kubatura igitambo." 
Acts14:19 Nuko haza kwaduka Abayahudi baturutse Antiyokiya n’Ikoniyo, bigarurira rubanda. Batera Pawulo amabuye, hanyuma bamukururira hirya y’umugi bibwira ko yapfuye." 
Acts14:20 Ariko igihe abigishwa bari bamukikije, arahaguruka asubira mu mugi. Bukeye ajyana na Barinaba i Deribe." 
Acts14:21 Ngo bamare kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza muri uwo mugi no kuhabona abigishwa benshi, bahera ko basubira i Lisitiri, Ikoniyo n’i Antiyokiya." 
Acts14:22 Bakomezaga umutima w’abigishwa, bakabatera umwete ngo bakomere mu kwemera, bababwira bati «Ni ngombwa ko tunyura mu magorwa menshi, kugira ngo tubone kwinjira mu Ngoma y’Imana.»" 
Acts14:23 Nuko bashyiraho abakuru muri buri Kiliziya, bamaze gusenga no gusiba kurya, babaragiza Nyagasani bari baremeye." 
Acts14:24 Hanyuma bambukiranya akarere ka Pisidiya, bagera muri Pamfiliya." 
Acts14:25 Bamaze kwamamaza ijambo ry’Imana i Perige, bamanuka berekeza Ataliya." 
Acts14:26 Bahavuye, bajya mu bwato berekeza Antiyokiya, ari na wo mugi bari baraturutsemo, ubwo abavandimwe babo babaragizaga Imana, babasabira kuzatunganya uwo murimo nyine bari bamaze kurangiza." 
Acts14:27 Bagezeyo, bakoranya Kiliziya, babatekerereza ibyo Imana yari yakoranye na bo byose, ariko cyane cyane ko yugururiye abanyamahanga irembo ry’ukwemera." 
Acts14:28 Nuko bamarana iminsi n’abigishwa. 
Acts15:1 Nuko abantu bamwe bavuye muri Yudeya, baza bigisha abavandimwe bo muri Antiyokiya bati «Niba mutigenyesheje uko Musa yabitegetse, ntimushobora gukizwa.»" 
Acts15:2 Nuko havuka amakimbirane n’impaka zikomeye kuri Pawulo na Barinaba bavuguruza abo bantu; ni ko kwemeza ko Pawulo na Barinaba hamwe n’abandi muri bo, bajya i Yeruzalemu kureba Intumwa n’abakuru b’ikoraniro, bakabagisha inama kuri icyo kibazo." 
Acts15:3 Nuko Kiliziya ya Antiyokiya ibafasha ku byo bakeneye mu rugendo, banyura muri Fenisiya na Samariya babatekerereza iby’uguhinduka kw’abanyamahanga, maze iyo nkuru itera abavandimwe bose ibyishimo byinshi." 
Acts15:4 Bageze i Yeruzalemu, Kiliziya y’aho irabakira hamwe n’Intumwa n’abakuru b’ikoraniro, hanyuma babatekerereza ibyo Imana yakoranye na bo byose." 
Acts15:5 Ariko bamwe mu bemeye bo mu gatsiko k’Abafarizayi batera hejuru bati «Ni ngombwa ko abo banyamahanga bagenywa, kandi bagategekwa kubahiriza Amategeko ya Musa.»" 
Acts15:6 Intumwa n’abakuru b’ikoraniro bateranira hamwe, kugira ngo basuzume icyo kibazo." 
Acts15:7 Bamaze kujya impaka z’urudaca, Petero ni ko guhaguruka, arababwira ati «Bavandimwe, muzi ko kuva mu ntangiriro Imana yantoranyije muri mwe, kugira ngo namamaze Inkuru Nziza mu banyamahanga, maze na bo baremera." 
Acts15:8 Ndetse n’Imana imenya imitima yabitangiye icyemezo, igihe ibahaye Roho Mutagatifu kimwe natwe." 
Acts15:9 Ntiyabatandukanyije natwe, imitima yabo yayisukurishije ukwemera." 
Acts15:10 None rero, ni kuki mushaka kugerageza Imana, mukorera abo bigishwa umutwaro abasekuruza bacu ndetse natwe ubwacu tutabashije kwikorera?" 
Acts15:11 Byongeye kandi, twemera ko twakijijwe n’ingabire ya Nyagasani Yezu kimwe na bo!»" 
Acts15:12 Nuko ikoraniro ryose riratuza, maze batega amatwi Pawulo na Barinaba babatekererezaga ibimenyetso byose n’ibitangaza Imana yabakoresheje mu banyamahanga." 
Acts15:13 Barangije kuvuga, Yakobo afata ijambo agira ati «Bavandimwe, nimunyumve." 
Acts15:14 Simewoni amaze kutwibutsa ukuntu kuva mu ntangiriro Imana yagendereye abanyamahanga, ikabatoranyamo umuryango uzubahiriza izina ryayo." 
Acts15:15 Ibyo bikaba bihuje n’ibyavuzwe n’Abahanuzi, nk’uko byanditswe ngo" 
Acts15:16 ’Nyuma y’ibyo nzagaruka, nongere nubake inzu ya Dawudi yasenyutse. Ahasenyutse nzahubaka bundi bushya, maze nyihagarike," 
Acts15:17 kugira ngo abarokotse bazashakashake Nyagasani, kimwe n’amahanga yose izina ryanjye ryambarizwamo. Uwo ni Nyagasani ubivuze, we urangiza imigambi ye" 
Acts15:18 isanzwe izwi kuva kera kose.’ 
Acts15:19 Ni cyo gituma mbona ko badakwiye gutera imitima ihagaze abo mu mahanga bagarukira Imana. 
Acts15:20 Ahubwo tubandikire gusa ngo birinde guhumanywa n’ibigirwamana n’ubukozi bw’ibibi, birinde kandi kurya inyamaswa zanizwe, n’amaraso." 
Acts15:21 Naho Musa, kuva kera umugi wose awufitemo abigisha ibye, kuko kuri buri sabato babisomera mu masengero.»" 
Acts15:22 Ubwo byose bamaze kubyumvikanaho, Intumwa n’abakuru b’ikoraniro biyemeza kwitoramo bamwe muri bo, ngo babatume i Antiyokiya kumwe na Pawulo na Barinaba. Nuko hatorwa Yuda witwa Barisaba na Silasi, abantu b’imena mu bavandimwe." 
Acts15:23 Urwo rwandiko babahaye rwagiraga ruti «Twebwe Intumwa, abakuru b’ikoraniro n’abavandimwe, turabaramutsa, bavandimwe bacu b’abanyamahanga bari Antiyokiya, muri Siriya no muri Silisiya." 
Acts15:24 Twumvise ko bamwe muri twe bababwiye amagambo yo kubakangaranya no kubakura umutima, kandi tutigeze tubatuma." 
Acts15:25 None twahuje umugambi wo gutoranya abantu ngo tubabatumeho, bazanye na Pawulo na Barinaba, incuti zacu dukunda," 
Acts15:26 kuko bahaze amagara yabo kubera izina ry’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Tubatumyeho rero Yuda na Silasi, kugira ngo na bo ubwabo babasobanurire ibyo tubandikiye." 
Acts15:28 Byanogeye rero Roho Mutagatifu kimwe natwe kutagira undi mutwaro tubagerekaho utari aya mabwiriza ya ngombwa: 
Acts15:29 mwirinde kurya inyama zatambiwe ibigirwamana, n’amaraso, n’inyama z’inyamaswa zanizwe, mwirinde n’ubukozi bw’ibibi. Nimureka gukora ibyo, muzaba mugenjeje neza. Nimugire amahoro!»" 
Acts15:30 Nuko abari batumwe bamanuka berekeza i Antiyokiya; bahageze bakoranyiriza hamwe ikoraniro ry’aho, babashyikiriza urwandiko." 
Acts15:31 Ngo bamare kurusoma, abantu bose bashimishwa n’ubwo butumwa bwo kubakomeza." 
Acts15:32 Yuda na Silasi, dore ko na bo bari abahanuzi, bababwira mu magambo arambuye yo kubahugura no kubakomeza." 
Acts15:33 Bamarana na bo iminsi, hanyuma abavandimwe bamaze kubifuriza amahoro, barabasezerera basubira ku babatumye. (" 
Acts15:34 Icyakora Silasi we yiyemeza kuguma aho, Yuda aba ari we usubirayo wenyine.)" 
Acts15:35 Naho Pawulo na Barinaba baguma i Antiyokiya, bigisha kandi bamamaza Inkuru Nziza y’ijambo rya Nyagasani bifatanyije n’abandi benshi." 
Acts15:36 Hashize iminsi, Pawulo abwira Barinaba ati «Reka duhindukire, dusure abavandimwe bo mu migi twamamajemo ijambo rya Nyagasani, turebe uko bameze.»" 
Acts15:37 Nuko Barinaba ashaka kujyana na Yohani bitaga Mariko. 
Acts15:38 Nyamara Pawulo we ntiyishimira kujyana n’umuntu wigeze kubatererana ubwo bari i Pamfiliya, ntabafashe umurimo." 
Acts15:39 Impaka ziba urudaca kugeza aho batandukana, Barinaba ajyana na Mariko bafata ubwato berekeza i Shipure," 
Acts15:40 naho Pawulo ahitamo kujyana na Silasi. Abavandimwe bamaze kumusabira no kumuragiza Nyagasani, arahaguruka aragenda." 
Acts15:41 Pawulo yambukiranya Siriya na Silisiya, akomeza za Kiliziya." 
Acts16:1 Hanyuma aza kugera atyo i Deribe n’i Lisitiri. Aho hakaba umwigishwa witwa Timote, umuhungu w’Umuyahudikazi wemeye, naho se akaba Umugereki." 
Acts16:2 Yashimwaga cyane n’abavandimwe b’aho i Lisitiri kimwe n’Ikoniyo. 
Acts16:3 Pawulo yifuza kujyana na we, ni ko kumugenya kubera Abayahudi bari muri ako karere, kandi bose bazi ko se ari Umugereki." 
Acts16:4 Mu migi yose banyuragamo, Pawulo na Silasi babagezagaho ibyemezo byafashwe n’Intumwa hamwe n’abakuru b’ikoraniro b’i Yeruzalemu, bakabasaba kubukurikiza." 
Acts16:5 Bityo Kiliziya zirushaho gukomera mu kwemera, kandi zikiyongera buri munsi." 
Acts16:6 Pawulo na Silasi bambukiranya Furujiya n’akarere kose k’Ubugalati, kuko Roho Mutagatifu yari yababujije kwamamaza ijambo ry’Imana muri Aziya." 
Acts16:7 Ngo bagere ku mbibi za Misiya, bagerageza kujya muri Bitiniya, ariko Roho wa Yezu arababuza." 
Acts16:8 Nuko bambukiranya Misiya, baramanuka bajya i Torowadi." 
Acts16:9 Ijoro rimwe, Pawulo arabonekerwa; abona umuntu wo muri Masedoniya amuhagaze imbere amwinginga, ati «Ambukira muri Masedoniya, uze udutabare!»" 
Acts16:10 Pawulo akimara kubonekerwa, dutangira gushaka uko twajya muri Masedoniya, kuko twari tumenye neza ko Imana iduhamagariye kuhamamaza Inkuru Nziza." 
Acts16:11 Nuko dufatira ubwato i Torowadi, twambuka tugana kuri Samotirasi, bukeye turakomeza n’i Neyapoli." 
Acts16:12 Tuhavuye tujya i Filipi, ari wo mugi mukuru wa Masedoniya, wari utuwe n’Abanyaroma benshi. Muri uwo mugi rero tuhamara iminsi." 
Acts16:13 Ku munsi w’isabato, dusohoka mu mugi tugana iruhande rw’umugezi, ahantu twibwiraga ko bagomba kuba bahasengera. Nuko turicara, dutangira kuganira n’abagore bari bahakoraniye." 
Acts16:14 Umwe muri bo witwaga Lidiya, ukomoka mu mugi wa Tiyatira, akaba n’umucuruzikazi w’imyenda y’imihemba, yari asanzwe asenga Imana. Nuko atega amatwi kuko Nyagasani yari yamuhaye umutima wo kwita ku byo Pawulo yavugaga." 
Acts16:15 Ngo amare kubatizwa kimwe n’abo mu rugo rwe bose, aratwinginga ati «Niba mubona koko ko nemera Nyagasani, nimuze mucumbike iwanjye.» Ni ko kuduhatira kubyemera." 
Acts16:16 Umunsi umwe, ubwo twajyaga ahantu basengeraga, duhura n’umukobwa w’umuja wahanzweho na roho mbi yamuteraga kuvuga ibizaba; ibyo bigatuma aronkera ba shebuja inyungu nyinshi." 
Acts16:17 Akomeza kudukurikirana twe na Pawulo, asakuza ati «Aba bantu ni abagaragu b’Imana Isumbabyose; barabamenyesha inzira y’umukiro.»" 
Acts16:18 Amara iminsi myinshi abigenza atyo. Pawulo rero bimaze kumurambira, arahindukira abwira iyo roho mbi, ati «Mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, ndagutegetse ngo: sohoka muri uwo mukobwa!» Ako kanya imuvamo." 
Acts16:19 Ba shebuja babonye ko nta nyungu bakimutezeho, bafata Pawulo na Silasi, barabakurubana no ku kibuga cy’umugi, babashyira abategetsi." 
Acts16:20 Nuko babashyikiriza abacamanza bakuru, barababwira bati «Aba bantu baratera imvururu mu mugi wacu. Ni Abayahudi" 
Acts16:21 kandi baramamaza imigenzo tudashobora kwemera no gukurikiza kuko turi Abanyaroma.» 
Acts16:22 Ubwo rubanda na bo barabahagurukira. Nuko abacamanza babashishimurira imyambaro, bategeka ko babakubita ibiboko." 
Acts16:23 Bamaze kubarema inguma, babajugunya mu buroko, bategeka umurinzi kubarinda abyitayeho." 
Acts16:24 Umurinzi ngo abone ko ahawe itegeko rikomeye, abashyira mu nzu yo hirya cyane, amaguru yabo ayaboheye ku biti." 
Acts16:25 Ahagana mu gicuku, Pawulo na Silasi barasenga, baririmba ibisingizo by’Imana, izindi mfungwa zibateze amatwi." 
Acts16:26 Nuko ako kanya haba umutingito ukomeye w’isi, imfatizo z’uburoko ziranyeganyega, imiryango yose ihita yikingura, iminyururu yari iboshye imfungwa zose iracikagurika." 
Acts16:27 Umurinzi w’uburoko akangutse, abona imiryango yose ikinguye. Yibwira ko imfungwa zacitse, ni ko gukura inkota ashaka kwiyica." 
Acts16:28 Ariko Pawulo atera hejuru cyane, aramubwira ati «Uramenye ntiwigirire nabi, twese turi hano.»" 
Acts16:29 Nuko uwo murinzi asaba urumuri, yinjira ahinda umushyitsi, maze yikubita imbere ya Pawulo na Silasi." 
Acts16:30 Hanyuma arabasohokana no hanze, arababaza ati «Bategetsi banjye, ngomba gukora iki kugira ngo nkire?»" 
Acts16:31 Baramusubiza bati «Wemere Nyagasani Yezu, uzakira, wowe n’urugo rwawe.»" 
Acts16:32 Nuko bamubwira ijambo rya Nyagasani, we n’abo mu rugo rwe bose." 
Acts16:33 Ako kanya muri iryo joro, arabajyana yuhagira inguma zabo, ahera ko abatizwa hamwe n’urugo rwe rwose." 
Acts16:34 Hanyuma ajyana Pawulo na Silasi iwe arabazimanira, yishimana n’abo mu rugo rwe bose, kubera ko yemeye Imana." 
Acts16:35 Bumaze gucya, abacamanza bakuru batuma abantu kubwira uwo murinzi w’uburoko bati «Rekura abo bantu!»" 
Acts16:36 Umurinzi w’uburoko na we amenyesha Pawulo iyo nkuru ati «Abacamanza bantumyeho ngo mbarekure, none rero nimusohoke mwigendere amahoro!»" 
Acts16:37 Ariko Pawulo arasubiza ati «Badukubitiye mu ruhame nta rubanza rwadutsinze, ndetse batujugunya mu buroko kandi dufite ubwenegihugu bw’Abanyaroma. None baragira ngo baturekure rwihishwa? Ibyo ni ibidashoboka! Ahubwo nibiyizire ubwabo, baturekure!»" 
Acts16:38 Abo bantu batumwe bajya kubwira abacamanza bakuru ayo magambo. Ngo bumve ko Pawulo na Silasi bafite ubwenegihugu bw’Abanyaroma bibatera ubwoba. 
Acts16:39 Baraza babitwaraho, hanyuma barabarekura, babinginga ngo babavire mu mugi." 
Acts16:40 Pawulo na Silasi bamaze kuva mu buroko bajya kwa Lidiya, babonana n’abavandimwe. Bamaze kubakomeza umutima, baragenda." 
Acts17:1 Banyura Amfipoli n’i Apoloniya, bagera i Tesaloniki, aho hakaba isengero ry’Abayahudi." 
Acts17:2 Pawulo rero yinjira mu isengero nk’uko yari abimenyereye, yikurikiranya amasabato atatu yose ajya impaka na bo, ahereye ku Byanditswe." 
Acts17:3 Yasobanuraga kandi akerekana ko Kristu yagombaga kubabara, akazuka mu bapfuye. Yungamo ndetse ati «Kristu ni uwo Yezu ndiho mbamenyesha.»" 
Acts17:4 Bamwe mu Bayahudi baremera, bifatanya na Pawulo na Silasi kimwe n’Abagereki benshi bubahaga Imana, ndetse n’abagore b’abanyacyubahiro batari bake." 
Acts17:5 Nyamara Abayahudi bararakara, bakorakoranya abantu b’ibirara bararuje mu mayira, biremamo inteko maze bateza imidugararo mu mugi. Nuko biroha ku nzu ya Yasoni bashaka Pawulo na Silasi ngo babazane imbere y’ikoraniro rya rubanda." 
Acts17:6 Bababuze, bakurubana Yasoni n’abandi bavandimwe, babashyira abatware b’umugi, basakuza bati «Abo bantu bateye isi yose hejuru, none bageze hano Yasoni arabakira." 
Acts17:7 Abo bose barakora ibinyuranyije n’amategeko ya Kayizari, bavuga ko hari undi mwami witwa Yezu.»" 
Acts17:8 Urwo rusaku rutera impagarara muri rubanda no mu batware b’umugi," 
Acts17:9 bategeka Yasoni na bagenzi be gutanga ingurano, hanyuma barabarekura." 
Acts17:10 Nuko nijoro abavandimwe bacikisha Pawulo na Silasi, babohereza i Beroya. Ngo bagereyo, binjira mu isengero ry’Abayahudi." 
Acts17:11 Abantu b’aho barushaga ubupfura ab’i Tesaloniki, bakirana umutima mwiza ijambo ry’Imana, buri munsi bagasesengura Ibyandi tswe, kugira ngo barebe niba ibyo Pawulo avuga ari ko biri." 
Acts17:12 Benshi muri bo baremera, kimwe n’Abagerekikazi b’abanyacyubahiro, n’abagabo batari bake." 
Acts17:13 Ariko Abayahudi b’i Tesaloniki ngo bamenye ko Pawulo yamamaza ijambo ry’Imana i Beroya, bahita bajyayo, bateza impagarara n’imidugararo ro muri rubanda." 
Acts17:14 Uwo mwanya, abavandimwe bohereza Pawulo ku nyanja, naho Silasi na Timote baguma aho ngaho." 
Acts17:15 Abari baherekeje Pawulo barakomeza bamugeza Atene, hanyuma bahindukirana ubutumwa bugenewe Silasi na Timote, bubategeka ko bazamugeraho bidatinze." 
Acts17:16 Igihe Pawulo akibategerereje Atene, ashengurwa cyane no kubona uwo mugi ugwiriyemo ibigirwamana." 
Acts17:17 Buri munsi yajyaga mu isengero, akajya impaka n’Abayahudi n’abandi bubaha Imana, ndetse no ku karubanda akajya impaka n’abahazaga." 
Acts17:18 Hari ndetse n’abahanga bamwe bakurikizaga inyigisho za Epikuri n’iz’Abanyastowa, nuko batangira kujya impaka na we. Bamwe bakabaza bati «Mbese iyo ndondogozi irashaka kuvuga iki?» Abandi bakavuga bati «Agomba kuba ari umwigisha w’imana z’inyamahanga», kuko bumvaga Pawulo yamamaza ibyerekeye Yezu n’izuka." 
Acts17:19 Nuko baramufata, bamujyana mu rukiko rwabo rwitwa Areyopago, bavuga bati «Dushobora se kumenya iby’izo nyigisho nshya wamamaza?" 
Acts17:20 Kuko ibyo utubwira turumva ari ibyaduka, none turifuza kumenya icyo bivuga.»" 
Acts17:21 Koko rero, Abanyatene bose n’abanyamahanga bahatuye, nta kindi bakoraga uretse kumva no kubara inkuru z’inzaduka." 
Acts17:22 Pawulo ahagarara rwagati mu rukiko, araterura ati «Yemwe bantu ba Atene, ndabona ko mushishikarira iyobokamana ku buryo bukataje!" 
Acts17:23 Koko rero, ubwo nagendagendaga mu mihanda y’umugi wanyu, nagiye mbona amashusho y’Imana zanyu, ndetse ndabukwa n’urutambiro rwanditsweho ngo ’Urw’imana itaramenyekana.’ None rero, iyo Mana musenga mutayizi, ni yo nje kubamenyesha." 
Acts17:24 Imana yaremye isi n’ibiyirimo byose, yo Mugenga w’ijuru n’isi, ntitura mu ngoro zubatswe n’ibiganza by’abantu," 
Acts17:25 ntikorerwa n’ibiganza by’abantu nk’aho hari icyo ikennye, ahubwo ni yo iha bose ubugingo, ikabaha umwuka n’ibindi bakeneye byose." 
Acts17:26 Yaremye amoko yose y’abantu ikurije ku muntu umwe, iyatuza ku bwisanzure bwose bw’isi; yayashyiriyeho ibihe uko bisimburana, ibakebera imbibi z’aho bagomba gutura." 
Acts17:27 Ibyo Imana yabigiriye kugira ngo wenda nibayishakashaka babashe kuyishyikira, kuko mu by’ukuri itari kure ya buri muntu muri twe." 
Acts17:28 Ni yo dukesha ubugingo, ubwinyagambure n’ukubaho uko ari ko kose, nk’uko bamwe mu basizi banyu bigeze kubivuga bati ’Koko turi inkomoko yayo.’" 
Acts17:29 Ubwo rero dukomoka ku Mana, ntitugomba gutekereza ko kamere y’Imana imeze nka bya bishushanyo bibajwe muri zahabu, muri feza, cyangwa se mu ibuye, bikomoka ku bukorikori n’ubugenge bya muntu." 
Acts17:30 Imana rero yirengagije ibyo bihe by’ubujiji, none irahamagara abantu bose iyo bava bakagera ngo bisubireho," 
Acts17:31 kuko yashyizeho umunsi igomba gucira isi urubanza rutabera, ikoresheje umuntu yabigeneye, nk’uko yahaye bose icyemezo, umunsi imuzura mu bapfuye.»" 
Acts17:32 Pawulo ngo avuge iby’izuka ry’abapfuye, bamwe muri bo bamuha urw’amenyo, abandi baramubwira bati «Kuri iyo ngingo, tuzakumva ikindi gihe!»" 
Acts17:33 Nuko Pawulo abavamo atyo. 
Acts17:34 Nyamara bamwe bifatanya na we baremera. Muri bo hakaba Diyoniziyo, umujyanama mu Rukiko, n’umugore witwa Damari, n’abandi." 
Acts18:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Pawulo ava Atene ajya i Korinti." 
Acts18:2 Ahasanga Umuyahudi witwa Akwila ukomoka i Ponto, wari uherutse kuva mu Butaliyani n’umugore we Purisila, kuko umwami w’i Roma, Kalawudiyo, yari yategetse Abayahudi bose kuhava. Pawulo amenyana na bo," 
Acts18:3 kandi kubera ko yari ahuje umwuga na bo, — bari ababoshyi b’amahema —, aguma iwabo bagakorana uwo mwuga." 
Acts18:4 Buri munsi w’isabato yafataga ijambo mu isengero, akagerageza kwemeza Abayahudi n’Abagereki." 
Acts18:5 Nuko Silasi na Timote bamaze kuhagera baturutse i Masedoniya, Pawulo yiyegurira wese ijambo ry’Imana, yemeza Abayahudi ko Yezu ari we Mukiza." 
Acts18:6 Nyamara bo bakamurwanya kandi bakamutuka, ni ko gukunguta imyambaro ye, ababwira ati «Amaraso yanyu azabahame! Jye ndi umwere, ndetse no kuva ubu nigiriye mu banyamahanga.»" 
Acts18:7 Avuye aho ngaho, ajya ku witwa Tito Yusito, umuntu wubahaga Imana, akaba yari atuye iruhande rw’isengero." 
Acts18:8 Kirisipo, umutware w’isengero, yemera Nyagasani n’urugo rwe rwose, ndetse n’Abanyakorinti benshi bumvise amagambo ya Pawulo baremera, barabatizwa." 
Acts18:9 Nuko ijoro rimwe, Nyagasani abonekera Pawulo aramubwira ati «Witinya, ahubwo komeza uvuge, ntuceceke!" 
Acts18:10 Ndi kumwe nawe kandi nta n’umwe uzahangara kukugirira nabi, kuko abantu benshi muri uyu mugi ari abanjye.»" 
Acts18:11 Pawulo amarana na bo umwaka umwe n’amezi atandatu, abigisha ijambo ry’Imana." 
Acts18:12 Mu gihe Galiyo yatwaraga Akaya, Abayahudi bahuza umugambi wo gufata Pawulo, bamujyana mu rukiko," 
Acts18:13 bamurega bagira bati «Uyu muntu yoshya abantu gusenga Imana ku buryo bunyuranyije n’Amategeko.» 
Acts18:14 Pawulo ngo ajye kugira icyo avuga, Galiyo abwira Abayahudi ati «Bayahudi, iyo bujya kuba ubugome cyangwa ubugizi bwa nabi murega uyu muntu, najyaga kubumva;" 
Acts18:15 ariko ubwo ari impaka zerekeye ku nyigisho, ku mazina no ku mategeko yanyu bwite, nimubyirangirize ubwanyu. Jye sinshaka kuba umucamanza w’ibyo!»" 
Acts18:16 Nuko abirukana mu rukiko. 
Acts18:17 Ubwo bahera ko basumira Sositeni, umutware w’isengero, bamukubitira imbere y’urukiko; ariko Galiyo ntiyabyitaho na busa." 
Acts18:18 Pawulo yongera kumara igihe kirekire i Korinti, hanyuma asezera ku bavandimwe, afata ubwato ajya muri Siriya ari kumwe na Purisila na Akwila. Ageze i Kenkireya, ariyogoshesha kubera umuhigo yari yarahize." 
Acts18:19 Bageze Efezi, Pawulo asiga bagenzi be aho ngaho, yinjira mu isengero atangira kwigisha Abayahudi." 
Acts18:20 Bamusaba kuhamara igihe kirekire ariko arabyanga; 
Acts18:21 ahubwo abasezeraho ababwira ati «Niba Imana ibishatse, nzagaruka iwanyu.» Afata ubwato ava Efezi," 
Acts18:22 yomokera i Kayizareya ajya gusura Kiliziya y’aho, hanyuma amanuka ajya Antiyokiya," 
Acts18:23 ahamara igihe kirekire. Ahavuye arakomeza azenguruka akarere k’Ubugalati na Furujiya, ashishikaza abigishwa bose." 
Acts18:24 Nuko Umuyahudi witwaga Apolo, kavukire ka Alegisandiriya, agera i Efezi. Akaba umuntu w’umuhanga mu Byanditswe." 
Acts18:25 Yari yarigishijwe inzira ya Nyagasani, akagira n’umwete mu kuvuga ibyerekeye Yezu, kandi akabyigisha uko biri, n’ubwo yari azi gusa batisimu ya Yohani." 
Acts18:26 Ubwo atangira kuvugira mu isengero ashize amanga, Purisila na Akwila ngo bamwumve bamujyana iwabo, bamusobanurira kurushaho inzira y’Imana." 
Acts18:27 Hanyuma Apolo ashatse kujya muri Akaya, abavandimwe bamutera inkunga kandi bandikira abigishwa b’aho ngo bamwakire neza. Agezeyo, agirira akamaro abemeye babikesha ubuntu bw’Imana," 
Acts18:28 kuko yatsindaga impaka Abayahudi ku mugaragaro, abereka mu Byanditswe ko Yezu ari we Kristu." 
Acts19:1 Igihe Apolo yari i Korinti, Pawulo na we agera i Efezi, aturutse mu bihugu by’amajyaruguru. Ahasanga abigishwa bamwe," 
Acts19:2 ni ko kubabaza ati «Mbese igihe mwemeye, mwaba mwarahawe Roho Mutagatifu?» Baramusubiza bati «Haba ngo twigeze no kumva ko Roho Mutagatifu abaho!»" 
Acts19:3 Pawulo ni ko kubabaza ati «None se mwahawe iyihe batisimu?» Baramusubiza bati «Batisimu ya Yohani.» 
Acts19:4 Nuko Pawulo aravuga ati «Yohani yatangaga batisimu yo kwisubiraho, agasaba rubanda kwemera Uwari ugiye kuza nyuma ye, ari we Yezu.»" 
Acts19:5 Bamaze kubyumva, babatizwa mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu." 
Acts19:6 Nuko Pawulo abaramburiraho ibiganza, maze Roho Mutagatifu abamanukiraho; bavuga mu ndimi kandi barahanura." 
Acts19:7 Bose hamwe bari bageze nko ku bantu cumi na babiri. 
Acts19:8 Mu mezi atatu yose, Pawulo yajyaga mu isengero akavuga ashize amanga, akagerageza kwemeza abamwumvaga ibyerekeye Ingoma y’Imana." 
Acts19:9 Ariko bamwe bakomeje kunangira umutima banga kwemera, bagatuka inzira ya Nyagasani mu ruhame. Pawulo ni ko gutandukana na bo, ajyana n’abigishwa akabigishiriza buri munsi mu ishuri ry’umuntu witwa Tirano." 
Acts19:10 Amara imyaka ibiri abigenza atyo, kugeza ubwo abaturage bose ba Aziya, Abayahudi kimwe n’Abagereki, bumva ijambo rya Nyagasani." 
Acts19:11 Imana yakoreshaga Pawulo ibitangaza bidasanzwe," 
Acts19:12 kugeza ubwo bafataga ibitambaro cyangwa imyenda yakoze ku mubiri we, bakabikoza ku barwayi bagakira indwara zabo, na za roho mbi zikabavamo." 
Acts19:13 Hari Abayahudi bamwe bazereraga ibihugu birukana roho mbi mu bantu, na bo bagerageza kuzirukana bitwaje izina rya Nyagasani Yezu, bavuga bati «Ndabirukanye mu izina rya Yezu uwo Pawulo yamamaza.»" 
Acts19:14 Abakoraga ibyo, ni abahungu barindwi b’Umuyahudi witwaga Seba, akaba n’umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
Acts19:15 Nyamara roho mbi irabasubiza iti «Yezu ndamuzi, na Pawulo nkamumenya, ariko se mwe muri bande?»" 
Acts19:16 Nuko uwo muntu wari wahanzweho na roho mbi arabasimbukira, abarusha amaboko bose maze abagirira nabi, kugeza ubwo baturumbuka mu nzu bagahunga bambaye ubusa kandi ari inkomere." 
Acts19:17 Abaturage bose b’i Efezi, Abayahudi kimwe n’Abagereki, ngo babimenye bashya ubwoba, basingiza izina rya Nyagasani Yezu." 
Acts19:18 Abenshi mu bari baremeye baraza, bakiregera mu ruhame ibikorwa bibi bakoze." 
Acts19:19 Abakoraga iby’ubupfumu, na bo batari bake, bakoranya ibitabo byabo babitwikira mu ruhame. Ngo babarure agaciro k’ikiguzi cyabyo, basanga bihwanye n’ibiceri bya feza ibihumbi mirongo itanu." 
Acts19:20 Bityo ku bw’imbaraga za Nyagasani, ijambo ry’Imana rikomeza kwamamara no gushinga imizi ihamye." 
Acts19:21 Nyuma y’ibyo, Pawulo abwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu, yiyemeza kujya i Yeruzalemu anyuze muri Masedoniya no muri Akaya. Yaravugaga ati «Nimara kugerayo, bizaba ngombwa no kujya i Roma.»" 
Acts19:22 Nuko atuma babiri mu bafasha be i Masedoniya, Timote na Erasito, naho we asigara igihe gito muri Aziya." 
Acts19:23 Icyo gihe ni bwo habyutse impagarara zikomeye mu mugi, zerekeye inzira ya Nyagasani." 
Acts19:24 Hakaba rero umucuzi witwaga Demetiriyo, wacuraga mu muringa udushushanyo tw’ingoro z’ikigirwamana cyitwa Aritemisi, bikaba byaramuzaniraga we n’abo bakoranaga inyungu zitangaje." 
Acts19:25 Nuko akoranya abo bakoranaga n’abandi banyamyuga bari begeranye, arababwira ati «Ncuti zanjye, muzi ko umunezero wacu tuwukesha uyu murimo." 
Acts19:26 None rero, nk’uko mubyirebera kandi mukabyiyumvira, Pawulo uwo aroshya rubanda rwose, atari Efezi honyine, ahubwo no muri Aziya yose, ababwira ko imana dukora atari zo." 
Acts19:27 Si ugutinya gusa ko umwuga wahinyuka, ahubwo n’ingoro y’imanakazi nkuru Aritemisi ishobora guta agaciro, igasuzugurika kandi ari yo isengwa n’Abanyaziya, ndetse n’abantu b’isi yose.»" 
Acts19:28 Abantu ngo babyumve bararakara cyane, ni ko gutera hejuru bati «Aritemisi y’Abanyefezi ni igihangange!»" 
Acts19:29 Nuko umugi wose uravurungana, icyo kivunge cy’abantu kiroha mu kibuga cy’amakoraniro, basumira abantu babiri bo muri Masedoniya, Gayo na Arisitariko, bagendanaga na Pawulo." 
Acts19:30 Pawulo yari yiyemeje gusanganira icyo kivunge cy’abantu, ariko abigishwa ntibamukundira." 
Acts19:31 Ndetse na bamwe mu bategetsi ba Aziya bari incuti ze bamutumaho, bamwinginga bamusaba kutigaragaza mu kibuga." 
Acts19:32 Ikoraniro ryose riravurungana, bagasakuza bose, umwe avuga ibye undi ibye, ndetse abenshi muri bo ntibari bazi n’impamvu yabakoranyije." 
Acts19:33 Abantu batekerereza byose uwitwa Alegisanderi, ari we Abayahudi bari bashyize imbere. Nuko ashyira ukuboko ejuru ngo baceceke, ashaka kugira icyo abwira rubanda." 
Acts19:34 Ariko ngo bamenye ko ari Umuyahudi, basakuriza icyarimwe bimara amasaha abiri, bavuga bati «Aritemisi y’Abanyefezi ni igihangange!»" 
Acts19:35 Umunyamabanga w’umugi amaze kubacecekesha, abwira rubanda ati «Banyefezi, ni nde utazi ko umurwa wacu wa Efezi ari umugi weguriwe Aritemisi w’igihangange, ukarinda n’ishusho rye ryamanutse mu ijuru?" 
Acts19:36 Ubwo rero nta we ubihakana, mugomba gutuza mukareka guhubuka." 
Acts19:37 Byongeye, mwazanye hano abantu batigeze basuzugura cyangwa ngo batuke imanakazi yacu!" 
Acts19:38 Niba rero Demetiriyo na bagenzi be bafite uwo bagira icyo barega, inkiko ziriho n’abacamanza barahari; aho ni ho bagomba kuburanira." 
Acts19:39 Niba kandi hari ikindi mushaka kubaza, kizakiranurwa n’ikoraniro ryemewe n’amategeko." 
Acts19:40 Ndetse n’iri teraniro rishobora kutuviramo kuregwa ubugome, kuko ari nta ngingo twakwifashisha kugira ngo dusobanure impamvu zaryo.» Amaze kuvuga ayo magambo, asezerera rubanda." 
Acts20:1 Izo mpagarara zimaze guhosha, Pawulo akoranya abigishwa, abarema agatima, abasezeraho yerekeza muri Masedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Amaze kwambukiranya iyo ntara yose, kandi ari na ko agenda abwira abavandimwe amagambo arambuye yo kubakomeza, aza kugera mu Bugereki," 
Acts20:3 ahamara amezi atatu. Nyamara ashaka gufata ubwato ngo ajye muri Siriya, amenya ko Abayahudi bamugambaniye; ni bwo yiyemeje kongera kunyura muri Masedoniya." 
Acts20:4 Muri urwo rugendo yari aherekejwe na Sopateri, mwene Piro w’i Beroya, Arisitariko na Sekundi b’i Tesaloniki, Gayo w’i Deribe na Timote, hamwe na Tushiko na Tirofimo bo muri Aziya." 
Acts20:5 Abo batubanje imbere, badutegerereza i Torowadi." 
Acts20:6 Naho twebwe, iminsi y’imigati idasembuye irangiye, dufatira ubwato i Filipi, tubasanga i Torowadi nyuma y’iminsi itanu, tuhamara icyumweru cyose." 
Acts20:7 Ku wa mbere w’icyumweru, ubwo twari duteraniye hamwe ngo tumanyure umugati, Pawulo wari uraye ari bugende aganira n’abavandimwe kugeza mu gicuku." 
Acts20:8 Mu cyumba cyo mu nzu yo hejuru aho twari duteraniye, hakaga amatara menshi." 
Acts20:9 Nuko umusore witwa Ewutiko akaba yicaye mu idirishya igihe Pawulo yigishaga. Inyigisho irambiranye, aza gutwarwa n’ibitotsi byinshi; ni ko guhanuka mu igorofa ya gatatu, yitura hasi, bahaterura uwapfuye." 
Acts20:10 Nuko Pawulo amanuka bwangu, amwubarara hejuru maze aramuhobera, avuga ati «Mwikuka umutima, ni mutaraga!»" 
Acts20:11 Aho azamukiye, Pawulo afata umugati, arawumanyura; hanyuma akomeza ikiganiro kugeza mu gitondo, abona kugenda." 
Acts20:12 Naho wa musore bamuzana ari mutaraga, maze ibyishimo biba byose." 
Acts20:13 Twe rero tujya mu bwato tugenda mbere twerekeje ahitwa Aso, aho twagombaga kwakirira Pawulo, kuko we yari yagennye kujyayo anyuze inzira y’ubutaka." 
Acts20:14 Nuko adusanga Aso tumushyira mu bwato, turambuka tujya i Mitilena." 
Acts20:15 Bukeye, tujya mu bwato tugera ahateganye n’ikirwa cyitwa Kiyo. Ku wundi munsi twambuka tugana i Samosi, ku munsi ukurikiyeho tugera i Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Pawulo yari yagennye kutanyura Efezi kugira ngo adatinda muri Aziya, kuko yihutiraga kuba ari i Yeruzalemu, nibura bishobotse ku munsi mukuru wa Pentekositi." 
Acts20:17 Pawulo ari i Mileto, ahamagaza abakuru ba Kiliziya ya Efezi." 
Acts20:18 Bamugezeho, arababwira ati «Muzi uko nabanye namwe kuva aho ngereye muri Aziya." 
Acts20:19 Nakoreye Nyagasani, niyoroheje ku buryo bwose, mu marira no mu magorwa naterwaga n’ubugambanyi bw’Abayahudi." 
Acts20:20 Nta cyo nabakinze mu byo nashoboraga kubabwira cyabagirira akamaro; byose narabitangaje, mbibigishiriza mu ruhame kimwe no mu ngo." 
Acts20:21 Nashishikarizaga Abayahudi kimwe n’Abagereki kugarukira Imana no kwemera Umwami wacu Yezu. 
Acts20:22 None dore ngiye i Yeruzalemu mbibwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu; ibizambaho ngezeyo simbizi. 
Acts20:23 Icyakora, muri buri mugi, Roho Mutagatifu anyemeza ko ingoyi n’amakuba bihantegerereje." 
Acts20:24 Nyamara ku bwanjye, ndahamya ko amagara yanjye bwite nta cyo amariye; icya ngombwa ni ukurangiza isiganwa ryanjye n’umurimo Nyagasani Yezu yanshinze wo guhamya Inkuru Nziza y’ineza Imana ibagirira." 
Acts20:25 Nzi neza ko kuva ubu mutazongera kumbona ukundi, mwebwe mwese abo nanyuzemo namamaza Ingoma y’Imana." 
Acts20:26 Ni cyo gitumye rero, uyu munsi nshobora kwemeza mu maso yanyu ko ndi umwere w’amaraso yanyu mwese," 
Acts20:27 kuko nabamenyesheje umugambi wose w’Imana, nta cyo mbakinze." 
Acts20:28 Murimenye rero ubwanyu, mumenye n’ubushyo mwaragijwe na Roho Mutagatifu, mube abashumba ba Kiliziya y’Imana, Yezu yacunguje amaraso ye bwite." 
Acts20:29 Nzi neza ko nimara kugenda, muzinjirwamo n’ibirura by’ibihubuzi bitazababarira n’ubushyo." 
Acts20:30 Ndetse no muri mwe hazaduka abantu bavuga amagambo y’ibinyoma, azatuma bigarurira abigishwa." 
Acts20:31 Murabe maso rero, mwibuka ko mu myaka itatu yose, ijoro n’amanywa ndetse no mu marira, ntatuje kuburira buri muntu muri mwe." 
Acts20:32 Ubu rero mbaragije Nyagasani kugira ngo abababarire, maze abakomereshe ijambo rye, kandi ku bwa ryo abahe umurage hamwe n’abatagatifujwe bose." 
Acts20:33 Nta kintu cy’umuntu uwo ari we wese nararikiye, cyaba feza, cyaba zahabu, cyangwa umwambaro." 
Acts20:34 Namwe ubwanyu murabizi: ibi biganza byanjye mureba ni byo nkesha ibyo nabaga nkeneye byose, kimwe na bagenzi banjye." 
Acts20:35 Naberetse buri munsi ko ari ngombwa kuvunika dutyo, kugira ngo tugoboke abatishoboye, twibuka n’amagambo Nyagasani Yezu yivugiye ubwe ati ’Utanga arahirwa kuruta uhabwa.’»" 
Acts20:36 Pawulo amaze kuvuga ibyo, arapfukama hamwe n’abo bari kumwe bose, maze arasenga." 
Acts20:37 Nuko bose baraturika bararira, bamugwa mu ijosi, baramuhobera." 
Acts20:38 Bari bababajwe cyane n’uko yari amaze kuvuga ko batazongera kumubona ukundi. Nuko baramuherekeza bamugeza ku bwato. 
Acts21:1 Tumaze kubiyaka, tujya mu bwato tuboneza tugana i Kosi; bukeye tugera i Rode, tuhava tujya i Patara." 
Acts21:2 Tuhasanga ubwato bwajyaga muri Fenisiya, turabwurira buratujyana." 
Acts21:3 Ngo tugere ahateganye n’ikirwa cya Shipure, ikirwa tugisiga ibumoso tugenda twerekeje muri Siriya maze twururukira i Tiri, kuko ari ho ubwato bwagombaga gusiga imitwaro." 
Acts21:4 Tuhamara iminsi irindwi kuko twari tuhasanze abigishwa, maze bayobowe na Roho Mutagatifu, babwira Pawulo ngo yoye kujya i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts21:5 Nyamara ya minsi ngo irangire, turahaguruka dukomeza urugendo, bose baraduherekeza hamwe n’abagore n’abana baturenza umugi. Nuko dupfukama aho ku nkombe y’inyanja turasenga;" 
Acts21:6 hanyuma dusezeranaho, twe twurira ubwato naho bo basubira iwabo." 
Acts21:7 Ubwo twebwe turangiza urugendo rwacu rwo kuva i Tiri, twururukira i Putolemayida, turamutsa abavandimwe b’aho, dusibira iwabo umunsi umwe." 
Acts21:8 Bukeye, turagenda tugera i Kayizareya twinjira kwa Filipo, umwogezi w’Inkuru Nziza, wari umwe muri ba Barindwi, nuko ducumbika iwe." 
Acts21:9 Yari afite abakobwa bane b’abari, bahanuraga." 
Acts21:10 Mu minsi twahamaze, haza kuza umuhanuzi wo muri Yudeya, akitwa Agabo." 
Acts21:11 Ngo agere aho turi, afata umukandara wa Pawulo, awibohesha amaguru n’amaboko avuga ati «Roho Mutagatifu aravuze ngo ’Nyir’uy’umukandara, uku ni ko Abayahudi bazamubohera i Yeruzalemu, maze bamugabize abanyamahanga.’»" 
Acts21:12 Tubyumvise, twe n’abavandimwe bo muri uwo mugi, twinginga Pawulo ngo yoye kujya i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts21:13 Nuko aradusubiza ati «Ikibateye kurira no kunshengura umutima ni iki? Jye siniteguye kubohwa byonyine, ahubwo niteguye no gupfira i Yeruzalemu, mporwa izina rya Nyagasani Yezu.»" 
Acts21:14 Kuko tutari dushoboye kubimwemeza, ntitwahatiriza turavuga tuti «Icyo Nyagasani ashaka nigikorwe!»" 
Acts21:15 Nyuma y’iyo minsi rero, tumaze kwegeranya ibintu byacu, turazamuka n’i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts21:16 Abigishwa b’i Kayizareya bari baduherekeje, batujyana gucumbika ku muntu witwa Munasoni ukomoka i Shipure, wari umwigishwa kuva kera." 
Acts21:17 Tugeze i Yeruzalemu, abavandimwe batwakirana ibyishimo." 
Acts21:18 Bukeye, Pawulo ajyana natwe kwa Yakobo, n’abakuru bose barahateranira." 
Acts21:19 Pawulo amaze kubaramutsa, abatekerereza ku buryo burambuye ibyo Imana yamukoresheje byose mu banyamahanga." 
Acts21:20 Abamwumvaga basingiza Imana, maze baramubwira bati «Muvandimwe, urabona ibihumbi by’Abayahudi bemeye uko bingana, nyamara dore bose barakiziritse ku Mategeko ya Musa." 
Acts21:21 Nuko rero, bumvise ko wigisha Abayahudi bose batuye mu mahanga kuzinukwa inyigisho ze, uvuga ngo ntibazongere ukundi kugenya abana babo no gukurikiza imigenzo yacu." 
Acts21:22 Byagenda bite rero? Byanze bikunze kandi, bazamenya ko wageze ino." 
Acts21:23 None rero, ukore ibyo tugiye kukubwira. Dufite abantu bane bahize umuhigo;" 
Acts21:24 bajyane ukore umuhango wo kwisukura hamwe na bo, kandi ubishyurire ibyo bari gutanga kugira ngo bogoshwe. Bityo abantu bose bazamenya ko ibyo bakumviseho bidafite ishingiro, ahubwo ko nawe ubwawe witondera Amategeko." 
Acts21:25 Naho ku byerekeye abanyamahanga bemeye, twabandikiye tubabwira ibyemezo byacu: kwirinda inyama zatambiwe ibigirwamana, n’amaraso, n’inyama z’ibyanizwe, no kwirinda ubukozi bw’ibibi.»" 
Acts21:26 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, Pawulo ajyana na ba bantu, atangira umuhango wo kwisukura hamwe na bo. Hanyuma ajya mu Ngoro y'Imana kugira ngo bemeranywe umunsi ituro rya buri wese rizaherezwaho, barangije kwisukura." 
Acts21:27 Iminsi irindwi ijya kurangira, Abayahudi bo muri Aziya ngo babone Pawulo mu Ngoro, babyutsa imvururu muri rubanda rwose, maze baramufata." 
Acts21:28 Barasakuzaga bavuga bati «Bayisraheli, nimudutabare! Dore uyu muntu agenda hose yigisha abantu bose, arwanya umuryango wacu kimwe n’Amategeko n’aha Hantu. Byongeye kandi, yinjije Abagereki mu Ngoro, ahumanya aha Hantu hatagatifu!»" 
Acts21:29 Koko rero, bavuze batyo kuko bari barabonye Tirofimo w’i Efezi ari kumwe na we mu mugi, bakeka ko Pawulo yamwinjije mu Ngoro." 
Acts21:30 Umugi wose ni ko kuvurungana, maze rubanda rwose rurahurura, bafata Pawulo bamuvana mu Ngoro bamujyana hanze, bahita bakinga imiryango." 
Acts21:31 Igihe bagishaka kumwica, iyo nkuru iba yageze ku mugaba w’ingabo, bamubwira bati «Yeruzalemu yose yavurunganye!»" 
Acts21:32 Aherako akoranya abasirikare n’abategeka babo, yihuta asanga icyo kivunge cy’abantu. Ngo babone uwo mugaba w’ingabo n’abasirikare, bareka gukubita Pawulo." 
Acts21:33 Nuko umugaba w’ingabo aramwegera, aramufata, maze ategeka ko bamuboha n’iminyururu ibiri; hanyuma abaza uwo ari we n’icyo yakoze." 
Acts21:34 Ariko rubanda bagasakuza, umwe avuga ibye undi ibye. Umugaba w’ingabo abonye ko nta cyo ashoboye kumenya kubera uwo muvurungano, ategeka abasirikare kumujyana mu kigo cyabo." 
Acts21:35 Igihe bageze ku mabaraza, abasirikare bagombye guterura Pawulo babitewe n’ukuntu rubanda bari barakaye," 
Acts21:36 kuko imbaga y’abantu uko yakabaye yari imukurikiye, basakuza bati «Nimumukureho!»" 
Acts21:37 Igihe bajyaga kumwinjiza mu kigo cy’abasirikare, Pawulo abaza umugaba w’ingabo ati «Mbese nshobora kugira icyo nkubwira?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Uzi ikigereki?" 
Acts21:38 Aho none ntiwaba wa Munyamisiri uherutse gutera impagarara, agacikisha abantu ibihumbi bine b’abishi, akabajyana mu butayu?»" 
Acts21:39 Pawulo ni ko kumusubiza ati «Jyewe ndi Umuyahudi, ukomoka i Tarisi ho muri Silisiya, nkaba umuturage w’uwo mugi w’ikirangirire. None ndakwinginze ngo ureke ngire icyo mbwira iyi mbaga.»" 
Acts21:40 Umugaba w’ingabo amaze kumwemerera, Pawulo ahagarara ku mabaraza, arambura ukuboko kugira ngo acecekeshe imbaga. Bamaze gutuza, ababwira mu rurimi rw’igihebureyi ati" 
Acts22:1 «Bavandimwe kandi babyeyi, nimwumve ukwiregura kwanjye ngiye kubagezaho.»" 
Acts22:2 Nuko ngo bumve avuze mu rurimi rw’igihebureyi, ituze rirushaho kuba ryose." 
Acts22:3 Arakomeza ati «Ndi Umuyahudi, navukiye i Tarisi ho muri Silisiya, ariko narerewe muri uyu mugi; nigishwa na Gamaliyeli, antoza kwita byuzuye ku Mategeko y’abasekuruza. Imana nyirwanira ishyaka nk’uko namwe murirwana uyu munsi." 
Acts22:4 Natoteje abantu bakurikiraga iyi Nzira kugeza ubwo mbica, mboha abagabo n’abagore mbashyira mu buroko." 
Acts22:5 Umuherezabitambo mukuru hamwe n’abakuru b’umuryango ni bo ntanzeho abagabo, bo bampaye inzandiko nshyikiriza abavandimwe bacu b’i Damasi, ubwo najyagayo, ntumwe kuboha abariyo no kubazana i Yeruzalemu kugira ngo bahanwe." 
Acts22:6 Nuko igihe nkiri mu nzira negereje kugera i Damasi, ako kanya amanywa ava, urumuri ruturutse mu ijuru rurangota." 
Acts22:7 Nikubita hasi, maze numva ijwi rimbwira riti ’Sawuli, Sawuli! Urantotereza iki?’" 
Acts22:8 Ndasubiza nti ’Uri nde, Nyagasani?’ Iryo jwi rirongera riti ’Ndi Yezu w’i Nazareti, uwo uriho utoteza.’" 
Acts22:9 Bagenzi banjye twari kumwe babonye urumuri, ariko ntibumve ijwi ry’uwo tuvugana." 
Acts22:10 Ni ko kubaza nti ’Nkore iki se, Nyagasani?’ Nyagasani aransubiza ati ’Haguruka ujye i Damasi, ni ho bazakubwira ibyo wagenewe gukora byose.’" 
Acts22:11 Ariko kubera ko icyezezi cy’urwo rumuri cyari cyampumye amaso, abo twari kumwe bagombye kundandata, ngera i Damasi." 
Acts22:12 Aho i Damasi hakaba umuntu witwa Ananiya, yari umuntu wubaha Imana, agakurikiza Amategeko kandi agashimwa n’Abayahudi bose bari bahatuye." 
Acts22:13 Aza kundeba maze arambwira ati «Sawuli, muvandimwe, humuka.’ Ako kanya ndahumuka, maze ndamureba." 
Acts22:14 Nuko arambwira ati ’Imana y’abasekuruza bacu yakugeneye kumenya icyo ishaka, kubona Intungane no kumva ijwi ryayo bwite." 
Acts22:15 Ugomba rero kuyibera umugabo mu bantu bose, ubamenyesha ibyo wabonye n’ibyo wumvise." 
Acts22:16 None se kandi utegereje iki? Haguruka wambaze Nyagasani, ubatizwe kandi uhanagurweho ibyaha byawe.’" 
Acts22:17 Nuko ngaruka i Yeruzalemu, igihe nari mu Ngoro nsenga nza gutwarwa," 
Acts22:18 maze mbona Nyagasani wambwiraga ati ’Ihute uve i Yeruzalemu bidatinze, kuko batazakira ibyo uzahamya binyerekeyeho.’" 
Acts22:19 Ubwo ndasubiza nti ’Nyagasani, barabizi neza ko ari jye wajyaga mu masengero yose gufunga no gukubita abakwemera." 
Acts22:20 Ndetse n’igihe bamennye amaraso ya Sitefano umuhamya wawe, nanjye nari mpari nshyigikiye abo bishi be, kandi ndinze n’imyambaro yabo.’" 
Acts22:21 Ariko Nyagasani arambwira ati ’Genda, kuko jyewe nshaka kugutuma ku bo mu mahanga ya kure.’»" 
Acts22:22 Abayahudi bari bagumye kumutega amatwi kugeza ko avuze ayo magambo, batera hejuru bati «Umuntu nk’uyu agomba kuvanwa ku isi! Ntakwiye kubaho!»" 
Acts22:23 Igihe bariho basakabaka, bajugunya ibishura byabo, ari na ko batumura umukungugu mu kirere," 
Acts22:24 umugaba w’ingabo ategeka ko binjiza Pawulo mu kigo cy’abasirikare, no kumubaza babanje kumukubita ibiboko, kugira ngo amenye impamvu ituma rubanda bamuvugiriza induru." 
Acts22:25 Igihe babohaga Pawulo kugira ngo bamukubite, abaza umutegeka w’abasirikare wari umuhagarikiye ati «Mbese mufite uburenganzira bwo gukubita umuntu ufite ubwenegihugu bw’Abanyaroma, atari yanacirwa urubanza?»" 
Acts22:26 Uwo mutegeka w’abasirikare ngo abyumve, asanga umugaba w’ingabo, aramubaza ati «Ibyo ugiye gukora ni ibiki? Ko uriya mugabo ari Umunyaroma!»" 
Acts22:27 Umugaba w’ingabo araza, abaza Pawulo ati «Ngaho mbwira, koko se uri Umunyaroma?» Pawulo aramusubiza ati «Ni koko.»" 
Acts22:28 Umugaba w’ingabo ni ko kuvuga ati «Nyamara jyewe narishye byinshi, kugira ngo mpabwe ubwo bwenegihugu!» Pawulo aravuga ati «Jyewe rero narabuvukanye!»" 
Acts22:29 Abari bagiye kumukubita bahita bamureka; umugaba w’ingabo agira ubwoba, aho amariye kumenya ko ari Umunyaroma kandi akaba yamuboshye." 
Acts22:30 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, umugaba w’ingabo ashaka kumenya neza icyo Abayahudi barega Pawulo, aramubohora, hanyuma ategeka ko abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’Inama nkuru yose baterana, azana Pawulo amuhagarika imbere yabo." 
Acts23:1 Pawulo ahanga amaso Inama nkuru, ni ko guterura ati «Bavandimwe, kugeza uyu munsi ndumva nta kibi mfite ku mutima.»" 
Acts23:2 Ariko Ananiya, umuherezabitambo mukuru, ategeka abari bakikije Pawulo kumukubita ku munwa. Nuko Pawulo aramubwira ati" 
Acts23:3 «Ni wowe Imana izakubita, wa nkike we irabye ingwa! Wicajwe no kuncira urubanza ukurikije Amategeko, none uhinyuye Amategeko, utegeka ko bankubita!»" 
Acts23:4 Abari bahagaze aho baravuga bati «Uratuka umuherezabitambo mukuru w’Imana!» 
Acts23:5 Pawulo arabasubiza ati «Bavandimwe, nta bwo nari nzi ko ari umuherezabitambo mukuru, kuko byanditswe ngo ’Ntugatuke umutware w’umuryango wawe.’»" 
Acts23:6 Pawulo ngo amenye ko iryo koraniro rigizwe n’igice kimwe cy’Abasaduseyi, n’ikindi cy’Abafarizayi, avuga aranguruye imbere y’Inama nkuru ati «Bavandimwe, ndi Umufarizayi, nkaba umwana w’Abafarizayi. Icyatumye nshyirwa mu rubanza, ndazira ko niringira izuka ry’abapfuye.»" 
Acts23:7 Ngo amare kuvuga ibyo, havuka amakimbirane mu Bafarizayi n’Abasaduseyi, ikoraniro risubiranamo." 
Acts23:8 Koko rero, Abasaduseyi bavugaga ko nta zuka, nta mumalayika, nta na roho bibaho, naho Abafarizayi bakemera ko bibaho." 
Acts23:9 Haba urusaku rwinshi, bituma bamwe mu bigishamategeko bo mu gice cy’Abafarizayi bahaguruka, barwana ishyaka bikomeye bagira bati «Nta kibi tubona kuri uyu muntu. Mbese none roho yaba yaravuganye na we, cyangwa se umumalayika?»" 
Acts23:10 Kubera ko amakimbirane yarushagaho gukomera, umugaba w’ingabo atinya ko bari butanyaguze Pawulo, ni ko gutegeka abasirikare ngo bamanuke bamuvane hagati yabo, bamusubize mu kigo cyabo." 
Acts23:11 Mu ijoro rikurikiyeho, Nyagasani abonekera Pawulo aramubwira ati «Komera! Uko wambereye umugabo i Yeruzalemu, ni ko ugomba no kuzambera umugabo n’i Roma.»" 
Acts23:12 Bukeye mu gitondo, bamwe mu Bayahudi bajya inama, ndetse barahira ko batazagira icyo barya cyangwa ngo banywe, batabanje kwica Pawulo." 
Acts23:13 Abari bahuje uwo mugambi bari abantu basaga mirongo ine. 
Acts23:14 Basanga abatware b’Abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’umuryango, barababwira bati «Twarahiye dukomeje ko nta cyo turi bukoze ku munwa, tutabanje kwica Pawulo." 
Acts23:15 None rero mwebwe, mwumvikane n’Inama nkuru, musabe umugaba w’ingabo amubazanire, nk’aho hari ikindi mushaka kumenya ku bimwerekeyeho. Ubwo natwe turaba twiteguye kumwica, atari yabageraho.»" 
Acts23:16 Ariko mwishywa wa Pawulo ngo amenye iby’icyo gico, araza yinjira mu kigo cy’abasirikare, abibwira Pawulo." 
Acts23:17 Pawulo ni ko guhamagara umwe mu bategeka b’abasirikare, aramubwira ati «Jyana uyu musore ku mugaba w’ingabo, kuko hari icyo ashaka kumumenyesha.»" 
Acts23:18 Nuko aramujyana amugeza ku mugaba w’ingabo, maze aravuga ati «Imfungwa yitwa Pawulo yampamagaye, insaba kukugezaho uyu musore, ngo afite icyo akubwira.»" 
Acts23:19 Umugaba w’ingabo ni ko kumufata ukuboko, amujyana ahiherereye, aramubaza ati «Icyo ushaka kumenyesha ni iki?»" 
Acts23:20 Uwo musore aramusubiza ati «Abayahudi bumvikanye ko ejo bazagusaba kuzana Pawulo mu Nama nkuru, bitwaje ko hari ibindi bashaka kumenya ku bimwerekeyeho." 
Acts23:21 Ntuzabemerere, kuko abantu basaga mirongo ine bamwubikiye, bakaba barahiye ko batazagira icyo barya cyangwa banywa batabanje kumwica. Bategereje gusa igisubizo cyawe.»" 
Acts23:22 Nuko umugaba w’ingabo asezerera uwo musore, ariko abanje kumwihanangiriza ati «Uramenye ntugire umuntu n’umwe ubwira ibyo wamenyesheje!»" 
Acts23:23 Hanyuma ahamagara babiri mu bategeka b’abasirikare, arababwira ati «Nimutegure abasirikare magana abiri, abanyamafarasi mirongo irindwi, n’izindi ngabo magana abiri zitwaje amacumu, mwitegure guhaguruka saa tatu z’ijoro mujya i Kayizareya." 
Acts23:24 Mutegure kandi n’amafarasi yo guheka Pawulo, mumushyikirize umutware Feligisi, akiri mutaraga.»" 
Acts23:25 Nuko umugaba w’ingabo yandikira umutware Feligisi muri aya magambo 
Acts23:26 «Jyewe Kalawudiyo Liziya, kuri Nyakubahwa umutware Feligisi: ndakuramutsa." 
Acts23:27 Uyu muntu nkoherereje yafashwe n’Abayahudi bashaka kumwica, ni bwo mpagobotse n’umutwe w’abasirikare ndamubaka, kuko nari maze kumenya ko afite ubwenegihugu bw’Abanyaroma." 
Acts23:28 Nashatse kumenya icyo bamurega, mujyana mu Nama nkuru," 
Acts23:29 nsanga rero bamurega impaka z’ibyerekeye amategeko yabo, ariko nta kindi kintu na kimwe yakoze cyatuma apfa cyangwa ngo abohwe." 
Acts23:30 Aho menyeye ko bari biteguye kumwica, niyemeje kumukoherereza. Menyesheje kandi n’abamurega ko bazakugezaho ibirego byabo. Gira amahoro!»" 
Acts23:31 Nuko abasirikare bakora uko bategetswe, bajyana Pawulo muri iryo joro, bamugeza Antipatiri." 
Acts23:32 Bukeye, abanyamafarasi baba ari bo bakomeza kujyana na we, abandi bagaruka mu kigo cyabo." 
Acts23:33 Bageze i Kayizareya, bahereza umutware Feligisi urwandiko, bamushyikiriza na Pawulo." 
Acts23:34 Feligisi amaze gusoma urwandiko, abaza akarere Pawulo akomokamo. Aho amenyeye ko akomoka muri Silisiya," 
Acts23:35 aravuga ati «Nzaba numva ibyawe, abakurega bamaze kugera hano.» Nuko ategeka ko arindirwa mu ngoro ya Herodi." 
Acts24:1 Hashize iminsi itanu, Ananiya umuherezabitambo mukuru amanukana na bamwe mu bakuru b’umuryango, hamwe n’umuburanyi wabo witwa Teritulo; basanga umutware Feligisi kugira ngo bamuregere Pawulo." 
Acts24:2 Pawulo amaze guhamagarwa, Teritulo atangira kumurega agira ati «Nyakubahwa Feligisi, aya mahoro atuganjemo ni wowe tuyakesha, kandi n’ibyavuguruwe byinshi muri iki gihugu tubikesha umwete wawe." 
Acts24:3 Aho turi hose, ntidusiba buri gihe kwakira ibyo byiza, kandi turabigushimira cyane." 
Acts24:4 Ariko kugira ngo ntakurambira, ndagusaba ko watwihanganira uko ubisanganywe, ukumva muri make ibyo dushaka kukubwira." 
Acts24:5 Uyu muntu twasanze ari icyorezo, acumba urugomo mu Bayahudi bo ku isi yose, kandi akaba n’umutware w’agatsiko kayobye k’Abanyanazareti." 
Acts24:6 Ndetse yagerageje no guhumanya Ingoro y’Imana yacu, turamufata. (Dushatse kumucira urubanza dukurikije amategeko yacu," 
Acts24:7 ni bwo umugaba w’ingabo Liziya ahagobotse, amutwambura ku ngufu," 
Acts24:8 ategeka ko abamuregaga bazagusanga). Nawe ubwawe umubajije, ushobora kumenya neza ko ibyo tumurega ari impamo.»" 
Acts24:9 Abayahudi na bo baryungamo, bahamya ko ibyo byose ari ko biri." 
Acts24:10 Umutware Feligisi amaze kumuha ikimenyetso cyo kuvuga, Pawulo araterura ati «Nzi neza ko umaze imyaka myinshi ucira imanza abaturage b’iki gihugu cyacu, ni yo mpamvu nishimiye kwiregurira imbere yawe." 
Acts24:11 Nk’uko wowe ubwawe ushobora kubyigenzurira, iminsi ntirarenga cumi n’ibiri kuva aho nzamukiye i Yeruzalemu, njyanyweyo no gusenga." 
Acts24:12 Haba mu Ngoro, haba mu masengero cyangwa mu mugi, muri aba bantu nta wigeze ambona hari uwo tujya impaka, cyangwa ngo basange nteza imvururu muri rubanda." 
Acts24:13 Aba bantu nta n’ubwo bashobora kubona ibimenyetso byemeza ibyo bandega ubu ngubu. 
Acts24:14 Nyamara icyo nemereye imbere yawe, ni uko nkorera Imana y’abasekuruza, nkurikije Inzira aba bita agatsiko k’abayobye, nkaba nemera n’ibyanditswe byose mu Mategeko no mu Bahanuzi." 
Acts24:15 Mfite icyo cyizere ku Mana — kandi na bo turagisangiye —, ko hazabaho izuka ry’intungane kimwe n’iry’abagome." 
Acts24:16 Ni cyo gituma nihatira ubudatuza kugira umutimanama udahinyuka imbere y’Imana n’imbere y’abantu. 
Acts24:17 Nyuma y’imyaka myinshi, nagarutse i Yeruzalemu nzaniye umuryango wanjye imfashanyo z’abakene, ndetse n’amaturo." 
Acts24:18 Igihe nkiri muri ibyo, bansanga mu Ngoro maze kwisukura, ariko nta bantu benshi twari kumwe, yemwe nta n’urusaku;" 
Acts24:19 uretse bamwe mu Bayahudi bo muri Aziya... Abo ni bo bagombaga kuza kukundegaho, iyo bajya kugira ikibi bambonaho!" 
Acts24:20 Cyangwa se aba na bo nibavuge ikosa bansanganye, igihe nari mpagaze imbere y’Inama nkuru!" 
Acts24:21 Naba se nzira iri jambo navugiye rwagati muri bo ndanguruye nti ’Mbese byaba ari uko nemera izuka ry’abapfuye, byatumye uyu munsi munshyira mu rubanza?’»" 
Acts24:22 Feligisi wari uzi neza iby’iyo Nzira, asubika urubanza avuga ati «Umugaba w’ingabo Liziya namara kuza, nzarangiza ibyanyu.»" 
Acts24:23 Nuko ashinga umutegeka w’abasirikare kurinda Pawulo aho yari ari mu buroko, ariko ngo amureke yishyire yizane, kandi ngo ntabuze n’umwe mu be kumuha icyo akeneye." 
Acts24:24 Hashize iminsi mike Feligisi azana n’umugore we Durusila, wari Umuyahudikazi. Ahamagaza Pawulo, maze amutega amatwi ngo amubwire ibyerekeye kwemera Yezu Kristu." 
Acts24:25 Ariko ngo ikiganiro kigere ku byerekeye ubutabera, ukwifata n’urubanza ruzaza, Feligisi agira ubwoba, ni ko kuvuga ati «Ba urekeye aho wigendere, ninongera kubona igihe nzagutumaho.»" 
Acts24:26 Yari yizeye kandi ko Pawulo yazamuha amafaranga, ni yo mpamvu yahoraga amutumiza kenshi ngo baganire." 
Acts24:27 Imyaka ibiri ishize, Feligisi asimburwa n’uwitwa Porikiyo Fesito; maze Feligisi ashaka kwikundisha ku Bayahudi, asiga Pawulo mu buroko." 
Acts25:1 Nyuma y’iminsi itatu Fesito ageze muri ako karere, ava i Kayizareya ajya i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts25:2 Abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abanyacyubahiro bo mu Bayahudi bamusanganiza ibirego barega Pawulo; bamwinginga 
Acts25:3 bamusaba kubagirira ubuntu ngo amutumize aze i Yeruzalemu, kuko bari baciye ibico byo kumwubikira ngo bamutsinde mu nzira." 
Acts25:4 Nuko Fesito abasubiza ko Pawulo afungiye i Kayizareya, kandi ko na we ubwe agomba gusubirayo bidatinze." 
Acts25:5 Arongera ati «Kandi ababa babishoboye muri mwe, baze tujyane i Kayizareya, barege uwo muntu niba hari ikibi yakoze!»" 
Acts25:6 Fesito amara iwabo iminsi itarenze umunani cyangwa icumi, asubira i Kayizareya. Bukeye ajya mu rukiko, maze ategeka ko bazana Pawulo." 
Acts25:7 Bamugejeje aho, Abayahudi bamanutse i Yeruzalemu baramukikiza, batangira kumurega byinshi kandi bikomeye, badashobora no kubonera gihamya." 
Acts25:8 Nuko Pawulo ariregura ati «Nta kosa nigeze nkora, haba ku Mategeko y’Abayahudi, haba ku Ngoro cyangwa se kuri Kayizari.»" 
Acts25:9 Ariko Fesito ashatse kwikundisha ku Bayahudi, abaza Pawulo ati «Mbese uremera kujya i Yeruzalemu kugira ngo abe ariho ucirirwa urubanza mu maso yanjye?»" 
Acts25:10 Pawulo arasubiza ati «Dore ndi mu rukiko rwa Kayizari, ni ho ngomba gucirirwa urubanza. Nta kibi nakoreye Abayahudi nk’uko nawe ubizi neza." 
Acts25:11 Niba koko ibyo bimpama, cyangwa se niba narakoze icyaha gikwiriye urupfu, sinanga gupfa. Ariko niba ibirego aba bantu bandega nta kuri kurimo, nta muntu ufite uburenganzira bwo kubangabiza. Njuririye Kayizari!»" 
Acts25:12 Nuko Fesito amaze kuvugana n’abajyanama be, arasubiza ati «Ubwo ujuririye Kayizari, uzajye kwa Kayizari.»" 
Acts25:13 Hashize iminsi mike, umwami Agripa na Berenisa bagera i Kayizareya, baje gusura Fesito." 
Acts25:14 Bahamaze igihe, Fesito atekerereza umwami ibya Pawulo, agira ati «Hano hari umuntu Feligisi yasize mu buroko." 
Acts25:15 Igihe nari i Yeruzalemu, abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’abakuru b’Abayahudi baramundegera, bansaba ko yakwicwa." 
Acts25:16 Mbasubiza ko atari akamenyero ku Banyaroma gucira umuntu urubanza, nta we uhingutse ngo amushinje na we abone umwanya wo kwiregura, ngo yiyezeho icyaha." 
Acts25:17 Ubwo rero baje hano, nanjye sinazarira, bukeye nicara mu rukiko mpamagaza uwo muntu." 
Acts25:18 Abamuregaga baramukikiza, ariko ntibagira ikirego gikomeye na kimwe bahingutsa mu byo nakekaga." 
Acts25:19 Ahubwo bafite ibyo bapfa byerekeye idini yabo, ariko ku buryo bw’umwihariko bagapfa umuntu witwa Yezu wapfuye, nyamara Pawulo akaba yemeza ko ari muzima." 
Acts25:20 Mbonye ko ntashobora gukemura ibyo bibazo byabo, mbaza Pawulo niba yemera kujya i Yeruzalemu, ngo abe ari ho acirirwa urubanza ku byo bamuregaga." 
Acts25:21 Ariko Pawulo arajurira, ashaka ko urubanza rwe rwarangizwa na Nyir’icyubahiro; ubwo nanjye ntegeka ko bamurinda kugeza igihe nzamwohereza kwa Kayizari.»" 
Acts25:22 Agripa ni ko kubwira Fesito ati «Nanjye ndashaka kumva uwo muntu!» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ejo uzamwumva.» 
Acts25:23 Nuko bukeye, Agripa na Berenisa binjirana ishema mu rukiko, bashagawe n’abagaba b’ingabo hamwe n’abanyacyubahiro bo muri uwo mugi, maze Fesito ategeka ko bazana Pawulo." 
Acts25:24 Fesito afata ijambo, agira ati «Mwami Agripa, namwe mwese abateraniye hano, murabona uyu muntu. Imbaga yose y’Abayahudi yaje kumundegera i Yeruzalemu, ndetse na n’ubu baracyasakuza, bavuga ko adakwiye kubaho." 
Acts25:25 Jye nasanze nta cyo yakoze cyatuma akwiye gupfa. Nyamara kuko we yajuririye Nyir’icyubahiro, niyemeza kumumwoherereza." 
Acts25:26 Icyakora, nta kintu na kimwe cy’ukuri nabonye naheraho nandikira Kayizari ku bimwerekeyeho. Ni cyo gitumye muzana imbere yanyu, cyane cyane wowe, mwami Agripa, kugira ngo nimumara kumubaza mbonereho kugira icyo nandika." 
Acts25:27 Kuko nasanze bidafututse kohereza imfungwa, ntagaragaje neza icyo iregwa.»" 
Acts26:1 Nuko Agripa abwira Pawulo ati «Ngaho iregure.» Pawulo arambura ukuboko, atangira kwiregura ati" 
Acts26:2 «Mwami Agripa, biranshimishije kurushaho, kuko ibyo Abayahudi bandega byose, uyu munsi ngiye kubyiregurira imbere yawe," 
Acts26:3 cyane cyane kuko nawe usanzwe uzi neza imico y’Abayahudi n’ibyo bajyaho impaka. Ni cyo gitumye ngusaba ngo wihangane unyumve. 
Acts26:4 Abayahudi bose bazi imibereho yanjye uhereye mu buto bwanjye, uko nabayeho rwagati mu muryango wanjye, ndetse n’i Yeruzalemu." 
Acts26:5 Baranzi kuva kera, babishatse bashobora guhamya ko nabaye umuyoboke w’ishyaka rikomeye ry’idini yacu, nkurikije umuco w’Abafarizayi." 
Acts26:6 None ubu ndaregwa ko nizera amasezerano Imana yagiriye abasekuruza bacu. 
Acts26:7 Ayo masezerano ni yo nyine imiryango yacu uko ari cumi n’ibiri idahwema kwizera ko azasohozwa, bigatuma ishishikarira gusenga Imana amanywa n’ijoro. None rero, Mwami, iby’ayo mizero ni byo ndegwa n’Abayahudi." 
Acts26:8 Mbese ye, ni mpamvu ki mudashobora kwemera ko Imana ishobora kuzura abapfuye?" 
Acts26:9 Nanjye ubwanjye, natekerezaga ko ngomba kurwanya ku buryo bwose izina rya Yezu w’i Nazareti." 
Acts26:10 Ni na byo nakoze i Yeruzalemu; nashyize mu buroko abenshi mu batagatifujwe, mpawe uburenganzira n’abatware b’abaherezabitambo; igihe kandi babaciraga urwo gupfa nkabishyigikira." 
Acts26:11 Nazengurutse amasengero yose mbatoteza bikomeye, ndetse nkanabahatira gutuka Imana. Narabarakariraga bikabije, ku buryo nabakurikiraga kugeza no mu migi yo mu mahanga." 
Acts26:12 Ni cyo cyatumye umunsi umwe njya i Damasi, mfite ububasha n’amabwiriza by’abatware b’abaherezabitambo." 
Acts26:13 Nuko ndi mu nzira rero, Mwami, amanywa ava mbona urumuri rutambukije izuba kwaka ruturutse mu ijuru, rurangota hamwe n’abo twari kumwe." 
Acts26:14 Ubwo twese twikubita hasi, maze numva ijwi rimbwira mu rurimi rw’igihebureyi, riti ’Sawuli, Sawuli! Urantotereza iki? Biragukomereye kwishita ku rubambo.’" 
Acts26:15 Nuko ndabaza nti ’Uri nde, Nyagasani?’ Nyagasani aransubiza ati ’Ndi Yezu, uwo uriho utoteza." 
Acts26:16 Ariko byuka, maze uhagarare! Igitumye nkubonekera ni uko nakugeneye kuba umugaragu wanjye n’umuhamya w’ibyo ubonye, n’uw’ibyo nzakwereka hanyuma." 
Acts26:17 Nzakugobotora umuryango wawe kimwe n’iy’abanyamahanga nkoherejemo," 
Acts26:18 kugira ngo ubahumure amaso, ubahindure bave mu mwijima bagane urumuri, bave mu ngoma ya Sekibi bagarukire Imana; kugira ngo nibanyemera bagirirwe imbabazi z’ibyaha, kandi bahabwe umurage hamwe n’abatagatifujwe.’" 
Acts26:19 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, mwami Agripa, nta cyari kumbuza kumvira ibyo neretswe biturutse mu ijuru." 
Acts26:20 Mpera ko mbanziriza ku bantu b’i Damasi, ngera i Yeruzalemu no mu karere kose ka Yudeya no mu mahanga yose, menyesha abo bose ngo bisubireho kandi bagarukire Imana, babeho ku buryo bukwiriye abicujije." 
Acts26:21 Ni cyo cyatumye Abayahudi bamfata igihe nari mu Ngoro, bakagerageza kunyica." 
Acts26:22 Nyamara no kugeza uyu munsi Imana iracyantabara, nkaba ngikomeza guhamya mu maso ya bose, abato kimwe n’abakuru, ibyavuzwe n’abahanuzi na Musa ku bigomba kuzaba kandi nta cyo nongeyeho:" 
Acts26:23 bityo mpamya ko Kristu yagombaga kubabara, kandi ko aho amariye kuzuka uwa mbere mu bapfuye, azasakaza urumuri mu muryango wacu no mu mahanga.»" 
Acts26:24 Pawulo, ngo ageze aho yiregura, Fesito atera hejuru ati «Pawulo, wasaze! Wize byinshi byo kugutera ibisazi!»" 
Acts26:25 Pawulo aramusubiza ati «Nyakubahwa Fesito, sinasaze, ahubwo ndavuga amagambo y’ukuri kandi ashyira mu gaciro." 
Acts26:26 Ni yo mpamvu mvuga nta cyo nishisha kuko umwami mbwira abizi neza byose, nkaba mpamya ko nta na kimwe cyamusobye, kuko bitakorewe mu bwihisho." 
Acts26:27 Mwami Agripa, mbese waba wemera iby’abahanuzi? Na ko ndabizi: urabyemera.»" 
Acts26:28 Nuko Agripa abwira Pawulo, ati «Erega ndabona uko utekereza, hari hato ukanyemeza kuba umukristu!»" 
Acts26:29 Pawulo aramusubiza ati «Byaba iby’akanya gato cyangwa se igihe kinini, ndasaba Imana ngo, uretse nawe wenyine, n’abanyumva uyu munsi bose bamere nkanjye..., usibye iyi minyururu imboshye!»" 
Acts26:30 Nuko umwami n’umutware na Berenisa n’abo bari kumwe barahaguruka. 
Acts26:31 Bigiye hirya baravugana bati «Uriya muntu, nta kibi yakoze gikwiriye kumwicisha, cyangwa kumufungisha!»" 
Acts26:32 Agripa abwira Fesito ati «Uriya muntu yajyaga kurekurwa, iyo atajuririra Kayizari.»" 
Acts27:1 Bamaze kwemeza ko dufata ubwato tukajya mu Butaliyani, Pawulo n’izindi mfungwa bashingwa umutegeka w’abasirikare witwa Yuli, akaba uwo mu mutwe w’abasirikare witwa «uwa Ogusito»." 
Acts27:2 Twurira ubwato buvuye Aduramiti bwajyaga mu byambu bya Aziya, maze tugera mu mazi magari. Ubwo twari kumwe na Arisitariko, Umumasedoniya ukomoka i Tesaloniki." 
Acts27:3 Bukeye duhagarara i Sidoni; Yuli rero wagiriraga neza Pawulo, amwemerera kujya gusura incuti ze kugira ngo zimwakire." 
Acts27:4 Tuvuye aho, tunyura mu majyepfo y’ikirwa cya Shipure, kuko umuyaga waturwanyaga." 
Acts27:5 Tuhavuye, tunyura mu nyanja iherereye kuri Silisiya na Pamfiliya, maze twambukira i Mira ho muri Lisiya." 
Acts27:6 Tugeze aho ngaho, umutegeka w’abasirikare abona ubwato buturutse Alegisandiriya bugana mu Butaliyani, nuko turabwurira." 
Acts27:7 Tumara iminsi myinshi tugenda buhoro, tuza kugera ahateganye n’umugi wa Kinida, ariko bibanje kutugora. Umuyaga utubujije gukomeza, tunyura mu majyepfo y’ikirwa cya Kireta, ahateganye na Salimoni." 
Acts27:8 Tumaze kuhanyura ariko bitugoye, tugera ahitwa «Myaro myiza», hafi y’umugi wa Lasaya." 
Acts27:9 Twari tumaze igihe kirekire kandi gukomeza urugendo rwo mu bwato bikaba byatera amakuba, kuko umunsi w’igisibo wari wararangiye; Pawulo ni ko kutubwira ati" 
Acts27:10 «Ncuti zanjye, ndabona uru rugendo rwo mu bwato rugiye gukurura amakuba ndetse rugahitana byinshi, atari ku mitwaro n’ubwato byonyine, ahubwo ndetse no ku bantu.»" 
Acts27:11 Umutegeka w’abasirikare, aho kwita ku byo Pawulo avuga, yiringira inama z’umusare na nyir’ubwato." 
Acts27:12 Nyamara icyo cyambu nticyari kimeze neza muri ayo mezi y’imbeho; abenshi bahuza umugambi wo gukomeza bakavayo, ngo barebe ko bagera i Fenike, babe ari ho bamara ayo mezi y’imbeho. Fenike ni icyambu cyo mu kirwa cya Kireta, aherekera mu burengerazuba." 
Acts27:13 Ngo bumve umuyaga woroshye uturuka mu majyepfo utangiye guhuhera, bibwira ko umugambi wabo wagezweho; ni ko kuzitura ubwato bagerageza kugenda, bakikiye ikirwa cya Kireta." 
Acts27:14 Ariko bidatinze, inkubi y’umuyaga witwa «Majyaruguru y’uburasirazuba» utangira guhuhera uturutse mu kirwa," 
Acts27:15 ukubita ubwato bunanirwa kuwurwanya; nuko twemera kujyanwa aho umuyaga ushaka. 
Acts27:16 Twabonye aho twikinga umuyaga akanya gato, ubwo twahitaga mu majyepfo y’akarwa kitwa Kawuda. Aho ni ho twashoboye kwiyegereza ubwato buto bwari buziritse ku bunini twarimo." 
Acts27:17 Abasare barabwuriza babushyira mu bunini; maze ubwo bunini babuzengurutsa imigozi ikomeye, barabuhambira ngo budasandara. Ubwo barekurira mu mazi ibifatabwato kugira ngo bugende buhoro, babitewe no gutinya kujugunywa ku nkombe ya Sirita." 
Acts27:18 Uko twagakomeje gucundabatwa bikomeye n’inkubi y’umuyaga, bukeye bw’aho batangira kuroha imitwaro mu nyanja," 
Acts27:19 naho ku munsi wa gatatu abasare ubwabo bafata ibikoresho by’ubwato, na byo barabiroha." 
Acts27:20 Hari hashize iminsi myinshi nta zuba nta n’inyenyeri biboneka, umuyaga ukomeza kuba mwinshi kandi mubi kugeza ubwo tutari tukiringiye kurokoka." 
Acts27:21 Bari bamaze igihe kirekire nta cyo bakoza ku munwa, Pawulo ni ko guhagarara hagati yabo, arababwira ati «Ncuti zanjye, byari kuba byiza iyo mujya kunyumva ntimutirimuke i Kireta, kuko mutari kubona aya makuba cyangwa ngo mugire igihombo kingana gitya." 
Acts27:22 Ariko noneho ndabasabye ngo mushyire umutima hamwe, kuko ari nta muntu n’umwe muri mwe uzagira icyo aba, keretse ubwato bwonyine." 
Acts27:23 Iri joro nyine, umumalayika w’Imana niyeguriye kandi nkorera yambonekeye," 
Acts27:24 arambwira ati ’Pawulo, witinya! Ni ngombwa ko ugera imbere ya Kayizari, kandi Imana ikugiriye ubuntu bwo kugukiriza ubuzima, hamwe n’abo mufatanyije urugendo bose.’" 
Acts27:25 Nimukomere rero ncuti zanjye, kuko nizeye Imana, bizaba nk’uko yabimbwiye." 
Acts27:26 Amaherezo ariko, ubwato buzadusuka ku kirwa.»" 
Acts27:27 Ijoro rya cumi na kane tugicundabatwa n’inkubi y’umuyaga mu nyanja ya Adiriyatika, ahagana mu gicuku, abasare bibwira ko bari hafi kugera ku butaka." 
Acts27:28 Bajugunya mu mazi umugozi uziritseho icyuma, basanga uburebure bw’amazi bureshya n’imikono makumyabiri; ngo bigire imbere gato babona uburebure bw’imikono cumi n’itanu." 
Acts27:29 Batinya ko ubwato bwasekura ku mabuye yo mu nyanja, bajugunya mu mazi ibifatabwato bine by’inyuma ngo ahari bwahagarara, maze bagategereza ko bucya." 
Acts27:30 Bigeze aho abasare bashaka guhunga, basubiza bwa bwato buto mu mazi, bitwaje ko bagiye kumanurira mu mazi ibindi bifatabwato by’imbere." 
Acts27:31 Pawulo abwira umutegeka w’abasirikare n’ingabo ze, ati «Aba bantu nibataguma mu bwato, mwebwe ntimushobora kurokoka.»" 
Acts27:32 Nuko abasirikare batema imigozi iziritse bwa bwato buto, barabureka buragenda." 
Acts27:33 Bujya gucya, Pawulo asaba ko bagira icyo bafungura agira ati «Dore uyu munsi ni uwa cumi n’ine muhagaritse umutima, mutagira icyo mukoza ku munwa." 
Acts27:34 Ndabasabye rero ngo mugire icyo murya, maze mubashe kubaho. Nongeye kandi kubabwira ko nta n’agasatsi k’umwe muri mwe kazazimira.»" 
Acts27:35 Amaze kuvuga atyo, afata umugati, ashimira Imana imbere ya bose, arawumanyura maze atangira kurya." 
Acts27:36 Bose ni ko kugarura umutima, na bo baratangira bararya." 
Acts27:37 Abari mu bwato twese, twari magana abiri na mirongo irindwi na batandatu." 
Acts27:38 Bamaze kwijuta, baroha ingano mu nyanja, kugira ngo borohereze ubwato." 
Acts27:39 Ngo bumare gucya, abasare ntibabasha kumenya ubutaka bari bagezeho, ariko babona akagobe k’inyanja gafite inkuka y’umusenyi, batekereza ko bishobotse ari ho bakwerekeza ubwato." 
Acts27:40 Bazitura bya bifatabwato birokera mu nyanja, bahambura n’ibiyoborabwato by’inyuma; hanyuma bazamura umwenda wo ku ruhembe rw’imbere, bityo bagana ku nkombe bakurikiye icyerekezo cy’umuyaga." 
Acts27:41 Ariko ubwato ngo bugere ku gashoro k’ubutaka karengewe n’amazi, butikura mu musenyi. Uruhembe rw’imbere rurigitamo ku buryo budatirimuka, naho urw’inyuma rusandazwa n’umuhengeri wo mu nyanja." 
Acts27:42 Abasirikare rero bagira igitekerezo cyo kwica imfungwa, ngo hatagira uwoga agacika." 
Acts27:43 Ariko umutegeka w’abasirikare washakaga gukiza Pawulo, ababuza kurangiza uwo mugambi, ahubwo ategeka ko abazi koga bakwiroha aba mbere, bagafata ku nkombe;" 
Acts27:44 abasigaye na bo bakabakurikira, bogeye ku mbaho cyangwa ku bimene by’ubwato. Uko ni ko bose babashije gufata imusozi, ari bataraga." 
Acts28:1 Tumaze rero guhonoka icyo cyago, tumenya ko icyo kirwa tugezeho cyitwa Malita." 
Acts28:2 Abaturage b’aho batwakira neza cyane, kubera ko imvura yagwaga hariho n’imbeho, baducanira umuriro turawukikiza."
