Acts28:3 Pawulo atoragura umuganda w’inkwi azishyira mu muriro, inzoka y’impiri isohorokamo yikanze ubushyuhe, maze imusumira ikiganza." 
Acts28:4 Abaturage babonye icyo gikoko kimunagana ku kiganza, baravugana bati «Rwose uyu muntu agomba kuba ari umwicanyi! Kubona yarokotse inyanja, ariko ubutabera bw’Imana bukaba bukimukurikiranye!»" 
Acts28:5 Ariko Pawulo akungutira ya mpiri mu muriro, kandi ntiyagira icyo aba." 
Acts28:6 Abo bantu bategereza ko ari bubyimbirwe, cyangwa se ko yikubita hasi agapfa, ariko ngo bamare umwanya bategereje, babona nta cyo abaye. Ni ko kwigarura bavuga bati «Ni imana!»" 
Acts28:7 Hafi aho, hakaba amasambu y’umutware w’icyo kirwa witwa Pubuliyo, atwakira gicuti, iwe tuhamara iminsi itatu." 
Acts28:8 Se w’uwo Pubuliyo yari mu buriri ari indembe, ahinda umuriro kandi na macinya imuri nabi. Pawulo ajya kumusura, amaze gusenga amuramburiraho ibiganza, aramukiza." 
Acts28:9 Ibyo bimaze kuba, abandi barwayi bo muri icyo kirwa na bo baraza, abakiza uburwayi bwabo." 
Acts28:10 Abantu b’aho baduha icyubahiro cyinshi, nuko igihe twuriye ubwato, baduha impamba twari dukeneye mu rugendo." 
Acts28:11 Hashize amezi atatu, twurira ubwato bwavaga Alegisandiriya, bwitiriwe ibigirwamana by’impanga, Kasitori na Polugisi, bwari bumaze amezi yose y’imbeho muri icyo kirwa." 
Acts28:12 Tugeze i Sirakuza tuhamara iminsi itatu," 
Acts28:13 tuhavuye tugenda dukikiye inkombe, tugera ahitwa Regiyo. Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, umuyaga utangira guhuhera uturuka mu majyepfo, maze tugera i Puzoli ku munsi wa kabiri." 
Acts28:14 Tuhasanga abavandimwe, badusaba kumara icyumweru iwabo. Nuko tugera i Roma dutyo." 
Acts28:15 Abavandimwe b’i Roma bumvise ko tuje, baza kudusanganirira ku Iguriro rya Apiyo, n’ahitwa ku Macumbi atatu. Pawulo ngo ababone ashimira Imana, yongera kugira icyizere." 
Acts28:16 Tugeze i Roma, bemerera Pawulo kwicumbikira ukwe, hamwe n’umusirikare wo kumurinda." 
Acts28:17 Hashize iminsi itatu, Pawulo atumiza abanyacyubahiro b’Abayahudi bahatuye; ngo bamare guterana arababwira ati «Bavandimwe, n’ubwo nta kibi nagiriye umuryango wacu, cyangwa se ngo ncishe ukubiri n’imigenzo y’abasekuruza, nyamara nafungiwe i Yeruzalemu, nshyikirizwa Abanyaroma!" 
Acts28:18 Bamaze gusuzuma ibyo ndegwa bashaka kundekura, kuko basanze nta kibi nakoze gikwiye urupfu." 
Acts28:19 Ariko mbonye Abayahudi babyanze, biba ngombwa ko njuririra Kayizari, nyamara nta cyo ngamije kurega bene wacu." 
Acts28:20 Ngicyo rero icyatumye mbatumiza ngo tuganire. Mu by’ukuri, naboheshejwe iminyururu ku mpamvu y’amizero ya Israheli.»" 
Acts28:21 Nuko baramusubiza bati «Nta rwandiko twigeze tubona ruturutse mu Yudeya rukuvuga, ndetse nta n’umwe mu bavandimwe waje ngo abitumenyeshe cyangwa se ngo akuvuge nabi." 
Acts28:22 Ariko rero, turashaka kumva icyo wowe ubwawe ubitekerezaho, kuko tuzi ko hose barwanya izo nyigisho z’ako gatsiko urimo.»" 
Acts28:23 Ubwo bemeranya umunsi bazongera guterana, uwo munsi ugeze bamusanga ari benshi ku icumbi rye. Ahera mu gitondo ageza nimugoroba abasobanurira iby’Ingoma y’Imana, anagerageza kubemeza ku byerekeye Yezu, ahereye ku Mategeko ya Musa no ku Bahanuzi." 
Acts28:24 Bamwe muri bo bemezwa n’ibyo yavugaga, abandi ariko banga kubyemera." 
Acts28:25 Bagera igihe bataha batarumvikana ubwabo, Pawulo ni ko kongeraho iri jambo ati «Mbega ngo riraba irinyakuri, rya jambo Roho Mutagatifu yabwiye abasekuruza banyu, arivugishije umuhanuzi Izayi ati" 
Acts28:26 ’Sanga umuryango wawe, maze ubabwire uti: Kumva muzumva, ariko mwe gusobanukirwa; muzitegereze, ariko mwe kubona." 
Acts28:27 Kuko uwo muryango winangiye umutima, biziba amatwi, bihuma n’amaso, kugira ngo batagira icyo babona, amatwi yabo akagira icyo yumva, n’umutima wabo ukagira icyo umenya, ngo batavaho bangarukira maze nkabakiza.’" 
Acts28:28 Nuko rero, mumenye ko uwo mukiro Imana yawoherereje abanyamahanga, kandi bo bakazawakira!»" 
Acts28:29 Pawulo ngo amare kubabwira ibyo, Abayahudi bataha bajya impaka z’urudaca." 
Acts28:30 Pawulo amara imyaka ibiri yose mu icumbi yirihirira, akakira abamugendereraga bose," 
Acts28:31 yamamaza Ingoma y’Imana kandi yigisha ibyerekeye Yezu Kristu nta nkomyi kandi ashize amanga. 
Romans1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, umugaragu wa Yezu Kristu, ndabaramutsa. Koko natorewe kuba intumwa, nteganyirizwa kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza" 
Romans1:2 Imana yari yarateguje abahanuzi bayo mu Byanditswe bitagatifu. 
Romans1:3 Iyo Nkuru Nziza yerekeye Umwana wayo, Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu, wabayeho ku bw’umubiri ari mwene Dawudi," 
Romans1:4 ariko izuka rye ava mu bapfuye rikagaragaza ko ari Umwana w’Imana mu bubasha bwose ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu. 
Romans1:5 Ni na We waduhesheje ubutumwa bwo kuyobora mu ikuzo ry’izina rye amahanga yose ku kwemera," 
Romans1:6 ari yo mubarirwamo namwe, abahamagawe na Yezu Kristu." 
Romans1:7 Mwebwe rero, batoni b’Imana muri i Roma, mwebwe abatagatifujwe no gutorwa n’Imana: nimugire ineza n’amahoro bituruka ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu, no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Mbere na mbere, ndashimira Imana yanjye muri Yezu Kristu ku mpamvu yanyu, kuko ukwemera kwanyu kuratwa n’isi yose." 
Romans1:9 Imana nyitanzeho umugabo, Yo nkeza mu mutima wanjye namamaza Inkuru Nziza y’Umwana wayo: sinsiba kubibuka," 
Romans1:10 ngasaba iteka mu masengesho yanjye ko nazagira amahirwe yo kuzashyira nkagera iwanyu niba Imana ibishatse. 
Romans1:11 Koko kandi, ndifuza cyane kubabona ngo mbe nabaha ku ngabire ndengakamere yabakomeza," 
Romans1:12 bambe kugira ngo mumare igishyika mu kwemera duhuriyeho, mwebwe nanjye." 
Romans1:13 Sinabahisha kandi, bavandimwe, ko kenshi nagambiriye kuza iwanyu — nyamara kugeza ubu byaramburiye — ngo ngire imbuto namwe mbasaruraho, nk’uko byagenze no ku yandi mahanga." 
Romans1:14 Ngomba kwita ku Bagereki no ku batari bo, ku bajijutse no ku batajijutse:" 
Romans1:15 ikaba ari yo mpamvu nshishikajwe no kubigisha Inkuru Nziza namwe ab’i Roma. 
Romans1:16 Koko rero, nta bwo nshishwa n’Inkuru Nziza kuko ari yo bubasha bw’Imana burokora uwemera wese uhereye ku Muyahudi ukageza ku Mugereki." 
Romans1:17 Koko kandi ni muri yo ubutungane bw’Imana buhishurirwa, bishingiye ku kwemera, bigakomeza ukwemera, nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Intungane izabeshwaho n’ukwemera.»" 
Romans1:18 Koko rero uburakari bw’Imana bwihishura buva mu ijuru burwanya abagomeramana bose, n’abagizi ba nabi bose bapfukirana ukuri muri iyo nabi." 
Romans1:19 Kuko icyo umuntu yamenya ku Mana kirabigaragariza: Imana yarakibahishuriye. 
Romans1:20 Koko rero, kuva isi yaremwa, ubwenge buhera ku byaremwe, bugashyikira ibitagaragara by’Imana, ni ukuvuga ububasha bwayo buhoraho na kamere yayo bwite. Bityo rero ntibabona uko biregura," 
Romans1:21 kuko bamenye Imana, ariko ntibayiha ikuzo, ngo bayishimire uko bikwiriye Imana; ahubwo babaye abapfu bishinga ibitekerezo by’amanjwe, maze umutima wabo w’igipfapfa ucura umwijima." 
Romans1:22 Birataga kuba abanyabwenge, bahinduka abapfayongo," 
Romans1:23 maze ikuzo ry’Imana idapfa barigurana ishusho isa n’umuntu uzapfa, isa n’ibiguruka, n’inyamaswa, n’ibikurura inda hasi." 
Romans1:24 Ngiyo impamvu yatumye Imana ibagabiza iby’umutima wabo urarikira, bakora ibiterasoni, kugira ngo bihumanye umubiri." 
Romans1:25 Bo baguranye ukuri kw’Imana ikinyoma, basenga ikiremwa baranagikorera, bahigika Rurema, Nyagusingizwa iteka ryose! Amen." 
Romans1:26 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana ibagabiza ingeso z’urukozasoni: dore abagore babo bateshejwe gukoresha imibiri yabo ibihuje na kamere," 
Romans1:27 abagabo na bo aho kugana umugore uko kamere ishaka, ubwabo bagurumanirana irari, umugabo agakorana n’undi ibiterasoni, bityo bikururira ingaruka mbi ikwiranye n’ubuyobe bwabo." 
Romans1:28 Byongeye kandi, nk’uko banze kumenya Imana, Imana yabagabije ubwenge bwabo bucuramye ngo bakore ibidakorwa." 
Romans1:29 Buzuye icyitwa inabi cyose, ubugome, umururumba, ububisha; buzuye ishyari, ubwicanyi, intonganya, uburiganya, ubugambanyi; barasebanya," 
Romans1:30 batera urubwa, banga Imana, barasuzugura, barirata, barirarira, bahimbahimba ibibi, bananira ababyeyi;" 
Romans1:31 ni ibiburabwenge, abahemu, ibiburamutima, intababarira." 
Romans1:32 N’ubwo bazi iteka ry’Imana ricira urwo gupfa abakora bene ibyo, bo ntibabikora gusa, bashima ndetse n’ababikora." 
Romans2:1 Nuko rero nta cyo uzabona wireguza, wowe muntu uca urubanza, uwo uri we wese: kuko iyo ucira undi urubanza, uba witsindisha ubwawe, kuko ugenza utyo nawe wowe uca urubanza." 
Romans2:2 Tuzi ko Imana izacira urubanza abagenza batyo ikurikije ukuri. 
Romans2:3 None se, muntu ucira urubanza abakora ibyo bintu kandi nawe ubikora, wibwira ko uzasimbuka ute urubanza rw’Imana?" 
Romans2:4 Cyangwa se waba usuzugura impuhwe zayo zitabarika, ubwihangane n’ubugwaneza bwayo, ukirengagiza ko ubuntu bwayo bukureshya ngo wicuze?" 
Romans2:5 Noneho rero, kuko wanangiye umutima wawe ukanga kwicuza, urihunikira uburakari bwa wa munsi w’uburakari Imana izahishura ko ica imanza zitabera," 
Romans2:6 Yo izitura buri wese ikurikije ibikorwa bye: 
Romans2:7 ubugingo bw’iteka ku batacogoye mu gukora ikiri cyiza bashakashaka ikuzo, icyubahiro n’ukutazapfa;" 
Romans2:8 naho uburakari n’umujinya ku bivumbuye, ntibumve ukuri, bakayoboka inabi." 
Romans2:9 Impagarara n’ishavu birakokama buri mutima w’umuntu ukora ikibi, uhereye ku Muyahudi ukageza ku Mugereki;" 
Romans2:10 naho ikuzo, icyubahiro n’amahoro kuri buri wese ukora icyiza, uhereye ku Muyahudi ukageza ku Mugereki." 
Romans2:11 Kuko Imana itareba igihagararo cy’abantu. 
Romans2:12 Koko rero, abazaba baracumuye nta mategeko, bazorama nta mategeko; naho abazaba baracumuye bazi amategeko, bazacirwa urubanza hakurikijwe amategeko." 
Romans2:13 Kuko abumva amategeko atari bo ntungane ku Mana, ahubwo abakurikiza amategeko ni bo bazagirwa intungane." 
Romans2:14 Iyo abanyamahanga bakora ku bwa kamere ibihuje n’amategeko, kandi nyamara batagira amategeko, bibera ubwabo amategeko, bo badafite amategeko." 
Romans2:15 Bagaragaza batyo ko icyo amategeko agamije cyanditswe mu mitima yabo. N’umutimanama wabo na wo ni intangamugabo hamwe n’imitima ibarwanamo, imwe ishinja, indi irengera." 
Romans2:16 Nk’uko nabivuze mu Nkuru Nziza yanjye, bizagaragara umunsi Imana izakoresha Yezu Kristu, Imana igacira urubanza ibyo abantu bahishahisha bakora rwihishwa." 
Romans2:17 Wowe rero witwa Umuyahudi, ukitwaza amategeko, ukiratana Imana," 
Romans2:18 wowe uzi kandi ugushaka kwayo, ukamenya guhitamo ikiruta ibindi kuko wigishijwe n’amategeko," 
Romans2:19 wowe wiyemera ngo ni wowe warandata impumyi, wamurikira abari mu mwijima," 
Romans2:20 wahugura injiji, wakwigisha abana, ngo kuko wasanze mu mategeko hakubiyemo ubumenyi n’ukuri..." 
Romans2:21 Ko wigisha abandi, ntiwiyigishe ubwawe; ko ubwiriza kutiba, nyamara ukiba;" 
Romans2:22 ko ubuza gusambana, ugasambana; ko uzira ibigirwamana, kandi ugasahura amasengero yabyo;" 
Romans2:23 ko wiratana amategeko, ariko ugasuzuguza Imana urenga ku mategeko," 
Romans2:24 nk’uko byanditswe ngo: «Izina ry’Imana bararituka mu mahanga ku mpamvu yanyu». 
Romans2:25 Koko kuba waragenywe byagira akamaro ukurikije amategeko, naho niba ugomera amategeko, ukugenywa kwawe kwabaye ukutagenywa." 
Romans2:26 Niba se utagenywe akurikije ibitunganiye amategeko, nta bwo se ukuba atagenywe bizaba bihwanye n’ukugenywa?" 
Romans2:27 Ndetse utagenywe umubiri, ariko agakurikiza amategeko, azagucira urubanza, wowe uzaba warenze ku mategeko witwaje ibyanditswe n’ukugenywa." 
Romans2:28 Kuko Umuyahudi ntumubwirwa n’ibigaragara, n’ukugenywa si uko ku mubiri ahagaragara;" 
Romans2:29 ahubwo Umuyahudi nyakuri ni uri we muri kami ye, n’ukugenywa nyakuri ni uk’umutima muri roho bitari mu nyandiko. Uwo ntakura ishimwe rye ku bantu, ahubwo ku Mana." 
Romans3:1 Umuyahudi arusha iki abandi? Ukugenywa bimaze iki? 
Romans3:2 Bifite akamaro kanini kandi ku buryo bwose. Mbere na mbere kuko ari bo baragijwe amagambo y’Imana. 
Romans3:3 Bite rero? Niba bamwe muri bo barahemutse, ubuhemu bwabo bwahindura ubusa ubudahemuka bw’Imana?" 
Romans3:4 Ntibikabeho! Imana irabe imvugakuri, naho umuntu wese abe umubeshyi, nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Urabe intungane mu magambo yawe, uzatsinde nushyirwa mu rubanza.»" 
Romans3:5 Ariko se niba inabi yacu igaragaza ubutungane bw’Imana, tuvuge ngo iki? Mbese Imana ntirenganya, Yo ihanira ko yarakaye?" 
Romans3:6 Ndavuga ku buryo bw’abantu. Ntibikabe! Naho ubundi se, Imana yazacira ite isi urubanza?" 
Romans3:7 Nyamara se, niba ukuri kw’Imana kurushaho kugaragara ku mpamvu y’ikinyoma cyanjye, maze Imana igahabwa ikuzo, ni uruhe rubanza rwampamya kuba umunyabyaha?" 
Romans3:8 Kandi ni iki kitubuza gukora ibibi ngo bibyare ibyiza, nk’uko batubeshyera bavuga ko ari yo nyigisho yacu? Abo ngabo bazacirwa urubanza rubakwiriye." 
Romans3:9 Bite rero? Hari icyo turusha abandi se? Habe na mba! Dore tumaze guhamya bose icyaha, ari Abayahudi, ari Abagereki," 
Romans3:10 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nta ntungane wabona, habe n’imwe," 
Romans3:11 nta we uzi ubwenge, nta we ushaka Imana." 
Romans3:12 Bose barayobye, babereye ibigoryi icyarimwe, nta n’umwe ukora icyiza, habe n’umwe." 
Romans3:13 Umuhogo wabo ni imva irangaye, indimi zabo zisuka ibinyoma. Iminwa yabo ijunditse ubumara nk’ubw’impiri," 
Romans3:14 akanwa kabo kuzuyemo imivumo n’amagambo asesereza. 
Romans3:15 Ibirenge byabo byihutira kumena amaraso," 
Romans3:16 amatongo n’imiborogo ni byo biranga aho banyuze. 
Romans3:17 Ntibazi inzira y’amahoro," 
Romans3:18 nta gitinyiro cy’Imana mu maso yabo. 
Romans3:19 Nyamara tuzi ko ibyo amategeko avuze byose, bibwirwa abagengwa n’amategeko kugira ngo akanwa kose kazibe, maze isi yose yemezwe kuba yaragomeye Imana." 
Romans3:20 Ni yo mpamvu nta n’umwe uzagirwa intungane mu maso yayo n’uko yubahiriza amategeko, kuko amategeko afasha gusa kumenya icyaha." 
Romans3:21 Ubu ngubu ariko ubutungane bw’Imana bwarahishuwe hatagombye amategeko; intangamugabo ni amategeko n’abahanuzi. 
Romans3:22 Ni ubutungane bw’Imana butangwa no kwemera Yezu Kristu, bukaba bugenewe abemera bose nta vangura." 
Romans3:23 Kuko bose bagomye, bakivutsa ikuzo ry’Imana." 
Romans3:24 Ariko bahabwa kuba intungane n’ineza yayo ku buntu, babikesha gucungurwa na Kristu Yezu." 
Romans3:25 Ni We Imana yagize intangacyiru mu maraso ye ku bw’ukwemera, kugira ngo igaragaze ubutungane bwayo, Yo yarenze ku byaha bya kera," 
Romans3:26 mu gihe yabyihanganiraga. Ubu ngubu rero igaragaza ubutungane bwayo kugira ngo ibe intungane, kandi ihe kuba intungane ugengwa no kwemera Yezu." 
Romans3:27 Wa mwirato ushingiye he se noneho? Warashize. Uzize irihe teka? Iryo kubahiriza amategeko? Oya! Ahubwo itegeko ry’ukwemera. 
Romans3:28 Koko rero, turahamya ko umuntu ahabwa kuba intungane n’ukwemera hatagombye ibikorwa by’amategeko." 
Romans3:29 Mbese Imana yaba iy’Abayahudi bonyine? Nta bwo se ari n’iy’abanyamahanga? Yego, ni n’iy’abanyamahanga." 
Romans3:30 Ubwo ari Imana imwe, izaha uwagenywe kuba intungane abikesha ukwemera, n’utagenywe na we abikesha ukwemera." 
Romans3:31 Ubwo se turambura amategeko agaciro kayo tuvuga ukwemera? Ntibikabe! Ahubwo tuyahaye ishingiro. 
Romans4:1 Twavuga iki ku mukurambere wacu Abrahamu? Hari icyo yaba yararonse ku bw’umubiri? 
Romans4:2 Niba Abrahamu yarabaye intungane abikesheje ibyo yakoze, akwiriye kubyirata, usibye imbere y’Imana." 
Romans4:3 None se ibyanditswe bivuga iki? Ngo «Abrahamu yemera Uhoraho, bituma aba intungane.»" 
Romans4:4 Umuntu kandi ukoze umurimo, igihembo ntagihabwa ku buntu, ahubwo barakimugomba." 
Romans4:5 Naho utagize icyo akora, ariko akemera uha umunyabyaha kuba intungane, uko kwemera kwe kuzamuha ubutungane." 
Romans4:6 Nk’uko Dawudi avuga amahirwe y’umuntu Imana iha kuba intungane kandi nta bikorwa, ati" 
Romans4:7 «Hahirwa abababariwe ibicumuro, maze ibyaha byabo bikarenzwaho." 
Romans4:8 Hahirwa umuntu Nyagasani adashinja icyaha.» 
Romans4:9 Mbese ayo mahirwe ni ay’abagenywe bonyine cyangwa ni n’ay’abatagenywe? Tuvuga ko «ukwemera kwahaye Abrahamu kuba intungane.» 
Romans4:10 Kwabimuhaye buryo ki? Mbere cyangwa nyuma yo kugenywa? Si nyuma, ahubwo ni mbere yo kugenywa." 
Romans4:11 Nyuma ukugenywa yaguhaweho ikimenyetso, irango ry’ubutungane akesha ukwemera yagize ataragenywa, kugira ngo abe umubyeyi w’abemera bose batagenywe, ngo bahabwe kuba intungane," 
Romans4:12 n’umubyeyi kandi w’abagenywe, batari abangenywe bonyine, ahubwo n’abashyira ikirenge mu cya Abrahamu bakurikiza ukwemera yari afite ataragenywa." 
Romans4:13 Koko rero, nta bwo ari amategeko yatumye Abrahamu cyangwa urubyaro rwe basezeranywa guhabwa isi yose ho umurage, ahubwo ni ubutungane butangwa n’ukwemera." 
Romans4:14 Kuko niba abiringiye amategeko ari bo ngenerwamurage, ukwemera kwaba nta mumaro, n’isezerano rikaba risheshwe." 
Romans4:15 Kuko amategeko akurura uburakari. Ariko ahataba amategeko, nta we ucumura." 
Romans4:16 Ni yo mpamvu, ari ku bw’ukwemera isezerano ryabaye ihame, ritangwa ku buntu, rigenerwa urubyaro rwose, atari abishingikirije amategeko bonyine, ahubwo ndetse n’abishingikirije ukwemera kwa Abrahamu, we mubyeyi wacu twese," 
Romans4:17 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nakugize sekuru w’amahanga menshi.» Yemeye Imana, Yo isubiza ubuzima abapfuye, igaha kubaho ibitariho." 
Romans4:18 Yizeye ibidashoboka nyamara aremera, maze aba atyo umubyeyi w’amahanga menshi bikurikije rya jambo ngo «Dore uko urubyaro rwawe ruzangana.»" 
Romans4:19 Ntiyigeze acogora mu kwemera areba umubiri we washaje — yakabakabaga imyaka ijana — n’inda ya Sara yumiranye, kuko urupfu rwari rwarabatashye bombi." 
Romans4:20 Ntiyabura ubwizere ngo ashidikanye isezerano ry’Imana, ahubwo akomezwa n’ukwemera maze yiragiza ikuzo ry’Imana." 
Romans4:21 Yiyemeza rwose ko ishobora kuzuza icyo yasezeranye. 
Romans4:22 Ni yo mpamvu ibyo byatumye agirwa intungane. 
Romans4:23 Nyamara si we wenyine byandikiwe ko ukwemera kugeza ku butungane; 
Romans4:24 natwe ni uko bizamera, twe twemera Uwazutse mu bapfuye, Yezu umwami wacu," 
Romans4:25 watangiwe ibyaha byacu, akazukira kutugira intungane." 
Romans5:1 Ubwo rero twagizwe intungane n’ukwemera, dufite amahoro ku Mana, muri Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu." 
Romans5:2 Ku bwe twashyikiriye, mu kwemera, iyi neza tuganjemo, none twiratira gutegereza ikuzo ry’Imana." 
Romans5:3 Si ibyo byonyine, twiratana ndetse n’ibitotezo, kuko tuzi ko ibitotezo bitera kwihangana," 
Romans5:4 ukwihangana kugatera kudahemuka, ukudahemuka na ko kugatera kwizera," 
Romans5:5 ukwizera ntigutamaze, kuko urukundo rw’Imana rwabuganijwe mu mitima yacu na Roho Mutagatifu twahawe." 
Romans5:6 Koko rero igihe twari tugifite intege nke, Kristu yapfiriye abanyabyaha ku munsi wagenwe." 
Romans5:7 Birakomeye ko hagira upfira intungane; sinzi niba hagira uwemera gupfira inyangamugayo. 
Romans5:8 Imana rero yerekanye urukundo idufitiye kuko Kristu yadupfiriye kandi twari abanyabyaha. 
Romans5:9 None ubwo twagizwe intungane n’amaraso ye, tuzarokorwa na We uburakari ku buryo busumbijeho." 
Romans5:10 Koko rero, niba twariyunze n’Imana mu rupfu rw’Umwana wayo kandi nyamara twari abanzi, ubwo twiyunze, tuzarokorwa mu buzima bwe ku buryo busumbijeho." 
Romans5:11 Si n’ibyo ngibyo gusa: twishimiye Imana muri Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu, ari We ubu ngubu wadufashije kwiyunga." 
Romans5:12 Nk’uko icyaha cyadutse mu nsi gikuruwe n’umuntu umwe, kandi n’urupfu rukuruwe n’icyaha, bityo urupfu rucengera abantu bose, kuko bose bacumuye..." 
Romans5:13 Koko rero na mbere y’uko amategeko atangazwa, icyaha cyariho mu nsi, n’ubwo nta we cyahama iyo nta mategeko ariho." 
Romans5:14 Nyamara urupfu rwaraganje kuva kuri Adamu kugera kuri Musa, ndetse no ku batakoze icyaha kingana n’icya Adamu, ari we washushanyaga Uwari ugiye kuzaza." 
Romans5:15 Ariko ineza ntigira ihuriro n’icyaha. Koko rero n’ubwo abenshi bapfuye bazize icyaha cy’umuntu umwe, ineza y’Imana n’ingabire y’ubuntu bw’umwe, Yezu Kristu, zasesekaye kuri benshi ku buryo busumbijeho." 
Romans5:16 Kandi rero ingabire ntiyagereranywa n’icyaha cy’umwe: kuko icyaha cy’umwe cyaciriwe urubanza rwo gucibwa, naho impuhwe zigiriwe ibyaha byinshi, zigeza ku butungane." 
Romans5:17 Niba koko urupfu rwaraganje rutewe n’umuntu umwe, rutewe n’icyaha cy’umuntu umwe, ku buryo busumbijeho abahabwa ineza n’ingabire zitabarika z’ubutungane, bazaganza mu bugingo babikesha umuntu umwe, Yezu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Bityo rero, nk’uko icyaha cy’umwe cyatumye abantu bose bacibwa, ni ko n’igikorwa cy’ubutungane bw’umuntu umwe kizatuma abantu bose bahabwa ubutungane butanga ubugingo." 
Romans5:19 Koko rero, nk’uko ukutumvira k’umuntu umwe kwatumye benshi icyaha kibahama, ni ko n’ukumvira k’umwe kuzatuma benshi baba intungane." 
Romans5:20 Amategeko yaje agwiza icyaha, ariko aho icyaha cyakwiriye, ineza yarushijeho kuhasendera" 
Romans5:21 kugira ngo, nk’uko icyaha cyari cyaraganje mu rupfu, n’ineza izaganze mu butungane butanga ubugingo bw’iteka muri Yezu Kristu umwami wacu." 
Romans6:1 Twabivugaho iki rero? Twigumire mu cyaha se ngo ineza ikunde igwire? 
Romans6:2 Ntibikabeho! Ko twebwe twapfuye ku cyaha, twakomeza dute kubaho muri cyo?" 
Romans6:3 Ntimuzi se ko twebwe twese ababatijwe muri Kristu Yezu, ari mu rupfu rwe twabatirijwemo?" 
Romans6:4 Koko rero ku bwa batisimu twahambanywe na we mu rupfu rwe kugira ngo, uko Kristu yazuwe mu bapfuye n’ikuzo rya Data, bityo natwe tugendere mu bugingo bushya." 
Romans6:5 Niba koko twarabaye umwe na We dusangira urupfu rwe, ni ko bizagenda no mu izuka." 
Romans6:6 Tumenye neza ko muntu w’igisazira twari we kera yabambanywe na We, kugira ngo umubiri w’icyaha utsiratsizwe, bityo twoye kuzongera ukundi kuba abagaragu b’icyaha." 
Romans6:7 Kuko upfuye, aba ahanaguweho icyaha." 
Romans6:8 Niba rero twarapfanye na Kristu, twemera ko nanone tuzabaho hamwe na We." 
Romans6:9 Tuzi ko Kristu yazutse mu bapfuye akaba atazongera gupfa ukundi, urupfu rukaba rutakimufiteho ububasha." 
Romans6:10 Kuko igihe apfuye, yapfuye ku cyaha rimwe rizima; naho kuba ariho, abereyeho Imana." 
Romans6:11 Bityo namwe mumenye ko ubwanyu mwapfuye ku cyaha mukaba mubereyeho Imana muri Kristu Yezu. 
Romans6:12 Icyaha rero nticyongere kugenga umubiri wanyu uzapfa ngo gitume mwumvira irari ryawo. 
Romans6:13 Kandi imibiri yanyu ntimukayegurire icyaha ngo ibe intwaro z’ukugira nabi, ahubwo nimugandukire Imana nk’abazima bavuye mu bapfu, imibiri yanyu muyegurire Imana ibe intwaro z’ubutungane." 
Romans6:14 Koko rero icyaha ntikikibafiteho ububasha, kuko mutakigengwa n’amategeko, ahubwo mugengwa n’ineza." 
Romans6:15 Bite rero? Tuzacumure se ngo aha ntitukigengwa n’amategeko, tugengwa n’ineza? Oya ntibikabe!" 
Romans6:16 Mbese ntimuzi ko uwo mwiyeguriye mukamubera abagaragu bamwumvira, muba mumubereye koko abagaragu bagomba kumwumvira, cyaba icyaha gishyira urupfu, kwaba ukumvira gutanga ubutungane?" 
Romans6:17 Imana ishimwe kuko mwahoze muri abagaragu b’icyaha none mukaba mwarayobotse mubikuye ku mutima inyigisho mwaragijwe. 
Romans6:18 Mwarokowe ubucakara bw’icyaha, muhinduka abagaragu b’ubutungane." 
Romans6:19 Ndavuga ku buryo bw’abantu mbitewe n’intege nke zanyu. Ubwo mwari mwareguriye imibiri yanyu gukora ibiterasoni n’ubwigomeke, noneho rero nimuyegurire ubutungane butanga ubutagatifu." 
Romans6:20 Koko rero, igihe mwari abagaragu b’icyaha, ntimwagengwaga n’ubutungane." 
Romans6:21 Mbese byabunguye iki icyo gihe? Ko ahubwo ubu ngubu bibateye isoni, kuko amaherezo yabyo ari urupfu." 
Romans6:22 Ariko ubu ngubu, kuva aho mugobotorewe icyaha, mukaba abagaragu b’Imana, mweze imbuto zigeza ku butagatifu, amaherezo akazaba ubugingo bw’iteka." 
Romans6:23 Nuko rero ingaruka y’icyaha ni urupfu, naho ingabire y’Imana ni ubugingo bw’iteka muri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu." 
Romans7:1 Bavandimwe muyobewe se ko umuntu agengwa n’amategeko igihe cyose akiriho? (Ndabwira abahanga mu mategeko). 
Romans7:2 Umugore wubatse, itegeko rimuhambira ku mugabo igihe akiriho; iyo umugabo apfuye, umugore aba abohowe itegeko ry’umugabo." 
Romans7:3 Ni yo mpamvu yitwa umusambanyi iyo ari ku wundi mugabo kandi uwe akiriho; ariko iyo umugabo apfuye, aba abohowe itegeko ku buryo ataba akiswe umusambanyi iyo acyuwe n’undi mugabo." 
Romans7:4 Namwe rero, bavandimwe, mwarapfuye ku byerekeye amategeko mubikesheje umubiri wa Kristu ngo mube ab’undi, ari We wazutse mu bapfuye, kugira ngo turumbukire Imana imbuto." 
Romans7:5 Koko rero, igihe twari mu cyaha, irari ryacyo ryaduteraga kwera imbuto z’urupfu, ryishingikirije itegeko." 
Romans7:6 Naho ubu ngubu, twapfuye ku byerekeye itegeko, tugobotorwa n’ibyo ryatuboheshaga ku buryo tugengwa na roho nshya, aho kugengwa n’inyandiko ishaje." 
Romans7:7 Twavuga iki rero? Ko amategeko ari yo cyaha? Oya ntibikabe! Ariko sinari kumenya icyaha ntabihawe n’amategeko. Simba naramenye irari iyo amategeko atavuga ngo «Ntuzararikire ikibi.» 
Romans7:8 Nyamara icyaha cyitwaje itegeko, kintera icyitwa irari cyose. Nuko rero hatabayeho amategeko, icyaha nticyabaho." 
Romans7:9 Kera, amategeko atarabaho, nari muzima. Aho itegeko rihingukiye, icyaha kirabaduka," 
Romans7:10 nuko jyewe ndapfa, nsanga itegeko rinkururira urupfu kandi ubundi ryaragenewe gutanga ubuzima." 
Romans7:11 Koko icyaha cyitwaje itegeko, kiranyoshya kirinyiciramo." 
Romans7:12 Bityo rero, amategeko ni matagatifu, ndetse itegeko ryose ni ritagatifu, riratunganye kandi ni ryiza." 
Romans7:13 Mbese noneho icyo cyiza kibe cyarambereye urupfu? Oya ntibikabeho! Ahubwo ni icyaha, kugira ngo cyigaragaze ko ari icyaha koko: kuko cyitwaje icyiza maze kinkururira urupfu, kugira ngo kandi cyerekane ububi bwacyo bwose bitewe n’itegeko." 
Romans7:14 Tuzi neza ko amategeko aturuka kuri Roho; jyewe ariko ndi umunyamubiri, naraguzwe mba umucakara w’icyaha." 
Romans7:15 Koko rero sinumva ibyo nkora: icyo nshaka gukora, si cyo nkora, ahubwo ndetse icyo ndashaka, ngicyo icyo nkora." 
Romans7:16 Ubwo noneho rero nkora icyo ndashaka, mpuje n’amategeko kandi nkemera ko ari meza." 
Romans7:17 Ubwo rero si jyewe ukora ibyo, ahubwo ni icyaha cyaritse muri jye." 
Romans7:18 Koko kandi nzi neza ko icyiza kitandimo, kubera intege nke z’umubiri wanjye. Nshobora kwifuza icyiza, ariko kugikora bikananira." 
Romans7:19 Kuko icyiza nifuza ntagikora, naho ikibi ndashaka akaba ari cyo nkora." 
Romans7:20 Niba rero icyo ndashaka ari cyo nkora, ntibikibaye jyewe ugikora ahubwo ni icyaha gituye muri jye." 
Romans7:21 Jyewe ushaka gukora icyiza, nsanga hari iri tegeko ko ikibi ari cyo kimbangukira." 
Romans7:22 Nishimira amategeko y’Imana mu mutima wanjye," 
Romans7:23 nyamara nkabona irindi tegeko muri jyewe rirwanya itegeko ry’umutima wanjye, ku buryo ndi imbohe y’itegeko ry’icyaha rindimo." 
Romans7:24 Mbega ngo ndaba umunyabyago! Ni nde uzankiza uyu mubiri wagenewe gupfa? 
Romans7:25 Imana ishimwe muri Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu! Naho ubundi jyewe ndasanga ndi umugaragu w’itegeko ry’Imana ku bw’umutima, n’uw’itegeko ry’icyaha ku bw’umubiri." 
Romans8:1 Ubu ngubu noneho abari muri Kristu Yezu ntibagiciwe. 
Romans8:2 Kuko itegeko rya Roho utanga ubugingo muri Kristu Yezu ryaturokoye itegeko ry’icyaha n’urupfu. 
Romans8:3 Koko rero, ikitashobokeraga amategeko kuko intege nke z’umubiri zayacogozaga, Imana yaragishoboye: igihe yohereje Umwana wayo mu mubiri usa n’uw’icyaha ngo abe igitambo cy’icyaha, yagitsindiye mu mubiri," 
Romans8:4 kugira ngo ubutungane bushakwa n’amategeko budusenderezwemo, twebwe abatagengwa n’ibitekerezo by’umubiri ahubwo na roho." 
Romans8:5 Koko rero abagengwa n’umubiri bita ku by’umubiri; naho abagengwa na roho, bo bita ku bya roho." 
Romans8:6 Irari ry’umubiri rishyira urupfu, naho ibyifuzo bya roho bigashyira ubugingo n’amahoro." 
Romans8:7 Kuko irari ry’umubiri rirwanya Imana: nta bwo ryayoboka amategeko y’Imana, ntiryanabishobora." 
Romans8:8 N’abagengwa n’umubiri ntibashobora kunyura Imana. 
Romans8:9 Mwebwe ariko, ntimugengwa n’umubiri, ahubwo mugengwa na roho, kuko Roho w’Imana atuye muri mwe. Umuntu udafite Roho wa Kristu, uwo ntaba ari uwe." 
Romans8:10 Niba Kristu ari muri mwe, umubiri wanyu wo ugomba gupfa ku mpamvu y’icyaha, ariko mubeshejweho na Roho ku mpamvu y’ubutungane." 
Romans8:11 Niba kandi Roho y’Uwazuye Kristu Yezu mu bapfuye abatuyemo, Uwazuye Kristu Yezu mu bapfuye azabeshaho imibiri yanyu igenewe gupfa ku bwa Roho we utuye muri mwe." 
Romans8:12 None rero, bavandimwe, turimo umwenda, ariko si uw’umubiri byatuma tugomba kubaho tugengwa n’umubiri." 
Romans8:13 Kuko nimubaho mugengwa n’umubiri, muzapfa; ariko niba ku bwa roho, mucitse ku bikorwa by’umubiri, muzabaho." 
Romans8:14 Abayoborwa na Roho w’Imana, abo ni bo bana b’Imana." 
Romans8:15 Kandi rero ntimwahawe roho y’ubucakara ibasubiza nanone mu bwoba, ahubwo mwahawe roho ibagira abana bishingiwe kibyeyi, igatuma dutera hejuru tuti «Abba! Data!»" 
Romans8:16 Roho uwo nyine afatanya na roho yacu guhamya ko turi abana b’Imana. 
Romans8:17 Kandi ubwo turi abana, turi n’abagenerwamurage; abagenerwamurage b’Imana, bityo n’abasangiramurage ba Kristu niba ariko tubabarana na We ngo tuzahabwe ikuzo hamwe na We." 
Romans8:18 Koko rero nsanga amagorwa y’igihe cy’ubu ngubu atagereranywa n’ikuzo rizatugaragarizwamo. 
Romans8:19 Ndetse n’ibiremwa byose birarekereje ngo birebe igaragazwa ry’abana b’Imana: 
Romans8:20 n’ubwo ibyo biremwa bitagifite agaciro, atari ku bushake bwabyo, ahubwo ku bw’Uwabigennye atyo, biracyafite amizero." 
Romans8:21 Kuko n’ibyaremwe ubwabyo bizagobotorwa ingoyi y’ubushanguke maze bigasangira ubwigenge n’ikuzo by’abana b’Imana. 
Romans8:22 Tuzi neza ko na n’ubu ibiremwa byose binihira icyarimwe, nk’ibiri mu mibabaro yo kuramukwa." 
Romans8:23 Nyamara si byo byonyine, ndetse natwe abahawe Roho Mutagatifu ho umuganura, turaganyira mu mutima, dutegereje kugirwa abana b’Imana, ugucungurwa kw’imibiri yacu." 
Romans8:24 Koko rero twarakijijwe mu bwizere; nyamara kureba ibyo wizeraga, ntibiba bikiri ukwizera. Iyo umuntu yirebera, aba acyizeye iki kindi?" 
Romans8:25 Niba rero twizeye icyo tutareba ubu ngubu, twihanganiye kugitegereza." 
Romans8:26 Bityo, ni ko na Roho atabara intege nke zacu, kuko tutazi icyo twasaba uko bikwiye, maze Roho ubwe akadutakambira mu miniho irenze imivugirwe." 
Romans8:27 Kandi Nyirugusuzuma imitima akaba azi icyo Roho yifuza, kuko atakambira abatagatifujwe ku buryo buhuje n’Imana." 
Romans8:28 Tuzi kandi ko byose bihira abakunda Imana, ari bo yihamagariye ku bwende bwayo." 
Romans8:29 Abo yamenye kuva kera, yanabageneye guhabwa isura y’Umwana wayo ngo abe umuvukambere mu bavandimwe benshi." 
Romans8:30 Abo yabigeneye kandi, abo ngabo yarabahamagaye; abo yahamagaye kandi, abo ngabo yabahaye kuba intungane; abo yahaye kuba intungane, abo ngabo yanabahaye ikuzo." 
Romans8:31 Ibi twabyongeraho iki? Niba Imana turi kumwe, ni nde waduhangara?" 
Romans8:32 Yo itimanye ndetse n’Umwana wayo, ahubwo ikamudutangira twese, yabura ite kandi kutugabira byose kumwe na We?" 
Romans8:33 Ni nde wagira icyo ashinja intore z’Imana? Ko Imana iziha kuba intungane. 
Romans8:34 Ni nde uzazicira urubanza? Ko Kristu Yezu yapfuye, ndetse ko yazutse, We uri iburyo bw’Imana, akaba anadutakambira." 
Romans8:35 Ni iki cyadutandukanya n’urukundo rwa Kristu? Ibyago se, agahinda se, ibitotezo se, inzara se, ubukene se, imitego se, cyangwa inkota?" 
Romans8:36 Nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Ku mpamvu yawe, baratwica umusubizo; batugize intama z’imbagwa.»" 
Romans8:37 Nyamara muri ibyo byose tugatsinda kakahava, tubikesha Uwadukunze." 
Romans8:38 Koko rero simbishidikanya: ari urupfu, ari ubugingo, ari abamalayika, ari ibinyabubasha, ari iby’ubu, ari ibizaza, ari ibinyamaboko," 
Romans8:39 ari iby’ejuru, ari iby’ikuzimu, ari n’ikindi kiremwa cyose, nta na kimwe kizashobora kudutandukanya n’urukundo Imana idukunda muri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu." 
Romans9:1 Ndavuga ukuri muri Kristu rwose simbeshya: icyemezo ndagitangana umutimanama wanjye muri Roho Mutagatifu. 
Romans9:2 Mfite agahinda kenshi n’intimba inshengura umutima ubutitsa. 
Romans9:3 Koko rero nakwiyifuriza kuba ikivume jyewe ubwanjye ngatandukana na Kristu, nigurana abavandimwe banjye dusangiye ubwoko ku bw’umubiri," 
Romans9:4 ari bo Abayisraheli. Ni bo batowe, bahabwa ikuzo n’amasezerano, amategeko, imihango n’ubuhanuzi." 
Romans9:5 Abasekuruza babo ni bo Kristu akomokaho ku bw’umubiri, We usumba byose, Imana isingizwa iteka ryose. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Nyamara ariko ijambo ry’Imana ntiryapfuye ubusa. Koko rero abakomoka kuri Israheli, si ko bose ari Israheli y’ukuri." 
Romans9:7 No kuba inkomoko ya Abrahamu, si byo kuba bose ari abana be. Ahubwo «Abakomoka kuri Izaki ni bo bazitwa abawe.»" 
Romans9:8 Ari byo kuvuga ko kuba abana be ku bw’umubiri, atari byo kuba abana b’Imana, ahubwo abana b’isezerano ni bo babarwa mu rubyaro." 
Romans9:9 Ngiri rero ijambo ry’isezerano «Igihe nk’iki nzahindukira, kandi Sara azabyara umuhungu.»" 
Romans9:10 Si n’ibyo gusa. Hari na Rebeka wasamye inda imwe kuri Izaki, umubyeyi wacu." 
Romans9:11 Igihe abana bataravuka, nta cyiza cyangwa ikibi barakora, kugira ngo umugambi w’Imana ukomeze ushingire ku butore," 
Romans9:12 atari ku bikorwa, ahubwo kuri Nyiruguhitamo, yarabwiwe ngo «Gakuru azaba umugaragu wa Gatoya»." 
Romans9:13 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nikundiye Yakobo, maze ndeka Ezawu.»" 
Romans9:14 Twabivugaho iki rero? Ko Imana ibera? Oya, ntibikabeho." 
Romans9:15 Yabwiye Musa iti «Nzagirira ineza uwo nzashaka kuyigirira, nzagirire impuhwe uwo nzashaka kuzigirira.»" 
Romans9:16 Nuko rero, si iby’umwete cyangwa ubushake by’umuntu, ahubwo ni iby’Imana igira impuhwe." 
Romans9:17 Kuko Ibyanditswe bibwira Farawo biti «Dore icyatumye ngushyiraho, kwari ukugira ngo nzakwerekanireho.» ububasha bwanjye maze izina ryanjye ribe ikirangirire ku isi yose" 
Romans9:18 Nuko rero Imana ibabarira uwo ishaka, ikanangira umutima w’uwo ishaka." 
Romans9:19 Ubwo rero wagira uti «Imana iracyadushakaho iki?» Mbese ni nde warwanya ugushaka kwayo? 
Romans9:20 Mbe muntu, uri nde wo gushyogoranya n’Imana? Mbese ikintu cy’ikibumbano cyabwira uwakibumbye ngo «Kuki wankoze utya?»" 
Romans9:21 Mbese umubumbyi ntashobora kuvana mu ibumba rimwe igikoresho cy’agaciro n’igikoresho gisanzwe? 
Romans9:22 Bityo rero Imana yashatse kwerekana uburakari bwayo no kugaragaza ububasha bwayo. Yihanganiye bihagije ibibumbano bibi byari bikwiriye kujanjagurwa. 
Romans9:23 Ibyo kwari ukugira ngo ibibumbano bikwiriye impuhwe byateganyirijwe ikuzo, ibigaragarize uburumbuke bw’ikuzo ryayo bwite:" 
Romans9:24 ibyo bibumbano ni twebwe yahamagaye tutavuye mu Bayahudi gusa, ahubwo ndetse no mu Banyamahanga." 
Romans9:25 Nk’uko yabivuze muri Hozeya ati «Umuryango utari uwanjye nzawita umuryango wanjye, utari inkundwakazi nzamwita inkundwakazi;" 
Romans9:26 kandi ahantu babwiriwe ngo ntimuri umuryango wanjye, ni ho bazitirwa abana b’Imana Nyir’ubugingo.»" 
Romans9:27 Izayi na we yavuze ibyerekeye Israheli ati «Naho umubare w’abana ba Israheli wangana n’umusenyi wo ku nyanja, agasigisigi konyine ni ko kazarokoka," 
Romans9:28 kuko Nyagasani azasohoza ijambo rye ku isi, ku buryo bunonosoye kandi adatindiganyije.»" 
Romans9:29 Ni nk’uko kandi Izayi yabihanuye ati «Iyo Nyagasani Umutegetsi w’ingabo atatuzigamira imbuto, tuba twarabaye nka Sodoma, tukagereranywa na Gomora.»" 
Romans9:30 Twabivugaho iki? Ko abanyamahanga batashakashakaga ubutungane babushyikiriye, ubutungane ariko bukomoka ku kwemera," 
Romans9:31 naho Israheli yashakaga itegeko ritanga ubutungane, ntiyarishyikira." 
Romans9:32 Ni ku mpamvu ki rero? Ni uko itashakiye ubutungane ku kwemera, ahubwo mu bikorwa. Batsitaye ku ibuye ry’ubutsikire" 
Romans9:33 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye ry’ubutsikire n’urutare rugusha, ariko uzemera akarushingaho ibirindiro ntazakorwa n’isoni.»" 
Romans10:1 Bavandimwe, icyo umutima wanjye wifuza n’icyo nsaba Imana ni uko barokoka." 
Romans10:2 Ndahamya rwose ko bafitiye Imana ishyaka, ariko nta bushishozi," 
Romans10:3 kuko bayobewe ubutungane buturuka ku Mana, bashaka gushyiraho ubwabo bwite, ntibayoboka ubutungane bw’Imana." 
Romans10:4 Kuko amategeko agarukira kuri Kristu, kugira ngo uwemera wese ahabwe kuba intungane." 
Romans10:5 Koko rero Musa yanditse ko ubutungane buturuka ku mategeko, kandi ko umuntu uzayubahiriza, azabeshwaho na yo." 
Romans10:6 Naho ubutungane buturuka ku kwemera bwo bukavuga buti «Ntukavuge mu mutima wawe ngo ’Ni nde uzazamuka mu ijuru?’» ari byo kuvuga kumanurayo Kristu," 
Romans10:7 cyangwa ngo «Ni nde uzamanuka ikuzimu?» ari byo kuvuga kuzamura Kristu mu bapfuye. 
Romans10:8 Ni ukuvuga iki se ahubwo? «Ijambo rikuri bugufi cyane, riri mu kanwa kawe no mu mutima wawe.» Iryo jambo ni iry’ukwemera twamamaza." 
Romans10:9 Kuko niba wamamarisha umunwa wawe ko Kristu ari Nyagasani kandi ukemera mu mutima wawe ko Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye, uzarokorwa." 
Romans10:10 Nuko rero umuntu yemera n’umutima bikamuha ubutungane, yakwamamarisha umunwa bikamuha uburokorwe." 
Romans10:11 Kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Umwemera wese ntazakozwa isoni.» 
Romans10:12 Nta tandukanyirizo rero hagati y’Umuyahudi n’Umugereki: Nyagasani ni umwe kuri bose, akungahaza abamwambaza bose." 
Romans10:13 Kuko «umuntu wese uzambaza izina rya Nyagasani, azarokorwa.»" 
Romans10:14 Bakwiyambaza bate rero Uwo bataremera? Bakwemera bate se Uwo batarumva? Bamwumva bate ntawamwamamaje? 
Romans10:15 Bamwamamaza bate niba batatumwe? Nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Mbega ngo biraba byiza ibirenge by’abogeza inkuru nziza!» 
Romans10:16 Nyamara si ko bose bumviye Inkuru Nziza. Koko rero Izayi yaravuze ati «Nyagasani, ni nde wemeye inyigisho zacu?»" 
Romans10:17 Bityo rero, ukwemera gushingira ku nyigisho, inyigisho na yo ku ijambo rya Kristu." 
Romans10:18 Reka nanjye mbaze: mbese ntibumvise? Barumvise. Ahubwo ndetse ngo «Ijwi ryabo ryakwiriye isi yose, n’ijambo ryabo rigera ku mpera z’isi.»" 
Romans10:19 Nongere mbaze: mbese Israheli yaba itarasobanukiwe? Musa ni we wabanje kuvuga ati «Nzabaharika ikitari umuryango muterwe ishyari.» n’ihanga ritagira ubwenge 
Romans10:20 Izayi we ntatinya kuvuga ati «Nabonywe n’abatanshakashakaga, nigaragariza abatambaririzaga»." 
Romans10:21 naho Israheli akayibwira ati «Nirije umunsi ntegeye amaboko umuryango utanyumvira, wigometse.»" 
Romans11:1 Reka mbaze rero: mbese Imana yaba yaraciye umuryango wayo? Oya ntibikabe! Nanjye ndi Umuyisraheli wo mu rubyaro rwa Abrahamu, mu nzu ya Benyamini." 
Romans11:2 Nta bwo Imana yaciye umuryango wayo kandi ari wo yari yaratoye. Cyangwa se ntimuzi icyo Ibyanditswe bivuga aho Eliya arega Israheli ku Mana, agira ati" 
Romans11:3 «Nyagasani, bishe abahanuzi bawe, basenya intambiro zawe, none nsigaye ndi jyenyine kandi nanjye barahigira amagara yanjye!»" 
Romans11:4 Mbese Imana imusubiza iki? «Nsigaranye abantu ibihumbi birindwi batapfukamiye Behali.» 
Romans11:5 Bityo rero no muri ibi bihe, hari agasigisigi katoranijwe ku buntu." 
Romans11:6 Ubwo rero ari ku buntu, ntibikiri ku bw’ibikorwa, naho ubundi ubuntu ntibwaba bukiri bwo." 
Romans11:7 Bite rero? Ko icyo Israheli yashakashakaga itagishyikiriye! Nyamara abatowe bo baragishyikiriye, naho abandi baranangira," 
Romans11:8 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Imana yabahaye umutima uhumye, n’amaso atabona, n’amatwi atumva, kugeza na n’ubu.»" 
Romans11:9 Na Dawudi aravuga ati «Ameza yabo arakababera umutego, urushundura, urutsitariro n’igihano bikwiriye!" 
Romans11:10 Amaso yabo arakijima boye kubona n’umugongo wabo ube umuheto iteka ryose.» 
Romans11:11 Reka nongere mbaze: batsitariye kugwa ngo bahere hasi? Oya, ntibikabe! Ahubwo ugutsitara kwabo kwatumye uburokorwe bugera ku banyamahanga kugira ngo bibatere ishyari." 
Romans11:12 Ubwo se ugutsitara kwabo kwakungahaje isi, n’ukugwa kwabo kugakungahaza amahanga, ntibizahebuza nibagera ku burokorwe bwuzuye?" 
Romans11:13 Mwebwe abanyamahanga, dore icyo mbabwira: mu rugero jyewe ndi intumwa mu mahanga, nubahiriza ubutumwa nahawe," 
Romans11:14 nizera gutera ishyari abo dusangiye ubwoko ngo ngire bamwe muri bo ndokora. 
Romans11:15 Kuko niba ugucibwa kwabo kwararonkeye isi kwiyunga n’Imana, ukugarurwa kwabo kuzacura iki kitari ukuzuka kw’abari barapfuye?" 
Romans11:16 Iyo ifu y’umuganura ari ntagatifu, n’irobe ni ko riba; n’iyo imizi ari mitagatifu, amashami na yo ni ko aba." 
Romans11:17 Niba amwe mu mashami yaratemwe, maze wowe, n’ubwo wari ishami ry’agasozi, ukahagemekwa maze ugasangizwa amakakama azamurwa n’umuzi w’umuzeti," 
Romans11:18 ntukitere hejuru wigamba kuri ya mashami. Niba witeye hejuru, wibuke ko atari wowe uhagaritse umuzi, ko ahubwo ari umuzi uguhagaritse." 
Romans11:19 Ahari wavuga uti «Batemye amashami kugira ngo ngemekwe.» 
Romans11:20 Ni byo koko. Yatemwe ku mpamvu y’ukutemera, naho wowe uhahagaritswe n’ukwemera. Ntukitere hejuru rero, ahubwo tinya." 
Romans11:21 Kuko ubwo Imana itasoneye amashami ya kamere, nawe ntizagusonera." 
Romans11:22 Irebere nawe ubugwaneza n’ubutabera by’Imana: ku baguye ikurikira ubutabera, kuri wowe igira ubuntu, niba ariko ugumye muri ubwo bugwaneza, naho ubundi nawe izagukorora." 
Romans11:23 Nyamara na bo umunsi bemeye, bazongera bagemekwe: kuko Imana ishobora kongera kubagemeka." 
Romans11:24 Ko wowe watemwe ku giti cy’agasozi muhuje ubwoko, maze ukagemekwa ku muzeti mwiza mudahuje ubwoko, nkanswe bo bazagemekwa ku muzeti wabo bwite bahuje ubwoko!" 
Romans11:25 Koko rero, bavandimwe, sinshaka ko muyoberwa iri banga hato mutazirata: igice kimwe cya Israheli kizanangira umutima kugeza igihe abanyamahanga bose bazaba bakoranyijwe." 
Romans11:26 Bityo rero Israheli yose izarokorwa nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Umucunguzi azaturuka i Siyoni, yamaganire kure ya Yakobo icyitwa ubugomeramana." 
Romans11:27 Ngiryo isezerano nzagirana na bo, maze kubakuraho ibyaha byabo.»" 
Romans11:28 Kuba batakiriye Inkuru Nziza, babaye abanzi b’Imana, naho kuba baratowe, ni abatoni bayo babikesha abasekuruza." 
Romans11:29 Koko rero igihe Imana imaze gutanga no gutora, ntiyisubiraho." 
Romans11:30 Nk’uko namwe kera mutumviraga, none ubu ngubu mukaba mwaragiriwe impuhwe ku mpamvu y’ukutumvira kwabo," 
Romans11:31 bityo na bo ubu ngubu banze kumvira kugira ngo mugirirwe impuhwe, mu gihe cyabo na bo bazazigirirwe." 
Romans11:32 Imana yakoranirije abantu bose mu bwigomeke kugira ngo bose hamwe ibagirire imbabazi. 
Romans11:33 Mbega ukuntu ubukungu n’ubuhanga n’ubwenge by’Imana birengeje urugero! Mbega ukuntu imigambi yayo ari inshoberabantu, n’inzira zayo zikaba urujijo!" 
Romans11:34 «Koko rero, ni nde wamenye igitekerezo cya Nyagasani, cyangwa ni nde wamubereye umujyanama," 
Romans11:35 cyangwa se wabanje kugira icyo amuha ngo azagombe kumwitura?» 
Romans11:36 Ko byose bikomoka kuri We bikabeshwaho na We, bikaberaho We. Nahabwe ikuzo iteka ryose! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Bavandimwe rero, mbinginze ku bw’impuhwe z’Imana: nimuture imibiri yanyu, ibe igitambo nyabuzima, gitagatifu kandi kinyuze Imana; ngiryo iyobokamana ryabava ku mutima." 
Romans12:2 Kandi ntimukigane ibi bihe turimo, ahubwo nimuhinduke, mwivugururemo ibitekerezo, kugira ngo muzajye mumenya neza ugushaka kw’Imana, ikiri cyiza, icyashimisha n’ikiboneye." 
Romans12:3 Ku bw’ingabire nahawe, reka ngire icyo mbwira buri wese muri mwe: ntimukirebe ibisumbye uko mugomba kwireba, ahubwo muzirikane ibifasha kwiyoroshya, buri wese mu rugero rw’ukwemera Imana yamugeneye." 
Romans12:4 Mbese nk’uko mu mubiri umwe tugira ingingo nyinshi kandi ingingo zose ntizikore umurimo umwe," 
Romans12:5 bityo turi benshi, ariko tugize umubiri umwe muri Kristu, buri wese ku buryo bwe akabera abandi urugingo." 
Romans12:6 Dufite ingabire zinyuranye bikurikije ineza twagiriwe. Uwahawe ingabire y’ubuhanuzi, ajye ahanura akurikije ukwemera;" 
Romans12:7 uwahawe ingabire yo kwita ku bandi, abiteho; uwahawe kwigisha, niyigishe;" 
Romans12:8 uwahawe gutera abandi inkunga, nayibatere. Utanga, atange nta kindi akurikiranye; uyobora, ayoborane umwete; utabara abatishoboye, nabafashe anezerewe." 
Romans12:9 Urukundo rwanyu ruzire uburyarya. Ikibi kibashishe mugihunge, naho icyiza mukihambireho." 
Romans12:10 Mukundane urukundo rwa kivandimwe, mushyire imbere icyahesha buri wese icyubahiro." 
Romans12:11 Muragire umwete ntimukabe abanebwe, nimushishikare, mube abagaragu ba Nyagasani." 
Romans12:12 Mwishimire amizero mufite, mwiyumanganye mu magorwa, ntimugahweme gusenga." 
Romans12:13 Musangire n’abatagatifujwe bakennye, muharanire gufata neza abashyitsi." 
Romans12:14 Musabire umugisha ababatoteza, mubasabire umugisha aho kubavuma." 
Romans12:15 Mwishimane n’abishimye, murirane n’abarira." 
Romans12:16 Muhuze imitima; ntimukararikire ibibasumbye, ahubwo mwimenyereze ibiciye bugufi. «Ntimukishime ubwenge bwanyu.»" 
Romans12:17 Ntihakagire uwo mwitura inabi; «mwihatire kugaragariza abantu bose ibyiza mukora.» 
Romans12:18 Bishobotse, mu rugero byabaturukaho mwebwe, mubane mu mahoro n’abantu bose." 
Romans12:19 Ntimukihorere ubwanyu, nkoramutima zanjye, ahubwo muhe akanya uburakari bw’Imana nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Kumara inzigo ni ibyanjye, ni jye uzatanga inyiturano», uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga." 
Romans12:20 Ahubwo rero «niba umwanzi wawe ashonje, muhe icyo kurya; niba afite inyota, muhe icyo kunywa. Kuko nugenza utyo, uzaba umurahuriye ku mutwe amakara agurumana.»" 
Romans12:21 Ntukareke inabi ikuganza, ahubwo inabi uyiganjishe ineza." 
Romans13:1 Umuntu wese yumvire ubutegetsi bumusumbye, kuko nta butegetsi budaturuka ku Mana kandi n’uburiho bukaba bwarashinzwe n’Imana." 
Romans13:2 Bityo urwanya ubutegetsi aba arwanya icyo Imana yagennye, kandi ababurwanya baba bikururira urubanza." 
Romans13:3 Kuko ugira neza si we utinya abatware, ahubwo ni ugira nabi. Mbese urashaka kudatinya ubutegetsi? Kora icyiza, na bwo buzagushima." 
Romans13:4 Kuko Imana ibukoresha ngo ugere ku cyiza. Ariko niba ukoze ikibi, utinye; nta bwo bwitwaza inkota ku busa. Kuko Imana ikoresha ubutegetsi ngo ibuhanishe ugira nabi." 
Romans13:5 Ni yo mpamvu ari ngombwa kuyoboka ubutegetsi, bidatewe no gutinya umujinya wabwo gusa, ahubwo ubibwirijwe n’umutimanama." 
Romans13:6 Ni na yo mpamvu burya mutanga imisoro: abayakirana ubwitonzi, baba bakorera Imana." 
Romans13:7 Mujye muha buri muntu ikiri icye: uwo mugomba umusoro, mumuhe umusoro; uwo mugomba ihazabu, muyimuhe; ugomba gutinywa, mumutinye; ugomba kubahwa, mumwubahe." 
Romans13:8 Ntihakagire uwo mubamo umwenda, atari uwo gukundana. Kuko ukunda undi, aba yujuje amategeko." 
Romans13:9 Kuko kuvuga ngo «Ntuzasambane, ntuzice, ntuzibe, ntuzararikire ikibi.» ». kimwe n’andi mategeko, yose akubiye muri iri jambo ngo «Uzakunde mugenzi wawe nkawe ubwawe" 
Romans13:10 Ukunda ntiyagirira mugenzi we inabi. Urukundo rero ni rwo rubumbye amategeko. 
Romans13:11 Cyane cyane mumenye ko aya magingo turimo, ari igihe cyo gushiguka mu bitotsi, kuko ukurokorwa kuturi hafi ubu ngubu kurusha igihe twakiriye ukwemera." 
Romans13:12 Ijoro rirakuze, umunsi ugiye gucya. Nitwiyake rero ibikorwa by’umwijima maze twambare intwaro z’urumuri." 
Romans13:13 Tugendane umurava nk’abagenda ku mugaragaro amanywa ava, nta busambo, nta businzi, nta busambanyi, nta biterasoni, nta ntonganya, nta shyari." 
Romans13:14 Ahubwo nimwiyambike Nyagasani Yezu Kristu kandi ntimukishinge umubiri ngo mukore ibyo wifuza. 
Romans14:1 Mujye mwakira ugifite intege nke mu kwemera, mwoye kumugisha impaka mu byo ashidikanyaho." 
Romans14:2 Kuko hari uwemera ko ashobora kurya ibibonetse byose, naho uw’intege nke yibwira ko agomba kurya imboga gusa." 
Romans14:3 Uwirira ibibonetse byose, ntagasuzugure utabirya; utabirya na we ntazacire ubirya urubanza, kuko Imana yamwakiriye." 
Romans14:4 Uri nde mbese, wowe ucira urubanza umugaragu utari uwawe? Yahagarara cyangwa yagwa, ibyo bireba shebuja; nyamara azagumya ahagarare kuko Nyagasani afite ububasha bwo kumushyigikira." 
Romans14:5 Hari usumbanya umunsi umwe n’indi, hari n’ubona yose ari kimwe. Buri wese ajye akurikiza icyo umutima we wemera." 
Romans14:6 Usumbanya iminsi ayisumbanyiriza Nyagasani; uwirira ibibonetse byose, abirira Nyagasani kuko aba ashimira Imana. Utarya na we, ni Nyagasani abigirira, na we ashimira Imana." 
Romans14:7 Koko rero nta n’umwe muri twe ubereyeho we ubwe, kandi nta n’umwe upfira we ubwe." 
Romans14:8 Niba turiho, tubereyeho Nyagasani; niba kandi dupfuye, dupfira Nyagasani. Twabaho, twapfa, turi aba Nyagasani." 
Romans14:9 Koko rero ni cyo cyatumye Kristu apfa akazuka, kwari ukugira ngo abe ari we ugenga abapfuye n’abazima." 
Romans14:10 Wowe rero, ni iki gituma ucira umuvandimwe wawe urubanza? Cyangwa ni iki gituma usuzugura umuvandimwe wawe ko twese tuzashyikirizwa urukiko rw’Imana?" 
Romans14:11 Kuko byanditswe ngo «Ndahiye ubuzima bwanjye — uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga — icyitwa ivi cyose kizampfukamira, n’icyitwa ururimi cyose kizamamaze Imana.»" 
Romans14:12 Nuko rero, umuntu wese azisobanurira ibye imbere y’Imana." 
Romans14:13 Ntitukongere rero gucirana imanza; ahubwo twitondere icyabera umuvandimwe intandaro yo kugwa cyangwa gucumura. 
Romans14:14 Nzi neza, rwose sinshidikanya muri Nyagasani Yezu, ko nta kintu gihumanya ku bwacyo; nyamara hagize utekereza ko ikintu gihumanya, kuri we koko kiba gihumanya." 
Romans14:15 Niba rero umuvandimwe wawe atewe agahinda n’icyo uriye, ntuba ukigengwa n’urukundo. Irinde kugira icyo urya cyagusha uwo Kristu yapfiriye." 
Romans14:16 Ikiri cyiza kuri mwe ntikigasebe. 
Romans14:17 Kuko Ingoma y’Imana itagizwe n’ibiribwa n’ibinyobwa, ahubwo irangwa n’ubutungane, amahoro n’ihirwe muri Roho Mutagatifu." 
Romans14:18 Ukorera Kristu atyo, anyura Imana kandi agashimwa n’abantu." 
Romans14:19 Nuko rero niduharanire ibishyigikira amahoro n’ibidufasha guterana inkunga. 
Romans14:20 Ntugasenye igikorwa cy’Imana ku mpamvu y’ibyo kurya. Ibintu byose ntibihumanya, ariko ni bibi ko umuntu arya icyatera undi gucumura." 
Romans14:21 Ibyiza ni ukutarya inyama no kutanywa divayi, mbese ni ukwirinda icyabera umuvandimwe impamvu yo kugwa." 
Romans14:22 Wowe rero, icyo wabwirijwe n’ukwemera ufite ugihorane mu mutimanama wawe no mu maso y’Imana. Hahirwa utigaya ubwe mu byo yahisemo yabisuzumye." 
Romans14:23 Naho urya kandi agishidikanya, uwo yatsinzwe n’urubanza kuko ibyo akora biba bidaturutse ku kwemera, kandi rero icyo umuntu akoze kidaturutse ku kwemera, kiba ari icyaha." 
Romans15:1 Twebwe abakomeye tugomba kugoboka intege nke z’abadashoboye, aho kwishimira gusa ibitworoheye." 
Romans15:2 Buri muntu muri twe nashimishe mugenzi we, akore icyiza cyose cyamukomeza." 
Romans15:3 Kuko na Kristu atakoze icyamushimishaga gusa, nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Ibitutsi by’abagutukaga byanguyeho.»" 
Romans15:4 Koko rero ibyanditswe kera byose, byandikiwe kutubera inyigisho kugira ngo tugire icyizere, twihangane kandi duhumurizwe na byo." 
Romans15:5 Imana soko y’ukwihangana n’uguhumurizwa, irabahe no guhuza ibitekerezo nk’uko Kristu Yezu abishaka," 
Romans15:6 kugira ngo, mu mutima umwe no mu ijwi rimwe, muhe ikuzo Imana, Se w’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans15:7 Ku mpamvu y’ibyo rero, nimwakirane nk’uko na Kristu ubwe yabakiriye agirira ikuzo ry’Imana." 
Romans15:8 Ndahamya ko Kristu yigize umugaragu w’abagenywe kugira ngo yerekane ubudahemuka bw’Imana maze yuzuze ibyo abasokuruza basezeranijwe. 
Romans15:9 Naho amahanga ahe Imana ikuzo ayishimira impuhwe zayo, nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Ni yo mpamvu nzakwamamaza mu mahanga, kandi nzasingiza izina ryawe»." 
Romans15:10 kandi ngo «Mahanga, nimwishimane n’umuryango we»." 
Romans15:11 nanone ngo «Mahanga mwese, nimusingize Nyagasani; miryango mwese, nimumuhimbaze.»" 
Romans15:12 Izayi na we akongera ati «Azashyira aze inkomoko ya Yese.»; ni we uzabadukira kugenga amahanga, kandi ni we bose bazizera" 
Romans15:13 Imana, Yo soko y’amizero, nibuzuze ihirwe ryose n’amahoro mu kwemera kugira ngo musenderezwe ukwizera ku bw’ububasha bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Romans15:14 Bavandimwe banjye, nzi neza ko namwe ubwanyu mwuje ingeso nziza, ko mwuzuye ubumenyi bwose, ko mushobora ubwanyu kujijurana." 
Romans15:15 Nyamara hamwe na hamwe muri iyi baruwa hari aho nagiye mbandikira ku buryo bwubahutse, nsa n’ubibutsa, kuko nahawe ingabire n’Imana" 
Romans15:16 yo kuba umugaragu wa Kristu mu mahanga, nkegurirwa umurimo w’Inkuru Nziza kugira ngo amahanga atagatifuzwe na Roho Mutagatifu, maze yakirweho ituro rinyuze Imana." 
Romans15:17 Ni cyo gituma nshobora kwirata muri Kristu Yezu ibyo nkorera Imana. 
Romans15:18 Kuko ntagira icyo niratana usibye icyo Kristu ubwe yankoresheje, ari mu magambo, ari mu bikorwa," 
Romans15:19 mu bubasha bw’ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, no mu bubasha bwa Roho, kugira ngo amahanga yumvire Imana. Bityo uhereye i Yeruzalemu ukazenguruka ukagera muri Iliriya, nahakwije Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu." 
Romans15:20 Nirinze ariko kuyamamaza ahandi handi usibye aho izina rya Kristu ritazwi, kugira ngo ntavaho nubaka mu kibanza cy’undi," 
Romans15:21 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Abatamumenyeshejwe bazamubona, n’abatamwumvise bazamumenya.»" 
Romans15:22 Ngicyo icyambujije kenshi kuza iwanyu. 
Romans15:23 None ubu ngubu, ubwo ntagifite ahandi nshigaje mu birere by’ino, nkaba kandi narifuje kuza iwanyu kuva imyaka n’imyaka," 
Romans15:24 igihe nzerekeza muri Hispaniya... Koko rero ndizera kuzababona mpita, nyuma mukamperekeza, maze kubashira urukumbuzi ho gato." 
Romans15:25 Ubu ngubu ariko ngiye i Yeruzalemu kwita ku batagatifujwe. 
Romans15:26 Kuko ab’i Masedoniya n’abo muri Akaya biyemeje kugira icyo basaranganya n’abatagatifujwe b’i Yeruzalemu bakennye. 
Romans15:27 Koko rero barabyiyemeje kandi barabibagombaga. Kuko niba amahanga yarasangiye na bo ibyiza byabo by’umutima, agomba kubafashisha ibyiza by’umubiri." 
Romans15:28 Ibyo rero nimbirangiza, maze kubashyikiriza ku mugaragaro uwo musaruro, nzabanyuraho njya muri Hispaniya." 
Romans15:29 Kandi nzi ko ninza iwanyu, nzazana umugisha wose wa Kristu." 
Romans15:30 Bavandimwe kandi, ndabinginga ku bw’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu no ku bw’urukundo rwa Roho Mutagatifu, ngo muntabaze amasengesho munturira Imana," 
Romans15:31 kugira ngo nkire abo mu Yudeya batemera, maze imfashanyo njyanye i Yeruzalemu izanyure abatagatifujwe;" 
Romans15:32 bityo nshobore kuza iwanyu nishimye, maze Imana nibishaka, nzaruhukane namwe." 
Romans15:33 Imana, Yo soko y’amahoro, nibane namwe mwese! Amen." 
Romans16:1 Mbashinze mushiki wacu Foyibe, umudiyakonikazi mu Kiliziya y’i Kenkireya," 
Romans16:2 kugira ngo mumwakire muri Nyagasani nk’uko bikwiriye abatagatifujwe, kandi ngo muzamufashe mu byo yabakeneraho byose, kuko na we yatabaye benshi, barimo jye." 
Romans16:3 Mutashye Purisika na Akwila, abafasha banjye muri Kristu Yezu;" 
Romans16:4 abo ni bo bishyize mu kaga, kugira ngo barwane ku buzima bwanjye. Si jye jyenyine ubashimira, ahubwo na Kiliziya zose z’abanyamahanga." 
Romans16:5 Mutashye na Kiliziya ijya iteranira mu rugo rwabo. Mutashye incuti yanjye Epayineto, we muganura Aziya yahaye Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Mutashye Mariya wabavunikiye cyane. 
Romans16:7 Mutashye bene wacu Andironiki na Yuniya, twasangiye umunyururu; ni intumwa z’ibirangirire kandi babaye aba Kristu mbere yanjye." 
Romans16:8 Mutashye Ampiliyato, incuti yanjye muri Nyagasani." 
Romans16:9 Muntahirize Urubano umufasha wanjye muri Kristu, ndetse na Sitaki incuti yanjye." 
Romans16:10 Muntahirize kwa Arisitobuli. 
Romans16:11 Muntahirize mwene wacu Herodiyoni. Muntahirize abo kwa Narisisi bari muri Nyagasani. 
Romans16:12 Muramutse Tirifayina na Tirifoza baruhira cyane Nyagasani. Mundamukirize inkoramutima Perisida, na we uvunikira cyane Nyagasani." 
Romans16:13 Muramutse Rufo, intore muri Nyagasani, ndetse na nyina ari we wanjye." 
Romans16:14 Mutashye Asinkirito, Filegonti, Erimesi, Patiroba, Herimasi n’abavandimwe bari kumwe na bo." 
Romans16:15 Muramutse Filologo na Yuliya, Nereyi na mushiki we, na Olimpiya n’abatagatifujwe bari kumwe na bo." 
Romans16:16 Nimuramukanye mu muhoberano mutagatifu. Kiliziya zose za Kristu zirabatashya. 
Romans16:17 Ndabinginze kandi, bavandimwe, mwitondere abazana amacakubiri n’ingero mbi, bakanyuranya n’inyigisho mwahawe; mubagendere kure." 
Romans16:18 Bene abo ntibakorera Kristu Umwami wacu, ahubwo inda yabo, maze amagambo yabo y’uburyarya n’ubucakura akayobya imitima itagira iribi." 
Romans16:19 Ukumvira kwanyu kwamenyekanye hose; ndabishimiye rero ariko ndashaka ko muba abahanga mu gukora icyiza n’abaswa mu gukora ikibi. 
Romans16:20 Imana, Yo soko y’amahoro, izajanjagurira Sekibi mu nsi y’ibirenge byanyu vuba. Ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu ibane namwe!" 
Romans16:21 Timote, umufasha wanjye, arabatashya, na bene wacu Lusiyo, na Yasoni, na Sosipateri." 
Romans16:22 Nanjye ndabatashya muri Nyagasani, jyewe Teritiyo wanditse uru rwandiko." 
Romans16:23 Arabatashya Gayusi uncumbikiye jye na Kiliziya yose. 
Romans16:24 Arabaramutsa Erasito umubikamari w’umugi, n’umuvandimwe Kuwariti." 
Romans16:25 Nihasingizwe Imana, Yo ifite ububasha bwo kubakomeza bihuje n’Inkuru Nziza nabashyikirije namamaza Yezu Kristu, nkurikije iyobera ryari ryaracecetswe kuva kera kose," 
Romans16:26 ubu rikaba ryahishuriwe abanyamahanga bose, rikagaragarira mu byanditswe by’abahanuzi. Nguko uko Imana Ihoraho yabigennye kugira ngo na bo ibageze ku kwemera bayumvire." 
Romans16:27 Imana Nyir’ubuhanga nihabwe ikuzo muri Yezu Kristu, uko ibihe bihora bisimburana iteka. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, watorewe kuba intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, uko Imana yabishatse, hamwe n’umuvandimwe wacu Sositeni," 
1Corinthians1:2 kuri Kiliziya y’Imana iri i Korinti, ari yo mwebwe abatagatifurijwe muri Yezu Kristu, mugahamagarirwa kuba intungane hamwe n’abandi bose biyambaza, aho bari hose, izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, Umwami wabo n’uwacu:" 
1Corinthians1:3 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana, Umubyeyi wacu, no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Mpora nshimira Imana yanjye kubera mwebwe, nibuka ineza yayo mwaherewe muri Kristu Yezu." 
1Corinthians1:5 Koko rero Imana yabasenderejeho ingabire z’amoko yose muri We, cyane cyane iyo kumumenya no kumumenyesha abandi." 
1Corinthians1:6 Bityo guhamya Kristu mukaba mwarabyikomejemo," 
1Corinthians1:7 ku buryo nta ngabire n’imwe y’Imana mubuze, mu gihe mugitegereje ukwigaragaza kwa Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu." 
1Corinthians1:8 Ni we uzabakomeza kugeza mu ndunduro, kugira ngo muzabe muri indakemwa, kuri uwo munsi wa Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Ni indahemuka, Imana yabahamagariye kugirana ubumwe n’Umwana wayo Yezu Kristu, Umwami wacu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Bavandimwe, mbinginze mu izina ry’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, ngo muhuze ibitekerezo, mwirinde kwicamo ibice; ahubwo muhuze umutima n’umugambi." 
1Corinthians1:11 Koko rero, bavandimwe, abo kwa Kolowe bambwiye ko mwifitemo amakimbirane." 
1Corinthians1:12 Icyo nshaka kuvuga ni uko buri muntu muri mwe agira ati «Jyewe ndi uwa Pawulo!» Undi ati «Jyewe ndi uwa Apolo!» Undi ati «Jyewe, ndi uwa Kefasi!» Undi ati «Jyewe ndi uwa Kristu!»" 
1Corinthians1:13 Mbese Kristu yaba agabanijemo ibice? Mbese ni Pawulo wababambiwe ku musaraba? Cyangwa se mwabatijwe mu izina rya Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndashimira Imana kuba nta n’umwe muri mwe nabatije, usibye Kirisipo na Gayo;" 
1Corinthians1:15 ku buryo nta n’umwe uzavuga ko yabatijwe mu izina ryanjye! 
1Corinthians1:16 Cyakora koko nabatije n’umuryango wa Sitefana, nkaba numva nta wundi wundi nabatije." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kuko Kristu atanyohereje kubatiza, ahubwo yantumye kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza, atari mu magambo y’ubuhanga ngo hato umusaraba wa Kristu udakurizaho guta agaciro." 
1Corinthians1:18 Mu by’ukuri, kwamamaza urupfu rwa Kristu ku musaraba bisa n’amahomvu ku bari mu nzira yo korama, ariko ku bari mu nzira yo gukira ari bo twe, ni ububasha bw’Imana." 
1Corinthians1:19 Kuko handitswe ngo «Nzasenya ubuhanga bw’abahanga kandi nzarimbura ubwenge bw’abanyabwenge.» 
1Corinthians1:20 Mbese uw’umuhanga ari he? Uw’umunyabwenge ari hehe? Uw’intyoza mu by’iyi si ari he? Ko ubanza ubuhanga bw’iyi si Imana yarabuhinduye amahomvu? 
1Corinthians1:21 Koko rero, isi ku bwenge bwayo ntiyashoboye kumenyera Imana mu bigaragaza ubuhanga bwayo; ni yo mpamvu Imana yihitiyemo gukiza abemera, ikoresheje ubusazi bw’iyamamazabutumwa." 
1Corinthians1:22 Mu gihe Abayahudi bigomba ibitangaza, naho Abagereki bashimikiriye iby’ubuhanga," 
1Corinthians1:23 twebweho twamamaza Kristu wabambwe ku musaraba, bigashengura Abayahudi, kandi bikitwa ibisazi ku Bagereki." 
1Corinthians1:24 Naho ku batowe, baba Abayahudi cyangwa Abagereki, Kristu uwo ni we bubasha bw’Imana n’ubuhanga bwayo." 
1Corinthians1:25 Kuko icyakwitwa ibisazi ariko giturutse ku Mana gitambutse kure ubuhanga bw’abantu, kandi icyakwitwa intege nke giturutse ku Mana gisumbye imbaraga z’abantu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Bavandimwe rero, mwebwe abatowe n’Imana, nimurebe uko muteye: murasanga ku bw’abantu nta bahanga benshi babarimo, nta n’ibihangange byinshi bibarimo, ndetse nta na benshi bafite amavuko y’ikirenga." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ahubwo rero ibyo abantu bita ibisazi, ni byo Imana yihitiyemo ngo irindagize abiyita abahanga; kandi ibinyantege nke ku bantu, ni byo Imana yitoreye ngo isuzuguze abanyamaboko;" 
1Corinthians1:28 byongeye, abatagira amavuko b’insuzugurwa ni bo Imana yihitiyemo ngo ihindure ubusa abiyita imbonera;" 
1Corinthians1:29 kugira ngo hatagira umuntu n’umwe wikuza imbere y’Imana. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ni yo mukesha kuba muri Kristu Yezu, we watubereye ku bw’Imana ubuhanga n’ubutungane, akaba ari we kandi udutagatifuza akanaturokora." 
1Corinthians1:31 Mbese nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Ushaka kwirata wese, niyiratire muri Nyagasani.»" 
1Corinthians2:1 Bavandimwe, igihe niyiziye ubwanjye iwanyu kwamamaza amabanga y’Imana, sinakoresheje amagambo y’akarimi keza cyangwa y’ubwenge." 
1Corinthians2:2 Koko rero nta kindi kindi nashatse kwibandaho usibye kubamenyesha Yezu Kristu, kandi Yezu Kristu wabambwe ku musaraba." 
1Corinthians2:3 Igihe nari kumwe namwe, nari mfite intege nke, ntinya kandi ndagadwa," 
1Corinthians2:4 kandi amagambo nakoresheje mbamamazamo Inkuru Nziza nta ho yari ahuriye n’iby’ubwenge buhanitse, ahubwo yabemeje ku bw’ububasha bwa Roho w’Imana." 
1Corinthians2:5 Bityo, ukwemera kwanyu kukaba kudashingiye ku bwenge bw’abantu, ahubwo ku bubasha bw’Imana." 
1Corinthians2:6 Nyamara, abamaze gukomera mu kwemera turababwira iby’ubuhanga, ariko butari ubuhanga bw’iyi si, cyangwa bukomoka ku bagenga b’iyi si kuko bariho batariho." 
1Corinthians2:7 Ubuhanga bw’Imana tubagezaho ni ibanga Imana yari yarazigamiye kuva kera kose kuduhesha ikuzo. 
1Corinthians2:8 Nta n’umwe wo mu bagenga b’iyi si wigeze aritahura, kuko iyo baza kuritahura, ntibaba barabambye Umwami w’ikuzo." 
1Corinthians2:9 Ariko bihuje n’uko byanditswe ngo «Icyo ijisho ritabonye, icyo ugutwi kutumvise, kandi ntikizamuke mu mutima wa muntu, ni cyo Imana yateguriye abayikunda.»" 
1Corinthians2:10 Ni twebwe rero Imana yabiseruriye ku bwa Roho wayo; kandi Roho uwo acengera byose, kugeza no ku mayobera y’Imana." 
1Corinthians2:11 Koko rero, ni nde wundi wamenya akari mu mutima w’umuntu, uretse nyirawo nyine? Ni na ko rero nta wamenya amabanga y’Imana, uretse Roho wayo nyine." 
1Corinthians2:12 Twebwe koko si ubwenge bw’isi twahawe, ahubwo ni Roho ukomoka ku Mana twahawe kugira ngo tumenye ibyiza Imana yatugabiye ku buntu." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ibyo turabibigisha, tutifashishije imvugo y’ubuhanga bw’abantu, ahubwo twishingikirije ubuhanga bwa Roho uduha gusobanura ibya Roho mu magambo abigenewe." 
1Corinthians2:14 Umuntu ugengwa na kamere ye gusa ntashobora kwumva ibya Roho w’Imana; koko rero, kuri we ni nk’ibisazi, maze ntashobore kubyumva, kuko bene ibyo biserurirwa muri Roho wenyine." 
1Corinthians2:15 Naho umuntu uyoborwa na Roho w’Imana asobanukirwa muri byose, akaba kandi nta we ushobora kumuhinyuza." 
1Corinthians2:16 Koko se «Ni nde wamenye ibitekerezo bya Nyagasani ngo akurizeho kumwungura inama?» Nyamara twebwe twifitemo ibitekerezo bya Kristu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Bavandimwe, sinashoboye kuvugana namwe nk’ubwira abantu bayoborwa na Roho w’Imana, ahubwo nababwiye nk’uvugana n’abantu bakigengwa na kamere yabo gusa, mbese nk’abakiri ibitambambuga muri Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabatungishije amata, sinabagaburira ibyo kurya bikomeye, kuko mutari kubibasha. Ndetse n’ubu ntimurabibasha," 
1Corinthians3:3 kuko mukiri ab’iyi si. None se ko mukirangwa n’ishyari n’amakimbirane, ibyo ntibigaragaza ko mukiri ab’iyi si, mukaba mwitwaye bya runtu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Iyo umwe avuga ati «Ndi uwa Pawulo», undi ati «Ndi uwa Apolo», ubwo se ntimukurikiza amatwara ya runtu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Ngaho nimumbwire: Apolo ni iki? Pawulo ni iki? Si abagaragu babagejeje ku kwemera; buri wese akoresheje ingabire yahawe na Nyagasani! 
1Corinthians3:6 Jyewe nateye imbuto, Apolo arayuhira, ariko Imana yonyine ni yo yayikujije." 
1Corinthians3:7 Bityo, uwateye nta cyo ari cyo, n’uwuhiye ni uko; Imana yonyine irihagije, yo itanga gukura." 
1Corinthians3:8 Nyir’ukubiba na nyir’ukuhira nta ho bataniye; buri wese azahabwa igihembo gihwanye n’umurimo yakoze. 
1Corinthians3:9 Twembi turi abafasha b’Imana, mwe mukaba umurima wayo n’inzu yiyubakira." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ku bw’ingabire nahawe n’Imana, nashije ikibanza nk’umufundi w’umuhanga, undi acyubakamo. Nyamara buri wese yitondere uburyo yubaka." 
1Corinthians3:11 Nta kindi kibanza kindi gishobora guhangwa, usibye igisanzwe: Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Niba rero kuri icyo kibanza umuntu yubakishijemo zahabu, feza, amabuye y’agaciro, ibiti, ibyatsi cyangwa ibikenyeri," 
1Corinthians3:13 umurimo wa buri wese uzagaragazwa ku munsi w’urubanza. Ni bwo byose bizasuzumwa n’umuriro, ari wo uzatangaza agaciro k’umurimo wa buri wese." 
1Corinthians3:14 Uzaba yarubatse muri icyo kibanza kandi umurimo we ugahonoka, azahembwa." 
1Corinthians3:15 Naho nyir’umurimo uzaba wakongotse, azabura igihembo; gukira we azakira, ariko nk’uwiyatse umuriro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Ubwo se ntimuzi ko muri ingoro y’Imana, kandi ko Roho w’Imana abatuyemo?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Nihagira rero usenya ingoro y’Imana, Imana na we izamusenya. Kuko ingoro y’Imana ari ntagatifu, kandi iyo ngoro ni mwebwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ntihakagire uwihenda: niba hari uwikekaho kuba umuhanga ku bw’iyi si, nabanze yihindure umusazi kugira ngo abe umunyabwenge nyakuri;" 
1Corinthians3:19 kuko ubuhanga bw’iyi si ari ubusazi mu maso y’Imana, nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Ni Yo ifatira abanyabwenge mu mutego w’uburiganya bwabo»," 
1Corinthians3:20 kandi ngo «Nyagasani acengera ibitekerezo by’abahanga, agasanga byose ari amanjwe.»" 
1Corinthians3:21 Ku bw’iyo mpamvu rero, ntihakagire ushingira ikuzo rye ku bantu, kuko byose ari ibyanyu:" 
1Corinthians3:22 yaba Pawulo, yaba Apolo cyangwa Kefasi, yaba isi, bwaba ubugingo cyangwa urupfu, byaba ibiriho cyangwa ibizaza, byose ni ibyanyu," 
1Corinthians3:23 naho mwebwe muri aba Kristu, na We Kristu akaba uw’Imana." 
1Corinthians4:1 Buri wese rero natubonemo abagaragu ba Kristu n’abagabuzi b’amabanga y’Imana. 
1Corinthians4:2 Kandi icyo abagabuzi batezweho si ikindi kindi atari ukuba indahemuka. 
1Corinthians4:3 Jyeweho, sintewe inkeke n’uko mwancira urubanza, cyangwa ko narucirwa n’urukiko rw’abantu, ndetse nanjye ubwanjye sindwicira." 
1Corinthians4:4 Nyamara n’ubwo nta kibi niyumva mu mutima, ibyo si byo bingira umwere; Nyagasani wenyine ni we uncira urubanza." 
1Corinthians4:5 Namwe rero ntimugace imanza igihe kitaragera, mutegereze ko Nyagasani azaza, agashyira ahabona ibihishwe mu mwijima, akanatangaza ibyo umutima ubundikiye. Ubwo ni bwo Imana izaha buri wese ishimwe rimukwiye." 
1Corinthians4:6 Muri ibyo byose, bavandimwe, nifuje ko tubabera urugero, ari jyewe, ari n’Apolo, kugira ngo mwitoze kutirata murwanirira ishyaka uyu cyangwa uriya." 
1Corinthians4:7 Mu by’ukuri, ni iki kigusumbije abandi? Ni iki utunze, waba utahawe? Niba se waragihawe, ni iki cyatuma wirata nk’aho utagihawe?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Dore muratengamaye! Dore mwarikungahaje! Yewe mwabaye abami, twe tutarimo. Ubonye mwakwimitswe, kugira ngo natwe twimikanwe namwe!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Jye uko mbibona, twebwe intumwa, Imana isa n’iyadushyize inyuma y’abandi, nk’abaciriwe urwo gupfa; koko rero twahinduwe agashungero k’isi, n’ak’abamalayika n’abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Twebweho turi abasazi ku mpamvu ya Kristu, naho mwe mukaba abanyabwenge muri Kristu; twebwe turi abanyantege nke, naho mwe murakomeye; murubashywe, naho twe turasuzuguritse." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kugeza magingo aya, turicwa n’inzara, dufite inyota, twambaye ubusa, turakubitwa, turabuyerezwa," 
1Corinthians4:12 kandi turacogozwa no gukoresha amaboko yacu. Baradutuka tukabifuriza umugisha; baradutoteza tukihangana; 
1Corinthians4:13 baradusebya twe tugahoza abandi! Twahinduwe nk’icyavu cy’isi, kugeza na n’ubu batugize ibicibwa mu bantu." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ibyo simbyandikiye kubakoza isoni, ahubwo ni ukubaburira nk’abana banjye nkunda." 
1Corinthians4:15 N’aho mwagira ibihumbi n’ibihumbi by’abarezi muri Kristu, ababyeyi banyu si benshi, kuko ari jyewe wabibyariye muri Yezu Kristu ku bw’Inkuru Nziza." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndabinginze rero, nimukurikize urugero nabahaye." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ni na yo mpamvu mboherereje Timote, umwana wanjye nkunda kandi indahemuka muri Nyagasani; azabibutsa imibereho yanjye muri Kristu, mbese nk’uko mbyigisha muri za kiliziya zose." 
1Corinthians4:18 Bamwe muri mwe bibwiye ko ntazagaruka iwanyu, batangira kwitera hejuru." 
1Corinthians4:19 Nyamara, Nyagasani nabishaka, nzabagarukamo vuba, maze aho kwibanda ku magambo y’abo birasi, nzirebere ibikorwa byabo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kuko Ubwami bw’Imana atari amagambo, ahubwo bushingiye ku bikorwa." 
1Corinthians4:21 Mbese icyo mwahitamo ni iki? Ko nabazanamo inkoni, cyangwa se urukundo n’umutima ugwa neza?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Inkuru yaramamaye hose y’uko muri mwe hari ubusambanyi, ndetse ubusambanyi bukabije, butaraboneka no mu banyamahanga: baravuga ko umwe muri mwe atunze muka se!" 
1Corinthians5:2 None mwe muritera hejuru! Aho kuba mwaragize ishavu, ngo nyir’ugukora ibyo abirukanwemo!" 
1Corinthians5:3 Jyewe rero, n’ubwo ku bw’amaso mbari kure, ku mutima turi kumwe, nkaba nararangije gucira urubanza uwakoze ayo mahano, nk’aho nahibereye." 
1Corinthians5:4 Ngaho rero, nimukoranire mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, maze ku bubasha bwe, nanjye mbashyigikiye," 
1Corinthians5:5 uwo muntu yegurirwe Sekibi ngo ababazwe muri ubu buzima, maze ahazaza azarokoke ku munsi wa Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ibyo mwiratana nta byo! Mbese ntimuzi ko agasemburo gake gatutumbya ifu yose? 
1Corinthians5:7 Nimwiyunyuguzemo rero umusemburo wose ushaje, kugira ngo mubone kuba nk’umugati mushya, udasembuye. Kuko Kristu, ari we Ntama ya Pasika yacu, yishweho igitambo." 
1Corinthians5:8 Niduhimbaze rero uwo munsi mukuru, tudakoresheje umusemburo ushaje ari wo w’ubugiranabi n’ubukozi bw’ibibi, ahubwo dukoreshe imigati idasembuye, ari yo ubumanzi n’ukuri." 
1Corinthians5:9 Hanyuma kandi, mu ibaruwa mperutse kubandikira, mbihanangiriza kutivanga n’abasambanyi," 
1Corinthians5:10 sinashakaga kuvuga abasambanyi bose iyo bava bakagera, cyangwa se abanyabugugu, abambuzi, n’abasenga ibigirwamana, kuko bibaye ibyo mwagombye kuva kuri iyi si." 
1Corinthians5:11 Mu by’ukuri rero, nabandikiye mbabuza kugenderana n’umuntu wiyita umuvandimwe, kandi ari umusambanyi, umunyabugugu, usenga ibigirwamana, usebanya, umusinzi, cyangwa umwambuzi ndetse n’umuntu nk’uwo nguwo ntimukanasangire." 
1Corinthians5:12 Mpuriye he no gucira imanza abo tudafitanye isano? Mwebwe se abo mukemanga si ababarimo rwagati? 
1Corinthians5:13 Abo hanze ni Imana izabacira urubanza. (Mugenze rero nk’uko byanditswe ngo) «Nimuvane inkozi z’ibibi muri mwe rwagati.» 
1Corinthians6:1 Igihe umwe muri mwe afite icyo apfa n’undi, atinyuka ate kumuregera abadatunganye, aho kumuhanisha mu batagatifujwe?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Cyangwa se, ntimuzi ko abatagatifu ari bo bazacira isi urubanza? Niba rero ari mwe muzacira isi urubanza, mwananirwa mute gukiranura ibyoroheje?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Ntimuzi ndetse ko n’abamalayika tuzabacira urubanza, nkanswe rero ibyo muri iki gihe?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Niba rero mufite imanza z’ubwo bwoko, kuki mutinyuka kuzegurira abo Kiliziya itizeye?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Mbivugiye kubakoza isoni, ubwo koko nta muntu n’umwe muri mwe waba usheshe akanguhe ngo akiranure abavandimwe?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Dore umuvandimwe araburanya umuvandimwe, kandi bikabera imbere y’abatemera!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Ibyo ari byo byose muba mwiyandaritse igihe mukurubana mu nkiko. Kuki mutihanganira kurenganywa? Kuki mutihanganira ko babahuguza? 
1Corinthians6:8 Nyamara ni mwe murenganya kandi mugahuguza abandi, abo bandi kandi ni abavandimwe banyu!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Mbese ntimuzi ko abadatunganye batazagira umugabane mu Ngoma y'Imana? Muramenye ntimwishunge! Ari abasambanyi, ari abasenga ibigirwamana, ari indaya, ari abararikirana nyamara bahuje ibitsina, ari abakora ingeso mbi bose," 
1Corinthians6:10 kimwe n’abajura, abanyabugugu, abasinzi, abasebanya, abambuzi, abo bose ntibazagira umugabane mu Ngoma y'Imana." 
1Corinthians6:11 Nguko uko bamwe muri mwe bari bameze. None, mwarasukuwe, mwaratagatifujwe muba intungane ku bw’izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, no ku bwa Roho w’Imana yacu." 
1Corinthians6:12 (Bamwe muri mwe baravuga bati) «Byose mbifitiye uburenganzira »; nyamara byose ntibimfitiye akamaro. «Byose mbifitiye uburenganzira»; yee! ariko jye sinzemera ko hagira ikintu na kimwe kinziga. 
1Corinthians6:13 Ibiribwa byagenewe inda, inda na yo igenerwa ibiribwa, simbihakana; nyamara byombi Imana izabisenya. Cyakora umubiri ntiwagenewe gusambana, ni uwa Nyagasani; Nyagasani akaba ari we uwugenga." 
1Corinthians6:14 None rero Imana yazuye Nyagasani, izatuzura natwe ku bw’ububasha bwayo." 
1Corinthians6:15 Ntimuzi se ko imibiri yanyu ari ingingo za Kristu? Hanyuma rero nzafate ingingo za Kristu maze nzigire ingingo z’ihabara? Ntibikavugwe! 
1Corinthians6:16 Ntimuzi se ko usambanye n’ihabara aba abaye umubiri umwe na yo? Ni ko byanditswe ngo «Bombi bazaba umubiri umwe.» 
1Corinthians6:17 Naho uwibumbira kuri Nyagasani, aba agize umutima umwe na we." 
1Corinthians6:18 Ubusambanyi nimubugendere kure. Icyaha cyose umuntu akoze, usibye icyo, ntikigera ku mubiri we; ariko usambana aba acumuriye umubiri we bwite." 
1Corinthians6:19 Ubundi se ntimuzi ko umubiri wanyu ari ingoro ya Roho Mutagatifu ubatuyemo, kandi ukomoka ku Mana, maze mukaba nta bubasha mwifiteho?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Mwacungujwe igiciro gihambaye! Nimusingirize rero Imana mu mubiri wanyu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Noneho ngeze ku byo mwanyandikiye. Uko mbona, ibyiza ni uko umugabo atakwegera umugore." 
1Corinthians7:2 Ariko kugira ngo mwirinde ingeso mbi, buri mugabo nagire umugore we, na buri mugore agire umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:3 Umugabo ntakwiriye kwiyima umugore we, bityo n’umugore ku mugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:4 Umugore ntiyigenga ku mubiri we, ugengwa n’umugabo we; n’umugabo ntiyigenga ku mubiri we, ugengwa n’umugore we." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ntihakagire uwiyima undi, keretse mubyumvikanyeho, na bwo by’igihe gito, kugira ngo muhugukire gusenga; hanyuma musubirane, ngo hato mutananirwa kwigomwa, Sekibi agakurizaho kubashuka." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ibyo mbabwiye, ndabibemereye gusa; simbibategetse." 
1Corinthians7:7 Nakwifuza yuko abantu bose bamera nkanjye, ariko buri wese afite ingabire ye bwite yiherewe n’Imana, umwe iye, undi iye." 
1Corinthians7:8 Icyo mbwira abatarashaka n’abapfakazi ni uko bakwigumira batyo, kimwe nanjye." 
1Corinthians7:9 Nyamara niba badashoboye kwihangana, nibashake; kuko ikiruta ari ugushyingirwa aho kwicwa n’irari." 
1Corinthians7:10 Dore icyo ntegetse abashakanye, atari jyewe ahubwo ni Nyagasani: umugore ntagatandukane n’umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:11 — niba batandukanye, ntakongere gushaka cyangwa yigorore n’umugabo we — n’umugabo ntakirukane umugore we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Abandi basigaye mbabwiye ku giti cyanjye, si Nyagasani ubwe ubivuga: niba hari umuvandimwe ufite umugore utaremera Kristu maze akishimira ko babana, ntakamwirukane." 
1Corinthians7:13 Niba kandi umugore afite umugabo utaremera, maze akishimira ko babana, ntagatandukane n’uwo umugabo." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kuko umugabo utemera atagatifuzwa n’umugore we, kimwe n’uko umugore utemera atagatifuzwa n’umugabo we. Byaba bitabaye ibyo, abana banyu baba babuze ubuntungane, kandi ubundi baratagatifujwe." 
1Corinthians7:15 Niba utemera ashatse gutandukana, nabigire! Icyo gihe umuvandimwe wacu, cyangwa mushiki wacu, aba abohowe, kuko Imana yabahamagariye kubaho mu mahoro." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ni ko se, wa mugore we, wabwirwa n’iki ko uzakiza umugabo wawe? Nawe wa mugabo we, wabwirwa n’iki ko uzakiza umugore wawe?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Ubundi rero buri muntu akomeze kubaho nk’uko Nyagasani yabimugeneye, mbese uko yari ari igihe Imana imuhamagaye; ni yo mabwiriza mpaye za Kiliziya zose." 
1Corinthians7:18 Niba hari uwahamagawe yarabanje kugenywa, ntakabihishahishe. Niba kandi hari utagenywe, ntakigenyeshe." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ari ukugenywa, cyangwa ukutagenywa, byose nta kavuro; icya ngombwa ni ugukurikiza amategeko y’Imana." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buri wese nagume uko yari ameze igihe ahamagawe. 
1Corinthians7:21 Mbese wahamagawe uri umucakara? Ibyo ntibiguhangayike; ndetse n’iyo waba wizeye kuzigobotora, ntibikubuze ituze mu bucakara bwawe." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kuko uwo Nyagasani yahamagariye mu bucakara, aba ari umwigenge muri Nyagasani. Kimwe n’uko uwahamagawe yigenga, aba ari umugaragu wa Kristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mwacungujwe igiciro gihambaye; ntimukisubize mu bucakara bw’abantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Buri wese, bavandimwe, nagume uko yari ameze igihe atowe n’Imana." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ku byerekeye ingaragu n’inkumi nta tegeko rya Nyagasani mbafitiye; ahubwo ndabagira inama y’umuntu wagiriwe impuhwe na Nyagasani kandi ukwiye kwizerwa. 
1Corinthians7:26 Ibyiza ni uko baguma uko bameze, kubera ingorane zo muri iki gihe. Rwose ndabona ko ibyiza ari uko umuntu yakwigumira uko ameze." 
1Corinthians7:27 Mbese usanganywe umugore? Witandukana na we. Mbese nta mugore washatse? Wigira uwo ushaka. 
1Corinthians7:28 Nyamara niba umushatse, nta cyaha ukoze; n’umukobwa aramutse ashyingiwe, nta cyaha aba akoze. Ariko abo ngabo bazahura n’ingorane z’urudaca, ari zo nifuzaga kubarinda." 
1Corinthians7:29 Mbibabwire rero, bavandimwe, igihe kirabashirana. Aho bigeze, abafite abagore nibabeho nk’aho batabagize;" 
1Corinthians7:30 abarira bamere nk’aho batarira; abanezerewe bamere nk’aho batanezerewe; n’abacuruza bamere nk’aho nta cyo batunze; 
1Corinthians7:31 n’abakoresha iby’iyi si ntibagatwarwe na byo, kuko imisusire y’iyi si ihita bwangu." 
1Corinthians7:32 Icyo nabifuriza ni ukubaho nta mpagarara. Umuntu utashatse ahihibikanira ibyerekeye Nyagasani, ashaka uko yanyura Imana." 
1Corinthians7:33 Naho ufite umugore aharanira iby’isi, ashakashaka uko yanyura umugore we," 
1Corinthians7:34 maze akaba yisatuyemo kabiri. Bityo, n’umugore cyangwa umukobwa batashatse bahihibikanira ibyerekeye Nyagasani, ngo bamutunganire ku mubiri no ku mutima. Naho umugore washatse aharanira iby’isi, ashakashaka uko yashimisha umugabo we." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kubafasha, atari umutego mbagushamo, ahubwo ari ukugira ngo mukore ikirushijeho gutungana kandi mwegukire Nyagasani, nta nkomyi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Niba umusore asanze ko yaba ahemukiye umukobwa yasabye badashyingiranwe kandi yumva amufitiye irari, nibashyingiranwe uko bisanzwe, kuko ari ko abishaka, kandi nta cyaha kirimo." 
1Corinthians7:37 Nyamara niba uwo musore yiyemeje mu mutima we kudashakana n’uwo mukobwa, nta gahato kamuriho, ahubwo abikuye ku bwende bwe, azaba agize neza." 
1Corinthians7:38 Bityo, ushyingiwe aba agize neza, ariko udashyingiwe aba arushijeho kugira neza." 
1Corinthians7:39 Umugore ahambiriye ku mugabo we igihe cyose akiriho. Nyamara uwo mugabo aramutse apfuye, umugore afite uburenganzira bwo kwishakira undi mugabo yishimiye, ariko wo mu bemera gusa." 
1Corinthians7:40 Cyakora uko mbyumva, yarushaho kugubwa neza yigumiye aho; kandi ndakeka ko nanjye mfite Roho w’Imana." 
1Corinthians8:1 Ku byerekeye inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana ni koko: twese tubifitemo ubujijuke (nk’uko mubivuga). Nyamara ubumenyi butera kwirata, naho urukundo rukajijura." 
1Corinthians8:2 Niba hari uwibwira ko hari icyo azi, ntarageza aho kumenya uko bikwiye." 
1Corinthians8:3 Ariko niba hari ukunda Imana, uwo nguwo azwi n’Imana." 
1Corinthians8:4 None se byaba byemewe kurya inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana? Tuzi ko nta kigirwamana kibaho ku isi, kandi ko nta yindi mana iriho, usibye Imana imwe rukumbi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Koko, n’ubwo hariho ibyitwa imana byinshi mu ijuru no ku isi — koko kandi ibigirwamana n’ibikomerezwa ntibibarika! —" 
1Corinthians8:6 kuri twe habaho Imana imwe, ari yo Mubyeyi, byose biturukaho, ari na Yo tugana; hakabaho na Nyagasani umwe, Yezu Kristu, ari We ubeshaho byose, natwe tukabeshwaho na We."
