1Corinthians8:7 Ariko bose si ko babifitemo ubujijuke. Hariho bamwe bakiva mu by’ibigirwamana, maze baba bariye inyama zabituwe, umutimanama wabo udakomeye ukabemeza ko bahumanye." 
1Corinthians8:8 Mu by’ukuri si ibiribwa bizatugeza ku Mana; tubiriye, tutabiriye, nta cyo tuzaba duhombye cyangwa twungutse." 
1Corinthians8:9 Cyakora mwitondere ubwo burenganzira mubifitemo, ngo hato butagusha abanyantege nke." 
1Corinthians8:10 Koko se umunyantege nke aramutse akubonye urira mu ngoro y’ibigirwamana, kandi witwa ko ujijutse, ntiyaboneraho akarya izo nyama zatuwe ibigirwamana, kandi umutima we utabimwemerera?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Bityo rero ubujijuke bwawe buzaba bugushije umunyantege nke, kandi ari umuvandimwe Kristu yapfiriye." 
1Corinthians8:12 Muri uko gucumurira abavandimwe banyu mubakomeretsa ku mutima usanzwe udakomeye, ubwo ni Kristu muba mucumuriye." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kubera iyo mpamvu, niba ibyo kurya bigusha umuvandimwe wanjye, nzazinukwa inyama burundu, aho kugusha umuvandimwe wanjye." 
1Corinthians9:1 Mbese jye simfite ubwigenge? Mbese sindi intumwa? Mbese jye sinabonye Yezu Umwami wacu? Mbese si mwe musaruro wanjye muri Nyagasani? 
1Corinthians9:2 Niba ku bandi ntari intumwa, nibura ndi yo kuri mwebwe, kuko ukuri k’ubutumwa Nyagasani yanshinze kubagaragariramo." 
1Corinthians9:3 Dore icyo nsubiza abaninura. 
1Corinthians9:4 Mbese twebwe ntitwagira uburenganzira bwo guhabwa ibyo kurya no kunywa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Mbese twe ntitwashobora kugendana n’umugore duhuje ukwemera, nk’uko izindi ntumwa, n’abavandimwe ba Nyagasani, na Kefasi babigenza?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Cyangwa se tuzabe ari twe twenyine, jyewe na Barinaba, duhatirwa gukorera ibidutunga?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Ni iyihe ngabo yagiye ku rugamba, kandi igomba no kwigemurira? Ni nde wahinga umuzabibu, ntawuryeho imbuto? Cyangwa se ni nde wakorora ubushyo, maze ntanywe amata yabwo?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Ibyo se byaba bishingiye gusa ku matwara y’abantu, cyangwa ahubwo bishyigikiwe n’Amategeko y’Imana?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Koko mu Mategeko ya Musa haranditswe ngo «Ntuzahambire umunwa w’ikimasa kivungagura ingano.» Ubwo se Imana yaba koko ishishikajwe n’ibimasa? 
1Corinthians9:10 Ahubwo si twebwe ibivugira? Ni koko, ibyo ni twebwe byandikiwe; kuko uhinga wese ahingana icyizere, n’uhura ingano akagira icyizere cyo guhabwa umugabane we." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ubwo twababibyemo imbuto z’Imana, murasanga bikabije ko dusarura ku byo mutunze?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Niba abandi babafiteho ubwo burenganzira, twe twabuzwa n’iki kububagiriraho? Nyamara nta bwo twigeze tubwitwaza! Twihanganiye byose, ngo hato tudatera imbogamizi Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Ariko se ntimuzi ko abakorera Ingoro y’Imana batungwa n’iyo Ngoro nyine, n’abahereza ku rutambiro, bagahabwa umugabane ku byo batuye?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Bityo rero, n’abogeza Inkuru Nziza, Nyagasani yabageneye gutungwa na yo." 
1Corinthians9:15 Icyakora nta cyo nigeze nitwaza muri ibyo byose; kandi simbibandikiye ngo mukurizeho kugira icyo mumpa; ahubwo nahitamo gupfa, aho gucuzwa iryo shema n’ubonetse wese." 
1Corinthians9:16 Kuba naramamaje Inkuru Nziza, si byo byatuma nirata, kuko ari umurimo ngombwa nashinzwe; ndiyimbire rero niba ntamamaje Inkuru Nziza!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Yabaye rero nabikoraga ku bwende bwanjye, nari nkwiye kubihemberwa; ariko ubwo mbitegetswe, ni umuzigo nahawe." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ubwo se ishimwe ryanjye rishingiye he? Rishingiye mu kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza ku buntu, ntarambirije ku burenganzira mpabwa na yo." 
1Corinthians9:19 N’ubwo nigenga kuri bose, nahisemo kwigira umugaragu wa bose, kugira ngo nigarurire benshi muri bo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Nigize Umuyahudi mu Bayahudi, kugira ngo nshobore gushyikira Abayahudi; kandi jyewe utakigengwa n’amategeko nemeye kumvira Amategeko nk’abayagenewe, ari ukugira ngo nigarurire abagengwa n’amategeko." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kandi jyewe utabuze itegeko ry’Imana ringenga, kuko Kristu ari we ungenga, nigize nk’utagira amategeko, rwagati mu batagira amategeko, ari ukugira ngo mbigarurire na bo." 
1Corinthians9:22 Nigize umunyantege nke mu banyantege nke, ngo niyegereze abanyantege nke. Nihwanyije na bose muri byose, kugira ngo ngire abo mbarokoramo." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ibyo kandi mbikorera Inkuru Nziza kugira ngo nzayigireho uruhare. 
1Corinthians9:24 Ntimuzi se ko abasiganwa ku kibuga cy’imikino biruka bose ariko igihembo kikegukana umwe? Ngaho rero nimwiruke namwe kugira ngo mwese mugitsindire. 
1Corinthians9:25 Urushanwa wese yigomwa byinshi, kandi aba aharanira ikamba rizayoka; naho twebwe iryo duharanira, ntirizashira." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nguko rero uko jye niruka, sinkora hirya no hino; nguko kandi uko ndwana, sinigera mpusha." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ahubwo umubiri wanjye ndawuhana nkawukandamiza kugira ngo ntazavaho mpigikwa, maze kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu bandi." 
1Corinthians10:1 Bavandimwe, sinshaka ko muyoberwa ukuntu abasekuruza bacu bose bagendaga bayobowe n’igihu cyererana, bose bakambuka inyanja," 
1Corinthians10:2 bose bakabatirizwa muri cya gihu na ya nyanja, bifatanyije na Musa." 
1Corinthians10:3 Bose basangiye ibyo kurya bimwe bikomoka mu ijuru; 
1Corinthians10:4 kandi bose bashoka iriba rimwe rikomoka mu ijuru; nuko bakanywa amazi avubuka mu rutare bahawe n’Imana, rukagenda rubaherekeje, kandi urwo rutare rwarangaga Kristu." 
1Corinthians10:5 Nyamara benshi muri bo si ko banyuze Imana, ni yo mpamvu intumbi zabo zararitswe mu butayu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ibyo byose byabereye kuducira amarenga, kugira ngo tutararikira ikibi, nk’uko na bo bakirarikiye." 
1Corinthians10:7 Ntimugasenge ibigirwamana, nk’uko bamwe muri bo babigize, mbese nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Nuko imbaga iricara, bararya, baranywa, nyuma barahaguruka, barabyina»." 
1Corinthians10:8 Twirinde gusambana, nk’uko bamwe muri bo babikoze, maze bagapfamo abageze ku bihumbi makumyabiri na bitatu umunsi umwe." 
1Corinthians10:9 Twirinde no kwinja Nyagasani, nk’uko bamwe muri bo bamugerageje, maze batsembwa n’inzoka z’ubumara." 
1Corinthians10:10 Ntimukitotombe, nk’uko bamwe muri bo binubye, maze Umunyacyorezo akaboreka." 
1Corinthians10:11 Ibyababayeho biraducira amarenga, kandi byandikiwe kutuburira, twe twegereje amagingo ya nyuma." 
1Corinthians10:12 Bityo rero uwibwira ko ahagaze, aritonde atagwa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Nta bwo mwigeze muterwa n’ibishuko bibarenze. Imana ni indahemuka; ntiyakwemera ko mushukwa birenze imbaraga zanyu; ahubwo izabaha uburyo bwo kwivana mu bishuko n’imbaraga zo kubyihanganira. 
1Corinthians10:14 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, nkoramutima zanjye, nimwirinde gusenga ibigirwamana." 
1Corinthians10:15 Reka mbabwire nk’abaciye akenge, namwe ubwanyu mwirebere ukuri kw’ibyo mvuga." 
1Corinthians10:16 Mbese inkongoro y’umugisha tunyweraho dushimira Imana, si ugusangira amaraso ya Kristu? N’umugati tumanyurira hamwe, si ugusangira Umubiri wa Kristu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Kubera uwo mugati umwe, n’ubwo twebwe turi benshi, tugize umubiri umwe, kuko twese nyine duhujwe n’umugati umwe." 
1Corinthians10:18 Nimurebere ku rubyaro rwa Israheli: mbese abarya ku bitambo byatuwe ntibaba bunze ubumwe n’urutambiro? 
1Corinthians10:19 Mbese mvuge ngo iki? Ko inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana, hari icyo zivuze? Cyangwa se ko ikigirwamana hari icyo kimaze?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Ashwi da! Kuko ibyo bitambo byabo, atari Imana babitura, ahubwo biturwa Sekibi, kandi sinshaka ko mugirana ubusabane na we." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ntimushobora kunywera icyarimwe ku nkongoro ya Nyagasani no ku nkongoro ya Sekibi; ntimushobora kubangikanya ameza ya Nyagasani n’aya Sekibi. 
1Corinthians10:22 Cyangwa se twaba dushaka kwikururira ishyari ry ’Imana? Twaba se tuyirusha amaboko? 
1Corinthians10:23 «Byose tubifitiye uburenganzira!» (nk’uko bamwe babivuga), nyamara byose ntibidufitiye akamaro; «Byose tubifitiye uburenganzira», ariko byose si ko bitera inkunga." 
1Corinthians10:24 Ntihakagire uwikurikiranira inyungu ye bwite, ahubwo aharanire iy’abandi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Nimwirire rero ibigurirwa ku isoko byose, mutiriwe musiganuza aho biturutse ngo bibakure umutima," 
1Corinthians10:26 «kuko isi yose ari iy’Imana, n’ibiyiriho byose.»" 
1Corinthians10:27 Niba kandi uwo mudasangiye ukwemera aramutse agutumiye, irire ibyo akuzimaniye byose, utiriwe usiganuza ngo bigukure umutima." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ariko hagize ukubwira ati «Izi nyama zatuwe ibigirwamana», ntuziryeho ubigiriye uwakuburiye ngo utamutera guhagarika umutima;" 
1Corinthians10:29 umutima mvuga rero si uwawe, ahubwo ni umutimanama w’undi. Kuki ubwigenge bwanjye bwaba bushingiye ku mutimanama w’undi?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Niba ngize icyo ndya nshimira Imana, kuki hagira ungayira ibyo nakurijeho gushimira?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ari igihe rero murya, ari n’igihe munywa, icyo mukoze cyose, mujye mugikorera guhesha Nyagasani ikuzo." 
1Corinthians10:32 Ntimukagire uwo mutera imbogamizi, yaba Umuyahudi, yaba Umugereki, yaba uwo mu Kiliziya y’Imana." 
1Corinthians10:33 Nguko uko nanjye ngerageza gushimisha bose muri byose, ntaharanira inyungu yanjye bwite, ahubwo ifitiye abenshi akamaro ngo bakurizeho gukira." 
1Corinthians11:1 Nimube rero abakurikiza banjye, nk’uko nanjye nkurikiza Kristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndabashimira ko muhora munyibuka, kandi mu budahemuka mukikomezamo ibyo nababwirije byose." 
1Corinthians11:3 Nyamara dore icyo mukwiye kumenya: Kristu ni we mugenga wa buri mugabo, umugore na we akagengwa n’umugabo; na we Kristu akagengwa n’Imana." 
1Corinthians11:4 Umugabo wese usenga cyangwa uhanura yitwikiriye umutwe, aba asuzuguye umutegetsi we." 
1Corinthians11:5 Naho umugore wese usenga cyangwa uhanura atitwikiriye umutwe, aba asuzuguye umutegetsi we; mbese ni nk’aho yaba yimojeho umusatsi." 
1Corinthians11:6 Niba rero umugore adateze igitambaro, n’imisatsi yose nayimareho! Nasanga ariko bimuteye isoni kwimoza cyangwa kwikemuza, natege igitambaro!" 
1Corinthians11:7 Umugabo we ntagomba kwipfuka mu mutwe, kuko ari ishusho n’uburanga bw’Imana; naho umugore akaba ikuzo ry’umugabo we." 
1Corinthians11:8 N’ubundi umugabo si we wakomotse ku mugore, ahubwo umugore ni we wakomotse ku mugabo." 
1Corinthians11:9 Kandi umugabo koko si we waremewe umugore, ahubwo umugore ni we waremewe umugabo." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngiyo impamvu umugore agomba kwambara ku mutwe ikimenyetso cy’uko agengwa, mbese abigiriye n’abamalayika." 
1Corinthians11:11 Nyamara muri Nyagasani umugabo wese agizwe n’umugore, n’umugore agizwe n’umugabo we." 
1Corinthians11:12 N’ubwo umugore yavuye ku mugabo, umugabo na we akabyarwa n’umugore, bombi baturuka ku Mana." 
1Corinthians11:13 Ngaho namwe nimumbwire: bishoboka bite ko umugore asenga Imana atitwikiriye umutwe? 
1Corinthians11:14 N’ubusanzwe biteye isoni ko umugabo atendeza imisatsi," 
1Corinthians11:15 nyamara ni ishema ry’umugore ko ayitunga atyo, bikurikije kamere yabo bombi, kuko umugore yayiherewe kumutwikira." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ahasigaye ushaka guhariranya, amenye ko atari umuco wacu, si n’uwa Kiliziya z’Imana." 
1Corinthians11:17 Tuvuye muri ibyo hari n’ibindi ntabashimaho: amakoraniro yanyu, aho kubagirira akamaro, abagwa nabi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Icya mbere cyo, bambwiye ko, iyo muhuriye mu ikoraniro, mwiremamo ibice kandi bisa n’aho ari byo:" 
1Corinthians11:19 wagira ngo ni ngombwa ko muri mwe habamo amakimbirane, kugira ngo ababakomeyemo bigaragaze." 
1Corinthians11:20 Igihe rero muteraniye hamwe, ntimuhuzwa n’isangira rya Nyagasani," 
1Corinthians11:21 kuko buri wese amaranira kurya ibyo yizaniye, ku buryo umwe yicwa n’inzara, undi yasinze." 
1Corinthians11:22 Mbese nta mazu mugira yo kuriramo no kunyweramo? Cyangwa muzanwa no gusuzugura imbaga y’Imana, no gukoza isoni abatagira icyo bafite? Mbabwire iki se? Mbashime se? Oya, muri ibyo simbashimye." 
1Corinthians11:23 Jyewe rero dore ibyo nashyikirijwe na Nyagasani, bikaba ari byo nabagejejeho: Nyagasani Yezu, araye ari butangwe, yafashe umugati," 
1Corinthians11:24 amaze gushimira, arawumanyura, avuga ati «Iki ni umubiri wanjye ubatangiwe; mujye mubikora namwe bibe urwibutso rwanjye.»" 
1Corinthians11:25 Barangije kurya, n’inkongoro ayigenzereza atyo, avuga ati «Iyi ni inkongoro y’Isezerano rishya, rishingiye ku maraso yanjye; mujye mubikora namwe, kandi igihe cyose muyinywereyeho, bibe urwibutso rwanjye.»" 
1Corinthians11:26 Kuko igihe cyose murya uyu mugati, mukanywa no kuri iyi nkongoro, muba mwamamaza urupfu rwa Nyagasani, kugeza igihe azazira." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ni cyo gituma uzarya uyu mugati, akanywa no kuri iyi nkongoro ya Nyagasani, atabikwiye, azaba acumuriye umubiri n’amaraso bya Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians11:28 Buri wese nabanze yisuzume rero, maze abone kurya uwo mugati no kunywa kuri iyo nkongoro;" 
1Corinthians11:29 kuko uwarya cyangwa akanywa atubahirije umubiri wa Nyagasani, aba ariye kandi anyoye ikizamubyarira ubucibwe." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ni cyo gituma benshi muri mwe barwaye kandi bamugaye, ndetse bamwe bakaba barapfuye." 
1Corinthians11:31 Iyaba twabanzaga kwisuzuma ubwacu, nta rundi rubanza twacirwa." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ariko Nyagasani adutonganyiriza kutugorora, kugira ngo tutarohamana n’iyi si." 
1Corinthians11:33 Bityo rero, bavandimwe, igihe muhuriye gusangira, nimurindirane." 
1Corinthians11:34 Niba hari ushonje, nabanze ahembukire iwe, kugira ngo ikoraniro ryanyu ritababyarira ubucibwe. Ibisigaye nzabitunganya, igihe nzaba naje." 
1Corinthians12:1 Bavandimwe, sinshaka ko muba injiji mu byerekeye ingabire za Roho." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mwibuke ko igihe mwari mutarayoboka Imana, mwagendaga mutwawe n’ibigirwamana bijunjamye." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ni yo mpamvu mbamenyesha ko nta we ubwirizwa na Roho w’Imana, ngo agire ati «Yezu arakaba ikivume», nk’uko nta wavuga ngo «Yezu ni Nyagasani», atabibwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu." 
1Corinthians12:4 Ingabire ziranyuranye, ariko Roho ni umwe;" 
1Corinthians12:5 muri Kiliziya kwitangira abandi biri kwinshi, ariko Nyagasani ni umwe;" 
1Corinthians12:6 uburyo bwo gukora buri kwinshi, ariko Imana ni Yo itunganya byose muri bose." 
1Corinthians12:7 Koko rero, buri wese ahabwa kugaragaza ibyo Roho w’Imana amukoreramo, ngo bigirire akamaro bose." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ku bwa Roho, umwe ahabwa kuvuga amagambo yuje ubushishozi, undi agahabwa kuvugana ubumenyi, muri uwo Roho nyine;" 
1Corinthians12:9 umwe ahabwa ukwemera guhebuje abikesha uwo Roho, undi agahabwa ingabire yo gukiza abarwayi na none muri uwo Roho nyine;" 
1Corinthians12:10 umwe yegurirwa ububasha bwo gukora ibitangaza, undi akagabirwa guhanura; umwe ahabwa kurobanura ibiturutse ku Mana n’ibiyitambamiye, undi agahabwa kuvuga mu ndimi nyinshi, hakaba n’uhabwa kuzisobanura." 
1Corinthians12:11 Ariko ibyo byose bikorwa na Roho umwe rukumbi, ugabira buri wese uko abyishakiye." 
1Corinthians12:12 Mu by’ukuri umubiri ni umwe, kandi ugizwe n’ingingo nyinshi; ariko izo ngingo zose, n’ubwo ari nyinshi, zigize umubiri umwe: ni ko bimeze no muri Kristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Twese twabatirijwe muri Roho umwe, ngo tube umubiri umwe. Twaba Abayahudi cyangwa Abagereki, twaba abacakara cyangwa abigenga, twese twuhiwe Roho umwe." 
1Corinthians12:14 Koko rero umubiri ntugizwe n’urugingo rumwe gusa, ahubwo ugizwe na nyinshi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Niba ikirenge kivuze kiti «Ubwo ntari ikiganza, nta ho mpuriye n’umubiri», byakibuza kuba urugingo rw’umubiri?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Niba ugutwi kuvuze kuti «Ubwo ntari ijisho, nta ho mpuriye n’umubiri», byakubuza kuba urugingo rw’umubiri?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Niba umubiri wose ubaye ijisho, kumva byaherera he? Niba byose bibaye ugutwi, uguhumurirwa kwaherera he?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Noneho rero Imana yagennye umwanya wa buri rugingo mu mubiri uko yabyishakiye. 
1Corinthians12:19 Yabaye byose byarabaye urugingo rumwe, umubiri wari kuba he?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Ingingo rero ni nyinshi, ariko umubiri ukaba umwe." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ijisho ntirishobora kubwira ikiganza ngo «Singukeneye», n’umutwe ngo ubwire ibirenge uti «Simbakeneye»." 
1Corinthians12:22 Byongeye kandi n’ingingo zisa nk’aho ari nta ntege, na zo ziba ngombwa," 
1Corinthians12:23 ndetse n’izo dukeka ko zisuzuguritse, ni zo twubaha cyane, maze izirusha izindi gutera isoni, tukarushaho kuzubahiriza." 
1Corinthians12:24 Naho ingingo zacu zisanzwe ntizijya ziduhangayika. Cyakora Imana yateye umubiri ku buryo buha icyubahiro ingingo zari zitacyifitemo," 
1Corinthians12:25 ari ukugira ngo umubiri utibyaramo amakimbirane, ahubwo ingingo zose zibe magirirane." 
1Corinthians12:26 Niba hari urugingo rubabaye, izindi zose zisangira ako kababaro; niba hari urugingo rumerewe neza, izindi na zo zirishima." 
1Corinthians12:27 Namwe rero muri umubiri umwe ari wo Kristu, kandi mukaba ingingo ze, buri muntu ku giti cye." 
1Corinthians12:28 Bityo rero, abo Imana yashyizeho muri Kiliziya, aba mbere ni intumwa, aba kabiri ni abahanuzi, aba gatatu ni abigisha. Hanyuma ikurikizaho abakora ibitangaza; abafite ingabire yo gukiza abarwayi, iyo gutabarana, iyo kuyobora n’iyo kuvuga mu ndimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Mbese bose ni intumwa? Bose se ni abahanuzi? Cyangwa ni abigisha? Mbese bose bakora ibitangaza? 
1Corinthians12:30 Cyangwa bafite ingabire yo gukiza? Bose se bavuga mu ndimi? Cyangwa bose bazi kuzisobanura? 
1Corinthians12:31 Nimuharanire ingabire zisumbuye, kandi ngiye kubereka izitambutse zose." 
1Corinthians13:1 N’aho navuga indimi z’abantu n’iz’abamalayika, ariko singire urukundo, naba ndi nk’icyuma kibomborana cyangwa inzogera irangira." 
1Corinthians13:2 N’aho nagira ingabire y’ubuhanuzi, ngahishurirwa amayobera yose n’ubumenyi bwose; n’aho nagira ukwemera guhambaye, kumwe gushyigura imisozi, ariko ndafite urukundo, nta cyo mba ndi cyo." 
1Corinthians13:3 N’aho nagabiza abakene ibyo ntunze byose, n’aho nahara umubiri wanjye ngo utwikwe, ariko nta rukundo mfite, nta cyo byaba bimariye." 
1Corinthians13:4 Urukundo rurihangana, rwitangira abandi, ntirugira ishyari; urukundo ntirwirarira, ntirwikuririza;" 
1Corinthians13:5 nta cyo rukora kidahwitse, ntirurondera akari akarwo, ntirurakara, ntirugira inzika;" 
1Corinthians13:6 ntirwishimira akarengane, ahubwo ruhimbazwa n’ukuri." 
1Corinthians13:7 Urukundo rubabarira byose, rwemera byose, rwizera byose, rukihanganira byose." 
1Corinthians13:8 Urukundo ntiruteze gushira. Ubuhanuzi se? Buzashira. Indimi zo se? Zizaceceka. Ubumenyi se? Buzayoka. 
1Corinthians13:9 Koko ubumenyi bwacu buracagase, kimwe n’uko ubuhanuzi bwacu bucagase." 
1Corinthians13:10 Igihe rero ibyuzuye bizahinguka, iby’igicagate bizazimira!" 
1Corinthians13:11 Mu gihe nari umwana, navugaga ay’abana, ngatekereza nk’abana, nkazirikana nk’abana; aho mbereye umugabo, nikuyemo ibya rwana byose." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ubu ngubu turasa n’abarebera mu ndorerwamo, ku buryo budafututse, ariko hari igihe tuzarebana imbonankubone. Ubu ngubu ibyo nzi biracagase, ariko icyo gihe nzamenya nk’uko nzwi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Kugeza ubu, ukwemera, ukwizera n’urukundo uko ari bitatu, birabangikanye; ariko icy’ingenzi muri byo ni urukundo." 
1Corinthians14:1 Ngaho rero nimukurikirane urukundo, kandi muharanire ingabire za Roho, cyane cyane iy’ubuhanuzi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kuko uvuga mu ndimi aba atabwira abantu, ahubwo Imana; koko kandi nta we uba amwumva; aba avuga ibimuri mu mutima ariko by’amayobera." 
1Corinthians14:3 Nyamara uhanura we, aba abwira abantu, akabakomeza, akabashishikaza, akabahumuriza." 
1Corinthians14:4 Uvuga mu ndimi ni we ubwe wiyungura, naho uhanura aba agiriye akamaro ikoraniro ry’abavandimwe." 
1Corinthians14:5 Nakwifuza ko mwese muvuga mu ndimi, ariko icyo nahitamo ni uko mwahanura. Uhanura asumbye uvuga mu ndimi, keretse rero nyirukuzivuga ashoboye no kuzisobanura, bigakomeza ikoraniro." 
1Corinthians14:6 Tuvuge nk’ubu, bavandimwe, nje iwanyu nkivugira mu ndimi, naba mbamariye iki, ijambo ryanjye ritagize icyo ribahishurira, mu bumenyi, mu buhanuzi, cyangwa mu nyigisho?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Ni kimwe n’ibyo bacurangisha, nk’umwirongi cyangwa inanga; bibaye bidasobanuye amajwi yabyo, watandukanya ute imicurangire y’umwirongi n’iy’inanga?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Akarumbeti kataranguruye ijwi, ni nde wakwitegura kujya ku rugamba?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Namwe rero: niba indimi zanyu zidasobanura amagambo, ibyo muvuga bizumvikana bite? Mwaba mucurangira abahetsi." 
1Corinthians14:10 Amagambo akoreshwa ku isi ni menshi, kandi nta n’ijambo na rimwe ridafite icyo risobanura." 
1Corinthians14:11 Habaye rero umbwira amagambo ntumva, naba mubereye nk’umunyamahanga, na we kandi akambera umunyamahanga." 
1Corinthians14:12 Namwe rero nimuharanire ingabire za Roho, ndetse muzikenukeho cyane, ariko murarikiye gukomeza ikoraniro." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ni yo mpamvu uvuga mu ndimi akwiye no gusaba Imana ingabire y’ubusobanuzi. 
1Corinthians14:14 Kuko iyo nsenga mu ndimi, umutima wanjye uba usenga, ariko ubwenge bwanjye nta cyo buhungukira." 
1Corinthians14:15 Bigende bite rero? Nzasengera mu mutima, ariko n’ubwenge bwanjye bushyireho akabwo. Nzaririmbira mu mutima, ariko n’ubwenge bushyireho akabwo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Naho ubundi niba ushimiye Imana mu mutima gusa, uri kumwe n’umuntu utabisobanukiwemo, yasubiza ate «Amen» kuri uko gushimira kwawe, kandi atumva icyo uvuga?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ugushimira kwawe yego ni kwiza, ariko nta cyo kumariye uwo nguwo." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nanjye ubwanjye mvuga mu ndimi, ndetse mbibarusha mwese — Imana ishimwe —" 
1Corinthians14:19 ariko iyo ndi mu ikoraniro mpitamo kuvuga amagambo make cyane yumvikana, afitiye abandi akamaro, aho gusukiranya menshi mu ndimi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bavandimwe, mu byo gushishoza ntimukigire nk’abana; mu byo gukora nabi ho, nimube abana koko, ariko mu byo gushishoza, mugenze nk’abantu bakuze." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu Mategeko haranditse ngo «Uyu muryango nzawubwiza izindi ndimi mu munwa w’abanyamahanga, ariko na bwo ntibazanyumva, uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga.»" 
1Corinthians14:22 Nuko rero kuvuga mu ndimi si ikimenyetso kigenewe abemera, ahubwo kireba abatemera; naho ubuhanuzi bwo si ikimenyetso kireba abataremera; ahubwo kigenewe abemera." 
1Corinthians14:23 Tuvuge nk’igihe Kiliziya yose ikoranye, maze mwese mukavuga mu ndimi, nyuma hakinjira uwo tudasangiye ukwemera cyangwa udasobanukiwe mu byacu, ntiyakurikizaho kubita abasazi?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ibiri amambu, hagize usanga mwese muhanura, yaba uwo tudasangiye ukwemera cyangwa udasobanukiwe mu byacu, azumva bose bamuhurijeho ijambo rimutera kwisuzuma no kwicuza," 
1Corinthians14:25 nuko ibyari byihishe mu mutima we bigaragare; maze agwe yubitse uruhanga, aramye Imana, yemeza ko Imana muri kumwe koko." 
1Corinthians14:26 Turangirize ku ki rero, bavandimwe? Igihe mukoraniye hamwe, umwe ashobora gutera indirimbo, undi akigisha, undi agatangaza ibyo yahishuriwe, undi akavuga mu ndimi, undi akazisobanura; ibyo byose kandi bikagirirwa akamaro rusange." 
1Corinthians14:27 Niba hari abavuga mu ndimi, babe babiri cyangwa batatu gusa, kandi bavuge umwe umwe, ndetse habe n’uzisobanura." 
1Corinthians14:28 Niba nta musobanuzi uhari, babyihorere; aho kuvuga mu ndimi, muzirikane mu mutima gusa kandi mubwira Imana." 
1Corinthians14:29 Abahanuzi na bo, havuge babiri cyangwa batatu, maze abandi basuzume ibyo bavuga." 
1Corinthians14:30 Hagize uwo mu ikoraniro ugize atya agahishurirwa ikintu, uwavugaga ahite aceceka." 
1Corinthians14:31 Mwese mushobora guhanura, ariko mugahana umwanya kugira ngo buri wese abonereho kujijuka no gushishikazwa." 
1Corinthians14:32 Umuhanuzi wese agenga ingabire yahawe. 
1Corinthians14:33 Kuko Imana yacu atari iy’akajagari, ahubwo ni iy’amahoro." 
1Corinthians14:34 Nk’uko bimeze muri za Kiliziya zose z’abatagatifujwe, abagore bajye baceceka mu makoraniro; ntibemerewe kuhafatira ijambo, ahubwo bajye batuza nk’uko Amategeko ubwayo abivuga." 
1Corinthians14:35 Niba hari icyo bifuza kujijukirwaho, bajye basobanuza abagabo babo mu rugo. Kuko bidakwiye ko umugore avugira mu ruhame." 
1Corinthians14:36 Mbese mwibwira ko Ijambo ry’Imana rikomoka iwanyu? Cyangwa se ko ari mwe mwenyine ryashyikirijwe? 
1Corinthians14:37 Niba hari uwikekaho ubuhanuzi, cyangwa ko ahishurirwa na Roho, amenyereho ko ibyo mbandikiye ari itegeko rya Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians14:38 Niba atabizi, ni uko na we Imana itamuzi!" 
1Corinthians14:39 Nuko rero, bavandimwe, nimuharanire ingabire y’ubuhanuzi, kandi ntimukange ko bavuga mu ndimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Ariko byose bikorwe neza nk’uko bikwiye. 
1Corinthians15:1 Bavandimwe, ndabibutsa Inkuru Nziza nabagejejeho, ari yo mwakiriye kandi mukaba muyihambiriyeho," 
1Corinthians15:2 ikaba ari na yo izabakiza niba muyikomeyeho nk’uko nayibigishije; naho ubundi ukwemera kwanyu kwaba ari impfabusa. 
1Corinthians15:3 Koko rero icya mbere cyo nabagejejeho, ni icyo nanjye nashyikirijwe: ko Kristu yapfuye azize ibyaha byacu, nk’uko byari byaranditswe." 
1Corinthians15:4 Ko yahambwe, ko yazutse ku munsi wa gatatu, nk’uko byari byaranditswe." 
1Corinthians15:5 Ko yabonekeye Kefasi, hanyuma akabonwa na ba Cumi na babiri." 
1Corinthians15:6 Hanyuma yongeye kubonwa n’abavandimwe magana atanu icya rimwe; abenshi muri bo baracyariho, abandi barapfuye." 
1Corinthians15:7 Hanyuma yabonekeye Yakobo, nyuma abonekera intumwa zose icyarimwe." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ubw’imperuka, nanjye arambonekera, jye umeze nk’uwavutse imburagihe." 
1Corinthians15:9 Koko jyewe ndi uwa nyuma mu ntumwa zose; sinkwiriye no kwitwa intumwa, kuko natoteje Kiliziya y’Imana." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ariko uko ndi kose, mbikesha ingabire y’Imana, kandi iyo ngabire ntiyambayemo impfabusa. Ahubwo ndetse nakoreye kubarusha bose; nyamara si ku bwanjye, ni ku bw’ingabire y’Imana indimo." 
1Corinthians15:11 Uko biri kose, yaba jye, cyangwa bo, ngibyo ibyo twamamaza, kandi ari na byo mwemeye." 
1Corinthians15:12 Ubwo hamamazwa ko Kristu yazutse mu bapfuye, bishoboka bite ko bamwe muri mwe bavuga ko abapfuye batazazuka?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Niba abapfuye batazazuka, Kristu na we ubwo ntiyazutse." 
1Corinthians15:14 Niba kandi Kristu atarazutse, ibyo twigisha nta shingiro, n’ukwemera kwanyu gufashe ku busa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Bikaba ndetse twaba abahamyabinyoma b’Imana, kuko twemeje ko yazuye Kristu, kandi itaramuzuye, niba ari byo ko abapfuye batazuka." 
1Corinthians15:16 Koko niba abapfuye batazuka, na Kristu ubwo ntiyazutse." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kandi niba Kristu atarazutse, ukwemera kwanyu ni amanjwe, mukaba mukiri mu byaha byanyu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Bityo rero, n’abapfuye bizeye Kristu barayoyotse." 
1Corinthians15:19 Niba kwizera Kristu kwacu guhagarariye kuri ubu bugingo gusa, twaba dukwiye kubabarirwa bitambukije abandi bose." 
1Corinthians15:20 Oya kandi, Kristu yazutse koko mu bapfuye, aba umuzukambere mu bapfuye bose." 
1Corinthians15:21 Nk’uko kandi urupfu rwakuruwe n’umuntu umwe, ni na ko izuka ry’abapfuye ryazanywe n’umuntu umwe." 
1Corinthians15:22 Kimwe n’uko bose boramye bitewe na Adamu, ni na ko bose bazasubizwa ubugingo biturutse kuri Kristu;" 
1Corinthians15:23 nyamara buri wese mu rwego rwe: uw’ibanze ni Kristu, nyuma hateho abamuyobotse, igihe azazira." 
1Corinthians15:24 Nuko byose bizarangire, igihe azegurira Ubwami Imana se, amaze gusenyagura icyitwa ubuhangange, ubutegetsi n’ububasha cyose." 
1Corinthians15:25 Kuko agomba kwima ingoma kugeza ko azashyira abanzi be bose mu nsi y’ibirenge bye. 
1Corinthians15:26 Umwanzi w’imperuka uzarimburwa, ni urupfu," 
1Corinthians15:27 kuko byanditswe ngo «byose yabishyize mu nsi y’ibirenge bye.» Igihe rero Kristu azavuga ati «Byose biranyeguriwe», birumvikana ko hatabariwemo Uwabimweguriye byose." 
1Corinthians15:28 Nuko rero igihe byose bizaba bimaze kumuyoboka, ubwo Mwana na we aziyegurire Se wamweguriye byose, kugira ngo Imana ibe byose muri bose." 
1Corinthians15:29 Bitabaye ibyo, ababatirizwa abapfuye baba bashaka kugera ku ki? Niba koko abapfuye batazuka, ni iki gituma bababatirizwa?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Natwe ubwacu kuki twahora twishyira mu makuba? 
1Corinthians15:31 Buri munsi ruhora rungera amajanja! Simbeshya, bavandimwe, mwe kuzo ryanjye muri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Biba byaramariye iki kurwanya inyamaswa zo muri Efezi, iyo nza kuba niringiye ubu bugingo gusa? Niba abapfuye batazuka nimwemere koko «twirire kandi twinywere, kuko ejo tuzapfa!»" 
1Corinthians15:33 Ntimukishuke: kubana n’ababi byonona imigenzo myiza. 
1Corinthians15:34 Nimwice ku businzi burundu, mwirinde gucumura. Kuko muri mwe harimo abatazi Imana na busa, ibyo mbivugiye kubakoza isoni." 
1Corinthians15:35 Ubwo ntihabuze uwibaza ati «Abapfuye bazazuka bate? Bazahingukana umubiri uteye ute?» 
1Corinthians15:36 Mbega injiji! Ese icyo ubibye ntikibanza gushanguka ngo kibyare ubuzima! 
1Corinthians15:37 Kandi icyo ubibye gitandukanye n’urubuto ruzaza; ni akabuto gasa k’ingano cyangwa k’ikindi kindi. 
1Corinthians15:38 Nyuma Imana ikakihera imisusire uko ishaka, buri rubuto ku buryo bwihariye." 
1Corinthians15:39 Nta kinyabuzima gihuje kamere n’ikindi: abantu batandukanye n’inyamaswa, n’inyoni, n’amafi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Hari ibyagenewe kuba mu kirere, n’ibyagenewe kuba ku isi; ariko byose ntibinganya umucyo." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ububengerane bw’izuba butandukanye n’ubw’ukwezi, n’ubw’inyenyeri; ndetse nta n’inyenyeri ishashagira nk’indi." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ni na ko bimeze mu kuzuka kw’abapfuye: umubiri ujyira mu gitaka gushanguka, ukazukira mu budashanguka;" 
1Corinthians15:43 ushyirwa mu gitaka ari nta kamaro, ukazukana ikuzo; ushyirwa mu gitaka ari nta ntege, ukazukana ibakwe;" 
1Corinthians15:44 hahambwa umubiri usanzwe wa muntu, hakazuka umubiri wahinduwe na Roho. Ubwo koko habaho imibiri ya kamere gusa, hashobora no kubaho n’imibiri yahinduwe na Roho." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ni na ko byanditswe ngo: Muntu wa mbere, Adamu, yagabiwe ubuzima bw’umubiri, ariko Adamu wa kabiri, ugizwe na Roho, atanga ubuzima." 
1Corinthians15:46 Cyakora habanza ubuzima bw’umubiri, hagakurikiraho ubuzima bwa Roho." 
1Corinthians15:47 Muntu wa mbere wavuye mu gitaka ni umunyagitaka; Muntu wa kabiri, we, aturuka mu ijuru." 
1Corinthians15:48 Uko umunyagitaka yabaye, ni na ko abanyagitaka bameze; uko uwaturutse mu ijuru ameze, ni na ko abagenewe ijuru bazaba." 
1Corinthians15:49 Nk’uko twabayeho mu misusire ya Muntu w’umunyagitaka, ni na ko kandi tuzagira imisusire y’Uwaturutse mu ijuru." 
1Corinthians15:50 Icyo nemeza cyo, bavandimwe, ni uko muntu, ku bw’umubiri n’amaraso, adashobora kwironkera umugabane mu Ngoma y’Imana, kimwe n’uko ubushanguke butakwigeza ku budashanguka." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ngiye noneho kubahishurira ibanga. Twese ntituzapfa; ahubwo twese tuzahindurwa ukundi," 
1Corinthians15:52 mu kanya gato, nk’uhumbije ijisho, akarumbeti k’imperuka kavuze. Koko akarumbeti kazavuga maze abapfuye bazukire kudashanguka, nuko natwe duhindurwe ukundi." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ni ngombwa ariko ko uyu mubiri wagenewe kubora ugezwa ku budashanguka, kandi uyu mubiri wagenewe gupfa ukagabirwa ukutazapfa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Igihe rero uyu mubiri ugenewe kubora uzagezwa ku budashanguka, kandi uyu mubiri ugenewe gupfa ukagabirwa ukutazapfa, ubwo ngubwo ibyanditswe bizaba byujujwe ngo «Urupfu rwaburijwemo n’umutsindo." 
1Corinthians15:55 Rupfu we! Ugutsinda kwawe kuri he? Urubori rwawe ruri hehe, wa Rupfu we?»" 
1Corinthians15:56 Koko rero urubori rw’urupfu ni icyaha, naho ububasha bw’icyaha buturuka ku mategeko." 
1Corinthians15:57 Dushimire Imana yaduhaye gutsinda ku bw’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Nuko rero, bavandimwe nkunda, nimukomere, mwe guhungabana, mukomeze gukorera Nyagasani, muzi neza ko kuruhira Nyagasani bitazabapfira ubusa." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ku byerekeye imfashanyo zigenewe abatagatifujwe, muzakurikize namwe amabwiriza nahaye Kiliziya zo mu Bugalati." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ku munsi wa mbere ukurikira isabato, ari ho ku cyumweru, buri wese ajye azigama icyo yashoboye gusagura, ku buryo mutazarindira igihe nzazira ngo mwegeranye amaturo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ubwo ningera iwanyu nzohereza abo muzaba mwihitiyemo, bajyane amabaruwa n’amaturo yanyu i Yeruzalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nibiba ngombwa ko nanjye njyayo, tuzafatanya urugendo." 
1Corinthians16:5 Nzaza iwanyu maze kwambukiranya Masedoniya, kuko nzayinyuramo gusa." 
1Corinthians16:6 Birashoboka ko nzatinda iwanyu, ndetse nkahaguma itumba ryose, kugira ngo munshakire uburyo bwo gukomeza urugendo rwanjye." 
1Corinthians16:7 Sinshaka noneho kubakubita urubandu, ahubwo nizeye kuzagumana namwe umwanya uringaniye, Nyagasani nabinyemerera." 
1Corinthians16:8 Icyakora nzaguma Efezi kugeza kuri Pentekositi," 
1Corinthians16:9 kuko umurimo wanjye wahugururiwe amarembo magari, n’ubwo hari abantambamiye benshi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Niba Timote aramutse aje iwanyu, muramenye ntazagire icyo abishishaho, kuko dufatanyije gukorera Nyagasani." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ntihazagire rero umusuzugura. Ahubwo muzamufashe mu rugendo rwe, ngo angarukire amahoro; ndamutegereje hamwe n’abandi bavandimwe." 
1Corinthians16:12 Naho umuvandimwe wacu Apolo, namusabye nkomeje ngo azane n’abandi bavandimwe iwanyu, ariko yabaye abyanze muri iki gihe, ngo azaza nabona umwanya umutunganiye." 
1Corinthians16:13 Murabe maso rero, mukomere mu kwemera, mube abagabo, mube intwari;" 
1Corinthians16:14 ibyanyu byose mubikorane urukundo. 
1Corinthians16:15 Indi nama nabungura, bavandimwe, ni ukutibagirwa ko Sitefana n’urugo rwe babaye uburiza muri Akaya, bakaba baritangiye rwose abatagatifujwe." 
1Corinthians16:16 Nimushobokere abantu nk’abo, kimwe n’abandi bose bafatanyije imirimo n’imiruho." 
1Corinthians16:17 Nanyuzwe n’uko Sitefana, Forutunati, na Akayikusi baje kunsura; barahababereye rwose." 
1Corinthians16:18 Batwuruye umutima, ari jye, ari namwe. Mujye mumenya gushimira bene abo bantu." 
1Corinthians16:19 Kiliziya zo muri Aziya zirabaramutsa. Akwila na Purisika barabatashya cyane muri Nyagasani, hamwe na Kiliziya ikoranira iwabo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abavandimwe bose barabatashya. Namwe rero muramukanye mwese, mu muhoberano mutagatifu." 
1Corinthians16:21 Iyi ndamutso ni jye uyiyandikiye, jyewe Pawulo." 
1Corinthians16:22 Niba hari udakunda Nyagasani, uwo arakaba ikivume. Marana ta! Ngwino, Nyagasani!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Ineza ya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu ihorane namwe. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ni jye, ubakundira mwese muri Kristu Yezu." 
2Corinthians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, intumwa ya Kristu Yezu, uko Imana yabishatse, n’umuvandimwe wacu Timote, kuri Kiliziya iri i Korinti, no ku batagatifujwe bose muri Akaya:" 
2Corinthians1:2 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana, Umubyeyi wacu no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Haragasingizwa Imana, Se w’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, Umubyeyi w’impuhwe zose kandi utanga ihumure ryuzuye." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ni yo iduhumuriza mu magorwa yacu yose ikaduha natwe guhumuriza abashavuye bose, tubagezaho ihumure twiherewe n’Imana." 
2Corinthians1:5 Nk’uko twahawe gusangira na Kristu imibabaro ye yose, ni na ko yadusenderejeho ihumure rishyitse muri We." 
2Corinthians1:6 Mbese amagorwa turimo, si yo ababyarira guhumurizwa no kurokoka? Kandi se iyo duhumurijwe, si byo bibabyarira kwihanganira imibabaro dusangiye, maze mukagira ituze?" 
2Corinthians1:7 Turabizeye bihagije: kuba dusangiye imibabaro, bizatuma dusangira n’ihumurizwa." 
2Corinthians1:8 Koko, bavandimwe, ntitwabahisha akaga twagiriye muri Aziya; twakutse umutima birenze imivugire, tugeza n’aho twiheba nk’abagiye gupfa." 
2Corinthians1:9 Koko twari tumeze nk’abaciriwe urwo gupfa, ku buryo amizero yari yadushizemo, dusigaye twiringiye Imana gusa, Yo izura abapfuye." 
2Corinthians1:10 Ni Yo koko yatwaruye mu nzara z’urupfu, kandi izahora irutwaruramo. Twizeye rwose ko nta na rimwe izigera idutererana." 
2Corinthians1:11 N’amasengesho yanyu azabidufashamo, bityo umukiro wacu tuzawukeshe gusabirwa na benshi, maze twese hamwe tuzafatanye gushimira Imana ubwo buntu izatugirira." 
2Corinthians1:12 Dore ishema ryacu aho rishingiye: ni uko umutimanama wacu utwizeza ko twabayeho kuri iyi si, cyane cyane muri mwe, mu bwiyoroshye no mu butaryarya biva ku Mana, tudakurikije ubwenge bw’abantu, ahubwo tuyobowe n’ineza y’Imana." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ntimukeke kandi ko mu mabaruwa yacu, tubandikira ibiciye ukubiri n’ibyo musoma kandi muhita mwumva; nizeye ko noneho muzatwumva neza," 
2Corinthians1:14 kuko kugeza ubu mwatwumvise amahushuka. Muzasanga ku munsi wa Nyagasani mutwishimira, nk’uko natwe tuzabishimira." 
2Corinthians1:15 Nari nizeye kubanza kunyura iwanyu, ngo mwongere mwishime;" 
2Corinthians1:16 noneho ngahaguruka iwanyu njya muri Masedoniya, ndetse nkongera kugaruka iwanyu, ngo muntegurire urugendo rwanjye rwo muri Yudeya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Mbese uwo mugambi nawufashe nsa n’ukina? Cyangwa se imigambi yanjye irasa n’idafashe, nk’umuntu wemeye atemeye?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Imana irandeba: ibyo nababwiye sinari ngambiriye guhita mbihindagura. 
2Corinthians1:19 Koko rero, Umwana w’Imana, Kristu Yezu, twamamaje iwanyu, jyewe, Silivani na Timote, si uko ateye. Ntiyabaye icyarimwe «yego» na «oya», yabaye «yego» gusa!" 
2Corinthians1:20 Ku buryo amasezerano yose y’Imana yabaye muri we «yego», natwe tugakurizaho gukuza Imana, tuvuga tuti «Amen»." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ni Yo ubwayo idukomeza muri Kristu, ikadutorera kuba abayo," 
2Corinthians1:22 idushyiramo ikimenyetso cyayo, ikaduha no gutunga Roho wayo mu mitima yacu kugira ngo atubere ingwate y’ibyiza yatugeneye." 
2Corinthians1:23 Imana imbeshaho ni Yo ntanzeho umugabo: nirinze kugaruka iwanyu i Korinti ngo ntabatera ibibazo. 
2Corinthians1:24 Nta bwo dushaka kubagora mu byerekeye ukwemera, kuko ukwemera kwanyu kutajegajega, ahubwo turabafasha ngo muhimbarwe." 
2Corinthians2:1 Niyemeje rero kutagaruka iwanyu, mu gihe tukibabaye." 
2Corinthians2:2 Niba se koko ari jye ubababaza, ni nde wundi wangarurira ibyishimo, usibye nyine uwo nababaje?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ubwo mperutse kubandikira nashakaga gukiranura ibintu, ngo hato ninza iwanyu ntababazwa n’abagombaga kuntera ibyishimo; sinshidikanya rwose ko igihe nishimye, namwe muba mwishimye." 
2Corinthians2:4 Simbabeshya, nabandikiye mfite ishavu ryinshi n’umutima wuzuye agahinda, ndetse amarira yisuka, atari ukugira ngo mbababaze, ahubwo ngo mumenye ukuntu mbakunda." 
2Corinthians2:5 Niba hari uwahemutse, si jye jyenyine yababaje, ndetse mubirebye neza nanone tudakabije, namwe mwese yarabababaje." 
2Corinthians2:6 Birahagije kuba uwo muntu yaratonganyirijwe mu ikoraniro; 
2Corinthians2:7 ni na yo mpamvu, aho bigeze, mukwiye kumubabarira, mukamuhumuriza, ngo hato adashengurwa n’agahinda gakabije, akiheba." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ndabibasabye rero, nimukomeze kumugaragariza urukundo." 
2Corinthians2:9 Icyatumye kandi mbandikira, ni uko nashakaga kubagerageza ngo ndebe ukuntu mukurikiza amabwiriza yanjye." 
2Corinthians2:10 Iyo mugize uwo mubabarira, nanjye mba mubabariye! Kandi jye mubabariye, mu rugero yaba abikwiye, ni mwe mba mbigiriye, mu maso ya Kristu," 
2Corinthians2:11 ngo tudaha Sekibi urwaho; imigambi yayo ntituyiyobewe. 
2Corinthians2:12 Ubwo ngeze i Torowadi nje kuhamamaza Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu, n’ubwo Nyagasani yari yahankinguriye amarembo," 
2Corinthians2:13 nakomeje guhagarika umutima, kuko ntahasanze umuvandimwe wanjye Tito; mpita mbasezeraho, njya muri Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ariko Imana ishimwe, Yo ihora iduha gutsinda muri Kristu, ikanatuma twogeza ubwamamare bwe, nk’impumuro nziza isakara hose." 
2Corinthians2:15 Kandi koko imbere y’Imana, turi impumuro nziza ya Kristu rwagati mu barokorwa no mu bacibwa." 
2Corinthians2:16 Kuri bamwe tubanukira urupfu bikazabageza ku rupfu; ku bandi turi impumuro y’ubuzima bikazabageza ku bugingo. Ni nde muntu rero waba ukwiye guhabwa ubutumwa nk’ubwo? 
2Corinthians2:17 Koko rero ntitumeze nk’abandi benshi bagenda barisha Ijambo ry’Imana; ahubwo, ku bwa Yo n’imbere yayo, turivugana ubutaryarya, muri Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Mbese twongere kandi kwishingana? Cyangwa se dukeneye kugenza nka bamwe bitwaza inzandiko zibashingana iwanyu, cyangwa aho mubohereje?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Ibaruwa idushingana ni mwe, ikaba kandi yanditse mu mutima wacu, izwi kandi isomwa na bose." 
2Corinthians3:3 Biragaragara rwose ko muri urwandiko rwa Kristu yandikishije umurimo wacu, rutandikishijwe wino ahubwo Roho w’Imana Nyirubuzima, atari ku bisate by’amabuye, ahubwo rwanditswe ku mitima y’abantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ngicyo icyizere dufitiye Imana ku bwa Kristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Bityo ku bwacu tukaba nta cyo dushobora kwiratana kidukomotseho, kuko ubushobozi bwacu buturuka ku Mana." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ni Yo yatugize abogeza b’Isezerano Rishya ridashingiye ku Mategeko yanditswe, ahubwo kuri Roho; kuko Amategeko yanditswe akurura urupfu, naho Roho we agatanga ubuzima." 
2Corinthians3:7 Niba gushingwa ubutumwa butarindaga urupfu, busharazwe ku bisate by’amabuye, kwaramuhesheje ikuzo ringana rityo kugeza aho Abayisraheli badahangara kureba uruhanga rwa Musa, kubera ububengerane bw’akanya gato bwo mu maso he," 
2Corinthians3:8 bishoboka bite ko uwashinzwe ubutumwa bwa Roho atamutambukije kure ikuzo? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ubwo ubutumwa bwavanyeho ubucibwe bwagize ikuzo, ubutumwa bugeza ku butungane busumbijeho kure ikuzo risesuye." 
2Corinthians3:10 Uko byamera kose, ibyahoranye ikuzo, byarayoyotse, ubigereranyije n’ibifite ikuzo rihanitse ryo kuri ubu." 
2Corinthians3:11 Niba rero ibyamaze akanya gato byarahawe ikuzo, bishoboka bite ko ibigenewe guhoraho, bitarushaho kugira ikuzo?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Kuba rero dufite ayo mizero, bituma tudahungabana." 
2Corinthians3:13 Ntitumeze nka Musa wipfukaga igitambaro mu maso ngo Abayisraheli batabona uko ikuzo rimweyurukaho. 
2Corinthians3:14 Nyamara ubwenge bwabo bwahumiye ko! Koko rero kugeza na n’ubu, iyo basoma Isezerano rya kera, icyo gitambaro cyakomeje kubapfukirana; ntikiratamururwa kuko Kristu wenyine ari We ukivanaho." 
2Corinthians3:15 Mu by’ukuri, kugeza magingo aya, uko basoma ibya Musa, hari nk’igihu kibambitse ku mutima wabo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Uwo mubambiko uzavanwaho n’uko bagaruriye Nyagasani umutima wabo. 
2Corinthians3:17 Mu by’ukuri Nyagasani ni We Roho, kandi aho Roho wa Nyagasani ari, ni ho haba ubwisanzure." 
2Corinthians3:18 Nuko rero twebwe twese, abo uruhanga rudapfukiranye, turashashagira ikuzo rya Nyagasani, bigatuma tugira imisusire ye, mu ikuzo rigenda ryisumbura, ku bwa Nyagasani, ari we Roho." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ku mpuhwe zayo, Imana yatweguriye uwo murimo, bigatuma tudacika intege." 
2Corinthians4:2 Ni yo mpamvu twirinze amatwara afifitse kandi ateye isoni; twanga kuryaryana no guhindagura Ijambo ry’Imana, ahubwo tugatangaza ukuri kwaryo kugira ngo abantu bose batwizere imbere y’Imana." 
2Corinthians4:3 Nyamara, niba Inkuru Nziza yacu yaba itumvikana, abatayumva ni aborama," 
2Corinthians4:4 n’abemeragato imana y’iyi si yahumye ubwenge, ku buryo batagerwaho n’umucyo w’Inkuru Nziza n’ububengerane bwa Kristu, We buranga nyakuri bw’Imana." 
2Corinthians4:5 Si twe twiyamamaza na gato, ahubwo twamamaza Nyagasani Yezu Kristu. Twebwe twiyiziho kuba abagaragu banyu, tubigiriye Yezu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Kuko Imana yivugiye iti «Urumuri nirwakire mu mwijima». ni Yo ubwayo yamurikiye mu mitima yacu, ngo tumenye ikuzo ryayo ribengerana ku ruhanga rwa Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ariko uwo mukiro tuwutwaye mu tubindi tumeneka ubusa, bigatuma bose babona ko ubwo bubasha buhanitse buturuka ku Mana, aho kutwitirirwa." 
2Corinthians4:8 Baraduhutaza hirya no hino, ariko ntidutembagara; turagirijwe, ariko tugatambuka;" 
2Corinthians4:9 turaburagizwa, ariko ntidushyikirwa; twatuwe hasi, ariko ntiduheranwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Igihe cyose tugendana imibabaro y’urupfu rwa Kristu, kugira ngo n’ubuzima bwe bwigaragaze mu mubiri wacu." 
2Corinthians4:11 N’ubwo turi bazima bwose, duhora tugabizwa urupfu, duhorwa Yezu, kugira ngo ubugingo bwe bugaragarire muri iyi mibiri yacu y’impfabusa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Twebwe ariko urupfu ruratubungamo, naho muri mwe ubuzima ni bwose." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ubwo dushyigikiwe n’ukwemera kw’Ibyanditswe bivuga biti «Naremeye, bintera kwamamaza». natwe turemera ikaba ari yo mpamvu twamamaza." 
2Corinthians4:14 Koko turabizi, Uwazuye Nyagasani Yezu, natwe azatuzurana na We, kandi twese azatwakire iruhande rwe." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ibyo byose ni mwe bigirirwa, kugira ngo musenderezwe ineza y’Imana, maze murusheho kuba benshi bashimira Imana, bayihesha ikuzo." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ni cyo gituma tudacogora; kabone n’ubwo umubiri ugenda uyonga, umutima wo wivugurura buri munsi." 
2Corinthians4:17 Kandi n’amagorwa yacu muri iki gihe gihita nta cyo adutwaye, uyagereranije n’ikuzo adutegurira ry’akataraboneka kandi rizahoraho." 
2Corinthians4:18 Bityo tukaba tutarangamiye ibigaragara, ahubwo ibitagaragara, kuko ibigaragarira amaso bihitana n’igihe, naho ibitagaragara bigahoraho iteka." 
2Corinthians5:1 Tuzi neza ko uyu mubiri utubereye nk’icumbi kuri iyi si. Umunsi ryasenyutse, tukazimukira mu ngoro ihoraho yo mu ijuru, itubatswe n’ukuboko k’umuntu, ahubwo yubatswe n’Imana." 
2Corinthians5:2 Tukaba rero duhangayikishijwe no kwifuza cyane igihe tuzatungira hirya y’ubu buzima, iwacu ho mu ijuru," 
2Corinthians5:3 niba ariko dusanganywe umwambaro aho kuba dutumbuje. 
2Corinthians5:4 Koko rero twebwe abakiri muri uyu mubiri, turaganya dushenguka, kuko tudashaka kuwucuzwa, ahubwo twifuza kuwambikirwaho kugira ngo uwo mwambaro w’akanya gato, uduhindurirwemo uw’ubuzima." 
2Corinthians5:5 Bityo, Imana, yaduteganyirije ibyo, yabaye iduhaye Roho Mutagatifu ho umuganura." 
2Corinthians5:6 N’ubwo ariko duhorana icyizere, tuzi neza ko igihe tuzaba dutuye muri uyu mubiri, tuzasa n’abari ishyanga, kure ya Nyagasani." 
2Corinthians5:7 — Kuko ubu tugendera mu kwemera, tutayobowe n’uko tubona neza. —" 
2Corinthians5:8 Koko duhorana icyizere, bigatuma duhitamo kwimuka muri uyu mubiri, ngo twigire gutura iruhande rwa Nyagasani." 
2Corinthians5:9 Twaba muri uyu mubiri, cyangwa twawimukamo, icyo tugambiriye ni uko tumushimisha." 
2Corinthians5:10 Kuko twese tuzahinguka imbere y’urukiko rwa Kristu, ngo buri wese ahabwe igikwiye ibyo yakoze akiri mu buzima bw’umubiri, byaba ibyiza cyangwa ibibi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ubwo dufitiye Nyagasani igitinyiro; turashishikariza abantu kumwemera, kandi rwose, nta buryarya dufite imbere y’Imana. Nizeye ko namwe mutabunziho." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ntitugiye kongera kubishinganaho, ahubwo turashaka kubaha uburyo bwo kutwishimira, kugira ngo mubone icyo musubiza abiratana ibihenda amaso, ariko bidafite ishingiro mu mutima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Niba twaragaragaweho n’ibisazi, twabigiriye Imana; niba kandi twarashyize mu gaciro, ni mwebwe twabigiriye." 
2Corinthians5:14 Urukundo rwa Kristu ruraduhihibikanya, iyo tuzirikanye ukuntu umwe yapfiriye bose, bikaba rero ko bose bapfuye." 
2Corinthians5:15 Kandi koko yapfiriye bose, kugira ngo abariho bataberaho bo ubwabo, ahubwo babereho uwabapfiriye kandi akazukira kubakiza." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ni cyo gituma kuva ubu nta muntu n’umwe tukimenya ku buryo busanzwe; ndetse na Kristu, niba twarigeze kumumenya ku buryo bw’abantu, ubu ntitukimumenya dutyo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Bityo, umuntu wese uri muri Kristu, yabaye ikiremwa gishya. Ibishaje byarayoyotse, none ngaha byose byahindutse bishya." 
2Corinthians5:18 Byose biva ku Mana, yo yiyunze natwe ikoresheje Kristu; nyuma idushinga umurimo w'ubwiyunge." 
2Corinthians5:19 Uko biri kose, Imana ubwayo ni yo yiyunze n’ab'isi bose muri Kristu, ntiyaba ikibabaraho ibicumuro byabo; nuko natwe idushinga ubutumwa bwo kubwira abantu ngo biyunge na Yo." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ubu rero duhagarariye Kristu, ku buryo Imana ubwayo ari yo ibahamagara ari twe ikoresheje. Ngaho rero turabinginze mu izina rya Kristu: Nimwemere mwiyunge n'Imana!" 
2Corinthians5:21 Kristu utarigeze akora icyaha, Imana yamubazeho ibyaha bya muntu, kugira ngo muri We tubarweho ubutungane bw'Imana." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ubwo turi abafasha b’Imana, turabashishikariza kudapfusha ubusa ubuntu bwayo." 
2Corinthians6:2 Kuko ubwayo yivugira iti «Mu gihe gikwiye, numvise isengesho ryawe; no ku munsi w’uburokorwe, naragutabaye.» Ngiki rero koko igihe gikwiye; nguyu koko umunsi w’uburokorwe." 
2Corinthians6:3 Nta we rero dushaka guhungabanya, kugira ngo ubutumwa bwacu butagira amakemwa." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ahubwo twihatira kugaragaza muri byose ko turi abagaragu b’Imana, turihangana bihagije, ari mu magorwa, mu mage no mu ishavu," 
2Corinthians6:5 ari mu ikubitwa, mu buroko no mu midugararo, ari mu minaniro, mu kutagoheka no mu isonza;" 
2Corinthians6:6 tukitabaza ubuziranenge n’ubuhanga, ubwiyumanganye n’ubugwaneza, muri Roho Mutagatifu; dukoresha urukundo rutaryarya," 
2Corinthians6:7 ijambo ry’ukuri n’ububasha bw’Imana; turwanisha intwaro z’ubutungane, zo mu kuboko kw’iburyo n’ibumoso." 
2Corinthians6:8 Rimwe turubahwa, ubundi tugasuzugurwa; baradusebya, ubundi bakadushimagiza. Batwita ababeshyi, kandi tuvugisha ukuri." 
2Corinthians6:9 Dusa nk’intamenyekana, kandi tuzwi neza. Dufatwa nk’indembe, kandi turi bazima. Baraduhana, ariko ntibageze aho kutwica." 
2Corinthians6:10 Turashavuzwa, nyamara duhora twishimye. Turi abakene, nyamara dukungahaza benshi. Batugize abinazi, kandi ari twe dutunze byose!" 
2Corinthians6:11 Bavandimwe b’i Korinti, twababwiye ukuri kose, tubaranguriza umutima wacu." 
2Corinthians6:12 Muwufitemo umwanya mugari: uwanyu ubanza ari wo ufunganye! 
2Corinthians6:13 Nimutwishyure rwose, ndababwira nk’abana banjye: nimutwugururire namwe umutima wanyu!" 
2Corinthians6:14 Ntimukagirane urunana rw’insumbane n’abatemera! Mbese ubutungane hari isano bugirana n’ubukozi bw’ibibi? Urumuri rwabangikana rute n’umwijima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Kristu na Beliyari bakumvikana bate? Uwemera n’utemera bahuriye he? 
2Corinthians6:16 Mbese ingoro y’Imana yasangirwa ite n’ibigirwamana? Erega, ni twe ngoro y’Imana Nzima, nk’uko ubwayo ibyivugira iti «Nzatura muri bo, nzatambagire rwagati muri bo, maze nzabe Imana yabo, na bo bazambere umuryango." 
2Corinthians6:17 Nimuve muri abo bantu, mwitandukanye na bo, uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga. Mwirinde gukora ku cyabahumanya, maze ubwanjye nzabakire." 
2Corinthians6:18 Nzababera umubyeyi, namwe mumbere abahungu n’abakobwa, uwo ni Nyagasani ubivuze.»" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ncuti nkunda, ubwo twashyikirijwe ayo masezerano nitwivaneho ubwandu bwose bw’umubiri n’ubw’umutima; twirundurire ubutungane, mu gitinyiro cy’Imana." 
2Corinthians7:2 Natwe, nimuduhe umwanya mu mitima yanyu. Nta we twigeze duhemukira; nta we twigeze ducuza ikiri icye; nta n’uwo twigeze turya imitsi." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ibyo simbivugiye kubahamya icyaha; nk’uko nakomeje kubibabwira: muri inkoramutima zacu bigeze n’aho urupfu rutadutandukanya. 
2Corinthians7:4 Mbafitiye ubwizere buhagije, kandi muhora muntera akanyamuneza. Mu magorwa yacu yose, mpora niyumvamo ihumure, ndetse nsendereye ibyishimo." 
2Corinthians7:5 Mu by’ukuri, kuva twagera muri Masedoniya, nta gahenge twigeze tugira, ahubwo twahuye n’ingorane zitabarika, ari intambara zo hanze, ari n’inkeke zo ku mutima." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ariko Imana ihoza abiyoroshya, yaduhumurije ituzanira Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Si ukuza kwe gusa, ahubwo no kumva ukuntu mwamwakiriye, akanadutekerereza iby’urukumbuzi mumfitiye, amarira yanyu, n’ukuntu mundwanirira ishyaka, ibyo byose byatumye nishima kurushaho." 
2Corinthians7:8 N’ubwo wenda ibaruwa nabandikiye yabababaje, sinicuza kuba narayanditse. Nanone ndabona ko yabababaje mu gihe cy’akanya gato," 
2Corinthians7:9 n’ubwo naba narabyicujije, ubu nshimishijwe n’uko yabateye kwisubiraho. Agahinda kanyu kanyuze Imana, bityo ku bwanjye nkaba nta nabi nabagiriye." 
2Corinthians7:10 Kuko akababaro kanyuze Imana gatera kwisubiraho bigeza ku mukiro. Ibyo rero nta n’umwe wabyicuza. Naho akababaro gaheze mu by’isi gusa, gakurura urupfu." 
2Corinthians7:11 Nimwirebere namwe icyo akababaro kanyu kanyuze Imana, kabagejejeho! Mbega umwete mwagize! Ukuntu mwitwaye! Ukuntu mwigaye, mwagize igishyika! Mbega ubushake, ukuntu mwagize isyaka, mwifuza gucyaha ikibi! Muri ibyo byose mwerekanye ko muri abere ku byabaye." 
2Corinthians7:12 Muri make, ubwo mperutse kubandikira, sinabigiriye uwahemutse, cyangwa uwahemukiwe, ahubwo kwari ukugira ngo mbagaragarize ishyaka mudufitiye imbere y’Imana." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngicyo icyatumaze agahinda. Uretse ihumurizwa bwite mwaduteye, twanyuzwe cyane n’ukuntu Tito yishimiye ko mwamwuruye umutima." 
2Corinthians7:14 Niba kandi hari ikintu nabamuratiyeho, sinigeze mbyicuza. Muzi neza ko mpora mbabwiza ukuri: ukuntu nabamuratiye ni ko yabasanze." 
2Corinthians7:15 Na we yarushijeho kubakunda, iyo abona ukuntu mumwumvira mwese, n’ukuntu mwamwakiranye icyubahiro n’igitinyiro." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nishimiye ko nshobora kubiringira muri byose. 
2Corinthians8:1 Bavandimwe, turifuza kubamenyesha ubuntu Imana yagiriye Kiliziya zo muri Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 N’ubwo bari mu ruhuri rw’amagorwa y’ibigeragezo, hakubitiyeho ubukene bukabije, ariko kandi bari no mu byishimo byinshi, ibyo byabateye kugira ubuntu cyane." 
2Corinthians8:3 Nanjye ndahamya ko batanze ku bwende bwabo, ndetse birenze uko bashoboye." 
2Corinthians8:4 Ahubwo banyingingiraga kubareka ngo bagire uruhare ku mfashanyo yagenewe abatagatifujwe (bo muri Yudeya). 
2Corinthians8:5 Baritanze, biyegurira Imana natwe baratwiha, birenze ndetse uko twari tubyizeye, nk’uko Imana yabishatse." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ni cyo cyatumye nsaba Tito nshishikaye ngo akomeze iwanyu icyo gikorwa yabatangiyemo cyo kugira ubuntu. 
2Corinthians8:7 Kandi ubwo musanganywe ubukungahazwe muri byose, haba mu kwemera no mu kuvuga neza, mu bumenyi n’ishyaka muri byose, ndetse no mu rukundo twabatoje, nimukataze no muri iyo ngabire yo kugira ubuntu." 
2Corinthians8:8 Simbibahayemo itegeko, ahubwo ndabamenyesha imyifatire y’ahandi, mukurizeho kugaragaza ukuri k’urukundo rwanyu." 
2Corinthians8:9 Musanzwe muzi ubugiraneza bw’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, We mukire wemeye kwigira umukene, ari mwe abigirira, ngo abakungaharishe ubukene bwe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ni akanama mbagira muri ibyo: ni byiza ko mukomeza icyo gikorwa cy’urukundo mwatangiye umwaka ushize; ntimwabaye aba mbere gusa mu kubitekereza, ahubwo no mu kubikurikiza." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ngaho nimugere ku cyo mwiyemeje, maze uko mubishoboye, ibikorwa byanyu byuzuze ugushaka kwanyu." 
2Corinthians8:12 Utangana umutima mwiza ntagayirwa icyo adafite, ashimirwa icyo yatanze!" 
2Corinthians8:13 Si ukuvuga ko mugomba kwikokora ngo murarwana ku bandi, ahubwo muharanire kuringaniza." 
2Corinthians8:14 Kuri ubwo buryo, icyo akarusho mutunze kizatabarure abari mu bwinazi; maze umunsi umwe icyo na bo bazabarusha kizabatabare mu bukene bwanyu, mukomeze mutyo kuba magirirane." 
2Corinthians8:15 Koko byaranditswe ngo «Uwayoye byinshi nta cyo yarengejeho, n’uwayoye bike nta cyo yabuzeho.»" 
2Corinthians8:16 Imana ishimwe, Yo yahaye na Tito uwo mutima wo kubakunda." 
2Corinthians8:17 Igihe musabye kujya iwanyu, yahise abyemera, ndetse yihutira kubageraho." 
2Corinthians8:18 Twamwohereje hamwe n’umuvandimwe ushimwa na Kiliziya zose kubera ishyaka afitiye Inkuru Nziza. 
2Corinthians8:19 Si n’ibyo gusa, Kiliziya zose zamutoreye kuduherekeza mu rugendo tujyanye imfashanyo zanyu, zihesha Imana ikuzo kandi zikagaragaza umutima wacu wo gufasha abandi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Nirinda rwose ko hagira untera urubwa mu buryo ngenga iyo mfashanyo itubutse mwanshinze. 
2Corinthians8:21 Turaharanira kuba indakemwa, bitari imbere y’Imana gusa, ndetse no mu maso y’abantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tubatumanye kandi n’undi muvandimwe wacu twagerageje ku buryo bwinshi, twasanze ari umunyeshyaka, maze ubu akaba arushijeho kurigira, kubera icyizere cyinshi abafitiye." 
2Corinthians8:23 Muzi ko Tito ari mugenzi wanjye dufatanya imirimo yose tubakorera. Naho abandi bavandimwe, bo bahagarariye za Kiliziya, kandi bakaba ikuzo rya Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ngaho rero, nimubagaragarize urukundo rwanyu, n’impamvu zidutera kubarata, bimenyekane muri za Kiliziya zose." 
2Corinthians9:1 Si ngombwa ko ngira icyo mbandikira ku byerekeye imfashanyo igenewe abatagatifujwe. 
2Corinthians9:2 Nzi imigambi myiza mufite, ndetse nabaratiye n’abo muri Masedoniya, nti «Kuva mu mwaka ushize, abo muri Akaya biteguye gutanga imfashanyo», kandi ishyaka ryanyu ryateye inkunga za Kiliziya nyinshi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Mboherereje aba bavandimwe, kugira ngo iryo shema mbafitiye muri ibyo ritaba impfabusa, muzasangwe koko mwiteguye, nk’uko nabibavuzeho." 
2Corinthians9:4 Mfite ubwoba ko, ndamutse nzanye n’abo muri Masedoniya, twasanga nta cyo mwateguye, kandi twari tubafitiye icyizere gihagije; twakorwa n’ikimwaro, ntiriwe mvuga ko namwe mwaba mugayitse." 
2Corinthians9:5 Nasanze ibyiza ari uko abo bavandimwe bambanziriza ngo begeranye amaturo yanyu, maze ibyo mwiyemeje gutanga ku buntu bimaze kuringanizwa, bizabe iby’ubuntu koko, atari ibyo mutanze mugononwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Muramenye ko «Uwabibye ubusa, asarura ubusa, naho uwabibye byinshi agasarura byinshi!»" 
2Corinthians9:7 Buri wese rero atange uko umutima we ubimubwira, atinuba, adahaswe, kuko Imana ikunda utanga yishimye." 
2Corinthians9:8 Imana ifite ububasha bwo kubasenderezaho ibyiza by’ubwoko bwose, kugira ngo muhorane ibya ngombwa igihe cyose no muri byose, mugasagura ndetse n’ibibafasha gukora ibikorwa byiza." 
2Corinthians9:9 Nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Yatanze ku buntu, akwiza abakene; ubutungane bwe buzahoraho iteka.»" 
2Corinthians9:10 Uha umuhinzi imbuto zo kubiba, akanamuha umugati wo kurya, azabaha namwe imbuto, azirumbure, kandi agwize umusaruro w’ubutungane bwanyu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Muzakungahazwa ku buryo bwose, bizatume mutanga mutizigamye maze imfashanyo tuzaba tubashyikirije, zitere benshi gushimira Imana." 
2Corinthians9:12 Umurimo w’ayo maturo, ntugamije gusa mu gukenura abatagatifujwe, ahubwo ugenewe no kugwiza amasengesho yo gushimira Imana." 
2Corinthians9:13 Abanyuzwe n’uwo murimo bazakurizaho gusingiza Imana kubera ukuntu mwumviye Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu, banayishimire kandi ubuntu mugira bwo gusangira byose na bose." 
2Corinthians9:14 Bityo mu kubasabira, babagaragarize ubwuzu babafitiye, ku mpamvu z’ingabire Imana yabasesekarije." 
2Corinthians9:15 Imana ishimirwe ubuntu bwayo butagereranywa! 
2Corinthians10:1 Ni jyewe Pawulo ubibisabiye ubwanjye, mu bugwaneza n’ituze bya Kristu. Muvuga ko iyo turi kumwe niyoroshya, naba ndi kure nkabisha." 
2Corinthians10:2 Nyamara ndabinginze, igihe nzazira iwanyu, sinzagombe gukoresha amakare, n’ubwo nifuza gukangara bamwe bibwira ko tucyitwara bya runtu." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kuba abantu ko turi abantu, ariko ntitukirwana ibi bisanzwe by’abantu." 
2Corinthians10:4 Oya, intwaro zacu ntizikomoka kuri muntu, ahubwo ububasha bwazo buturuka ku Mana, bugasenyagura ibyari intamenwa. Abiyemera tubakura ku izima," 
2Corinthians10:5 kimwe n’abatambamiye ubumenyi bw’Imana. Twigarurira ibitekerezo byose ngo bigomokere Kristu," 
2Corinthians10:6 kandi twiteguye gucyaha icyitwa agasuzuguro cyose, igihe mwebwe muzaba mwumviye muri byose." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nimurebe ibintu uko biri! Uwibwira wese ko ari uwa Kristu, namenye bidasubirwaho ko natwe turi aba Kristu, kimwe na we!" 
2Corinthians10:8 Niba naba nkabya mu kwiratana ububasha Nyagasani yaduhereye kubakomeza, atari ubwo kubadindiza, nta soni binteye." 
2Corinthians10:9 Sinshaka gusa n’ubakangaranya mu nzandiko zanjye," 
2Corinthians10:10 — kuko hari abavuga ngo «Inzandiko ze zifite ireme kandi zirakaze, nyamara iyo ari muri twe, usanga agayitse n’ijambo rye ari nta ryo.» —" 
2Corinthians10:11 Uwibwira ibyo amenye neza ko, uko tumeze mu mvugo, turi kure, twandika, nta ho bitandukaniye n’ibyo tuzakora tugeze iwanyu." 
2Corinthians10:12 Kuko tutahangara kwireshyeshya no kwigereranya n’abo biyogeza ubwabo; ni abirasi rwose gukeka ko ari bo kamara n’igipimo cya byose. 
2Corinthians10:13 Twebwe tuzirinda kwirata birengeje urugero rw’umurimo Imana yadushinze itwohereza iwanyu. 
2Corinthians10:14 Iyo tuza kuba tutaraje iwanyu twaba koko dutandukiriye; none twabaye aba mbere bageze iwanyu tubazaniye Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu. 
2Corinthians10:15 Nta bwo twikabiriza nk’abiratana imirimo yakozwe n’abandi, ahubwo dufite icyizere ko, nimukomeza gutera imbere mu kwemera, tuzarushaho kwagura umurimo wacu muri mwe," 
2Corinthians10:16 ndetse Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu tukayirenza imbibi z’iwanyu, uko tubishinzwe; bityo ntituziratane imirimo abandi bakoze mu murima wabo." 
2Corinthians10:17 «Ushaka kwirata wese, niyiratire muri Nyagasani!»" 
2Corinthians10:18 Uwiyemezaho agaciro wese, si we ugakwiye, ahubwo uwo Nyagasani akemejeho, ni we ugakwiye." 
2Corinthians11:1 Icyampa ngo mushobore kwihanganira ubusazi bwanjye ho gato! Ngaho se nimunyihanganire! 
2Corinthians11:2 Mbakunda byansajije, nk’uko Imana ibakunda. Nabashyingiye umukwe umwe rukumbi, mbashyikiriza Kristu muri nk’umugeni w’isugi." 
2Corinthians11:3 Nyamara, nk’uko Eva yaguye mu mutego w’inzoka, ndatinya ko namwe, imitima yanyu izahuma mugateshuka ku bupfura mukwiriye kugirira Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Dore nawe, uwadutse wese abamenyesha undi Yezu utari uwo twabigishije, cyangwa se akabarohamo umwuka wundi utari Mwuka w'Imana mwahawe, cyangwa se akabazanira indi nkuru nziza itari Iyo twabashyikirije, uwo muntu mumutega yombi." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ndibwira ko izo ntumwa z’akataraboneka nta cyo zindusha. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ndi umuswa koko mu byo kuvuga neza, nyamara sindi we mu by’ubuhanga. Ibyo twabibagaragarije muri byose no ku buryo bwose." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ubwo se cyabaye icyaha cyo kubicishaho bugufi, mbamamariza Inkuru Nziza y’Imana ku buntu, kugira ngo mbaheshe agaciro?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Nacuje za Kiliziya z’ahandi, nemera gutungwa na zo ngo mbone uko mbakorera." 
2Corinthians11:9 Iyo nagiraga icyo nkenera ndi iwanyu, nta we nigeze ndushya, kuko ibyo nari mbuze nabihabwaga n’abavandimwe baturutse muri Masedoniya. Iteka ryose nirinze kubagora, kandi nzakomeza kubyirinda." 
2Corinthians11:10 Mbarahirije ukuri kwa Kristu undimo, nta we uzanyaga iryo shema mu turere twose two muri Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Kuki se? Kuko se ntabakunda? Imana ni Yo ibizi! 
2Corinthians11:12 Nzakomeza uko nsanzwe ngenza, kugira ngo ndaha urwaho abarunshakaho, babure impamvu yo kwirata ko duhwanyije agaciro." 
2Corinthians11:13 Bene abo bantu ni ingirwantumwa, ni abahendanyi biyoberanyamo intumwa za Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ibyo kandi ntibitangaje: Sekibi na yo yihinduramo umumalayika w’urumuri. 
2Corinthians11:15 Nta gitangaje rero ko abagaragu bayo bihinduramo abaharanira ubutungane. Nyamara amaherezo yabo ni ukugarukwa n’ibyo bakoze. 
2Corinthians11:16 Nongere mbisubiremo, ntihakagire ukeka ko ndi umusazi, cyangwa se nimunyemerere kuba we maze nanjye nshobore kwirataho gato." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ibyo ngiye kuvuga, simbibwirijwe na Nyagasani, ahubwo mu bisazi byanjye nishimiye kugira icyo niratana." 
2Corinthians11:18 Ubwo benshi biratana ibyo bakesha kamere, reka nanjye nirate." 
2Corinthians11:19 Mwebwe muzwiho ubwitonzi, mwihanganira abasazi nta ngorane!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Mwihanganira ko babagira abacakara, ko babaryana utwanyu, ko babacuza, ko babishongoraho, ko babakubita mu maso." 
2Corinthians11:21 Mfite isoni zo kubabwira ko twagize intege nke nka bo! Ibyo abandi batinyutse kwivuga — noneho mvuge nk’umusazi — nanjye ndabitinyutse. 
2Corinthians11:22 Mbese ni Abahebureyi? Nanjye ndi we! Ni Abayisraheli? Nanjye ndi we! Inkomoko ya Abrahamu? Nanjye ndi yo! 
2Corinthians11:23 Mbese bakorera Kristu? — Reka mvuge amateshwa — Ndabarusha bose! Mu miruho? Narabarushije! Mu buroko? Incuro nyinshi kubarusha! Inkoni? Nakubiswe izitabarika! Amakuba y’urupfu? Nayagize hato na hato! 
2Corinthians11:24 Incuro eshanu Abayisraheli bankubise ibiboko mirongo itatu n’icyenda. 
2Corinthians11:25 Nakubiswe inkoni incuro eshatu, rimwe mpondaguzwa amabuye, ndohama gatatu mu mazi, ndetse mara ijoro n’umunsi rwagati mu nyanja." 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ngendo zanjye nyinshi nagiriye amakuba mu nzuzi, mpura n’abambuzi, ngira akaga k’abo dusangiye ubwoko n’ako ntewe n’abanyamahanga, ngirira ingorane mu mugi, mu butayu no mu nyanja, nkubitiraho imitego y’abagambanyi biyita abavandimwe!" 
2Corinthians11:27 Mu miruho n’iminaniro, mu kurara irondo kenshi, mu nzara n’inyota, mu gusiba kurya kenshi, mu kwicwa n’imbeho no kubura icyo nambara;" 
2Corinthians11:28 ntavuze n’ibisigaye: inkeke ya buri munsi mpagaritswe umutima na za Kiliziya zose! 
2Corinthians11:29 Ni nde wacogoye, sincike intege? Ni nde wateshutse, maze simpinde umushyitsi?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Niba kwirata ari ngombwa, nziratana intege nke zanjye." 
2Corinthians11:31 Imana, Se wa Nyagasani Yezu, yogahora isingizwa iteka, izi ko ntabeshya." 
2Corinthians11:32 I Damasi, igisonga cy’Umwami Areta cyarindishije umugi ngo bamfate." 
2Corinthians11:33 Nuko bancisha mu idirishya, bamanurira ku rukuta mu gitebo, murokoka ntyo." 
2Corinthians12:1 Mbese ni ngombwa kwirata? Ubanza ari nta cyo bimaze! Nyamara reka ngere ku ibonekerwa no ku byo nahishuriwe na Nyagasani. 
2Corinthians12:2 Hari umuntu nzi ku bwa Kristu, hashize imyaka cumi n’ine, — niba byari mu mubiri we, simbizi; niba bitari mu mubiri we, jye simbizi; Imana ni Yo ibizi —, uwo muntu rero yarajyanywe, agezwa mu bushorishori bw’ijuru." 
2Corinthians12:3 Kandi nzi ko uwo muntu, — niba ari mu mubiri we, niba atari mu mubiri we, simbizi; Imana ni Yo ibizi —," 
2Corinthians12:4 uwo muntu yajyanywe mu ijuru maze ahumvira amagambo arengeje imivugirwe, umuntu ndetse adafitiye uruhusa rwo gusubiramo." 
2Corinthians12:5 Bene uwo muntu namwiratana koko, usibye ko jyewe nta kindi nziratana kitari intege nke zanjye." 
2Corinthians12:6 Rwose, nshatse kwirata sinaba ndi umusazi, kuko naba mvuga ibiri ukuri; ariko na byo ndabyirinze, ngo hato batankekaho kuba nsumbye uko bambona cyangwa uko mvuga." 
2Corinthians12:7 Maze, kugira ngo ibyo bintu bihanitse nahishuriwe bitantera kwirarika, nashyizwe umugera mu mubiri, ari yo ntumwa ya Sekibi ngo ijye inkubita, nirinde kwikuza." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ibyo byatumye nsaba Nyagasani gatatu kose ngo ayinkize. 
2Corinthians12:9 Maze aransubiza ati «Ingabire yanjye iraguhagije; kuko ububasha bwanjye bwigaragariza cyane cyane mu banyantegenke.» Ni yo mpamvu mpisemo kwiratira mu ntege nke zanjye, kugira ngo ububasha bwa Kristu bunyituriremo." 
2Corinthians12:10 Bityo mpimbarirwe mu ntege nke zanjye, mu bitutsi, mu mage, mu bitotezo no mu ihagarikamutima, mbigirira Kristu. Kuko igihe cyose mba mfite intege nke, ari bwo nyine mba nkomeye." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ngaho rero nabaye umusazi! Ariko ni mwe mwabinteye. Ni mwe muba mwarandwanyeho, kuko nta cyo izo ntumwa z’akataraboneka zinsumbije, n’ubwo nta cyo ndi cyo." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ibiranga intumwa nyayo byarabagaragariye, ari byo ibi: ukwihangana kudahinyuka, ibimenyetso, ibitangaza, n’ibikorwa by’ububasha." 
2Corinthians12:13 Izindi Kiliziya zabarushije iki, usibye ko jye ntigeze mbasahura? Niba muri ibyo narabarenganyije, nimubimbabarire!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Ubu niteguye kugaruka iwanyu ubwa gatatu, kandi nta bwo nzabagora; kuko atari ibintu byanyu ndangamiye, ahubwo ari mwebwe ubwanyu. Si abana bagomba kuzigamira ababyeyi, ahubwo ababyeyi ni bo babikorera abana babo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ku binyerekeye, nahara ibyanjye byose, nanjye nkitanga wese ntizigamye, mbigirira mwe. Ese kuba mbakunze by’agahebuzo byamviramo gukundwa urumamo?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ni koko, sinabashatsemo indonke! Ariko nabaye inyaryenge mbafatisha amayeri?" 
2Corinthians12:17 Murebe mu bo nabatumyeho, uwo nikingirije ngo mbacuze." 
2Corinthians12:18 Ningingiye Tito kuza iwanyu, n’undi muvandimwe mutayobewe. Tito se yaba ari we wabamazeho ibintu? Twaba se tutaragize umutima umwe? Cyangwa tutaraciye inzira imwe?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Hashize umwanya mutekereza ko turiho tubireguraho? Oya da! Turavugira imbere y’Imana, muri Kristu. Kandi ibyo byose, nkoramutima zacu, bibere kubagwa neza." 
2Corinthians12:20 Cyakora mfite ubwoba ko, ninza, ntazabasanga uko mbyifuza, cyangwa se ko jyewe mutazasanga meze uko munyifuza; ndatinya ko nzabasangana ubwumvikane buke, ishyari, uburakari, ubushyamirane, amazimwe, ubutiriganya, ugusuzugurana n’imvururu." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndatinya rwose ko, igihe nzagaruka iwanyu, Imana yanjye izankoza isoni imbere yanyu, nkarizwa na benshi muri mwe bacumuye, ariko ntibisubireho ngo biyake ingeso mbi, ubusambanyi n’ubuhabara." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ubu ni ubwa gatatu ngiye kuza iwanyu. (Nk’uko Ibyanditswe bibivuga) «Urubanza rwose ruzasozwa ari uko rukemuwe n’abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu». 
2Corinthians13:2 Narabivuze ubwo nabasuraga bwa kabiri, n’ubu nkiri kure nongeye kubisubiramo, abaherutse gucumura n’abandi bose, ko nindamuka nje, nta mpuhwe nzabagirira," 
2Corinthians13:3 kuko ngo mushaka ikimenyetso cy’uko ari Kristu umvugiramo. Kristu si inganzwa kuri mwe, ahubwo azabagaragariza ububasha bwe." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ni koko yabambwe ku musaraba bishingiye ku ntege nke ze, ariko ubu ni muzima bishingiye ku bubasha bw’Imana. Natwe kandi muri We turi abanyantege nke, ariko nk’uko muzabyibonera, tuzabana na We ku bw’ububasha bw’Imana buzabagaragarizwa." 
2Corinthians13:5 Nimwisuzume ubwanyu, mwigerageze, murebe ko mutacogoye mu kwemera. Mwaba se mwariyibagije ko Kristu abatuyemo nyirizina? Keretse rero, musanze mwaratsinzwe!" 
2Corinthians13:6 Nizeye ko mudashidikanya ko twe twatsinze. 
2Corinthians13:7 Turasaba Imana ngo mutazavaho mukora nabi. Icyo tugamije si ukugaragaza ko mwatsinzwe n’igeragezwa, ahubwo ni uko twababona mukora neza, maze tukaba ari twe twibeshya." 
2Corinthians13:8 Nta ntege dufite zo kurwanya ukuri, ahubwo tuzifitiye kugushyigikira." 
2Corinthians13:9 Duhora twishimye iyo twe ducogoye ariko mwe mukaba mukomeye. Impamvu y’amasengesho yacu ni uko mwatera imbere. 
2Corinthians13:10 Ni cyo gitumye mbandikiye nkiri kure, ngo ntazazanwa no guca urubanza, nkoresheje ububasha Nyagasani yampereye kubakomeza aho kubacogoza." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ahasigaye rero, bavandimwe, muhorane ibyishimo, mutere imbere, muterana inkunga, mushyire hamwe, mubane mu ituze, bityo Imana yuje urukundo n’amahoro izabana namwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Muramukanye mu muhoberano mutagatifu. Abatagatifujwe bose b’ino barabaramutsa. 
2Corinthians13:13 Ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, n’urukundo rw’Imana Data, n’ubusabane kuri Roho Mutagatifu, bihorane namwe mwese." 
Galatians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo intumwa, itari iy’abantu cyangwa kubw’umuntu, ahubwo ku bushake bwa Yezu Kristu n’Imana Umubyeyi wacu wamuzuye mu bapfuye," 
Galatians1:2 n’abavandimwe bose turi kumwe, kuri za Kiliziya zo mu Bugalati:" 
Galatians1:3 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu, no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 witangiye ibyaha byacu ngo aturokore iyi si mbi, akurikije ugushaka kw’Imana, ari Yo Umubyeyi wacu." 
Galatians1:5 Nahabwe ikuzo uko ibihe bihora bisimburana. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ntangazwa n’ukuntu, mu kanya gato, mutangiye gucika ku wabahamagariye ineza ya Kristu, mugashikira indi Nkuru Nziza." 
Galatians1:7 Si uko haba hari indi Nkuru Nziza ibaho. Ni uko hadutse abantu bashaka ko muhagarika imitima, bashaka no guhindura Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu." 
Galatians1:8 Ariko rero, hagize ubigisha Inkuru Nziza itari iyo twabigishije, kabone n’aho yaba umwe muri twe, cyangwa umumalayika umanutse mu ijuru, arakaba ikivume!" 
Galatians1:9 Mbese nk’uko twababwiye, kandi n’ubu ngubu mbisubiyemo: uzabigisha Inkuru Nziza itari iyo mwakiriye, arakaba ikivume!" 
Galatians1:10 Mbese ubu ngubu nkurikiranye gushimwa n’abantu cyangwa n’Imana? Aho ntimugira ngo mparanira kuneza abantu? Mbaye nkigamije kuneza abantu, sinaba nkiri umugaragu wa Kristu." 
Galatians1:11 Mbibamenyeshe rero, bavandimwe, iyo Nkuru Nziza nabigishije si iy’umuntu," 
Galatians1:12 si n’umuntu nyikesha, kandi si umuntu wayinyigishije: ni Yezu Kristu wayimpishuriye." 
Galatians1:13 Mwumvise kandi imigirire yanjye kera nkiri mu kiyahudi: ko natotezaga bikabije Kiliziya y’Imana nshaka kuyitsemba. 
Galatians1:14 Kandi benshi mu bo tungana, dusangiye n’ubwoko nabarushaga gukurikiza idini ya kiyahudi, nkabasumbya ishyaka mu guharanira umuco karande w’abasokuruza." 
Galatians1:15 Nyamara umunsi Uwanyitoranyirije nkiri mu nda ya mama, yampamagaye kubw’ineza ye" 
Galatians1:16 ngo ampishurire Umwana we, kugira ngo mwamamaze mu mahanga, ako kanya nahise mpaguruka nta we niriwe ngisha inama," 
Galatians1:17 habe no kuzamuka i Yeruzalemu ngo nsange abantanze kuba intumwa; ahubwo nagiye muri Arabiya, nyuma ngaruka i Damasi." 
Galatians1:18 Nyuma y’imyaka itatu, ni bwo nazamutse i Yeruzalemu kureba Petero, tumarana iminsi cumi n’itanu." 
Galatians1:19 Nta yindi ntumwa twabonanye, uretse Yakobo umuvandimwe wa Nyagasani." 
Galatians1:20 Ibi mbandikira, dore ndi mu maso y’Imana, simbeshya." 
Galatians1:21 Hanyuma naje mu ntara ya Siriya na Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Kiliziya za Kristu ziri mu Yudeya zari zitarambona," 
Galatians1:23 usibye ko zumvaga bavuga ngo «wa wundi wadutotezaga kera, asigaye yamamaza ukwemera yahoze arwanya.»" 
Galatians1:24 Nuko zigasingiza Imana kubera jye. 
Galatians2:1 Nyuma y’imyaka cumi n’ine, nongera kuzamuka i Yeruzalemu, ndi kumwe na Barinaba, na Tito ndamujyana." 
Galatians2:2 Nazamutseyo ari uko Imana yabimpishuriye. Mbanyuriramo ibyerekeye Inkuru Nziza nigishaga mu mahanga; abayobozi bo nyibasobanurira birambuye twiherereye. Kwari ukugira ngo menye niba nirukira cyangwa narirukiye ubusa. 
Galatians2:3 Yewe, kabone na Tito mugenzi wanjye utari Umuyahudi, ntibamuhatiye kugenywa;" 
Galatians2:4 nyamara ariko hari indyarya ziyita abavandimwe zitwihishamo ngo zitubuze ubwigenge bwacu twifitiye muri Kristu Yezu, bityo ngo zidusubize mu bucakara." 
Galatians2:5 Ntitwigeze n’akanya na gato tuganzwa n’abo, kugira ngo ukuri kw’Inkuru Nziza kuzagume muri mwe." 
Galatians2:6 Naho abayobozi — icyo bari cyo nticyari kinshishikaje kuko Imana itareba ubusumbane bw’abantu — abo bayobozi nta kindi bantegetse. 
Galatians2:7 Ahubwo ndetse babonye ko nashinzwe kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza mu batagenywe nk’uko Petero yayishinzwe mu bagenywe," 
Galatians2:8 kuko Uwahaye Petero kuba intumwa mu bagenywe, ni na We wampaye kuba intumwa mu banyamahanga." 
Galatians2:9 Nuko Yakobo, Petero na Yohani, kandi ari na bo bitwa inkingi, bamaze kumenya ingabire nahawe, turumvikana baduhereza ukuboko, jyewe na Barinaba, ngo twebwe tujye mu banyamahanga, naho bo mu bagenywe." 
Galatians2:10 Batwihanangirije ikintu kimwe rudori: ko tuzajya twibuka abakene; ari na cyo nihatiye gukora. 
Galatians2:11 Nyamara ariko, ubwo Petero yazaga Antiyokiya, nahanganye na we kuko byari ngombwa kumugaya." 
Galatians2:12 Koko rero, mbere y’uko haza abantu bo mu gice cya Yakobo, yasangiraga n’abanyamahanga. Aho baziye, aravunura, aritarura, byo gutinya abagenywe." 
Galatians2:13 N’abandi Bayahudi bigana uburyarya bwe, bigeza aho na Barinaba yoshywa na bo kuryarya bene ako kageni." 
Galatians2:14 Jye rero mbonye ko batagororokeye ukuri kw’Inkuru Nziza, mbwira Petero bose barora nti «Niba wowe w’Umuyahudi ugenza nk’abanyamahanga aho kugenza kiyahudi, ushobora ute guhatira abanyamahanga kugenza kiyahudi?»" 
Galatians2:15 Twebwe turi Abayahudi kavukire, ntituri abanyamahanga b’abanyabyaha." 
Galatians2:16 Tuzi ariko ko umuntu atagirwa intungane no kubahiriza amategeko, ahubwo no kwemera Yezu Kristu byonyine. Natwe rero twemeye Yezu Kristu, ngo tuzagirwe intungane no kwemera Kristu, tutabitewe no kuzuza amategeko kuko nta n’umwe uba intungane abikesheje kubahiriza amategeko." 
Galatians2:17 Kuba se dushaka kuba intungane muri Kristu, ariko kandi bikagaragara ko natwe ubwacu tukiri abanyabyaha, bizabe byerekana ko Kristu ari we utuma abantu bagwa mu cyaha? Oya ntibikabe!" 
Galatians2:18 Mbaye ari jye wubaka bundi bushya ibyo nashenye, naba nihamije icyaha." 
Galatians2:19 Nyamara rero, jyewe napfuye ku byerekeye kugengwa n’amategeko, kandi ari amategeko abinteye, kugira ngo mbeho ngengwa n’Imana. Nabambanywe na Kristu ku musaraba." 
Galatians2:20 Yego ndiho, ariko mu by'ukuri si jye ukiriho, ahubwo ni Kristu uriho muri jye. Kuba ubu ngubu ndiho mu mubiri, ni uko ndiho mu kwemera Umwana w’Imana wankunze, ubwe akigabiza urupfu ari jye agirira." 
Galatians2:21 Jye sinasuzuguza ineza y’Imana. Kuko niba ari itegeko rituma umuntu aba intungane, noneho Kristu yapfiriye akamama!" 
Galatians3:1 Mbega ngo muraba abapfu, Banyagalati! Ni nde wabararuye kandi mwareretswe uko Kristu yabambwe?" 
Galatians3:2 Ndifuza ko mumenyesha iki cyonyine: ari ukuzuza amategeko, ari no kwakira ukwemera, icyabahesheje Roho ni ikihe?" 
Galatians3:3 Mbese mwabaye abapfu bigejeje aho? Mwatangiye ibintu mufashijwe na Roho, none mwibwiye ko bizuzurizwa mu ruhu rw’umubiri?" 
Galatians3:4 Mbega kuruhira ubusa? Ubonye n’iyo biba ku busa nyine! 
Galatians3:5 Mbese nyine, Ubaha Roho, akabakoramo ibitangaza, abigirira ko mwujuje amategeko cyangwa ko mwakiriye ukwemera?" 
Galatians3:6 Nk’uko Abrahamu yemeye Uhoraho bigatuma aba intungane," 
Galatians3:7 mubimenye rero: abemera ni bo bana ba Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Ibyanditswe byabibonye kare ko Imana izatagatifuza amahanga ku mpamvu y’ukwemera, byo byahanuriye Abrahamu ngo «Imiryango yose y’isi izaguherwamo umugisha.»" 
Galatians3:9 Bityo rero, abemera bahabwa umugisha hamwe na Abrahamu w’umwemezi." 
Galatians3:10 Naho abitwaza ibikorwa by’amategeko, bikururira umuvumo kuko byanditswe ngo «Arakaba ikivume utuzuza ibyanditswe byose mu Gitabo cy’Amategeko.»" 
Galatians3:11 Ni ikintu kigaragara kandi ko mu maso y’Imana, nta muntu n’umwe waba intungane abikesha amategeko kuko «intungane izabeshwaho n’ukwemera.»" 
Galatians3:12 Amategeko kandi ntahuje.» n’ukwemera yo avuga ngo «umuntu uzubahiriza ibyo, bizamubeshaho" 
Galatians3:13 Kristu yadukijije umuvumo w’amategeko, yihindura umuvumo ari we, ari twe agirira, kuko byanditswe ngo «Umanitse ku giti wese ni umuvumo.»" 
Galatians3:14 Ibyo ari ukugira ngo umugisha wa Abrahamu usesekare ku mahanga muri Kristu Yezu, kandi duhabwe mu kwemera Roho twasezeranijwe." 
Galatians3:15 Bavandimwe, mvuge mpereye ku mico y’abantu: indagano umuntu akoze, nta wundi uyisesa cyangwa ngo agire icyo ayongeraho." 
Galatians3:16 Abrahamu rero ni we wahawe amasezerano, we n’urubyaro rwe. Ntibavuga imbyaro ze nk’aho ari nyinshi: ahubwo ni nk’aho ari urubyaro rumwe rukumbi: «n’urubyaro rwawe», ari rwo Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Icyo nshaka kuvuga rero ni iki: indagano ihamye y’Imana nta bwo yaseswa n’itegeko ryashyizweho hashize imyaka magana ane na mirongo itatu; bibaye ibyo, iyo ndagano yaba ibaye ubusa." 
Galatians3:18 Kuko iyaba umurage watangwaga ku bw’itegeko, ntibyaba bikibaye ku bw’isezerano. Nyamara ineza Imana yagiriye Abrahamu, yayigiriye isezerano." 
Galatians3:19 Itegeko rero ni iry’iki? Ryongereweho hanyuma ngo rijye rigaragaza uwacumuye, kuzageza igihe hazahinguka urubyaro rwagenewe isezerano. Itegeko ryatangajwe n’abamalayika barishinga umuhuza." 
Galatians3:20 Nyamara umuhuza ntiyabaye uw’umwe. Imana yo ni imwe rukumbi. 
Galatians3:21 Noneho se, itegeko ryaba ritambamiye amasezerano y’Imana? Oya ntibikabe! Iyaba koko haratangajwe itegeko ritanga ubugingo, ubutungane buba mu by’ukuri buriturukaho." 
Galatians3:22 Ahubwo rero Ibyanditswe byabohesheje byose ingoyi y’icyaha kugira ngo isezerano rizuzurizwe abemera Yezu Kristu. 
Galatians3:23 Mbere y’uko igihe cy’ukwemera kigera, twari nk’imfungwa turinzwe n’amategeko, dutegereje uko kwemera kwagombaga guhishurwa." 
Galatians3:24 Bityo rero, amategeko yaradushoreye adushyikiriza Kristu kugira ngo tuzahabwe ubutungane tubikesha ukwemera." 
Galatians3:25 Ubu rero, kuva aho haziye ukwemera, ntitugishorewe," 
Galatians3:26 kuko mwese muri abana b’Imana mubikesha kwemera Kristu Yezu. 
Galatians3:27 Kandi ni koko, mwebwe mwese ababatijwe muri Kristu, mwambaye Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Nta Muyahudi ukiriho, nta Mugereki, nta mucakara, nta mwigenge, nta mugabo, nta mugore, kuko mwese muri umwe muri Kristu Yezu." 
Galatians3:29 Ubwo rero muri aba Kristu, noneho ni mwe rubyaro rwa Abrahamu, ni mwe rero muzegukana umurage wasezeranywe." 
Galatians4:1 Dore icyo nshaka kuvuga: igihe cyose uwagenewe umurage akiri muto, nta ho aba atandukaniye n’umugaragu n’ubwo aba ari we mutware wa byose," 
Galatians4:2 ahubwo agumya kugengwa n’abamurera n’abashinzwe ibintu bye kugeza igihe se yategetse. 
Galatians4:3 Natwe ni uko: igihe twari tukiri bato, twategekwaga n’ibigenga isi, twari abagaragu," 
Galatians4:4 ariko igihe cyagenwe kigeze, Imana yohereje Umwana wayo, avuka ku mugore, kandi avuka agengwa n’amategeko," 
Galatians4:5 kugira ngo acungure abari bakigengwa n’amategeko, maze duhabwe kuba abana Imana yihitiyemo." 
Galatians4:6 Kandi koko muri abana b’Imana, yo yohereje Roho w’Umwana wayo mu mitima yanyu ngo arangurure ijwi agira ati «Abba, Data.»"
