Galatians4:7 Bityo rero ntukiri umugaragu, ahubwo uri umwana; kandi ubwo uri umwana, Imana iguha kuba n’umugenerwamurage." 
Galatians4:8 Kera mutaramenya Imana, mwari abacakara bakorera ibidafite kamere y’Imana." 
Galatians4:9 Ubu ngubu ariko muzi Imana, ndetse na Yo irabazi. Mwongeye mute kugarukira ibyo bintu bitagira intege, bitagira uko byigira na byo? Mwakwiyemeza mute kongera kubibera abagaragu bundi bushya?" 
Galatians4:10 Mwubahiriza imihango n’imiziririzo yerekeye iminsi, amezi, ibihembwe n’imyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Munteye agahinda, nkibaza niba ntaravunikiye ubusa iwanyu." 
Galatians4:12 Bavandimwe, ndabinginze, nimumere nkanjye ubwo nanjye nigize nkamwe. Nta kibi mwigeze mungirira." 
Galatians4:13 Muzi ko nari ndwaye igihe nje kubigisha Inkuru Nziza bwa mbere na mbere. 
Galatians4:14 Uwo muruho mwatewe n’umubiri wanjye, ntimwigeze muwuhungana ishozi cyangwa ngo muwuvumire ku gahera. Ahubwo mwanyakiriye nk’umumalayika w’Imana, nka Kristu Yezu ubwe." 
Galatians4:15 Ubu uri he wa munezero? Jyewe ndahamya rwose ko, iyo biba ibishoboka, muba mwarinogoyemo amaso yanyu ngo muyanyihere." 
Galatians4:16 Ubu se noneho mbaye umwanzi wanyu kuko mbabwije ukuri? 
Galatians4:17 Abo bantu babitayeho cyane, nyamara si icyiza babashakira, kuko bashaka kudutandukanya ngo abe ari bo mwikundira." 
Galatians4:18 Ni byiza kugira urugwiro, iyo murutewe n’umutima mwiza kandi mukarugira iteka, atari igihe ndi kumwe namwe gusa." 
Galatians4:19 Twana twanjye, ndacyari ku gise mbabyara kugeza igihe Kristu abaremwemo." 
Galatians4:20 Iyaba ubu ngubu nari ndi kumwe na mwe, nari kumenya imvugo nakoresha kuko ibyanyu binshobeye." 
Galatians4:21 Ngaho nimumbwire mwebwe mushaka kugengwa n’amategeko: mbese ntimwumvise amategeko? 
Galatians4:22 Koko rero biranditswe ko Abrahamu yagize abahungu babiri; umwe yavutse ku muja, undi ku mugore utigeze ubuja." 
Galatians4:23 Ariko uw’umuja yavutse ku bwa kamere mubiri, naho uw’umugore utari umuja avuka ku bw’isezerano." 
Galatians4:24 Ibyo ni incamarenga. Abo bagore bashushanya amasezerano uko ari abiri: rimwe ryo ku musozi wa Sinayi, rikabyarira ubuja, ni Hagara." 
Galatians4:25 Hagara ashushanya umusozi Sinayi wo muri Arabiya, ashushanya kandi Yeruzalemu y’ubu ngubu kuko ari umuja, we n’abana be." 
Galatians4:26 Naho Yeruzalemu yo mu ijuru irigenga, ni yo umubyeyi wacu." 
Galatians4:27 Koko rero byanditswe ngo «Ishime mugore w’ingumba, wowe utigeze ubyara, rangurura maze uvuze impundu, wowe utamenye ububabare bw’igise, kuko abana b’intabwa baruta ubwinshi ab’ubana n’umugabo»." 
Galatians4:28 Mwebwe rero, bavandimwe, muri abana b’isezerano nka Izaki." 
Galatians4:29 Kandi uko byabaye icyo gihe, uwavutse ku bwa kamere mubiri yatotezaga uwavutse ku bwa roho, na n’ubu ni ko bimeze." 
Galatians4:30 Nyamara se Ibyanditswe bibivugaho iki? «Irukana umuja n’umuhungu we, umwana w’umuja ntagahabwe umurage hamwe n’umwana w’umugore wigenga»." 
Galatians4:31 Bityo rero, bavandimwe, ntituri abana b’umuja, turi abana b’umugore wigenga." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu yaratubohoye kugira ngo tugire ubwo bwigenge. Nimwemarare rero, mwirinde ko umutwaro w’ubucakara wakongera kubagonda ijosi." 
Galatians5:2 Ngaha jyewe Pawulo ndabibabwiye: muramutse mwigenyesheje, Kristu nta cyo yaba akibamariye." 
Galatians5:3 Nongeye kandi kwerurira umuntu wese wigenyesha, ko agomba gukurikiza amategeko iyo ava akagera." 
Galatians5:4 Muzaba mwitandukanije na Kristu rero, nimushakira ubutungane mu mategeko; muzaba mwivukije ineza." 
Galatians5:5 Naho twebwe, ni ku bwa Roho no mu kwemera dutegereje ubutungane twizeye." 
Galatians5:6 Kuko, ku muntu uri muri Kristu, nta cyo bivuze kuba yaragenywe cyangwa atagenywe; igifite akamaro ahubwo, ni ukwemera kujyana n’urukundo." 
Galatians5:7 Ko mwirukaga neza, ni nde ubabambiye ngo mudakurikiza ukuri?" 
Galatians5:8 Igishuko nk’icyo nticyaturuka ku Uwabahamagaye. 
Galatians5:9 N’ubundi agasemburo gake gatutumbya irobe ryose. 
Galatians5:10 Jyewe ndabizeye muri Nyagasani, nzi ko mutatekereza ukundi. Naho ubatera guhagarika imitima, uwo azatsindwa n’urubanza, uwo ari we wese." 
Galatians5:11 Naho jyewe, bavandimwe, niba nkigisha ukugenywa, naba se kandi ngitoterezwa iki? Ubwo rero, umusaraba nta we waba ugiteye kwibaza." 
Galatians5:12 Mbese abo babatera guhagarika umutima, bakwishahuye bakamaraho!" 
Galatians5:13 Mwebweho, bavandimwe, mwahamagariwe ubwigenge. Gusa rero ubwigenge ntibukabere umubiri urwitwazo, ahubwo umwe abere undi umugaragu mugirirana urukundo." 
Galatians5:14 Kuko amategeko yose abumbiye muri iri jambo rimwe rukumbi ngo «Uzakunde mugenzi wawe nkawe ubwawe ». 
Galatians5:15 Naho niba mushihana, mugacagagurana, muramenye ntimuzamarane." 
Galatians5:16 Mureke mbabwire: Roho nabayobore, ni bwo mutazakora ibyo umubiri urarikira." 
Galatians5:17 Kuko umubiri urarikira ibirwanya Roho, na Roho igakurikirana ibyo umubiri wangira. Ibyo byombi koko birazirana ku buryo namwe mutagenza uko mwishakiye kose." 
Galatians5:18 None rero, niba muyoborwa na Roho, nta bwo mukigengwa n’amategeko." 
Galatians5:19 Ibikorwa by’umubiri birigaragaza: ubusambanyi, ubuhabara, ubwomanzi," 
Galatians5:20 gusenga ibigirwamana, kuroga, kwangana, gukurura intonganya, ishyari, uburakari, kwikuza, amazimwe, amakimbirane," 
Galatians5:21 inzika, ubusinzi, ubusambo, n’ibindi nk’ibyo. Ndababuriye nk’uko nigeze kubibabwira: abakora bene ibyo, nta murage bazahabwa mu Ngoma y'Imana." 
Galatians5:22 Naho imbuto ya Roho ni urukundo: ibyishimo, amahoro, kwihangana, ubugwaneza, ubuntu, ubudahemuka," 
Galatians5:23 imico myiza, kumenya kwifata. Nta tegeko ribuza imigirire nk’iyo." 
Galatians5:24 Aba Kristu Yezu babambye ku musaraba umubiri wabo n’ingeso mbi ndetse n’irari. 
Galatians5:25 Niba tubeshejweho na Roho, nituyoborwe na Roho." 
Galatians5:26 Twoye kurarikira ikuzo ry’amanjwe, twirinde gushotorana no kugirirana ishyari." 
Galatians6:1 Bavandimwe, niba hagize ufatirwa mu cyaha, mwebwe abayoborwa na Roho, nimumuhane ariko mumworoheye. Nawe ubwawe witonde, maze utazavaho ushukwa." 
Galatians6:2 Nimwakirane imitwaro yanyu, bityo muzaba mwumviye byuzuye itegeko rya Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Naho uwakwirebamo kuba akataraboneka, kandi nta cyo ari cyo, uwo yaba yibeshya." 
Galatians6:4 Ahubwo buri muntu asuzume ibikorwa bye bwite. Niba hari icyo abonye yakwiratana, abikore ku giti cye atigereranya n’abandi." 
Galatians6:5 Kuko buri wese azitwarira uwe muzigo. 
Galatians6:6 Uwigishwa ijambo, nahe ku bye byose urimwigisha." 
Galatians6:7 Ntimuzibeshye: Imana ntireregwa. Icyo umuntu azaba yarabibye ni cyo azasarura. 
Galatians6:8 Ubibira umubiri, azawusaruraho urupfu. Naho ubibira roho, azayisaruraho ubugingo bw’iteka." 
Galatians6:9 Nitwihatire gukora icyiza tutadohoka, bityo, niba tudacogoye, tuzasarura igihe kigeze." 
Galatians6:10 Nuko rero, ubwo tukibifitiye umwanya, nitugirire neza abantu bose, cyane cyane abo dusangiye ukwemera." 
Galatians6:11 Nimwitegereze noneho izi nyuguti nini: ni jye ubwanjye ubandikira n’ukuboko kwanjye. 
Galatians6:12 Abashaka gushimwa biratana ibikorwa by’umubiri, abo ngabo ni bo babahatira kugenywa, gusa ngo badatotezwa bahorwa umusaraba wa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Nyamara n’abigenyesha, na bo ubwabo ntibakurikiza amategeko, none barashaka ko mugenywa kugira ngo birate ibyabaye mu mubiri wanyu." 
Galatians6:14 Naho jyewe nta kindi nakwiratana kitari umusaraba wa Nyagasani wacu Yezu Kristu: ni wo iby’isi bimbambiweho, nanjye nkaba mbibambiweho." 
Galatians6:15 Kuko nta cyo bimaze kugenywa cyangwa kutagenywa, ahubwo ukuba ikiremwa gishya." 
Galatians6:16 Abakurikiza iri tegeko bose, bahorane amahoro n’impuhwe, bo na Israheli y’Imana." 
Galatians6:17 Ahasigaye, ntihakagire undushya, dore ngendana mu mubiri wanjye inguma za Yezu." 
Galatians6:18 Ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu isakare imitima yanyu, bavandimwe. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, uko Imana yabishatse, ku batagatifujwe b’indahemuka muri Yezu Kristu:" 
Ephesians1:2 mbifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana, Umubyeyi wacu, no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana, Se w’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, Yo yadusakajemo imigisha y’amoko yose, ituruka kuri Roho, mu ijuru, ku bwa Kristu." 
Ephesians1:4 Nguko uko yadutoreye muri We nyine, mbere y’ihangwa ry’ibiriho byose, kugira ngo tuzayihore imbere mu rukundo, turi intungane n’abaziranenge." 
Ephesians1:5 Igena ityo mbere y’igihe, ko tuzayibera abana yihitiyemo, tubikesheje Yezu Kristu. Uko ni ko yabyishakiye ku buntu bwayo," 
Ephesians1:6 kugira ngo izahore isingirizwa ingabire yaduhereye ubuntu mu Mwana wayo w’Inkoramutima. 
Ephesians1:7 Ni We dukesha ugucunguzwa amaraso ye, tukamuronkeramo imbabazi z’ibyaha byacu, ku rugero rw’ubusendere bw’ineza yayo," 
Ephesians1:8 ikaba yarabudusesekajemo ibigiranye ubuhanga n’ubumenyi bwose. 
Ephesians1:9 Yaduhishuriye ibanga ry’ugushaka kwayo, wa mugambi wuje urugwiro yari yifitemo kuva kera," 
Ephesians1:10 ngo izawuzuze ibihe bigeze: umugambi wo gukoranyiriza ibintu byose ku Mutware umwe rukumbi, Kristu, ari ibiri mu ijuru, ari n’ibiri ku isi." 
Ephesians1:11 Ni we kandi twatorewemo tugenwa mbere y’igihe ku buryo buhuye n’umugambi w’Ugenga byose," 
Ephesians1:12 kugira ngo twebwe abashyize amizero muri Kristu, tubonereho gusingiza ikuzo ryayo." 
Ephesians1:13 Namwe rero, aho mumariye kumvira ijambo ry’ukuri, ari yo Nkuru Nziza y’ugukizwa kwanyu, mukaryemera, ni We mukesha kuba mwarashyizweho ikimenyetso cya Roho Mutagatifu wasezeranywe," 
Ephesians1:14 ari na We musogongero w’umugabane twagenewe, ubanziriza icungurwa ry’umuryango Imana yironkeye, ngo ihore isingirizwa ikuzo ryayo." 
Ephesians1:15 Ni cyo gituma nanjye, kuva aho menyeye ukwemera mufitiye Nyagasani Yezu, n’urukundo mugirira abatagatifujwe bose," 
Ephesians1:16 ntahwema gushimira Imana kubera mwe, mbibuka mu masengesho yanjye." 
Ephesians1:17 Imana y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, Yo Mubyeyi wuje ikuzo, nibahe umutima w’ubwenge n’ubujijuke, maze muyimenye rwose." 
Ephesians1:18 Ubonye yamurikiye amaso y’umutima wanyu, mugasobanukirwa n’ukwizera mukesha ubutorwe bwanyu, n’ikuzo rihebuje muzigamiweho umurage hamwe n’abatagatifujwe," 
Ephesians1:19 mugasobanukirwa kandi n’ububasha bwayo butagereranywa yadusesuyeho, twebwe abemera!" 
Ephesians1:20 Izo mbaraga zitagira urugero yanazigaragarije muri Kristu, igihe imuzuye mu bapfuye, ikamwicaza iburyo bwayo mu ijuru," 
Ephesians1:21 hejuru y’ibyitwa Ibikomangoma, Ibihangange, Ibinyabubasha n’Ibinyabutegetsi byose, ndetse no hejuru y’irindi zina ryose ryashobora kuvugwa ubu no mu bihe bizaza." 
Ephesians1:22 «Ishyira rero byose mu nsi y’ibirenge bye». kandi mbere ya byose imugira umutwe wa Kiliziya," 
Ephesians1:23 ari yo mubiri n’umusendero w’Uwo Imana ubwayo isendereyemo ku buryo bwose. 
Ephesians2:1 Namwe kandi mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibicumuro n’ibyaha mwiberagamo kera," 
Ephesians2:2 igihe mwakurikizaga imigenzo y’iyi si, n’Umugenga w’ibyo mu nsi y’ikirere, wa mwuka ukorera mu bagomera Imana..." 
Ephesians2:3 Kandi natwe twese kera twari tumeze nka bo, dukurikira irari ry’umubiri wacu, dukora gusa ibyo umubiri ushaka n’ibyifuzo byawo bibi; yewe, ku bwacu twari twikururiye uburakari bw’Imana kimwe na bo." 
Ephesians2:4 Ariko Imana ni Nyir’impuhwe zihebuje; kubera urukundo rwinshi yadukunze," 
Ephesians2:5 n’ubwo twari twarapfuye tuzize ibyaha byacu bwose, yadushubije ubugingo hamwe na Kristu: rwose, kuba mwarakijijwe, mubikesha ubuntu bwayo!" 
Ephesians2:6 Nuko hamwe na We iratuzura, maze itwicaza mu ijuru turi muri Kristu Yezu." 
Ephesians2:7 Bityo, igiriye ubuntu bwayo yatugaragarije muri Yezu Kristu, yashatse kwerekana mu bihe bizaza ubukungu butagereranywa bw’ineza yayo." 
Ephesians2:8 Koko mwakijijwe ku buntu, mubikesha ukwemera; nta bwo ari ku bwanyu rero, ahubwo ni ku bw’ingabire y’Imana." 
Ephesians2:9 Ntibyatewe n’ibyo mwakoze, kugira ngo hatazagira uwirata." 
Ephesians2:10 Koko rero, Imana ni Yo yaduhanze, kandi twaremewe muri Kristu Yezu, kugira ngo dushishikarire ibikorwa byiza Imana yateguye kuva kera igira ngo bijye bituranga iteka." 
Ephesians2:11 Nuko rero, mwebwe b’abanyamahanga, mwebwe abasuzugurwaga n’Abayahudi kubera umubiri wanyu utagenywe warangaga ukutemera kwanyu, naho bo bakiratana iryo genywa ryabo ryakozwe n’abantu," 
Ephesians2:12 nimwibuke uko mwari mumeze kera: icyo gihe mwari mwibereye aho mutagira Umukiza, nta sano mufitanye na Israheli, nta ho muhuriye n’Amasezerano y’Imana, ndetse mutanayizi, kandi nta cyo mwizeye kuri iyi si." 
Ephesians2:13 Naho ubu ngubu, muri Yezu Kristu, mwebwe abari kure y’Imana kera, mwigijwe bugufi yayo mubikesha amaraso ya Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Koko rero ni We mahoro yacu; Abayahudi n’abatari bo yabahurije mu muryango umwe, maze aca urwango rwabatandukanyaga, rwari rumeze nk’urukuta ruri hagati yabo." 
Ephesians2:15 Yakuyeho itegeko n’amabwiriza ariherekeza, kimwe n’imigenzo yabyo, kugira ngo bombi, ari Umuyahudi, ari n’utari we, abahindure umuntu umwe mushya muri We, bityo agarure amahoro," 
Ephesians2:16 maze bombi abagire umubiri umwe, abagorore n’Imana abigirishije umusaraba we, awutsembeshe inzangano zose." 
Ephesians2:17 Yazanywe no kubamamazamo inkuru nziza y’amahoro, mwebwe mwari kure, kimwe n’abari hafi." 
Ephesians2:18 Ubu rero twese, uko twari amoko abiri, tumukesha guhinguka imbere y’Imana Data, tubumbwe na Roho umwe." 
Ephesians2:19 Nuko rero ntimukiri abanyamahanga n’abasuhuke; ahubwo musangiye ubwenegihugu n’abatagatifujwe, mubarirwa mu muryango w’Imana." 
Ephesians2:20 Muri inzu yubatswe mu kibanza cy’intumwa n’abahanuzi, maze Yezu Kristu ubwe akaba ibuye riyishyigikira." 
Ephesians2:21 Ibimwubatseho byose bizamuka bisobekeranye neza, bigahinduka ingoro ntagatifu ibereye Nyagasani." 
Ephesians2:22 Namwe kandi ni We mukesha gusobekwa kuri iyo nzu imwubatseho, kugira ngo muhinduke ingoro y’Imana ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Ephesians3:1 Ngicyo igituma, jyewe Pawulo, ndi imbohe ya Kristu Yezu kubera mwebwe, abavuye ishyanga..." 
Ephesians3:2 Ngira ngo mwamenye ingabire Imana yampaye ku buntu, ari mwe ibigirira, kugira ngo isohoze umugambi wayo," 
Ephesians3:3 ikampishurira ibanga ryayo nk’uko maze kubibandikira muri make. 
Ephesians3:4 Nimubisoma, muziyumvira ubwanyu ukuntu nacengewe n’ibanga rya Kristu." 
Ephesians3:5 Iryo banga, Imana ntiyigeze iribwira abantu bo hambere, nk’uko ubu imaze kurihishurira intumwa zayo ntagatifu n’abahanuzi bayo, ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Ephesians3:6 None dore n’abanyamahanga na bo bemerewe gusangira umurage umwe natwe, bakaba ingingo z’umubiri umwe hamwe natwe, kandi bakabona uruhare ku isezerano rimwe hamwe natwe muri Kristu Yezu, babikesha Inkuru Nziza." 
Ephesians3:7 Kandi iyo Nkuru Nziza ni yo nshinzwe kwamamaza ku bw’ingabire Imana yampaye ku buntu no ku bubasha bwayo. 
Ephesians3:8 Jyewe w’intamenyekana mu batagatifujwe bose, nahawe iyo ngabire yo kogeza mu banyamahanga ibyiza bitagereranywa bituruka kuri Kristu," 
Ephesians3:9 no gusobanurira bose ukuntu Imana isohoza wa mugambi wari uhishe kuva kera na kare muri Yo, Rurema wahanze ibintu byose." 
Ephesians3:10 Bityo, guhera ubu ngubu, Ibikomangoma n’Ibihangange byo mu ijuru bimenyera kuri Kiliziya ubuhanga bw’Imana buteye kwinshi," 
Ephesians3:11 nk’uko yabigambiriye kuva kera na kare muri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu. 
Ephesians3:12 Nuko ku bw’ukwemera tumufitiye, duhabwa gutunguka imbere y’Imana tuyiringiye." 
Ephesians3:13 Ni cyo gituma mbinginga ngo mwoye gucika intege mubitewe n’amagorwa ndimo mbaruhira, kuko ari yo abahesha ishema." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngiyo impamvu itumye mpfukama imbere y’Imana Data," 
Ephesians3:15 Yo icyitwa ububyeyi cyose gikomokaho, ari mu ijuru, ari no ku isi," 
Ephesians3:16 ikaba na Nyir’ikuzo ryose, nkabasabira kugira ngo ibatere imbaraga ibigirishije Roho wayo, inakomeze umutima wa buri wese." 
Ephesians3:17 Kristu nabaturemo mubikesha ukwemera; mushore imizi mu rukundo, murushingemo n’imiganda," 
Ephesians3:18 maze hamwe n’abatagatifujwe bose, mushobore gusobanukirwa n’urukundo ruhebuje rwa Kristu, mumenye ubugari n’uburebure, ubujyejuru n’ubujyakuzimu byarwo." 
Ephesians3:19 Ni bwo muzagera ku bumenyi busumba byose bw’urwo rukundo, maze musenderezwemo mutyo ubukungahare bw’Imana." 
Ephesians3:20 Nyir’ububasha bwose, ugirira muri mwe ibyiza bisumba kure cyane ibyo twasaba, ndetse n’ibyo twakwibwira," 
Ephesians3:21 naherwe ikuzo muri Kiliziya no muri Kristu Yezu, uko amasekuruza n’ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka! Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Ubu rero, jyewe uri ku ngoyi nzira Nyagasani, ndabinginga ngo mugenze mu buryo bukwiranye n’ubutore bwanyu:" 
Ephesians4:2 nimubane mu rukundo, murangwe n’ubwiyoroshye, n’ituze, n’ubwiyumanganye, mwihanganirane muri byose," 
Ephesians4:3 kandi mwihatire kugumana umutima umwe ubahuza mu mahoro. 
Ephesians4:4 Nk’uko Umubiri ari umwe na Roho akaba umwe, ni na ko mwahamagariwe gusangira ukwizera kumwe." 
Ephesians4:5 Nyagasani ni umwe, ukwemera ni kumwe, batisimu ni imwe;" 
Ephesians4:6 n’Imana ni imwe, Yo Mubyeyi wa bose, usumba bose, agakorera muri bose, kandi agatura muri bose." 
Ephesians4:7 Buri wese muri twe yahawe ingabire ye bwite, uko Kristu yayimugeneye." 
Ephesians4:8 Ni cyo gituma mu Byanditswe hari ahavuga ngo «Yarazamutse atumbagira ashoreye imbohe, maze aha abantu ingabire»." 
Ephesians4:9 Kuba yarazamutse bivuga iki atari uko yabanje kumanuka akagera ku isi yacu? 
Ephesians4:10 Uwari waramanutse ni na We wazamutse mu bushorishori bw’ijuru kugira ngo aganze muri byose. 
Ephesians4:11 Ni na We wahaye bamwe kuba intumwa, abandi abaha kuba abahanuzi, abandi abaha kuba abogezabutumwa, abandi abaha kuba abashumba cyangwa se abigisha." 
Ephesians4:12 Nguko uko yatunganyije abatagatifujwe be, anabategurira gukomeza umurimo bashinzwe wo kungura umubiri wa Kristu," 
Ephesians4:13 kugeza igihe twese tuzunga ubumwe mu kwemera no mu kumenya Umwana w’Imana, tukazaba abantu bashyitse, bageze ku rugero ruhamye, ruyingayinga igihagararo cya Kristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Ubwo rero ntituzaba tukiri abana basabayangwa, maze ngo twangaranwe n’umuyaga ubonetse wose w’inyigisho ziturutse ku buhendanyi bw’abantu no ku buriganya bwabo bubayobya." 
Ephesians4:15 Ahubwo nitubaho mu rukundo rutaryarya, tuzakura kandi twiyongere ubudahwema twifatanyije na Kristu utubereye umutwe." 
Ephesians4:16 Ni We uha umubiri wose gutera hamwe mu ngingo nyinshi ziwugize, zikawutunga, zikawucunga, buri rugingo ku rugero rwarwo, akanawuha gukura no kwiyubaka mu rukundo." 
Ephesians4:17 Dore rero icyo mbabwira kandi mbashishikariza muri Nyagasani: ntimuzongere kugenza nk’abatazi Imana, bikurikirira ubupfu bwabo." 
Ephesians4:18 Koko ibitekerezo byabo bigandiyemo umwijima; bitandukanyije n’ubugingo buva ku Mana kubera ubujiji baterwa no kunangira umutima wabo; 
Ephesians4:19 bataye isoni maze biroha mu busambanyi, bigeza aho batwarwa n’ingeso mbi zose nta cyo bikanga." 
Ephesians4:20 Mwebweho si uko mwigishijwe kumenya Kristu: 
Ephesians4:21 niba koko ari We mwabwiwe, niba ari We mwigishijwe kumenya, mukumva ibihuje n’ukuri kuganje muri Yezu." 
Ephesians4:22 Mugomba rero guca ukubiri n’imibereho yanyu yo hambere, mukivanamo imigenzereze ya muntu w’igisazira ugenda yiyangiza mu byifuzo bibi bimuroha." 
Ephesians4:23 Ahubwo nimuvugurure imitima yanyu hamwe n’ibitekerezo byanyu," 
Ephesians4:24 muhinduke muntu mushya waremwe uko Imana ibishaka mu budakemwa no mu butungane nyakuri. 
Ephesians4:25 Nibitume rero mucika ku binyoma, buri muntu abwire mugenzi we ukuri, kuko bamwe turi ingingo z’abandi." 
Ephesians4:26 Nimufatwa n’uburakari, ntibikabaviremo gucumura; izuba ntirikarenge mugifite umujinya." 
Ephesians4:27 Ntimugahe Sekibi urwaho. 
Ephesians4:28 Uwari umujura ntakongere kwiba, ahubwo ajye yihatira gukoresha amaboko ye imirimo ifite akamaro, kugira ngo abone n’icyo afashisha abari mu bukene." 
Ephesians4:29 Ntihakagire ijambo ribi riva mu kanwa kanyu, ahubwo hajye hava ijambo ryiza ryahumuriza abandi, rikagirira akamaro abaryumva." 
Ephesians4:30 Muramenye, ntimugashavuze Roho Mutagatifu w’Imana, wa wundi mwahawe ngo abe ikimenyetso kizabaranga ku munsi w’ukubohorwa kwanyu." 
Ephesians4:31 Icyitwa ubwisharirize cyose, n’umwaga, n’uburakari, n’intonganya, no gutukana, kimwe n’icyitwa ububisha cyose, bicibwe muri mwe." 
Ephesians4:32 Ahubwo nimugirirane ineza n’impuhwe, mubabarirane ibyaha nk’uko Imana yabababariye muri Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Nimwigane rero Imana, ubwo muri abana bayo ikunda;" 
Ephesians5:2 mujye mukundana nk’uko Kristu yadukunze, maze ubwe akatwitangira aba igitambo n’ituro bimeze nk’umubavu uhumura neza, bigashimisha Imana." 
Ephesians5:3 Naho ibyerekeye ubusambanyi, ubwandavure iyo buva bukagera, kimwe n’ubugugu, ibyo ntibikanavugwe muri mwe; ni ko bikwiye mu batagatifujwe." 
Ephesians5:4 Kandi amagambo ateye isoni, ay’amanjwe, n’amahomvu, na byo ni uko; ahubwo muhore mushimira Imana." 
Ephesians5:5 Koko rero mubimenye neza: nta musambanyi, cyangwa uwandavuye, cyangwa umunyabugugu — we uhindura iby’isi ikigirwamana cye —, abo bose, nta wuzagira umugabane mu Ngoma ya Kristu n’Imana." 
Ephesians5:6 Kandi ntihazagire ubahendesha amagambo atagira aho ashingiye, kuko ari ibyo ngibyo bitera Imana kurakarira abayigomera." 
Ephesians5:7 Ntimugafatanye n’abo bantu. 
Ephesians5:8 Koko rero, kera mwigeze kuba umwijima, naho ubu ngubu mwagizwe urumuri muri Nyagasani; nimugenze nk’abana b’urumuri." 
Ephesians5:9 Imbuto kandi y’urumuri ni icyitwa ubugiraneza cyose, n’ubutungane n’ukuri." 
Ephesians5:10 Nimushishoze, mumenye ibishimisha Nyagasani." 
Ephesians5:11 Mureke kugira uruhare ku bikorwa by’umwijima bitagira icyo bibyara, ahubwo mubyamagane;" 
Ephesians5:12 kuko ibyo bene abo bakora rwihishwa, yewe ndetse no kubivuga biteye isoni." 
Ephesians5:13 Mubyamagane rero, maze mubishyire ku mugaragaro, kuko urumuri rugaragaza byose uko bimeze." 
Ephesians5:14 Ni cyo gituma bajya bavuga ngo «Kanguka, wowe usinziriye! Haguruka, uve mu bapfuye, maze Kristu akumurikire!»" 
Ephesians5:15 Nuko rero nimwitondere imibereho yanyu, ntimube abapfayongo, ahubwo mube abantu bashyira mu gaciro," 
Ephesians5:16 bakoresha neza igihe barimo, kuko iminsi ari mibi." 
Ephesians5:17 Ntimukabe rero abapfu, ahubwo mwihatire kumenya icyo Nyagasani ashaka." 
Ephesians5:18 Ntimugasindishwe na divayi, kuko byabatera kwifata nabi, ahubwo nimwuzure Roho Mutagatifu." 
Ephesians5:19 Nimufatanye kuvuga zaburi, ibisingizo n’indirimbo mubwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu; muririmbe, mwogeze Nyagasani n’umutima wanyu wose." 
Ephesians5:20 Igihe cyose no muri byose, mushimire Imana Data mu izina ry’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
Ephesians5:21 Mujye mworoherana kubera igitinyiro mufitiye Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Abagore borohere abagabo babo nk’aho babigirira Nyagasani; 
Ephesians5:23 koko rero umugabo agenga umugore we, nk’uko Kristu agenga Kiliziya akanayibera umutwe ukiza umubiri wose." 
Ephesians5:24 Nk’uko rero Kiliziya yumvira Kristu, bityo n’abagore nibajye bumvira abagabo babo muri byose." 
Ephesians5:25 Namwe bagabo, nimukunde abagore banyu, nk’uko Kristu yakunze Kiliziya, maze akayitangira." 
Ephesians5:26 Yarayitagatifuje, ayisukuza amazi n’ijambo ribiherekeza," 
Ephesians5:27 kugira ngo ayihingutse imbere ye, ibengerana, nta bwandu n’iminkanyari, cyangwa indi nenge, ahubwo ari Kiliziya ntagatifu kandi itagira amakemwa." 
Ephesians5:28 Nguko uko abagabo bagomba gukunda abagore babo, mbese nk’imibiri yabo bwite. Ukunda umugore we aba yikunze ubwe." 
Ephesians5:29 Koko rero nta wigeze yanga umubiri we, ahubwo arawugaburira, akawitaho cyane, mbese nk’uko na Kristu agenzereza Kiliziya." 
Ephesians5:30 Muyobewe se ko turi ingingo z’umubiri we, (nk’uko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo)" 
Ephesians5:31 «Ni cyo gituma umugabo azasiga se na nyina, akifatanya n’umugore we, bakaba umubiri umwe»." 
Ephesians5:32 Iryo yobera rirakomeye, cyakora ibyo mbivuze nzirikana Kristu na Kiliziya." 
Ephesians5:33 Nuko rero namwe, buri mugabo nakunde umugore we uko yikunda, n’umugore yubahe umugabo we." 
Ephesians6:1 Bana, nimwumvire ababyeyi muri Nyagasani, kuko ari byo bikwiye." 
Ephesians6:2 «Wubahe so na nyoko»; mu mategeko yose ni ryo rya mbere rijyana n’isezerano: 
Ephesians6:3 «kugira ngo uzagire ihirwe, kandi urambe ku isi»." 
Ephesians6:4 Namwe babyeyi, ntimugakure umutima abana banyu, ahubwo mubarere neza, mubakosore kandi mubagire inama zikomoka kuri Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:5 Bacakara namwe, nimwumvire ba shobuja ba hano ku isi; mujye mububaha kandi mubatinye, nta buryarya ku mutima, nk’aho mwakumviye Kristu ubwe." 
Ephesians6:6 Ntimugakorere ijisho nk’abashaka gushimisha abantu, ahubwo mugenze nk’abagaragu ba Kristu, baharanira gukora icyo Imana ishaka." 
Ephesians6:7 Mushishikarire kurangiza ibyo mutegetswe, nk’aho mwaba mukorera Nyagasani, atari abantu mubigirira." 
Ephesians6:8 Umuntu wese, yaba umucakara, yaba uwigenga, muzi ko icyiza azaba yakoze, azakiturwa na Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:9 Namwe ba shebuja, mujye mubagenzereza mutyo, mureke kubakangisha ibihano; muzi neza ko Shebuja wabo n’uwanyu ari mu ijuru, We utarobanura abantu." 
Ephesians6:10 Ahasigaye rero, nimugire ubutwari muri Nyagasani, mugire imbaraga ze zibashoboza byose." 
Ephesians6:11 Nimwambare intwaro zikomoka ku Mana, kugira ngo mubashe guhangara imitego ya Sekibi." 
Ephesians6:12 Erega abanzi turwana si abantu, ahubwo abo turwana ni Ibikomangoma, n’Ibihangange, n’Abagenga b’iyi si y’umwijima, n’izindi roho mbi zo mu kirere." 
Ephesians6:13 Nuko rero nimwitwaze intwaro z’Imana, kugira ngo muzashobore gukomera ku munsi mubi, muzatsinde mudacogoye." 
Ephesians6:14 Ngaho rero, nimuhagarare gitwari! Ukuri mukugire nk’umukandara mukenyeje, ubutungane mubwambare nk’ikoti ry’icyuma," 
Ephesians6:15 umwete wo kogeza Inkuru Nziza y’amahoro ubabere nk’inkweto mu birenge. 
Ephesians6:16 Ariko cyane cyane muhorane ukwemera, kubabere nk’ingabo izazimya imyambi igurumana ya Nyakibi." 
Ephesians6:17 Nimwakire ingofero y’Umukiro, n’inkota muhawe na Roho, ari yo Jambo ry’Imana." 
Ephesians6:18 Igihe cyose muhore musenga kandi mwambaza ku buryo bwose mubwirijwe na Roho; mubyitondere kandi musabire ubutitsa abatagatifujwe bose. 
Ephesians6:19 Nanjye munsabire kugira ngo mpabwe imbaraga zo kuvuga nshize amanga, namamaza iyobera ry’Inkuru Nziza" 
Ephesians6:20 mbereye intumwa n’ubwo ndi mu munyururu bwose. Icyampa ngo nshobore kuvuga ibyayo nshize amanga, uko mbigomba." 
Ephesians6:21 Kugira ngo mumenye uko meze n’icyo nkora, mbatumyeho Tushiko, umuvandimwe nkunda, akaba n’umufasha wanjye w’indahemuka muri Nyagasani." 
Ephesians6:22 Mubatumyeho rero, kugira ngo abamenyeshe ibinyerekeyeho byose, kandi ngo ahumurize imitima yanyu." 
Ephesians6:23 Abavandimwe nibagire amahoro, n’urukundo hamwe n’ukwemera biva ku Mana Data no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Abakunda Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu bose baragahorana ineza ye mu rukundo rudatezuka. 
Philippians1:1 Twebwe Pawulo na Timote, abagaragu ba Yezu Kristu, ku batagatifujwe bose muri Yezu Kristu bari i Filipi, hamwe n’abayobozi babo n’abadiyakoni babo:" 
Philippians1:2 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu, no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians1:3 Nshimira Imana yanjye igihe cyose mbibutse, no mu masengesho yanjye yose" 
Philippians1:4 buri gihe mbasabira mwese nishimye," 
Philippians1:5 kubera uruhare mwagize mu kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza kuva ku munsi wa mbere kugeza ubu. 
Philippians1:6 Sinshidikanya rero ko Imana yabatangiyemo uwo murimo mwiza, izanawukomeza kugeza ku munsi Yezu Kristu azaziraho." 
Philippians1:7 Ngibyo ibitekerezo mbafitiye mwese, kandi koko birakwiye, kuko mbahoza ku mutima, mwebwe muhora mwifatanyije nanjye mu neza yose Imana yangiriye, haba ubu ndi mu buroko, haba n’igihe twarwaniraga Inkuru Nziza, ngo ikomere." 
Philippians1:8 Koko ndabakunda n’umutima wanjye wose, wuzuye urukundo rwa Yezu Kristu: Imana ubwayo nyitanzeho umugabo!" 
Philippians1:9 Icyo mbasabira rero ni uko urukundo rwanyu rwakomeza kwiyongera, mu bwenge no mu bumenyi bwose," 
Philippians1:10 kugira ngo mushobore guhitamo ibitunganye. Bityo muzabe abaziranenge n’indahemuka kugera ku munsi wa Kristu," 
Philippians1:11 maze muzere imbuto z’ubutungane zituruka kuri Kristu, zigahesha Imana ikuzo n’ishimwe." 
Philippians1:12 Bavandimwe, ndashaka kubamenyesha ko ibyangwiririye byatumye ndetse Inkuru Nziza ijya mbere," 
Philippians1:13 ku buryo byagaragaye imbere y’urukiko rukuru n’imbere ya rubanda rwose, ko ndi mu buroko kubera Kristu," 
Philippians1:14 kandi ingoyi ndiho yatumye abavandimwe benshi barushaho kwizera Nyagasani, batinyuka kwamamaza ijambo ry’Imana nta mususu." 
Philippians1:15 N’ubwo bamwe bagenza batyo babitewe n’ishyari no gushaka kurushanwa, abandi bamamaje Kristu babitewe n’umutima mwiza koko." 
Philippians1:16 Bamwe babikorana urukundo, kuko bazi neza ko mbereyeho kurengera Inkuru Nziza." 
Philippians1:17 Naho abandi bakamamaza Kristu bahimana kandi baryarya, bibwira ko bongera ububabare nterwa n’ingoyi ndiho." 
Philippians1:18 Ariko se bitwaye iki? Uko biri kose, baryarya cyangwa se babikora babikuye ku mutima, mpfa ko Kristu yamamazwa, ngicyo ikinshimisha. Ndetse bizakomeza kunshimisha iteka," 
Philippians1:19 kuko nzi neza ko ari byo bizangeza ku mukiro mbikesha amasengesho yanyu n’inkunga ya Roho wa Yezu Kristu. 
Philippians1:20 Icyo ntegereje kandi nizeye ndashidikanya, ni uko ntazakorwa n’isoni ahubwo ubu n’iteka ryose nzahesha Kristu ikuzo nta mususu, haba mu bugingo bwanjye, haba mu rupfu rwanjye." 
Philippians1:21 Koko rero, Kristu ni we bugingo bwanjye ndetse gupfa byambera urwunguko." 
Philippians1:22 Niba ariko gukomeza kubaho muri uyu mubiri byatuma nkora umurimo w’ingirakamaro, simbona icyo nahitamo..." 
Philippians1:23 Ndagirijwe impande zombi: nifuzaga kwigendera ngo mbane na Kristu, kuko ari byo birushijeho kuba byiza;" 
Philippians1:24 ariko gukomeza kubaho mu mubiri ni cyo mukeneye. 
Philippians1:25 Mu by’ukuri, nzi neza ko nzakomeza kubaho, kandi nkagumana namwe, kugira ngo mujye mbere kandi mushimishwe n’ukwemera kwanyu;" 
Philippians1:26 bityo, nimbagarukamo, bizababere impamvu yo kwishimana kurushaho muri Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians1:27 Nyamara rero, nimukore ibikwiranye n’Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu. Bityo, nindamuka nje maze nkababona, cyangwa se nintahaba, nzumve ko mukomeye mufite ubumwe, kandi ko muhuje umutima mugafatanyiriza hamwe kurwanira ukwemera mukesha Inkuru Nziza." 
Philippians1:28 Ababarwanya rero ntibakabatere ubwoba na busa; maze ibyo bizabumvishe ko bazorekwa, naho mwebwe mukazarokorwa mubikesha Imana." 
Philippians1:29 Kuko mutahawe gusa kwemera Kristu, mwahawe no kubabara ari We mugirira," 
Philippians1:30 ubwo mumurwanira intambara imwe n’iyanjye, nk’uko mwabimbonanye, kandi mukaba mubinyumvaho ubu." 
Philippians2:1 Niba rero inkunga yanyu iri muri Kristu, niba koko mutera imbere mu rukundo, niba koko muhuriye kuri Roho Mutagatifu, niba kandi mufite umutima w’impuhwe," 
Philippians2:2 ngaho nimunsenderezemo ibyishimo, mutekereza kimwe, muhuje urukundo, muhuje n’umutima, murangamiye bimwe." 
Philippians2:3 Ntimukagire icyo mukora mubitewe n’ishyari cyangwa ukwikuza, ahubwo mwicishe bugufi, buri muntu yibwire ko abandi bamuruta." 
Philippians2:4 Mwoye guharanira ibyanyu gusa, ahubwo mwite no ku by’abandi." 
Philippians2:5 Nimugire mu mitima yanyu amatwara ahuje n’aya Kristu Yezu ubwe: 
Philippians2:6 N’ubwo we yari afite imimerere imwe n’iy’Imana, ntiyagundiriye kureshya na Yo." 
Philippians2:7 Ahubwo yihinduye ubusabusa, yigira nk’umugaragu, maze mu migirire ye agaragaza ko ari umuntu. Nuko aho amariye kwishushanya n’abantu," 
Philippians2:8 yicisha bugufi kurushaho, yemera kumvira, ageza aho gupfa, apfiriye ndetse ku musaraba." 
Philippians2:9 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana imukuza, imuha Izina risumbye ayandi yose," 
Philippians2:10 kugira ngo nibamara kumva izina rya Yezu, bose bamupfukamire, mu ijuru, ku isi n’ikuzimu," 
Philippians2:11 kandi indimi zose zamamaze ko Yezu Kristu ari We Nyagasani, biheshe Imana Se ikuzo." 
Philippians2:12 None rero nkoramutima zanjye, ubwo mutahwemye kumvira igihe nari mpari, n’ubu ngubu ndahari mubikomeze ndetse murusheho; ngaho nimushishikarire uburokorwe bwanyu mufite ubwoba kandi mudagadwa," 
Philippians2:13 kuko Imana ari yo ibatera gushaka no gukora ikiyishimisha. 
Philippians2:14 Mukore byose mutinuba kandi mutagingimiranya," 
Philippians2:15 kugira ngo mube indakemwa n’indahinyuka, mube n’abana b’Imana bazira inenge rwagati mu bantu b’indyarya kandi bararutse, mukamurika muri bo nk’inyenyeri mu kirere," 
Philippians2:16 kubera iryo jambo ry’ubugingo mwifitemo. Bityo ku munsi wa Kristu, bizambere ikuzo kuba ntarirukiye ubusa kandi ntaravunikiye ubusa." 
Philippians2:17 Kandi n’aho byaba ngombwa ko mena amaraso yanjye, akamishwa ku gitambo no ku ituro ry’ukwemera kwanyu, byanshimisha, kandi nasangira namwe mwese ibyo byishimo." 
Philippians2:18 Bityo, namwe nimwishime, kandi muhimbarwe hamwe nanjye." 
Philippians2:19 Icyakora nizeye muri Nyagasani Yezu kuboherereza bidatinze Timote, kugira ngo nanjye nimenya amakuru yanyu, nshyire umutima hamwe." 
Philippians2:20 Mu by’ukuri nta wundi mfite duhuje umutima, wakwita ku byanyu koko:" 
Philippians2:21 kuko abandi bose bakurikira ibiri ibyabo, aho gukurikira ibya Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Naho we, muzi agaciro ke, n’ukuntu yagokeye Inkuru Nziza hamwe nanjye nk’uko umwana agokana na se." 
Philippians2:23 Nizeye kumuboherereza, nkimara kubona aho ibyanjye byerekeye." 
Philippians2:24 Byongeye nizeye rwose muri Nyagasani ko nanjye nzaza iwanyu bidatinze. 
Philippians2:25 Ariko nasanze ari ngombwa kuboherereza Epaforoditi, umuvandimwe wanjye dusangiye umurimo n’intambara, mwari mwanyoherereje ngo anyunganire mu byo nkeneye," 
Philippians2:26 kuko yari abakumbuye mwese, akanashavuzwa n’uko mwumvise ko yarwaye." 
Philippians2:27 Ni koko, yararwaye yenda gupfa, ariko Imana iramubabarira; nyamara si we yababariye gusa, emwe nanjye, kugira ngo noye guhora nicwa n’agahinda." 
Philippians2:28 Nihutiye rero kumuboherereza, kugira ngo nimumubona mwongere kwishima, nanjye kandi ako gahinda ngakire." 
Philippians2:29 Nimumwakirane rero ibyishimo muri Nyagasani, kandi mugirire icyubahiro umuntu nk’uwo." 
Philippians2:30 Yari agiye gupfa azize umurimo wa Kristu, yitanga atizigamye kugira ngo abasimbure mu byo mutari mubashije kumfasha." 
Philippians3:1 Ahasigaye, bavandimwe banjye, nimwishimire muri Nyagasani. Ntibinduhije kongera kubibandikira, kandi bibafitiye akamaro." 
Philippians3:2 Mwirinde izo mbwa! Mwirinde abo bagiranabi! Mwirinde abirata ko bagenywe! 
Philippians3:3 Burya ni twe twagenywe by’ukuri, twe dusenga Imana ku bwa Roho wayo, twe dufite ikuzo ryacu muri Yezu Kristu, aho kwiringira umubiri." 
Philippians3:4 Icyakora jyewe ubwanjye simbuze impamvu zo kwiringira iby’umubiri, ndetse nzirusha uwo ari we wese wabyiringira:" 
Philippians3:5 Jyewe, wagenywe ku munsi wa munani, nkaba uwo mu muryango wa Israheli no mu nzu ya Benyamini, Umuhebureyi ukomoka ku Bahebureyi, n’Umufarizayi mu byerekeye Amategeko!" 
Philippians3:6 Ku byerekeye umwete, natoteje Kiliziya; naho ku byerekeye ubutungane bukeshwa amategeko, simpinyuka." 
Philippians3:7 Ariko ibyo byose byampeshaga agaciro, nasanze ari igihombo, kubera Kristu." 
Philippians3:8 Ndetse nsanga ko ibintu byose ari igihombo ubigereranije n’icyiza gisumba byose ari cyo kumenya Umwami wanjye Yezu Kristu. Kubera We nemeye guhara byose no kubyita umwanda, kugira ngo nunguke Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 maze nzamusange ntishingikirije ubutungane bwanjye bukomoka ku Mategeko, ahubwo mfite ubutungane bukomoka ku kwemera Kristu, buva ku Mana, bukaba bushingiye ku kwemera." 
Philippians3:10 Igisigaye ni ukumumenya, We wazukanye ububasha, no kwifatanya na We mu bubabare bwe, ndetse no kwishushanya na We mu rupfu rwe," 
Philippians3:11 kugira ngo nibishoboka, nanjye nzagere ku izuka mu bapfuye." 
Philippians3:12 Si ukuvuga ko ubu ibyo nabigezeho, cyangwa ko naba narabaye intungane, ahubwo ndatwaza ngo nsingire Yezu Kristu, mbese nk’uko We ubwe yansingiriye." 
Philippians3:13 Koko, bavandimwe, sinemeza ko nabigezeho; icyo mparanira ni kimwe gusa: ibyashize ndabyihorera nkihatira ibizaza." 
Philippians3:14 Ntwaza rero ngana intego, ya ngororano Imana iduhamagarira mu ijuru muri Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians3:15 Twese abagamije ubutungane, tugenze dutyo; niba kandi mubyumva ukundi, na byo Imana izabibamurikira." 
Philippians3:16 Aho tugereje rero, dufatanye gukomeza inzira imwe." 
Philippians3:17 Mwese, bavandimwe, mugenze nkanjye, kandi mwitegereze abakurikira urugero tubahaye." 
Philippians3:18 Koko rero nabibabwiye kenshi, kandi n’ubu ndabivugana amarira: hariho benshi bagenza nk’abanzi b’umusaraba wa Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Amaherezo yabo ni ukorama; kuko inda yabo bayigize Imana yabo, maze bakikuriza mu byagombaga kubatera isoni, bo baharanira iby’isi gusa." 
Philippians3:20 Twebweho, iwacu ni mu ijuru; ni ho hazaturuka Umukiza dutegereje, Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu," 
Philippians3:21 We uzahindura ukundi umubiri wacu wa gitindi, ugasa n’umubiri we wakirana ikuzo, akoresheje ububasha afite bwo kwigarurira byose." 
Philippians4:1 Nuko rero, bavandimwe banjye nkunda kandi nkumbuye cyane, mwebwe byishimo byanjye n’ingororano yanjye, nimukomere mutyo muri Nyagasani, nkoramutima zanjye!" 
Philippians4:2 Ndasaba Evodiya kandi ndinginga Sintike ngo bashyire hamwe muri Nyagasani. 
Philippians4:3 Nawe rero, Sizugo, mugenzi wanjye w’indahinyuka, ndakwinginga ngo ubafashe, kuko bantabaye mu kogeza Inkuru Nziza, hamwe na Kilimenti n’abandi bangobotse; none amazina yabo akaba yanditse mu Gitabo cy’ubugingo." 
Philippians4:4 Muhore mwishima muri Nyagasani; mbisubiyemo, nimwishime." 
Philippians4:5 Ubugwaneza bwanyu nibumenyekane ku bantu bose. Nyagasani ari hafi. 
Philippians4:6 Ntimugire ikibahagarika umutima, ahubwo nimumenyeshe Imana icyo mukeneye cyose, muyisenga, muyinginga, munayishimira." 
Philippians4:7 Maze amahoro y’Imana arenze icyitwa ubwenge cyose, ahore mu mitima no mu bitekerezo byanyu, muri Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians4:8 Ahasigaye, bavandimwe, icyitwa icy’ukuri cyose kimwe n’igikwiye kubahwa, igitunganye, ikitagira inenge, igikwiye gukundwa no kuratwa, mbese icyitwa ingeso nziza cyose kandi gikwiriye ishimwe, abe ari cyo muharanira." 
Philippians4:9 Ibyo nabigishije kandi mwemeye, ibyo mwanyumvanye kandi mwambonanye, mujye mubikora, maze Imana y’amahoro izahorane namwe." 
Philippians4:10 Narishimye cyane muri Nyagasani mbitewe n’uko ishyaka mumfitiye ryiyongereye; icyakora, murarisanganywe, uretse ko mwari mwarabuze uko muringaragariza." 
Philippians4:11 Ibyo simbivuga kubera ubukene ndimo, kuko nimenyereje kunyurwa n’ibyo mfite." 
Philippians4:12 Nzi kubaho ntunzwe na bike, nzi no kubaho muri byinshi. Muri byose, buri gihe, nitoje guhaga no gusonza, gukira no gukena." 
Philippians4:13 Nshobora byose muri Kristu untera imbaraga. 
Philippians4:14 Icyakora mwagize neza muntabara mu kaga. 
Philippians4:15 Mwebwe kandi, Banyafilipi, murabizi: Inkuru Nziza ikimenyekana iwanyu, ubwo nari nturutse i Masedoniya, nta Kiliziya n’imwe yangobotse ngo imfashe mu byo nari nkeneye, keretse mwebwe mwenyine." 
Philippians4:16 N’ubwo nari ndi i Tesaloniki, mwanyoherereje imfashanyo, ndetse ubugira kabiri." 
Philippians4:17 Mumenye ariko ko nta maturo mparanira; icyo nkurikiranye ni uko inyungu yanyu yiyongera. 
Philippians4:18 Ubu mfite ibya ngombwa byose, ndetse birarenze, byasendereye igihe Epaforoditi anshyikirije amaturo yanyu, yo mubavu mwiza n’igitambo kinyura Imana." 
Philippians4:19 Kandi Imana yanjye, mu bukungahare n’ikuzo byayo, izabasenderezaho ingabire zayo mu byo mukeneye byose, muri Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians4:20 Nihakuzwe Imana Umubyeyi wacu iteka ryose. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Mutashye uwatagatifujwe wese muri Yezu Kristu. Abavandimwe turi kumwe barabatashya. 
Philippians4:22 Abatagatifujwe bose barabatashya, ariko cyane cyane abo mu ngoro ya Kayizari." 
Philippians4:23 Muhorane ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu. 
Colossians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, uko Imana yabishatse, n’umuvandimwe wacu Timote," 
Colossians1:2 ku batagatifujwe b’i Kolosi, kuri mwebwe, bavandimwe b’indahemuka muri Kristu: tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu." 
Colossians1:3 Turashimira Imana, Se w’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, kandi tukanabasabira ubudahwema," 
Colossians1:4 kuva aho twumviye ukwemera mufitiye Yezu Kristu, n’urukundo mugirira abatagatifujwe bose," 
Colossians1:5 mubitewe no kwizera ibyiza bibagenewe mu ijuru. Ayo mizero mwayamenyeshejwe n’ijambo ry’ukuri, ari yo Nkuru Nziza yageze iwanyu." 
Colossians1:6 Nk’uko irumbuka kandi igakwira ku isi yose, no muri mwe ni ko bimeze, kuva aho mwumviye kandi mukamenya by’ukuri ingabire y’Imana." 
Colossians1:7 Mugenzi wacu Epafurasi dufatanyije umurimo, ni we wayibigishije." 
Colossians1:8 Uwo mugaragu w’indahemuka wa Yezu Kristu ubakorera mu kigwi cyacu, yanatumenyesheje urukundo mwasenderejwe na Roho Mutagatifu." 
Colossians1:9 Ni cyo gituma natwe, kuva aho tubyumviye, tudahwema kwambaza tubasabira ku Mana, kugira ngo mugire ubumenyi bushyitse bw’icyo ishaka, muhore murangwa n’umutima wuzuye ubuhanga n’ubushishozi ku bwa Roho Mutagatifu." 
Colossians1:10 Nguko uko muzizihiza Nyagasani mu mibereho yanyu imunyuze muri byose, munakore ibyiza byinshi kandi mugende murushaho kumenya Imana." 
Colossians1:11 Bityo muzakomezwa n’imbaraga zayo zitagereranywa, mubashe kuba indacogora no kwihangana muri byose." 
Colossians1:12 Nimunezerwe kandi mushimire Imana Data watumye mugira umugabane ku murage w’abatagatifujwe bari mu mucyo. 
Colossians1:13 Koko rero, yatugobotoye ku ngoyi y’umwijima, atujyana mu Ngoma y’Umwana we akunda byimazeyo," 
Colossians1:14 ari na We dukesha gucungurwa no kubabarirwa ibyaha. 
Colossians1:15 Ni We shusho ry’Imana itagaragara, Umuvukambere mu byitwa ikiremwa cyose," 
Colossians1:16 kuko byose byaremewe muri We, ari ibiri mu ijuru, ari n’ibiri ku isi. Ibigaragara n’ibitagaragara, Ibinyabubasha n’Inganji, Ibikomangoma n’Ibihangange: byose byaremwe na We, kandi ni We byaremewe;" 
Colossians1:17 yariho mbere ya byose, kandi byose bibeshwaho na We." 
Colossians1:18 Ni We kandi Mutwe w’umubiri, ari wo Kiliziya, akaba n’Ishingiro, n’Umuvukambere mu bapfuye, kugira ngo ahorane muri byose umwanya w’ibanze;" 
Colossians1:19 kuko Imana yizihijwe no kumusenderezamo ibyiza byose," 
Colossians1:20 kandi muri We yiyunga n’ibiriho byose, ndetse ari We ibigirira, ari ibiri ku isi, ari n’ibiri mu ijuru, byose ibisakazaho amahoro aturutse ku maraso ye yameneye ku musaraba." 
Colossians1:21 Namwe ubwanyu, kera mwari mwaraciye ukubiri n’Imana, mwari n’abanzi bayo kubera ibitekerezo n’ibikorwa byanyu bibi," 
Colossians1:22 none ubu ngubu yabahaye kwigorora na Yo, mubikesha Umwana wayo watanze umubiri we akabapfira, kugira ngo mube abatagatifu, nta mwanda kandi nta makemwa, imbere yayo." 
Colossians1:23 Cyakora mukomere mu kwemera, ntimugahungabane, ngo muteshuke ku mizero mwasezeranyijwe n’Inkuru Nziza mwumvise, ari yo yamamarijwe ikiremwa cyose kiri mu nsi y’ijuru, akaba ari na yo jyewe Pawulo ndahwema kuruhira." 
Colossians1:24 Ubu rero nshimishijwe n’uko mbabara ari mwe ngirira, maze ibyari bibuze ku mibabaro ya Kristu, nkabyuzuriza mu mubiri wanjye, mbigirira umubiri we, ari wo Kiliziya." 
Colossians1:25 Koko rero, nabaye umugaragu wa Kiliziya, biturutse ku murimo Imana yanshinze muri mwe: ni uwo kubagezaho byuzuye ijambo ry’Imana," 
Colossians1:26 mbamenyesha ibanga ryari ryarahishwe kuva kera kose no mu bisekuruza byose, none rikaba rimaze guhishurirwa abatagatifujwe bayo." 
Colossians1:27 Ni bo Imana yishakiye kumenyesha ikuzo n’ibyiza bitagereranywa iryo banga rizanira abanyamahanga: Kristu ari muri mwe, We uzaduhesha ikuzo twizeye!" 
Colossians1:28 Kristu uwo nyine ni We twamamaza, tuburira buri muntu kandi tumwigisha ubwenge bwose, kugira ngo buri wese tumuhindure intungane muri Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Ngicyo icyo nduhira nkakirwanirira nkoresheje imbaraga zose mpora nterwa na We. 
Colossians2:1 Nifuza rero ko mumenya intambara ikomeye mbarwanira, mwebwe n’abo muri Lawodiseya, ndetse n’abandi batigeze bambona n’amaso yabo." 
Colossians2:2 Icyo mparanira ni uko imitima yabo ihumurizwa, bakibumbira mu rukundo, kandi bakagera ku bumenyi bwuzuye bw’ibanga ry’Imana, ari ryo Kristu," 
Colossians2:3 We nganzo iganjemo icyitwa ubuhanga n’ubumenyi cyose. 
Colossians2:4 Ibyo mbibabwiriye kugira ngo hatagira ubashukisha amagambo y’amaryohereza. 
Colossians2:5 N’ubwo tutari kumwe bwose, mbahozaho umutima nejerejwe n’uko iwanyu ibintu byose biri mu buryo, n’uko kandi mukomeza kwemera Kristu mutadohoka." 
Colossians2:6 Bityo rero, nimukomeze mujye mbere muri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu, mbese nk’uko mwamubwiwe;" 
Colossians2:7 mushore imizi muri We, kandi mube ari We mwishingikirizaho, mukomejwe n’ukwemera babatoje, mushimira Imana ubudahwema." 
Colossians2:8 Muramenye ntihazagire ubashukisha bene za nyigisho z’ubuhendanyi bita ubuhanga bwahebuje, zihuje n’ibitekerezo by’ubuyobe bw’abantu, zigashingira ku by’isi, ariko zinyuranye na Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Koko rero ni We ubusendere bwose bwa kamere‐Mana butuyemo mu buryo bw’umubiri," 
Colossians2:10 kandi namwe ubwanyu abasenderezamo ibyiza byose, We mutware w’Ibikomangoma n’Ibihangange byose." 
Colossians2:11 Mwagenywe muri We; ariko iryo genywa si rya rindi rikorwa n’abantu, ahubwo ni igenywa mwakorewe na Kristu, ari ryo ribakiza irari ry’imibiri yanyu." 
Colossians2:12 Igihe mubatijwe, mwahambanywe na Kristu, kandi muzukana na we, kuko mwemeye ububasha bw’Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye." 
Colossians2:13 Mwebwe mwari mwarapfuye muzize ibyaha byanyu n’umubiri wanyu wandavuye, none Imana yabashubije ubugingo hamwe na We, itubabarira ibicumuro byacu byose." 
Colossians2:14 Yasibanganyije urwandiko rwadushinjaga imyenda twarimo kubera amategeko tutakurikije, irarushwanyaguza irubamba ku musaraba." 
Colossians2:15 Yanyaze Ibikomangoma n’Ibihangange, ibakoza isoni ku mugaragaro, ibakurubana nk'ingaruzwamuheto inyuma ya Kristu utahanye intsinzi ku bw'umusaraba we." 
Colossians2:16 Nuko rero ntihakagire ubacira urubanza mu byerekeye ibiribwa cyangwa ibinyobwa, cyangwa se kubera iminsi mikuru, imboneko z’ukwezi n’amasabato." 
Colossians2:17 Ibyo byose ni amarenga y’ibyagombaga kuzaza, ariko ukuri nyako ni Kristu." 
Colossians2:18 Ntihakagire kandi ababavutsa amahoro bakurikiza utugenzo tudafite akamaro, bagasenga abamalayika, bakirata ko babonekewe, bakurikije ibitekerezo byabo by’amanjwe." 
Colossians2:19 Bene abo bitandukanyije n’Umutwe uhuza kandi ukagaburira umubiri wose, ukawukuza ubigirishije imitsi n’ingingo, nk’uko Imana ibishaka." 
Colossians2:20 Ubwo mwapfanye na Kristu, mukagobotorwa ku by’isi, ni iki cyatuma mugenza nk’aho mukiri ab’isi," 
Colossians2:21 mugakurikiza bene iyi miziro, ngo «Wifata iki!», cyangwa «Ntusomeho!», cyangwa «Ntukoreho!»" 
Colossians2:22 Kandi ibyo byose bizashira mukibikoresha! Ngayo amategeko n’inyigisho z’abantu! 
Colossians2:23 Koko, ibyo byose wagira ngo birimo ubwenge, cyangwa ngo bigamije gushimisha Imana mu kwicisha bugufi no kwigomwa, nyamara nta kamaro bifite na gato ko gucubya irari ry’umubiri." 
Colossians3:1 Ubwo mwazukanye na Kristu, nimuharanire ibyo mu ijuru, aho Kristu ari, yicaye iburyo bw’Imana;" 
Colossians3:2 nimurangamire iby’ijuru, aho kurarikira iby’isi." 
Colossians3:3 Koko mwapfanye na Kristu, none ubugingo bwanyu bwihishe hamwe na We mu Mana." 
Colossians3:4 Aho Kristu azigaragariza, We bugingo bwanyu, icyo gihe namwe muzagaragara muri kumwe na We, mu ikuzo ryisesuye." 
Colossians3:5 Nimucike rero ku bibarimo byose bibatera gutwarwa n’iby’isi, nk’ubwiyandarike n’ubusambanyi, ingeso mbi n’irari ribi, ibyifuzo bibi n’ubugugu butuma musenga ibintu nk’ibigirwamana!" 
Colossians3:6 Ngibyo ibirakaza Imana. 
Colossians3:7 Nguko uko namwe mwagenzaga kera, mugikora ibyo." 
Colossians3:8 Noneho ubu, namwe ibyo byose nimubizinukwe: uburakari, umwaga, ubugome, ibitutsi, n’ibigambo bibi bibava mu kanwa." 
Colossians3:9 Nimuherukire aho kubeshyana, kuko mwasezereye muntu w’igisazira hamwe n’imigenzereze ye," 
Colossians3:10 mugahinduka muntu mushya, uwo Umuremyi ahora avugurura amwishushanya, agira ngo amugeze ku bumenyi nyakuri." 
Colossians3:11 Icyo gihe rero ntihaba hakivugwa Umugereki cyangwa Umuyahudi, uwagenywe cyangwa utagenywe, umunyeshyanga cyangwa Umushiti, umucakara cyangwa uwigenga; ahubwo haba havugwa gusa Kristu, uba byose muri bose." 
Colossians3:12 Naho mwebwe, ntore z’Imana, mukaba abatagatifu bayo ikunda byimazeyo, nimugire umutima wuje impuhwe, ubugiraneza, ubwiyoroshye, ituze, n’ukwiyumanganya." 
Colossians3:13 Nimwihanganirane kandi, niba umwe agize icyo apfa n’undi mubabarirane. Nk’uko Nyagasani yabababariye, namwe nimugenze mutyo." 
Colossians3:14 Ariko ikiruta ibyo byose, nimugire urukundo ruzabahuriza mwese mu butungane." 
Colossians3:15 Kandi amahoro ya Kristu naganze mu mitima yanyu, kuko ari yo mwahamagariwe ngo mube umubiri umwe. Kandi mujye muhora mushimira." 
Colossians3:16 Ijambo rya Kristu niribaturemo, risagambe rwose. Mujye mwigishanya kandi muhanane, mubigiranye ubwitonzi. Mujye mushimira Imana mu mitima yanyu, muyiririmbira zaburi, ibisingizo n’izindi ndirimbo mubwirijwe na Roho Mutagatifu." 
Colossians3:17 Ari ibyo muvuze, ari n’ibyo mukoze, byose mujye mubigira mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu, abe ari we mwisunga mushimira Imana Data." 
Colossians3:18 Bagore, mujye mworohera abagabo banyu nk’uko bikwiye, mubigirira Nyagasani." 
Colossians3:19 Bagabo, namwe nimukunde abagore banyu, mwoye kubabera abanyamwaga." 
Colossians3:20 Bana, nimwumvire ababyeyi banyu muri byose, kuko ari byo binyura Nyagasani." 
Colossians3:21 Babyeyi, namwe ntimugatonganye abana banyu ubutitsa, mutazabakura umutima." 
Colossians3:22 Bagaragu, nimwumvire muri byose ba shobuja bo kuri iyi si, mudakorera ijisho, nk’aho ari abantu mushaka gushimisha, ahubwo mubigirane umutima utaryarya, mwubaha Nyagasani." 
Colossians3:23 Icyo mukoze cyose, mujye mugikora mwimazeyo nk’abakorera Nyagasani, atari ugukorera abantu," 
Colossians3:24 muzirikana ko muzahembwa na Nyagasani umurage yageneye abe. Nyagasani Kristu ni We mukorera. 
Colossians3:25 Ugira inabi wese azayiturwa, kandi bose bazagenzerezwa kimwe." 
Colossians4:1 Namwe ba shebuja, mujye muha abagaragu banyu ibitunganye n’ibibakwiye, mwibuka ko namwe mufite Shobuja uri mu ijuru." 
Colossians4:2 Nimukomere ku isengesho, muhugukire gushimira." 
Colossians4:3 Mudusabire natwe, kugira ngo Imana idutegurire uburyo bwo kwamamaza ibanga rya Kristu, ari na ryo ritumye mba imfungwa," 
Colossians4:4 maze mbone kuritangaza uko mbishinzwe. 
Colossians4:5 Abo mudasangiye ukwemera, mubagenderere mu bwitonzi, mubibonere umwanya n’uburyo." 
Colossians4:6 Amagambo muvuze ahore arangwa n’ineza, amere nk’asize umunyu; uwo muvuganye wese mumenye kumusubiza uko bikwiye." 
Colossians4:7 Ibinyerekeyeho byose muzabibwirwa na Tushiko, uwo muvandimwe nkunda wandwanyeho kandi twafatanyije umurimo wa Nyagasani." 
Colossians4:8 Ndamuboherereje kugira ngo ababwire amakuru yacu kandi abahumurize. 
Colossians4:9 Mboherereje na Onezimi, uwo muvandimwe nkunda kandi w’inyangamugayo, ngo bazane maze babamenyeshe ibyabaye ino byose." 
Colossians4:10 Arisitariko mugenzi wanjye dufunganywe arabatashya, na Mariko mwene sewabo wa Barinaba; naza iwanyu, muzamwakire neza, mukurikije amabwiriza mwahawe." 
Colossians4:11 Yezu, uwo bahimbye irya Yusito, na we arabatashya. Ni bo bonyine mu Bayahudi bamfashije kogeza Ingoma y’Imana, bambereye igihozo." 
Colossians4:12 Epafurasi uvuka iwanyu arabatashya; uwo mugaragu wa Yezu Kristu ntahwema kubasabira, kugira ngo mukomere mube intungane, kandi mukurikize muri byose ugushaka kw’Imana." 
Colossians4:13 Rwose ndahamya ko abaruhira cyane, mwebwe n’abo muri Lawodiseya, n’abo kuri Hiyerapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Arabatashya Luka, umuganga dukunda, na Demasi." 
Colossians4:15 Mutashye abavandimwe bari i Lawodiseya, na Nimifa, n’abakoranira mu nzu ye bose." 
Colossians4:16 Nimumara gusoma iyi baruwa, muzayoherereze na Kiliziya y’i Lawodiseya maze na bo bayisome; namwe muzasome ivuye i Lawodiseya nibageraho." 
Colossians4:17 Mubwire Arikipo muti «Witondere umurimo wahawe muri Nyagasani, kandi wihatire kuwutunganya!»" 
Colossians4:18 Ngiyo intashyo yanjye mbandikiye ubwanjye, jyewe Pawulo. Mwibuke kandi ingoyi ndiho. Muhorane ineza ya Nyagasani!" 
1Thessalonians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, na Silivani, na Timote kuri Kiliziya y’Abanyatesaloniki, yibumbiye ku Mana Data no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu: tubifurije ineza n’amahoro." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Iyo tubibutse mu masengesho yacu, ntiduhwema gushimira Imana kubera mwebwe mwese." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Duhora twibuka ibikorwa byiza n’ukwemera kwanyu, n’imiruho muterwa n’urukundo rwanyu, n’ukuntu mwiringiye Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu mudatezuka imbere y’Imana Umubyeyi wacu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Bavandimwe, nkoramutima z’Imana, tuzi neza ko muri mu bo yatoye." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Koko rero, Inkuru Nziza tubamenyesha, nta bwo yabagejejweho mu magambo gusa, ahubwo twayamamaje dushize amanga, twishingikirije ububasha butyaye bwa Roho Mutagatifu. Muzi neza ukuntu twabagenjereje tugamije kubagirira akamaro." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Namwe mwaratwiganye, mwigana na Nyagasani, maze mu bitotezo byinshi, mwakirana ijambo ry’Imana ibyishimo bikomoka kuri Roho Mutagatifu." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Byatumye mubera urugero abemera bose bo muri Masedoniya n’abo muri Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Koko rero, ijambo rya Nyagasani, rihereye iwanyu, ntiryasakaye muri Masedoniya no muri Akaya gusa, ahubwo inkuru y’ukuntu mwemeye Imana yamamaye hose, ku buryo nta cyo twakwirirwa tubivugaho." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Bose kandi bavuga uko twakiriwe iwanyu, n’ukuntu mwayobotse Imana, mugata ibigirwamana, kugira ngo mukorere Imana nzima kandi nyakuri," 
1Thessalonians1:10 kandi mutegereze Umwana wayo Yezu yazuye mu bapfuye, We uzaza ava mu ijuru ngo adukize uburakari bugiye kuza." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Namwe ubwanyu, bavandimwe, muzi ukuntu twaje iwanyu, kandi ntibibapfire ubusa." 
1Thessalonians2:2 N’ubwo i Filipi twari tumaze kuhabonera imibabaro no kuhatukirwa cyane, nk’uko musanzwe mubizi, ntibyatubujije kubasanga namwe, twiringiye Imana yacu, ngo tubagezeho Inkuru Nziza yayo mu ngorane nyinshi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Inyigisho zacu ntizishingiye ku buyobe cyangwa ku migambi idahwitse, cyangwa se ku mayeri." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ariko kubera ko yabanje kutugerageza kugira ngo idushinge Inkuru Nziza yayo, bituma tuyamamaza kuri ubu buryo: ntituvugira gushimisha abantu, ahubwo gushimisha Imana, Yo igenzura imitima yacu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Ntitwigeze na rimwe tubabwira amagambo yo kubaryoshya, ibyo murabizi; nta n’ubwo twigeze dushaka kubungukiraho, Imana irabibere umuhamya;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 nta na rimwe twigeze duharanira icyubahiro mu bantu, haba muri mwe cyangwa se mu bandi," 
1Thessalonians2:7 n’ubwo twashoboraga kwitwaza ko turi intumwa za Kristu, tukabagora. Ahubwo twicishije bugufi cyane hagati yanyu, mbese nk’uko umubyeyi ashyashyanira abana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Bityo, kubera ubwuzu twari tubafitiye, uretse kubagezaho Inkuru Nziza y’Imana, twari twiteguye no guhara amagara yacu, bitewe n’urukundo twabakundaga." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Muribuka, bavandimwe, imvune n’imiruho yacu: igihe twabamenyeshaga Inkuru Nziza y’Imana: ntitwaburaga gukora ijoro n’amanywa kugira ngo hatagira n’umwe muri mwe tugora." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Yemwe, uko twifashe hagati yanyu, tubabera intungane, intabera n’indahinyuka, mwebwe abemera mushobora kubihamya, ndetse n’Imana ubwayo." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Kandi muzi uko twahuguraga buri muntu, nk’umubyeyi mu bana be," 
1Thessalonians2:12 tubashishikaza, tubatera inkunga, kandi tubingingira gutunganira Imana Yo ibahamagarira ingoma yayo n’ikuzo ryayo." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ngicyo igituma tudahwema gushimira Imana, kuko mwakiriye ijambo ryayo twabigishije nk’uko riri by’ukuri. Koko ntimwaryakiriye nk’ijambo ry’abantu, ahubwo nk’ijambo ry’Imana rigaragariza akamaro karyo muri mwebwe abemera." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Koko rero, bavandimwe, mwiganye Kiliziya z’Imana zo muri Yudeya, zibumbiye muri Kristu Yezu; kuko namwe mwaboneye amagorwa kuri bene wanyu nk’uko na bo bayaboneye ku Bayahudi." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Uko bishe Nyagasani Yezu n’abahanuzi, ni ko badutoteje natwe. Nta bwo bashimisha Imana, kandi babangamiye abantu bose." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Batubuza kwigisha abanyamahanga ngo bakizwe, bakagumya kugwiza batyo ibyaha byabo. Amaherezo ariko, uburakari bw’Imana bwarabagwiriye." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Naho twebwe, bavandimwe, tumaze igihe gito dutandukanye, ariko kure y’amaso si ho kure y’umutima; byatumye twihatira kongera kubabona, kuko twari tubakumbuye cyane." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ni yo mpamvu twashatse kuza iwanyu, — jyewe ubwanjye Pawulo nabigambiriye kenshi — ariko Sekibi aratuzitira." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Usibye mwebwe, ugira ngo hari ahandi twakura amizero, n’ibyishimo, n’ishema rizatubera ikamba imbere y’Umwami wacu Yezu igihe azazira?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Koko ni mwe shema n’ibyishimo byacu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Aho rero tunaniriwe kwihangana, twahisemo gusigara twenyine Atene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 nuko twohereza Timote, umuvandimwe wacu akaba n’umufasha w’Imana mu byo kwamamaza Inkuru Nziza ya Kristu. Twamushinze kubakomeza no kubatera umwete mu kwemera kwanyu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 kugira ngo hatagira uhungabanywa n’aya makuba turimo, kuko musanzwe muzi ko ari yo twagenewe." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Igihe twari iwanyu, twababuriye hakiri kare ko tuzahura n’amagorwa, kandi muzi ko ari ko byagenze." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ni cyo gituma aho naniriwe kwihangana, naboherereje intumwa kugira ngo menyeshwe iby’ukwemera kwanyu, hato Umushukanyi ataba yarabashutse, maze ibyo twakoze bikaba imfabusa." 
1Thessalonians3:6 None ubu Timote atugezeho avuye iwanyu, atuzanira amakuru meza yerekeye ukwemera n’urukundo byanyu; yanatubwiye ko muhora mutwibuka, mukifuza kutubona nk’uko natwe tubyifuza." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Bityo rero, bavandimwe, ukwemera kwanyu kwatumaze agahinda mu mpagarara no mu magorwa yacu yose." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ubu turumva tuguwe neza, ubwo mugikomeye muri Nyagasani." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Mbese twashimira Imana dute kubera ibyishimo byose mudutera imbere yayo? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ijoro n’amanywa, dusaba Imana, tukayinginga dukomeje, ngo iduhe kwongera kubonana, maze tubongerere ibyo mukibuze mu kwemera kwanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Imana Data ubwayo, hamwe n’Umwami wacu Yezu, nibadutegurire urugendo ruzatugeza iwanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Namwe kandi, Nyagasani arabongeremo kandi yuzuze urukundo mufitanye, n’urwo mufitiye abantu bose, nk’uko natwe tubakunda." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Nyagasani nakomeze imitima yanyu, igume mu butungane budahinyuka imbere y’Imana Umubyeyi wacu, kugeza igihe Umwami wacu Yezu azaza ashagawe n’abatagatifu be bose." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ikindi kandi, bavandimwe, turabasaba tubinginga muri Nyagasani Yezu ngo mwifate ku buryo bushimisha Imana, nk’uko twabibigishije; ni ko musanzwe mubigenza, ariko noneho nimurusheho." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Muzi kandi amategeko twabahaye muri Nyagasani Yezu ayo ari yo. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Dore icyo Imana ibashakaho: ni uko mwaba intungane, mukirinda ubusambanyi." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Ahubwo buri wese muri mwe amenyere kwifata, agumane ubumanzi n’ubwiyubahe," 
1Thessalonians4:5 yange gutwarwa n’irari nk’abanyamahanga batazi Imana. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Kandi ntihakagire ucumura ku uwo bava inda imwe, cyangwa ngo amurenganye muri ibyo, kuko Nyagasani azahana abagenza batyo, nk’uko twabibabwiye, tubihanangiriza." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Koko rero, Imana ntiyaduhamagariye kwandavura, ahubwo yaduhamagariye kuba intungane." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ni na yo mpamvu usuzugura aya mategeko, atari umuntu aba asuzuguye, ahubwo aba asuzuguye Imana yabashyizemo Roho Mutagatifu wayo." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ibyerekeye urukundo rwa kivandimwe, si ngombwa ko tubibandikira, kuko Imana ubwayo yabiyigishirije gukundana," 
1Thessalonians4:10 kandi ni na ko mubikorera abavandimwe bose bo muri Masedoniya yose. Bavandimwe, turabasaba gukomeza kujya mbere;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 nimwihatire gutuza, mwibande ku bibareba, kandi mukoreshe amaboko yanyu, nk’uko twabibategetse." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Bityo muzihesha agaciro muri rubanda, kandi nta we muzakenera." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Bavandimwe, nta bwo dushaka ko muguma mu bujiji ku byerekeye abapfuye, kugira ngo mudaheranwa n’ishavu, nk’abandi batagira icyo bizera." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nk’uko twemera ko Yezu yapfuye kandi yazutse, ni na ko abapfuye bamwizera, Imana izabazura maze ikabashyira hamwe na We." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Dore icyo tubabwira giturutse ku ijambo rya Nyagasani: twebwe abazima, abazaba bakiriho ku munsi w’amaza ya Nyagasani, nta bwo tuzabanziriza na gato abapfuye." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Koko rero, ku kimenyetso gitanzwe n’umumalayika mukuru mu ijwi riranguruye, no ku mworomo w’impanda y’Imana, Nyagasani ubwe azamanuka mu ijuru. Nuko abapfuye bizera Kristu babanze bazuke," 
1Thessalonians4:17 hanyuma twebwe abazima, abazaba basigaye, duhite twererezwa hamwe na bo mu bicu, kugira ngo dusanganire Nyagasani mu kirere, bityo tuzabane na Nyagasani iteka ryose." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Murajye rero muhumurizanya muri bene ayo magambo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Naho ku byerekeye igihe n’amagingo ibyo bizabera, bavandimwe, ntimukeneye ko tubibandikira." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ubwanyu muzi neza ko Umunsi wa Nyagasani uza nk’umujura wa nijoro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Igihe rero bazaba bavuga ngo ’Mbega amahoro n’umutekano!» ni bwo icyorezo kizabatungura, nk’uko ibise bitungura umugore utwite, kandi nta mahungiro." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ariko mwebwe, bavandimwe, ntimukiri mu mwijima ku buryo uwo munsi wabatungura nk’umujura;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 mwese muri abana b’urumuri n’ab’amanywa; ntituri ab’ijoro n’ab’umwijima. 
1Thessalonians5:6 None rero, ntitugasinzire nk’abandi, ahubwo tube maso kandi twirinde gutwarwa n’irari." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Abashaka gusinzira, nijoro ni ho basinzira; n’abasinda, nijoro ni ho basinda;" 
1Thessalonians5:8 naho twebwe, ubwo turi ab’amanywa, tujye twiramira, kandi twambare intwaro z’Imana, ukwemera n’urukundo bibe ikoti ry’intamenwa, amizero y’uko tuzakizwa abe nk’ingofero y’icyuma." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Erega Imana ntiyatugeneye kurimburwa n’uburakari bwayo, ahubwo yatugeneye kuronka umukiro dukesha Umwami Yezu Kristu" 
1Thessalonians5:10 wadupfiriye kugira ngo, twaba bazima cyangwa twaba twarapfuye, duhore twunze ubumwe na we." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Kubera iyo mpamvu, nimujye muhumurizanya kandi muterane inkunga nk’uko musanzwe mubigenza." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Turabasaba kandi, bavandimwe, ngo mumenye abanyu babaruhira, bakaba bashinzwe kubayobora muri Nyagasani no kubagira inama;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 mujye mububahana urukundo rwinshi, kubera ibyo babakorera. Namwe ubwanyu mubane mu mahoro." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Turabinginga, bavandimwe, ngo muhane inkorabusa, mukomeze umutima abacika intege, mushyigikire abatishoboye, bose mubihanganire." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mumenye ntihakagire uwitura undi inabi, ahubwo muharanire iteka kugirirana ineza, ndetse muyigirire bose." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mujye muhora mwishimye," 
1Thessalonians5:17 musenge ubudahwema," 
1Thessalonians5:18 mushimire Imana muri byose, kuko ari byo ibashakaho muri Yezu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Muramenye ntimuzimye Roho w’Imana," 
1Thessalonians5:20 ntimugahinyure ibyahanuwe; 
1Thessalonians5:21 ahubwo mujye mugenzura byose, ibyiza mubigumane," 
1Thessalonians5:22 naho ikibi cyose mucyirinde. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Imana y’amahoro ubwayo nibatagatifuze binonosoye, kugira ngo izasange muri indahemuka mwese nta makemwa mufite ku mutima no ku mubiri, ku munsi Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu azaziraho." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ubahamagara ni indahemuka; azakora n’ibyo ngibyo. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bavandimwe, natwe mudusabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Muramukanye n’abavandimwe bose mu muhoberano mutagatifu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mbasabye nkomeje ku bwa Nyagasani, gusomera abavandimwe bose iyi baruwa." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Muhorane iteka ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, na Silivani, na Timote kuri Kiliziya y’Abanyatesaloniki, yibumbiye ku Mana Data no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Data no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Bavandimwe, tugomba guhora dushimira Imana kubera mwebwe. Ibyo birakwiye, kuko ukwemera kwanyu kugenda kwiyongera, n’urukundo mufitanye rukabasenderamo uko mungana," 
2Thessalonians1:4 bigatuma natwe muduhesha ishema muri Kiliziya z’Imana, kubera ubudacogora n’ukwemera bibaranga muri ibyo bitotezo n’amagorwa yose mwihanganira." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ibyo birerekana urubanza Imana izaca mu butabera, kuko nimumara kubabara ku mpamvu y’Ingoma y’Imana, nta washidikanya ko izasanga mukwiye kuyinjizwamo." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Koko rero, biratunganye ko Imana isubiza amagorwa ku bayateye," 
2Thessalonians1:7 naho mwebwe abagowe, ikabaha kuruhukana natwe, igihe cy’ukwigaragaza kwa Nyagasani Yezu, uzava mu ijuru ashagawe n’abamalayika be mu bubasha bwinshi," 
2Thessalonians1:8 kandi ari hagati y’umuriro ugurumana, kugira ngo ahane abatazi Imana bakanga kumvira Inkuru Nziza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu" 
2Thessalonians1:9 Abo ngabo bazabona igihano kizahoraho, bacirirwe kure y’uruhanga rwa Nyagasani Nyir’ikuzo," 
2Thessalonians1:10 kuri wa munsi azaza kugira ngo aherwe ikuzo mu batagatifu be, kandi ashimagirizwe mu bazaba baramwemeye bose: mwebweho rero, muri mu bemeye ubuhamya bwacu." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ni yo mpamvu ituma tubasabira iteka, kugira ngo Imana yacu ibahe gutunganya ibyo yabatoreye, kandi ngo ku bubasha bwayo, ibahe gukora ibyiza byose mwiyemeje, mugire n’ukwemera kwigaragaza mu bikorwa." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Bityo, izina rya Nyagasani Yezu rizakurizwe muri mwe, namwe muri We, mubikesha ubuntu bw’Imana yacu n’ubwa Nyagasani Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bavandimwe, ku byerekeye amaza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu no ku byerekeye uko tuzakoranira iruhande rwe, hari icyo twabasaba:" 
2Thessalonians2:2 muramenye ntimugahagarike imitima vuba, ngo muce igikuba mubitewe na bamwe biha kubemeza ko umunsi wa Nyagasani waba wageze, bitwaje ubuhanuzi batugerekaho, n’andi magambo tutigeze tuvuga, cyangwa se amabaruwa ngo twaba twaranditse." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Rwose ntihazagire ubabeshya na busa, kuko ibyo bitazaba hatabanje kuza igihe cy’ubuhakanyi, kandi hatabanje kwigaragaza Umuntu w’Umugomeramana, Umwana woramye," 
2Thessalonians2:4 wa Mwanzi uzishyira hejuru y’icyitwa Imana cyose, no hejuru y’ibindi byose bikwiye gusengwa, akageza n’aho ubwe yicara mu Ngoro y’Imana, maze agatangaza ko ubwe ari Imana." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Mbese ntimwibuka ko tukiri kumwe najyaga mbibabwira? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Muzi kandi ikimuzitiye ubu ngubu, ku buryo atakwigaragaza igihe cye kitaragera." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ni koko, Ubugomeramana bw’urujijo bwatangiye guca ibintu mu cyayenge; igisigaye gusa ni ukwigizayo ubuzitiye ubu ngubu." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Uwo nguwo rero namara kwigizwayo, ni bwo Umugomeramana azigaragaza, maze Nyagasani Yezu amwicishe umwuka umuva mu kanwa, amurimbuze ububengerane buranga amaza ye." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Naho amaza y’Umugomeramana yo azarangwa n’imigirire ikomoka kuri Sekibi, agaragarire mu bushobozi buhambaye, no mu bimenyetso n’ibitangaza by’ibinyoma biteye kwinshi," 
2Thessalonians2:10 kimwe no mu bishuko byose by’ubugizi bwa nabi, bizitabirwa n’abagenewe korama bazize ko batakunze ukuri kugenewe kubarokora." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ni yo mpamvu Imana ibareka bagaterwa n’ubuyobe bubarindagiza, bakemera ibinyoma," 
2Thessalonians2:12 kugira ngo abazaba baranze kwemera ukuri, ahubwo bagahimbazwa n’ubugiranabi, bose bazacirwe urubanza." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Twebweho rero, tugomba guhora dushimira Imana kubera mwebwe, bavandimwe mukunzwe na Nyagasani, kuko Imana yabatoye kuva mu ntangiriro, kugira ngo murokorwe mubikesha Roho ubatagatifuza, mubikesha kandi no kwemera ukuri." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ngicyo icyo yabatoreye, ibigirishije Inkuru Nziza twamamaza, kugira ngo muronke ikuzo ry’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 None rero, bavandimwe, nimukomere kandi mukomeze ubutagerura inyigisho z’uruhererekane twabagejejeho, ari mu magambo, ari no mu nyandiko." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu ubwe, hamwe n’Imana Umubyeyi wacu wadukunze, maze ku neza ye akaduha kwizera ihumure ritazashira," 
2Thessalonians2:17 bo nyine nibabahumurize kandi babahe gukomera mu byiza byose mukora cyangwa muvuga. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ahasigaye, bavandimwe, mudusabire kugira ngo ijambo rya Nyagasani rikomeze gukwira hose, ryamamare nk’uko bimeze iwanyu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Musabe kandi kugira ngo turokoke abantu b’abagome n’abagiranabi: koko rero kwemera si ibya bose. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Nyagasani ni indahemuka: azabakomeza, abarinde Nyakibi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Kandi ku bwa Nyagasani ntidushidikanya ko ibyo tubategeka, mubikora mukazanabikomeza." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Nyagasani nayobore imitima yanyu, ayitoze gukunda Imana no kwiyumanganya nka Kristu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bavandimwe, mu izina rya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, tubategetse kwirinda umuvandimwe wese w’inyandagazi, udakurikiza inyigisho n’umuco mudukomoraho." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Muzi neza ukuntu mugomba kudukurikiza: nta bwo twigeze tuba inkorabusa iwanyu," 
2Thessalonians3:8 nta n’umwe twigeze dusaba umugati wadutunze; ahubwo ijoro n’amanywa, mu mvune n’imiruho, twarikoreraga ubwacu, kugira ngo hatagira n’umwe muri mwe tugora." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Si ukuvuga ko tutari tubifitiye uburenganzira, ahubwo twashakaga kubabera urugero mukurikiza." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Igihe twari iwanyu, twabahaye uyu mugambi, tuti «Niba hari udashaka gukora, ajye areka no kurya!»" 
2Thessalonians3:11 None dusigaye twumva ko muri mwe harimo abandaraye, ntibagire icyo bakora, ahubwo bakivanga muri byose." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Abameze batyo tubategetse kandi tubasabye ibi ngibi; muri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu: nibajye bakora mu ituze, batungwe n’umugati baruhiye ubwabo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Namwe, bavandimwe, ntimukadohoke mu gukora neza." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Niba kandi hari utumvira ibyo tuvuze muri iyi baruwa, muramumenye, mumugendere kure, kugira ngo akorwe n’isoni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Icyakora ntimukamufate nk’umwanzi, ahubwo mumugire inama bya kivandimwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nyagasani Nyir’amahoro ubwe nabagwirize amahoro, aho muri hose n’igihe cyose. Nyagasani abane namwe mwese." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Iyi ndamutso, ni jyewe ubwanjye Pawulo uyiyandikiye. Kandi mu mabaruwa yanjye yose ni cyo kizabemeza ko ari jyewe: ni uko nandika!" 
2Thessalonians3:18 Muhorane iteka ineza y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu. 
1Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, uko Imana Umukiza wacu na Kristu Yezu amizero yacu babishatse," 
1Timothy1:2 kuri Timote, umwana wanjye nyakuri nabyaye mu kwemera: nkwifurije ineza, impuhwe n’amahoro biva ku Mana Data no kuri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu." 
1Timothy1:3 Igihe nendaga kujya i Masedoniya, nagusabye kuguma Efezi, kugira ngo ubuze bamwe gukwiza inyigisho z’intarurano," 
1Timothy1:4 no kwibanda ku migani y’amahomvu hamwe n’ibisokuruza by’urudaca, bigamije gusa gukurura impaka zidashobotse, aho gushyigikira umugambi w’Imana ushingiye ku kwemera." 
1Timothy1:5 Ibyo mbivugiye guteza imbere urukundo rukomoka ku mutima usukuye, ku mutimanama ukeye no ku kwemera kutaryarya." 
1Timothy1:6 Kubera ko bamwe bataye uwo murongo, byatumye barorongotana mu magambo atagira shinge na rugero." 
1Timothy1:7 Bibwira ko ari abahanga mu by’Amategeko, kandi baba batazi n’icyo bavuga cyangwa barwanira ishyaka." 
1Timothy1:8 Koko, birazwi, Amategeko ni meza, apfa gusa gukoreshwa mu rugero rukwiye," 
1Timothy1:9 umuntu akamenya ko Itegeko ritabereyeho intungane, ahubwo ko ryashyiriweho abantu b’ibigande n’ibyigomeke, abananira Imana n’abanyabyaha, inkorashyano n’inkozi z’ibibi, abica ba se cyangwa ba nyina, n’abandi bicanyi," 
1Timothy1:10 ibyomanzi, abiyandarika, abacuruza abantu, ababeshyi n’abarahirabinyoma, n’abandi bose bakora ibitambamiye inyigisho zitunganye," 
1Timothy1:11 za zindi zihuje n’Inkuru Nziza naragijwe n’Imana, Yo Nyir’ikuzo n’ihirwe." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndashimira cyane Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu wampaye imbaraga, kuko yasanze nkwiye kwizerwa, maze akantorera kumukorera," 
1Timothy1:13 jyewe wahoze ndi umuntu utuka Imana, ngatoteza abayo, nkaba umunyarugomo. Ariko nagiriwe imbabazi, kuko ibyo nakoraga nabiterwaga n’ubujiji, ntaragira ukwemera." 
1Timothy1:14 None ingabire y’Umwami wacu yambayemo igisagirane, nsenderezwa ukwemera n’urukundo ruri muri Kristu Yezu." 
1Timothy1:15 Dore ijambo rigomba kwizerwa, kandi rikwiye kwakiranwa ubwuzu na bose: ni uko Kristu Yezu yaje ku isi kugira ngo akize abanyabyaha, muri bo jye nkaba uwa mbere." 
1Timothy1:16 Kandi kuba naragiriwe imbabazi, ni ukugira ngo Kristu Yezu ahere kuri jye, maze yerekane ubuntu bwe bwose, bityo angire urugero rw’abagomba kuzamwemera bose bizeye ubugingo bw’iteka." 
1Timothy1:17 Umwami w’ibihe byose, ari na We Mana imwe rukumbi, ihoraho kandi itagaragara, naharirwe icyubahiro n’ikuzo, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Timote, mwana wanjye, ngiyo inyigisho nkuragije, ikaba ihuje n’ubuhanuzi bukwerekeye bakuvugiyeho kera, kugira ngo numara kubucengeramo, ubashe kurwana intambara ikwiye," 
1Timothy1:19 ufite ukwemera n’umutimanama mwiza. Hari ababiretse, maze ukwemera kwabo kurayoyoka." 
1Timothy1:20 Abo ni nka ba Himene na Alegisanderi nashumurije Sekibi, kugira ngo bamenyereho kutazongera gutuka Imana ukundi." 
1Timothy2:1 Ndasaba rero nkomeje ko mbere ya byose mwakwambaza Imana, mukavuga amasengesho, mugatakamba kandi mugashimira Imana, mubigirira abantu bose." 
1Timothy2:2 Dukwiye gusabira abami n’abandi bategetsi bose, kugira ngo tubone kubaho mu ituze n’amahoro, turangwa n’ubusabane ku Mana kandi dutunganiwe." 
1Timothy2:3 Ngicyo ikintu gikwiye kandi kinogeye Imana Umukiza wacu," 
1Timothy2:4 Yo ishaka ko abantu bose bakira kandi bakamenya ukuri. 
1Timothy2:5 Koko rero, Imana ni imwe rukumbi, n’umuhuza w’abantu n’Imana akaba umwe: ni Kristu Yezu, umuntu nyirizina," 
1Timothy2:6 witanze ngo abe incungu ya bose. Ngicyo icyemezo cy’ugukizwa kwacu cyatanzwe igihe cyabigenewe kigeze," 
1Timothy2:7 kandi nanjye ubwanjye nkaba naratorewe kuba intumwa yo kubyamamaza no kubyogeza. Ndavuga ukuri simbeshya, ndi umwarimu w’amahanga mu byerekeye ukwemera n’ukuri." 
1Timothy2:8 None rero ndashaka ko abagabo bajya basenga, aho bari hose, bakerekeza ku ijuru ibiganza bizira inenge, nta mwaga cyangwa intonganya." 
1Timothy2:9 Abagore na bo bagomba kugira imyifatire ikwiriye bakarimbana ubwiyoroshye, nta kurata ubukire, nta kuboha imisatsi, nta mitako ya zahabu, nta masaro cyangwa imyambaro y’igiciro," 
1Timothy2:10 ahubwo bakihunda ibikorwa byiza, bya bindi bibereye abagore biyemeje kuyoboka Imana." 
1Timothy2:11 Igihe hari inyigisho itangwa, umugore agomba guceceka, agacisha make rwose." 
1Timothy2:12 Sinemereye umugore kwigisha cyangwa guha itegeko umugabo: najye ahama hamwe, aceceke." 
1Timothy2:13 Koko rero, Adamu ni we waremwe bwa mbere, hanyuma hakurikiraho Eva." 
1Timothy2:14 Kandi Adamu si we wemeye gushukwa, ahubwo umugore ni we wemeye gushukwa, maze aracumura." 
1Timothy2:15 Nyamara ariko azakizwa no kuba umubyeyi, apfa gusa guhorana ubwiyoroshye kandi akaba indacogora mu kwemera, mu rukundo no mu butungane." 
1Timothy3:1 Dore ijambo rigomba kwizerwa: ni uko umuntu wumva ashaka kuba umwepiskopi, aba yifuje gushingwa umurimo mwiza cyane." 
1Timothy3:2 Ariko rero, umwepiskopi agomba kuba ari umuntu w’inyangamugayo, washyingiwe rimwe risa, ntagire inda nini, agacisha make, akagira ubupfura, akamenya kwakira neza abamugana, kandi akaba ashoboye ibyo kwigisha," 
1Timothy3:3 ntabe umunywi cyangwa umunyamahane, ahubwo agahorana ineza, akazira gushotorana kandi ntabe umunyabugugu." 
1Timothy3:4 Akamenya kugenga urugo rwe no gutoza abana be kumvira; ibyo byose bigakorwa mu bwiyubahe. 
1Timothy3:5 None se koko umuntu utazi gutegeka urugo rwe bwite, yashobora ate kwita kuri Kiliziya y’Imana?" 
1Timothy3:6 Byongeye, ntazabe ari umuntu ugarukiye Imana mu bya vuba, hato atazatwarwa n’ubwirasi, bigatuma acirwa urwa Sekibi." 
1Timothy3:7 Ubundi kandi, rubanda rwo hanze rugomba kuba rumuvuga neza kugira ngo atava aho yamaganwa, cyangwa akongera kugwa mu mitego ya Sekibi." 
1Timothy3:8 Abadiyakoni na bo, bagomba kuba ari abantu b’inyangamugayo, bazira uburyarya, ntibarenze urugero mu kunywa inzoga, cyangwa ngo bararikire inyungu zidaciye mu mucyo." 
1Timothy3:9 Bagomba kandi gukomera ku iyobera ry’ukwemera, barangwa n’umutimanama ukeye." 
1Timothy3:10 Na bo kandi, bazabanze babagerageze, hanyuma nibasanga ari indakemwa, bazabone kubashinga umurimo w’ubudiyakoni." 
1Timothy3:11 N’abagore ni uko: bagomba kuba ari inyangamugayo, ntibabe abanyamazimwe, ntibagire inda nini, kandi bakaba indahemuka muri byose." 
1Timothy3:12 Abadiyakoni bagomba kuba barashyingiwe rimwe risa, bakanamenya gutegeka neza abana babo n’ingo zabo bwite." 
1Timothy3:13 Koko rero, abatunganya neza imirimo bashinzwe, bibahesha umwanya w’icyubahiro, bakanabikesha gushira amanga mu kwemera bafitiye Kristu Yezu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ibyo mbikwandikiye nizera ko nzaza vuba nkagusanga. 
1Timothy3:15 Nyamara ariko ndamutse ntinze, ni ngombwa ko umenya uko wifata mu nzu y’Imana: ndashaka kuvuga Kiliziya y’Imana nzima, yo nkingi ishyigikiye ukuri." 
1Timothy3:16 Rwose, nta watinya kubivuga, iyobera ry’ubusabaniramana rirakomeye: Kristu yigaragarije muri kameremuntu, aba intungane ku bwa Roho, arangamirwa n’abamalayika, yamamazwa mu banyamahanga, yemerwa ku isi hose, ajyanwa mu ikuzo." 
1Timothy4:1 Roho Mutagatifu abivuga yeruye ko mu minsi y’imperuka, bamwe bazihakana ukwemera, bishinge ababashukisha ibinyoma, maze batwarwe n’inyigisho zikomoka kuri Sekibi," 
1Timothy4:2 bahendwe ubwenge n’abanyabinyoma buje uburyarya kandi basabitswe n’iyo ngeso ku mutima. 
1Timothy4:3 Abo bantu babuza abandi gushyingirwa cyangwa kurya ibiribwa bimwe, nyamara Imana ari yo yabiremye kugira ngo abayoboke bayo n’abandi bazi ukuri, bajye babirya bayishimira." 
1Timothy4:4 Koko rero, ikintu cyose Imana yaremye ni cyiza, nta kiribwa gikwiye kuba umuziro niba cyakiranywe umutima ushimira:" 
1Timothy4:5 ijambo ry’Imana n’isengesho biragitagatifuza. 
1Timothy4:6 Ibyo byose nubisobanurira abavandimwe, uzaba ubereye Kristu Yezu umugaragu mwiza, utunzwe n’amagambo y’ukwemera n’inyigisho ziboneye witabiranye ubudahemuka." 
1Timothy4:7 Naho imigani y’amanjwe hamwe n’uburondogozi bw’abakecuru, urabigendere kure. Ahubwo itoze gusabanira Imana." 
1Timothy4:8 Koko ni byo: imyitozo y’umubiri ifite akamaro gake, naho gusabanira Imana bimaze byose, kuko ari byo birimo amasezerano y’ubugingo, ari ubwo turimo ubu, ari n’ubuzaza." 
1Timothy4:9 Iryo jambo rigomba kwizerwa kandi rikwiye kwakiranwa ubwuzu na bose. 
1Timothy4:10 Koko rero, niba tugoka ndetse tugaharana, ni uko twiringiye Imana nzima, yo Mukiza w’abantu bose, cyane cyane abayemera." 
1Timothy4:11 Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kwibandaho mu mabwiriza n’inyigisho utanga. 
1Timothy4:12 Ntihazagire ugusuzugurira ko ukiri muto. Ahubwo uzabere abayoboke urugero, ari mu magambo, ari mu migenzereze, mu rukundo, mu kwemera, no mu budakemwa." 
1Timothy4:13 Mu gihe ugitegereje ko nza, ihatire gusoma Ibyanditswe bitagatifu, ushishikarize abandi kugenza neza kandi utange inyigisho." 
1Timothy4:14 Ntuzarangarane ingabire y’Imana ikurimo, ya yindi wahawe igihe ugaragaweho n’ubuhanuzi, maze urugaga rw’abakuru b’umuryango rukakuramburiraho ibiganza." 
1Timothy4:15 Ibyo ngibyo bishyireho umutima, ubyibandeho rwose, maze uko ujya mbere bigende bigaragara mu maso ya bose." 
1Timothy4:16 Ihugukire ubwawe, uhugukire n’umurimo wawe wo kwigisha; ube indatezuka kuri izo nama nkugiriye. Nugenza utyo, uzikiza wowe ubwawe, ukize n’abandi bose bagutega amatwi." 
1Timothy5:1 Ntukabwire nabi umuntu usheshe akanguhe, ahubwo ujye umuhugura nk’umubyeyi. Abasore, ujye ubafata nka bene so;" 
1Timothy5:2 abakecuru ujye ubagenzereza nk’ababyeyi bawe; inkumi na zo, uzifate nka bashiki bawe; byose kandi ubikorane umutima ukeye." 
1Timothy5:3 Uzajye wubaha abapfakazi; ndavuga ariko abari bo by’ukuri. 
1Timothy5:4 Niba rero umupfakazi afite abana cyangwa abuzukuru, mbere na mbere ni ngombwa kubigisha kwita ku muryango wabo bwite, no kwitura ababyeyi babo ibyiza babagiriye. Ibyo ni byo rwose bishimisha Imana."
