1Timothy5:5 Naho umupfakazi nyakujya, wa wundi wasigaye wenyine, we yishyira mu maboko y’Imana, akibanda ku byo gusenga no kuzirikana iby’Imana ijoro n’umunsi." 
1Timothy5:6 Naho rero uwikurikiraniye iby’amaraha, we abarirwa mu bapfuye n’ubwo aba agihagaze." 
1Timothy5:7 Ibyo na byo ujye ubyibutsa kugira ngo abapfakazi babe indakemwa. 
1Timothy5:8 Niba umuntu atita kuri bene wabo, cyane cyane ku bo babana mu rugo, uwo aba yarihakanye ukwemera; arutwa n’utemera na gato." 
1Timothy5:9 Umugore ushobora kwandikwa mu rugaga rw’abapfakazi ni uzaba agejeje nibura ku myaka mirongo itandatu, kandi akaba yarashyingiwe rimwe risa." 
1Timothy5:10 Agomba kuba azwiho ibikorwa byiza: nko kuba yarareze abana be neza, agacumbikira abagenzi, akoza ibirenge by’abatagatifujwe, agatabara imbabare, mbese agashishikarira ibikorwa byose by’ubugiraneza." 
1Timothy5:11 Abapfakazi bakiri bato, bo uzabihorere; iyo ibyifuzo bidakwiranye na Kristu bibatashyemo, bumva bashaka gushyingirwa na none," 
1Timothy5:12 bityo bakikururira umugayo, kuko baba batatiye amasezerano yabo ya mbere." 
1Timothy5:13 Nuko rero, kubera ko baba ari imburamukoro, bagakurizaho kuzerera mu mihana; usibye no kuba imburamukoro gusa, baba bagiye kurondogora no kwivanga mu bitabareba, no kurocangwa." 
1Timothy5:14 Ndashaka rero ko abapfakazi bakiri bato bakongera gushyingirwa, bakabyara abana, bakagenga ingo zabo, bityo ntibahe umwanzi urwaho ngo abambike urubwa." 
1Timothy5:15 Ni koko, hari bamwe muri bo barohamye bakurikiye Sekibi." 
1Timothy5:16 Niba hari umukristukazi ufite benewabo b’abapfakazi, najye abitaho, kugira ngo bitaba ngombwa ko Kiliziya ibishingira, ahubwo ishobore kurwana ku bari abapfakazi by’ukuri." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakuru b’ikoraniro bariyobora neza, bakwiye kubyubahirwa kabiri, cyane cyane abagokera ku murimo wo kwamamaza ijambo ry’Imana no kurisobanura." 
1Timothy5:18 Koko rero Ibyanditswe biravuga, ngo «Ntuzahambire umunwa w’ikimasa kivungagura ingano », kandi ngo «Umukozi akwiye igihembo cye.»." 
1Timothy5:19 Ntuzakire ikirego gishinja umukuru w’ikoraniro nta gihamya cy’abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu 
1Timothy5:20 Abakoze icyaha, urajye ubihanangiriza ubigiriye mu ruhame rwa bose, kugira ngo n’abandi bagire ubwoba." 
1Timothy5:21 Mbigusabiye imbere y’Imana, n’imbere ya Kristu n’abamalayika b’intore, urakurikize aya mategeko nta ho ubogamiye, ntuzagire icyo ukora ugambiriye kugira uwo ubera." 
1Timothy5:22 Ntuzagire ubwira bwo kuramburira ibiganza ku muntu ubonetse wese, hato utagira uruhare ku cyaha cy’undi. Nawe kandi ubwawe, urakomeze kuba umuziranenge." 
1Timothy5:23 Uzareke kunywa amazi yonyine, ahubwo uzajye unywa na ka divayi gakeya kubera igifu cyawe n’intege nke uhorana." 
1Timothy5:24 Hariho abantu ibyaha bihama na mbere y’uko babacira urubanza; ariko hariho n’abo bigaragaraho nyuma. 
1Timothy5:25 Ibikorwa byiza na byo ni uko, birigaragaza; ndetse n’ibitari byiza ntibishobora kuguma mu bwihisho." 
1Timothy6:1 Abari ku ngoyi y’ubucakara bose bagomba kumva ko ba shebuja bakwiye icyubahiro cyose, kugira ngo Izina ry’Imana n’inyigisho y’ukuri bitazatukwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Abafite ba shebuja b’abakristu, baririnde kubasuzugura bitwaje ko ari abavandimwe. Ahubwo bazabakorere neza kurushaho, kuko nyine iyo mirimo iba igenewe abayoboke n’abavandimwe batoneshejwe n’Imana. Ngibyo ibyo ugomba kwigisha no gushishikariza abandi." 
1Timothy6:3 Nihagira umuntu wigisha ukundi, ntiyite ku magambo aboneye y’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu no ku nyigisho itoza gusabanira Imana," 
1Timothy6:4 azaba ari umuntu wahumishijwe n’ubwirasi; aba ari injiji irwaye gukurura impaka no guterana amagambo. Aho ni ho hava ishyari, amakimbirane, gutukana, gukekana nabi," 
1Timothy6:5 n’impaka z’urudaca ziterwa n’abantu bararutse umutima, batakimenya ukuri, kandi bakibwira ko ubusabaniramana ari uburyo bwo kwishakira inyungu." 
1Timothy6:6 Yego nanone gusabanira Imana birimo inyungu nyinshi cyane, ariko ku muntu wishimiye ibyo afite." 
1Timothy6:7 Koko rero, nta kintu twazanye kuri iyi si, kandi ni na ko nta cyo dushobora kuzayimukanaho." 
1Timothy6:8 Igihe rero dufite ibyo kurya n’icyo kwambara, tujye dushimishwa n’ibyo." 
1Timothy6:9 Naho abararikiye kurunda ubukire, bagwa mu mutego w’ibishuko no mu byifuzo byinshi by’ubucucu n’ubugiranabi, bya bindi biroha abantu mu butindi no mu cyorezo." 
1Timothy6:10 Ni koko, umuzi w’ibibi byose ni irari ry’imari. Kubera ko bamwe bayohotseho, byatumye bitandukanya n’ukwemera, maze umutima wabo ushengurwa n’imibabaro itabarika." 
1Timothy6:11 Naho wowe, muntu w’Imana, ibyo bintu ubihe akato; ahubwo ujye uharanira ubutungane, ubusabaniramana, ukwemera, urukundo, ubwiyumanganye n’ubugwaneza." 
1Timothy6:12 Rwana intambara nyayo y’ukwemera, uronke ubugingo bw’iteka wahamagariwe, nk’uko wabyiyemeje igihe wahamyaga ukwemera kwawe ushize amanga, mu ruhame rwa benshi." 
1Timothy6:13 Mbigutegekeye imbere y’Imana ibeshaho byose, n’imbere ya Kristu Yezu wabaye umuhamya uhebuje w’Imana imbere ya Ponsiyo Pilato:" 
1Timothy6:14 wite ku mategeko, ukomeze kuba umuziranenge n’indakemwa kugeza ku munsi w’Ukwigaragaza kw’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
1Timothy6:15 Koko rero igihe cyagenywe nikigera, azagaragazwa n’Imana Nyir’ihirwe na Mugengabyose umwe rukumbi, Umwami w’abami, n’Umutegetsi w’abategetsi," 
1Timothy6:16 Yo yonyine yihariye ukudapfa, igahora ituye mu rumuri rudahangarwa, ntihagire umuntu n’umwe waba yarayibonye cyangwa ngo ashobore kuzayibona bibaho. Niharirwe icyubahiro n’ububasha ubuziraherezo! Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Abakire bo kuri iyi si, ubasabe ukomeje kutirata no kutiringira ubukungu buyoyoka, ahubwo bizere Imana, yo itugabira byose uko dushaka ngo tubitunge." 
1Timothy6:18 Nibajye bagenza neza, babe abakire ku bikorwa byiza, batange batitangiriye itama, bamenye gusangira n’abandi." 
1Timothy6:19 Bityo, bazaba bizigamiye ubwabo ubukungu nyabwo mu gihe kizaza, bazakesha kuronka ubugingo nyakuri." 
1Timothy6:20 Timote rero, wite ku byo waragijwe, wirinde abavuga amagambo y’amahomvu n’ubwigomeke ku Mana, bakabyutsa impaka zishingiye ku ngirwabuhanga." 
1Timothy6:21 Kubera ko ari bwo bashyize imbere, byatumye bamwe bitandukanya n’inzira y’ukwemera. Ineza y’Imana ihorane namwe!" 
2Timothy1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, intumwa ya Kristu Yezu ku bushake bw’Imana, kugira ngo namamaze isezerano ry’ubugingo duherwa muri Kristu Yezu," 
2Timothy1:2 kuri Timote umwana wanjye nkunda cyane: nkwifurije ineza n’imbabazi n’amahoro biva ku Mana Data, no kuri Kristu Yezu Umwami wacu." 
2Timothy1:3 Mpora nshimira Imana nkorera n’umutima ukeye, nk’uko abasokuruza banjye babigenjeje, kandi simpwema kuyambaza ijoro n’amanywa nkuzirikana." 
2Timothy1:4 Iyo nibutse amarira yawe, nifuza cyane kukubona, kugira ngo nezerwe." 
2Timothy1:5 Niyibutsa kandi ukwemera kuri muri wowe ku buryo butihishira, kwa kundi kwabanje kuba muri nyogokuru wawe Loyida, no muri nyoko Ewunika, nkaba ntashidikanya ko kuri no muri wowe ubwawe." 
2Timothy1:6 Ni cyo gituma ngusabye kwivugururamo ingabire Imana yagushyizemo igihe nkuramburiyeho ibiganza. 
2Timothy1:7 Koko rero, Imana ntiyaduhaye umutima wuje ubwoba, ahubwo yaduhaye umutima wuje imbaraga, urukundo no kwitsinda." 
2Timothy1:8 Ntuzagire rero isoni zo kubera umwami wacu umuhamya, cyangwa se ngo ugire isoni kubera jyewe ufunzwe ari We nzira, ahubwo ujye ufatanya nanjye kuruhira Inkuru Nziza, ushyigikiwe n’imbaraga z’Imana," 
2Timothy1:9 Yo yadukijije, ikanaduhamagarira kuba intungane, itabitewe n’ibikorwa byacu, ahubwo ibitewe n’umugambi wayo bwite, kimwe n’ineza yayo, ya yindi twaherewe muri Kristu Yezu mbere y’ibihe byose," 
2Timothy1:10 none ubu ngubu ikaba yarerekaniwe mu Ukwigaragaza k’Umukiza wacu Kristu Yezu watsinze urupfu, maze agatangaza ubugingo n’ukutazapfa abigirishije Inkuru Nziza," 
2Timothy1:11 ari na yo jyewe natorewe ngo mbe umwogeza, intumwa n’umwigisha wayo." 
2Timothy1:12 Ni na yo mpamvu ituma mbabara bene aka kageni; ariko nta soni binteye; koko rero nzi Uwo nemeye, kandi sinshidikanya ko ashoboye kurinda ibyo yanshinze kugeza kuri wa Munsi w’ukuza kwe." 
2Timothy1:13 Jya wigisha ukurikije amagambo aboneye wanyumvanye, urangwe n’ukwemera n’urukundo ufitiye Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy1:14 Komeza rero ibyiza waragijwe, Roho Mutagatifu utuye muri twe abigufashemo." 
2Timothy1:15 Nk’uko ubizi, abo muri Aziya bose barantaye, barimo Figelo na Herimogeni." 
2Timothy1:16 Nyagasani nagirire impuhwe urugo rwa Onesifori, kuko yanduhuriye kenshi, kandi ntaterwe isoni n’iminyururu nambaye;" 
2Timothy1:17 ahubwo akigera i Roma, yanshakashatse abishyizeho umwete, maze arambona." 
2Timothy1:18 Nyagasani namuhe kuzaronka imbabazi ku Mana kuri wa Munsi. Naho ibyerekeye akamaro yangiriye nkiri Efezi, nta wakurusha kubimenya." 
2Timothy2:1 Wowe rero, mwana wanjye, wikomezemo ingabire ukesha Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy2:2 Kandi ibyo wanyumvanye mu ruhame rwa benshi, nawe ubihererekanye mu bantu b’indahemuka, kandi bazashobora na bo kubyigisha abandi." 
2Timothy2:3 Emera ufatanye nanjye imibabaro, nk’uko bikwiriye umusirikare mwiza wa Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy2:4 Nta n’umwe mu bajya ku rugamba ukomeza kwizirika ku mirimo yari asanganywe, ngo abe agishimishije uwamuhuruje." 
2Timothy2:5 Kandi n’urushanwa ku kibuga cy’imikino wese, ntahabwa ikamba atabanje kurushanwa akurikije amategeko." 
2Timothy2:6 Umuhinzi wagotse ni we ukwiriye kubanza kuganura ku mbuto z’ibyo yahinze. 
2Timothy2:7 Ngira ngo urumva icyo nshaka kuvuga; n’ubundi kandi, Nyagasani ubwe azaguha kubyumva byose." 
2Timothy2:8 Ujye wibuka Yezu Kristu wazutse mu bapfuye, kandi uvuka mu bwoko bwa Dawudi, nk’uko Inkuru Nziza namamaza ibihamya." 
2Timothy2:9 Ni na yo mporwa, ngatotezwa, nkabohwa, boshye umugome. Nyamara ariko ijambo ry’Imana ntiribohwa!" 
2Timothy2:10 Ni cyo gituma nihanganira byose mbigirira abo Imana yatoye, kugira ngo na bo babone umukiro uba muri Kristu Yezu, babone n’ikuzo rizahoraho iteka." 
2Timothy2:11 Dore ijambo rikwiye kwizerwa: Nidupfana na We, tuzabaho hamwe na We;" 
2Timothy2:12 nituba intwari hamwe na We, tuzima ingoma hamwe na We; nitumwihakana, na We azatwihakana;" 
2Timothy2:13 nituramuka tubaye abahemu, We azaguma kuba indahemuka, kuko adashobora kwivuguruza." 
2Timothy2:14 Jya wibutsa abandi ibyo ngibyo, kandi urahirire imbere y’Imana ko ari ngombwa kwirinda kujya mu mpaka z’amahomvu, zidafite icyo zimaze, uretse gusa kuyobya abazumva." 
2Timothy2:15 Ihatire guhagarara imbere y’Imana nk’umuntu w’inararibonye, nk’umukozi mwiza udakwiye kugira ipfunwe, nk’umugabuzi udahemuka w’ijambo ry’ukuri." 
2Timothy2:16 Naho amagambo y’amahomvu n’ubwigomeke ku Mana ujye uyagendera kure, kuko bene kuyavuga bazakomeza kurorongotana mu nzira y’ubugomeramana," 
2Timothy2:17 maze ijambo ryabo rigende rimunga byose nk’igisebe cy’umufunzo. Muri bo navuga nka Himene na Fileto," 
2Timothy2:18 baciye ukubiri n’ukuri, bakiha kuvuga ko izuka ryarangije kubaho, bityo bagahubanganya ukwemera kwa benshi." 
2Timothy2:19 Nyamara ishingiro rihamye Imana yashyizeho riracyakomeye kandi rizahoraho, rikarangwa n’aya magambo aryanditsweho ngo «Imana izi abayo.» kandi ngo «Abambaza izina ry’Uhoraho bose nibitarure ikibi" 
2Timothy2:20 N’ubundi, mu nzu ngari ntihabamo gusa inkongoro zakozwe muri zahabu na feza, ahubwo habamo n’izakozwe mu biti no mu ibumba; zimwe zikagenerwa iby’icyubahiro, naho izindi bakazikoresha imirimo isuzuguritse." 
2Timothy2:21 Umuntu wese rero niyirinda gukora ibibi navuze, azaba nk’inkongoro yubahiritse, yatagatifujwe kandi y’ingirakamaro kuri Nyirayo, mbese ibereye imirimo myiza yose." 
2Timothy2:22 Irinde rero imigenzo mibi y’abasore, ahubwo uharanire ubutungane, ukwemera, urukundo, n’amahoro, wunge ubumwe n’abiyambaza Nyagasani barangwa n’umutima ukeye." 
2Timothy2:23 Naho ibibazo n’ubushakashatsi bitagira shinge na rugero, ubyitarure: uzi ko bibyara impaka z’ubusa." 
2Timothy2:24 Umugaragu wa Nyagasani rero ntakwiriye kuba umunyamahane, ahubwo akwiye kuba umugwaneza kuri bose, akamenya kwigisha no kwiyumanganya ibyago." 
2Timothy2:25 Iyo hagize abamugisha impaka, abahugurana imico myiza, kuko aba yizeye ko wenda Imana izabaha kwisubiraho, bakamenya ukuri," 
2Timothy2:26 bakongera gushyira mu gaciro bamaze kwigobotora mu mitego ya Sekibi wari warabagize imfungwa ze, akabakoresha icyo ashaka." 
2Timothy3:1 Umenye neza kandi ko mu minsi y’imperuka hazaza ibihe by’amakuba. 
2Timothy3:2 Koko hazagwira abantu bikunda ubwabo, n’abafite inyota nyinshi y’ibintu, n’abirasi, n’abikuza, n’abanyarubwa, n’ibyigomeke ku babyeyi, n’indashima, n’inkorashyano," 
2Timothy3:3 n’abagome, n’abazirampuhwe, n’abanyamazimwe, n’abatihanganira abandi, n’indakoreka, n’abanzi b’ibyiza," 
2Timothy3:4 n’abagambanyi, n’ibishihanyi, n’abahumwe amaso n’ubwirasi, n’abakunda ibyishimo by’umubiri aho gukunda Imana," 
2Timothy3:5 n’abiha isura y’ubusabaniramana, ariko mu by’ukuri bahakana ishingiro ryabwo. N’abo ngabo rero urabirinde." 
2Timothy3:6 Ndetse n’ubu, bene abo babarimo; navuga nk’abacengera mu ngo, bagashuka abagore b’abapfayongo baheranywe n’ibyaha, bagatwarwa n’ingeso mbi zose," 
2Timothy3:7 maze n’ubwo bahora baharanira kwigishwa, ugasanga badashobora na busa kumenya ukuri." 
2Timothy3:8 Nk’uko kera Yanesi na Yambure barwanije Musa, ni na ko abo ngabo barwanya ukuri, kuko ari abantu bafite umutima ucuramye, ntibagire ukwemera guhamye." 
2Timothy3:9 Ariko ntibazashobora kubikomeza, kuko amaherezo ubusazi bwabo buzatahurwa na bose, nk’uko ubwa bariya bombi bwagaragaye." 
2Timothy3:10 Naho wowe, wakomeje kunkurikira muri byose: mu nyigisho zanjye, mu migenzereze yanjye, mu migambi yanjye, mu kwemera kwanjye, mu kwihangana kwanjye, mu rukundo n’ubudacogora byanjye," 
2Timothy3:11 mu bitotezo n’ibyago naboneye Antiyokiya, n’Ikoniyo n’i Lisitiri. Mbega ibitotezo nabonye! Ariko byose Nyagasani yabinkuyemo." 
2Timothy3:12 Ni koko, abashaka bose kubaho muri Kristu barangwa n’ubuyoboke, ntibazabura gutotezwa." 
2Timothy3:13 Naho abagiranabi n’abahendanyi, bo ntibazabura kugenda barushaho gukora nabi ubudahwema bataretse guhenda abandi no guhendwa ubwabo." 
2Timothy3:14 Ariko wowe, gumya kwibanda ku byo wigishijwe kandi wakiriye udashidikanya. Uzi neza uwo ubikomoraho;" 
2Timothy3:15 kandi kuva mu buto bwawe wamenye Ibyanditswe Bitagatifu; ni byo bishobora kukubera isoko y’ubuhanga bukuganisha ku mukiro ubikesheje kwemera Kristu Yezu. 
2Timothy3:16 Icyitwa Igitabo gitagatifu cyose cyahumekewemo n’Imana kandi gifite akamaro mu byerekeye kwigisha, no kuvuguruza ubuyobe, gukosora no gutoza umuntu iby’ubutungane;" 
2Timothy3:17 bityo umuntu w’Imana wese akabasha kuba igihame kandi akabona intwaro zimufasha gukora icyiza cyose. 
2Timothy4:1 Nkurahirije imbere y’Imana n’imbere ya Kristu Yezu uzacira imanza abazima n’abapfuye, ku mpamvu y’ukwigaragaza kwe n’Ubwami bwe:" 
2Timothy4:2 amamaza ijambo, uryigishe igihe n’imburagihe, wumvishe ingingo, utote, ushishikaze, mu bwihangane butarambirwa, uharanira kujijura." 
2Timothy4:3 Kuko hazaza igihe abantu batazihanganira inyigisho ziboneye, ahubwo bakurikije irari ryabo, n’ubukirigitwa bw’amatwi yabo, bakazikoranyirizaho umukumbi w’abigisha," 
2Timothy4:4 maze ukuri bakakwima amatwi yabo, ngo bahugukire ibitagira shinge." 
2Timothy4:5 Wowe rero urabe maso muri byose, wiyumanganye ibitotezo, ushishikarire kogeza Inkuru Nziza, urangize neza ubutumwa bwawe." 
2Timothy4:6 Naho jyewe, dore maze kumera nk’igitambo giseswa, n’amagingo y’ukwigendera kwanjye aregereje." 
2Timothy4:7 Urugamba rwiza narurwanye inkundura, intera nagombaga kwiruka narayirangije, ukwemera nagukomeyeho." 
2Timothy4:8 None dore ikamba rigenewe intungane rirantegereje, iryo Nyagasani umucamanza utabera azangororera kuri wa Munsi we, ariko atari jyewe jyenyine, ahubwo n’abandi bose bazaba barakunze Ukwigaragaza kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Banguka uze kundeba bidatinze," 
2Timothy4:10 kuko Demasi yantaye, abitewe no gukunda iyi isi: yigiriye i Tesaloniki; Kirisensi na we yagiye mu Bugalati, Tito ajya muri Dalimatiya," 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ni we wenyine tukiri kumwe. Shaka Mariko, muzazane, kuko amfitiye akamaro cyane mu byo kumfasha;" 
2Timothy4:12 Tushiko, namwohereje Efezi." 
2Timothy4:13 Nuza, uzanzanire umwitero wanjye nasize i Torowadi kwa Karupo; uzanzanire n’ibitabo byanjye, cyane cyane iby’impu." 
2Timothy4:14 Alegisanderi w’umucuzi yangiriye nabi cyane; Nyagasani azamwitura ibihwanye n’ibikorwa bye. 
2Timothy4:15 Nawe umwirinde, kuko arwanya bikomeye ibyo twigisha." 
2Timothy4:16 Ubwo najyaga mu rukiko bwa mbere kugira ngo niregure, nta n’umwe wanshyigikiye; bose barantereranye. Ntibazabihorwe!" 
2Timothy4:17 Naho Nyagasani we yambaye hafi, maze antera imbaraga kugira ngo mbashe kuhamamariza ubutumwa nshize amanga, kandi ngo abanyamahanga bose babwumve. Nuko nkizwa urwasaya rw’intare." 
2Timothy4:18 Nyagasani azansimbukisha ikintu cyose kigamije kungirira nabi, maze ankize anjyana mu Ngoma ye y’ijuru. Naharirwe ikuzo uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka! Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Utashye Purisika na Akwila, n’urugo rwa Onesifori." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasito yasigaye i Korinti; naho Tirofimo namusize i Mileto arwaye. 
2Timothy4:21 Wihutire kuza mbere y’itumba. Ewubuli aragutashya, na Pudensi, na Lini, na Kalawudiya, n’abavandimwe bose." 
2Timothy4:22 Nyagasani nabane nawe. Ineza ye nihorane namwe! 
Titus1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, umugaragu w’Imana n’intumwa ya Yezu Kristu igenewe kugeza intore z’Imana ku kwemera no ku bumenyi bw’ukuri guhuje n’ubusabaniramana," 
Titus1:2 mu bwizere bwo kuzabona ubugingo buhoraho, ubwo Imana itabasha kubeshya yasezeranye mbere y’ibihe bya kera na kare," 
Titus1:3 maze amagingo yagennye yagera ikamenyekanya ijambo ryayo ibigirishije iyamamazabutumwa nashinzwe ku bushake bw’Imana Umukiza wacu: 
Titus1:4 kuri Tito, umwana wanjye nyakuri nabyaye mu byerekeye ukwemera duhuriyeho, nkwifurije ineza n’amahoro biva ku Mana Data no kuri Kristu Yezu Umukiza wacu." 
Titus1:5 Nagusize i Kireta ari ukugira ngo utunganye ibyo nasize bituzuye, kandi ngo ushyireho abakuru b’ikoraniro mu migi yose ukurikije amabwiriza naguhaye." 
Titus1:6 Buri wese uhawe ubwo bukuru agomba kuba ari indakemwa, yarashyingiwe rimwe risa, afite abana bemera batavugwaho ubwomanzi cyangwa kuba intumvira." 
Titus1:7 Koko rero, umwepiskopi, kubera ko ari umugabuzi w’ibintu by’Imana, agomba kuba indakemwa, ntabe umwirasi n’umunyamwaga, ntabe umunywi n’indwanyi, ntabe n’umuntu ukurikiranye inyungu itanyuze mu mucyo," 
Titus1:8 ahubwo akamenya kwakira abamugana, agakunda ibiboneye, akitonda, akaba intabera n’umuyoboke ku Mana, akamenya kwitsinda," 
Titus1:9 kandi akihatira gutanga inyigisho zitagoragora, zihuje n’idini, kugira ngo abone uko ashishikariza abandi inyigisho ziboneye, n’uko kandi amwaza abamugisha impaka." 
Titus1:10 Koko rero hariho benshi b’ibyigomeke, n’abavuga ibitagira shinge, n’abashukanyi, cyane cyane mu bagenywe." 
Titus1:11 Abo ngabo ni ngombwa kubaziba akanwa, kuko bahubanganya ingo nyinshi, igihe baba bigisha ibidakwiye kugira ngo bibonere inyungu mbi." 
Titus1:12 Umwe muri bo, umuhanuzi wabo bwite, yaravuze ati «Abanyakireta! Ni abanyabinyoma iteka, ni inyamaswa mbi, ni abanyenda mbi b’abanebwe.»" 
Titus1:13 Icyo cyemezo gihuje n’ukuri. Kubera ibyo rero, ujye ubacyaha cyane, kugira ngo bagumane ukwemera nyako," 
Titus1:14 boye kwita ku migani y’amahomvu y’Abayahudi, no ku mategeko y’abantu bihunza ukuri." 
Titus1:15 Ikintu cyose kiba cyiza ku bere. Naho ku bandavuye kandi badafite ukwemera, nta na kimwe kiba cyiza; ahubwo ubwenge n’umutimanama byabo byarandavuye." 
Titus1:16 Biratana ko bazi Imana, nyamara bakayihakana mu migirire yabo. Bateye isesemi, bakaba ibyigomeke; no ku cyitwa igikorwa cyiza cyose, nta cyo bamaze." 
Titus2:1 Wowe rero, jya uvuga ibikwiranye n’inyigisho ziboneye." 
Titus2:2 Abasaza nibajye birinda isindwe, biyubahe, bashyire mu gaciro, bakomere mu kwemera, mu rukundo, n’ubudacogora." 
Titus2:3 N’abakecuru ni uko, na bo bagomba kwifata nk’uko bikwiriye abatagatifujwe: nibirinde amazimwe no gutwarwa n’akayoga, ahubwo bajye batoza abandi ingeso nziza;" 
Titus2:4 bityo bigishe abagore bakiri bato gukunda abagabo babo n’abana babo," 
Titus2:5 banabatoze kwitonda, kwirinda ingeso mbi, kwita ku by’ingo zabo, kugwa neza, no kumvira abagabo babo, kugira ngo ijambo ry’Imana bataritukisha." 
Titus2:6 Jya ushishikaza n’abasore ngo bashyire mu gaciro. 
Titus2:7 Nawe ubwawe kandi jya ubabera urugero rwiza mu byo ukora byose: haba mu nyigisho ziboneye, haba se mu kwiyubaha," 
Titus2:8 cyangwa mu magambo aboneye kandi adahinyuka; bityo umubisha azabure ikibi yatuvugaho, maze amware." 
Titus2:9 Wigishe n’abacakara kumvira ba shebuja no kubashimisha muri byose, batabagisha impaka," 
Titus2:10 birinde kwiba, ahubwo bahore barangwa n’ubudahemuka budakemangwa; bityo bazubahisha muri byose inyigisho z’Imana Umukiza wacu." 
Titus2:11 Koko rero ineza y’Imana, soko y’umukiro ku bantu bose, yarigaragaje," 
Titus2:12 itwigisha kureka kugomera Imana no gutwarwa n’irari ry’iby’iyi si, kugira ngo guhera ubu ngubu tubeho turangwa n’ubwitonzi, ubutungane, n’ubusabaniramana," 
Titus2:13 mu gihe tugitegereje ya mizero mahire hamwe n’Ukwigaragaza kwa Yezu Kristu yisesuyeho ikuzo, We Mana yacu y’igihangange, akaba n’Umukiza wacu," 
Titus2:14 witanze kubera twebwe, kugira ngo aturokore ubugome bwose kandi yuhagire umuryango ugenewe kuba ubukonde bwe no kugira ishyaka ryo gukora icyiza cyose." 
Titus2:15 Ujye uvuga ibyo ngibyo, ubibashishikarize, ndetse ubacyahe ubigiranye igitsure cy’umutware. Ntihakagire ugusuzugura." 
Titus3:1 Jya wibutsa bose ko bagomba kuyoboka abatware n’abategetsi, bakabumvira, bagahora bakereye gukora umurimo mwiza wose," 
Titus3:2 ntibagire uwo batuka, bakirinda kurwana, bakaba abantu bagira neza, bakagaragariza abandi bose ubugwaneza budakemwa." 
Titus3:3 Koko rero natwe kera twari ibicucu, n’intumvira, n’ibirara; twari twaratwawe n’irari ry’ibibi bitagira ingano, tukibera mu bugizi bwa nabi n’ishyari, dufite n’icyangiro, kandi natwe ubwacu tuzirana." 
Titus3:4 Ariko igihe higaragaje ubuntu bw’Imana Umukiza wacu n’urukundo ifitiye abantu," 
Titus3:5 yaradukijije, itabitewe n’ibyiza twaba twarakoze, ahubwo ibitewe n’impuhwe igira, idukirisha icyuhagiro dukesha kuvuka bwa kabiri no guhinduka abantu bashya muri Roho Mutagatifu." 
Titus3:6 Kandi uwo Roho, yamudusakajemo ku bwa Yezu Kristu Umukiza wacu," 
Titus3:7 kugira ngo tube intungane, kandi twiringire kuzahabwa umurage w’ubugingo bw’iteka, tubikesha ubuntu bwayo." 
Titus3:8 Iryo jambo rikwiye kwizerwa, kandi ndashaka ko kuri izo ngingo wajya uvuga wihanukiriye, kugira ngo abemeye Imana barushanwe kugira umwete wo kugenza neza. Ibyo ni byo byiza bifitiye abantu akamaro." 
Titus3:9 Naho ibibazo bidafite ishingiro, n’ibyerekeye amasekuruza, intonganya n’impaka za ngo turwane zerekeye Amategeko, jya ubigendera kure, kuko ari nta cyo bimaze kandi bikaba iby’ubusa." 
Titus3:10 Nihagira umuntu uca ukubiri n’ukwemera, maze wamuburira ubwa mbere n’ubwa kabiri ntiyumve, uzatane na we;" 
Titus3:11 uzi yuko bene uwo muntu aba yarataye inzira, akaba n’umunyabyaha wicira ubwe urubanza rubi." 
Titus3:12 Ninkoherereza Aritemasi na Tushiko, uzihutire kunsanga i Nikopoli, kuko ari ho nageneye kuzamara itumba." 
Titus3:13 Ugire umwete wo gutegura urugendo rwa Zenasi, impuguke mu by’amategeko, n’urwa Apolo, kugira ngo batazagira icyo babura." 
Titus3:14 Kandi n’abacu bitoze kurushanwa kugira umwete wo kugenza neza, bakenure ababikwiriye, kugira ngo batabura icyo bamarira abandi." 
Titus3:15 Abo turi kumwe bose baragutashya. Nawe utashye abadukunda dusangiye ukwemera. Ineza y’Imana ihorane namwe mwese. 
Philemon1:1 Jyewe Pawulo, infungwa kubera Kristu Yezu, n’umuvandimwe Timote, kuri Filemoni umufasha wacu dukunda, no kuri Afiya mushiki wacu," 
Philemon1:2 no kuri Arikipo twatabaranye ku rugamba, no kuri Kiliziya iteranira mu nzu yawe:" 
Philemon1:3 tubifurije ineza n’amahoro bituruka ku Mana Umubyeyi wacu no kuri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Mpora nkwibuka mu masengesho, ngashimira Imana yanjye," 
Philemon1:5 kuko numva barata urukundo n’ukwemera ufitiye Nyagasani Yezu n’abatagatifujwe bose. 
Philemon1:6 Ndagusabira kugira ngo uko kwemera kube gushingiye ku bikorwa, maze ugaragarize mu ruhame ibyiza byose twashobora kugirira Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 Koko, muvandimwe, nagize ibyishimo bikomeye, kandi ndahozwa ku mpamvu y’urukundo rwawe, numvise ukuntu wahumurije imitima y’abatagatifujwe." 
Philemon1:8 Kubera ibyo, n’ubwo mfite uburenganzira bwose muri Kristu bwo kugutegeka ibyo ugomba gukora," 
Philemon1:9 mpisemo kwiyambaza urukundo, jyewe Pawulo w’umusaza, nkubitiyeho no kuba ndi infungwa kubera Yezu Kristu ubu ngubu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndagutakambira kubera umwana wanjye nabyariye mu buroko, Onezimi uwo nguwo," 
Philemon1:11 wakubereye imburamumaro, ariko noneho azatubera twembi ingirakamaro." 
Philemon1:12 Ubu ndamukugaruriye, we nkoramutima yanjye." 
Philemon1:13 Nashakaga kumugumana hafi yanjye, kugira ngo ajye amfasha mu kigwi cyawe, muri ubu buroko nafungiwemo mporwa Inkuru Nziza." 
Philemon1:14 Ariko nta cyo nashatse gukora utabyemeye, kugira ngo icyo gikorwa cyiza kitakubera agahato, ahubwo gituruke ku bwende bwawe." 
Philemon1:15 Kandi wenda wamubuze igihe gito none arakugarukiye, kugira ngo uzamuhorane iteka." 
Philemon1:16 Uzasanga atakiri umucakara, ahubwo atambutse umucakara, usange ari umuvandimwe wawe ukunda: jyeweho ni ko amereye rwose, nawe ni ko azakumerera ndetse arusheho, ari mu maso y’abantu, ari no mu maso ya Nyagasani." 
Philemon1:17 Niba rero wemera ko ndi incuti yawe, uramwakire nk’uko wanyakira." 
Philemon1:18 Kandi niba hari icyawe yatwaye cyangwa akaba akurimo umwenda, uzabimbaze." 
Philemon1:19 Jyewe Pawulo ndabyiyandikiye ubwanjye: nzabyishyura... siniriwe mvuga ko nawe undimo umwenda, kandi uwo mwenda ni wowe ubwawe." 
Philemon1:20 Ngaho, muvandimwe, ungirire ubwo buntu muri Nyagasani, ushimishe umutima wanjye muri Kristu!" 
Philemon1:21 Nkwandikiye niringiye rwose ko uzanyumva; ndetse nzi neza ko uzakora ibitambutse ibyo ngusabye. 
Philemon1:22 Byongeye kandi, untegurire n’icumbi, kuko nizeye ko bazandekura nkabagarukira mbikesheje amasengesho yanyu." 
Philemon1:23 Aragutashya Epafurasi dufunganywe kubera Kristu Yezu. 
Philemon1:24 Na Mariko aragutashya, na Arisitariko, na Demasi, na Luka, abafasha banjye." 
Philemon1:25 Nimuhorane ineza ya Nyagasani Yezu Kristu! 
Hebrews1:1 Imana imaze kubwira abasokuruza bacu kenshi no ku buryo bwinshi, ikoresheje abahanuzi," 
Hebrews1:2 natwe muri iyi minsi turimo, ari na yo y’imperuka, yatubwirishije Umwana wayo, ari We yageneye kwegurirwa byose, akaba ari na We yabiremesheje byose iyo biva bikagera." 
Hebrews1:3 Mwana uwo, ni We buranga bw’ikuzo ry’Imana n’ishusho rya kamere yayo, ni na We kandi uhagaritse byose ku bubasha bw’ijambo rye. Amaze rero kuhagira abantu ibyaha byabo, yicaye iburyo bwa Nyirikuzo mu ijuru." 
Hebrews1:4 Asumba atyo abamalayika kuko n’izina yahawe ritambutse kure ayabo. 
Hebrews1:5 Koko rero, ni nde wo mu bamalayika Imana yigeze ibwira iti «Uri Umwana wanjye; ni Jye wakwibyariye uyu munsi»? Cyangwa se iti, «Nzamubera umubyeyi, na we ambere umwana»?" 
Hebrews1:6 Kandi igihe yohereje imfura yayo ku isi, yaravuze iti «Abamalayika bose b’Imana bazamupfukamire.»" 
Hebrews1:7 Abamalayika bo, ibavugaho iti «Abamalayika bayo yabagize nk’imiyaga, maze abagaragu bayo ibagira nk’imirabyo.»" 
Hebrews1:8 Naho Umwana wayo iramubwira iti «Mana, intebe yawe y’ubwami ihoraho iteka; umuryango wawe, uwuyoborana ubutabera." 
Hebrews1:9 Ukunda ibiboneye ukazirana n’ubukozi bw’ibibi. Ni yo mpamvu Imana, Imana yawe, yishimiye kugusiga amavuta y’ubutore, ikurobanuye muri bagenzi bawe.»" 
Hebrews1:10 Irongera iti «Nyagasani, ni wowe wahanze isi kuva mu ntangiriro, n’ijuru rikaba igikorwa cy’ibiganza byawe." 
Hebrews1:11 Ibyo byose bizayoyoka, ariko wowe uhoraho iteka. Isi n’ijuru bizashira ak’imyenda ishaje," 
Hebrews1:12 uzabizingazinga nk’igishura, maze bizasimburwe nk’uko umwenda ukura undi. Naho wowe uhora uri wa wundi, n’imibereho yawe ntigira iherezo»." 
Hebrews1:13 Ni nde wo mu bamalayika bayo Imana yigeze ibwira iti «Icara iburyo bwanjye, kugeza ko abanzi bawe mbahinduramo akabaho ushyira mu nsi y’ibirenge byawe»." 
Hebrews1:14 Abamalayika rero bagenewe iki? Si ibiremwa se bigaragira Imana kandi yohereza gufasha abazahabwa umurage w’uburokorwe? 
Hebrews2:1 Ni yo mpamvu tugomba guhugukira cyane ibyo twumvise, niba tudashaka kugenda tuyobagurika." 
Hebrews2:2 Tuzirikane ukuntu ijambo ryavuzwe kera n’abamalayika ryabaye impamo, n’ukuntu abarirenzeho bakarisuzugura bikururiye igihano kibakwiye." 
Hebrews2:3 Twebwe rero twazarokoka dute niba turangaranye umukiro wa bene ako kageni, wabanje kwamamazwa na Nyagasani ubwe, nyuma natwe abawumvise tukawuhamya," 
Hebrews2:4 kandi Imana ubwayo iwukomeresha ibimenyetso, ibitangaza n’ibikorwa by’impangare by’amoko yose, n’ingabire Roho Mutagatifu atanga nk’uko abishaka." 
Hebrews2:5 Abamalayika si bo bahawe kugenga isi izaza tuvuga. Umwanditsi wa zaburi abihamya agira ati 
Hebrews2:6 «Umuntu ni iki kugira ngo wirirwe umwibuka? Mwene Muntu ni iki kugira ngo wirirwe umwitaho? 
Hebrews2:7 Wamucishije bugufi y’abamalayika ho gato; umutamiriza ikamba ry’ikuzo n’icyubahiro; 
Hebrews2:8 ibintu byose ubishyira mu nsi ye.» Ubwo byose yamuhaye kubigenga, nta kintu na kimwe rero kitamweguriwe. Icyakora kuri ubu ntibiragaragara ko byose byamuyobotse," 
Hebrews2:9 nyamara dore icyo tubona: Yezu uwo, wagizwe muto ku bamalayika mu gihe kigufi, ubu kubera ko yababaye agapfa, tumubona atamirije ikamba ry’ikuzo n’icyubahiro. Bityo, ku bw’ineza y’Imana, urupfu yigabije rwagiriye buri muntu akamaro." 
Hebrews2:10 Mu by’ukuri, byari bikwiye ko Imana, Yo irema byose ikabibeshaho, igira ikirenga Umwana wayo — ari we uburokorwe bwose buturukaho —, imunyujije mu bubabare, ngo ibonereho kwigarurira abana batabarika basangira ikuzo ryayo." 
Hebrews2:11 Koko rero utagatifuza n’abatagatifujwe basangiye inkomoko, bigatuma adashidikanya kubita abavandimwe," 
Hebrews2:12 avuga ati «Nzogeza izina ryawe mu bavandimwe banjye; nzagusingirize rwagati mu ikoraniro.» 
Hebrews2:13 Akongera ati «Ni we nzashyiramo amizero yanjye.» Kandi ati «Dore ndi hano, jyewe n’abana Imana yampaye.»" 
Hebrews2:14 None rero, ubwo abana bafitanye ubumwe bw’amaraso n’umubiri, Yezu na We yasangiye na bo ubwo bumwe kugira ngo mu rupfu rwe atsiratsize umugenga warwo, ari we Sekibi," 
Hebrews2:15 maze abohore abatinyaga urupfu rubahoza mu bucakara igihe cy’ubuzima bwabo bwose. 
Hebrews2:16 Koko ntiyaje atabaye abamalayika, ahubwo yaje atabaye inkomoko y'Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Kubera iyo mpamvu yagombaga kwishushanya n’abavandimwe be muri byose, akaba Umuherezagitambo Mukuru w’umunyampuhwe, kandi wishyikira ku Mana ngo ahanagure ibyaha by’imbaga." 
Hebrews2:18 Ubwo We yababaye kandi akageragezwa, ashobora no gutabara abageragezwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Nuko rero, bavandimwe mwatagatifujwe mukaba musangiye ubutorwe bw’ijuru, nimuhugukire Uwo twohererejweho Umuherezagitambo Mukuru ari na We ukwemera kwacu gushingiyeho." 
Hebrews3:2 Yabereye indahemuka Uwamushinze inzu ye yose, nk’uko byabaye kuri Musa." 
Hebrews3:3 Mu by’ukuri ikuzo rye risumbye kure irya Musa, mu rugero rw’uko uwubatse inzu arusha icyubahiro iyo nzu yubatse." 
Hebrews3:4 Buri nzu yose igira umwubatsi, ariko umwubatsi wa byose ni Imana." 
Hebrews3:5 Musa yashinzwe inzu yayo yose, ari umugaragu wo guhamya ibyo Imana yari igiye kuvuga." 
Hebrews3:6 Naho Kristu We yashinzwe inzu yayo, ari Umwana bwite. Iyo nzu yayo ni twebwe, niba twikomejemo ubwiringire buhamye, kandi tugaterwa ishema n’ukwizera dufite." 
Hebrews3:7 Ni nk’uko Roho Mutagatifu abihamya, ati «Uyu munsi, nimwumva ijwi rye," 
Hebrews3:8 ntimunangire imitima yanyu nk’igihe cy’amananiza, nk’uko byabaye ku munsi w’igeragezwa, mu butayu;" 
Hebrews3:9 aho abasekuruza banyu bangeragereje, bashaka kunyinja, n’ubwo bari barabonye ibikorwa byanjye, mu myaka mirongo ine." 
Hebrews3:10 Ni cyo cyatumye ndakarira iyo nyoko, maze ndavuga nti ’Iteka ryose umutima wabo urararuka; ntibamenye inzira zanjye!’" 
Hebrews3:11 None narahije uburakari bwanjye ko batazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye!» 
Hebrews3:12 Muramenye rero, bavandimwe, ntihakabe n’umwe muri mwe wigiramo umutima mubi, ngo yitandukanye n’Imana Nzima abitewe no kubura ukwemera." 
Hebrews3:13 Ahubwo buri munsi nimuterane inkunga, igihe cyose hakiri «Uyu munsi» Ibyanditswe bivuga, maze ntihagire n’umwe muri mwe unangira umutima, ayobejwe n’icyaha." 
Hebrews3:14 Twabaye koko umwe na Kristu, niba ariko dukomeje kudahinyuka ku mimerere yacu yo mu ntangiriro," 
Hebrews3:15 nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Uyu munsi, nimwumva ijwi rye, ntimunangire imitima yanyu nk’igihe cy’amananiza.»" 
Hebrews3:16 Ni bande se koko «bumvise» maze bagatera «amananiza»? Si abimutse mu Misiri bose, bayobowe na Musa?" 
Hebrews3:17 Kandi ni bande yarakariye «imyaka mirongo ine» yose? Si abaguye mu cyaha, imirambo yabo ikararikwa mu butayu?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ni bande kandi «yarahiriye ko batazinjira mu buruhukiro bwe», atari izo ntumvira nyine?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kandi tuzi ko batabwinjiyemo, ku mpamvu y’ukutemera kwabo." 
Hebrews4:1 Bityo rero, ubwo isezerano ryo kwinjira mu buruhukiro bwayo rikiri ryose, turamenye ntihazagire uwibwira ko we arihejweho." 
Hebrews4:2 Kuko natwe twashyikirijwe iyo nkuru nziza kimwe na bo, ariko ijambo bumvise ryabapfiriye ubusa, kuko bataryakiranye ukwemera." 
Hebrews4:3 Naho twebwe abemeye tuzinjira koko muri ubwo buruhukiro, ari bwo Imana yabatangarijeho iti «Narahije uburakari bwanjye ko batazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye!» Nta we ushidikanya ko Imana yujuje ibikorwa byayo byose kuva isi ikiremwa," 
Hebrews4:4 nk’uko hari aho bavuga iby’umunsi wa karindwi, ngo «Nuko kuri uwo munsi wa karindwi Imana iruhuka umurimo yari imaze gukora.»" 
Hebrews4:5 Hanyuma kandi nk’uko bimaze kuvugwa ngo «Ntibazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye.» 
Hebrews4:6 Ubwo rero hakiri abagenewe kubwinjiramo, kandi abumvise bwa mbere iyo Nkuru Nziza batabwinjiyemo ku mpamvu y’ukutemera kwabo," 
Hebrews4:7 Imana yongeye gushyiraho undi munsi mushya, uwa none, ibisobanurisha Dawudi, hashize igihe kirekire, muri aya magambo, iti «Uyu munsi, nimwumva ijwi rye, ntimunangire imitima yanyu.»" 
Hebrews4:8 Kandi koko, iyo Yozuwe aza kuba ari we wabagejeje mu buruhukiro, Imana ntiba yaravuze iby’umunsi wundi." 
Hebrews4:9 Hakaba rero hari ikindi kiruhuko cy’umunsi wa karindwi kizigamiwe umuryango w’Imana. 
Hebrews4:10 Kuko uwinjiye muri icyo kiruhuko, na we aruhuka imirimo ye, nk’uko Imana yaruhutse iyayo." 
Hebrews4:11 Nitwihutire rero kwinjira muri icyo kiruhuko, ngo hato urugero rw’ukutemera kwacu rutagira uwo rugusha." 
Hebrews4:12 Koko Ijambo ry’Imana ni irinyabuzima, ni irinyabushobozi, kandi riratyaye kurusha inkota y’amugi abiri. Riracengera kugeza aho umutima n’ubwenge bitandukanira, hagati y’ingingo n’imisokoro; rigasobanura ibyifuzo n’ibitekerezo byihishe muri muntu." 
Hebrews4:13 Nta kiremwa na kimwe kiribera intaboneka, ahubwo byose biratamuruye kandi biritaragaje mu maso y’Uwo tuzagomba kumurikira ibyacu." 
Hebrews4:14 Ubwo dufite Umuherezagitambo mukuru uhebuje, watashye mu ijuru, Yezu, Umwana w’Imana, nitwikomezemo ukwemera." 
Hebrews4:15 Koko rero ntidufite Umuherezagitambo mukuru wananirwa kudutabara mu ntege nke zacu; yageragejwe muri byose, ku buryo bumwe natwe, ariko ntiyatsindwa n’icyaha." 
Hebrews4:16 Nitwegerane rero ubwizere intebe ya Nyirineza, kugira ngo tugirirwe impuhwe, kandi duhabwe imbaraga zizadufasha igihe kigeze." 
Hebrews5:1 Umuherezabitambo mukuru wese atorwa mu bantu kandi agashyirirwaho gufasha abantu mu mubano wabo n’Imana; ashinzwe guhereza amaturo n’ibitambo bihongerera ibyaha. 
Hebrews5:2 Ubwo na we ari umunyantege nke muri byinshi, ashobora kumva abatarasobanukirwa, bagihuzagurika;" 
Hebrews5:3 kandi nk’uko atambirira ibyaha by’imbaga, na we aboneraho guhongerera ibye bwite." 
Hebrews5:4 Nta wiha ubwe bwite icyo cyubahiro, ahubwo gihabwa uwo Imana ibihamagariye, kimwe na Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Mbese nk’uko Kristu atihaye ubwe iryo kuzo ryo kuba Umuherezagitambo mukuru, ahubwo akaba yararihawe n’Uwamubwiye ati «Uri umwana wanjye, ni jye wakwibyariye uyu munsi»;" 
Hebrews5:6 kimwe n’uko avuga ahandi ati «Uri umuherezagitambo iteka ryose, wo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki.»" 
Hebrews5:7 Mu gihe cy’imibereho ye yo ku isi, ni We wasengaga atakamba mu miborogo n’amarira, abitura Uwashoboraga kumurokora urupfu, maze arumvirwa kuko yagororokeye Imana." 
Hebrews5:8 Nubwo yari Mwana bwose, ibyo yababaye byamwigishije kumvira;" 
Hebrews5:9 maze aho amariye kuba intagereranywa, abamwumvira bose abaviramo isoko y’ubucungurwe bw’iteka." 
Hebrews5:10 Imana yamugize Umuherezagitambo mukuru wo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Turacyafite byinshi byo kubabwira kuri izo ngingo, ariko biraruhije kubibasobanurira kuko muri abantu batumva vuba." 
Hebrews5:12 Mwagombye kuba mwarabaye abahanga kuva kera, nyamara muracyakeneye ko babigisha ingingo z’ibanze z’amagambo y’Imana. Muracyakeneye gutungwa n’amata mu mwanya w’ibiryo bikomeye." 
Hebrews5:13 Unywa amata gusa aba akiri umwana, ntashobore kugira igitekerezo gihamye ku byaba bitunganye." 
Hebrews5:14 Abaciye akenge bo, batungwa n’ibiryo bikomeye, kuko bafite akamenyero ko gusobanura mu bitekerezo byabo icyiza n’ikibi." 
Hebrews6:1 Nuko rero, tube turetse inyigisho z’ibanze zerekeye Kristu, maze tujye mu byisumbuye bikwiriye abakuze. Ntitugaruka ku mahame y’ishingiro ariyo y’aya: gutandukana n’ibikorwa bikurura urupfu, kwemera Imana," 
Hebrews6:2 inyigisho zerekeye za batisimu, kuramburirwaho ibiganza, izuka ry’abapfuye, n’urubanza rw’iteka." 
Hebrews6:3 Ndetse ni uko tugiye kubigenza, niba Imana ibitwemereye." 
Hebrews6:4 Abigeze gushyikirizwa urumuri, bagasogongera ku ngabire z’Imana, bagahabwa Roho Mutagatifu," 
Hebrews6:5 bakaryoherwa n’Ijambo ryiza ry’Imana, bakibonera ububasha bw’igihe kizaza, bazamera bate niba bararenze kuri ibyo bakagwa?" 
Hebrews6:6 Ntibishoboka ko bivugurura bundi bushya bicuza, kandi ku bwabo bakomeza kubamba ku musaraba Umwana w’Imana bamusuzuguza ku mugaragaro." 
Hebrews6:7 Iyo ubutaka bunywa amazi abugwaho maze bukabyarira ababuhinga imbuto z’ingirakamaro, buba buhawe umugisha w’Imana." 
Hebrews6:8 Naho iyo bumezeho amahwa n’ibitovu, buba butaye agaciro, bukwiye kuvumwa, amaherezo bukagabizwa umuriro." 
Hebrews6:9 Mwebweho rero, nkoramutima, nubwo tumaze kuvuga dutyo, ntidushidikanya ko muri mu nzira nziza, ari yo y’uburokorwe." 
Hebrews6:10 Imana rwose ntirenganya, ntishobora kwibagirwa umwete wanyu n’urukundo mwagaragarije izina ryayo, mufasha abatagatifujwe nk’uko n’ubu mukibikomeje." 
Hebrews6:11 Cyakora, icyo twifuza ni uko buri wese yakomeza iryo shyaka rizamugeza ku ndunduro y’ibyo yizeye." 
Hebrews6:12 Bityo rero, umurego wanyu ntugacogore, ahubwo mukurikize urugero rw’abahawe umurage wabasezeranijwe, babikesheje ukwemera n’ukwiyumanganya." 
Hebrews6:13 Igihe Imana isezeranyije Abrahamu, kuko nta wundi wari uyisumbye ngo imurahirire, yarirahiriye ubwayo iti" 
Hebrews6:14 «Rwose nzaguhundazaho imigisha, kandi nzaguha inkomoko nyamwinshi.»" 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahamu akomeza kwihangana bigeza aho yuzurizwa amasezerano. 
Hebrews6:16 Ubusanzwe abantu barahirira imbere y’ubaruta, maze kugira ngo bakemure impaka bakishingikiriza iyo ndahiro." 
Hebrews6:17 Ni cyo cyatumye Imana ubwayo ikoresha indahiro ngo igaragarize abo yageneye isezerano ko umugambi wayo udakuka. 
Hebrews6:18 Iryo sezerano n’iyo ndahiro bidakuka kandi bitarangwamo ubuhendanyi bw’Imana, ni byo shingiro ridahungabana ry’amizero yacu, twe abemeye guhara byose ngo tugere ku mizero twasezeranijwe." 
Hebrews6:19 Ayo mizero ni nk’inkingi umutima wacu wegamiye, kandi akaba ari yo atugeza hirya y’umubambiko," 
Hebrews6:20 ha handi Yezu yatubanjirije kwinjira, ari Umuherezagitambo mukuru kandi w’iteka ryose, wo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Uwo Malekisedeki, Umwami w’i Salemu, umuherezabitambo w’Imana Isumba byose, ni we wasanganiye Abrahamu wari umaze gutsinda Abami, nuko amuvugiraho amagambo y’umugisha." 
Hebrews7:2 Ni we kandi Abrahamu yeguriye igice cya cumi cy’iminyago. Izina rye risobanura mbere na mbere «umwami w’ubutabera», hanyuma kandi kuba umwami w’i Salemu bivuga «Umwami w’amahoro»." 
Hebrews7:3 Byongeye Malekisedeki, nta se uzwi, nta nyina, nta bisekuruza, nta we uzi igihe yavukiye n’igihe yapfiriye, maze agashushanya atyo Umwana w’Imana, akaba kandi n’Umuherezabitambo w’iteka ryose." 
Hebrews7:4 Nimwirebere ubukuru bw’uwo muntu, Abrahamu, umukurambere wacu, yeguriye igice cya cumi cy’iminyago myiza!" 
Hebrews7:5 Abakomoka kuri Levi batorewe kuba abaherezabitambo, ni bo bonyine Amategeko ashinga kwakirira rubanda kimwe cya cumi cy’umusaruro wabo ugenewe Ingoro; abo bawutanga kandi ni abavandimwe babo bakomoka kuri Abrahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Ariko Malekisedeki we, utari uwo mu bisekuruza byabo, yegukanye igice cya cumi cy’umutungo wa Abrahamu, kandi aha umugisha uwaragijwe amasezerano y’Imana." 
Hebrews7:7 Nta we ushidikanya ko umuto ari we uhabwa umugisha n’umukuru. 
Hebrews7:8 Bisubiye kandi bene Levi basoresha ni abagenewe kuzapfa, naho Malekisedeki we bahamya ko ariho." 
Hebrews7:9 Twavuga ndetse ko Levi, wakiraga kimwe cya cumi, na we ubwe yagitangiye muri Abrahamu," 
Hebrews7:10 kuko yari akiri mu nda ya sekuruza igihe asanganiwe na Malekisedeki. 
Hebrews7:11 Iyaba ubuherezabitambo bwa Levi bwari bwuzuye — kandi mu by’ukuri ari bwo shingiro ry’amategeko yahawe Israheli — ntibiba byarabaye ngombwa ko haduka undi muherezabitambo, wo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki, aho kuba uwo mu cyiciro cya Aroni." 
Hebrews7:12 Igihe rero ubuherezabitambo buhindutse, ni ngombwa ko n’amategeko ahinduka." 
Hebrews7:13 Uwo ibi bivugwaho — Nyagasani Umwami wacu — avuka mu bundi bwoko butigeze gushingwa imirimo y’urutambiro. 
Hebrews7:14 Nta we uyobewe ko Umwami wacu akomoka kuri Yuda, ubwoko Musa atigeze ahingutsa mu bagenewe ubuherezabitambo." 
Hebrews7:15 Bikarushaho kumvikana, iyo tuzirikana ko umuherezabitambo uje ari uwo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki;" 
Hebrews7:16 akaba atabugejejweho n’amategeko y’abantu, ahubwo n’ububasha bw’ubugingo buhoraho." 
Hebrews7:17 Dore koko ibyamwemejweho: «Uri umuherezabitambo iteka ryose, wo mu cyiciro cya Malekisedeki.»" 
Hebrews7:18 Bityo amahame ya mbere akaba avuyeho, kuko yari adafashe kandi nta kamaro." 
Hebrews7:19 Amategeko koko nta cyo yigeze ageza ku ndunduro; ni yo mpamvu twahawe amizero yisumbuye ari yo dukesha kwegera Imana. 
Hebrews7:20 Uretse ibyo kandi habaye n’indahiro y’Imana: ubwo abaherezabitambo ba mbere bashyirwagaho nta ndahiro," 
Hebrews7:21 Uwacu we yashyirishijweho indahiro y’Uwamubwiye ati «Uhoraho yarabirahiriye, kandi ntazisubiraho: Uri Umuherezagitambo iteka ryose.»" 
Hebrews7:22 Ni kuri ubwo buryo Yezu ahagarariye Isezerano ryisumbuye. 
Hebrews7:23 Byongeye kandi, abaherezabitambo ba mbere bakurikiranye ari benshi, kuko urupfu rwabatwaraga;" 
Hebrews7:24 ariko We, kuko ari uw’iteka ryose, ubuherezagitambo bwe ntibusimburanwaho." 
Hebrews7:25 Ni cyo gituma ashobora kurokora burundu abamunyuraho bagana Imana, kuko abereyeho kubingingira iteka ryose." 
Hebrews7:26 Uwo ni we koko muherezagitambo mukuru twari dukeneye, w’intungane, w’umuziranenge, w’umuzirabwandu, utabarirwa mu banyabyaha, wakiriwe ahasumbye ijuru." 
Hebrews7:27 Ntameze nk’abandi baherezabitambo bakuru bagomba gutamba buri munsi, bakabanza guhongerera ibyaha byabo bwite, bakabona guhongerera iby’imbaga; ibyo We yabigize rimwe rizima yitangaho igitambo ubwe." 
Hebrews7:28 Abo Amategeko ashyiriraho kuba abaherezabitambo bakuru ni abanyantege nke, ariko Uwashyirishijweho indahiro yakuye Amategeko, ni Umwana w’Imana wuje ubutungane iteka ryose." 
Hebrews8:1 Ingingo y’ingenzi y’ibyo tuvuga ni uko dufite Umuherezagitambo mukuru wa bene ako kageni, wicaye mu ijuru iburyo bwa Nyirikuzo," 
Hebrews8:2 akaba ashinzwe ingoro n’ihema nyaryo, ritubatswe n’abantu, ahubwo Imana yiyubakiye ubwayo." 
Hebrews8:3 Umuherezabitambo mukuru wese ashyirirwaho guhereza amaturo n’ibitambo, bikamubera ngombwa ko na we agira icyo atura." 
Hebrews8:4 Mu by’ukuri, iyaba Yezu yari ari ku isi, ntiyaba umuherezabitambo, kuko hatabuze abahereza amaturo bakurikije Amategeko." 
Hebrews8:5 Ibyo abo ngabo bakora ku isi ni ibishushanyo bica amarenga y’ibiriho mu ijuru, nk’uko Musa agiye kubaka Ihema yabwirijwe n’Imana ngo «Itegereze, uzakore byose ukurikije urugero rw’ibyo werekewe hejuru y’umusozi.»" 
Hebrews8:6 Ariko ubu ngubu Umuherezagitambo wacu mukuru yeguriwe umurimo uruta cyane uwabo, kuko ari umuhuza w’Isezerano rishingiye ku byiza bihebuje, biruse ibyari byarasezeranywe mbere." 
Hebrews8:7 Iyaba Isezerano rya mbere ryarabaye indakemwa, ntiriba ryaragombye gusimburwa n’irya kabiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Kuko Imana yabatonganyije, igira iti «Ngaha iminsi igiye kuza, uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga, maze nzagirane Isezerano rishya n’inzu ya Israheli, n’inzu ya Yuda;" 
Hebrews8:9 atari nk’isezerano nagiranye n’abasekuruza babo umunsi mbafata ikiganza ngo mbakure mu gihugu cya Misiri. Kubera ko batakomeje isezerano ryanjye, nanjye narabitaruye, uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga." 
Hebrews8:10 None ngiri Isezerano nzagirana n’inzu ya Israheli nyuma y’iyo minsi, uwo ari Nyagasani ubivuga: ’Nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu bwenge bwabo, maze nyandike mu mutima wabo; nzababera Imana, na bo bazambere umuryango.’" 
Hebrews8:11 Maze hekuzagira uwongera kwigisha mugenzi we cyangwa ubwiriza umuvandimwe we, ati ’Umenye Nyagasani’, kuko bose bazaba banzi, kuva ku muto kugeza ku mukuru." 
Hebrews8:12 Kuko nzabababarira ubuhemu bwabo bwose, maze ibicumuro byabo sinongere kubyibuka.»" 
Hebrews8:13 Kuvuga rero «isezerano rishya», ni uko irya mbere Imana iba irigize impitagihe; ikibaye kandi icya kera n’igisazira kiba kigiye gushiraho" 
Hebrews9:1 Isezerano rya mbere ryari rifite imihango irigenga, n’ingoro Imana isingirizwamo hano ku isi." 
Hebrews9:2 Bari barashinze ihema, rigizwe n’ibyumba bibiri. Icya mbere cyabagamo ikinyarumuri, n’imigati y’umumuriko, kikitwa ahatagatifu." 
Hebrews9:3 Hirya y’umubambiko wa kabiri hakaba icyumba cyitwa ahatagatifu rwose," 
Hebrews9:4 cyabagamo urutambiro rwa zahabu rutwikirwaho imibavu, hakabamo kandi Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano busizwe hose zahabu; muri bwo harimo agaherezo ka zahabu kuzuyemo manu, harimo kandi inkoni ya Aroni yari yarashibutseho indabo, n’ibimanyu by’amabuye byanditsweho Isezerano." 
Hebrews9:5 Hejuru y’Ubushyinguro hakaba Abakerubimu b’ikuzo batwikiriye urwicurizo. Ariko si igihe cyo kuvuga umwirondoro w’ibyo byose. 
Hebrews9:6 Ibikoresho iyo bimaze gutunganywa mu myanya yabyo, abaherezabitambo binjira igihe cyose mu cyumba cya mbere, bakahakorera imihango yo gusenga." 
Hebrews9:7 Mu cyumba cya kabiri ho, umuherezabitambo mukuru ahinjira gusa rimwe mu mwaka, kandi yitwaje amaraso yo guhongerera ibyaha by’ubujiji bwe bwite, kimwe n’iby’imbaga." 
Hebrews9:8 Roho Mutagatifu agaragaza atyo ko inzira y’ahatagatifu rwose itarugururwa mu gihe ingoro ya mbere ikiriho. 
Hebrews9:9 Ni amarenga y’iki gihe turimo, atwumvisha ko amaturo n’ibitambo bihaturirwa bidashobora kugeza ku butungane umutima w’ukora iyo mihango." 
Hebrews9:10 Ubwo ishingiye ku biribwa, ku binyobwa no kwisukurisha amazi, ni imihango iringaniye n’intege nke z’abantu, yemewe kuzageza igihe Imana izavugururira byose." 
Hebrews9:11 Igihe Kristu ahingukiye, yaje ari Umuherezagitambo mukuru, w’ibyiza bizaza. Yambukiranyije ingoro isumbije iya mbere agaciro n’ubutungane, itubatswe n’ikiganza cy’abantu, ari byo kuvuga ko itari iyo muri ibi byaremwe." 
Hebrews9:12 Yinjiye rimwe rizima ahatagatifu rwose, atahinjiranye amaraso ya za ruhaya n’ay’ibimasa, ahubwo aye bwite, aturonkera atyo ubucungurwe bw’iteka." 
Hebrews9:13 Niba koko amaraso ya za ruhaya n’ay’ibimasa, kimwe n’umuyonga w’inyana yatwitswe, bishobora gusukura no gutagatifuza umubiri w’abo byuhagijwe," 
Hebrews9:14 nk’amaraso ya Kristu wituye Imana ho igitambo kitagira inenge ku bwa Roho Uhoraho, yo azarushaho ate gusukura umutima wacu, awukiza ibikorwa bitera urupfu, ngo dushobore gusingiza Imana Nzima?" 
Hebrews9:15 Ni cyo gituma Kristu yabaye ishingiro ry’Isezerano rishya, kuko yapfiriye gukiza ibicumuro by’abari bakigengwa n’Isezerano rya mbere, kandi ngo abatowe bazahabwe umurage w’iteka wabasezeranijwe." 
Hebrews9:16 Koko rero iyo hari uburage, ni ngombwa ko urupfu rw’uraga rubanza kugaragara." 
Hebrews9:17 Uburage bugira agaciro iyo uraga yapfuye; naho iyo akiriho, nta gaciro buba bufite." 
Hebrews9:18 Ni cyo cyatumye n’Isezerano rya mbere ritashoboye kubaho hatabanje kumenwa amaraso. 
Hebrews9:19 Koko rero, igihe Musa yari amaze gutangariza imbaga amabwiriza yose uko yanditswe mu Mategeko, yafashe amaraso y’ibimasa n’aya za ruhaya, hamwe n’amazi, abimisha ku gitabo no ku mbaga yose akoresheje ubwoya bw’intama butukura n’icyuhagiro," 
Hebrews9:20 avuga ati «Aya ni amaraso y’Isezerano Imana yabageneye.» 
Hebrews9:21 Hanyuma kandi ayo maraso ayuhagiza Ihema n’ibikoresho byose by’imihango mitagatifu. 
Hebrews9:22 Bityo, nk’uko Amategeko abivuga, hafi ya byose bisukurishwa amaraso, maze ntihabe ibabarirwa ry’ibyaha, hatabanje kumenwa amaraso." 
Hebrews9:23 Niba ibishushanya iby’ijuru bisukurwa kuri ubwo buryo, ni ngombwa ko iby’ijuru nyirizina bisukurwa n’ibitambo byisumbuyeho." 
Hebrews9:24 Koko, Kristu ntiyinjiye mu ngoro yubatswe n’abantu yacaga amarenga y’Ingoro y’ukuri, ahubwo yatashye mu ijuru ubwaryo, kugira ngo aduhagararire ubu ngubu imbere y’Imana." 
Hebrews9:25 Kandi ntiyagombaga kwitamba ubwe incuro nyinshi, nk’uko umuherezabitambo mukuru yinjiranaga buri mwaka ahatagatifu rwose amaraso atari aye." 
Hebrews9:26 Iyo biba ibyo, Kristu aba yaragombye kubabara incuro nyinshi kuva isi ikiremwa. Mu by’ukuri, yahingutse rimwe rizima, ibihe byuzurijwe, kugira ngo icyaha agihanagurishe igitambo cye." 
Hebrews9:27 Nk’uko kandi umuntu wese yagenewe gupfa rimwe rizima, nyuma agacirwa urubanza," 
Hebrews9:28 ni na ko Kristu yatuweho igitambo rimwe rizima kugira ngo avaneho ibyaha by’abantu batabarika, nyuma akazaza ubwa kabiri, bitagifite amahuriro n’icyaha, azaniye uburokorwe abamutegereje bose." 
Hebrews10:1 Amategeko ya kera ntiyarangaga bihagije amahame y’ukuri, ahubwo yari amarenga y’ibyiza bizaza. Ntiyashoboraga na gato kugeza ku butungane abaturaga ubudahwema ibyo bitambo bidahinduka, basubiragamo buri mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Iyo bitaba ibyo, baba bararetse kubitura, kuko iyo baza gusukurwa burundu, ntibari gukomeza kwigiramo inkeke y’icyaha." 
Hebrews10:3 Nyamara ahubwo ibyo bitambo byari bigamije buri mwaka kwibutsa imbaga ibyaha byayo. 
Hebrews10:4 Koko rero nta kuntu amaraso y’ibimasa n’aya za ruhaya ashobora kuvanaho ibyaha. 
Hebrews10:5 Ni cyo cyatumye igihe Kristu aje ku isi, yavuze ati «Ntiwanyuzwe n’ibitambo n’amaturo, ahubwo wampangiye umubiri." 
Hebrews10:6 Ntiwashimishijwe n’ibitambo bitwikwa bihongerera ibyaha; 
Hebrews10:7 nuko ndavuga nti ’Dore ndaje, kuko ari jye uvugwa mu muzingo w’igitabo, ngo nkore ugushaka kwawe, Dawe’.»" 
Hebrews10:8 Umva ko abanje kuvuga ati «Ntiwanyuzwe cyangwa ngo ushimishwe n’amaturo n’ibitambo bitwikwa», bihongerera ibyaha», nyamara biturwa uko biteganywa n’Amategeko!" 
Hebrews10:9 Hanyuma akongeraho ati «Dore ndaje ngo nkore ugushaka kwawe.» Ni uko yakuyeho uburyo bwa mbere bwo gutura, ashinga ubwa kabiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Ni ku bw’uko gushaka kandi twatagatifujwe n’ituro ry’umubiri wa Kristu ryabaye rimwe rizima. 
Hebrews10:11 Mu gihe umuherezabitambo wese ahora ahagaze ngo akore buri munsi imihango, atura kenshi ibitambo bihora ari bimwe kandi bidashobora kuvanaho ibyaha," 
Hebrews10:12 Kristu We, aho amariye guhereza igitambo rukumbi gihongerera ibyaha, «yicaye iburyo bw’Imana ubuziraherezo»," 
Hebrews10:13 akaba kuva ubwo ategereje ko «abanzi be bahindurwamo akabaho ko mu nsi y’ibirenge bye.» 
Hebrews10:14 Ku bw’iryo turo rimwe rukumbi yagejeje ku butungane abo yiyemeje gutagatifuza. 
Hebrews10:15 Ni na byo kandi Roho Mutagatifu ubwe atwemeza. Kuko amaze kuvuga ati 
Hebrews10:16 «Ngiri Isezerano nzagirana na bo nyuma y’iyo minsi». Nyagasani yaratangaje ati «Nzashyira amategeko yanjye mu mutima wabo, maze nzayandike no mu bwenge bwabo." 
Hebrews10:17 Sinzongera kwibuka ibyaha byabo.» 
Hebrews10:18 Bityo rero ahari ibabarirwa, ntihaba hagikeneye ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha." 
Hebrews10:19 Kuri ubwo buryo, bavandimwe, dufite ubwizere buhagije bwo kuzataha mu ngoro ntagatifu, tubikesheje amaraso ya Kristu." 
Hebrews10:20 Yaduhangiye inzira nshya kandi nyabuzima, ihinguranya umubambiko, ari byo kuvuga umubiri we." 
Hebrews10:21 Tukaba ubu dufite umuherezagitambo uhebuje uyobora inzu y’Imana. 
Hebrews10:22 Nitumwegerane rero umutima ugororotse n’ukwemera guhamye, dufite umutima wakijijwe inkeke yose y’icyaha n’umubiri wuhagijwe amazi asukuye." 
Hebrews10:23 Nitwikomezemo amizero yacu tudacogora, kuko Uwatugiriye amasezerano ari indahemuka." 
Hebrews10:24 Bamwe bajye bita ku bandi, duterana umwete mu rukundo no mu bikorwa byiza." 
Hebrews10:25 Ntitukihunze amakoraniro yacu, nk’uko bamwe babigizemo akamenyero; ahubwo niturusheho guterana inkunga, cyane cyane ndetse ubwo mubona ko umunsi wa Nyagasani wegereje." 
Hebrews10:26 Tumenye ko, niba dukomeje gucumura tubishaka, kandi twaramenyeshejwe ukuri kose, nta gitambo kindi gisigaye cyo guhongerera ibyaha byacu;" 
Hebrews10:27 ahasigaye ni ugutegereza urubanza rukaze n’inkongi y’umuriro uzatsemba ibyigomeke. 
Hebrews10:28 Uwagira atya akarenga ku mategeko ya Musa, nta shiti azicwa nta mbabazi, niba byemejwe n’abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu." 
Hebrews10:29 Bizagendekera bite rero uzaba asuzuguye Umwana w’Imana, akandavuza amaraso y’Isezerano ry’Imana yamutagatifuje, kandi agatuka Roho Nyir’ingabire? Nimwiyumvishe ukuntu igihano azaba akwiye kizarushaho kuba gikaze." 
Hebrews10:30 Ntituyobewe, Uwavuze ati «Uguhora ni ukwanjye; ni jye kandi utanga ibihembo», akongera ati «Nyagasani azacira urubanza umuryango we.»" 
Hebrews10:31 Ni akaga gakomeye kwibasirwa n’ikiganza cy’Imana Nzima. 
Hebrews10:32 Nimwibuke uko mwatangiye mukimara kubona urumuri, ukuntu mwarwanye intambara ikomeye kandi ibabaje:" 
Hebrews10:33 rimwe mushungerwa mu bitutsi no mu bitotezo, ubundi mwifatanya n’abagirirwaga ayo marorerwa." 
Hebrews10:34 Kandi koko mwasangiye ububabare n’abafunzwe, mwakirana ibyishimo isahurwa ry’ibintu byanyu, kuko mwari muzi ko mufite ubukungu bwisumbuyeho kandi buzahoraho." 
Hebrews10:35 Amizero yanyu ntagacogore, azabahesha ingororano ikomeye." 
Hebrews10:36 Ubu icyo mukeneye ni ubutwari buzabafasha kuzuza ugushaka kw’Imana no kuronka ibyiza mwasezeranijwe. 
Hebrews10:37 Kuko «hasigaye akanya gato, ndetse gatoya cyane, maze Ugomba kuza akaza bidatinze." 
Hebrews10:38 Intungane yanjye izabeshwaho n’ukwemera; nyamara niba inyuze ukwayo, ntizongera guhimbaza umutima wanjye.»" 
Hebrews10:39 Twebweho ntituri abantu bo gutezuka ngo bitume tworama, ahubwo turi abantu bafite ukwemera kuzaduhesha uburokorwe." 
Hebrews11:1 Ukwemera ni ishingiro ry’ibyo twizeye, kukatubera n’icyemezo cy’ibitagaragara." 
Hebrews11:2 Ukwemera ni ko kwahesheje abakera gushimwa n’Imana. 
Hebrews11:3 Ukwemera kutwumvisha ko ibyaremwe byatunganijwe n’Ijambo ry’Imana, bityo rero ko ibigaragara bikomoka ku bitagaragara." 
Hebrews11:4 Ukwemera kwatumye Abeli ahereza Imana igitambo gitambutse icya Kayini. Kwamugaragajeho rero kuba intungane kuko Imana yashimye amaturo ye. Ku bw’uko kwemera, n’ubwo yapfuye bwose, aracyavuga na n’ubu." 
Hebrews11:5 Ukwemera kwatumye Henoki ajyanwa, maze ahonoka urupfu, akaba rero nta wongeye kumubona, kuko Imana yamwijyaniye; koko mbere y’uko ajyanwa yari yaragaragaweho ko yanogeye Imana." 
Hebrews11:6 Nuko rero nta we ushobora kunyura Imana adafite ukwemera, kuko uwegera Imana wese agomba kwemera ko ibaho kandi igahemba abayishakashaka." 
Hebrews11:7 Aho Nowa amariye kumenyeshwa ibyari bitaraba, ukwemera kwatumye adashidikanya maze aremekanya ubwato bwo kurokoreramo umuryango we. Ubwo ahamya isi icyaha, maze asigara ari ingenerwamurage y’ubutungane buturuka ku kwemera." 
Hebrews11:8 Ukwemera kwatumye Abrahamu yumvira Imana, agenda agana igihugu yari agiye guhabwa ho umurage, kandi agenda atazi iyo ajya." 
Hebrews11:9 Ukwemera kwatumye atura nk’umushyitsi mu gihugu yasezeranijwe, acumbika mu ihema, hamwe na Izaki na Yakobo, ari bo basangiye amasezerano." 
Hebrews11:10 Abrahamu uwo yari ategereje umurwa wubatse ku kibanza gikomeye, watekerejwe kandi ukubakwa n’Imana ubwayo." 
Hebrews11:11 Ukwemera kwatumye na Sara, wari ugeze mu zabukuru, ahabwa ubushobozi bwo gusama inda, kuko yari yizeye ubudahemuka bw’Uwabagiriye amasezerano." 
Hebrews11:12 Ni na yo mpamvu umuntu umwe, ndetse wari wegereje urupfu yakomotsweho n’imbaga ingana n’inyenyeri zo mu kirere kandi itabarika nk’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo bose bapfanye ukwemera, na none bataragera ku byiza basezeranijwe, ariko basa n’ababirabukwa, babiramukiriza kure, bahamya ko ari abagenzi n’abashyitsi kuri iyi si." 
Hebrews11:14 Abavuga batyo baragaragaza rwose ko bari mu gushakashaka igihugu cy’iwabo nyakuri; 
Hebrews11:15 kuko iyo baza kuba bakumbuye icyo baturutsemo, bari bagifite umwanya uhagije wo gusubirayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Mu by’ukuri bari barangamiye ikindi gihugu cyiza, ari cyo iwabo ho mu ijuru. Ni na yo mpamvu Imana itagira ipfunwe ryo kwitwa Imana yabo, kuko ari Yo yabateguriye umurwa." 
Hebrews11:17 Ukwemera kwatumye, mu gihe cy’igeragezwa, Abrahamu atura Izaki ho igitambo; atura umwana we w’ikinege, kandi yari yarahawe amasezerano," 
Hebrews11:18 abwirwa ati «Izaki ni we uzaguhesha urubyaro ruzakwitirirwa.» 
Hebrews11:19 Yiyemezaga ko Imana ishobora no kuzura uwapfuye, bituma asubizwa umwana we, biba n’amarenga y’ibizaza." 
Hebrews11:20 Ukwemera kwatumye Izaki aha Yakobo na Ezawu umugisha uzabafasha mu gihe kizaza. 
Hebrews11:21 Ukwemera kwatumye Yakobo, igihe yari agiye gupfa, aha umugisha buri muhungu wa Yozefu, nuko apfukama yishingikirije inkoni ye." 
Hebrews11:22 Ukwemera kwatumye Yozefu wendaga gupfa atangaza imitahukire y’abana ba Israheli, kandi agena n’uko bazagenzereza amagufa ye." 
Hebrews11:23 Ukwemera kwatumye Musa, amaze kuvuka, ahishwa n’ababyeyi be amezi atatu yose, kuko bari banyuzwe n’uburanga bwe, ntibatinya guca ku itegeko ry’umwami." 
Hebrews11:24 Ukwemera kwatumye Musa, aho amariye gukura, yigurutsa kwitwa umwana w’umukobwa wa Farawo," 
Hebrews11:25 ahitamo kuburagizwa hamwe n’umuryango w’Imana aho kwishimishiriza mu byaha by’igihe gito. 
Hebrews11:26 Yiyumvisha ko kwifatanya n’ugusuzugurwa k’umuryango watowe bitambukije kure agaciro ubukire bwose bwo mu Misiri, kuko amaso ye yari arangamiye indi ngororano." 
Hebrews11:27 Ukwemera kwatumye yimuka mu Misiri ntiyakangwa n’uburakari bw’umwami, nuko ntiyahindagana amera nk’umuntu wizigiye Utaboneshwa amaso." 
Hebrews11:28 Ukwemera kwatumye ahimbaza Pasika, maze asiga amaraso ku nzu z’Abayisraheli, kugira ngo Umunyacyorezo atarimbura abana b’imfura." 
Hebrews11:29 Ukwemera kwabambukije Inyanja Itukura nko ku butaka bwumutse, mu gihe Abanyamisiri babiganye, bo bararohama." 
Hebrews11:30 Ukwemera kwatumye inkuta zizitiye Yeriko zihirika, bamaze kuzizenguruka iminsi irindwi yose." 
Hebrews11:31 Ukwemera kwatumye Rahabu w’ihabara atarimburwa hamwe n’ibyigomeke, kuko yakiranye amahoro intasi za Israheli." 
Hebrews11:32 Mbese mvuge nte kandi? Nta gihe nabona cyo kuvuga bihagije ibya Gideyoni, Baraki, Samusoni, Yefute, Dawudi, Samweli, n’Abahanuzi." 
Hebrews11:33 Ukwemera kwabo kwatumye batsinda amahanga, bategekana ubutabera, buzurizwa amasezerano, bazibiranya urwasaya rw’intare," 
Hebrews11:34 bazimya ubukana bw’umuriro, bahonoka ubugi bw’inkota, bashinga intege bakirutse indwara, bagira ubutwari igihe cy’intambara, bakumira ingabo z’abanyamahanga." 
Hebrews11:35 Hari n’abagore bazuriwe abana babo bari bapfuye. Hari n’abahisemo gutanyaguzwa, banga kubabarirwa, kugira ngo bazashyikire ubugingo bwisumbuye bw’abazutse." 
Hebrews11:36 Abandi bemeye agashinyaguro n’ibiboko, ndetse n’ingoyi n’uburoko." 
Hebrews11:37 Hari abatewe amabuye, basatuzwa urukero, batemaguzwa inkota; hari abatorongeye, bagenda bambaye impu z’intama n’iz’ihene, ari abatindahare, bapfukiranwa kandi batotezwa," 
Hebrews11:38 — abatari bagenewe kuba ab’isi — babuyeraga ku gasi no mu misozi, bahungira mu bigugu no mu masenga y’isi." 
Hebrews11:39 Abo bose, n’ubwo Imana yashimye ukwemera kwabo, ntibashoboye gushyikira iyuzuzwa ry’amasezerano;" 
Hebrews11:40 kuko Imana yari iduteganyirije ibyiza biruseho, ntiyashatse kubageza ku ndunduro yabyo, tutari kumwe." 
Hebrews12:1 Natwe rero, ubwo duhagarikiwe n’inteko ingana ityo y’ababaye intwari mu kwemera, nitwigobotore imizigo idushikamiye n’icyaha gihora kiducogoza, maze tuboneze inzira ubutagerura mu ntambara twahamagariwe," 
Hebrews12:2 duhanze amaso Yezu, We ntangiriro n’iherezo ry’ukwemera kwacu, We wemeye guhara ibyishimo byari bimukwiye, akiyumanganya umusaraba adatinya ko byamuviramo ikimwaro, nuko kuva ubwo akicara iburyo bw’intebe y’Imana." 
Hebrews12:3 Koko nimutekereze uwababajwe cyane n’abanyabyaha bari bamwibasiye, agira ngo imitima yanyu itazacogozwa n’ukwiheba." 
Hebrews12:4 Ntimurarwana bigeze aho kuvushwa amaraso mu ntambara y’icyaha murimo," 
Hebrews12:5 kandi mwiyibagije inama yabagiriwe kimwe n’abana ngo «Mwana wanjye, ntukange ko Nyagasani aguhana, cyangwa ngo ucogozwe n’uko agucyashye;" 
Hebrews12:6 kuko Nyagasani ahana abo akunda, agacyaha uwo yemereye kuba umwana we bwite.»" 
Hebrews12:7 Ububabare bwanyu bugenewe kubagorora, kandi Imana ibafata nk’abana bayo. Ni uwuhe mwana rero udakosorwa na se?" 
Hebrews12:8 Niba muri abarindwabihano kandi abandi bose babihuriyeho, ubwo muri ibibyarirano, ntimuri abana b’ukuri." 
Hebrews12:9 Twarezwe n’ababyeyi bacu b’umubiri kandi bitugwa neza; tuzarushaho dute rero kuyoboka Umubyeyi w’imitima yacu, ngo aduhaze ubugingo?" 
Hebrews12:10 Bo baducyahaga by’igihe gito, uko babyumvaga; Imana Yo ibigirira ikidufitiye akamaro, igamije kutugeza ku butungane bwayo." 
Hebrews12:11 Nanone nta we uhita ashimishwa n’igihano, ahubwo kiramubabaza; nyuma y’aho ariko, abo cyagoroye kibabyarira imbuto y’amahoro n’ubutungane." 
Hebrews12:12 «Nimukomeze rero ibiganza bidandabirana n’amavi ajegajega; 
Hebrews12:13 kandi mutegurire ibirenge byanyu amayira agororotse», kugira ngo ucumbagurika adahinyagara, ahubwo akurizeho gukira." 
Hebrews12:14 Nimuharanire kugirana amahoro n’abantu bose, no gutunga ubutungane kuko utabufite atazigera abona Imana." 
Hebrews12:15 Muramenye ntihazagire n’umwe usaguka ku ngabire y’Imana, ntihazamere kandi muri mwe ingemwe isharira yabatera imidugararo maze ikanduza imbaga yose." 
Hebrews12:16 Muramenye ntimukabemo inkozi y’ibibi n’imwe cyangwa umusebyamana, nka Ezawu waguranye imbehe icyubahiro cye cyo kuba imfura ya se." 
Hebrews12:17 Muzi kandi ko, hanyuma yashatse kuragwa umugisha, akabihakanirwa, akabura n’uburyo yabihindura, n’ubwo yatakambaga kandi asuka amarira!" 
Hebrews12:18 Ntimwaje mugana ibintu bigaragara, nk’umuriro uhinda cyangwa igicu kibuditse, umwijima cyangwa inkubi y’umuyaga," 
Hebrews12:19 umworomo w’impanda cyangwa ijwi risakabaka, ku buryo abaryumvise basabye ngo bekongera kuryumva." 
Hebrews12:20 «Ntibashoboye kwihanganira iri tegeko ryababwiraga ngo ’Nihagira uwegera uyu musozi, ndetse n’ubwo ryaba ari itungo rizicishwe amabuye.»" 
Hebrews12:21 Ibyo babonye byari biteye ubwoba kugeza aho Musa avuga ati «Nakutse umutima, none ndadagadwa!»" 
Hebrews12:22 Mwebweho mwaje mugana umusozi wa Siyoni n’umurwa w’Imana Nzima, ari wo Yeruzalemu yo mu ijuru, n’inteko itabarika y’abamalayika bakereye ibirori;" 
Hebrews12:23 mwasanze ikoraniro ry’abavukambere banditswe mu ijuru, mwegera n’Imana Umucamanza wa bose, n’intungane zageze ku ndunduro," 
Hebrews12:24 mwegera kandi Yezu, We muhuza w’Isezerano rishya ku bw’amaraso yamishwe, aruta kure ay’Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Muririnde rero kwima amatwi Nyir’ukubabwira! Abanze kumva uwabahanuriraga hano ku isi ntibashoboye kuzibukira igihano; twebwe se tuzakitaza dute niba twirengagije Utubwirira mu ijuru? 
Hebrews12:26 Ijwi rye ryahungabanyije isi kandi n’ubu aravuga ati «Hasigaye indi ncuro maze nekuzahungabanya isi yonyine, ahubwo ndetse n’ijuru.»" 
Hebrews12:27 Ayo magambo ngo «hasigaye indi ncuro» aratwumvisha ko ibyo bihindagurika ari ibintu byaremwe bizavanwaho, kugira ngo ibidahindagurika bihoreho iteka." 
Hebrews12:28 Ubwo rero duhawe Ubwami budahindagurika, nidukomere kuri iyo ngabire, dukorere Imana ku buryo buyinogeye, mu cyubahiro n’igitinyiro," 
Hebrews12:29 kuko Imana yacu ari umuriro ugurumana. 
Hebrews13:1 Nimwikomezemo urukundo rwa kivandimwe. 
Hebrews13:2 Ntimukibagirwe kwakira abashyitsi, kuko hariho ababikesheje kwakira abamalayika batabizi." 
Hebrews13:3 Muzirikane abari mu buroko nk’aho mwabaye imbohe hamwe na bo; muzirikane kandi abababazwa kuko namwe mufite umubiri. 
Hebrews13:4 Ugushyingirwa nikubahwe na bose, n’uburiri bw’abashakanye buzire inenge, kuko Imana izacira urubanza abasambanyi n’inkozi z’ibibi." 
Hebrews13:5 Imibereho yanyu izire ubugugu, munyurwe n’ibyo mufite, kuko Nyagasani ubwe yavuze ati «Sinzaguhara, kandi sinzagutererana!»" 
Hebrews13:6 ku buryo dushobora kuvuga nta shiti tuti «Nyagasani arampagarikiye, ntakizantera ubwoba; mbese ni nde wagira icyo antwara?»" 
Hebrews13:7 Nimuzirikane abayobozi banyu, ababamenyesheje Ijambo ry’Imana; mwitegereze uko barangije ubutumwa bwabo, maze mukurikize ukwemera kwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristu ntahinduka, ari ejo, ari none, no mu bihe byose." 
Hebrews13:9 Ntimugatwarwe n’inyigisho z’amoko menshi kandi zitandukira, kuko ikiruta ari uko umutima wakomezwa n’ingabire z’Imana, aho gukomezwa n’ibyo kurya bitagiriye n’akamaro ababiha agaciro." 
Hebrews13:10 Twebweho dufite urutambiro abakorera mu ihema badafitiye uruhusa rwo kurya ibiruvuyeho. 
Hebrews13:11 Koko kandi amaraso y’ibitungwa ajyanwa n’umuherezabitambo mukuru ahatagatifu rwose ngo ahongerere ibyaha, naho inyama zabyo zigatwikirwa inyuma y’ingando." 
Hebrews13:12 Ni na yo mpamvu Yezu yababarijwe inyuma y’umurwa, ngo amaraso ye bwite atagatifuze imbaga." 
Hebrews13:13 Nidusohoke natwe tumusanganirire inyuma y’ingando, twikoreye agashinyaguro ke." 
Hebrews13:14 Kuko nta murwa uzahoraho dufite hano ku isi, ahubwo turashakashaka umurwa w’igihe kizaza." 
Hebrews13:15 Ku bwe rero ntiduhweme guhereza Imana igitambo cy’ibisingizo, ni ukuvuga imvugo yamamaza izina ryayo." 
Hebrews13:16 Ntimukibagirwe kugira neza no gushyira hamwe ibyo mutunze, kuko Imana ishima bene ibyo bitambo." 
Hebrews13:17 Nimwumvire abayobozi banyu kandi mubashobokere, kuko ari bo bashinzwe roho zanyu kandi bakazazibazwa. Bityo bazashobora kubikorana ibyishimo, aho kubikora binuba, kuko ibyo nta kamaro byabagirira." 
Hebrews13:18 Nimudusabire; mu by’ukuri umutimanama wacu uraboneye, kandi twiyemeje kugenza neza muri byose." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndabasabye, nimusabe mushishikaye, kugira ngo nzashobore kubagarukamo vuba." 
Hebrews13:20 Imana Nyir’amahoro, yakuye Umwami wacu Yezu mu bapfuye, Umushumba mukuru w’intama, ibigirishije amaraso y’Isezerano rizahoraho iteka," 
Hebrews13:21 Yo ubwayo ibahe gukora icyiza cyose gihuje n’ugushaka kwayo, kandi iturangirizemo ikiboneye mu maso yayo ku bwa Yezu Kristu, Nyaguharirwa ikuzo uko ibihe bisimburana iteka. Amen!" 
Hebrews13:22 Bavandimwe, ndabinginze ngo mwakire iri jambo ryo kubatera umwete, bikaba byatumye mbandikira ntarambuye." 
Hebrews13:23 Mumenye ko umuvandimwe wacu Timote yafunguwe. Nangeraho vuba, ni we tuzazana kubasura." 
Hebrews13:24 Nimutashye abayobozi banyu n’abatagatifujwe bose. Abo mu Butaliyani barabatashya. 
Hebrews13:25 Ineza y’Imana ihorane namwe mwese! 
James1:1 Jyewe Yakobo, umugaragu w’Imana n’uwa Nyagasani Yezu Kristu, ku batoranyijwe n’Imana bo mu miryango cumi n’ibiri, batuye mu mahanga, ndabaramutsa." 
James1:2 Bavandimwe, amagorwa y’amoko yose munyuramo, mujye muyakirana ibyishimo byinshi," 
James1:3 mumenye kandi ko ibigerageza ukwemera kwanyu bibyara ubwiyumanganye. 
James1:4 Ariko rero ubwo bwiyumanganye bugomba kuba bugaragara, kugira ngo mube abantu bahamye kandi nyabo, mbese batagira amakemwa." 
James1:5 Niba muri mwe hari ubuze ubuhanga, abusabe Imana izabumuha, Yo iha bose ku buntu kandi itagombye kugondozwa." 
James1:6 Ariko rero, ajye asabana ukwemera atabanje kujijinganya; kuko ujijinganya asa n’umuvumba mu nyanja ihubanganyijwe n’umuyaga." 
James1:7 Bene uwo muntu ntakibwire ko hari icyo Nyagasani yakwihera 
James1:8 umuntu w’imberabyombi, uhindagurika mu nzira ze zose." 
James1:9 Umuvandimwe w’umukene niyishimire ikuzwa rye," 
James1:10 n’umukire yishimire ugucishwa bugufi kwe, kuko umukire azahita nk’ururabyo rw’icyatsi." 
James1:11 Izuba ryararashe n’ubushyuhe bwaryo bwinshi, ryumisha icyatsi, ururabyo rurahunguka, maze ubwiza bwarwo burayoyoka. N’umukire rero azarabirana atyo mu byo akora byose." 
James1:12 Hahirwa umuntu uba intwari mu bigeragezo, kuko namara kugeragezwa, azahabwa ikamba ry’ubugingo Imana yasezeranyije abayikunda." 
James1:13 Nihagira ugwa mu gishuko, ntakavuge ati «Ni Imana inshuka», kuko Imana idashobora koshya gukora ikibi cyangwa ngo igire uwo ishuka." 
James1:14 Buri muntu ashukwa n’irari rye bwite rimukurura, maze rikamwoshya." 
James1:15 Iyo iryo rari rimaze gusama, ribyara icyaha, n’icyaha cyamara gukura kikabyara urupfu." 
James1:16 Ntimukibeshye rero, bavandimwe nkunda." 
James1:17 Icyitwa ingabire y’agaciro cyose, n’ituro rishyitse iryo ari ryo ryose, bikomoka mu ijuru ku Mubyeyi w’urumuri, we udahinduka kandi ntatume habaho umwijima uturutse ku mihindagurike y’ibihe." 
James1:18 Ni ku bwende bwe bwite yatwibyariye akoresheje ijambo rye ry’amanyakuri, kugira ngo tube imena mu biremwa bye." 
James1:19 Mubimenye rero, bavandimwe nkunda, ko muri impuguke. Nyamara, buri muntu arabangukirwe mu gutega amatwi, ariko ntagahubuke mu kuvuga; atinde no kurakara," 
James1:20 kuko uburakari bw’umuntu budakora igihuje n’ubutungane bw’Imana. 
James1:21 Nimwitandukanye rero n’icyitwa ubwandure cyose, n’icyitwa agasigisigi k’ubugira nabi kose, mwakirane urugwiro ijambo ryababibwemo kandi rishobora kubakiza." 
James1:22 Mube abantu bagaragaza mu bikorwa ijambo ry’Imana, kuko kwishimira kuryumva byonyine ari ukwibeshya." 
James1:23 Koko rero, niba umuntu ateze amatwi ijambo ariko ntarikurikize, amera nk’umuntu urebera mu ndorerwamo isura yavukanye:" 
James1:24 iyo amaze kwireba, aragenda, agahita yibagirwa uko yasaga." 
James1:25 Naho uwibanda ku itegeko rihamye, ari ryo ry’ubwigenge, kandi akaryizirikaho, atari uryumva akaryibagirwa, ahubwo ari urikurikiza; uwo nguwo azagira amahirwe mu bikorwa bye." 
James1:26 Niba hari uwibwira ko ari umuyoboke w’Imana, ariko ntashobore gutegeka ururimi rwe, aba yibeshya, n’iyobokamana rye riba ari ubusa." 
James1:27 Iyobokamana risukuye kandi ritagira amakemwa mu maso y’Imana Data ni iri ngiri: ni ugusura imfubyi n’abapfakazi mu magorwa yabo, kwirinda ubwandu bwose bwo kuri iyi si, kugira ngo ube umuziranenge." 
James2:1 Bavandimwe, ntimukitiranye kwikundira abantu bamwe n’ukwemera mufite muri Nyagasani Yezu Kristu wisesuyeho ikuzo." 
James2:2 Koko rero, niba mu ikoraniro ryanyu hinjiye umuntu ufite impeta za zahabu, wambaye neza cyane, hakinjira n’umukene wambaye imyenda y’ibishwangi," 
James2:3 maze mukarangamira umuntu wambaye imyambaro myiza, mukamubwira muti «Wowe, icara muri uyu mwanya w’icyubahiro», naho umukene mukamubwira muti «Wowe hagarara hariya», cyangwa se «Wicare mu nsi y’akabaho nkandagizaho ibirenge byanjye»," 
James2:4 ubwo se ntimuba mwivanguye ubwanyu? Ntimuba se mubaye abacamanza b’ibitekerezo bifutamye? 
James2:5 Nimwumve, bavandimwe nkunda! Mbese nyine, Imana si Yo yahisemo abakene muri iyi si, kugira ngo babe abakungahazwe mu kwemera, n’abagenerwamurage b’Ingoma Imana yasezeranyije abayikunda?" 
James2:6 Nyamara mwebwe mwima umukene icyubahiro cye! Mbese ye, abakire si bo babakandamiza? Si bo se babajyana mu nkiko?" 
James2:7 Si bo se batuka izina rya Kristu mwitiriwe? 
James2:8 Icyakora, niba mukurikiza itegeko rihatse yose nk’uko byanditswe ngo «Uzakunde mugenzi wawe nkawe ubwawe», mukora neza." 
James2:9 Ariko niba mugira uruhande mubogamiraho, mukora icyaha, mugashinjwa n’itegeko murengaho." 
James2:10 Koko rero, umuntu ukurikiza Itegeko ryose, ariko agateshuka ku ngingo yaryo imwe gusa, aba akwiye guhanwa nk’uwayishe yose," 
James2:11 kuko Uwavuze ati «Ntuzasambane», yaranavuze ati «Ntuzice.» Niba rero utasambanye, ariko ukica, uba wishe amategeko." 
James2:12 Nimuvuge kandi mukore nk’abantu bahamagariwe gucirwa urubanza hakurikijwe itegeko ry’ubwigenge. 
James2:13 Koko rero, urubanza ntirugira impuhwe ku muntu utaragize impuhwe; nyamara impuhwe zisesa urubanza." 
James2:14 Byaba byunguye iki se, bavandimwe banjye, umuntu avuze ko afite ukwemera, niba adafite ibikorwa? Uko kwemera se gushobora kumukiza?" 
James2:15 Niba umuvandimwe wawe cyangwa mushiki wawe bambaye ubusa, cyangwa se badafite ibyo kurya bya buri munsi," 
James2:16 maze muri mwe hakagira ubabwira ati «Nimugende amahoro, mwote kandi muryoherwe», atabahaye ibibatunga, byaba bimaze iki?" 
James2:17 Bityo rero, n’ukwemera kutagira ibikorwa kuba kwarapfuye ubwako." 
James2:18 Ariko wenda hagira uvuga ati «Wowe ufite ibikorwa, naho jye nkagira ukwemera!» Uwo nguwo namusubiza nti «Nyereka ukwemera kwawe kutagira ibikorwa, naho jye nkwereke ibikorwa bigaragaza ukwemera kwanjye." 
James2:19 Wemera ko habaho Imana imwe? Ni byiza rwose! N’ingabo za Sekibi zirabyemera, ariko zigahinda umushyitsi kubera ubwoba." 
James2:20 Muntu w’ikiburabwenge, waba ushaka se kumenya ko ukwemera kudafite ibikorwa kuba kwarapfuye?" 
James2:21 Ni ko ye, Abrahamu, umukurambere wacu, si ibikorwa byatumye aba intungane igihe atuye umuhungu we Izaki ku rutambiro?" 
James2:22 Urabona rero ko ukwemera kwajyanaga n’ibikorwa, n’ibikorwa bikuzuza ukwemera;" 
James2:23 maze hakarangira ijambo ry’Ibyanditswe rigira riti ’Nuko Abrahamu yemera Imana, bityo aba intungane’ kandi yitwa incuti y’Imana.»" 
James2:24 Murabona rero ko ari ibikorwa umuntu akesha kuba intungane, ntibibe mu kwemera konyine." 
James2:25 Ni ko byagenze no kuri Rahabu w’ihabara: none se si ibikorwa yakesheje ubutungane igihe yakiraga za ntasi, kandi akazinyuza mu yindi nzira?" 
James2:26 Koko rero, nk’uko umubiri ubuze umwuka uba wapfuye, bityo n’ukwemera kutagira ibikorwa kuba kwarapfuye." 
James3:1 Bavandimwe, ntimugahirimbanire mwese kuba abigisha. Murabizi ko twebwe abigisha tuzacirwa urubanza rukomeye," 
James3:2 kuko kenshi twese duteshuka mu magambo. Niba umuntu adateshutswe mu magambo, uwo nguwo aba ari umuntu nyawe, ushobora no gutegeka umubiri we wose." 
James3:3 Niba dushyize imikoba mu munwa w’amafarasi kugira ngo atwumvire, dushobora no kuyobora umubiri wayo wose." 
James3:4 Nimwitegereze n’amato; n’ubwo ari manini bwose kandi agasunikwa n’inkubi y’umuyaga, ayoborwa n’ingashya ntoya cyane, kugira ngo agane aho umusare ashaka." 
James3:5 Bityo rero, n’ururimi ni urugingo rw’umubiri rungana urwara, ariko rukiratana ibikorwa bikomeye. Nimurebe ukuntu akariro gake gatwika ishyamba rinini rigakongoka." 
James3:6 Ururimi na rwo ni nk’umuriro, isoko y’ibibi; rubarirwa mu myanya y’umubiri wacu, maze rukanduza umubiri wose, rukawutwikisha umuriro rukomora mu nyenga y’ikuzimu, rukangiza imibereho yacu yose." 
James3:7 Koko rero nta bwoko na bumwe, bwaba ubw’inyamaswa z’inkazi, bwaba ubw’inyoni, bwaba ubw’ibikururuka ku butaka, bwaba ubw’amafi, nta na bumwe umuntu adashobora gutegeka;" 
James3:8 ariko ururimi, nta muntu n’umwe ushobora kurutegeka, rwo cyorezo kidahoshwa, rukaba rwuzuyemo uburozi bwica!" 
James3:9 Ni rwo tuvugisha dusingiza Nyagasani n’Umubyeyi, ariko akaba ari na rwo tuvumisha abantu baremwe mu ishusho y’Imana;" 
James3:10 bityo mu munwa umwe hagasohoka umugisha n’umuvumo. Bavandimwe rero, ntibyari bikwiye kumera bityo." 
James3:11 Ese ye, isoko ishobora kuvubura mu kobo kamwe amazi aryohereye n’amazi asharira?" 
James3:12 Cyo se bavandimwe, umutini ushobora kwera imizeti, cyangwa se umuzabibu ukera imitini? Bityo n’isoko irimo umunyu ntishobora gutanga amazi anyobwa." 
James3:13 Ni nde w’umuhanga n’umunyabwenge muri mwe? Nabyerekanishe imyifatire ye myiza, ko ibikorwa bye byuzuye ituze n’ubuhanga." 
James3:14 Ariko niba mu mutima wanyu huzuyemo ishyari rikabije n’ubucabiranya, ntimukirate cyangwa ngo mubeshye muhinyura ukuri." 
James3:15 Ubwo buhanga ntibukomoka mu ijuru; ahubwo ni ubw’isi, bukaba ubw’inyamaswa n’ubwa Sekibi." 
James3:16 Koko rero, ahari ishyari n’ubucabiranya, haba umuvurungano n’ibikorwa bibi by’amoko yose." 
James3:17 Naho ubuhanga bukomoka mu ijuru, icya mbere cyo ni ubuziranenge, ni ubunyamahoro, ni ubunyarugwiro n’ubunyampuhwe, bukaba busendereye ineza kandi bukarumbuka imbuto nziza, ntibugire aho bubogamira kandi ntibugire uburyarya." 
James3:18 Imbuto y’ubutungane ibibwa mu mahoro, ku baharanira amahoro." 
James4:1 Amakimbirane akomoka he? Cyangwa se intambara muri mwe zituruka he? Aho ibyo byose ntibyaba bituruka ku byifuzo byanyu, birwanira mu myanya y’umubiri wanyu?" 
James4:2 Murararikira, ariko ntimugire icyo mutunga; muri abicanyi n’abanyeshyari, nyamara nta cyo muronka; murarwana kandi mukavurungana, ariko ntimugire icyo mugeraho, kuko mutazi gusaba." 
James4:3 Murasaba ariko ntimuronke, kuko ugusaba kwanyu nta kindi kugamije uretse gutagaguza ibyifuzo byanyu." 
James4:4 Mwa basambanyi mwe, ntimuzi se ko kuba incuti y’isi ari ukuba umwanzi w’Imana? Ushaka kuba incuti y’isi, aba abaye umwanzi w’Imana." 
James4:5 Muratekereza se ko Ibyanditswe byandikiwe ubusa, aho bigira biti «Imana ikunda cyane umwuka wayo yadushyizemo»?" 
James4:6 Nyamara, Imana iduha ingabire yisumbuyeho, kuko Ibyanditswe bigira biti «Imana yima abirasi, ariko abiyoroshya ikabagirira ubuntu.»" 
James4:7 Nimuyoboke rero Imana; mwiyime Sekibi, maze azabahungire kure." 
James4:8 Nimwegere Imana, na yo izabegera. Banyabyaha, nimusukure ibiganza byanyu; namwe bantu b’imberabyombi, musukure imitima yanyu!" 
James4:9 Nimubabazwe n’amagorwa yanyu, mujye mu cyunamo kandi murire; igitwenge cyanyu kibe amarira, n’ibyishimo byanyu bihinduke umubabaro." 
James4:10 Nimwicishe bugufi imbere ya Nyagasani, maze azabashyire ejuru." 
James4:11 Bavandimwe, ntimugasebanye bamwe ku bandi. Ushebeje cyangwa agacira umuvandimwe we urubanza, aba ashebeje kandi aciriye itegeko urubanza. Niba rero uciriye itegeko urubanza, nta bwo ukiri ukurikiza itegeko, ahubwo ugenza nk’umucamanza." 
James4:12 Kandi umucamanza n’utanga itegeko, ni umwe rukumbi: ni we ushobora kwica no gukiza. Uri nde rero, kugira ngo ucire mugenzi wawe urubanza?" 
James4:13 Nuko rero namwe abavuga muti «Uyu munsi, cyangwa ejo, tuzajya mu mugi uyu n’uyu, tuzahamare umwaka, ducuruze kandi turonke inyungu»," 
James4:14 nyamara mutazi uko ejo muzamera; kuko muri nk’ibihu bigaragara mu kanya gato, hanyuma bikayoyoka!" 
James4:15 Aho mwagize muti «Niba Nyagasani abishatse tuzabaho, kandi dukore ibi na biriya»," 
James4:16 ahubwo murirata muteganya ibintu bikomeye mutazageraho. Bene ubwo bwirasi ni bubi. 
James4:17 Bityo rero, umuntu ushobora gukora icyiza, ariko ntagikore, aba acumuye." 
James5:1 Naho mwebwe abakungu, nimurire, muboroge kubera amakuba abategereje!" 
James5:2 Ubukungu bwanyu bwaraboze, imyambaro yanyu yaramunzwe;" 
James5:3 zahabu yanyu na feza byaguye ingese, kandi iyo ngese ni yo izabashinja, ikazatwika imibiri yanyu nk’umuriro. Ngaho mwihunikiye ubukungu muri iyi minsi y’indunduro!" 
James5:4 Umushahara w’abakozi basaruye imyaka mu mirima yanyu mwarawubahuguje, none ngaha uravuza induru kandi n’imiborogo y’abo bakozi yageze mu matwi ya Nyagasani Umutegetsi w’ingabo." 
James5:5 Kuri iyi si mwibereyeho mu murengwe no mu byishimo, kandi ku munsi batotezaga intungane, ntimwaretse kugwa ivutu." 
James5:6 Mwaciriye urubanza rubi intungane, maze murayica, nyamara itabarwanyije." 
James5:7 Bavandimwe rero, nimwihangane kugeza igihe Nyagasani azazira. Nimwitegereze umuhinzi ukuntu yihangana ategereje ko ubutaka bwe bubyara umusaruro mwiza; akihangana ubutarambirwa." 
James5:8 Namwe rero nimwihangane, mwikomeze umutima, kuko isesekara rya Nyagasani riri hafi." 
James5:9 Bavandimwe, ntimukijujute bamwe ku bandi, kugira ngo mudacirwa urubanza; dore umucamanza ahagaze imbere y’umuryango." 
James5:10 Bavandimwe, ku byerekeye ububabare n’ubwiyumanganye, nimufatire urugero ku bahanuzi bavuze mu izina rya Nyagasani." 
James5:11 Dore ubu turashimira abiyumanganyije. Mwumvise inkuru y’ukwiyumanganya kwa Yobu, kandi mwabonye uko Nyagasani yamugenjereje hanyuma; kuko Nyagasani ari umugwaneza n’umunyambabazi."
