James5:12 Ariko mbere ya byose, bavandimwe, ntimukarahire ijuru cyangwa isi, cyangwa se ubundi buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose. Ahubwo mujye muvuga ngo «yego» niba ari yego, cyangwa se «oya » niba ari oya, kugira ngo mudacirwa urubanza." 
James5:13 Mbese muri mwe hari ubabaye? Nasenge. Hari uwishimye se? Naririmbe ibisingizo. 
James5:14 Mwaba se mwifitemo umurwayi? Nahamagaze abakuru ba Kiliziya bamuvugireho amasengesho bamaze kumusiga amavuta mu izina rya Nyagasani. 
James5:15 Isengesho rijyanye n’ukwemera rizakiza uwo murwayi: Nyagasani azamuzahura, kandi niba yarakoze ibyaha, abibabarirwe." 
James5:16 Nimwirege ibyaha byanyu bamwe ku bandi, kandi musabirane kugira ngo mukizwe. Isengesho ry’intungane rigira ubushobozi bwinshi." 
James5:17 Dore Eliya yari umuntu nka twe, asabana umwete kugira ngo imvura itagwa, maze koko ntiyagwa mu gihe cy’imyaka itatu n’amezi atandatu;" 
James5:18 hanyuma yongera gusaba, maze ijuru rivubura imvura, isi yera imbuto..." 
James5:19 Bavandimwe, niba muri mwe hari uwahabye, maze akitarura ukuri, hanyuma bakamugarura," 
James5:20 mumenye ko ugaruye umunyabyaha, akamukura mu nzira yari yarayobeyemo, aba akijije ubuzima bw’umunyabyaha kandi agatsemba ibyaha bitabarika." 
1Peter1:1 Jyewe Petero, intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, kuri mwebwe ntore z’Imana, mwatatanijwe nk’abagenzi n’abasuhuke mu ntara ya Ponti, mu Bugalati, muri Kapadosiya, muri Aziya no muri Bitiniya," 
1Peter1:2 mukaba ari mwebwe Imana Data yatoranije bikurikije umugambi wayo, ikabatagatifurisha Roho kugira ngo mujye mwumvira Yezu Kristu kandi musukurwe n’amaraso ye: ineza n’amahoro nibibasenderemo!" 
1Peter1:3 Nihasingizwe Imana, Se w’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, kuko yagiriye impuhwe zayo z’igisagirane maze ikaduha ubugingo bushya, kugira ngo tugire amizero ahamye dukesha izuka rya Yezu Kristu mu bapfuye," 
1Peter1:4 no kugira ngo dutunge umurage udashobora gushanguka, kwandura cyangwa guserebera, ari wo ubazigamiwe mu ijuru," 
1Peter1:5 mwebwe abo ububasha bw’Imana buragirishije ukwemera, kugeza ubwo umukiro wabateguriwe uzigaragariza mu bihe byagenwe by’imperuka." 
1Peter1:6 Nimwishime kandi munezerwe, kabone n’ubwo mukigomba mu gihe gito kubabazwa n’amagorwa y’amoko yose." 
1Peter1:7 Uko zahabu bayiyungururisha umuriro, ni na ko bya bigeragezo bigenewe gusukura ukwemera kwanyu gutambukije kure agaciro iyo zahabu y’akanya gato, kugira ngo nikumara guhama, kuzabaheshe ibisingizo, ikuzo n’icyubahiro, igihe Yezu Kristu azaba yigaragaje." 
1Peter1:8 Koko ni We mukunda mutamurora, mukamwemera mutarigeze mumubona; akaba ari na cyo gituma mwasazwe n’ibyishimo bitagira ivugiro kandi by’agatangaza," 
1Peter1:9 kuko mwashyikiriye igihembo cy’ukwemera kwanyu, ari cyo umukiro wanyu." 
1Peter1:10 Iby’uwo mukiro, abahanuzi bagerageje kubikurikirana no kubisobanuza, maze bahanura ibyerekeye ineza mwari mugiye kugirirwa n’Imana." 
1Peter1:11 Bashakashakaga uko batahura igihe n’uburyo ibyo bari bumvishijwe na Roho wa Kristu wari ubarimo bizabera, nk’ibyerekeye ububabare Kristu yagombaga kubabara, hamwe n’ikuzo rizabukurikira." 
1Peter1:12 Abo bahanuzi Imana yabahishuriye ko ubwo butumwa atari bo bwagenewe, ahubwo ko ari mwebwe bagomba kubushyikiriza, none ubu ngubu mukaba mubumenyeshejwe n’abigisha b’Inkuru Nziza bayobowe na Roho Mutagatifu woherejwe aturuka mu ijuru, ndetse n’abamalayika bifuza kuyirangamira." 
1Peter1:13 Nimuhore rero mwiteguye, mube maso kandi mushyire amiringiro yanyu yose mu ngabire muzahabwa igihe Yezu Kristu azaba yigaragaje." 
1Peter1:14 Nimube nk’abana bumvira, mureke gukurikiza irari mwari mufite kera, mukiri mu bujiji;" 
1Peter1:15 ahubwo mube intungane mu migenzereze yanyu yose, mbese nk’uko Uwabahamagaye na We ari intungane," 
1Peter1:16 kuko byanditswe ngo «Nimube intungane, kuko ndi intungane.»" 
1Peter1:17 Niba mwiyambaza Imana nk’Umubyeyi wanyu, Yo itagira aho ibogamira, kandi igacira buri muntu urubanza ikurikije ibikorwa bye, nimugendere mu gitinyiro igihe cyose muri ku isi;" 
1Peter1:18 kuko muzi y’uko atari ibintu bishanguka nka zahabu cyangwa feza byabarokoye mu migenzereze mibi mwarazwe n’abakurambere banyu; 
1Peter1:19 ahubwo ko mwarokowe n’amaraso y’agaciro gakomeye ya Kristu, nk’ay’intama itagira inenge cyangwa ubwandure." 
1Peter1:20 Kristu ni We watoranyijwe mbere y’ihangwa ry’isi, kandi agaragazwa mu bihe by’indunduro ku mpamvu yanyu." 
1Peter1:21 Ni na We mukesha kwemera Imana yamuzuye mu bapfuye kandi ikamukuza, ku buryo ukwemera kwanyu n’amizero yanyu bishingira ku Mana." 
1Peter1:22 Mwasukuwe imitima yanyu mwumvira ukuri, kugira ngo mugire urukundo rwa kivandimwe ruzira uburyarya. Nimukundane ubudatezuka n’umutima wanyu wose," 
1Peter1:23 mwebwe abavutse bundi bushya ku mbuto itari inyabushanguke, ahubwo idashanguka ku bw’ijambo nyabuzima kandi rihoraho ry’Imana." 
1Peter1:24 Kuko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Ikinyamubiri cyose ni nk’icyatsi, n’ikuzo ryacyo rikaba nk’iry’ururabyo rw’icyatsi: icyatsi kiruma, ururabyo rugahunguka;" 
1Peter1:25 ariko ijambo ry’Uhoraho rizahoraho iteka.» Iryo jambo rero ni ryo Nkuru Nziza mwamenyeshejwe. 
1Peter2:1 Nuko rero nimwitandukanye n’icyitwa ubugome n’ubuhendanyi bwose, icyitwa uburyarya, ishyari n’ubuzimuzi cyose." 
1Peter2:2 Mbese kimwe n’abana bakimara kuvuka, nimurarikire amata meza y’ijambo ry’Imana, kugira ngo igihe muryakira, mutere imbere mu gucungurwa kwanyu," 
1Peter2:3 niba koko mwarasogongeyeho mukumva ukuntu Nyagasani aryohereye. 
1Peter2:4 Nimwegere Nyagasani, ibuye nyabuzima ryajugunywe n’abantu, nyamara ari indobanure kandi rifite agaciro gakomeye mu maso y’Imana;" 
1Peter2:5 bityo namwe mube nk’amabuye mazima, mwubakwemo ingoro ndengakamere, kugira ngo mube imbaga ntagatifu y’abaherezabitambo, mwitureho ibitambo ndengakamere bishimisha Imana ku bwa Yezu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Koko Ibyanditswe bivuga ngo «Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta, ibuye ry’indobanure kandi rifite agaciro gakomeye, maze uzaryishingikirizaho wese, ntazakorwe n’ikimwaro.»" 
1Peter2:7 Mwebwe rero abemera, iryo kuzo ni iryanyu, naho ku batemera «ibuye ryajugunywe n’abubatsi ryahindutse ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta," 
1Peter2:8 ariko kandi ribabera ibuye basitaraho n’urutare batembaho.» Barisitaraho kuko banze kwemera ijambo ry’Imana, kandi ni na cyo bagenewe." 
1Peter2:9 Naho mwebwe muri ubwoko bwatoranyijwe, imbaga y’abaherezabitambo ba cyami, ihanga ritagatifu, umuryango Imana yironkeye, kugira ngo mujye mwamamaza ibigwi by’Uwabahamagaye, abavana mu mwijima, akabinjiza mu rumuri rwe rw’agatangaza," 
1Peter2:10 mwebwe abatari umuryango w’Imana kuva kera, ubu ngubu noneho mukaba mwarabaye umuryango wayo, mwebwe mutari abo kugirirwa imbabazi, ubu ngubu noneho mukaba mwarazigiriwe." 
1Peter2:11 Nkoramutima zanjye, mwebwe muri nk’abagenzi n’abanyamahanga, ndabasaba ngo mwirinde irari ry’umubiri rirwanya umutimanama." 
1Peter2:12 Nimugire imyifatire myiza imbere y’abatemera Imana nyakuri, kugira ngo n’ubwo babasebya nk’aho muri abagiranabi, bazamurikirwe n’ibikorwa byanyu, maze basingize Imana ku munsi izaziraho." 
1Peter2:13 Nimuyoboke rero ubutegetsi bwose bw’abantu ku mpamvu ya Nyagasani: yaba umwami mu mwanya we w’ikirenga," 
1Peter2:14 baba abatware batumwe na we kugira ngo bahane abagiranabi kandi bashime abakora neza; 
1Peter2:15 kuko icyo Imana ishaka ari uko mwacubya ubujiji bw’abantu b’ibiburabwenge, kubera ibikorwa byanyu byiza." 
1Peter2:16 Nimubeho nk’abantu bigenga, ariko ntimukoreshe ubwo bwigenge muhishira ubugome bwanyu, ahubwo mubeho nk’abagaragu b’Imana." 
1Peter2:17 Nimwubahe abantu bose, mukunde abavandimwe banyu, mutinye Imana kandi muhe umwami icyubahiro." 
1Peter2:18 Bagaragu, nimwubahe ba shobuja mubikuye ku mutima, atari abeza n’abagwaneza bonyine, ahubwo ndetse n’ab’indashoboka." 
1Peter2:19 Koko rero kwiyumanganya imibabaro yose ugirirwa uzira akarengane ni ingabire, iyo bigiriwe guhesha Imana ikuzo." 
1Peter2:20 Murabona byabamo kuzo nyabaki kwiyumanganya inkoni mukubitwa, niba mwakoze ikosa? Ariko niba mwiyumanganyije imibabaro mwatewe n’icyiza mwakoze, ngiyo ingabire mu maso y’Imana." 
1Peter2:21 Nuko rero, icyo ni cyo mwahamagariwe, kuko na Kristu yababaye ku mpamvu yanyu, akabasigira urugero kugira ngo mukurikize inzira ye:" 
1Peter2:22 We utigeze akora icyaha, kandi akaba atarigeze avuga ibinyoma;" 
1Peter2:23 agatukwa, ariko ntasubize igitutsi, mu bubabare bwe ntagire uwo akangara, ahubwo akiragiza umucamanza w’intabera;" 
1Peter2:24 We wajyanye ibyaha byacu mu mubiri we bwite ku musaraba, kugira ngo nitumara gupfa ku byaha, tubeho mu butungane. Ni We nyir’ibikomere byabakijije." 
1Peter2:25 Koko rero, mwari mumeze nk’intama zatatanye, none ubu ngubu mwagarukiye umushumba n’umurinzi wanyu." 
1Peter3:1 Namwe bagore ni uko; nimwumvire abagabo banyu, kugira ngo n’aho bamwe muri bo baba bataremera Ijambo ry’Imana, babashe guhinduka ari nta cyo umuntu ababwiye, ahubwo babitewe n’imigenzereze myiza y’abagore babo," 
1Peter3:2 bamaze kwitegereza imigenzereze yanyu myiza kandi ishyira mu gaciro. 
1Peter3:3 Imirimbire yanyu ntikabe iy’inyuma: imisatsi iboshye, impeta za zahabu cyangwa imyenda y’akarusho;" 
1Peter3:4 ahubwo imirimbire yanyu ibe iy’imbere mu mutima, imirimbire idashanguka y’umutima utuje kandi ukagwa neza, ufite agaciro kanini mu maso y’Imana." 
1Peter3:5 Ngiyo imirimbire y’abagore b’intungane babayeho kera bizera Imana kandi bakumvira abagabo babo: 
1Peter3:6 twavuga nka Sara wumviraga Abrahamu akamwita umutegetsi. Namwe muri abakobwa be igihe cyose muba mukora icyiza, mudatinya igikangisho icyo ari cyo cyose." 
1Peter3:7 Namwe bagabo ni uko; imibereho yanyu nimuyisangire n’abagore banyu, mukurikije ko imimerere yabo idakomeye nk’iyanyu; mubahe icyubahiro, kuko bagomba kuzasangira namwe umurage w’ingabire y’ubugingo, kugira ngo hatagira icyabera inkomyi amasengesho yanyu." 
1Peter3:8 Ahasigaye, nimutekereze ibihuje, mugirirane impuhwe, mukundane urwa kivandimwe, mube abanyambabazi kandi mwicishe bugufi." 
1Peter3:9 Ntimukiture undi inabi yabagiriye, cyangwa ngo nabatuka mumusubize; ahubwo mwifurizanye umugisha, kuko ari cyo mwahamagariwe, kugira ngo muzahabwe umugisha ho umurage." 
1Peter3:10 Koko rero, «Ushaka gukunda ubuzima no kubona iminsi mihire, agomba kurinda ururimi rwe kuvuga ikibi, n’umunwa we ntuvuge amagambo y’ibinyoma." 
1Peter3:11 Nazibukire ikibi, akore icyiza; nashakashake amahoro, ayaharanire." 
1Peter3:12 Kuko Nyagasani ahoza amaso ku bantu b’intungane, agatega amatwi amasengesho yabo, ariko akima uruhanga rwe abakora ikibi.»" 
1Peter3:13 Ni nde uzabagirira nabi niba mushishikariye gukora icyiza? 
1Peter3:14 N’iyo kandi mwagira icyo mubabazwaho ku mpamvu y’ubutungane, mwaba mugize amahirwe. Ntimugatinye ababatoteza, ngo muhagarike umutima;" 
1Peter3:15 ahubwo nimwubahe Kristu mu mitima yanyu, kuko ari We Nyagasani. Nimuhore mwiteguye guha igisubizo umuntu wese uzagira icyo ababaza ku byerekeye ukwizera kwanyu." 
1Peter3:16 Nyamara ariko, mujye mubikorana ubugwaneza n’icyubahiro kandi mufite umutima utaryarya, kugira ngo nibanababeshyera, abasebya imigenzereze yanyu muri Kristu bazakorwe n’ikimwaro." 
1Peter3:17 Koko rero, icyaruta ni ukubabazwa mukora neza, niba ari ko Imana ibishaka, aho kubabazwa mukora nabi." 
1Peter3:18 Koko rero, Kristu ubwe yapfuye rimwe rizima azize ibyaha by’abantu; bityo, nubwo ari intungane, apfira abagome kugira ngo abayobore ku Mana, abanje gupfa ku bw’umubiri, hanyuma agasubizwa ubuzima ku bwa Roho." 
1Peter3:19 Nuko ajya kwigisha ndetse n’abari bafungiye mu buroko bw’Ikuzimu," 
1Peter3:20 ba bandi bigomekaga ku Mana kera, mu gihe Yo yihanganaga birebire, kugeza kuri ya minsi Nowa yubakaga ubwato, ari bwo bwinjiwemo n’abantu bake, bagera ku munani, maze bagakizwa n’amazi." 
1Peter3:21 Ayo mazi yagenuraga batisimu ibakiza ubu ngubu: ariko atari iyuhagira ubwandure bw’umubiri, ahubwo ya yindi ibaha kugana Imana mufite umutima utunganye, ikabakirisha izuka rya Yezu Kristu," 
1Peter3:22 wazamutse mu ijuru, none akaba ari iburyo bw’Imana, akayobokwa n’Abamalayika, Abanyabutegetsi n’Abanyabubasha." 
1Peter4:1 Nuko rero, ubwo Kristu yababaye mu mubiri, icyo gitekerezo abe ari cyo namwe mwishingikirizaho; kuko uwababaye mu mubiri, aba atandukanye n’icyaha" 
1Peter4:2 kugira ngo abeho adakurikije irari ry’abantu, ahubwo agakora icyo Imana ishaka, igihe cyose ashigaje kubaho mu mubiri." 
1Peter4:3 Koko rero, igihe cyahise cyari kibahagije kugira ngo mukore ibyo abatemera Kristu bifuza, mubeho mu ngeso mbi, mu byifuzo bibi, mu businzi, mu irari ryo kurya no kunywa no mu mihango igayitse y’ibigirwamana." 
1Peter4:4 Bityo, batangazwa no kubona mutakirukanka nka bo inyuma y’izo ngeso mbi zose, maze bakabatuka." 
1Peter4:5 Nyamara bazabyibarizwa n’Imana, Yo yiteguye gucira imanza abazima n’abapfuye." 
1Peter4:6 Ni cyo cyatumye Inkuru Nziza yamamazwa ndetse no mu bapfuye, kugira ngo nibamara gucirwa urubanza rw’abantu ku mubiri, bazashobore kubana n’Imana babikesheje Roho Mutagatifu." 
1Peter4:7 Nyamara iherezo rya byose riregereje. Murabe rero abashishozi n’abizige, kugira ngo muhugukire gusenga." 
1Peter4:8 Mbere ya byose ariko, mugirirane iteka urukundo nyarwo, kuko urukundo rubabarira ibyaha bitabarika." 
1Peter4:9 Mujye mucumbikirana mu ngo zanyu nta kwinuba," 
1Peter4:10 mufashanye buri wese akurikije ingabire yahawe, mbese mube nk’abagabuzi beza b’ingabire zinyuranye z’Imana." 
1Peter4:11 Nihagira uterura kuvuga, abigire nk’aho yigisha amagambo y’Imana; nihagira ukora umurimo uyu n’uyu, bibe nk’aho akoreshwa n’imbaraga ahawe n’Imana, kugira ngo Imana isingizwe ku buryo bwuzuye, ku bwa Yezu Kristu, We ukwiriye ikuzo n’ububasha uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka. Amen!" 
1Peter4:12 Nkoramutima zanjye, ntimutangazwe no kuba muri mu muriro w’amagorwa, nk’aho ari ikintu kidasanzwe kibagwiririye," 
1Peter4:13 ahubwo mwishimire uruhare mufite ku bubabare bwa Kristu, kugira ngo muzasabagizwe n’ibyishimo igihe ikuzo rye rizisesurira." 
1Peter4:14 Muzishime nibabatuka babaziza izina rya Kristu, kuko Roho nyir’ikuzo, ari na we Roho w’Imana, azaba ari kumwe namwe." 
1Peter4:15 Ntihakagire n’umwe muri mwe uhorwa ko ari umwicanyi, umujura cyangwa umugiranabi, cyangwa se ngo azire ko yivanze mu by’abandi." 
1Peter4:16 Nihagira uhorwa ko ari umukristu, ntibikamutere isoni, ahubwo ajye akuza Imana ku mpamvu y’iryo zina." 
1Peter4:17 Koko igihe kirageze cy’uko urubanza rutangira, kandi rugahera ku muryango w’Imana. Ruramutse se ari twe rutangiriyeho, amaherezo yazaba ayahe ku banze kwemera Inkuru Nziza y’Imana?" 
1Peter4:18 Niba se byaranditswe ngo «Intungane ikizwa biruhanyije», hazacura iki ku mugome n’umunyabyaha?" 
1Peter4:19 Bityo rero, abababara bazira ugushaka kw’Imana, nibaragize amagara yabo Umuremyi w’indahemuka, bakomeza gukora ibyiza." 
1Peter5:1 Noneho rero, ndinginga abakuru b’ikoraniro bari muri mwe, nkabigira ari uko nanjye ndi umukuru kimwe na bo, n’umuhamya w’ububabare bwa Kristu, nkaba mfite n’uruhare ku ikuzo rigiye kugaragazwa." 
1Peter5:2 Nimukenure ubushyo bw’Imana mwaragijwe, mutabikoreshejwe n’agahato, ahubwo mubigiranye ubwende, nk’uko Imana ibishaka; mukabyemera atari ukwishakira amaronko, ahubwo ari ukugira ngo mwitangire abandi." 
1Peter5:3 Ntimugategekeshe igitugu abo mushinzwe kuragira, ahubwo nimubere ubwo bushyo urugero rwiza;" 
1Peter5:4 maze igihe Umushumba mukuru azigaragariza, muzahabwe ikamba ridashanguka ry’ikuzo." 
1Peter5:5 Namwe basore ni uko; nimwumvire abakuru b’ikoraniro; mwese murangwe n’ukwiyoroshya, kugira ngo mushobore gufashanya kivandimwe, kuko byanditswe ngo «Imana irwanya abikuza, ariko abiyoroshya ikabagirira ubuntu.»" 
1Peter5:6 Nimwicishe bugufi rero mu nsi y’ukuboko kw’Imana kwuje ububasha; kugira ngo igihe nikigera, izabashyire ejuru." 
1Peter5:7 Mujye muyitura imiruho yanyu kuko ibitaho. 
1Peter5:8 Murabe maso, mumenye kwiramira, kuko umwanzi wanyu Sekibi ariho azerera nk’intare itontoma, ashaka uwo yaconshomera." 
1Peter5:9 Nimukomere mu kwemera, muyinanire, muzirikana ko n’abavandimwe banyu bari ahandi ku isi bafite na bo bene iyo mibabaro." 
1Peter5:10 Nyamara nimumara kubabazwa igihe kigufiya, Imana nyir’ubuntu bwose, Yo yabahamagariye ikuzo rihoraho muri Kristu, izabasubiza imbaraga, ibatere inkunga, ibakomeze kandi ibagire indatsimburwa." 
1Peter5:11 Niharirwe ububasha, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka. Amen!" 
1Peter5:12 Mbandikiye muri make, nifashishije Silivani mbonamo umuvandimwe w’indahemuka, kugira ngo mbashishikaze kandi mbemeze ko ari ingabire nyakuri y’Imana mwihambiriyeho." 
1Peter5:13 Imbaga y’abatowe iri i Babiloni irabaramutsa, kimwe na Mariko umwana wanjye." 
1Peter5:14 Nimuramukanye mu muhoberano wa kivandimwe. Abari muri Kristu mwese, nimugire amahoro!" 
2Peter1:1 Jyewe Simoni Petero, umugaragu n’intumwa ya Yezu Kristu, ku bahawe ukwemera gukomeye nk’ukwacu, babikesheje ubuntu bw’Imana yacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu:" 
2Peter1:2 nimusenderezwe ineza n’amahoro, mubikesheje kuba mwaramenye Imana na Yezu Umwami wacu." 
2Peter1:3 Koko ni We watugabiye mu bubasha bwe bwahebuje ibyo twagombaga byose byerekeye ubugingo n’ubusabaniramana, igihe atumenyesheje Uwaduhamagarishije ikuzo rye n’imbaraga ze bwite." 
2Peter1:4 Bityo duhabwa ibyiza by’igiciro gihanitse twasezeranyijwe, kugira ngo mwinjire muri kamere y’Imana, mumaze kwitandukanya n’ubwononekare bwazanywe mu nsi n’irari." 
2Peter1:5 Kubera iyo mpamvu nyine, nimushyireho imbaraga zanyu zose kugira ngo ukwemera kwanyu mukongereho imigenzo myiza, imigenzo myiza muyongereho ubumenyi," 
2Peter1:6 ubumenyi mubwongereho ubwizige, ubwizige mubwongereho ubudacogora, ubudacogora mubwongereho ubusabaniramana," 
2Peter1:7 ubusabaniramana mubwongereho umubano wa kivandimwe, umubano wa kivandimwe muwongereho urukundo." 
2Peter1:8 Kuko ibyo nibibarumbukamo, bitazasiga muri abanebwe cyangwa nta cyo mwungutse mu byerekeye kumenya Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Naho ubundi, umuntu ubuze ibyo ngibyo, ameze nk’impumyi ihunyeza, akibagirwa ko yahanaguweho ibyaha bye bya kera." 
2Peter1:10 Ni cyo gituma rero, bavandimwe, mugomba kwiyongeramo imbaraga kugira ngo mukomere ku ihamagarwa ryanyu n’ubutore bwanyu; nimubigenza mutyo, nta bwo muzigera mugwa bibaho." 
2Peter1:11 Bityo rero, mukazakiranwa urugwiro mu Ngoma ihoraho y’Umwami wacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu." 
2Peter1:12 Nanone kandi, mpora mbibibutsa n’ubwo nyine mubizi neza kandi mukaba mukomeye muri uko kuri." 
2Peter1:13 Nyamara ndatekereza ko igihe nkiri hano ku isi ngomba kubakangurisha inyigisho zanjye," 
2Peter1:14 kuko nzi neza yuko igihe cyanjye cyo gupfa cyegereje, nk’uko Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu yabimenyesheje." 
2Peter1:15 Nyamara ariko, nzashyiraho umwete kugira ngo na nyuma y’urupfu rwanjye, muzashobore guhora muzirikana izo nyigisho." 
2Peter1:16 Koko rero, nta bwo ari imigani yahimbwe n’ubwenge twakoresheje kugira ngo tubamenyeshe ububasha n’ukuza by’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, ahubwo twaramwiboneye n’amaso yacu, yisesuyeho ikuzo." 
2Peter1:17 Kuko Imana Data yamuhaye icyubahiro n’ikuzo, igihe ijwi ry’agatangaza ry’Imana rigize riti «Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda cyane, unyizihira.»" 
2Peter1:18 Natwe ubwacu iryo jwi twararyiyumviye rituruka mu ijuru, igihe twari kumwe na We ku musozi mutagatifu." 
2Peter1:19 Ikindi kandi kiruseho, twishingikirije ku ijambo rikomeye ry’abahanuzi; mukaba rero mukora neza iyo murirangamira, nk’itara rimurika ahantu h’umwijima, kugeza ubwo hatangira gucya, n’inyenyeri y’urukerera ikarasira mu mitima yanyu." 
2Peter1:20 Mbere ya byose ariko, mumenye neza ko nta muntu ushobora ku bwe kwisobanurira ubuhanuzi na buke buri mu Byanditswe," 
2Peter1:21 kuko nta buhanuzi nyakuri bwigeze buva ku bushake bwa muntu, ahubwo abavuze batyo ni abantu bayobowe na Roho Mutagatifu, batumwe n’Imana." 
2Peter2:1 Uko habayeho abahanurabinyoma mu muryango wa Israheli, ni na ko muri mwe hazaduka abigishabinyoma bazana rwihishwa inyigisho zitera amakimbirane, bigeza n’aho bihakana Umutware wabacunguye, bityo ntibazatinde kwikururira ubucibwe." 
2Peter2:2 Hari benshi kandi bazabakurikira muri ubwo buyobe bwabo, maze batume inzira y’ukuri isuzugurika." 
2Peter2:3 Ubugugu bwabo buzabatera kubashakaho inyungu, babarye imitsi, babashukisha akarimi keza. Nyamara kuva kera urubanza rwabo rwaraciwe, n’ubucibwe bwabo ntiburi kure." 
2Peter2:4 Koko rero, Imana ntiyababariye abamalayika bacumuye, ahubwo yaraboretse, ibagabiza umwijima wo mu nyenga y’ikuzimu, kugira ngo bategereze gucirwa urubanza." 
2Peter2:5 Nta n’ubwo yababariye isi ya kera, ahubwo yazanye umwuzure urenga ku isi y’abagome, ariko yizigamira Nowa, umwe muri ba bandi munani barokotse, kuko yamamazaga iby’ubutungane." 
2Peter2:6 Hanyuma itsemba imigi ya Sodoma na Gomora, iyihindura ivu, kugira ngo bibere urugero abagome bo mu bihe byakurikiyeho." 
2Peter2:7 Irongera irokora intungane Loti, wari washavujwe n’imibereho y’abo bagome b’ibyomanzi;" 
2Peter2:8 kuko iyo ntungane yari ituye rwagati muri bo, igahora ibabona kandi ikabumva, maze uko bukeye umutima we uharanira ubutungane ugahora ubabaye cyane, kubera ibikorwa byabo biteye ishozi." 
2Peter2:9 None rero, Nyagasani ashobora kuvana mu magorwa abamuyobotse, naho abagome akabarindiriza umunsi w’urubanza kugira ngo bahanwe:" 
2Peter2:10 abo aheraho mbere na mbere, ni abatwarwa n’irari ribi ry’umubiri, maze bagahinyura ubutegetsi bw’Imana. Abo biyemera, bagashira isoni, ntibatinya no gutuka Abakujijwe;" 
2Peter2:11 nyamara abamalayika n’ubwo basumbya abo Bakujijwe imbaraga n’ububasha, ntibahangara kubatuka bene ako kageni mu maso ya Nyagasani." 
2Peter2:12 Ariko abo bantu, bakoreshwa na kamere yabo nk’inyamaswa zitagira ubwenge, zivukira gufatwa mu mutego no kubora, bagatuka ibyo batazi, bazabora nk’izo nyamaswa nyine;" 
2Peter2:13 bazaronke batyo igihembo cy’ubugome bwabo. Bishimira kwiyandarika ku mugaragaro; ni abantu buje ingeso mbi n’imyanda, bagahimbazwa no kubariganya ndetse n’igihe baba bamaze kurengwa basangira namwe." 
2Peter2:14 Amaso yabo yatwawe n’ubusambanyi gusa, ntibahage ibyaha; bagashukashuka bene imitima idafashe; bakaba aba mbere mu kurarikira ibibi, bityo bakaba ibyohe." 
2Peter2:15 Bitaruye inzira iboneye, bayoba bakurikira inzira ya Balamu mwene Bewori wemeye gushukwa n’igihembo cy’ubugome," 
2Peter2:16 ariko uwo muhanuzi aza guhanirwa ukutumvira kwe, igihe indogobe ye, yo nyamaswa idashobora kuvuga, ivuze nk’umuntu ikaburizamo ubusazi bwe." 
2Peter2:17 Abo bantu ni nk’amariba atagira amazi, cyangwa ibicu bihuherwa n’umuyaga; bakaba bazigamiwe umwanya mu mwijima w’icuraburindi." 
2Peter2:18 Koko rero, bungikanya ibigambo bitagira shinge na rugero, maze ibyifuzo bibi by’umubiri bigatuma bashukashuka abari bakimara kwitandukanya n’abantu bakiri mu mafuti." 
2Peter2:19 Babasezeranya ubwigenge kandi na bo ubwabo ari abacakara b’ingeso mbi, kuko buri muntu ari umucakara w’icyamutsinze." 
2Peter2:20 Abigobotoye ubwandure bw’isi babikesheje kumenya Umwami wacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu, iyo bwongeye kubapfukirana no kubategeka, imibereho yabo ya nyuma irusha iya mbere kuba umwaku;" 
2Peter2:21 byajyaga kurutaho kuri bo iyo batamenya inzira y’ubutungane, aho guhita birengagiza itegeko ritagatifu bamenyeshejwe." 
2Peter2:22 Ibyababayeho bihuje mu by’ukuri n’uyu mugani ugira uti «Imbwa yasubiye ku birutsi byayo». cyangwa ngo «Ingurube ikimara kwiyuhagira yongeye kwivuruguta mu isayo.» 
2Peter3:1 Nkoramutima zanjye, iyi baruwa ni iya kabiri mbandikiye. Muri ayo mabaruwa yombi nashatse kubibutsa bimwe na bimwe, kugira ngo murusheho gutekereza ku buryo buboneye." 
2Peter3:2 Nimwibuke amagambo yavuzwe kera n’abahanuzi batagatifu, mwibuke n’amabwiriza mwahawe n’intumwa zaboherejweho, ziyakomora kuri Nyagasani n’Umukiza." 
2Peter3:3 Mbere na mbere, mumenye ko mu minsi ya nyuma hazaduka abaneguranyi batagira icyo bemera, bakurikira gusa irari ryabo bwite," 
2Peter3:4 maze bakazabakwena bagira bati «Mbese isezerano ry’uko azaza ryaba rigeze he? Kuko kuva igihe ababyeyi bacu bapfiriye, byose bikomeza kuba uko byari bimeze mu ntangiriro y’iremwa ry’isi.»" 
2Peter3:5 Iyo bavuga batyo, baba birengagiza ko kera cyane higeze kubaho ijuru hamwe n’isi yakuwe mu mazi, ariko ikagumya gufatana n’ayo mazi ku bw’Ijambo ry’Imana," 
2Peter3:6 akaba ari na cyo cyatumye isi ya kera irengwaho n’amazi, ikarimbuka." 
2Peter3:7 Naho ku byerekeye ijuru n’isi biriho ubu ngubu, iryo Jambo nyine ribizigamiye umuriro, bikaba birindiriye umunsi w’urubanza n’uw’ukurimbuka kw’abagomeramana." 
2Peter3:8 Nyamara rero, nkoramutima zanjye, hari ikintu mutagomba kwibagirwa: ni uko kuri Nyagasani umunsi umwe ari nk’imyaka igihumbi, n’imyaka igihumbi ikaba nk’umunsi umwe." 
2Peter3:9 None rero, Nyagasani ntatinze kurangiza isezerano rye, nk’uko bamwe biha kuvuga ko yatinze; mu by’ukuri ni mwebwe yihanganira, kuko adashaka ko hagira n’umwe worama, ahubwo ko bose bisubiraho, bakamugarukira." 
2Peter3:10 Umunsi wa Nyagasani uzaza nk’umujura; uwo munsi ijuru rizazimirana n’urusaku rukaze, ibiririmo byose bizakongokeshwe n’umuriro; maze isi n’ibiyiriho byose bizagurumane." 
2Peter3:11 Ubwo rero ibyo byose bigomba kurimbuka kuri ubwo buryo, nimwumve uko imyifatire yanyu igomba kumera. Nimurangwe n’imigenzereze itunganye, mwubahe Imana," 
2Peter3:12 mwebwe abategereje kandi mugashaka gutebutsa umunsi w’Imana, umunsi uzatuma ijuru rizimira rigakongokeshwa n’umuriro, n’ibiririmo byose bikazayoka." 
2Peter3:13 Ariko nk’uko Imana yabisezeranye, dutegereje ijuru rishya n’isi nshya, aho ubutungane buzatura." 
2Peter3:14 Ni yo mpamvu, nkoramutima zanjye, mu gihe mugitegereje ibyo, mugomba gukora uko mushoboye kose kugira ngo Nyagasani azabasange mu mahoro, muri abaziranenge n’inyangamugayo." 
2Peter3:15 Kandi mumenye ko Nyagasani akomeza kubihanganira agira ngo abakize, nk’uko na Pawulo, umuvandimwe wacu dukunda, yabibandikiye akurikije ubushishozi yahawe." 
2Peter3:16 Ni na cyo avuga mu mabaruwa ye yose, aho asiganura ibyo: icyakora harimo bimwe biruhije kumvikana, ugasanga abantu b’abaswa n’injiji babitwara uko bitari, nk’uko babigenza no ku Byanditswe bindi, bityo bakikururira ubucibwe." 
2Peter3:17 Nuko rero, nkoramutima zanjye, dore mwe muraburiwe: muramenye, hato mutazashukwa n’abagomeramana biyobeje, maze mugateshuka ku mizero yanyu." 
2Peter3:18 Ahubwo nimukomeze kujya mbere mu ngabire n’ubumenyi by’Umwami wacu n’Umukiza wacu Yezu Kristu. Nahabwe ikuzo ubu ngubu n’iteka ryose. Amen! 
1John1:1 Ibyariho kuva mu ntangiriro n’ibyo twiyumviye kuri Jambo Nyir’ubugingo, ibimwerekeyeho twiboneye n’amaso yacu, tukabyitegereza, tukabikorakoza ibiganza byacu, ni byo namwe tubamenyesha." 
1John1:1 Ibyariho kuva mu ntangiriro n’ibyo twiyumviye kuri Jambo Nyir’ubugingo, ibimwerekeyeho twiboneye n’amaso yacu, tukabyitegereza, tukabikorakoza ibiganza byacu, ni byo namwe tubamenyesha." 
1John1:2 Koko, Ubugingo bwarigaragaje maze turabwibonera; none turahamya kandi tukabamenyesha ubwo Bugingo buzahoraho iteka, bwari kumwe n’Imana kandi bukatwigaragariza." 
1John1:2 Koko, Ubugingo bwarigaragaje maze turabwibonera; none turahamya kandi tukabamenyesha ubwo Bugingo buzahoraho iteka, bwari kumwe n’Imana kandi bukatwigaragariza." 
1John1:3 Nuko rero, ibyo twiboneye kandi tukabyumva, turabibamenyesheje, kugira ngo namwe mwunge ubumwe natwe, maze twese twunge ubumwe n’Imana Data, hamwe n’Umwana wayo Yezu Kristu." 
1John1:3 Nuko rero, ibyo twiboneye kandi tukabyumva, turabibamenyesheje, kugira ngo namwe mwunge ubumwe natwe, maze twese twunge ubumwe n’Imana Data, hamwe n’Umwana wayo Yezu Kristu." 
1John1:4 Kandi ibyo tubibandikiye kugira ngo ibyishimo byacu bisendere. 
1John1:4 Kandi ibyo tubibandikiye kugira ngo ibyishimo byacu bisendere. 
1John1:5 Dore rero ubutumwa twamwumvanye, ari na bwo tubasohojeho: Imana ni urumuri, kandi muri Yo ntiharangwa umwijima na busa." 
1John1:5 Dore rero ubutumwa twamwumvanye, ari na bwo tubasohojeho: Imana ni urumuri, kandi muri Yo ntiharangwa umwijima na busa." 
1John1:6 Niba tuvuze tuti «Twunze ubumwe na Yo», nyamara tukagendera mu mwijima, tuba tubeshye, nta bwo tuba dukora ibihuje n’ukuri."
