Jude1:1 Jyewe Yuda, umugaragu wa Yezu Kristu n’umuvandimwe wa Yakobo, ku bahamagawe kandi bakunzwe n’Imana, bakarindwa na Yezu Kristu:" 
Jude1:2 nimusenderezwe impuhwe, n’amahoro n’urukundo." 
Jude1:3 Nkoramutima zanjye, nifuje cyane kubandikira ku byerekeye ugucungurwa twese dusangiye; none nsanze ari ngombwa kubikora, kugira ngo mbashishikarize kurwanira ukwemera kwashyikirijwe burundu abatagatifujwe." 
Jude1:4 Koko, mwasesewemo n’abantu banditsweho ubucibwe kuva kera kose; ni abagomeramana bahindanya ineza y’Imana, bakigira ibyomanzi, kandi bakihakana Umutegetsi wacu umwe rukumbi, Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
Jude1:5 N’ubwo rero muzi byose ku buryobudasubirwaho, ndashaka kubibutsa ko Uhoraho amaze kugobotora umuryango we mu gihugu cya Misiri, yatsembye abari banze kwemera." 
Jude1:6 Nimwibuke kandi ko abamalayika bitesheje agaciro, bakikura mu cyicaro cyabo, maze Imana ikababohera mu mwijima ubuziraherezo, kugira ngo bahategerereze Umunsi ukomeye w’urubanza." 
Jude1:7 Naho abaturage ba Sodoma na Gomora, n’abo mu migi iyikikije, bohotse kuri ubwo buryo mu busambanyi kandi bakishimisha ku yindi mibiri itaberanye n’umuntu, bahanishwa igihano cy’umuriro w’iteka, cyabaye akarorero ku bantu bose." 
Jude1:8 Ni kuri ubwo buryo abo bantu na bo, mu busazi bwabo, bahindanya umubiri wabo, bagasuzugura Ubutegetsi bw’Imana kandi bagatuka Abakujijwe." 
Jude1:9 Nyamara n’igihe Mikayeli, umumalayika mukuru, agiye impaka na Sekibi, basigana ku byerekeye umurambo wa Musa, ntiyatinyutse no guhingutsa igitutsi ngo atuke Sekibi, ahubwo yaravuze ati «Imana izaguhane.»" 
Jude1:10 Nyamara abo bantu bo, icyo batazi baragituka; n’ibyo bazi kandi ku buryo bw’inyamaswa itazi ubwenge, nta kindi bibamarira usibye kuboreka." 
Jude1:11 Bariyimbire, kuko bakurikiye inzira ya Kayini; inyungu ikabashuka, bakagwa mu buyobe bwa Balamu, kandi bakarimbuka kuko bivumbagatanyije nka Kore." 
Jude1:12 Abo ni bo banduz isangira ryanyu rya kivandimwe, igihe bakora iminsi mikuru kandi bauzuza inda zabo nta soni bafite. Ni nk’ibicu bitagira amazi bihuherwa n’umuyaga, bakamera nk’ibiti bitagira imbuto kandi ari igihe cy’umwero, ibiti byarandutse kandi byumiranye." 
Jude1:13 Bameze nk’imihengeri gica yo mu nyanja, ivundereza ifuro ry’ibikorwa byabo biteye isoni; bameze nk’inyenyeri zangara, zateganyirijwe iteka ryose umwanya wazo mu mwijima w’icuraburindi." 
Jude1:14 Abo ni bo kandi umukurambere Henoki, uwa karindwi kuva kuri Adamu, yahanuye, akavuga ibiberekeyeho agira ati «Dore Nyagasani agiye kuza hamwe n’ingaba ze ntagatifu," 
Jude1:15 kugira ngo acire abantu bose urubanza, maze ahane abagomeramana base abaziza ibikorwa byabo bibi, n’amagambo agayitse abanyabyaha batiyubaha bavuze, barwaya Imana.»" 
Jude1:16 Ni abo ngaba rero! Ni abantu bijimye, bahora bijujuta; bakabaho bakurikije irari ryabo bwite, bakavuga amagambo y’ubwirasi kandi bagacacura abantu babigirira gusa kuronka inyungu yabo." 
Jude1:17 Naho rero mwebwe, nkoramutima zanjye, nimwibuke amagambo mwabwiwe kera n’intumwa z’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu." 
Jude1:18 Barababwiye bati «Mu bihe bya nyuma hazaduka abantu b’abaneguranyi bazabaho bakurikije ingeso mbi z’ubugomeramana.» 
Jude1:19 Ni abo ngaba rero! Ni bo bazana ubushyamirane, bakagira ibitekerezo by’isi, ntibagire muri bo Roho Mutagatifu." 
Jude1:20 Mwebweho rero, nkoramutima zanjye, nimushinge imizi mu kwemera kwanyu gutagatifu rwose; musengere muri Roho Mutagatifu;" 
Jude1:21 mwikomeze mu rukondo rw’Imana; mushingire amizero yanyu ku mpuhwe z’Umwami wacu Yezu Kristu, kugira ngo muronke ubugingo buhoraho." 
Jude1:22 Nimugirire impuhwe abagishidikanya; 
Jude1:23 mubakize mubakura mu muriro; abandi na bo mubagirire impuhwe ariko zivanze n’ubwoba, mwange n’imyambaro yandujwe n’imibiri yabo." 
Jude1:24 Imana imwe rukumbi n’Umukiza wacu, ibarinde icyabagusha icyo ari cyo cyose, ibahingutse mu byishimo muri abaziranenge imbere y’ikuzo ryaro," 
Jude1:25 ku bwa Yezu Kristu Umwami wacu. Naharirwe ikuzo n’ubuhangange, ubutegetsi n’ububasha, kuva mu ntangiriro y’ibihe byose byahise, kugeza ubu n’iteka ryose. Amen!" 
Revelation1:1 Ibyahishuwe na Yezu Kristu: Imana yarabimuhaye, kugira ngo yereke abagaragu bayo ibigomba kuba bidatinze. Nuko yohereza umumalayika wayo, ngo abimenyeshe Yohani, umugaragu wayo," 
Revelation1:2 ari na we wahamije ko ibyo yabonye byose ari ijambo ry’Imana n’ubuhamya bwa Yezu Kristu. 
Revelation1:3 Arahirwa usoma kimwe n’abatega amatwi amagambo y’ubu buhanuzi bagakurikiza ibyanditswemo, kuko igihe cyegereje." 
Revelation1:4 Jyewe Yohani, kuri za Kiliziya ndwi zo muri Aziya: nimugire ineza n’amahoro bituruka kuri wa Wundi uriho, uwahozeho kandi ugiye kuza, bigaturuka no kuri roho ndwi zihagaze imbere y’intebe ye y’ubwami," 
Revelation1:5 no kuri Yezu Kristu, umuhamya w’indahemuka, umuvukambere mu bapfuye, n’umugenga w’abami bo ku isi. Koko, Kristu aradukunda; yadukijije ibyaha akoresheje amaraso ye," 
Revelation1:6 maze atugira ihanga rya cyami n’abaherezabitambo, kugira ngo dukorere Imana Se. Naharirwe rero ikuzo n’ububasha, uko ibihe bihora bisimburana iteka! Amen!" 
Revelation1:7 Nguyu araje rwagati mu bicu, maze icyitwa ijisho cyose kizamubone, ndetse n’abamuhinguranyije: imiryango yose y’isi izajya mu cyunamo ku mpamvu ye. Ni byo koko! Amen!" 
Revelation1:8 Ni jyewe Alufa na Omega, Intangiriro n’Iherezo, — uwo ni Nyagasani Imana ubivuga — Uriho, Uwahozeho kandi Ugiye kuza, Umushoborabyose." 
Revelation1:9 Jyewe Yohani, umuvandimwe wanyu na mugenzi wanyu musangiye amagorwa, ubwami n’ubwiyumanganye muri Yezu, nari ndi mu kirwa cya Patimosi ku mpamvu y’ijambo ry’Imana, n’iy’ubuhamya bwa Yezu." 
Revelation1:10 Nuko ku munsi wa Nyagasani ntwarwa na Roho w’Imana, maze numva inyuma yanjye ijwi riranguruye nk’iry’akarumbeti, rigira riti" 
Revelation1:11 «Ibyo ubona, ubyandike mu gitabo, maze ubyoherereze izi Kiliziya uko ari ndwi: iya Efezi, iya Simirina, iya Perigamo, iya Tiyatira, iya Saridi, iya Filadelifi n’iya Lawodiseya.»" 
Revelation1:12 Ubwo ndahindukira, kugira ngo ndebe iryo jwi ryamvugishaga, maze nkebutse mbona amatara arindwi ya zahabu," 
Revelation1:13 kandi mbona rwagati muri ayo matara, umeze nk’Umwana w’umuntu. Yari yambaye ikanzu ndende, akindikije umukandara wa zahabu;" 
Revelation1:14 naho umutwe we n’imisatsi ye byereranaga nk’ubwoya bw’intama y’umweru, mbese nk’urubura, n’amaso ye arabya nk’umuriro ugurumana." 
Revelation1:15 Ibirenge bye byasaga n’umuringa w’agaciro gakomeye, watunganyirijwe mu ruganda, naho ijwi rye ari nk’inyanja isuma." 
Revelation1:16 Mu kiganza cy’iburyo afashe inyenyeri ndwi, mu kanwa ke hagasohoka inkota ityaje amugi yombi. Uruhanga rwe rwarabengeranaga, boshye izuba ry’amanywa y’ihangu." 
Revelation1:17 Ngo mukubite amaso, ngwa ku birenge bye nk’uwapfuye, ariko anshyiraho ikiganza cy’iburyo, avuga ati «Witinya, ni jye Uwibanze n’Uwimperuka" 
Revelation1:18 kandi n’Uriho; narapfuye none dore ndi muzima uko ibihe bihora bisimburana iteka, mfite imfunguzo z’urupfu n’iz’Ikuzimu." 
Revelation1:19 None rero, andika ibyo wabonye, ibiriho n’ibigomba kuzaba hanyuma." 
Revelation1:20 Naho ku byerekeye inyenyeri ndwi wabonye mu kiganza cyanjye cy’iburyo, n’amatara arindwi ya zahabu, dore icyo bisobanura: inyenyeri ndwi ni abamalayika ba Kiliziya ndwi, naho amatara arindwi akaba nyine izo Kiliziya uko ari indwi." 
Revelation2:1 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya ya Efezi, uti «Ufashe inyenyeri ndwi mu kiganza cy’iburyo, akagenda rwagati mu matara arindwi ya zahabu, aravuga ati" 
Revelation2:2 ’Ibikorwa byawe, umuruho wawe n’ubwiyumanganye bwawe ndabizi, kimwe n’uko utashobora kwihanganira abagome. Wagerageje abiyitaga intumwa kandi atari zo, maze usanga ari ababeshyi." 
Revelation2:3 Ufite ubwiyumanganye koko: warababaye ku mpamvu y’izina ryanjye, kandi ntiwacika intege." 
Revelation2:4 Nyamara mfite icyo nkugayaho: ni uko utakinkunda nka mbere. 
Revelation2:5 Ibuka rero aho wahanantutse ukagwa. Gira wisubireho kandi ukore ibikorwa nk’ibya mbere. Naho ubundi, ngiye kuza, maze niba utisubiyeho nzakure itara ryawe mu mwanya waryo." 
Revelation2:6 Nyamara hari icyo ngushima: ni uko wanga ibikorwa by’Abanikolayi, nk’uko nanjye ubwanjye mbyanga.’" 
Revelation2:7 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya. Uzatsinda, nzamuha kurya ku giti cy’ubugingo, kiri mu busitani bw’Imana.»" 
Revelation2:8 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Simirina, uti «Uwibanze n’Uwimperuka, wa wundi wapfuye, none akaba ari muzima, aravuga ati" 
Revelation2:9 ’Nzi neza amagorwa yawe n’ubukene bwawe — nyamara uri umukungu —, kandi nzi ko uvugwa nabi n’abiyita Abayahudi; nta bwo ari bo rero, ahubwo ni ikoraniro rya Nyakibi." 
Revelation2:10 Ntutinye ibigiye kukubabaza. Dore Sekibi agiye kujugunya mu buroko bamwe muri mwe kugira ngo abagerageze, maze muzagire amagorwa y’iminsi cumi. Urabe indahemuka kugeza ku rupfu, maze nzakwambike ikamba ry’ubugingo.’" 
Revelation2:11 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya. Uzatsinda, nta bwo azigera ababazwa n’urupfu rwa kabiri.»" 
Revelation2:12 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Perigamo, uti «Wa wundi ufite inkota ityaje amugi yombi, aravuga ati" 
Revelation2:13 ’Nzi neza aho utuye: ni ho hari intebe ya Sekibi. Ariko kandi, wakomeje kwizirika ku izina ryanjye, ntiwanyihakana, kabone no mu gihe cya Antipasi, umugaragu wanjye udahemuka wiciwe iwanyu, aho Sekibi atuye." 
Revelation2:14 Nyamara mfite icyo nkugayaho: ni uko iwawe hari bamwe bakihambira ku nyigisho za Balamu, wa wundi wagiraga inama Balaki ngo ashuke Abayisraheli, ngo barye inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana, kandi ngo bohoke mu buhabara." 
Revelation2:15 Iwawe na none, hari abakihambira ku nyigisho z’Abanikolayi." 
Revelation2:16 Gira wisubireho rero, bitabaye ibyo ngiye kuza bidatinze, maze mbarwanye n’inkota y’akanwa kanjye.’" 
Revelation2:17 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya. Uzatsinda, nzamuha manu yahishwe, muhe akabuye kererana, kandi kuri ako kabuye hazaba handitseho izina rishya ritagira undi urizi, uretse urihawe.»" 
Revelation2:18 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Tiyatira uti «Umwana w’Imana, wa Wundi ufite amaso arabya nk’umuriro ugurumana, n’ibirenge bisa n’umuringa w’agaciro gakomeye, aravuga ati" 
Revelation2:19 ’Nzi neza ibikorwa byawe, urukundo rwawe, ukwemera kwawe, ukwitangira abandi kwawe n’ubwiyumanganye bwawe. Ibikorwa byawe biheruka, bishumbije ibya mbere ubwinshi." 
Revelation2:20 Nyamara mfite icyo nkugayaho: ni uko worohera Yezabeli, uwo mugore wiyita umuhanuzikazi, maze akayobya abagaragu banjye, abigisha kohoka mu buhabara no kurya inyama zatuwe ibigirwamana." 
Revelation2:21 Namuhaye igihe kugira ngo yisubireho, ariko ntashaka kwisubiraho ngo areke ubuhabara bwe." 
Revelation2:22 None dore ngiye kumujugunya ku buriri bw’amagorwa akaze, we na bagenzi be bafatanije ubuhabara, keretse niba bisubiyeho bakareka ibyo bikorwa byabo." 
Revelation2:23 Abana be nzabagabiza urupfu, maze Kiliziya zose zimenye ko ari jyewe usesengura imitima n’impyiko, kandi ko nzitura buri wese nkurikije ibikorwa bye." 
Revelation2:24 Ariko kandi mbibabwire, mwebwe ab’i Tiyatira, mutigeze muyoboka iryo dini, ntimunamenye ibyo bita ’amabanga ya Sekibi’, sinzabagerekaho undi mutwaro." 
Revelation2:25 Gusa rero, ibyo mutunze mubikomereho, kugeza igihe nzazira." 
Revelation2:26 Uzatsinda, akazaba yarakomeje kugenza uko nshaka kugeza ku ndunduro, nzamuha ububasha ku mahanga," 
Revelation2:27 ayategekeshe inkoni y’icyuma, ayajanjagure nk’umena ibibindi by’ibumba," 
Revelation2:28 mbese nk’uko nanjye ubwo bubasha nabuhawe na Data; kandi nzamuha n’inyenyeri yo mu rukerera.’ 
Revelation2:29 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya.» 
Revelation3:1 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Saridi, uti «Wa Wundi ufite roho ndwi z’Imana n’inyenyeri ndwi, aravuga ati ’Nzi neza ibikorwa byawe: bavuga ko uri muzima, nyamara warapfuye." 
Revelation3:2 Ba maso, kandi ukomeze abasigaye benda gupfa, kuko nasanze ibikorwa byawe bitaboneye imbere y’Imana yanjye." 
Revelation3:3 Ibuka rero ibyo wahawe n’ibyo wumvise, ubikomereho kandi wisubireho. Naho niba utabaye maso, ngiye kuza nk’umujura, kandi ntuzamenya igihe nzazira ngutunguye." 
Revelation3:4 Nyamara aho i Saridi, uhafite abantu bakeya batanduje imyambaro yabo; abo ni bo tuzajyana bambaye imyambaro yererana, kuko babikwiriye." 
Revelation3:5 Bityo, uzatsinda na we azambara imyambaro yererana; sinzasibanganya izina rye mu gitabo cy’ubugingo, kandi nzamwishingira imbere ya Data n’imbere y’abamalayika be.’" 
Revelation3:6 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya.» 
Revelation3:7 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Filadelifi, uti «Nyirubutagatifu na Munyakuri, wa Wundi ufite urufunguzo rw’inzu ya Dawudi, yakingura ntihagire n’umwe washobora gukinga, yakinga ntihagire n’umwe ubasha gukingura, aravuze ati" 
Revelation3:8 ’Nzi neza ibikorwa byawe. Dore nashyize imbere yawe umuryango ukinguye, utagira n’umwe wabasha kuwukinga. Ufite imbaraga nke, nyamara washoboye gukomera ku ijambo ryanjye, kandi ntiwihakana izina ryanjye." 
Revelation3:9 Ngaha nkweguriye abantu bo mu ikoraniro rya Sekibi, ba bandi biyita Abayahudi kandi atari bo, kuko ari ababeshyi. Dore ngiye gutuma baza kugupfukamira, kandi bemeye ko ngukunda." 
Revelation3:10 Kubera ko wakomeye ku ijambo ryanjye ubigiranye ubwiyumanganye, nanjye nzagukomeraho igihe cy’amagorwa agiye kugwirira isi yose, akazabera ikigeragezo abatuye isi." 
Revelation3:11 Ngaha ndaje bidatinze. Komera ku byo utunze, hato hatagira ugutwara ikamba." 
Revelation3:12 Uzatsinda, nzamugira inkingi mu Ngoro y’Imana yanjye, kandi ntazigera ayisohokamo bibaho, maze mwandikeho izina ry’Imana yanjye, hamwe n’izina ry’umurwa w’Imana yanjye ari wo Yeruzalemu nshya imanutse mu ijuru iva ku Mana, ndetse mwandikeho n’izina ryanjye rishya.’" 
Revelation3:13 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya.» 
Revelation3:14 Andikira umumalayika wa Kiliziya y’i Lawodiseya, uti «Amen, Umuhamya udahemuka kandi nyakuri, Ishingiro ry’ibyaremwe n’Imana, aravuga ati" 
Revelation3:15 ’Nzi neza ibikorwa byawe: ntukonje kandi ntunashyushye. Iyaba nibura wari ukonje cyangwa se ushyushye! 
Revelation3:16 None rero ubwo uri akazuyazi, ukaba udakonje kandi udashyushye, ngiye kukuruka uve mu kanwa kanjye." 
Revelation3:17 Kubera ko wibwira uti ’Ndi umukire, ndakungahaye nta cyo nkennye’, maze ntumenye ko uri umunyabyago, imbabare, umukene, impumyi n’umutumbuze," 
Revelation3:18 jye nkugiriye inama yo kumpahaho zahabu yayungurujwe umuriro kugira ngo wikungahaze, umpaheho n’imyambaro yererana kugira ngo wambare, maze ubwambure bwawe bwoye kugaragara; ugure n’umuti wo gusiga ku maso yawe, maze wongere ubone." 
Revelation3:19 Jyeweho, abo nkunda ndabacyaha kandi nkabakosora. None rero, shishikara kandi wisubireho!" 
Revelation3:20 Dore mpagaze ku muryango ndiho ndakomanga. Nihagira uwumva ijwi ryanjye, akankingurira, nzinjira iwe, nsangire na we, na we asangire nanjye." 
Revelation3:21 Uzatsinda, nzamuha kwicarana nanjye ku ntebe yanjye y’ubwami, mbese nk’uko nanjye natsinze maze nkajya kwicarana na Data ku ntebe ye y’ubwami.’" 
Revelation3:22 Ufite amatwi arumve icyo Roho abwira za Kiliziya.» 
Revelation4:1 Nyuma y’ibyo ndareba, mbona irembo rikinguye mu ijuru, maze ijwi rimeze nk’iry’akarumbeti nari numvise mbere, rirambwira riti «Zamuka uze hano, maze nkwereke ibigomba kuba hanyuma y’ibi ngibi.»" 
Revelation4:2 Ako kanya ntwarwa na Roho w’Imana, maze mbona intebe y’ubwami y’Imana iteretse mu ijuru, kandi ikagira n’Uyicayeho." 
Revelation4:3 Uwari uyicayeho yabengeranaga nk’ibuye rya yasipi na sarudoni; intebe y’ubwami izengurutswe n’umukororombya urabagirana nk’ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye. 
Revelation4:4 Intebe makumyabiri n’enye zari zikikije intebe y’ubwami, zicayeho Abakambwe makumyabiri na bane bambaye ibyererana, kandi batamirije amakamba ya zahabu ku mutwe wabo." 
Revelation4:5 Mu ntebe y’ubwami hasohokaga imirabyo, amajwi, n’inkuba. Amatara arindwi yakiranaga imbere y’intebe y’ubwami, ari zo roho ndwi z’Imana." 
Revelation4:6 Imbere y’intebe y’ubwami hakaba inyanja isa n’ikirahure kibonerana. Hagati y’intebe y’ubwami n’ibiyikikije, hari Ibinyabuzima bine, byuzuyeho amaso imbere n’inyuma." 
Revelation4:7 Ikinyabuzima cya mbere cyasaga n’intare, icya kabiri kigasa n’ikimasa, icya gatatu kikagira uruhanga nk’urw’umuntu, naho icya kane kigasa na kagoma iguruka." 
Revelation4:8 Buri Kinyabuzima muri ibyo uko ari bine cyari gifite amababa atandatu, yuzuyeho amaso imbere n’inyuma. Ntibyahwemaga kuririmba amanywa n’ijoro bigira biti «Nyirubutagatifu, Nyirubutagatifu, Nyirubutagatifu! Ni Nyagasani Imana, Umushoborabyose, Uwahozeho, Uriho kandi ugiye kuza.»" 
Revelation4:9 Uko ibyo Binyabuzima byahaga ikuzo n’icyubahiro kandi binashimira Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, Uriho uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka," 
Revelation4:10 Abakambwe makumyabiri na bane bari bapfukamye imbere y’Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, basenga Uriho uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka, bakanaga amakamba yabo imbere y’intebe y’ubwami, bavuga bati" 
Revelation4:11 «Nyagasani Mana yacu, ukwiriye guharirwa ikuzo, icyubahiro n’ububasha, kuko ari Wowe waremye ibintu byose, washatse ko bibaho, maze biraremwa.»" 
Revelation5:1 Nuko mu kiganza cy’iburyo cy’Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, mpabona igitabo cyanditsweho imbere n’inyuma, gifungishije za kashe ndwi." 
Revelation5:2 Ubwo mbona Umumalayika w’igihangange, wamamazaga mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Ni nde ukwiriye guhambura za kashe, akabumbura igitabo?»" 
Revelation5:3 Ariko ari mu ijuru, ari ku isi, ari n’ikuzimu, ntihagira n’umwe uboneka, washobora kubumbura igitabo cyangwa kukirebamo." 
Revelation5:4 Nuko ndarira cyane, kubera ko nta n’umwe ubonetse, waba akwiriye kubumbura igitabo cyangwa kukirebamo." 
Revelation5:5 Ariko umwe muri ba Bakambwe arambwira ati «Wirira! Dore intare yo mu muryango wa Yuda, inkomoko ya Dawudi, yaratsinze; ni we uzahambura igitabo, ahambure n’ikashe zacyo uko ari indwi.»" 
Revelation5:6 Nuko mbona Ntama ameze nk’uwishwe, ahagaze hagati y’intebe y’ubwami, akikijwe na bya Binyabuzima bine n’Abakambwe. Yari afite amahembe arindwi n’amaso arindwi, ari zo za roho z’Imana zoherejwe ku isi hose." 
Revelation5:7 Ahera ko araza kugira ngo yakire igitabo cyari mu kiganza cy’iburyo cy’Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami. 
Revelation5:8 Ngo amare kwakira igitabo, bya Binyabuzima bine n’Abakambwe makumyabiri na bane, bapfukama imbere ya Ntama. Buri wese yari afite inanga n’ibyotezo bya zahabu byuzuyemo imibavu, ari yo masengesho y’abatagatifu." 
Revelation5:9 Baririmba rero indirimbo nshya, bavuga bati «Ukwiriye guhabwa igitabo no guhambura ikashe zigifunze, kuko wishwe, maze ku bw’amaraso yawe ugacungurira Imana abantu bo mu miryango yose, mu ndimi zose, mu bihugu byose, no mu mahanga yose, maze" 
Revelation5:10 ukabagira ingoma n’abaherezagitambo b’Imana yacu, maze bakazima ingoma ku isi.»" 
Revelation5:11 Nuko ngo ndebe, numva ijwi ry’abamalayika batabarika, bakikije intebe y’ubwami na bya Binyabuzima n’Abakambwe. Bari ibihumbi n’ibihumbi; amagana n’amagana," 
Revelation5:12 bakavuga mu ijwi riranguruye bati «Umwana w’intama watambwe akwiriye guharirwa ububasha, ubutunzi n’ubuhanga, imbaraga n’icyubahiro, ikuzo n’ibisingizo.»" 
Revelation5:13 Maze icyitwa ikiremwa cyose, ari mu ijuru ari ku isi, ari ikuzimu, ari no mu nyanja, mbese ibyaremwe byose bihari, mbyumva bivuga biti «Ibisingizo n’icyubahiro, ikuzo n’ububasha, ni iby’Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami na Ntama, uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka.»" 
Revelation5:14 Naho bya Binyabuzima bine bigasubiza, biti «Amen!» Ba Bakambwe na bo barapfukama, barasenga." 
Revelation6:1 Hanyuma mbona Ntama ahambuye iya mbere muri za kashe ndwi; numva icya mbere muri bya Binyabuzima giteye hejuru mu ijwi nk’iry’inkuba, kiti" 
Revelation6:2 «Ngwino!» Ngo ndebe, mbona ifarasi y’umweru, uwari uyicayeho afite umuheto, nuko ahabwa ikamba maze agenda ari umutsinzi, kandi ngo azahore atsinda." 
Revelation6:3 Igihe ahambuye ikashe ya kabiri, numva Ikinyabuzima cya kabiri giteye hejuru, kiti «Ngwino!»" 
Revelation6:4 Maze hasohoka indi farasi itukura nk’umuriro. Uwari uyicayeho ahabwa ububasha bwo gutsemba amahoro ku isi, kugira ngo abantu bamarane; nuko ahabwa inkota ndende cyane." 
Revelation6:5 Igihe ahambuye ikashe ya gatatu, numva Ikinyabuzima cya gatatu giteye hejuru, kiti «Ngwino!» Ndebye, mbona ifarasi y’umukara, uyicayeho afite umunzani mu kiganza." 
Revelation6:6 Nuko numva rwagati muri bya Binyabuzima bine, ikintu kimeze nk’ijwi ryavugaga riti «Idenari imwe ku ndengo y’ingano, n’indengo eshatu z’ingano za bushoki ku idenari imwe. Naho amavuta na divayi byo ntubikoreho.»" 
Revelation6:7 Nuko igihe ahambuye ikashe ya kane, numva Ikinyabuzima cya kane giteye hejuru, kiti «Ngwino.»" 
Revelation6:8 Maze ndebye, mbona ifarasi isa n’icyatsi; uwari uyicayeho bamwitaga «Rupfu», kandi na Kuzimu yari amukurikiye. Nuko bahabwa ububasha ku gice cya kane cy’isi ngo bagitsembeshe inkota, inzara, urupfu n’inyamaswa z’inkazi zo ku isi." 
Revelation6:9 Igihe ahambuye ikashe ya gatanu, mbona mu nsi y’urutambiro roho z’abishwe bahowe ijambo ry’Imana n’ubuhamya batanze." 
Revelation6:10 Bavugaga mu ijwi riranguruye, bati «Nyagasani, Nyirubutagatifu na Nyirukuri, uzahereza he kudacira urubanza abatuye isi no guhorera amaraso bamennye?»" 
Revelation6:11 Nuko buri wese muri bo ahabwa ikanzu yererana, kandi basabwa kuba bihanganye igihe gito, kugeza ubwo umubare wa bagenzi babo n’abavandimwe babo bagiye gupfa rumwe uzuzurira." 
Revelation6:12 Hanyuma mbona ahambuye ikashe ya gatandatu; maze haba umutingito w’isi ukaze cyane, izuba ririjima nk’umwenda wirabura, n’ukwezi uko kwakabaye guhinduka amaraso." 
Revelation6:13 Inyenyeri zo ku ijuru zihanantuka zigwa ku isi, boshye imbuto mbisi z’umutini zihungabanyijwe n’umuyaga w’inkubi." 
Revelation6:14 Ijuru riribumba nk’igitabo bazinze, imisozi yose n’ibirwa bitirimuka mu mwanya wabyo." 
Revelation6:15 Abami b’isi, abatware, abagaba b’ingabo, abakire n’ibikomerezwa, abacakara n’abantu bigenga, bose bihisha mu buvumo no mu masenga yo mu gasozi," 
Revelation6:16 bakabwira imisozi n’ibitare, bati «Nimutwubarare hejuru, muduhishe uruhanga rw’Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, na kure y’uburakari bwa Ntama.»" 
Revelation6:17 Koko rero, umunsi ukomeye w’uburakari bwe wageze; ni nde noneho uzabasha kuwurokoka?" 
Revelation7:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, mbona abamalayika bane bahagaze mu mpande enye z’isi. Bari bakumiriye imiyaga ine yo ku isi, kugira ngo hatagira umuyaga uhuhera ku isi, ku nyanja cyangwa se ku giti na kimwe." 
Revelation7:2 Nuko ndongera mbona undi mumalayika uzamuka ava iburasirazuba, afite ikashe y’Imana nzima. Avuga mu ijwi riranguruye, abwira ba bamalayika bane bari bahawe ububasha bwo kugirira nabi isi n’inyanja, ati" 
Revelation7:3 «Muririnde kugirira nabi isi, inyanja cyangwa ibiti, mbere y’uko turangiza gushyira ikimenyetso ku gahanga k’abagaragu b’Imana yacu.»" 
Revelation7:4 Nuko numva umubare w’abashyizweho ikimenyetso: abantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine bo mu miryango yose y’Abayisraheli. 
Revelation7:5 Abo mu muryango wa Yuda: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri bashyizweho ikimenyetso, Abo mu muryango wa Rubeni: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Gadi: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri," 
Revelation7:6 abo mu muryango wa Asheri: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Nefutali: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Manase: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri," 
Revelation7:7 abo mu muryango wa Simewoni: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Levi: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Isakari: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Zabuloni: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri," 
Revelation7:8 abo mu muryango wa Yozefu: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abo mu muryango wa Benyamini: abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri bashyizweho ikimenyetso." 
Revelation7:9 Nyuma y’ibyo, mbona imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu, umuntu atashobora kubarura, baturutse mu mahanga yose, mu miryango yose, mu moko yose, no mu ndimi zose. Bari bahagaze imbere y’intebe y’ubwami n’imbere ya Ntama, bambaye amakanzu yererana kandi bafashe imikindo mu ntoki," 
Revelation7:10 bakavuga mu ijwi riranguruye bati «Ubucunguzi ni ubw’Imana yacu yicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, bukaba n’ubwa Ntama.»" 
Revelation7:11 Nuko abamalayika bose bari bakikije intebe y’ubwami, hamwe na ba Bakambwe na bya Binyabuzima bine, bagwa bubitse uruhanga ku butaka imbere y’intebe y’ubwami, maze basenga Imana, bavuga bati" 
Revelation7:12 «Amen! Ibisingizo, ikuzo, ubuhanga, ishimwe, icyubahiro, imbaraga n’ububasha, ni iby’Imana yacu, uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka! Amen!»" 
Revelation7:13 Umwe mu Bakambwe afata ijambo, maze arambaza ati «Aba bantu bambaye amakanzu yererana, ni bande kandi baturutse he?»" 
Revelation7:14 Ndamusubiza nti «Shobuja, ni wowe wabimenya!» Na we arambwira ati «Aba bavuye mu magorwa akaze, bameshe amakanzu yabo, bayezereza mu maraso ya Ntama." 
Revelation7:15 Ni yo mpamvu bahagaze imbere y’intebe y’ubwami y’Imana, bakayiha icyubahiro amanywa n’ijoro mu Ngoro yayo, maze Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, akazabugamisha mu ihema rye." 
Revelation7:16 Ntibazasonza ukundi, kandi ntibazagira inyota ukundi, ndetse n’izuba n’icyokere cyaryo, ntibizabageraho ukundi," 
Revelation7:17 kuko Ntama uri rwagati y'intebe y’ubwami, azababera umushumba, akazabashora ku mariba y’amazi y’ubugingo. Nuko Imana ikazahanagura icyitwa amarira cyose ku maso yabo.»" 
Revelation8:1 Igihe ahambuye ikashe ya karindwi, mu ijuru haratuza bimara nk’igice cy’isaha..." 
Revelation8:2 Nuko mbona abamalayika barindwi bahagaze imbere y’Imana; bahabwa uturumbeti turindwi. 
Revelation8:3 Undi mumalayika araza, ahagarara iruhande rw’urutambiro, afite icyotero cya zahabu, maze ahabwa imibavu myinshi kugira ngo ayiture hamwe n’amasengesho y’abatagatifu bose, ku rutambiro rwa zahabu ruri imbere y’intebe y’ubwami." 
Revelation8:4 Umwotsi w’imibavu wacumbekeraga mu kiganza cy’uwo mumalayika, uzamuka imbere y’Imana, hamwe n’amasengesho y’abatagatifu." 
Revelation8:5 Nuko umumalayika afata icyotezo, acyuzuzamo umuriro arahuye ku rutambiro, maze awumena ku isi: ubwo haba imihindagano nk’iy’inkuba, urusaku, imirabyo n’umutingito w’isi." 
Revelation8:6 Noneho ba bamalayika barindwi bari bafite uturumbeti turindwi bitegura kutuvuza. 
Revelation8:7 Uwa mbere ngo avuze akarumbeti ke: urubura n’umuriro uvanze n’amaraso bigwa ku isi, maze igice cya gatatu cy’isi kirashya, n’igice cya gatatu cy’ibiti kirashya, n’ibimera byose birakongoka." 
Revelation8:8 Umumalayika wa kabiri na we avuza akarumbeti ke: nuko ikintu kimeze nk’umusozi munini ugurumana kiroha mu nyanja, maze igice cya gatatu cy’inyanja gihinduka amaraso;" 
Revelation8:9 igice cya gatatu cy’ibiremwa biba mu nyanja kirapfa, n’igice cya gatatu cy’amato kirasenyuka." 
Revelation8:10 Hanyuma umumalayika wa gatatu avuza akarumbeti ke: nuko inyenyeri nini cyane ihanantuka mu ijuru igurumana nk’ifumba y’umuriro, igwira igice cya gatatu cy’inzuzi no ku masoko y’amazi." 
Revelation8:11 Iyo nyenyeri yitwaga «Ndurwe». Nuko igice cya gatatu cy’amazi gihinduka indurwe, kandi abantu benshi barapfa kubera amazi yari yakarishye." 
Revelation8:12 Umumalayika wa kane na we avuza akarumbeti ke: nuko igice cya gatatu cy’izuba, igice cya gatatu cy’ukwezi, n’igice cya gatatu cy’inyenyeri birakobana; kimwe cya gatatu cyabyo kirijima, ku buryo amanywa yatakaje igice cya gatatu cy’umucyo n’ijoro bikaba bityo." 
Revelation8:13 Nuko ndebye, numva ijwi rya kagoma yatambaga hejuru cyane mu kirere risakuza riti «Mwiyimbire! Mwiyimbire! Mwiyimbire abatuye isi, ku mpamvu y’umworomo w’uturumbeti tw’abamalayika batatu bagomba kongera kuvuza!»" 
Revelation9:1 Nuko umumalayika wa gatanu aherako avuza akarumbeti ke: maze mbona inyenyeri ihanantutse ku ijuru, yituye ku isi, ihabwa urufunguzo rw’inyenga." 
Revelation9:2 Iyo nyenyeri ikinguye inyenga, hacucumukamo umwotsi umeze nk’uwo mu itanura rinini, maze izuba n’ikirere birijima." 
Revelation9:3 Nuko muri uwo mwotsi hasohokamo inzige zikwira ku isi; zihabwa ububasha nk’ubwa za manyenga zo ku isi," 
Revelation9:4 ariko zibuzwa kugira icyatsi cyo ku isi zikoraho, ku kimera cyose cyangwa ku giti icyo ari cyo cyose, keretse gusa ku bantu badafite ku gahanga ikashe y’Imana." 
Revelation9:5 Icyakora ntizahabwa uruhushya rwo kubica, ahubwo zemererwa gusa kubababaza amezi atanu yose. Ububabare bw’urumwe n’inzige bukababaza nk’ubwa manyenga, iyo irumye umuntu." 
Revelation9:6 Muri iyo minsi rero, abantu bazashakashaka urupfu ariko barubure; bazifuza gupfa, ariko urupfu rubahunge." 
Revelation9:7 Izo nzige zari zimeze nk’amafarasi yambariye urugamba, zikagira ku mitwe yazo ibintu bimeze nk’amakamba ya zahabu, naho mu maso hazo hagasa n’ah’abantu." 
Revelation9:8 Zari zifite imisatsi nk’iy’abagore, amenyo yazo ari nk’ay’intare." 
Revelation9:9 Zari zimeze kandi nk’izambaye umwambaro w’icyuma, urusaku rw’amababa yazo ari nk’urw’amagare akururwa n’amafarasi menshi yiruka agana urugamba." 
Revelation9:10 Zikagira imirizo nk’iya za manyenga, ikabamo imbori, kandi muri iyo mirizo hakabamo n’ububasha bwo kugirira nabi abantu mu mezi atanu yose." 
Revelation9:11 Umwami wazo akaba umumalayika w’ikuzimu, mu gihebureyi akitwa Abadoni, naho mu kigereki akitwa Apoliyoni." 
Revelation9:12 Icyago cya mbere kirarangiye. Dore rero ibyago bibiri na byo bikurikiyeho. 
Revelation9:13 Nuko umumalayika wa gatandatu avuza akarumbeti ke: numva ijwi riturutse mu mahembe y’urutambiro rwa zahabu ruri imbere y’Imana. 
Revelation9:14 Ryabwiraga umumalayika wa gatandatu wari ufite akarumbeti, riti «Rekura abamalayika bane baboheye ku ruzi rwa Efurati.»" 
Revelation9:15 Nuko arekura ba bamalayika bane bari biteguye bategereje iyo saha, uwo munsi, uko kwezi n’uwo mwaka, bagombaga kwica igice cya gatatu cy’abantu." 
Revelation9:16 Umubare w’ingabo zarwaniraga ku mafarasi ni igihumbi n’uduhumbagiza ukubye kabiri. Ni wo mubare wabo numvise. 
Revelation9:17 Dore uko nabonye, mu ibonekerwa ryanjye, amafarasi n’abayagenderaho: bari bambaye imyambaro y’icyuma igurumana nk’umuriro, ifite ibara ry’ikigina n’iry’ubujeni. Amafarasi yari afite imitwe nk’iy’intare, ibinwa byayo bikaruka umuriro, umwotsi n’ubujeni." 
Revelation9:18 Nuko igice cya gatatu cy’abantu kirarimbuka, kizize ibyo byorezo uko ari bitatu: umuriro, umwotsi n’ubujeni, byarutswe n’ayo mafarasi." 
Revelation9:19 Koko rero ububasha bw’amafarasi buba mu minwa no mu mirizo yayo, kandi iyo mirizo yayo imeze nk’inzoka, ikagira amasonga atuma ibasha kugira nabi." 
Revelation9:20 Abantu rero bari basigaye badahitanywe n’ibyo byorezo, ntibisubiraho ngo bareke ibikorwa byabo bibi, bakomeza gusenga ingabo za Sekibi, ibigirwamana bya zahabu cyangwa ibya feza, iby’umuringa, iby’amabuye cyangwa iby’ibiti bidashobora kureba, kumva cyangwa kugenda." 
Revelation9:21 Banze kwisubiraho ngo bareke ubwicanyi bwabo n’ubupfumu, ubukozi bw’ibibi n’ubujura bwabo." 
Revelation10:1 Nuko mbona undi mumalayika w’igihangange wamanukaga mu ijuru. Yari yambaye igicu, umukororombya uzengurutse umutwe we, mu maso he habengerana nk’izuba, n’ibirenge bye bisa n’inkingi z’umuriro;" 
Revelation10:2 yari afite mu ntoki ze agatabo kabumbuye. Nuko ashinga ikirenge cy’iburyo ku nyanja, icy’ibumoso agishinga ku isi," 
Revelation10:3 maze atera hejuru mu ijwi riranguruye, atontoma nk’intare. Igihe ateye hejuru, inkuba ndwi zirahinda." 
Revelation10:4 Izo nkuba ndwi zimaze guhinda, nanjye uko nakiteguye kwandika, numva ijwi riturutse mu ijuru, rimbwira riti «Ubutumwa bw’izo nkuba ndwi ubugire ibanga, ntubwandike.»" 
Revelation10:5 Hanyuma wa mumalayika nari nabonye ahagaze ku nyanja no ku isi, abangura ikiganza cye cy’iburyo akerekeje ku ijuru," 
Revelation10:6 maze arahira mu izina ry’Uriho uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka, Uwaremye ijuru n’ibiririmo byose, isi n’ibiyirimo byose, inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose, ati ’Nta gihe kizongera kubaho.’" 
Revelation10:7 Ahubwo umunsi bazumva umumalayika wa karindwi avugije akarumbeti ke, ni bwo ibanga ry’Imana rizaba rigeze ku ndunduro, nk’uko yabimenyesheje abagaragu be b’abahanuzi.»" 
Revelation10:8 Nuko rya jwi nari numvise rituruka mu ijuru, ryongera kumbwira riti «Genda ufate agatabo kabumbye, kari mu kiganza cy’umumalayika, uhagaze ku nyanja no ku isi.»" 
Revelation10:9 Nuko ndatambuka nsanga wa mumalayika, musaba kumpa ako gatabo. Arambwira ati «Kakire maze ukarye. Mu nda yawe karagusharirira, ariko mu kanwa kawe hararyohera nk’ubuki.»" 
Revelation10:10 Mpera ko rero mfata ako gatabo ngahawe n’uwo mumalayika, maze ndakarya. Mu kanwa kari karyohereye nk’ubuki, ariko maze kukamira, mu nda yanjye harasharirirwa." 
Revelation10:11 Nuko barambwira bati «Ni ngombwa ko wongera guhanurira ibihugu, amahanga, indimi, n’abami benshi.»" 
Revelation11:1 Nuko bampa ikibingo kimeze nk’inkoni yo gupimisha, bambwira bati «Haguruka, upime Ingoro y’Imana n’urutambiro, ndetse ubare n’abahasengera." 
Revelation11:2 Ariko urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro, urwihorere nturupime, kuko rweguriwe amahanga azavuyanga umurwa mutagatifu, mu gihe cy’amezi mirongo ine n’abiri »." 
Revelation11:3 Nzaha abahamya banjye babiri ubushobozi bwo guhanura, mu minsi igihumbi magana abiri na mirongo itandatu, bambaye ibigunira." 
Revelation11:4 Abo bahamya ni ibiti bibiri by’imizeti n’amatara abiri, biri imbere y’Umwami w’isi." 
Revelation11:5 Nihagira ushaka kubagirira nabi, umuriro uzasohoka mu kanwa kabo, maze utsembe abanzi babo. Ni koko, niharamuka hagize ushaka kubagirira nabi, ni uko agomba kwicwa." 
Revelation11:6 Bafite ububasha bwo gufunga ijuru, maze ntihazagire imvura igwa mu minsi bazamara bahanura, bakagira n’ububasha bwo guhindura amazi amaraso, kimwe n’ubwo guteza isi ibyorezo bitabarika, uko babishatse kose." 
Revelation11:7 Igihe bazaba barangije gutanga ubuhamya bwabo, Igikoko kizamutse mu nyenga kizabarwanya, kibatsinde maze kibice." 
Revelation11:8 Imirambo yabo izaguma ku kibuga cy’umurwa w’icyamamare, witwa Sodoma na Misiri mu buryo bw’incamarenga, ari na ho Umwami wabo ubwe yabambwe." 
Revelation11:9 Abantu bo mu bihugu byose, no mu miryango yose, no mu ndimi zose no mu mahanga yose, bazaza gushungera imirambo yabo igihe cy’iminsi itatu n’igice, kandi bababuze guhambwa." 
Revelation11:10 Nuko abatuye isi bazishimire urupfu rwabo bombi, banezerwe, bohererezanye amaturo, kuko abo bahanuzi bombi bari barababaje abatuye isi." 
Revelation11:11 Ariko nyuma y’iyo minsi itatu n’igice, umwuka w’ubugingo uturutse ku Mana uzabinjiremo, maze bahaguruke. Nuko ababashungeraga batahwa n’ubwoba bwinshi cyane." 
Revelation11:12 Bumva ijwi riranguruye rituruka mu ijuru ribwira abo bahanuzi, riti «Nimuzamuke hano!» Nuko bazamuka mu gicu bajya mu ijuru, abanzi babo babareba." 
Revelation11:13 Ako kanya haba umutingito w’isi ukomeye, igice cya cumi cy’umurwa kirariduka, maze abantu ibihumbi birindwi bahitanwa n’icyo cyorezo. Nuko abarokotse batahwa n’ubwoba, basingiza Imana yo mu ijuru." 
Revelation11:14 Icyago cya kabiri kiba kirahise. Dore icyago cya gatatu na cyo kiraje bidatinze. 
Revelation11:15 Umumalayika wa karindwi na we avuza akarumbeti ke. Nuko amajwi yumvikanira mu ijuru, avuga aranguruye ati «Ingoma y’isi yeguriwe Umwami wacu na Kristu we; akazima ingoma uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka.»" 
Revelation11:16 Ba Bakambwe makumyabiri na bane bicaye ku ntebe zabo imbere y’Imana, bagwa bubitse uruhanga ku butaka maze basenga Imana," 
Revelation11:17 bavuga bati «Turagushimira, Nyagasani Mana, Mushoborabyose, wowe uriho kandi wahozeho, kuko wakoresheje ububasha bwawe buhebuje, maze ugashinga ingoma yawe." 
Revelation11:18 Amahanga yari yarakaye, ariko uburakari bwawe buba ari bwo bwigaragaza. Ubu ni igihe cyo gucira urubanza abapfuye, no guhemba abagaragu bawe b’abahanuzi, abatagatifu n’abatinya izina ryawe, abakuru n’abato, n’igihe cyo gutsemba abarimbuye isi.»" 
Revelation11:19 Nuko Ingoro y’Imana yo mu ijuru irakinguka, n’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano bugaragarira mu Ngoro yayo. Ubwo haba imirabyo, urusaku n’imihindagano nk’iy’inkuba, umutingito w’isi n’urubura rukaze." 
Revelation12:1 Ikimenyetso gikomeye kigaragara mu ijuru: yari umugore wisesuye izuba, ukwezi kuri mu nsi y’ibirenge bye, naho ku mutwe atamirije ikamba ry’inyenyeri cumi n’ebyiri." 
Revelation12:2 Yari atwite, kandi ariho atakishwa n’ibise n’imibabaro y’iramukwa." 
Revelation12:3 Nuko ikindi kimenyetso kigaragara mu ijuru: cyari Ikiyoka nyamunini kandi gitukura nk’umuriro, kikagira imitwe irindwi n’amahembe cumi, n’amakamba arindwi kuri iyo mitwe uko ari irindwi." 
Revelation12:4 Umurizo wacyo usakuma igice cya gatatu cy’inyenyeri uzihananturira ku isi. Icyo Kiyoka rero gihagarara imbere y’uwo Mugore wari wegereje kubyara, kugira ngo giconcomere umwana ukivuka." 
Revelation12:5 Nuko abyara umwana w’umuhungu: ugomba kugenga amahanga yose n’inkoni y’icyuma. Maze uwo mwana we ajyanwa ku Mana no ku ntebe yayo y’ubwami. 
Revelation12:6 Hanyuma Umugore ahungira mu butayu, aho Imana yamuteguriye umwanya, kugira ngo abe yo agaburirwa mu minsi igihumbi na magana abiri na mirongo itandatu." 
Revelation12:7 Nuko mu ijuru intambara irarota: Mikayeli n’abamalayika be barwana na cya Kiyoka; na cyo kirabarwanya hamwe n’abamalayika bacyo," 
Revelation12:8 ariko ntibabasha gutsinda, kandi ntibongera ukundi kugira umwanya wabo mu ijuru." 
Revelation12:9 Cya kiyoka nyamunini kirahananturwa: ya Nzoka ya kera na kare, ari yo bita «Sekibi na Sekinyoma», wa wundi uyobya isi yose. Nuko gihananturirwa ku isi hamwe n’Abamalayika bacyo." 
Revelation12:10 Hanyuma numva ijwi riranguruye rituruka mu ijuru riti «Ngiki igihe cy’ubucunguzi kirageze, igihe cy’ububasha n’ubwami by’Imana yacu, n’ubutegetsi bwa Kristu wayo: kuko Kareganyi, wahoraga arega abavandimwe bacu ku Mana yacu amanywa n’ijoro, ahanantuwe." 
Revelation12:11 Nyamara bo bamutsindishije amaraso ya Ntama n’ijambo babereye abahamya. Bemeye guhara amagara yabo, kugeza ku rupfu." 
Revelation12:12 Kubera iyo mpamvu, ijuru niryishime, namwe abarituye munezerwe! Naho mwebwe, isi n’inyanja mwiyimbire, kuko Sekibi yamanutse abasanga n’uburakari bwinshi, kandi akaba azi ko ashigaje igihe gito.»" 
Revelation12:13 Ikiyoka rero kibonye ko gihananturiwe ku isi, kiruka gikurikiranye wa Mugore wari wabyaye umwana w’umuhungu." 
Revelation12:14 Ariko wa Mugore ahabwa amababa abiri nk’aya kagoma nini cyane, kugira ngo aguruke ajya mu butayu kure ya ya Nzoka, ahantu yari yateguriwe ngo ahamare igihe, n’ibihe, n’inusu y’igihe, agaburirwa." 
Revelation12:15 Nuko ya Nzoka ivundereza ibintu bimeze nk’uruzi rw’amazi inyuma ya wa Mugore, kugira ngo atwarwe n’imivu y’ibyo bizi," 
Revelation12:16 nyamara isi iramutabara; ubutaka burabumbuka maze bumira rwa ruzi ruvunderejwe na cya Kiyoka. 
Revelation12:17 Kubera uburakari cyari gifitiye uwo Mugore, icyo Kiyoka kijya kurwanya abasigaye mu bamukomokaho, abubahiriza amategeko y’Imana kandi bagakomera ku buhamya bwa Yezu." 
Revelation12:18 Hanyuma kibunda mu musenyi wo ku nyanja. 
Revelation13:1 Nuko mbona Igikoko kizamuka mu nyanja, gifite amahembe cumi n’imitwe irindwi, kikagira kuri ya mahembe amakamba cumi, naho ku mitwe yacyo hariho izina rituka Imana." 
Revelation13:2 Igikoko nabonaga cyasaga n’ingwe, amaguru yacyo ameze nk’ay’ikirura, n’urwasaya rwacyo ari nk’urw’intare. Nuko cya Gikoko gihabwa ububasha bwacyo, intebe yacyo n’ubutegetsi burambuye na cya Kiyoka." 
Revelation13:3 Umwe muri ya mitwe yacyo wasaga n’uwakomeretse bwo gupfa, ariko uruguma rwacyo ruhita rukira. Nuko isi yose iratangara, ihita iyoboka cya Gikoko." 
Revelation13:4 Ubwo batangira kuramya cya Kiyoka, kuko cyahaye cya Gikoko ububasha, kandi baramya n’icyo Gikoko bavuga bati «Ni nde wagereranywa n’iki Gikoko, cyangwa se ni nde washobora kukirwanya?»" 
Revelation13:5 Nuko gihabwa umunwa wo kwirata no gutuka Imana, gihabwa n’ububasha bwo gukora icyo gishaka igihe cy’amezi mirongo ine n’abiri." 
Revelation13:6 Cyabumburiraga umunwa gutuka Imana, no gutuka izina ryayo, Ingoro yayo n’abatuye ijuru." 
Revelation13:7 Gihabwa kandi kurwanya abatagatifujwe no kubatsinda, gihabwa n’ububasha ku miryango yose, ibihugu byose, indimi zose n’amahanga yose." 
Revelation13:8 Nuko abatuye isi bose baragisenga, abo bose kuva isi yahangwa, bafite amazina atanditswe mu gitabo cy’ubugingo cya Ntama wishwe." 
Revelation13:9 Ufite amatwi, arumve!" 
Revelation13:10 Uwagenewe kubohwa, azatabwa muri yombi byanze bikunze, n’uwagenewe kwicwa n’inkota, azicishwa inkota. Igihe rero kirageze cyo kugaragaza ubwiyumanganye n’ukwemera by’abatagatifujwe." 
Revelation13:11 Nuko mbona nanone ikindi Gikoko kizamuka ku isi. Cyari gifite amahembe abiri nk’intama, ariko kikavuga nk’Ikiyoka." 
Revelation13:12 Cyakoreshaga ububasha bwose bw’Igikoko cya mbere mu maso yacyo, kigategeka isi n’abayituye gusenga Igikoko cya mbere, cyari cyakize uruguma rwajyaga kugihitana." 
Revelation13:13 Icyo Gikoko cya kabiri gikora ibintu byinshi bitangaje, kugeza n’aho kimanurira ku isi umuriro wo ku ijuru, abantu bose babireba." 
Revelation13:14 Bityo kiyobya abatuye isi kubera ibyo bitangaza cyari cyahawe gukora mu maso y’Igikoko cya mbere; kibwira abatuye isi kwimika ishusho yubahiriza cya Gikoko cyari cyakomerekejwe n’inkota, none kikaba ari gitaraga." 
Revelation13:15 Nuko gihabwa ububasha bwo guha ubuzima iyo shusho y’Igikoko cya mbere, ku buryo iyo shusho ibasha ubwayo kuvuga, maze igategeka kwica umuntu wese wanze gusenga ishusho y’Igikoko." 
Revelation13:16 Nuko abantu bose, abato n’abakuru, abakire n’abakene, abacakara n’abigenga, gihabwa kubashyiraho ikimenyetso ku kiganza cy’iburyo cyangwa ku gahanga," 
Revelation13:17 kugira ngo hatagira umuntu n’umwe wemererwa kugura cyangwa kugurisha ikintu adafite ikimenyetso cy’izina ry’Igikoko cyangwa umubare uranga izina ryacyo. 
Revelation13:18 Ubu rero ni igihe cy’ubushishozi: umunyabwenge arasobanukirwe n’umubare uranga Igikoko, kuko uwo mubare uhwanye n’izina ry’umuntu. Uwo mubare ni magana atandatu na mirongo itandatu na gatandatu." 
Revelation14:1 Nuko mbona Ntama wari uhagaze ku musozi wa Siyoni, ari kumwe na ba bantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine bafite izina rye, ndetse n’izina rya Se, ryanditse ku gahanga kabo." 
Revelation14:2 Hanyuma numva ijwi riturutse mu ijuru, rimeze nk’urusumo rw’amazi nyamwinshi y’inyanja, cyangwa nk’umuhindagano ukaze w’inkuba. Iryo jwi numvise kandi, ryari rimeze nk’indirimbo y’abacuranzi, bakoze ku mirya y’inanga zabo." 
Revelation14:3 Baririmbaga indirimbo nshya bari imbere y’intebe y’ubwami, n’imbere ya bya Binyabuzima bine n’Abakambwe. Kandi nta wundi washoboraga kwiga iyo ndirimbo, uretse ba bantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo ine na bine, barokotse mu isi." 
Revelation14:4 Ntibigeze banduzwa n’abagore, koko rero ni amasugi. Ni bo bazaherekeza Ntama aho agiye hose. Barokotse mu bantu nk’umuganura ugenewe Imana na Ntama," 
Revelation14:5 kandi nta wigeze kubumva bavuga ibinyoma: ni abaziranenge. 
Revelation14:6 Nuko mbona undi mumalayika wagurukaga mu kirere hejuru cyane, afite Inkuru Nziza ihoraho, yagombaga gutangariza abatuye isi: abantu bo mu mahanga yose, mu miryango, mu ndimi zose no mu bihugu byose." 
Revelation14:7 Yavugaga mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Nimutinye Imana kandi muyihe ikuzo, kuko igihe cyayo cyo guca urubanza cyageze. Nimusenge Umuremyi w’ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’amasoko y’amazi.»" 
Revelation14:8 Ubwo hakurikiraho undi mumalayika wa kabiri, aravuga ati ’Iraridutse! Iraridutse Babiloni, wa murwa w’icyamamare, yo yuhiye amahanga yose divayi y’ubuhabara bukomeye bwayo.»" 
Revelation14:9 Hanyuma undi mumalayika wa gatatu arabakurikira, maze avuga mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Niba hagize usenga Igikoko n’ishusho yacyo, agashyirwaho ikimenyetso cyayo ku gahanga cyangwa ku kiganza," 
Revelation14:10 uwo na we azanywa kuri divayi y’uburakari bw’Imana, yasutswe idafunguye mu nkongoro y’ubukana bwayo, maze azababarizwe mu muriro n’amahindure imbere y’abamalayika batagatifu n’imbere ya Ntama." 
Revelation14:11 Umwotsi w’umuriro bazababarizwamo, uzahora ucumbeka uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka; ntibazagira ikiruhuko ku manywa na nijoro, abasenga Igikoko n’ishusho yacyo, n’umuntu wese uzashyirwaho ikimenyetso cy’izina ryacyo." 
Revelation14:12 Igihe kirageze cyo kugaragaza ubwiyumanganye bw’abatagatifujwe, bakomeye ku mategeko y’Imana no ku kwemera muri Yezu." 
Revelation14:13 Nuko numva ijwi riturutse mu ijuru rirambwira riti «Andika: Hahirwa guhera ubu abapfiriye muri Nyagasani. Ni koko, uwo ari Roho w’Imana ubivuga. Nibaruhuke imibabaro yabo, kuko ibikorwa byabo bibaherekeza.»" 
Revelation14:14 Nuko ngo ndebe, mbona igicu cyererana; uwari ukicayeho agasa n’Umwana w’umuntu. Yari atamirije ikamba rya zahabu ku mutwe, afite mu kiganza umuhoro utyaye." 
Revelation14:15 Hanyuma undi Mumalayika asohoka mu Ngoro, maze arangurura ijwi abwira uwari wicaye hejuru y’igicu, ati «Cyamura umuhoro wawe, maze usarure. Isaha yo gusarura irageze, kuko imyaka y’isi yeze.»" 
Revelation14:16 Nuko uwari wicaye hejuru y’igicu arekurira umuhoro we ku isi, maze imyaka y’isi irasarurwa." 
Revelation14:17 Hanyuma undi mumalayika asohoka mu Ngoro yo mu ijuru, nawe yari afite umuhoro utyaye." 
Revelation14:18 Undi mumalayika wari ufite ububasha ku muriro, aturuka ku rutambiro, maze avuga aranguruye ijwi abwira uwari ufite umuhoro, ati «Cyamura umuhoro wawe utyaye, maze ugese amaseri y’umuzabibu w’isi, kuko imbuto zawo zihishije.»" 
Revelation14:19 Nuko umumalayika arekurira umuhoro we ku isi, agesa amaseri y’umuzabibu w’isi, akayanaga mu rwengero runini rw’uburakari bw’Imana;" 
Revelation14:20 maze yengerwa hanze y’umugi. Nuko mu rwengero hasohokamo imivu y’amaraso, arasendera kugera ku minwa y’amafarasi, kandi akwira ahantu h’amasitadi igihumbi na magana atandatu." 
Revelation15:1 Nuko mbona mu ijuru ikindi kimenyetso gikomeye kandi gitangaje: ni abamalayika barindwi bacigatiye ibyorezo birindwi ari byo by’imperuka, kuko muri byo uburakari bw’Imana bwari bugeze ku musendero wabwo." 
Revelation15:2 Hanyuma mbona ikimeze nk’inyanja ibonerana kandi ivanze n’umuriro. Abatsinze cya Gikoko, ishusho yacyo n’umubare w’izina ryacyo, bari bahagaze kuri iyo nyanja ibonerana, bafite inanga z’Imana." 
Revelation15:3 Nuko batera indirimbo ya Musa, umugaragu w’Imana, n’iya Ntama, bavuga bati «Nyagasani Mana, Mushoborabyose, ibikorwa byawe birakomeye kandi biratangaje. Inzira zawe ziratunganye kandi ni inyakuri, wowe Mwami w’amahanga." 
Revelation15:4 Ni nde utagutinya, Nyagasani, kandi ngo asingize izina ryawe? Kuko ari wowe wenyine Nyirubutagatifu; amahanga yose azaza, maze apfukame imbere yawe, kubera ko ubucamanza bwawe bwigaragaje.»" 
Revelation15:5 Hanyuma y’ibyo, mbona mu ijuru Ingoro y’Imana, yarimo Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano irakingutse," 
Revelation15:6 maze ba bamalayika barindwi bari bacigatiye ibyorezo birindwi basohoka mu Ngoro, bambaye imyambaro y’ihariri inetereye kandi ibengerana, bakenyeje n’umukandara wa zahabu." 
Revelation15:7 Nuko kimwe muri bya Binyabuzima bine gihereza abo bamalayika barindwi inkongoro ndwi za zahabu, zisendereye uburakari bw’Imana ibaho uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka." 
Revelation15:8 Nuko Ingoro y'Imana yuzura umwotsi, utewe n’ikuzo ry’Imana n’ububasha bwayo. Ntihagira n’umwe ushobora kwinjira mu Ngoro y'Imana, kugeza ubwo bya byorezo birindwi byazanywe n’abamalayika barindwi birangira." 
Revelation16:1 Nuko numva ijwi riranguruye rituruka mu Ngoro, ribwira ba bamalayika barindwi, riti «Nimugende, maze mucubanurire ku isi izo nkongoro ndwi zuzuye uburakari bw’Imana.»" 
Revelation16:2 Uwa mbere aragenda, acubanurira inkongoro ye ku isi. Nuko abantu bari bafite ikimenyetso cya cya Gikoko, n’abasenga ishusho yacyo, bafatwa n’ibisebe bibi by’umufunzo." 
Revelation16:3 Uwa kabiri na we acubanurira inkongoro ye mu nyanja, maze ihinduka amaraso ameze nk’ay’umuntu wapfuye, n’ikinyabuzima cyose kiri mu nyanja kirapfa." 
Revelation16:4 Umumalayika wa gatatu na we acubanurira inkongoro ye mu migezi no ku masoko y’amazi, maze ahinduka amaraso." 
Revelation16:5 Nuko numva umumalayika utegeka amazi avuga ati «Uri intabera wowe Uriho kandi Uwahozeho Nyirubutagatifu, kuko wagaragaje utyo urubanza uciye," 
Revelation16:6 maze ubwo bamennye amaraso y’abatagatifujwe n’ay’abahanuzi bawe, ukaba ubahaye na bo amaraso ngo bayanywe: bahawe rwose ikibakwiriye!" 
Revelation16:7 Hanyuma numva urutambiro ruvuga ruti «Ni byo koko, Nyagasani Mana, Mushobora byose, imanza uciye ziba zihuje n’ukuri n’ubutabera.»" 
Revelation16:8 Nuko umumalayika wa kane na we acubanurira inkongoro ye ku zuba, maze rihabwa ububasha bwo gutwika abantu." 
Revelation16:9 Abantu rero batwikwa n’ubushyuhe bwinshi; ni ko gutuka izina ry’Imana itegeka ibyo byorezo, ariko ntibisubiraho ngo bajye bayisingiza." 
Revelation16:10 Nuko umumalayika wa gatanu na we acubanurira inkongoro ye ku ntebe ya cya Gikoko, maze ingoma yacyo ihinduka umwijima, ububabare butera abantu kwikacanga indimi;" 
Revelation16:11 ni ko gutuka Imana yo mu ijuru, kubera imibabaro yabo n’ibisebe byabo, ariko ntibisubiraho ngo bareke ibikorwa byabo." 
Revelation16:12 Nuko umumalayika wa gatandatu na we acubanurira inkongoro ye ku ruzi runini rwa Efurati; maze amazi yose arakama, kugira ngo haboneke inzira y’abami baturutse Iburasirazuba." 
Revelation16:13 Nuko mbona roho mbi eshatu zimeze nk’imitubu, zisohoka mu kanwa ka cya Kiyoka, no mu kanwa ka cya Gikoko, no mu kanwa ka wa muhanurabinyoma." 
Revelation16:14 Izo roho mbi ni za Sekibi zikora ibintu bitangaje, maze zigasanga abami bo ku isi yose, kugira ngo zibakoranyirize kurwanya umunsi ukomeye w’Imana Mushoborabyose." 
Revelation16:15 «Ngaha ndaje nk’umujura! Hahirwa uba maso kandi agakomeza kwambara imyambaro ye, kugira ngo atagenda yambaye ubusa, maze rubanda bakabona ubwambure bwe.»" 
Revelation16:16 Nuko za roho mbi zikoranyiriza ba bami ahantu hitwa, mu gihebureyi, Harimagedoni." 
Revelation16:17 Nuko umumalayika wa karindwi na we acubanurira inkongoro ye mu kirere, maze mu Ngoro, ku ntebe y’ubwami haturuka ijwi riranguruye, riravuga riti «Birarangiye!»" 
Revelation16:18 Nuko haba imirabyo, urusaku, imihindagano nk’iy’inkuba, n’umutingito w’isi ukaze cyane kuruta indi yose yigeze kubaho kuva aho umuntu agereye ku isi." 
Revelation16:19 Umurwa w’icyamamare usadukamo ibice bitatu, n’imigi y’amahanga irariduka. Nuko Imana yibuka ityo Babiloni, wa murwa w’icyamamare, kugira ngo iwuhe ku nkongoro isendereye divayi y’uburakari bwayo." 
Revelation16:20 Nuko ibirwa byose birahunga n’imisozi yose irazimira; 
Revelation16:21 urubura ruremereye nk’amatalenta rumanuka mu ijuru, rucocagura abantu, maze abantu batuka Imana babitewe n’icyo cyago cy’urubura, kuko icyo cyorezo ubwacyo cyari gikabije kuba kibi." 
Revelation17:1 Nuko umwe muri ba bamalayika barindwi bari bafite inkongoro ndwi, araza, maze arambwira ati «Ngwino, nkwereke igihano cya rya habara ry’icyamamare, ryicaye ku nkombe z’amazi magari," 
Revelation17:2 rikaba ryarasambanye n’abami b’isi, maze abatuye isi bagasinda divayi y’ubuhabara bwaryo.»" 
Revelation17:3 Nuko ndatwarwa njyanwa na wa mumalayika mu butayu. Ngo mpagere mbona umugore wicaye ku Gikoko gitukura, cyuzuyeho amazina atuka Imana, kikagira kandi imitwe irindwi n’amahembe cumi." 
Revelation17:4 Uwo mugore yari yambaye imyambaro ihambaye y’umuhemba n’umutuku, arabagirana kubera imirimbo ya zahabu, amabuye y’agaciro gakomeye, n’amasaro. Mu kiganza cye yari afite inkongoro ya zahabu yuzuyemo amahano, n’imyanda y’ubuhabara bwe," 
Revelation17:5 ku gahanga ke handitswe iri zina ry’urujijo ngo ’Babiloni, umurwa w’icyamamare, nyina w’ubuhabara n’amahano y’isi.’" 
Revelation17:6 Hanyuma mbona uwo mugore yasinze amaraso y’abatagatifujwe n’ay’abahamya ba Yezu. Mukubise amaso, ndatangara cyane!" 
Revelation17:7 Nuko umumalayika arambaza ati «Utangajwe n’iki? Ngiye kukubwira ibanga. ry’uyu mugore n’Igikoko cy’imitwe irindwi n’amahembe cumi. 
Revelation17:8 Igikoko wabonye, kigeze kubaho, ariko ntikikiriho. Noneho kigiye kuzamuka mu nyenga, maze kijye aho kirimburirwa. Abatuye isi, bene amazina atanditswe mu gitabo cy’ubugingo kuva isi igihangwa, bazatangara babonye icyo Gikoko, kuko kigeze kubaho, none kikaba kitakiriho, ariko kikazongera kubaho." 
Revelation17:9 Aha rero hagomba ubwenge bumurikiwe n’ubuhanga: imitwe irindwi y’Igikoko, ni imisozi irindwi uwo mugore yicayeho; ikaba n’abami barindwi." 
Revelation17:10 Batanu muri bo ntibakiriho, uwa gatandatu ariho, naho uwa karindwi ntaraza; ariko naza, azamara igihe gito." 
Revelation17:11 Igikoko kigeze kubaho ariko kitakiriho, ubwacyo ni umwami wa munani; kiri mu mubare wa barindwi ba mbere, kandi kigiye aho kirimburirwa." 
Revelation17:12 Naho amahembe cumi wabonye, ni abami cumi batarimikwa; ariko mu isaha imwe barahabwa ububasha bwo kwima ingoma hamwe n’Igikoko." 
Revelation17:13 Umugambi wabo ni umwe: ni uwo gukoresha ububasha bwabo n’ubutegetsi bwabo, bakorera Igikoko." 
Revelation17:14 Bazarwanya Ntama, nyamara abaganze, kuko ari we Mutegetsi w’abategetsi n’Umwami w’abami, kandi hamwe na we, abahamagawe, n’abatowe n’abayoboke be, na bo bazatsinda.»" 
Revelation17:15 Arongera arambwira ati «Amazi wabonye iryo habara ryari ryicayeho, ni ibihugu n’inteko z’abantu, amahanga n’indimi." 
Revelation17:16 Amahembe cumi wabonye, kimwe n’Igikoko, bizanga urunuka rya habara, birihindure intabwa kandi biricuze imyambaro. Bizarya inyama zaryo, izisigaye bizitwike n’umuriro." 
Revelation17:17 Kuko rero Imana yabihaye umutima wo kurangiza umugambi wayo, umugambi umwe rukumbi wo kwegurira Igikoko ubwami bwabyo kugeza igihe amagambo y’Imana azaba yageze ku ndunduro." 
Revelation17:18 Naho umugore wabonye, ni umurwa w’icyamamare utegeka abami b’isi.»" 
Revelation18:1 Hanyuma mbona undi mumalayika umanutse mu ijuru afite ububasha bukomeye, maze isi imurikirwa n’ububengerane bw’ikuzo rye." 
Revelation18:2 Nuko atera hejuru mu ijwi riranguruye ati «Iraridutse! Iraridutse Babiloni, umurwa w’icyamamare: yahindutse intaho ya za Sekibi, indiri ya za roho mbi zose, n’iy’ibisiga byose byahumanye kandi by’ibivume." 
Revelation18:3 Kuko yuhiye amahanga yose divayi y’uburakari bukaze bw’ubuhabara bwayo, abami b’isi bakohoka mu buhabara hamwe na yo, kandi abacuruzi b’isi bagakungahazwa n’ubukire bwayo butagira ingano.»" 
Revelation18:4 Nuko numva irindi jwi ryavugiraga mu ijuru, riti «Nimusohoke muri uwo murwa, muryango wanjye, hato mutaza kugira uruhare ku byaha byawo, bityo mugasangira na wo ibyorezo byawugenewe;" 
Revelation18:5 kuko ibyaha byawo byirundanyije kugera ku ijuru, maze Imana ikibuka ibikorwa bibi byawo." 
Revelation18:6 Nimuwugenzereze uko wabagenjeje, ibyo wabakoreye mubikube kabiri. Inkongoro wabagereyemo divayi yawo, muyiwugereremo incuro ebyiri, divayi iruta iyo wabahaye!" 
Revelation18:7 Uko wisheshekajeho ikuzo n’ubukire, abe ari ko muwuteza imibabaro n’icyunamo, kuko wibwiye mu mutima, uti ’Ndadamaraye nk’umwamikazi, nta bwo ndi umupfakazi kandi sinteze kuzabona icyunamo.’" 
Revelation18:8 Kubera ibyo, ibyorezo byawugenewe bizawugwirira umunsi umwe: urupfu, icyunamo, n’inzara kandi uzasenywe n’umuriro, kuko Nyagasani Imana, ari Nyirububasha, akaba yawuciriye urubanza.»" 
Revelation18:9 Nuko abami b’isi bohokanye na wo mu buhabara bwawo no mu bukire byawo, bazawuririre, baboroge, igihe bazaba babonye umwotsi w’umuriro uwutwika." 
Revelation18:10 Bazahagarara ahitaruye kubera gutinya iyo mibabaro yawo, maze bavuge bati «Mbega ibyago! Mbega ibyago ubonye, Murwa w’icyamamare, Babiloni murwa w’igihangange! Isaha imwe gusa irahagije kugira ngo urubanza rwawe rurangire.»" 
Revelation18:11 Abacuruzi b’isi na bo bazawuririra, bajye mu cyunamo, kuko nta we uzaba akigura ibicuruzwa byabo:" 
Revelation18:12 ibicuruzwa bya zahabu n’ibya feza, amabuye y’agaciro n’amasaro, imyambaro y’ubwoya n’iy’imihemba, iya hariri n’iy’umutuku; amoko y’ibiti bihumura, ibyakozwe mu mahembe y’inzovu, mu biti by’imbonekarimwe, mu muringa cyangwa mu butare, mu mabuye y’agaciro;" 
Revelation18:13 ibiti n’ibyatsi bihumura, imibavu n’ububane, divayi n’amavuta, ifu n’ingano, ibimasa n’intama, amafarasi n’amagare, abacakara n’imbohe." 
Revelation18:14 Imbuto umutima wawe wakundaga zarakwitaruye, ikiryohera icyo ari cyo cyose n’igishimisha ijisho bigushizeho, kandi ntuzongera kubibona ukundi." 
Revelation18:15 Abacuruzi bari bakungahajwe n’ubwo bucuruzi, bazahagarara ahitaruye kubera gutinya iyo mibabaro. Bazarira baboroge," 
Revelation18:16 maze bavuge bati «Mbega ibyago! Mbega ibyago ubonye, Murwa w’icyamamare wari wambaye imyambaro y’ubwoya, imihemba n’itukura, ukarabagirana kubera imitako ya zahabu, amabuye y’agaciro n’amasaro." 
Revelation18:17 None ubwo bukungu bwawe bukaba bwazimiye mu isaha imwe!» Nuko abasare bose, n’abagendera mu mato hafi aho bose, n’ababeshwaho n’inyanja bose, bakaba bahagaze ahitaruye," 
Revelation18:18 babonye umwotsi w’inkongi yawo barasakabaka bati «Ni uwuhe murwa wari uhwanye n’uyu murwa w’icyamamare!» 
Revelation18:19 Nuko bisiga umukungugu mu mutwe, batera hejuru barira kandi baganya bati «Mbega ibyago! Mbega ibyago ubonye, Murwa w’icyamamare! Ubukire bwawe bwari bwarakungahaje abafite amato mu nyanja bose; ariko none dore warimbutse mu isaha imwe gusa!»" 
Revelation18:20 Ishime juru, unezezwe n’uko uyu murwa uridutse. Mwishime namwe abatagatifujwe, intumwa n’abahanuzi, kuko Imana igihe iwuciriye urubanza, yagaragaje ityo ubutungane bwanyu." 
Revelation18:21 Nuko wa mumalayika w’igihangange afata ibuye rimeze nk’urusyo ruremereye, maze arihananturira mu nyanja avuga ati «Babiloni, umurwa w’icyamamare, na yo izahananturwa ityo, kandi ntibazongera kuyibona ukundi." 
Revelation18:22 Ntibazongera ukundi kumva iwawe amajwi y’abacuranzi b’inanga n’abaririmbyi, abavuza imyirongi n’uturumbeti; nta muhanga mu bukorikori ubwo ari bwo bwose uzarangwa iwawe, n’ijwi ry’urusyo ntirizumvikana iwawe ukundi." 
Revelation18:23 Urumuri rw’itara ntiruzabonesha iwawe ukundi, ntibazongera kumva iwawe ijwi ry’umukwe n’umugeni, kuko abacuruzi bawe bari ibikomerezwa by’isi, ubupfumu bwawe bukaba bwarayobeje amahanga yose," 
Revelation18:24 kandi bakaba barasanze iwawe amaraso y’abahanuzi, ay’abatagatifujwe, n’ay’abandi bose bishwe ku isi.»" 
Revelation19:1 Hanyuma numva mu ijuru ibimeze nk’amajwi ahanitse y’inteko nyamwinshi z’abantu, bavugaga bati «Alleluya! Ubucunguzi, ikuzo, n’ububasha ni iby’Imana yacu," 
Revelation19:2 kuko ubucamanza bwayo bukurikiza ukuri n’ubutabera, ikaba yaciriye urubanza rya habara ry’icyamamare ryahumanyaga isi riyiroha mu buhabara bwaryo, kandi igahorera amaraso y’abagaragu bayo.»" 
Revelation19:3 Bungamo bati «Alleluya! None umwotsi waryo uriho uracumbeka uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka.» 
Revelation19:4 Nuko ba Bakambwe makumyabiri na bane hamwe na bya Binyabuzima bine barapfukama, basenga Imana yicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami, bavuga bati «Amen! Alleluya!»" 
Revelation19:5 Nuko ijwi riranguruye rituruka mu ntebe y’ubwami, rivuga riti «Nimusingize Imana yacu, mwebwe mwese abagaragu bayo, namwe abayitinya, abakuru n’abato.»" 
Revelation19:6 Ndongera numva ibimeze nk’amajwi y’inteko nyamwinshi z’abantu, ameze nk’urusumo rw’amazi magari cyangwa umuhindagano w’inkuba zikaze, bavuga bati «Alleluya, kuko Nyagasani Imana yacu, Mushoborabyose, yagaragaje ingoma ye." 
Revelation19:7 Nitwishime, tunezerwe kandi dukuze Imana, kuko igihe cy’ubukwe bwa Ntama cyageze, n’umugeni we akaba yiteguye." 
Revelation19:8 Yahawe kwambara hariri ibengerana kandi itanduye. Koko rero uwo mwambaro wa hariri ni ibikorwa biboneye by’abatagatifu.» 
Revelation19:9 Nuko umumalayika arambwira ati «Andika: Hahirwa abatumiwe mu bukwe bwa Ntama.» Hanyuma yungamo ati «Ayo magambo ni ay’Imana ubwayo.» 
Revelation19:10 Nuko mpfukama imbere ye ngo musenge, ariko arambwira ati «Sigaho, ntubikore! Ndi umugaragu kimwe nawe, kimwe kandi n’abavandimwe bawe, bakomeza ubuhamya bwa Yezu. Imana ni yo ugomba gupfukamira.» Koko rero ubuhamya bwa Yezu ni umwuka w’ubuhanuzi." 
Revelation19:11 Nuko mbona ijuru rirakinguye, maze hasohoka ifarasi y’umweru, Uwari uyicayeho akitwa Umudahemuka n’Umunyakuri, agaca imanza kandi akarwana akurikije ubutabera." 
Revelation19:12 Amaso ye ameze nk’umuriro ugurumana, afite n’amakamba menshi ku mutwe; akagira n’izina ryanditse ritagira undi warimenya, uretse we wenyine." 
Revelation19:13 Yari yambaye igishura cyinitswe mu maraso, kandi akitwa Jambo w’Imana." 
Revelation19:14 Ingabo z’ijuru zari zimukurikiye ku mafarasi y’umweru, zambaye imyambaro yera kandi itanduye." 
Revelation19:15 Mu kanwa ke hasohokamo inkota ityaye, kugira ngo arimbure amahanga. Azayagenga n’inkoni y’icyuma, kandi ubwe azakandagira mu rwengero rwa divayi y’uburakari bw’Imana, Mushoborabyose." 
Revelation19:16 Ku gishura cye no ku kibero cye handitse iri zina ngo «Umwami w’abami n’Umutegetsi w’abategetsi.» 
Revelation19:17 Nuko mbona umumalayika uhagaze mu zuba, avuga mu ijwi riranguruye abwira ibisiga byatambaga mu kirere hejuru cyane, ati «Nimuze, mukoranire hamwe, maze musangire ifunguro ritubutse Imana ibahaye," 
Revelation19:18 murye inyama z’abami, iz’abatware, iz’abanyamaboko, iz’amafarasi n’abayagenderaho, n’inyama z’abantu bose, abigenga n’abacakara, abato n’abakuru.»" 
Revelation19:19 Ndongera mbona Igikoko, n’abami b’isi n’ingabo zabo, bakoraniye kurwanya uwicaye ku ifarasi n’ingabo ze." 
Revelation19:20 Nuko Igikoko gifatwa mpiri, hamwe n’umuhanurabinyoma wakoreraga imbere yacyo ibikorwa bitangaje, akayobya abari barahawe ikimenyetso cy’igikoko, kandi bagasenga ishusho yacyo. Bombi bajugunywa ari bazima mu nyenga y’umuriro ugurumana w’amahindure." 
Revelation19:21 Abandi bamarwa n’inkota yasohokaga mu kanwa k’uwicaye ku ifarasi; maze ibisiga byose birengwa inyama zabo. 
Revelation20:1 Nuko mbona umumalayika wamanukaga mu ijuru, afite mu kiganza urufunguzo rw’ikuzimu n’umunyururu munini." 
Revelation20:2 Afata cya Gikoko, Inzoka ya kera na kare, ari yo Sekibi na Sekinyoma, maze arakiboha ngo kigume ku ngoyi imyaka igihumbi." 
Revelation20:3 Nuko akiroha mu nyenga, arahafunga, arahadanangira, kugira ngo kitazongera kuyobya amahanga, kuzageza ko hashira imyaka igihumbi; ariko hanyuma y’ibyo, kigomba kuzarekurwa igihe gitoya." 
Revelation20:4 Mbona kandi intebe; abaje kuzicaraho bahabwa ububasha bwo guca imanza. Hanyuma mbona abishwe baciwe imitwe, bazize kuba abahamya ba Yezu n’ab’ijambo ry’Imana; mbona n’abanze gusenga Igikoko n’ishusho yacyo, kandi batigeze bashyirwaho ikimenyetso cyacyo ku gahanga no ku kiganza. Nuko bongera kuba bazima, maze bima ingoma hamwe na Kristu imyaka igihumbi." 
Revelation20:5 Abandi bapfuye, bo ntibongera kuba bazima, kugeza ko hashira ya myaka igihumbi. Iryo ni izuka rya mbere." 
Revelation20:6 Abazagira uruhare kuri iryo zuka rya mbere, abo barahirwa kandi ni abatagatifu. Urupfu rwa kabiri ntiruteze kubagiraho ububasha, ahubwo bazaba abaherezabitambo b’Imana n’aba Kristu, kandi bazime ingoma hamwe na we imyaka ibihumbi." 
Revelation20:7 Imyaka igihumbi nirangira Sekibi azarekurwa, ave mu buroko bwe," 
Revelation20:8 maze ajye kuyobya amahanga atuye mu mpande enye z’isi, ari yo Gogi na Magogi. Azabakoranyiriza hamwe kugira ngo bajye ku rugamba: umubare wabo ungana n’umusenyi wo ku nyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Nuko mbona bateye isi yose kandi bagota ingando y’abatagatifujwe, hamwe n’umurwa wakunzwe n’Imana. Ariko umuriro umanuka mu ijuru, maze urabatwika." 
Revelation20:10 Na Sekibi wabayobyaga, arohwa mu nyenga y’umuriro n’ubujeni, aho cya Gikoko na wa muhanurabinyoma bari. Bazababara amanywa n’ijoro, uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka." 
Revelation20:11 Nuko mbona intebe nini yererana n’Uwari uyicayeho. Isi n’ijuru biramuhunga, ntibyongera kugaragara ukundi." 
Revelation20:12 Hanyuma mbona abapfuye, abakuru n’abato, bari bahagaze imbere y’intebe y’ubwami; nuko ibitabo birabumburwa. Habumburwa ikindi gitabo, ari cyo cy’ubugingo; maze abapfuye bacirwa imanza hakurikijwe ibikorwa byabo byanditswe muri ibyo bitabo." 
Revelation20:13 Inyanja irekura abapfuye bayirimo, Urupfu n’Ukuzimu na byo birekura abapfuye byari bifite, maze buri wese acirwa urubanza hakurikijwe ibikorwa bye." 
Revelation20:14 Nuko Urupfu n’Ukuzimu birohwa mu nyenga y’umuriro. Iyo nyenga y’umuriro rero, ni yo rupfu rwa kabiri." 
Revelation20:15 Kandi n’umuntu wese utari wanditse mu gitabo cy’ubugingo, na we yaroshywe muri iyo nyenga y’umuriro." 
Revelation21:1 Hanyuma mbona ijuru rishya, n’isi nshya; koko rero ijuru rya mbere n’isi ya mbere byari byazimiye, n’inyanja itakiriho." 
Revelation21:2 Nuko mbona Umurwa mutagatifu, Yeruzalemu nshya, yururukaga iva mu ijuru ku Mana, yabukereye nk’umugeni witeguye gusanganira umugabo we." 
Revelation21:3 Hanyuma numva ijwi riranguruye riturutse mu ntebe y’ubwami, rivuga riti «Dore Ingoro y’Imana mu bantu! Izabana na bo. Bazaba abantu bayo, Imana na Yo ibane na bo:" 
Revelation21:4 izahanagure icyitwa amarira cyose ku maso yabo, n’urupfu rwoye kuzongera kubaho ukundi. Icyunamo, amaganya n’imibabaro, na byo ntibizongera kubaho ukundi, kuko ibya kera byose birangiye.»" 
Revelation21:5 Nuko Uwicaye ku ntebe y’ubwami aravuga ati «Dore ibintu byose mbigize bishya.» Hanyuma arongera ati «Andika yuko aya magambo ari imvaho kandi akwiriye kwizerwa.» 
Revelation21:6 Nuko arambwira ati «Birarangiye! Ni jyewe Alufa na Omega, Intangiriro n’Iherezo. Ufite inyota wese, nzamuha ku buntu kunywa ku isoko y’amazi y’ubugingo." 
Revelation21:7 Uzatsinda azatunga ibi ngibi ho umurage, kandi nzamubera Imana, na we ambere umwana." 
Revelation21:8 Naho abanyabwoba, abahemu, abakora ibizira, abicanyi, amahabara, abarozi, abasenga ibigirwamana, n’ababeshyi bose, umurage wabo uri mu nyenga igurumana y’umuriro kandi yuzuye amahindure. Ngurwo urupfu rwa kabiri.»" 
Revelation21:9 Nuko haza umwe muri ba bamalayika barindwi bari bafite inkongoro ndwi, zuzuyemo ibyorezo birindwi by’imperuka, maze arambwira ati «Ngwino nkwereke umwari, umugeni wa Ntama.»" 
Revelation21:10 Ubwo njyanwa buroho ku musozi munini kandi muremure, maze anyereka Umurwa mutagatifu, Yeruzalemu, yururukaga iva mu ijuru ku Mana." 
Revelation21:11 Wararabagiranaga, wisesuyeho ikuzo ry’Imana ubwayo, ububengerane bwawo bwari bumeze nk’ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye, mbese nk’ibuye rya yasipi ibonerana." 
Revelation21:12 Uwo murwa wari uzengurutswe n’inkike nini kandi ndende, ukagira amarembo cumi n’abiri, kandi kuri ayo marembo hakaba abamalayika cumi na babiri, n’amazina yanditseho: ayo mazina ni ay’imiryango cumi n’ibiri y’Abayisraheli." 
Revelation21:13 Mu burasirazuba hari amarembo atatu, mu majyaruguru amarembo atatu, mu majyepfo amarembo atatu, no mu burengerazuba amarembo atatu." 
Revelation21:14 Inkike zikikije uwo murwa zari zubatse ku mfatiro cumi n’ebyiri, zanditseho amazina y’intumwa cumi n’ebyiri za Ntama." 
Revelation21:15 Uwamvugishaga yari afite igipimisho cy’ikibingo cya zahabu, kugira ngo apime umurwa, amarembo yawo n’inkike yawo." 
Revelation21:16 Uwo murwa wari ufite impande enye zingana, uburebure n’ubugari bwawo bikareshya. Nuko umumalayika awupimisha cya kibingo, ugira amasitadi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, kandi uburebure bwawo, ubugari n’ubuhagarike bireshya." 
Revelation21:17 Hanyuma apima n’inkike zawo, zigira imikono ijana na mirongo ine n’ine, ukurikije igipimisho cya muntu umumalayika yakoreshaga." 
Revelation21:18 Inkike zari zubatswe n’amabuye ya yasipi, naho umurwa wubatswe na zahabu iyunguruye kandi ibonerana nk’ikirahure." 
Revelation21:19 Ku mfatiro z’inkike y’umurwa, hari hometseho amabuye y’ubwoko bwose bw’agaciro gakomeye. Urufatiro rwa mbere rwari rwubakishije amabuye ya yasipi, urwa kabiri amabuye ya safiri, urwa gatatu amabuye ya karisedoni, urwa kane amabuye ya emerodi," 
Revelation21:20 urwa gatanu amabuye ya sarudoni, urwa gatandatu amabuye ya korinaline, urwa karindwi amabuye ya kirisolite, urwa munani amabuye ya berili, urwa cyenda amabuye ya topazi, urwa cumi amabuye ya kirizoparasi, urwa cumi n’imwe amabuye ya hiyasinta, urwa cumi n’ebyiri amabuye ya ametisita." 
Revelation21:21 Amarembo uko ari cumi n’abiri yari akozwe mu masaro cumi n’abiri, buri rembo rikozwe mu isaro rimwe. Naho ikibuga cy’umurwa kikaba zahabu iyunguruye, mbese nk’ikirahure kibonerana." 
Revelation21:22 Ariko rero nta Ngoro nabonye muri uwo murwa, kuko Ingoro yawo ari Nyagasani nyirizina, Imana ishobora byose, hamwe na Ntama." 
Revelation21:23 Uwo murwa ntukeneye izuba cyangwa ukwezi kugira ngo biwumurikire, kuko umurikirwa n’ikuzo ry’Imana kandi na Ntama akaba urumuri rwawo." 
Revelation21:24 Amahanga azagenda ayobowe n’urumuri rwawo, n’abami b’isi bazawuzanire ikuzo ryabo." 
Revelation21:25 Amarembo yawo ntazigera yugarirwa bibaho, kuko aho hantu hatarangwa ijoro." 
Revelation21:26 Bazawuzanamo ikuzo n’icyubahiro by’amahanga," 
Revelation21:27 ariko icyanduye icyo ari cyo cyose ntikizinjira muri uwo murwa; kimwe n'umuntu wese ukora amahano cyangwa se ubeshya. Uzinjirwamo gusa n’abanditswe mu Gitabo cy’Ubugingo cya Ntama. 
Revelation22:1 Hanyuma anyereka uruzi rw’amazi y’ubugingo yaboneranaga nk’ikirahure, rwavubukaga ku ntebe y’ubwami y’Imana no ku ya Ntama." 
Revelation22:2 Rwagati mu kibuga cy’umurwa no hagati y’amashami abiri y’uruzi, hari igiti cy’ubugingo, kikagira imisaruro cumi n’ibiri, buri kwezi kikera imbuto, kandi amababi yacyo agakiza amahanga." 
Revelation22:3 Umuvumo ntuzongera kubaho ukundi. Intebe y’ubwami y’Imana n’iya Ntama bizahora muri uwo murwa, n’abagaragu bayo bayisenge." 
Revelation22:4 Bazahora barangamiye uruhanga rwayo, n’izina ryayo ribe ku gahanga kabo." 
Revelation22:5 Nta joro rizongera kubaho ukundi, kandi nta n’uzakenera urumuri rw’ifumba cyangwa urw’izuba, kuko Nyagasani Imana azasakaza urumuri rwe kuri bo, maze bakazima ingoma uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana iteka." 
Revelation22:6 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Aya magambo ni imvaho kandi akwiriye kwizerwa; kuko Nyagasani, Imana yabwirije abahanuzi, yohereje umumalayika wayo kugira ngo yereke abagaragu be ibigomba kuzaba bidatinze." 
Revelation22:7 Ngaha rero ndaje bidatinze! Hahirwa abakurikiza amagambo y’ubuhanuzi buri muri iki gitabo.» 
Revelation22:8 Jyewe Yohani, ibyo narabyiyumviye kandi ndabyibonera. Aho mariye kubyumva no kubibona, napfukamye imbere y’umumalayika wabinyerekaga, kugira ngo musenge;" 
Revelation22:9 ariko arambwira ati «Sigaho, ntubikore! Ndi umugaragu kimwe nawe, kimwe n’abavandimwe bawe b’abahanuzi, n’abandi bose bakurikiza amagambo ari muri iki gitabo; Imana ni yo ugomba gupfukamira.»" 
Revelation22:10 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Amagambo y’ubuhanuzi buri muri iki gitabo ntuyagire ibanga, kuko igihe cyayo cyegereje." 
Revelation22:11 Umugiranabi nakomeze agire nabi, n’uwanduye akomeze abe mu bwandure, ariko n’intungane nikomeze ikore neza, umutagatifu akomeze yitagatifuze." 
Revelation22:12 Dore ngiye kuza bidatinze, kandi nje mfite ibihembo nateganyije, kugira ngo ngororere buri muntu nkurikije ibikorwa bye." 
Revelation22:13 Ni jyewe Alufa na Omega, Uw’ibanze n’Uw’imperuka, Intangiriro n’Iherezo." 
Revelation22:14 Hahirwa abamesa amakanzu yabo, kugira ngo bagire uburenganzira ku giti cy’ubugingo, kandi ngo binjire mu murwa banyuze mu marembo yawo." 
Revelation22:15 Kuko ab’imbwa n’abarozi, n’amahabara, n’abicanyi, n’abasenga ibigirwamana, n’umuntu wese ukunda ibinyoma kandi ubikoresha, abo bazahera hanze." 
Revelation22:16 Jyewe Yezu, nohereje umumalayika wanjye kugira ngo ababwire ubu buhamya bugenewe za Kiliziya. Ndi inkomoko y’umuryango wa Dawudi; inyenyeri yakirana mu rukerera.»" 
Revelation22:17 None Roho n’umugeni baravuga bati «Ngwino!» Ubyumvise na we navuge ati «Ngwino!» Ufite inyota naze, n’ushaka naze ahabwe ku buntu amazi y’ubugingo." 
Revelation22:18 Ni jyewe ubihamya mbwira umuntu wese wumva amagambo y’ubuhanuzi buri muri iki gitabo. Nihagira ugira icyo yongeraho, Imana izamwongerera ibyago byanditswe muri iki gitabo!" 
Revelation22:19 Nihagira kandi ugira icyo agabanya ku magambo ari muri iki gitabo cy’ubuhanuzi, Imana izavanaho umugabane yagombaga kubona ku giti cy’ubugingo n’umwanya mu murwa mutagatifu, uko byanditswe muri iki gitabo!" 
Revelation22:20 Uhamya ibyo ngibyo aravuga ati «Koko, ngiye kuza bidatinze!» Amen, ngwino, Nyagasani Yezu!"
